chapters.title: Chapter 1: :Technology Library
chapters.body:
Chapter 1: :Technology Library

Lightning illuminates the rain curtain, passing through the transparent window, letting the library's bookshelf flash with lightning. The savage rain, suffocating, let this white season, a little more cool.

Chen Mo shuttles between the bookshelves of the library, and his eyes are constantly searching for books to be found on the bookshelf.

At the corner, suddenly, Chen Mo felt a pain in his nose. A faint scent of scented into the tip of the nose, let Chen Mo slightly stunned.

A few steps back from the nose, Chen Mocai saw the person who hit, a girl.

Dark black hair, simple low pony tail, two dragons in front of the forehead, bangs, will blend gentle and elegant temperament. White T-shirts and ultra-short jeans, slender legs exposed to the air, combined with the faint wildness of the breath, people never tired of it.

The eyes are bright and soft, the skin is fair, and I can't say that I am a beautiful girl, but it is definitely the most comfortable girl he has ever seen.

delicate and pretty.

This is the first thought that Chen Mo’s mind came out.

Realizing that he wanted to be partial, Chen Mo returned to God: "Sorry."

"It doesn't matter." The girl licked her forehead and smiled at Chen Mo and turned away.

Looking at the girl's back, Chen Mozhen was hit by the sour nose, but the faint scent left on the tip of the nose, so that Chen Mo could not help but emerge the girl's appearance.

With his head in his head, Chen Mo continued to look around the bookshelf. It didn’t take long before he saw the girl just now.

The two men smiled and passed by. The aroma of the nose was so that Chen Mo couldn't help but look back at her back.

Rumble! A huge thunderbolt fell over the library, accompanied by undulating screams.

The girl was also shocked by the sudden loud noise, and the back was shocked. Chen Mo also felt the heart twitch, and the neck shrank involuntarily.

The screams just fell, and in the bookshelf next door they heard loud noises.

Suddenly, Chen Mo’s hole narrowed, and he saw that the bookshelf on top of her head had slowly fallen.

"Be careful."

Chen Mo did not say anything, rushed up and rushed to the girl.

Hey! Chen Mo only felt that something had smashed his head, and the girl hugged the girl with his hands and fell out. He only felt the familiar scent of the nose.

"Someone knocked down the bookshelf..."

"There are classmates who are suppressed and come to help."

"call the ambulance."

......

A pain in the head was uploaded, which made Chen Mo’s consciousness a bit embarrassing. Before he lost consciousness, he still heard the noisy voice coming from the library.

I don't know how long it took, Chen Mocai gradually recovered consciousness.

Just looking up, I found a golden gate that was hundreds of meters high. All kinds of incomprehensible words on the gate, the symbols fill the entire door, thick and simple. Falling in the eyes of Chen Mo, it seems very strange.

Was it not caught in the bookshelf?

What is this?

Ghost door off?

A series of questions filled his head, and Chen Mo stayed at the door. When the hand touched the door, it suddenly opened, and the white light shone from the inside, drowning him in the endless light.

The radiant scatter, Chen Mo raised his head.

Centered on him, the shelves of hundreds of meters high are arranged in layers, and you can't see the end. On the bookshelf, books of different thicknesses are neatly arranged and vast.

Looking at the tall bookshelf, Chen Mo's eyes are blank, like standing in the middle of a huge library, lost ants.

What is this? Is this the Hell Library or the Paradise Library?

Is it in the library that was killed in the library, will it appear in the library of heaven?

Chen Mo thought with enthusiasm, and when he returned to God, he set his sights on a huge library. Even the library of the giants is not so big.

"anyone there?"

Chen Mo whispered, but did not receive any response.

"Someone?" Strong courage, Chen Mo shouted at the library.

"Someone?"... "Man?"...

No one responded, only the echo that drifted away, his eyes fell in the middle of the library.

In the middle is an ordinary mahogany table with a book on it. The book cover is dark red, simple, heavy, and under close look, the dense formulas, symbols, and letter combinations are arranged to form complex dark lines.

There are five hot stamps on the book cover: the Science and Technology Library.

Science and technology library?

Chen Mo hesitated, and opened the pages of the book, a blank.

Oh...

Chen Mogang wants to continue to explore, a light curtain hangs from the sky above the library, and a figure appears in the open space behind him.

An old man, wearing a gray robe, his hair gray, his face with wrinkles, his eyes full of wise light, smiling, kind and kind, like the grandfather of his neighbor.

"Old man, hello, what is this?" Chen Mo hesitated and asked, the old man, does not look like a bad person.

"Isn't that written above? Lucky child." The old man spoke and smiled at Chen Mo.

“Technology library?” Chen Mo pointed to the cover of the book.

"Yes, there are countless civilized technologies here, called the Science and Technology Library." The old man looked at the endless bookshelves to the rear.

Chen Mo hesitated to go to the bookshelf, and after seeing the books on the bookshelf, his eyes flashed incredible.

"Quantum Portal", "Super Alloy", "Gene Editing and Artificial Man", "Artificial Intelligence", "Ultra-Dimensional Mathematics", "Anti-Substance Extraction Technology", "God Particle Stabilization and Use Technology", "Human Potential Development Drugs", "Super-power Awakening Method and technology"……

Bookshelf up to 100 meters, all of which are various technical books. Covers all high-tech fields such as physics, chemistry, biology, computing, mathematics, information, medicine, and military.

Inside, every book is a technology. Any technology he sees, put it into reality, can definitely be both fame and fortune, endless wealth, at your fingertips.

How much technology is there in this technology library? Chen Mo turned to look at the depths of the library that could not be seen at the end, and his heart was shocked.

After returning to God, Chen Mo reached out to take the book and grabbed the empty hand. Only then did he find that these bookshelves did not seem to be in his time and space and could not be touched.

I caught a few more times, or I caught the air.

No matter how hard he tried, he couldn't touch all the bookshelves and could only pass through it.

"Old man, am I dreaming? Why can't I get these books?"

Chen Mo smiled, this is a golden mountain in front of him, and he can only watch, can not take. The farthest distance in the world is no more than this.

"Children, not dreaming." The old man pointed to the dark red book on the table: "When you write your name on it, you will become the new owner of the technology library."

Chen Mo walked back to the table, hesitated for a few seconds, picked up the black feather pen next to the book, and wrote his name on the title page.

Just wrote the name, the hand flashed a trace of golden light, and then dimmed.

"Chen Mo."

A loud voice rang out over the library, and Chen Mo couldn't help but look up, only to find that there was nothing left.

"Don't look for it, this is the library's identity." The old man saw Chen Mo's appearance and smiled: "From now on, you are the owner of the library."

The words of the old man made Chen Mo’s face smile. He found that there might be an adventure.

"Old man, what should I call you?" Chen Mo asked.

"I am the guardian of the technology library. I don't have a name. You can call me an administrator, or you can call me whatever you want." The old man looked at Chen Mo, and the more he looked, the more satisfied he was.

"That's how it works. You are the administrator here. I am sure to read the books. The book is like Shu. I want you to be old."

"I didn't expect that I also had a name." The old man smiled heartily: "Let's follow you."

"Shu Lao, I am now the owner of the library, can I get the book?" Chen Mo could not wait to go to the bookshelf.

"You try." Shu old laughed.

Chen Mo’s hand caught on the shelf and his face became depressed, but he still couldn’t get it.

“Why can’t I get these books?”

"The authority is not enough." Shu Lao shook his head: "You just have a library, the authority is just [trainee], high-level technology, you can't get it."

"Low-level can take?" Chen Mo immediately seized the focus.

"Yes, your authority is [trainee]. Every month, you can only pick a book at random, at the apprentice level. This is the beginning, you are free to choose one."

“What are the trainee levels?”

"In the book, look at it yourself." Shu Lao pointed to the dark red book on the table.

chapters.title: Chapter 2: : Low-Level Human Potential Development Technology (New Book For Collection, For Recomme
chapters.body:
Chapter 2: : Low-Level Human Potential Development Technology (New Book For Collection, For Recomme

Chen Mo put his gaze on the dark red book on the table and walked over and gently opened it.

really!

The dark red book has been able to open the second page, and the book can't be opened before the signature.

Seeing the record on the book, Chen Mo’s eyes condensed.

Every page has a brief introduction to the technology, and it seems that Chen is dazzled.

"Computer virus killer code", field: computer, permission level: trainee; product introduction: kill most computer viruses, malicious code, malicious programs.

"Soft Ceramic Material Formulation and Technology", field: Chemistry, physics, privilege level: trainee; Product introduction: Lightweight, non-conductive, high temperature resistant, ceramic material with certain ductility, suitable for ordinary car casing, mobile phone casing, computer casing Wait.

"American Formula", field: biology, chemistry, authority level: trainee; product introduction: topical, whitening skin, suitable for cosmetics, pregnant women available, not edible.

"Low-level lithium battery technology", field: physical, chemical, authority level: trainee; Product introduction: an ordinary lithium-ion rechargeable battery.

......

A variety of technologies, involving various fields, only the level of authority, are trainees, and do not see the technology of higher authority.

Even so, it is enough to shock. The above technology is released enough to renovate the world's technology and technology.

Seeing so many technologies, Chen Mo is entangled, which one to choose.

Any kind of here can bring him a lot of wealth. There are too many dishes, but I don't know which one to eat.

"Shu Lao, do you have any suggestions?" Chen Mo looked at Shu Lao.

“Let me give you advice?” Shu Lao said: “A lot of technology here can bring you wealth?”

"Yes, a lot of wealth." Chen Mo nodded.

"Do you think that money is important or important?" Shu old asked again.

"Body." Chen Mo did not hesitate to answer.

There is more money, no healthy body, everything is over the eyes. Everyone knows this truth.

"Shu old, you won't ask me not to choose, let me go out for a workout?"

"Ha ha ha... you talk a little bit." Shu Lao laughed: "I asked this question, come up with a technology and release it to the market, such as this lithium battery technology, you have not studied it? Suddenly put Go out, others ask you how the technology came, what do you say? Stealing?"

Shu old's words, let Chen Mo nodded slightly.

"There are people who are sinister. If you take the technology out, others will block it and steal it. Conversely, if you steal technology, what do you do? You are an ordinary person, you have no right to be powerless, can you keep it?" Said.

"No."

Chen Mo shook his head. He really didn't doubt Shu Lao's words. Sometimes life is more **** than TV dramas.

"So, keep a low profile, and build a thin hair." Shu Laoyu said with a heavy heart: "Is this supposed to be your national culture?"

"What should I do? How do I choose?" Chen Mo asked.

"Two methods, first, you choose a technology that can make money, don't let go in a short time, learn the technology in this area, precipitate it for a while, then find a chance to release it. Second, you choose one yourself now. Available technology."

"Which can be used?" Chen Mo turned over the book, his face was depressed, too much technology, many similar, he did not know which one is best.

“It’s good for the body.” Shu old mysteriously said: “Looking at the technology of biological science, there is this “Low-level human potential development technology.”

Following the guidance of Shu Lao, Chen Mo quickly turned to the catalogue of taxonomy and found the technology that Shu Lao said.

"Low-level human potential development technology"; field: biology; authority level: trainee; product introduction: develop the basic potential of the human body, improve human vitality, immunity, strength, agility, tolerance, toughness.

"The development of human potential, do not need to say it? The most advanced version of this technology, when the most powerful, can develop the body's greatest potential, with super power. The most powerful people, can destroy the planet, and even more Horror," Shu said.

"Oh..." Chen Mo’s eyes were round and he was shocked by Shu’s words: “Isn’t that a little different?”

"No difference, shuttle space, immortality, flying in the sky, moving mountains and reclamation. These myths and legends, science is achievable."

Shu Lao looked at the deepest part of the library and looked deep.

"The supreme realm of science is theology."

“Is there any technology in the technology library?” Chen Mo swept the bookshelf with his eyes in his eyes. These things are almost dreams of life, otherwise history will not have so many myths.

Mythology is the human desire for immortality and strength.

"Yes." Shu old nodded: "If you want to take it, you must have the highest authority of the technology library. But you don't have to think about it for a while, I just draw a cake for you. Those things are not only a hundred thousand miles away from you. Think about your current situation. "Low-level human potential development technology", this is what you can use right now."

Chen Mo thought about it. As Shu Lao said, this potential development technology is indeed the book he is most likely to come in handy.

Develop your physical potential, learn a little martial arts, and don't have to be in the library, the consequences of being stunned by bookshelves.

Heroes save the United States, but not every time as lucky as this time.

"Just choose it."

"Is it OK?" Shu Lao said.

"Determining, the body is fundamental." Chen Mo said: "The technology to make money sooner or later, not rushing for a while."

Shu Lao nodded with satisfaction, his palms were five fingers, and a light fell from the library. A book appeared in his hand.

The book exudes a shimmer, a bit like a holographic projection.

Shu Lao’s book in his hand was gently photographed on Chen Mo’s head. Chen Mo’s head was shocked, and a huge amount of information appeared in his mind, engraved in memory.

"After this time, do I have to take technology next month?" Chen Mo asked while thinking about the human potential development technology.

"Not necessarily. You go out to study science and engineering books, technology. Every 100 books, you can get a technology. Until you see 1000 copies, you can rise to the next level of authority." Shu Lao said.

"1000?" Chen Mo almost blew a blood out.

What is the concept of 1000 science and engineering books? Ordinary people can't see 200 books for a lifetime. 1000 copies? Isn't this terrible?

“Is it difficult to upgrade the conditions?”

"It's not as hard as you think. Your current head is different from ordinary people. It's a super brain. The science and technology library is not for you to sit on the mountain. You have to keep learning and you have higher authority." The old saying goes.

"Understood." Chen Mozhong focused on the head.

"Well, you have been in a coma for a while, you should go out. For a long time in a coma, it is not good for your body." Shu Lao said: "If you come in later, open the book, I will come out."

"How come out?" Chen Mo looked around and did not see the exit.

"Close the book." Shu Lao pointed to the dark red book.

Chen Mo reached out and closed the dark red book, and Shu Lao’s body slowly disappeared. In the center of the library, in front of the table, a three-meter-high door with golden light emerged.

A black vortex is suspended in the middle of the light door, and the blue light of the stars rotates. It is a bit like a space-time portal in a science fiction movie. Chen Mo walks to the light door and looks back at the library and steps into the golden door.

chapters.title: Chapter 3: : Small Fishing
chapters.body:
Chapter 3: : Small Fishing

Binhai People's Hospital. Chen Mo was shocked and opened his eyes in the bed, his eyes stunned.

Everything just was a dream?

Chen Mo felt a slight pain in his head. He found that there seemed to be a memory in his mind, which is the information of "Low-level Human Potential Development Technology".

Is the science library real? Chen Moyi, closed his eyes again.

The 100-meter-high gate appeared again in front of him, white light drowned him, and Chen Mo appeared in the familiar library.

Can not see the end of the bookshelf, Shushan Shuhai.

Not dreaming!

Exiting from the technology library, Chen Mo’s face was filled with joy. The smell of disinfectant water was introduced into the tip of the nose, allowing Chen Mo to return to God and turn his head to look around.

This is the ward, the head still has a bit of pain, touched and found a drum kit. After pressing it, it hurts to let Chen Mo breathe.

Suddenly, Chen Mo felt that the right hand sent a heavy feeling. Looking at the arm, I found a girl who was kneeling on his arm and slept.

The girl in the library?

Chen Mo recognized it at a glance, that is, he was in the library and rushed to the girl who was holding it.

He didn't move, for fear of awakening the girl, let her kneel on it. Listening to the girl's figure, at this moment, his long-closed heart appeared a little swaying.

After a while, Chen Mo did feel the movement of his arm. Looking at the arm, I just saw the girl looked up at him.

"You are awake." The girl hurriedly let go of Chen Mo's arm and his face was shy.

"Yeah." Chen Mo smiled and nodded. "How long have I been in a coma?"

"Fast three days, the doctor said that you have a slight concussion, it is no big problem. Thank you for saving me in the library."

"No need to."

Chen Mo glanced at the girl's tired face and felt a little distressed: "Have you been here to take care of me for the past three days?"

"Yeah." The girl nodded shyly. "Your teacher has seen you. The doctor said that you are not serious. I wake up after a while, so I didn't inform your family, lest they worry, let me take care of you."

"Thank you." Chen Mo's eyes softened.

"This is what it should be, you have saved me once." The girl said: "My name is He Xiaoyu, the fisherman's fishing, you can call me a small fish."

"My name is Chen Mo, silent silence."

The two men were opposite each other, and the little fisherman’s face became more rosy and he was at a loss for a moment.

Oh...

The voice of the stomach protested to break the subtle atmosphere, and the little fisherman smiled. Chen Mo’s face turned red and a little embarrassed.

"You have been playing glucose for the past two days, have not eaten anything, I will buy some food for you." Xiao Yu got up and left.

Chen Mo looked at the disappointing stomach, hated the iron and did not become steel, and later called you hungry.

Not long after, Xiaoyu came back with a bag: "You just woke up, you shouldn't eat something too greasy, I will buy you a bowl of porridge. If it is not enough, I will buy it again."

"Thank you." Chen Mo reached out and tried to pick it up, only to find that the left hand was still inserted with a hanging needle.

"I will feed you."

Xiao Yu picked up the spoon and put a spoonful of spoon on Chen Moutou. The gentle movement makes people feel like a girlfriend is taking care of a boyfriend.

Chen Moxin was happy, but I did not expect this treatment.

Xiao Yu gave a spoonful of spoonfuls of porridge, and Chen Mo saw the eyes of the buddies who had envied the next door, and his heart was dark.

The eyes of the two men came together from time to time, and the face of Xiao Yu was blushing.

This is the first time to take care of a person of the opposite sex, and it is still three days in a row. Rubbing the body, the massage is her own hands, so it will be so tired.

The nurses thought they were related.

But Chen Mo saved her, and her family did not come, she could only take care of her. Thinking of these three days, Chen Mo’s body touched it all over, and Xiao Yu would not dare to look directly at his gaze.

After feeding Chen Mo to eat the porridge, Xiao Yu took out a stack of red hair grandfather from the bag and handed it to him.

"The thing in the library is that a girl was scared by thunder and accidentally knocked down the bookshelf. The girl came to be modest, this is the medical bill he paid for you, 10,000."

"Okay, let's put it. You are so tired, go back to rest first." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu's tired eyes and felt a little distressed.

Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo, didn't know what he was thinking, after a while, he nodded and stood up with a bag.

"Are you coming in the afternoon?"

"Well," the little fish caught in the footsteps, the ears were a little rosy, and finally slammed and stalked away.

Seeing the back of Xiao Yu’s departure, Chen Mo lost his heart, and the smile of his mouth floated, and he could not wait to jump from the bed.

Judging from the reaction of Xiao Yu, he knew that there was a chance. For a long time, there was no feeling of heart, and Xiao Yu made him feel this way.

The hero saves the beauty, and also gets the goodwill of the beauty. The old bridge is happening to him.

After the happy, Chen Mo lay back on the bed, thinking about the development of the human potential.

In the afternoon, Xiaoyu arrived as scheduled.

Chen Mo has also recovered, check the body again, and make sure that there is no problem before leaving the hospital.

"Let's go have a meal. I haven't eaten for three days, so I have to reward myself." Chen Mo said, touching his stomach.

"I invite you, you saved me, it is a small reciprocation." Xiaoyu stood next to Chen Mo, slightly restrained, and remembered the scene of taking care of Chen Mo these days, she felt guilty.

"No, I invite you, thank you for your three-day care." Chen Mo took out the money at noon: "The girl's compensation is a bit more. Go back and you will return the money to her. She is also a student, all of them are flower family. Money, since it is an accident, it is enough to give medical expenses."

Chen Mo handed the rest of the money to Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu looked up at Chen Mo, took the money in his hands, looked at his eyes, and changed a little.

After a simple meal, Chen Mo asked Xiao Yu to watch a movie. Chen Mo feels that the distance between the two is slowly drawing invisibly.

After sending Xiaoyu back to the dormitory, Chen Mo went back to the dormitory alone.

I am very lucky today. I got a technology library and met a nice girl. He felt that his future was bright.

After returning to the dormitory, I found that the wolves in the dormitory did not come back and lay directly on the bed.

Not long after lying down, the mobile phone WeChat rang. The information of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo can't wait to open, he feels that his life, from today, has become wonderful.

"The money has been returned to the girl, she told me to say sorry to you."

"Nothing, maybe I should thank her and make my life more exciting." Chen Mo immediately replied: "Is it free tomorrow?"

"Tomorrow's weekend, I went to the library and took a three-day leave to replenish my homework."

"Exactly, I also want to go to the library, let's go together."

Chen Mo smiled, but he really wanted to go.

Shu Lao said that studying science and engineering books and technology, 100 books, can take a technology. He must learn and must go up in order to get higher privileges.

"Okay, I am going at eight in the morning. You just left the hospital today and have a rest early."

In the female dormitory, Xiao Yu put down the mobile phone, his eyes were shy, and his mouth was still hung with joy. Suddenly, the mobile phone in his hand was taken away, and a face with a smirk reached out to the small fisherman.

"Small fish, your eyes contain spring water, your face is full of peaches. Leave three days to take care of your hero, is there a good thing?"

"No, no... no." Xiaoyu has some guilty conscience: "You return the phone to me."

"Hey, you are guilty." The girl smiled: "The hero saves the bridge, but it is very classic. Let me see your message."

"Li Ruoxuan, you will return the phone to me." Xiao Yu immediately grabbed the girl and desperately grabbed the phone.

"I should thank her and make my life more exciting. At 8 o'clock tomorrow morning, the library, you have to rest early. The best cabbage in our family is going to be arched."

"Ah, if you die, please return the phone to me."

......

In a female dormitory of Binhai University, there was a lot of noise.

chapters.title: Chapter 4: : Super Brain? (New Book, Seeking Collection, Seeking Recommendation.)
chapters.body:
Chapter 4: : Super Brain? (New Book, Seeking Collection, Seeking Recommendation.)

Chen Wei, a male dormitory in Binhai University, dropped his mobile phone and smiled on his face. Today will be the luckiest day of his life.

After losing the phone, Chen Mo picked up a high book and opened it.

Suddenly, his eyes condensed.

In the book, the obscure formula quickly became clear in his head.

After ten pages, he still clearly remembers the formula, theorem, and even the problem-solving process of each page.

what happened? Never forget?

Chen Mo suddenly remembered the words of Shu Lao, his current head, unlike ordinary people, is already a super brain.

Chen Mo quickly turned back to the first page of the book and couldn't wait to look down. He read books very quickly, almost ten lines, and read a page in less than half a minute. The above formulas, theorems, and various explanations and analyses are all engraved in his mind. Even if I close the book, it is still very clear.

Chen Mo twisted his arm and it hurt, not a dream.

In my heart, Chen Mo continued to read the book. He is very fast, not half an hour, has seen half of the book.

Leibniz formula, Lagrangian median theorem, Cauchy mean value theorem, Gaussian formula...

Even if you only look at it once, the formulas, theorems, and the guidelines of the book are all clear. Not only that, but the variants of those formulas can quickly come to mind.

There has never been a moment, and it is so simple to learn high numbers.

Chen Mo took the color and continued to look. An hour later, Chen Mo turned to the last page and closed the book. The dense formula theorem flashed through his mind, and he even remembered which page the formula was on.

Chen Mo is ecstatic.

The mathematics that once made him suffer is not so difficult to understand at this time. At this point he found that learning did not seem so difficult.

Putting the higher mathematics well, Chen Mo picks up the ordinary physics next to him and continues to struggle. Chen Mo seems to open the desire to learn. The door of hope, immersed in learning can not extricate themselves.

When Chen Mo read the book, several people came in from outside the dormitory. After seeing Chen Mo, a few people were weird, and when he saw him reading a book, his face was wonderful.

"Is this kid stupid by the bookshelf?" said a fat man headed.

"I look like." said Liu De, who was wearing glasses next to him.

The other three people also nodded.

The five people whispered and pulled Chen Mo out of the book. After seeing the fat man and others, they closed the book.

"When is it coming back?" The fat man said: "I just heard that a beautiful woman is taking care of you, and you are not awake, we have no intention to bother you, is it okay?"

"It's okay." Chen Mo was warm.

"Chen Mo, what book are you reading?"

Tall and thin, looks like a bamboo raft, just walked to him, and after seeing the physics in his hands, his face was strange: "Chen Mo, are you irritated?"

"The bamboo raft is right, don't scream, don't scream, say it, the old man guides you, squats in your heart, and is not good for your health." The youngest boy in the dormitory said. His name is Puyuan, and he is called Puyuan Master.

"Wool, what can I do? You still have to enlighten your ‘female donor’.”

"Ha ha ha ha..."

A few people burst into laughter and were able to say this, indicating that Chen Mo is really fine.

"Chen Mo, I heard that the girl you saved, took care of you for three days. Is such a good girl, did you take it?" The fat man slammed into Chen Mo's ear with a look of gossip on his face.

Thinking of the appearance of a small fisherman, Chen Mo’s mouth with a smile.

"Well, I understand."

The fat man took a slap in the face of Chen Mo’s shoulder and smiled and sat back to his position: “Comrades, in order to celebrate the return of the heroes of our dormitory, let’s open a black one.”

"Don't you have a night out?"

"The next time I call the chicken, we have just got out of the waves and can't eat it."

"How do I hear it a bit strange?"

......

Five people turned on the computer to log in the game, and Chen Mo continued to focus on the book.

The next day, Chen Mo got up and dragged his body to get up. When he finished washing, he went to the library. I was too fascinated to read the book last night, and I read the course majored in the university. I ended up sleeping at two o'clock.

Today is the first date with Xiaoyu. If you don’t go to sleep, I’m afraid it’s gone.

When I came to the library, Chen Mo looked at the shelf where the accident happened. It was cleaned up and restored.

Pick up a book of Chinese medicine illustrations and pharmacological analysis on the shelf and go to the study area.

In the morning of the library on the weekend, there are not too many people, and more people are sleeping late. Looking around in the self-study area for a week, Chen Mo will choose a corner to sit down and enter the learning state.

Not long after, Chen Mo felt that there was movement around him. When he turned around, Xiao Yu had already sat down beside him. The two did not agree on which specific floor, but did not expect to tacitly choose the first layer of this encounter.

"Is there any discomfort in your body?" Xiao Yu glanced at him.

"No." Chen Mo shook his head slightly.

“Do you study medicine?” Xiaoyu refers to several books on Chinese medicine and pharmacological analysis.

"When you are in a whim, you want to know."

Chen Mo's answer, let Xiao Yu's gaze blink, suddenly think of something, his face is reddish, focus on the book.

Inside the library, I fell into silence again.

Chen Mo’s attention is on the books, and his eyes are focused. The same kind of drug illustrations crossed in his mind, and he was completely in his mind about the introduction and role of drugs.

The reason for his view of the Chinese medicine illustration is very simple. It is necessary to clarify the types of drugs in the potential development technology. In order to use the drug, the name of the drug must be clarified, because the above description of the technology is different from the name here.

He has the potential to develop technology and want to mobilize potential. But he currently has no technology and instruments, and it is impossible to extract the pharmacy, only through the most primitive method. .

Chen Mo's reading speed is also accelerating, ten seconds a page, but the name and efficacy of the drug, he is in mind.

In the dead library, except for the slight human language from outside, only he turned the book.

Not long after, Chen Mo felt that the atmosphere was a bit wrong. He looked up and saw that there was a girl opposite him.

The girl is wearing a short skirt and her skin is fair. It is a big beauty, but she lacks the delicate atmosphere of Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu’s face was ruddy at this time, and he looked at the girl and looked nervous.

"Hello, my name is Li Ruojun, Xiao Yu's girlfriend."

Chen Mo is not a big guy, but self-confidence, calm temperament, fascination, how many people do not have this temperament. At this moment, they all have a little envy.

Xiao Yu will hand over two computers to Chen Mo.

"This is mys. This one is awkward. The information of my accountant is in it. If I can recover it, I can recover it. I can't recover it. Even if I can, I will reinstall a system."

"Complete recovery, there are rewards." Li Ruoxi smiled: "I will tell you the last information."

"Don't listen to her."

Xiaoyu immediately stopped Li Ruoxi and worried that she would be betrayed again.

"I am watching the blackmail virus." Chen Mo said: "I try my best to get it for you as soon as possible."

After taking over the computer of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo looked at the three women: "Xiaoyu is in trouble in the dormitory, you have to take care of her. Please feel free to contact me."

"Yes, let's go first, you continue to whisper." Li Ruoqi took the two women back to the dormitory, leaving Xiao Yu and Chen Mo.

“Is there a reward?”

Chen Mo smiled and smiled at Xiaoyu. Just now Li Ruoxi and others were there. He didn't open his mouth. Don't worry now.

"When you fix it, let's talk."

Xiao Yu lost the next sentence and hurried back to the dormitory.

Chen Mo returned to the rental house with two computers. The computer screen was still a black iron door and a huge iron lock, which looked mysterious.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo lay back on the bed and entered the technology library.

chapters.title: Chapter 9: : Eternal Heart (New Book, Seeking Collection, Seeking Recommendation.)
chapters.body:
Chapter 9: : Eternal Heart (New Book, Seeking Collection, Seeking Recommendation.)

Still a hundred meters high bookshelves stand out, can not see the end. Only in this kind of scene will you feel that knowledge is endless.

Chen Mo went to the desk and opened the dark red book. Shu Lao’s figure instantly appeared in the library.

Shu Lao looked at Chen Mo and nodded slightly.

“It’s still hard work, so I’ve read 100 books so quickly. Now you have the opportunity to extract a technology, do you want to extract now?”

"Shu Lao, I want to ask, is there any computer anti-virus software here, can you kill the ransomware?" Chen Mo asked.

If he studies, he will certainly be able to research anti-virus software, but the time is too long, he has that energy, it is better to use these time to read books, in exchange for technology.

"Which kind of ransomware?" Shu old asked.

"It's outside, on the two computers on my desk." Chen Mo said.

Shu old closed his eyes, after a while, a little finger. In the sky above the science library, drop a huge light curtain.

On the light curtain, it is the lock screen of the ransomware virus.

"Is this the case?" Shu asked.

"Yes."

"Checking this kind of computer virus is very simple, you can solve it." Shu Lao said: "Now give you two choices, one is that you are free to choose an anti-virus software technology, and the other is that I will give you the virus code, you yourself Designing anti-virus programs. As a cost of trading virus code, you are free to choose the right to technology and change to random selection."

"Shu Lao, are you testing me?"

"You can think so." Shu Lao said: "I said at the beginning, the Science and Technology Library, is not for you to sit on the mountain, or there can be so many books."

Shu Lao pointed to the bookshelf that could not be expected.

"Then the second one." Chen Mo said.

After reading nearly a hundred books on computer technology and hacking techniques, plus the source code of the ransomware virus, he believes that he can design antivirus programs without taking too long.

It's just that this random selection technique is a bit mysterious. He doesn't have anything at all. If he randomly gives him the technology he doesn't use or the technology that is very tasteless, then he can only wait for the next time. It is time to rely on luck.

"Not bad."

Shu Lao nodded, his finger to the light curtain, a dense code, listed above. Then the light curtain shrank and became a book that fell into the hands of Shu, and he was pressed by Chen Mo's head.

The dense code is engraved in Chen Mo's mind, and the root of the blackmail virus is also clear in Chen Mo's mind.

Various ideas are intertwined in my mind.

"When you design the program to kill the virus, come over and choose the technology, maybe there will be unexpected gains at that time." Shu Lao said with deep meaning.

After withdrawing from the technology library, Chen Mo sat back in front of the computer. With the source code of the virus, the next thing becomes much simpler.

He now has an idea, but this idea has yet to be verified by the program.

When I turn on the computer, Chen Mo starts to type the code.

......

The incident of ransomware attack at Binhai University was quickly transmitted to the Internet. In this information age, events spread throughout the country in the shortest possible time.

The appearance of this news seems to blow the horn of the attack.

The major universities in China have also been reported to be attacked by blackmail. The colleges and universities that were attacked, the circle of friends and the forum were mourning.

The virus is called 'Eternal Heart' and is a variant of the blackmail virus 'Eternal Blue'.

Same as last time, mainly through email attachments, phishing URLs, downloading URLs, users downloading virus files on malicious sites, and spreading web pages.

The difference is that if it is opened, the virus will infect the regional network of the computer, and then spread throughout the region, and the ability to spread is greatly enhanced.

The last time the ransomware appeared, it was just the lock file, the lock video and the hard drive data. This time, the entire computer system was directly locked, and it was impossible to log in to the desktop of the computer.

The main scope of the domestic ransomware variant ‘Eternal Heart’ attack is still major universities and companies. Spread through the university's regional network and corporate network.

Many colleges and universities have closed the campus network to avoid the campus network being infected with the 'eternal heart'.

The virus is still spreading and can't stop it.

More and more computer viruses have appeared, and the Internet is hot, and there is concern about coexistence. The Internet has also become cautious, and I dare not just click on some URLs and unknown software.

This time is a variant of the ransomware virus. It is better than the last time. The loopholes have been patched up, and the speed of transmission is much faster than last time. In a short period of time, it has spread.

After the last blackmail virus crisis, another computer virus crisis swept the world.

All news media put the blackmail virus on the front page.

"Huaxia has closed virtual currency trading, what is the computer virus? 》

"The Blue Variety of Eternity: The Eternal Heart?" Has infected nearly a million computers. 》

The price of Bitcoin continued to rise due to the influence of the 'Eternal Heart'. 》

......

On the Internet, various reports were overwhelming, and in Europe, the first discovery of the eternal heart of the new ransom virus variant, Europe was almost affected.

The whole of Europe is bleak. The main scope of this attack is stock trading centers, banks, government departments, universities, energy companies, subway systems, corporate companies, supermarkets, etc.

The European stock exchange was forced to stop, causing the stock market to be in chaos. There are also many banks whose computers are attacked, ATM machines cannot withdraw money, and banks cannot conduct business normally.

The UK's national health care system has once again suffered, and the computer systems of all its hospitals have been infected, resulting in the inability of some rescue and ambulances to be dispatched.

In just one day, ‘Eternal Heart’ has spread to the Middle East, South America, Oceania and Southeast Asia.

With the spread of the 'eternal heart', the extortion virus officially evolved into a global viral crisis. This ransomware variant is several times more horrible than the last viral crisis.

Worldwide, millions of computers have been infected with viruses and locked. If you reinstall the system, all the data in the computer will be lost.

Many people's important information is still in the computer, certainly can not reinstall the system, and is still waiting for a solution.

Affected by the ‘Eternal Heart’, Microsoft’s stock plunged 2% and its market value evaporated by nearly $11 billion.

The US Federal Bureau of Investigation has also filed a case for hacking organizations that produce variants of ransomware on a global scale.

Finding the source of the ‘Eternal Heart’ spread, they soon discovered that this was the result of careful planning by senior hackers several months in advance, and it is still impossible to check.

Many network security companies also issued warnings for the first time to remind users not to open problematic emails.

Various measures and various reports are overwhelming.

Five days have passed, and ‘Eternal Heart’ has infected more than one million computers.

Many network security companies can only give precautionary advice, but there is no real anti-virus software that can kill the ransomware.

The first batch of infected computers was left in a few days. If it is not possible to find a way to kill the virus within two days, all the data in the computer will be destroyed.

Many people have been desperate, and they have started paying hackers virtual currency such as bitcoin and getting a key to unlock the computer.

Since the last blackmail virus outbreak, people have seen regulatory loopholes in virtual currency such as bitcoin, providing a way for money laundering, transfer of funds, tax evasion and other crimes.

After the first virus crisis, China's market regulators gradually closed the trading platform of virtual currency.

This virus crisis has made it impossible for domestically infected computers to make a 'redemption'.

Some people can only pray at the last moment, the way to kill the virus, otherwise all the important information in their computer will be lost.

chapters.title: Chapter 10: : Unlucky?
chapters.body:
Chapter 10: : Unlucky?

In the library, Chen Mo’s finger hit the keyboard and his face showed a relaxed smile.

After five days of hard work, he failed three times. Finally, he was cheeky and asked Shu Lao to ask some questions. Shu Lao asked him questions and did not hesitate to explain to him.

Under the slight guidance of Shu Lao, Chen Mo quickly found the key points and knew that the anti-virus program was perfected now.

The eternal heart has erupted for five days and was finally completed today.

Chen Mo can't wait to put the anti-virus program into the u disk and insert it into the small fishing computer.

Still the mysterious iron gate and big lock, there is still 40 hours of countdown. After 40 hours, if you do not unlock, the information in the computer will be destroyed.

When I saw the flashing light of the u disk flashing, Chen Mo knocked on the keyboard a few times.

"Retrieving virus, completed: 1%..."

A hint jumped out of the screen to make Chen Mo happy.

After two minutes, after the value jumps to 100%, the computer screen lights up and the familiar windows desktop is restored. Everyone does not know that in the library of Binhai University, Chen Mo has solved the ransomware that threatens the world.

"A little bit of a card."

Chen Mo uses the mouse to refresh it on the desktop.

However, I think that Xiao Yu is not proficient in the computer, and everything is placed in the C drive, and the computer card is normal. However, Xiaoyu’s computer desktop is very neat.

"Really a little card, go back and ask for advice from Xiaoyu, help her manage the computer."

Chen Mo thought, the mouse clicked on the desktop a few times, but the mouse stopped stuck in a video, there was no movement at all.

"Ah... a library..."

Sudden screams, resounding through the library’s self-study area, the source of the sound is the computer in front of Chen Mo’s eyes.

Chen Mo’s eyes were round and horrified. When he saw the picture of the computer screen, he almost blew a blood out.

The entire self-study area looked at him with a stunned look. Some girls' faces are red, and looking at Chen Mo's eyes is extremely weird.

Without saying anything, Chen Mo hastened to cover the computer screen and his face is red.

"This buddy is so eager to come to the library to see the action film of the island."

"My grandmother didn't help, I took him."

"Old iron 666..."

"Ha ha ha..."

Many people in the study area held their laughter, their face flushed, and finally they got a stomachache and laughed on the table.

The laughter of the entire self-study area, all sorts of weird eyes, Chen Mo almost did not hit his head on the table. This time, the shame was lost, and he couldn’t think of dreams. On the computer desktop of Xiaoyu, there was actually such a movie.

"I can't stay here."

Chen Mo rushed to install two computers back to the backpack and got up and left. Just out of the library, just a small fishing out of the library.

He did not say anything, grabbed the hand of Xiao Yu, and quickly left.

"What happened?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Let's wait."

Chen Molian wanted to laugh at himself. He didn't expect to kill a poison. There is such a thing. This is the most embarrassing thing he has encountered. The two came to the pavilion resting on the lake, and Chen Mocai stopped.

"The computer virus has been killed." Chen Mo took out the computer, and smiled and handed it to Xiaoyu.

Xiao Yu hesitated, open the computer.

"Ah...ah..."

The screams and wheezing came out in the computer. Before I saw the picture, I let the little fish face suddenly turn red. From the root of the ear to the neck, I almost threw the computer in my hand.

Hurry to cover the computer, Xiao Yu red face, do not dare to see Chen Mo.

The most worrying thing is still happening.

"The movie, that night, if you yell at them..."

After hesitating for a while, Xiao Yu told Chen Mo about the whole movie. She knows that Chen Mo has already discovered it and must explain it. Otherwise, she is too shy to lift her head in front of Chen Mo.

"You didn't look at it, but you have suffered." Hearing Xiao Yu's explanation, Chen Mo's face stunned.

"You watched? Is it okay?" Xiao Yu asked with a red face.

For the first time, she said such an explicit topic in front of the opposite sex, although the person in front of her eyes is her own boyfriend.

"I was in the library study area just now, the computer was stuck. I accidentally opened it. The sound is still so big. The people in the self-study area have heard that many people have already laughed and hurt."

"Ha ha ha..."

Xiao Yu smiled disregarding the image, and the kind of picture, the brain filled it, it felt funny.

"You still laugh, I lost a lot, how can I compensate me?"

Xiao Yu held back his smile and looked at Chen Mo with a blush, biting his lip, and kissed him close to his face and quickly retracted.

Chen Mo’s mood is refreshing, all depressed, and disappears instantly.

"Come on again." Chen Mo pointed at his face with a chuckle.

"Don't make trouble."

Xiao Yu blushes and slaps Chen Mo, this is the first time she has taken the initiative to kiss a different sex.

"The kind of thing happened in the library just now, the computer didn't shut down, just closed, the movie was still playing, and there was sound when I opened the lid."

Chen Mo knocked on Xiao Yu’s computer with a bad taste. "If you want to see it, just open the lid, but remember to wear headphones, or you will be heard again."

Xiaoyu’s face turned red in an instant, and the computer was thrown back to Chen Mo: “Help me delete it.”

"Can delete, can come again." Chen Mo smiled.

"You delete it and say it."

Chen Mo took the notebook and opened the computer screen directly. The voice of ecstasy came out from the computer again. Fortunately, there is no one here, otherwise it will make trouble.

Xiao Yu’s face is not too long, and his face is red.

"I am worried that you are being ruined in the dormitory." Chen Mo closed the video and deleted it before returning the computer to Xiaoyu.

"Thank you." Xiao Yu took over the computer and saw that the documents were all complete, and he was relieved.

"Come on actual action."

After Zhou Wei’s computer also killed the virus and helped the small fisherman to sort out the computer, he sent the Xiaoyu back to the dormitory.

After returning to renting a house, Chen Mo put things in and entered the technology library.

At the beginning, Shu Lao said, as long as the killing program is made, you can go in and randomly select a technology, and the program is now complete.

Enter the book that opens the dark red, and Shu Lao appears again.

"finished?"

"finished!"

"Yes, faster than I thought, now I want to randomly pick a technology?" Shu asked.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded. The purpose of his coming in was for this.

"Let's get started."

Shu Lao is a little bit free, in the sky above the library, drop a circle of light curtains, shrouded the central area. On the light curtain, it is dense, and the books arranged like tiles begin to rotate.

Seeing so many books crazy rotation, Chen Mo has a heart stunned and stares at it. Rotating to the end, only the only book left in midair, slowly falling into the hands of Shu Lao.

"Ultra-thin sanitary cotton production process"

Seeing the book in the hands of Shu Lao, Chen Mo’s face turned red and almost burst out of blood. At this point he wanted to cry, then chose, did not expect to choose such a technology.

Sure enough, random selection is a pit.

I have had a joke in the library today. This time again, is it so bad today?

Shu Lao saw the thoughts in Chen Mo’s heart at a glance.

"Congratulations, hahaha..." After seeing the book, Shu Lao smiled.

Hearing the laughter of Shu Lao, Chen Mo is like an eggplant that is frosted, and the whole person is not good. Thousands of technologies, how to choose this. Even if you choose one that you can't use for a while, you can do it.

Chen Mo squinted and wanted to cry without tears: "Shu Lao, can you change one?"

"No." Shu old shook his head: "Don't?"

"Yes, why not?"

Chen Mo immediately jumped up, don't want to be white, even if he didn't use it, he could make money by selling this information and selling it to a company that specializes in production.

After giving the technology to Chen Mo, Shu Laocai once again said: "Remember what I said last time? Designing a killing program and then looking for me, there will be unexpected gains."

"Remember." Chen Mo immediately got up and said: "Is there any unexpected technology?"

chapters.title: Chapter 11: : Sell Anti-Virus Programs!
chapters.body:
Chapter 11: : Sell Anti-Virus Programs!

Seeing Chen Mo's appearance, Shu Lao is not in a hurry, turning his head and pointing to the giant bookshelf that can't see the end.

"How do you feel about these technologies?"

Chen Mo pondered: "It should be the former library owner, creating accumulation."

“The answer is half right. Many of them are created by the owners. They put the technology they created into the library. This way is technology sharing.”

"What do you mean by saying that I have to put the technology I created into the technology library? For example, the procedure for killing the ransomware?"

"Wrong, not, is willing, willing, voluntary. Are you willing to share your technology products with the library?" Shu Lao said.

"Technology sharing? Willing."

Chen Mo nodded without hesitation. Even if it was mandatory, he did not complain. Now he is the owner of the technology library.

"Yes, Not Bad."

Shu Lao pointed to the light curtain in midair, such as ant-like code, which appeared on the light curtain quickly.

Chen Mo sees very clearly, that is, he designed the program code to kill the ransomware.

Under his gaze, the light curtain turned into a book and flew into the depths of the technology library. Then, a light curtain landed in the hands of Shu Lao to form a book.

"This is a reward for your sharing of technology." Shu old book was placed in front of Chen Mo.

"Smartphone operating system source code and development"

After seeing the book, Chen Mo showed ecstasy. Sure enough, it was an unexpected gain, I didn’t expect to share technology, and there was such a reward. He could almost see that another mobile phone system appeared in his hands.

After seeing this technology, Chen Mo’s all the depression was gone and disappeared without a trace.

"It’s a lucky kid." Shu Lao said: "In order to encourage technology sharing, the technology sharing and the technology won will be better than the shared technology. Your kid is a little lucky, actually got this, just to use it, Still higher than a grade."

"That is that, since I met Shu Lao, my luck is very good." Chen Mo smiled.

"Do you want to talk about your little girlfriend?" Shu old looked at Chen Mo's mind at a glance: "When I got the technology, I didn't see you saying good luck?"

"The same, the same, almost at that time." Chen Moxiao smiled.

"take it."

Shu Lao’s book in his hand was taken into Chen Mo’s head.

......

Coming out of the technology library, Chen Mo also had a pleasant smile. This time I made a big profit and got the source code of the mobile phone system. As long as it is operated properly, the money is basically a number.

But now there is no money.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo went to the computer to open Weibo and found the official Weibo of Qihu Company. Hesitating, he edited a message and sent it to the mailbox.

Without the mailboxes of those responsible for the company, he can only use this method to contact, and he can't go black into the network security company, then he will force.

It is now at the peak of the ravages of eternal heart. On a global scale, no one has ever studied the software that kills the eternal heart, but he has it here.

He is not a good person, this is in exchange for the right to free choice of technology, at first he is ready to use anti-virus software to earn the first bucket of gold.

It is just right now.

After the information was sent, Chen Mo began to type the code. The source code of the smartphone system, which will be his next product, just happens to be able to enter the Internet field.

......

There are several Weibo operators in Qihu Company, and Lang Yumeng is one of them.

The flourishing development of Weibo is also a channel for some enterprises to release news. If there is demand, it will give birth to this new type of occupation.

At this time, Lang Yu Meng was on the side of the computer, and was browsing the Weibo news. As a microblogging operation specialist, she is the cute girl behind the official Weibo.

The netizens summed up their work: they had done the design, wrote the copy, and caught the hot spot; they talked about the current events and pulled the laces; they got the content, they got the comments, and they sold the Meng;

Sometimes when you see interesting comments, they will reply.

Recently, after the outbreak of the "Eternal Heart" blackmail virus crisis, their network security companies are the focus of attention. Weibo comments are ten times more than usual.

As a microblogging operation specialist, during this time, they were exhausted. As a cute girl, dark circles were given to them.

Suddenly, Lang Yumeng grabbed the mouse in his hand and his eyes fell on a message.

"Silent ants?"

Lang Yumeng looked at the message and immediately began to feel the spirit. He looked hesitant. Just as the office director came over, she immediately made up her mind.

"Director, you have come to see this Weibo news." Lang Yumeng pointed to the computer screen.

Wang Yu heard Lang Yumeng's voice, stopped and walked toward her. The microblogging operations specialist, generally no major event, will not bother him as the director of the office.

Going to the computer and seeing the news of Lang Yumeng, Wang Yu’s eyes were condensed and his look became cautious.

"You print out the screenshot of this message."

Not long after, Wang Yu took the printed paper and walked into the president's office. If this news is true, it will matter.

"Zhou Zong, this is a message on Weibo, I feel that it matters, I will report it to you." After Wang Yu entered the president's office, he handed the printed paper to Zhou Hongwei.

"Ok?"

After seeing the above content, Zhou Hongwei's eyes condensed, followed by flickering. Hesitated, or open the mailbox and enter the email address.

Now at the peak of the ‘Eternal Heart’ raging, their company’s cybersecurity team is looking for ways to kill the ransomware day and night.

He is also always concerned about the progress. So far, there has been some progress, but there is still a long way to go from cracking the eternal heart. After all, the things that senior hackers are painstakingly planning are not so easy to fix.

But now suddenly a person emerged, saying that he has studied the procedure of cracking the 'eternal heart', which has to be taken seriously.

The other party contacted him, apparently wanting to sell the cracking program to him to talk about the transaction. If you get the crack method, then their company is definitely a fame and fortune.

"Hello, I am Zhou Hongwei, the president of the Seven Tigers. I have already seen your message. Are you saying that the procedure for cracking the 'Eternal Heart' is true? I want to see it in person..."

After the edited mail was sent out, Zhou Hongwei began to stare at the mailbox and waited.

Chen Mo, who is typing the code, immediately stops the action in his hand and opens the email after seeing the email prompt. After seeing the content, he reveals a smile.

Unexpectedly, the news he gave was answered.

After opening the mail, Chen Mo directly entered his phone number and sent it back to Zhou Hongwei.

Zhou Hongwei, who is watching the computer, sees the phone call and smiles. He immediately dials the phone number on the mailbox.

"Hello, I am Zhou Hongwei." Zhou Hongwei said after the call was connected.

"Hello, Zhou Zong, my name is Chen Mo. Is there any interest in the software I have researched?" Chen Mo smiled after connecting the phone.

"Of course, I am interested." Zhou Hongwei said: "Can you send the program installation package to us for testing?"

"In the face test, come to the coffee shop at the front door of Binhai University and turn right 800 meters. I will contact me. I am going to interview. If I am afraid that I will lie to you, I can contact you for thousands of degrees or penguins." Chen Mo said.

"Well, I am now, let's meet and talk." After Zhou Hongwei hung up his mobile phone, he immediately stood up from his seat and looked at the assistant: "Xiao Liu, book a ticket, and prepare to go to Binhai."

chapters.title: Chapter 12: :Transaction
chapters.body:
Chapter 12: :Transaction

Zhou Hongwei’s movements were very fast. At about 5 pm that day, he rushed to the coffee shop Chen Mo said. After receiving the call, Chen Mo brought the computer and information and immediately went to the coffee shop.

it is true.

Seeing that the second computer was back to normal, Zhou Hongwei sighed and leaned back in the chair.

This scene means that the eternal heart that has swept the world has been cracked, and it is the youth who is too young to be seen.

"Mr. Chen is so young, still studying? Students at Binhai University?" Zhou Hongwei asked.

"This is not very important?" Chen Mo smiled.

“It really doesn’t matter.” Zhou Hongwei said with a smile: “This program was developed independently by Mr. Chen? Is it really young and promising, are you interested in entering our company?”

"There is no such plan for the time being." Chen Mo did not humble and said: "Go into the subject."

Zhou Hongwei carefully looked at Chen Mo. This young man, his temperament and talk, is much stronger than the young people he has ever seen. He is definitely a rare talent.
