"Not much, 80 million."

hiss……

When Chen Mo’s price came out, the people he heard were taking a breath of air and looked at him with surprise.

"Mr. Chen, will this price be a little higher?" Zhou Hongwei laughed.

"If it's too high, then forget it." Chen Mo shrugged and took the u disk back into his backpack: "I am going back to contact the penguins, maybe they will be interested."

"Mr. Chen, don't worry." Zhou Hongwei immediately stopped Chen Mo: "Your price is really a bit high. Contact Penguin, they will not give you this price."

“Don’t try to know?” Chen Mo said: “The eternal heart is indirectly causing billions of dollars in losses in the world.”

"This way, a price, 10 million, technology transfer to me, now sign the contract." Zhou Hongwei said.

"That's all right." Chen Mo said: "At present, no anti-virus method has been found in the world. If your company first releases software that can kill the "Eternal Heart", fame and fortune, I have already lost this price."

"Thirty million, this is the bottom line." Zhou Hongwei said: "The number of computers infected around the world is only nearly one million. Our company does not make money."

"Word of mouth and reputation, this is the key, Zhou will not be so superficial?" Chen Mo said: "If you don't want to, then I contact other companies. This program should make the penguin or the market value of thousands of degrees rise a lot."

Zhou Hongwei did not expect Chen Mo to be young and so slippery. But this anti-virus program can really make their company fame and fortune, especially at the global virus crisis.

If the program is given to the opponent, their company will lose an opportunity.

"To tell the truth, we don't necessarily have 80 million profits from your program."

"70 million, no more." Chen Mo said.

"Wait, 60 million." Zhou Hongwei said: "We released a free program that could not make much profit."

"You are free, nothing to do with me, you can also charge." Chen Mo got up and was ready to leave.

"Wait, 70 million, the deal." Zhou Hongwei immediately spoke.

“This is contract and technical information.”

Chen Mo sat back in his seat and took out a u disk and two contracts from the computer bag and placed them in front of Zhou Hongwei.

Seeing what was already prepared, Zhou Hongwei stunned. This young man seems to have guessed from the beginning that they will give in.

Let the lawyers next to the contract carefully read the contract and make sure that there is no problem before they look at Chen Mo: "I didn't expect the young people in China to have such a good one."

"Over-the-counter awards, this program, accidentally made out, is luck."

"Ok?"

Zhou Hongwei unexpectedly said Chen Mo to make such a set, so that he was speechless. The virus that has no solution in the world falls in his hands and says it is luck. No one believes when he says it.

"If you have no problem, sign the contract." Chen Mo said.

"can."

After signing the contract, Zhou Hongwei also transferred money to Chen Mo on the spot.

After seeing the transfer success, Chen Mo smiled. This is his first bucket of gold, earned by his own hands.

Even if you deduct personal income tax back, there are still more than 56 million. Chen Mo is still thinking about how to spend the money.

"Cooperation is enjoyable." Chen Mo and Zhou Hongwei shook hands: "I have deleted the program information here. Your information is an orphan. Remember to back up, I will go first."

"Don't eat a meal?"

"No, come back and contact."

After bidding farewell to Zhou Hongwei, Chen Mo left the coffee shop with his books.

"Return the program back to the technical department, call them to inform them, bind the code of the anti-virus program to the guards, and prepare to update the guards."

After Zhou Hongwei told the assistant, he looked at the door that Chen Mo left and fell into meditation.

At 7:00 that evening, a message was posted by Qihu Weibo.

Seven Tigers has researched the process of killing the 'Eternal Heart' and is currently undergoing final emergency processing. Upon completion, it will be released as soon as possible, as always, free of charge.

When the news came out, it immediately caused a sensation in the online world. The Weibo of the Seven Tigers also attracted praise and recognition from countless netizens.

"Historical and striking similarities, the Seven Tigers have found the program software to kill the 'Eternal Heart', and a computer housekeeper is still releasing news about playing games."

"Conscience business, I will change the anti-virus software now."

"This time I support seven tigers."

......

This incident is also unswervingly on the headlines of the major media.

Everything comes without warning.

The current ‘Eternal Heart’ is a hot topic. The news of the Seven Tigers was quickly discovered by the media and spread throughout the country in a very short period of time.

At the time of the news release, some TV stations that were broadcasting live news also urgently inserted the latest news. This news was also posted to foreign social networking sites in the shortest possible time.

The entire online world is boiling.

The ransomware incident of the 'Eternal Heart' is almost the biggest kidnapping in the online world. Worldwide, there are nearly a million computers with viruses. Mainly concentrated in government departments, energy companies, railway companies, banks, hospitals, universities, trading venues and other important areas.

The event has been almost seven days, and unless you reinstall the system, you can't get rid of the 'eternal heart'. But reinstalling the system means that all the data in the computer will be lost, which is impossible for some people to accept.

The news released by the Seven Tigers is undoubtedly a tonic. Those who are ready to pay ransom to hackers have stopped to wait for Qihu to release anti-virus programs.

chapters.title: Chapter 13: : Ending
chapters.body:
Chapter 13: : Ending

The next day, in the hope of many people, the seven tiger official website updated the security guards. You only need to download the security guards. When you find the eternal heart virus, you will be reminded and killed.

The locked computer only needs to download the anti-virus software to the u disk and insert it into the infected computer to automatically unlock the computer screen.

This news made all the media excited and spread the news in the first place.

Seeing the news of mobile news push, Zhang Hai was ecstatic.

Yesterday I heard that Qihu Company has researched anti-virus programs. I didn't sleep last night, I was waiting for the update of the Seven Tigers company today.

In his computer, there are his engineering drawings. After the virus, he wants to redesign and can't finish it.

It is necessary to submit the manuscript today. If the manuscript is not handed in, the work will be difficult to protect.

Now my wife has just produced and needs money everywhere. Unemployment at this time will be a huge blow to him.

The hard waiting for one night was finally updated.

Zhang Hai has a feeling of wanting to cry.

Trembling, landing on the next computer on the seven tiger official website to download the guards. Just after downloading, he couldn't wait to insert the u disk with the guards into a computer locked by an iron door.

According to the instructions, knocked on the keyboard a few times, seeing the picture being shot, Zhang Hai's face is difficult to cover the excitement.

Two minutes later, when I saw the familiar computer screen, Zhang Hai burst into laughter.

Really effective.

A few days of fear, finally passed. After pulling the engineering design drawing into the u disk, Zhang Hai rushed to the company for the first time.

This scene was staged in various corners, and many important manuscripts were saved because the guards of the Seven Tigers were renewed.

Many people are so weeping that some important documents and research materials are placed on the computer. It will be destroyed in a half day, and the guards of the Seven Tigers will pull them back from despair.

After the update of the Seven Tigers Security Guards, there have been hundreds of thousands of updated users in just half an hour. Not long after, on Weibo, the process of killing the ‘Eternal Heart’ was carried out.

Seven tiger company's anti-virus software, once again on the hot search, the trend to occupy the headlines of the major news headlines. The name of the Seven Tigers spread throughout China.

With the exposure of major news media, the number of security guards is also steadily increasing.

The updated Seven Tiger Security Guards appeared on some foreign websites and forums in less than half an hour. Within an hour, the software downloads more than a million.

Anti-virus software, also on the headlines of national media, is almost free advertising.

Not long after, on social media such as Facebook and Twitter, major companies, exchanges, and hospitals that were invaded by viruses issued a thank-you letter to Qihu.

Qihu Company has earned enough attention, word of mouth has risen, and the number of users has also risen rapidly. In the computer anti-virus software, the market share is also increasing, together with the addition of other software, browsers and other products.

This situation, let the seven tigers high-level glad, the wise decision to spend money to buy anti-virus procedures.

The virus crisis that swept the world came to an end in just one day.

The virus crisis has been resolved, but the security personnel in various countries are following up on hacker organizations.

The first blackmail virus outbreak swept the world, and now the second blackmail virus outbreak is more horrible than the last time.

Before this hacker prevented it from being found out, no one would say if it would be the third time that the ransomware crisis would break out.

Although this virus crisis is larger than the previous one, the hacker organization behind it is more tragic than the last one. The scale is large, but those companies don't compromise with them. Last time there was a revenue of more than 100,000 US dollars, this time less, but 100,000.

The biggest beneficiary of this virus incident is Qihu Company.

But there is another beneficiary.

As a nephew, Qihu Company deliberately concealed it. Only a few insiders knew that the person who really solved the virus crisis was a young man in Binhai.

Inside the gym.

Chen Mo wore a glove and sweated, and the sandbag in front of him seemed to mourn under his fist.

The virus crisis incident seems to have nothing to do with him. He just didn't want to make a big splash in this matter, he would choose to sell the program to Qihu Company.

During this time, coming to the gym is a must for him every day. After the potential development, he is here to adapt to the power.

It has been almost half a month and now it has adapted to the strength of the body.

Chen Mo also trained for a period of time to initially control the fighting skills.

He feels strong now, but no one does it, he doesn't know how strong. After training for a while, I stopped and wiped the sweat from my forehead.

Looking at the time, Chen Mo’s eyebrows picked up and hurriedly packed up and rushed back to rent.

Simply taking a shower and putting on a more comfortable T-shirt and slacks, Chen Mo rushed to the dormitory area on a bicycle.

This weekend, I made an appointment with Xiaoyu and went out shopping.

It’s been the first time to compare a formal date with Xiaoyu’s relationship.

I used to spend it in the library, making him feel a little owed. Now that things are just coming to an end, Chen Mo is also ready to relax and spend some time with Xiao Yu.

Just riding a bicycle to the dormitory area, just happened to meet the small fishing and went downstairs.

"Almost late." Chen Mo stopped in front of Xiao Yu.

His eyes fell on the little fisherman, and his eyes lit up. Today's small fishing, obviously deliberately dressed up.

A touch of makeup, elegant floral skirt, long hair tied up, two front dragons bangs.

It may have grown up on the beach since childhood, and Xiao Yu has a faint wildness that no other girl has. This wild temperament and her unique gentleness, the two temperament in her body perfectly combined, quiet and elegant, temperament and exquisite, people never tired of.

Chen Mo was found staring at her, and the little fish face was a bit rosy.

This is their first real date. Although she has been with her for some time, she is still a little nervous. To this end, he also deliberately took out the collection of skirts, and was also ridiculed by several people.

However, seeing Chen Mo’s reaction, she was also happy in her heart.

"I am going to put my bicycle, wait for me here." Chen Mo said back to God.

"You don't have to let go." Xiao Yu called Chen Mo: "Take me out on a bicycle."

"Is this not good?" Chen Mo said.

"Nothing, I want to see the night view of Binhai." Xiaoyu said: "Can you?"

"Yes." Chen Mo immediately agreed.

Xiao Yu walked down to the back seat of the bicycle and sat down, extending his right hand around his waist. Feeling the waist and the temperature behind him, Chen Mo showed a smile.

"Sit well?" Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Xiao Yu said with a skirt.

"Then go."

In Binhai University, where the night has just fallen, there are two more dogs.

"Rely, unfair, I also have bicycles, why aren't there such beautiful girls sitting behind me?"

"Life is a winner, I have never met such a good girl."

"The silk also has spring."

"This is the legendary sitting behind the bicycle and laughing, watching the girl's appearance, very happy and satisfied."

On the school road, looking at the figure of the two, all the envious eyes of hate. Mainly the small fish sitting behind the bicycle is too eye-catching and attracts a lot of attention.

In the eyes of various eyes, the two left the University of Binhai.

chapters.title: Chapter 14: :Danger?
chapters.body:
Chapter 14: :Danger?

At night in the coastal city, the sky is gray, and under the neon light, the night sky seems to be shining with colorful colors. All kinds of brilliant door plaques on the street are particularly eye-catching in the light.

If there is no, elegant melody, from the street club, let the street under the night, full of romantic colors.

Xiao Yu slammed Chen Mo's waist and leaned on his body with a sweet smile on his lips.

This is a feeling that has never been seen before. When Chen Mo was holding her in the library, her heart was a little bit swaying.

Until Chen Mo boldly grabbed her hand, she acquiesced to all of this, and finally took the courage to take Chen Mo's hand.

The two determined the relationship for more than half a month, most of the time, spent in the library. Just holding hands, never hugged, Chen Mo is not active, she naturally has to be reserved.

The most intimate move was that she took the initiative to kiss Chen Mo last time.

That time she still had the greatest courage.

This time, for the first time, she leaned on Chen Mo, a feeling of peace of mind, as if the sky had fallen, there would be a shoulder for himself.

"Chen Mo, tell me about your past," said Xiao Yu.

"before?"

"Yeah, have you ever talked about love?" Xiao Yu asked: "I want to know you."

"This, all passed, really want to say?" Chen Mo was not sure.

"Let's say, don't worry about me being jealous, I am not a vinegar jar." Xiao Yu said with a smile: "Talk to me about your glorious history and let my girlfriend know about you."

"There was a period." Chen Mo said: "It was later divided."

"how long?"

"Two years." Chen Mo's gaze became deep, with a hint of emotion in his tone: "Several points combined, the last time she proposed to break up, I have never seen it again, four years from now."

"Do you remember her?" Xiao Yu's tone was a bit sour.

"Let's go down early."

Chen Mo’s back is hairy, and the woman said that she is not jealous, it must be a lie.

"Since I saw you, I felt that you are destined for me."

"You used to be such a girlfriend?"

"There is no such thing. I said this for the first time. The last time I met you in the library, I felt that. When I saw the bookshelf squatting down, I wouldn’t hesitate to rush it. Your impulse. I thought I was dead."

"Count you to pass."

When Chen Mo said the library, Xiao Yuguang became gentle. The process of meeting the two people is indeed dramatic, and perhaps it is the fate of the world.

"What about you? Have you ever talked about love?"

When I heard Chen Mo’s question, Xiao Yu showed a bad smile: “Yes, I have talked three times.”

"No?" Chen Mo was sour.

"You don't look at my natural beauty, the school chasing me, can be discharged from the podium to the back of the classroom." Xiaoyu still has a smile on his face.

"Can you tell me about your business?" Chen Mo tasted.

"Cheat you, stupid." Xiao Yu smiled: "There are a lot of people chasing me, but they have been rejected by me. Now it is my first love."

"You actually learned to lie." Chen Mo smiled: "Is it if they teach you bad?"

"Have she not told you? I am a kitten, my character is a bit wild. I have more unexpected things in the future, don't be fooled by my gentle appearance." Xiao Yu laughed.

"Well, I feel falling into a trap."

"what did you say?"

"Tender trap." Chen Mo hurriedly said: "If you say you will be spoiled, sprinkle a look for me."

"Think of beauty."

All the way to laughter, unconsciously, the two have already arrived on the street near the shopping plaza. After stopping the bicycle, Chen Mocai and Xiao Yu strolled around the street near the shopping plaza.

"Go, go there and see what you want, I will send you." Chen Mo said.

"No." Xiao Yu shook his head: "You can go shopping, you give it to me, or use your family's money. Wait until you make money, then give it to me."

"I……"

" Needless to say, I will send you later, I promise not to be polite with you, buy you to go bankrupt." Xiao Yu interrupted Chen Mo's words, holding his hand and walking slowly on the shopping street.

Looking at Xiao Yu’s appearance, Chen Mo’s eyes were soft.

"Little fish, I have something to tell you."

"You said."

"I……"

"Ah... robbery! Grab him." Chen Mogang wanted to speak, and a woman's exclamation interrupted him.

The crowds in the shopping are in chaos and quickly separated from the middle. A man with a bag and a flustered look rushed toward the two with a dagger that had a cold light.

"Let it go, or I will kill you." The gangster shouted at the crowd.

Seeing the gangsters rushing over from here, Chen Mo's pull of the small fisherman behind him, hurriedly retreated. Not waiting for him to rush to them, a person suddenly extended his foot.

"Ah." A scream rang, and the gangster flew out of balance and fell heavily on the ground.

"What happened?"

“Why did the gangster fall?”

The crowd was a little flustered, no one noticed it, and Chen Mo saw it very clearly. It was the dark-skinned man who squatted on the gangster.

At this time, the gangster’s dagger and bag had been released, and they all fell in front of Chen Mo and Xiao Yu.

Still waiting for the man to react, the gangster quickly climbed up and looked at him in a panic. The next moment, rushed into the crowd and robbed a baby in his arms.

"Let my daughter go." The woman who was knocked down looked at the gangster in horror.

"Don't come over, come over and kill her." The gangsters looked back, and they continued to retreat, and the crowds watching the crowd quickly spread.

"Friends, calm down." The man looked solemn: "You are just robbery, not very guilty, and you will come out in a few months. If you impulsively hurt her, you are the death penalty."

"Don't come over." The gangster yelled at the man: "If you come over again, I will kill her. Don't think that I am afraid of death. Anyway, the gambling debt is not dead. It's a big deal. Don't push me."

"Calm, I don't pass." The man raised his hands and stopped: "Calm down, have something to say, you want money, I will give you, don't hurt the baby, she doesn't know anything."

"Save my child." The young woman pleaded to the man: "Save my daughter, beg you, she is only nine months."

"Ms., don't be excited." The man turned to look at the gangster: "I am not a policeman. You put the child, I don't catch you."

"That bag, throw it over to me, hurry up." The gangster looked at the man with resentment. If it weren't for him, he had run away.

"Give you." Chen Mozhen took the bag from his feet and threw it in front of the gangsters. Then he looked at the crowd: "You all spread out, don't watch the excitement, spread out."

When I heard Chen Mo’s words, the crowd of people onlookers spread a lot, but still stood in the distance.

"Now give you the bag, gently put down the child, I don't catch you, I am not a policeman." The man glanced at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo pulled Xiao Yu behind him, and he was not sure what this crazy gambler would do. He did not expect that he would finally come out with a small fisherman and actually encountered such a thing.

"go to hell."

The gangster laughed and threw the baby in his hand to the side of the road, quickly picked up his bag and ran away.

"I am your uncle."

At the moment he threw the baby, Chen Mo’s face changed. The body's maximum speed broke out. Before everyone responded, it had already jumped out of the baby. In the exclamation of everyone, Chen Mo hugged the baby and fell heavily on the road and rolled a few laps to stop.

Chen Mogang hugged the baby and climbed up. A car was pressing against the huge horn and stepping on the brakes.

chapters.title: Chapter 15: :Bad News
chapters.body:
Chapter 15: :Bad News

Seeing Chen Mo is about to be hit by a car, the crowd screams. The onlookers, hurriedly squinted, could not look straight.

The friction between the tires and the ground rang through everyone's heart. It was not until more than ten meters that the car stopped and the crowd was dead.

The young woman stared at the empty road, turned her eyes and fainted to the ground.

Xiao Yu stayed in the wood chicken, Chen Mo jumped out of the scene, replayed in his mind. Looking at the dead and empty road, her face with fear, tears constantly rushing out.

"Chen Mo, Chen Mo."

Xiao Yu’s voice was panicked and scared, and he rushed out.

Just ran to the road, Xiao Yu felt a tight body and slammed into a bottle. The familiar breath of the tip of the nose, the small fishing rod. Looking up at the familiar face, tears couldn’t stop, crying and laughing, and finally burying his head on his shoulder.

"Don't cry." Chen Mo comforted Xiao Yu.

The potential development, so that his body has a strong explosive power and speed, just in the midst of a thousand miles, with that explosive power, to escape the car. At that time, I felt the car brushed from the side, and he was scared of a cold sweat.

When Chen Mo appeared, the crowd cheered.

"Don't cry, you see this little guy is laughing at you." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's shoulder and put the baby in his arms in front of her.

The baby is now licking the pure eyes and laughing at Xiao Yu. Seeing the baby's happy appearance, Xiao Yu also broke into laughter.

"The gangsters caught it."

There was a cheer in the crowd. Several men, carrying a person, were thrown back to the ground, and their hands and feet were tied with a belt. At this time, the nose was swollen and the bag was still hanging on him.

"This woman is fainted. Who is a doctor here?"

There was a cry that caught everyone's eyes, and the baby's mother had fallen to the ground.

"I'm."

A middle-aged man with glasses came out and pressed a few times in the woman's person. Not long after, the woman woke up.

"My child, child." The woman's voice was full of fear and looked around.

"Madam, your child." Chen Mo took the baby back to the woman and put it in her arms.

Seeing the child intact, the woman stunned and cried and laughed.

In the applause of the crowd, a police car stopped at the side of the road. From the occurrence to the end, no more than five minutes.

The man who intercepted the gangster saw the police coming and turned and walked into the crowd. Chen Mo also took a small fisherman and walked into the crowd to disappear.

Only when Chen Mo left, there was a lot of attention in the crowd.

Not far from the shopping street is the seaside. Xiao Yu helps Chen Mo to deal with the bruises on his cheeks and elbows. The movement is very gentle.

"Poor my handsome face, to be ugly."

"You are still narcissistic, I was scared to death just now." Xiao Yu was very angry, with blame in his tone, just the movements in his hands, still careful.

"There was a hot brain and I didn't think much. When she was you, I would not hesitate to rush."

"You want to wait for me for 18 years?"

"I found that you became humorous."

After dealing with the wound, both of them fell silent. The wind blows, making the atmosphere subtle. Chen Mo looked down at her, and Xiao Yu’s face immediately became ruddy, and his eyes were a little dodging.

Chen Mo took the waist of Xiao Yu and slowly lowered his head.

The small fishing eyes are closed, like a life-threatening, long eyelashes tremble slightly. She knows what will happen next and her body is a little tight.

The lips came soft, the teeth were softly opened, and the strangeness of the tongue was raised, which made her feel a strange feeling, her face became redder, and her body was attached to Chen Mo.

The first kiss of the collection for more than 20 years, finally dedicated to this somewhat narcissistic bastard.

The feeling of joy and happiness filled the body and mind, and Xiao Yu began to slowly meet Chen Mo. Her movements gradually become natural from the beginning of the oysters.

The mapping of the night and the light, the singer of the riverside singer echoes the river and the sound of the river, the river wind blows the skirt and hair of the small fish, and rises slightly. Cruise ships on the sea, ripples of light, and colorful neon lights on the beach form a beautiful picture.

After a minute, Chen Mo was released. The distance between the two souls, with this kiss, is completely open to the other side.

“Perfect, perfect, perfect.”

The two have not yet returned to God, and an amazing voice interrupted the warmth of the two. The two looked erroneous and turned to the source of the sound.

"It's perfect." A photographer holding a camera and excitedly walked toward the two: "Hello, my name is Liang Zhihang, a photography enthusiast."

"Hey? Hello, my name is Chen Mo." Seeing the other person introducing himself, Chen Mo politely returned.

"I came to the beach to find the inspiration for the work. I happened to meet you and took pictures of the kiss you just made. It's perfect. I am going to use this set of photos to submit a draft and participate in the National Photo Contest, I hope to get your consent."

Liang Zhihang excitedly opened the camera in his hand and put the photo he had just taken to Chen Mo.

Xiaoyu didn't think that when he was kissing, he was photographed and shyly hiding behind Chen Mo. He wanted to find a place to sneak down. This is his first kiss.

"I just flashed a flash of light. This set of photos is called "Luminous"."

Liang Zhihang was so excited that he did not pay attention to the difference between the two.

The natural movements of the two people just now, as well as the feeling that can't be said, are impossible to show. That kiss, showing all the love of both sides to the fullest, reflecting the night view of the sea, is perfect.

When I saw the photo, Chen Mo’s eyes lit up and it was really beautiful.

"It's pretty," Chen Mo said.

When Chen Mogang finished speaking, he felt a slight pain in his waist. Xiao Yu had buried his face behind his back, his fingers pinching the meat of his waist.

Liang Zhihang’s face is filled with joy: “This moment has inspired me to write poetry.”

This is the most perfect work of all his works.

"You send us the photo, we can agree to take the photo to participate." Chen Mo looked at the photo.

"Well, I will add you WeChat, after I sort out the photos, I will send them to you." Liang Zhihang immediately agreed to take out his mobile phone and add Chen Mo's WeChat.

After Liang Zhihang left, Xiaoyu’s face was still red and fluttered, and he squatted on Chen Mo.

"Why did you promise him to let him take the photo to participate?"

"He was an artistic creation, a rare inspiration. Moreover, he helped us to fix that important moment in the photo. Later I took the photo as the mobile theme. Come, come back."

Xiao Yu shyly bowed his head and did not resist.

The two looked at the beauty of the beach and wandered around the seawall. The things just happened have already been left behind by both of them. This is the first real date, a bit embarrassing, but more perfect.

The happy time is very short. When Chen Mo took out his mobile phone again to watch the time, his face became strange.

"what happened?"

"I have to tell you a bad news. It is already 11:30. The dormitory is closed. You can't go back tonight." Chen Mo laughed.

"I don't feel how long it is." Xiao Yu grabbed the phone incredibly: "What should I do?"

"Two choices, go to the hotel for one night, or go to my rental." Chen Mo smiled happily.

"You deliberately." Xiao Yu red face covered the meat of Chen Mo's waist.

"I made four, absolutely not." Chen Mo took a breath of air and raised four fingers.

"Don't go to the hotel."

"Then go back with me."

Chen Mo took a small fishing, found a bicycle, and rushed back to the rental house.

chapters.title: Chapter 16: : Registered Company
chapters.body:
Chapter 16: : Registered Company

It’s already more than twelve o’clock to rent back to the apartment. When I walked into Chen Mo’s renting house, Xiao Yu immediately became nervous. I thought that I would live with Chen Mo tonight, and my heart was like a deer.

"I am going to the toilet."

Chen Mo looked at the back of Xiao Yu’s escape and smiled. Sitting in front of the computer, I began to process the photos sent by Liang Zhihang.

I have to say that this photo is really beautiful, and the hero is still him.

After a while, Xiaoyu came out of the bathroom, blushing, and hesitated for a long time before he climbed onto the bed and lay down: "I slept first."

"Sleep."

He knows that tonight will be a sad night.

Turning his attention to the computer, Chen Mo forced himself to calm down and continue to code. The code of the mobile phone system is gradually lengthened in his hands.

Xiao Yu was lying in bed, couldn't sleep, could only turn over, looked at Chen Mo, who was concentrating on the code, and thought about what happened tonight, with a shy and sweet smile on his lips.

I don't know how long it took, Chen Mo, who was sitting in front of the computer, moved. Xiao Yu hastened to close his eyes and his heart was tense.

Looking at the small fish that closed his eyes, Chen Mo’s face fell. After walking into the bathroom and brushing your face, I gently climbed onto the bed.

God gave him a choice, but he couldn't be impulsive. Impulsiveness is very easy to make a life!

A small fisherman lifted his heart, his body was tight and he did not dare to move. The lights were off, the room was in the dark, and the little fish became more tense.

After a few minutes, Chen Mo did not touch her, and the tension slowly relaxed. Just opened his eyes and prepared to sneak into Chen Mo, but found that Chen Mozhen had a god's eyes and reflected a glimmer of light in the darkness.

"It turns out that you are sleeping."

Chen Mo smiled, Xiao Yu also smiled.

"Can't you?"

"Yes. Big beauty sleeps beside me, what can I do if I can't sleep?"

"You can't sleep, you have to sleep."

"At this moment, I think of a paragraph. A man and a woman sleep on the bed, the woman said, not to touch her at night, or the beast. The next day, the woman fanned the man's slap, saying that he was not as good as the beast."

"Don't think about it." Xiao Yu's cheeks are hot: "When I prepare for my heart, I will give you all of it, can I?"

"Really?"

"Really."

"You said, I remember." Chen Mo laughed.

"Do you want to know the last answer? Tell you, when it comes to welfare." Xiao Yu was attached to Chen Mo's ear and kissed him on his face. He turned his face and covered his quilt.

"If you say that you are wild, I still don't believe it, now I believe."

Chen Mo licked the waist of Xiao Yu, adjusted his posture, tried to keep calm and close his eyes.

Xiao Yu’s body was tight and he found that he did not move in the next step before he relaxed and put it in Chen’s arms, sleeping with a smile.

Nothing in the night.

Early the next morning, Xiao Yu woke up and felt the temperature of the big hand at the waist, his face was slightly red. I slept very well last night, and the previous insomnia disappeared without a trace.

Sleeping in Chen Mohuai, I feel very relieved. Slowly took Chen Mo’s hand and sneaked on his face before he climbed up.

Chen Mo did not know how he finally slept in the end. When I opened my eyes, Xiao Yu was no longer around, but the faint scent remained in the pillow.

"Sneaking up?"

Chen Mo looked at the empty bed and remembered the shy appearance of Xiao Yu, smiling. Just after the washing was finished, I saw the little fisherman returning for breakfast.

"Come and eat." Xiaoyu said: "Your kitchen has nothing, I can only go out and buy breakfast."

"I changed the clothes yesterday, have you washed?" Chen Mo sat down beside Xiao Yu.

"Ok."

"Looking for a girlfriend, earning a lot." Chen Mo took the porridge from the small fisherman and smiled: "You will come to live here, buy me breakfast every day."

"You want me to wash your smelly socks every day."

"This has been discovered. I will catch you more in the future." Chen Mo laughed.

"Do you dare?" Xiao Yu blushes: "You live outside, you can cook something to eat yourself, don't always eat takeaway. I see the pot in the kitchen, never touched."

"You come to help me cook?"

"Think of beauty."

"Generally, I don't eat breakfast." Chen Mo finished the porridge and picked up the bread next to it. "At noon in the school cafeteria or outside, dinner is eaten outside after fitness."

The chopsticks in Xiao Yu’s hand paused and didn’t know what to think.

"I will go back after breakfast, I have to review the accountant exam, and I have to go back to the dormitory."

Thinking of what happened last night, Xiao Yu’s cheeks were a bit hot. This is the first time she has not returned to the night, and she is dating Chen Mo, and she must have been misunderstood by Ruo Ruo and others.

"Today, I will take you out for a day."

"Playing one night last night, playing too much is not good, and it is a waste of money." Xiao Yu said: "Go next week, take me ‘行侠义义’.”

"Follow, woman."

"loquacious."

After dinner, Chen Mo sent a small fishing back to the dormitory.

The video of Chen Mo’s rescue of the baby girl last night has been announced on the Internet. It was just that the light was too dark at night, and the video could not see the appearance of Chen Mo, so they were not disturbed.

After leaving the school, Chen Mo went to the Trade and Industry Bureau and got a nearby agent registration company.

Now that things have come to an end, the anti-virus program has been sold and the funds have been available. Registering a company now, when the company gets a business license, the mobile phone system is almost complete.

"Hello, sir, what do you need to help?"

Chen Mogang entered the registration company, and a female salesman greeted him: “Our company acts as a registered company, patents and trademarks. All professionals follow up and quickly issue certificates. The registered company can also advance the registered capital and provide the registered address. ""

"I want to register a company." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, sir, please sit down." The female staff smiled and asked Chen Mo to sit down: "What type of company do you want to register?"

"The legal person is solely invested." Chen Mo said.

"The registered capital is 50 million, no need to advance."

When she heard Chen Mo’s words, the female salesman’s eyes widened. 50 million don't have to pay, this sentence reveals too much information.

This handsome young man in front of him is a rich man. Such a young and wealthy, and so handsome, if you can get it, you don't have to be busy here and work all day.

The female salesman's smile was more prosperous, and the movements became softer, intentionally or unintentionally sending Chen Qi to the dark.

"Sir, you have to prepare the names of several companies, preferably three to five. I will help you to search for them and see if they are occupied. It is easier to register successfully. Otherwise, the company name is occupied, it is a bit troublesome."

Chen Mo turned a blind eye to her little movements.

"Ok."

Chen Mo thought about it and wrote three names on the paper handed over by the female salesman. After entrusting the company to the agency, Chen Mo left.

Next, he can safely tap the source code of the mobile phone system. As soon as the mobile phone system comes out, his company will be a blockbuster.

It’s just that the company doesn’t have a person yet. He doesn’t know how to manage it. This is also a problem. Looking back to find a professional manager talent line.

After returning to the dormitory, Chen Mo turned on the computer and continued to type the code.

chapters.title: Chapter 17: : Marching Ants
chapters.body:
Chapter 17: : Marching Ants

At this time, Chen Mo sat in front of the computer, and the dense code on the screen continued to grow as his movements continued.

As time went by, he tapped the keyboard's fingers faster and faster.

Oh...

When the mouse was pressed and run, Chen Mo’s hand stopped, his face smiled and he finally laughed.

Finally finished.

For half a month, he went to buy medicine and carried out his second physical potential development. His strength is growing, but he has never had the opportunity to play.

In addition to fitness and reading, the rest of the time is focused on the code of the phone system.

Constant efforts, the source code of the mobile phone system is now finally completed.

This mobile phone system is not entirely the source code in the technology library. He just followed the architecture design of the mobile phone system, made some changes in the source code, and also cut down the unique features.

Because this system is not in their world, many functions are not available, and there are many functions that are redundant.

To this end, Chen Mo also asked Shu Lao.

Under the guidance of Shu Lao, coupled with mobile phone system development technology and programming knowledge, Chen Mo also successfully transformed his mobile phone system.

After the happy completion, after saving the source code, Chen Mo was lying in bed and entering the technology library.

Familiar bookshelf, here he comes at least once a day. Come here to sleep with Shu Lao before going to bed, or to listen to Shu Lao’s story about other worlds or the stories of those who have previously, can also increase your knowledge.

After opening the dark red book, Shu Lao appeared behind him, still the kindly appearance, like the grandfather of the neighbor.

"Shu old, the smartphone operating system is complete." Chen Mo said.

"Yes, good." Shu couldn't help but nod. "Is faster than I thought, the modified mobile phone system, shared to the library?"

"Of course share." Chen Mo nodded.

"But this time sharing, you can't get technology. Because this mobile phone system is improved on the original technology, in essence, it does not belong to you." Shu Lao said.

“Sharing.” Chen Mo said: “The Science and Technology Library has given me so much, there is no return, I have nothing to say, and I have nothing to lose.”

"Ah, very good."

Shu Lao smiled and nodded, a little finger, a huge light curtain fell. Numerous pieces of code are arranged on the light curtain, floating, and finally reduced into a book, flying into the depths of the library.

"Although in essence, the mobile phone system does not belong to you, but it has also undergone some transformations, some functions have become different, and you are half a work. As a reward for sharing, the technology library can help you optimize the mobile phone system, do you need it? ?"

"That must be."

Chen Mo's face is a joy, such a good thing, don't be a fool.

Shu Lao nodded, his finger was light, and the light curtain appeared again.

On the light curtain, the source code of the mobile phone system constantly changes the position structure, cuts and adds.

This transformation makes Chen Mo feel incredible. He can see that some vulnerabilities are constantly being repaired, perfected, and finally perfected.

The changing curtain of the light curtain, a new source code appeared, turned into a book, falling into the hands of Shu Lao.

"This is the source code of the optimized mobile phone system." Shu said the book was placed in front of Chen Mo.

"Do you want me to use my head to smash it?" Chen Mo looked at the book and smiled: "I can hit it if I hit the book?"

Shu Lao haha smiled: "You kid, every time you talk, slippery." Going to Chen Mo, Shu Lao directly took the book in his hand into his head.

Numerous codes flashed from my head, and Chen Mo was ecstatic.

If the mobile phone system is just a child, then the current marching ant system is a mature youth in all aspects.

With his knowledge of computer language, I can't see the current source code of this system.

This is definitely an unexpected surprise.

The mobile phone system will definitely become a strong opponent of Android and Apple systems.

From the library exit, Chen Mo began to modify the original mobile phone system source code according to the optimized source code.

The mobile phone system was transformed by him, and he is very familiar with the basic structure of the source code. The optimization of the science and technology library is also carried out on this structure, so it is very quick to modify.

The power of the science and technology library, Chen Mo also had to sigh. Some small loopholes are all perfect, and if it is not modified, I am afraid he can't see it.

This is a perfect piece.

After the source code was completely revised, Chen Mo took out a new M10 mobile phone from China Micro and started to brush the system.

He has already named this mobile phone system: the marching ant system.

When registering the company, he put the name of the marching ant in the first place. If there is no accident, his company will be called a marching ant.

Ten minutes later, after seeing the progress bar, Chen Mo picked up the Huawei micro-M10 on the computer side, with a touch of color and expectation on his face.

Oh...

After a small shock, an animation of a cartoon marching ant appears on the screen.

Boot time 10 seconds!

Chen Mo remembers the design, according to the estimation, the boot time is at least 1 minute, I did not expect the technology library to optimize, the boot time is reduced so much.

The operation of the marching ant system is different from that of the Android system and the Apple system. But only a little experience to adapt, you will be able to get started soon.

Security does not need him to test at all. When I saw the source code, he drifted through the idea of writing a mobile phone virus, but he could not start with the source code of the marching ant system.

It can be said that it is not very likely to break this mobile phone system, and it takes too much effort.

The fluency problem, the marching ant system is definitely the best in the current mobile operating system. Coupled with the smart chip, Chen Mo believes that the M10 in his hands is definitely the best mobile phone on the market.

After the mobile phone is collected, Chen Mo will pick up the things and save the source code files of the mobile phone system before going out.

This morning, the company's agent company had already informed him that the company had successfully registered and the business license had been down, allowing him to collect the company's materials in the past.

"Mr. Chen Mo, please come with me."

Chen Mogang walked into the agency, and the female salesman greeted him, staring at him with a smile on his face, his eyes were extremely aggressive.

The procedure was quickly completed, and the company’s business license and other materials were obtained. After confirming that there was no problem, Chen Mocai smiled.

"Mr. Chen Mo, congratulations, I am free today, have a meal together?" The female salesman's body leaned against Chen Mo, and the open neckline was exposed to Chen Mo, deep gully and unobstructed.

"Free, I have a date." Chen Mo jumped and jumped: "It's a little urgent now."

Not waiting for the female salesman to respond, Chen Mo got up and left, and then he vomited when he walked out of the agency.

Marching Ant Technology Co., Ltd.

Looking at the name of the registered company, Chen Mo smiled.

Marching ants, a synonym for aggressiveness. It will also be the next thing he will do, invading various business areas.

Let the name of the marching ant change this era.

The company registration is completed, and the next question is the company's development.

He doesn't manage the company, and he can't take the time to manage the company's affairs. The best way is to find a senior manager and help him manage the company.

"Handsome, you wait."

Still not taking a few steps, a magnetic female voice rang behind Chen Mo.

"Don't look at me, what are you doing now?" Chen Mo turned the topic to Zhao Min.

Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min with amazement and quickly took out his mobile phone search. After seeing her information and photos, she showed a happy smile.

Zhao Min is a senior talent, graduated with a master's degree in business administration, and served as vice president of Wanbao Group in China for two years. He will never let go of such a good opportunity.

"The idea is quite bold. I want to empty the white wolf." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with a slight smile: "What is your company's name? How many people are there? What is the product? How much is the money?"

"The company just registered successfully..."

"Little brother, although my sister thank you for being brave, but my sister has no time to work with you."

"Remove the word 'small'." Chen Mo's face is depressed: "There are funds products, just let you recruit people for me, manage the company. Of course, the salary will not be given to you."

"How much is the money? Little brother." Zhao Min grabbed the boiling water at the table and said something.

"Where am I small?" Chen Mo’s forehead’s blue veins jumped and jumped: “There are tens of millions of funds...”

"Hey? Keke..."

Zhao Minzheng was drinking water, and he stumbled and tried to cough.

Seeing her appearance, Chen Mo was in a good mood and handed the paper towel on the table to her.

"Do you brag about drafting?"

"You grab. Robbery? Little brother."

Seeing the above figures, Zhao Min’s eyes were full of surprises and could not be seen. Chen Mo was still a small local tyrant.

Zhao Min put the phone on, and turned his attention to Chen Mo: "What is your company's name?"

"The marching ant, a marching ant who just came out of the nest."

The operating interface is different from the current Android, Apple, and YuNoS. Sister, you said my looks, can you let him? Abandon my girlfriend and fall in love with me?"

Now its performance is stronger than Apple S, which means that this system is better than Apple system. Finish, turn and leave. He did not forcefully explain it because there is no such need. Zhao Min does not believe that forcible explanation is useless.
