"First use random selection." Think of the technology that was randomly selected last time, Chen Mo nervous: "Shu Lao, will not get the kind of partial technology as it did last time?"

“Do you really want another one?” Shu Lao said, “If you have any side effects, you should do it.”

"Don't, don't, go into the medical field later."

Chen Mo’s head shook like a rattle. If he came again, he would kill him on the bookshelf of the Science and Technology Library, although he couldn’t touch the bookshelves.

"You want me to give you no, see your luck."

Shu old finger gently, a light curtain landed over the library. Countless books are arranged on top, at least tens of thousands.

The book slowly rotated, and Chen Mo’s heart was also praying.

Last time, a technique of "ultra-thin sanitary cotton production process" was randomly selected, which made him almost vomiting blood. If he is random and he does not use the technology, he will be sad.

The rotating light curtain slowly turned into a book and fell into the hands of Shu Lao.

Star Office Software

After seeing the cover of the book, Chen Mo was slightly happy. Although not a big technology, at least he can use it now.

Now the company is starting, just this can be the company's first product.

If the smartphone operating system is rushed out, the impact will definitely be small. Now that the company has nothing, his little ant will certainly not be able to maintain the operation of such a mobile phone system.

It is best to use this office software as the start of the company.

Shu Lao took the book in his hand into Chen Mo’s head: "You still have a free choice. If you want any technology, you can go to the book to find it."

"Not for the time being." Chen Mo thought about it.

There is no shortage of money, the mobile phone system has been completed, and now there is another office software. Office software makes money, there is absolutely no problem, leaving an opportunity to deal with unexpected situations.

Just like the last ‘Eternal Heart’ has no omen to sweep the world. Keep an opportunity, as long as there is a sudden situation, what technical solutions are needed, and he can have a chance to choose freely.

And the source code of this office software is enough for him to work for a while. Greed is not bad, first step by step.

After withdrawing from the technology library, Chen Mo opened the computer and began to organize the office software.

chapters.title: Chapter 21: : Open Source?
chapters.body:
Chapter 21: : Open Source?

The company is slowly on the right track in the hands of Zhao Min. After taking over the company from Chen Mo, she began to call some former capable employees.

Coupled with the newly recruited staff, in just ten days, it has been able to barely maintain the company's operations.

Zhao Min sat in the office and looked at the documents in his hand. Opposite her, she was a woman with a good face and a professional dress.

"Xiao Li, you are going to inform Director Li that at the recruitment fairs of major universities, the recruiting staff will be a little more, but it must be strictly in accordance with the company's employment standards."

Zhao Min handed back the documents in his hand to the female white-collar worker: "And, the company's personnel are still quite nervous. You temporarily go to the administrative system to help."

"Okay, president." Xiaoli took the documents and left the office.

Until Xiaoli left, Zhao Min was frowning and took a drink from the tea cup next to him.

The company has just started, and there are a lot of troubles to deal with now.

Chen Mo, the chairman of the board, completely ignored the matter and handed over everything to her.

Zhao Min is painful and happy. Now she has a lot of work, but now she is talking about the company affairs, and there is no such thing as a former one.

Hey!

Not long after, the door knocked, Chen Mo carrying a backpack and holding a document into the office.

"Rarely, the chairman."

Seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min’s eyes flashed in a strange color.

When the company rented the office address, Chen Mo came once. In the past few days, Chen Molian did not see his personal photo. Both of them were connected by mobile phone. I did not expect that Chen Mo actually came over.

“Is the company busy?”

When Chen Moyi came in, he put the documents in his hand in front of Zhao Min.

"Crap, just getting started, the company is not enough. The company's data center, servers, recruiters, do you think everyone is as leisurely as you are? Now I am preparing to go to major universities to recruit new graduates." Zhao Min took over Chen Mo Hand over the information and look through it a few times.

"Heaven and earth conscience, I am not idle, I am getting a second product." Chen Mo said.

When Chen Mo’s words just fell, Zhao Min immediately raised his spirit.

"When can it be completed? The mobile phone system is temporarily impossible to release. The company is not big enough, and the talents are seriously insufficient. It is easy to be targeted when it is released. If there are other products, you can publish it first, and the company will gain a foothold. As soon as the mobile phone system comes out, it will be able to fly."

"It’s the same as I thought, so I’m working on the second day to write the second product.”

“What is the second product?” asked Zhao Min.

"An office software." Chen Mo put a u disk in front of Zhao Min: "It has been completed, the function is similar to wPS and office, and a simple picture processing function, the information is inside."

During this time, Chen Motian evaded the code of the office software and designed the interface. Fortunately, it was just copying, otherwise it would be a bit troublesome for him to design all the interfaces by himself.

“Really?” Zhao Min asked some questions.

"This is my company, do you have money to take it?"

Chen Mo gave Zhao Min's reaction to make fun of it. He inserted the u disk into Zhao Min's office computer and directly occupied her position.

Not long after, a piece of software appeared on the desktop, the icon is a cartoon ant.

"Ant office?"

Zhao Min glanced at the icon, and his eyes lit up, and he opened the software.

Office software and wPS are similar, but only the interface difference, the function is more than wPS. PDF and other format conversions are available. There is also a more image processing function, quite a simplified version of PS, a little more than the Mito function, this feature makes people shine.

The layout of the interface makes people look very comfortable. People who have used wPS or office are very easy to use.

"This is what you got out?" Zhao Min pointed at the computer.

"Yeah, praise me."

Shakaka...

Zhao Min opened the drawer and turned it over. He saw Chen Mo blink: "What are you doing?"

"Looking for scissors."

"What are you looking for?"

"Taste you."

Chen Mo was so scared that he was "cool! You don't boast, don't you have to be so excited?"

"Is this something really researched by you?" Zhao Min still doesn't believe it.

"Don't be surprised, the future products are definitely not only these." Chen Mo said.

"Talk about business, now report to you about the company's work and expenses." Zhao Min also sat down on the sofa in the office.

"No, I believe in you." Chen Mo said: "The company's business is what you said."

"These words are really touching. You are not afraid that your girlfriend knows that her boyfriend said this to another woman?" Zhao Min said with a smile.

"She knows it's okay. I came here not to listen to your report, but to send you the product."

Chen Mo pointed to the u disk on the table.

"This office software is mature. There are two versions of PC and mobile. The key is to see how you promote it. It just happens to make the company stable and pave the way for the mobile phone system release."

"About the marching ant system, I have already commissioned an agency to apply for an international patent. Are you choosing to authorize, or enter the mobile phone market, or open source?"

"Not open," Chen Mo said.

The umbrella company's open source code for Android, due to the existence of open source protocols, is now losing control of the Android system. Domestic mobile phone manufacturers have been optimized based on Android, and umbrella companies have criticized third-party customized systems such as rice systems, which are jeopardizing the Android ecosystem.

Seeing Apple’s profitability due to the Apple system, the umbrella company’s now updated Android system is gradually tightening control of the Android system.

The latest updated version of Android has integrated fragmented systems for rigorous modularization. Just want to gradually withdraw control of the Android system.

If the marching ant system is also open source, the unique structure of the marching ant system will definitely attract the interest of developers. The computer operating system is even developed based on the marching ant system.

Once the marching ants have spread out, even if they beat Android, it will be very troublesome to withdraw in the future. So Chen Mo did not think about open source.

"Then enter the mobile phone market." Zhao Min said: "Our mobile phone system is better than the Apple system, entering the mobile phone market, with high price and low price, has certain advantages."

“Yes.” Chen Mo thought for a moment and said, “Tell me the things of mobile phone design.”

"Can you do it?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo without trust.

"Can a man say no?"

"This is really hard to say, after all, you are a younger brother." Zhao Min said with a taste.

Chen Moman's head is black, and he is sure that Zhao Min is absolutely deliberate.

"Since you say that you are doing, then the mobile phone design is handed over to you, I want to recruit people, the company is still too small, there are not too many talents." Chen Mo said, not waiting for Chen Mo to speak.

After Zhao Min was busy with the company, Chen Mo went back to school alone.

For Zhao Min, he is very relieved. Since Zhao Min is willing to help him manage the company, he will naturally trust Zhao Min 100%.

Go back to the library all the way.

Xiaoyu has already sat in the library. It is not long before the accountant exam. Xiaoyu will come here every day.

After a long walk on the bookshelf, Chen Mocai took a bunch of books on telecommunications and sat down beside Xiaoyu.

"coming."

After Chen Mo sat down, Xiao Yu looked up and smiled sweetly at him.

"Come with my girlfriend." Chen Mo smiled.

"I'm sorry, I have to prepare an accountant title exam during this time, and I don't have much time to accompany you." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's eyes and apologized.

"Say to me, sorry, it is better to take some practical action." Chen Mo said in her ear.

"Sit better, here is the library." Xiao Yu blushes and laughs and laughs: "I will give you a surprise after waiting for this time."

“Really? What surprise?”

"You will know when you get there." Xiao Yu glanced at the book on Chen Mo's table: "You were still reading the book of physics last time. How do you look at telecommunications now?"

"Learning to repair your computer."

As soon as he mentioned the computer repair, Xiao Yu smiled softly. The last time the virus in the computer made such a big oolong, it’s funny to think about it now.

Chatting quietly, Chen Mo put his eyes on the book. Xiao Yu stared at Chen Mo's concentrated side face and his eyes became gentle.

chapters.title: Chapter 22: : Butterfly Eyes!
chapters.body:
Chapter 22: : Butterfly Eyes!

One afternoon, Chen Modu focused on the books of telecommunications, even if he wanted to take the design of the mobile phone from the technology library, but he had to first reserve a little knowledge. Otherwise, it would be awkward to watch the circuit design.

He doesn't know how to read books every day. If you look at it, your head will explode. Now his state is like a full-fledged man, and he is constantly stuffing things into his mouth.

If you have not developed your potential and have good physical fitness, you may not be able to eat it.

With a faint painful eyebrow, Chen Mo cleaned up the books on the table and left the library with a small fisherman.

On the school road, Xiao Yu was sitting on the back seat of Chen Mo's bicycle with a relaxed smile on his face. All are working hard, there is definitely pressure, and only this kind of free time can enjoy the rare ease.

"Small fish, how are you reviewing?"

"Not bad, but the test accountant, different from taking the qualification certificate, is still a little pressure." Xiao Yu said: "It will take a while to test, these days may be busy, may have to spend in the review. ""

"Nothing, I will accompany you."

"Your mind, I know, are you not starting a business? You are going to do your business, I am not a child, I don't have to accompany me every day."

Xiao Yu’s side of the body sat on the back of Chen Mo’s back with a satisfied smile on his face: “When I need you to accompany me, I will go to you, and you can’t refuse it.”

"Guarantee not to refuse, big things, girlfriends are the most important, go eat, hehe."

After eating the meal and sending the small fish back to the dormitory, Chen Mo left the school.

Now is the matter of designing mobile phones. Many things are not solved by one computer. There must be a place to work and place instruments and tools.

Rent a shop as a temporary laboratory.

Because of the existence of the technology library, he prefers to do things alone, so that there is less triviality. Otherwise, the secrets of the body are discovered, and others always look at him with weird eyes, which is a lot of trouble.

Not far from Binhai University, there is a long commercial street. Although it is not the center of Binhai City, it is adjacent to Binhai University. The commercial street will be lively every night.

Many students like to go to the tea shop in the commercial street, drink milk tea and chat. Or classmates and friends gathering, will be here.

After a long walk on the road, Chen Mocai found a store transfer in the place after the commercial street opened.

It is a shop for computer and mobile phone repairs. Chen Mo knows this shop. The computer repair and mobile phone repair here are more expensive than other places. Over time, there are not many people here to repair mobile computers.

When contacting the boss, Chen Mo went into the tea shop next to him.

Not long after, a man of about 30 years old rushed over.

After seeing Chen Mo, Wang Jiyu immediately put a smile on his face. During this time, business is difficult to do, and rents are not paid back, let alone earning money to support the family.

When I am older, my family is forced to work. If I don’t change my work, my wife will be in trouble.

This shop, on this commercial street, is not very good, not many people are willing to take over. Now that I have finally arrived, he can't wait to come over.

"Brother, hello, my name is Wang Jiyu." Wang Jiyu reached out and Chen Mo shook his hand: "Go in and see the shop."

"can."

As soon as the shop door was opened, the thick dust and dust came, and the instruments of the shop did not move away. They were all placed inside, but only a layer of ash had accumulated on it.

"Which line is Mr. Chen ready to do? Do these machines need it?" Wang Jiyu said: "The machine is a little old, but it can be used. There is absolutely no dark disease. There are three computers here, and there are some other tools and instruments. If Mr. Chen needs I will give you the lowest price, I am going to change course."

"It's cheaper, I can take over."

Chen Mo looked at it and nodded slightly. There are a lot of things here that are useful to him. With these foundations, he only needs to purchase some sophisticated instruments to transform into a temporary experimental site.

"Let's say something."

Wang Jiyu immediately showed a surprise smile on his face.

He is not ready to do this. These instruments are at home. They are useless. They can only be sold as tattered. Now Chen Mo took over. For him, it was an unexpected gain.

Although the price is lower, when the loss is not so big.

After discussing the price and signing the transfer agreement of the store, Chen Mo cleaned the store and lost all the useless things.

Has been busy until the evening, Chen Mocai rushed back to renting a house and entered the technology library.

He has adapted to the environment inside the science and technology library, and sees the bookshelf hundreds of meters high, and is no longer as amazing as before.

After opening the dark red book in the middle of the library, Shu Lao appeared again.

"Shu old."

"Come." Shu old looked at Chen Mo, nodded with satisfaction: "Is it in the choice of technology?"

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded. "I want a mobile phone design, including the motherboard and shape."

"You let me help you choose?" Shu Lao said.

"There are so many mobile phone designs here, you let me find, can't find the monkey year of the moon? If you choose the wrong one, then I can't cry when I cry." Chen Mo smiled.

"Okay, then I will list it and let you choose."

Shu old fingers gently, a huge light curtain hangs over the library, covering the huge open space in the middle of the library.

A book appeared, three layers in the outer layer and three layers in the outer layer. Chen Mo could not count how many books there were. In each book, the picture of the phone is used as the cover.

Brick type, watch type, pendant type, glasses type, helmet type, round shape, rhombus shape... Various shapes that can be imagined are available on the cover.

If it is not certain that this is a mobile phone technology, Chen Mo is really not sure, these strange things are mobile phones.

"There are still a lot of things that can't be listed. Which one do you want?" asked Shu.

“Providing conditional screening?” Chen Mo glanced at the book suspended in the air: “The shape of the normal point is our ordinary mobile phone shape, and now the technology can do it.”

When his words fell, some books disappeared, and new books appeared to fill the original position, still so much. Chen Mo said several conditions in succession. The result is still a book in the sky, and there is no such thing.

"Shu old, don't play like this, so much? Can I choose a few to see?"

Chen Mo looked at the books of the sky and couldn’t smile. This time, he intuitively felt how many books in the science and technology library, just mobile phones, so many, and still filtered through so many conditions.

"You have the right to choose freely, you can take one." Shu Lao said.

"It's really hard to choose." Chen Mo muttered, looking up at the book in the sky: "You can adjust some, and some will be enough."

"can."

Shu Lao once again ordered, hundreds of books appeared in front of Chen Mo, neatly arranged.

Chen Mo carefully looked at the introduction of the phone function on the book, and finally fixed his eyes on the cover of one of the books.

The phone on the cover, the lines are soft, the design is exquisite, it seems that people can't help but like it.

"Butterfly Eye Smart Waterproof Phone"

"Shu old, you will transfer the butterfly eye." Chen Mo pointed at the book.

I saw the old finger gently, the book disappeared instantly, and turned into a light curtain in the hands of Shu Lao. Looking closely at the design on the cover, Chen Mo immediately liked the phone.

"It's it," Chen Mo said.

The appearance of this phone is very beautiful, he believes that this phone is released, not to mention the function, even if it is the appearance, it can definitely have a good response.

"it is good."

Shu Lao nodded and took the book in his hand into Chen Mo’s head.

The circuit board design, the various parameters of the mobile phone flashed in Chen Mo's head, and then his face blossomed.

What surprised him even more was the interface design of the mobile phone.

This is a waterproof phone, whether it is a headphone jack or a charging port, it has this unique waterproof structure. This kind of design is very delicate, and the person who designed these two interfaces is simply a genius.

Not to mention the mobile phone, just the patent application of these two waterproof interfaces is enough to redefine the interface of the mobile phone, which is an unexpected gain.

After exiting the technology library, Chen Mo sat up from the bed and walked into the bathroom.

chapters.title: Chapter 23: :Looks Familiar?
chapters.body:
Chapter 23: :Looks Familiar?

Chen Mo’s life has returned to calm, and the army ant company is busy.

After getting the office software, Zhao Min ordered to go down and use the fastest speed to get the promotion plan of office software.

The company's 50 million funds, in the upcoming entry into the mobile phone industry, seems to be somewhat stretched, and now must use office software to make money.

As Zhao Min followed the instructions, the newly formed army ant's small nest was running fast.

Julie walked into Zhao Min’s office with a planning copy.

When the company was founded, she was called by Zhao Min to help. Knowing the roots, Zhao Min also trusted her very much and directly responsible for the management of the market system.

Office software is the first product promotion that they entered the company. Everyone mentioned the spirit of twelve points and did not dare to have any scorn.

After receiving the order from Zhao Min, the marketing department began to conduct advertising planning for the first time, and determined the plan with the fastest speed. Until today, the advertisement was finally released.

“How is the data?” Zhao Min asked.

"According to the background data, as of the time I report, the free version of the software has exceeded 10,000 downloads and more than 300 registered paying users."

"Well, a good start." Zhao Min nodded.

The current marching ant company, just established, is just a small ant that has no fame.

The office software that has just been launched can break through 10,000 in such a short period of time, which is already a very remarkable achievement.

This office software is a masterpiece of Chen Mo. Four versions, Home Edition, Small Business Edition, Professional Edition and Free Edition are available.

The free version can only use the most basic word documents, excel and PPT demos, as well as unique image processing features.

In terms of software prices, only half of the office is still small.

The purpose of their introduction of office software is to open up the company's popularity; the second is to use low prices to enter the market and give users a good reputation; three is to make money.

Office software, the main market is in the offices of major companies. As long as you can take the fat of the company, the ants will bring them continuous income.

The function of ant office is better than office and wps. It also has image processing function, which combines two functions of office and Mito. It is unique and powerful, and it does not occupy much memory.

Zhao Min believes that it will take a long time for users to enter.

"The mobile side is also released, let people go to major companies to promote."

"Okay, General Zhao."

Julie promised to leave the office.

After Julie left, Zhao Min picked up the phone and dialed Chen Mo’s number. This chairman, who has never seen the dragon in the end, has made her very helpless, and she can only use her mobile phone every time.

“Chairman, office software has been promoted. The market has responded well and there is a good start.”

"That's good." In the store, Chen Mo stopped the circuit design in his hand.

“Would you like to come to the company?” Zhao Min asked.

"Go next time, I am afraid I am not available today. I will send you the design and interface design information of the mobile phone. You can make samples and apply for a patent."

"So fast?" Zhao Min was full of surprise: "That line, you are busy first. I have contacted the mobile phone spare parts channel, I used to work, there are some connections, everything is going well, you don't have to worry."

"Ok,"

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo looked at the time, saved the file of the motherboard circuit design, and closed the store door.

"Young man? Closed so quickly? Don't you do business?" Chen Mogang came out and asked the aunt of the grocery store next door.

"Go out and play." Chen Mo smiled.

Today is a small fisherman accountant, and he took the opportunity to take a break.

The accountant's examination is conducted at the Accounting Practitioners Examination Service Center. It is not far from Binhai University and rides a bicycle in 15 minutes.

When he first came to the vicinity, Chen Mo saw that someone came out from the door. Not long after, Xiao Yu appeared in the crowd, ran over to him, looked like, and was in a good mood.

With a small fishing, in the eyes of the envied people around, they left.

After eating the buffet, the two went to the aquarium and went shopping to watch the movie.

This is the most arrogant day, and both of them know that this kind of opportunity is rare, so they all try their best to play. Go where the couple should go.

That night, the two squatted by the seawall and watched the sea in the dark.

At this time, Chen Mo's face was very relaxed. During this time, every day, reading, research, and pressing too much. When he was with Xiao Yu, the tightness of his head would disappear completely.

Looking at Xiao Yu’s smile, Chen Mo’s heart has a sense of satisfaction. Recalling that I know each other and I love each other, it’s like dreaming.

Suddenly, Chen Mo’s eyebrows picked up and thought of something, letting Xiao Yu’s squatting, and secretly took out his mobile phone and glanced at it, his eyes became strange.

"If this is the case, it will be fine."

"Yes, I think so too." Chen Mo smiled softly.

"Is it you?"

A voice appeared and the two were interrupted. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu just turned their heads and saw Liang Zhihang holding the camera and looking at the two in surprise.

"It's you."

"Yes, it is me."

Liang Zhihang hurriedly shook hands with Chen Mo.

"It’s a coincidence. The last time your group of photos was submitted, it’s already shortlisted. This is my first time to be a national photo contest. I washed it out. It’s the best work I have done for so many years. Give you one."

Liang Zhihang took out a photo album from his backpack and took a photo in the album and handed it to two people.

"Thank you." Chen Mo took the photo of Liang Zhihang and nodded his thanks.

"You're welcome, I should thank you. I happened to run into it, not deliberately not bothering you, turning back, goodbye."

After that, Liang Zhihang smiled and said goodbye, turned and left.

"You put it in your bag. This photo is to be treasured." Chen Mo handed the photo to Xiao Yu.

Seeing that the scene of the two kissing was fixed in the photo, Xiao Yu’s face was reddish. Although her mobile phone desktop is also such a photo, but now I think of the mood at the time, still a little shy.

Just fishing a little fish, I feel a bit wrong. Just looking up, I saw Chen Mozhen staring at her with a smirk.

Oh...

After a slight struggle, Xiaoyu accepted his life and his body was soft in Chen Mohuai.

After a minute, Chen Mo was released.

"Is it satisfied? I know I bully me."

Xiao Yu gasped and shy in Chen Mo’s arms. When the two kissed, some people passed by, and now they are ashamed to die.

This scene seems to be similar?

Suddenly thought of something, Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's eyes, woke up, and hurriedly took out his mobile phone from his bag.

Seeing the time displayed on the phone, Xiao Yu’s face is a glimpse. As with the last time, there are still five minutes away from the dormitory. It is too late to go back.

Chen Mo smiled happily, took the hand of Xiao Yu and walked back to the night market.

"Where?"

"Go buy clothes."

"What about buying clothes?"

"You can't go back, don't take a shower, buy clothes and go back and wash."

"It turns out that you didn't tell me the time."

The two voices gradually drifted away.

chapters.title: Chapter 24: : Such A Good Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 24: : Such A Good Girl

The two returned to renting a house, which is already more than twelve o'clock. As soon as he came in, Xiao Yu was blushing, walking into the bathroom with his bags and clothes.

After a while, the bathroom heard the sound of water, Chen Mocha sitting in front of the computer, sent the information of the finished mobile phone design and interface design to Zhao Min's mailbox.

After sending the information to Zhao Min, Chen Mo continued the circuit design. After relaxing today, the memory of these circuits is clearer in my head.

From the technology library to get the design of the mobile phone motherboard, now finishing the circuit, in addition to deleting some hardware, is almost copying.

For a long time, the footsteps in the room pulled him out of the circuit diagram.

Just turning back, Chen Mo was wide-eyed and people were still there.

Xiao Yu wears the sling nightdress that he just bought, and the long, straight legs are exposed to the air. The skin of the sheep's fat jade is red and white. A touch of scent, floating in the air, attracts people to think.

He did not expect that the small fisherman would wear a nightdress and draped in front of him.

What does it mean?

In an instant, Chen Mo’s mind came up with various ideas.

Found that he wanted to go far, Chen Mo wakes up and stops his eyes on Xiao Yu.

"What about the hair dryer?"

Xiao Yu found Chen Mo's burning gaze, and his eyes fluttered, pulling the skirt of the nightdress slightly. For the first time in such a bold dress in front of a boy, although this person is his own boyfriend, but still a little uncomfortable.

"In the closet, I will help you blow it."

Chen Mo has no idea to engage in the circuit of the mobile phone, turn off the computer, take out the hair dryer in the closet, sit behind the small fishing, and blow her hair.

Xiao Yu did not refuse, and his face was red and fluttered on the sofa, letting Chen Mo blow his hair.

"You have been cheated again by you." Xiao Yu said.

"It's your big head, forget the time." Chen Mo smiled easily.

"You know the time clearly, but you don't tell me deliberately. I wanted to surprise you. Now I decided to give it to you after a while." The little fish nose wrinkled and snorted.

"Don't, I can't do it wrong?"

"It is useless to admit mistakes."

The angle of the small fisherman's mouth floated slightly, enjoying Chen Mo blowing her hair.

After drying the hair, Xiao Yu said nothing, avoiding Chen Mo’s claws and drilling into the room.

Chen Mo saw the back of Xiao Yu, smiled slightly, took two pieces of clothes and went into the bathroom. Not long after, I walked out from inside wearing a big pants and dried my hair before I walked into the room.

At this time, the small fish, his face was red, and after climbing to the bed, he stared at the door of the room, without any sleepiness.

When the door to the room opened, Xiao Yu stared at the door.

Chen Mo is shirtless, but the lines of the body are very good, and the abdomen has muscles that look very comfortable.

I found that I was far away, Xiao Yu snorted, and the ruddy on her face turned into a red cloth, which spread to the roots of the ears. Going back to God, Chen Moyi lay down beside her.

Seeing her awkward eyes, Chen Mo laughed.

The lights suddenly darkened and the room fell into the darkness. Only the light from the window was in, and the close faces could see each other's faces.

At the moment of clinging to Xiao Yu, Chen Mo was able to clearly feel the rigidity of her body.

"Chen Mo, tell you an unfortunate news."

"what happened?"

"I am coming to relatives."

"Then you still play so crazy? Still blowing the sea breeze, still washing your hair? Why don't you tell me? Is it uncomfortable now?"

Hearing Chen Mo's series of questions, a slightly nervous voice, Xiao Yu's heart warmed, and drilled into his arms: "Nothing, not as serious as you think. The sweat is blowing the sea breeze, the hair is salty, Of course, you have to wash it, and once in a while, you don’t have to use cold water."

"Then you are going to sleep, you can't stay up late." Chen Mo slammed Xiao Yu and got rid of the extra thoughts.

Nothing in the night, Chen Mo did not know how to sleep in the end, but this sleep is very reassuring.

When I woke up, Xiao Yu was no longer around.

Climbing up from the bed, Chen Mo knocked on his head and dragged the body out of the room.

"You finally woke up, wash your face and have breakfast, or it's cold." Just out of the room, sitting on the sofa with his computer watching a movie, and looked up at him.

"Why don't you sleep for a while? Is the body okay?"

"Nothing." Hearing the tone of Chen Mo's concern, Xiao Yu smiled.

After washing, Chen Mo sat on the sofa and enjoyed breakfast. Xiao Yu has already washed his clothes, and the house has been cleaned once.

This simple day has been very easy. At this time, Chen Mo is thinking about how to use the method to swindle the little fisherman to live in, and then he will not eat it.

"Chen Mo, I heard that you rented a shop in the food street?" Xiao Yu said, interrupting his cranky thoughts.

"how do you know?"

"Hey told me that the food is often going to buy things to eat. She said that I saw you there, I am not sure. I took the accountant exam two days ago and didn't ask you. Can you take me to see you today? Shop?"

"it is good."

After breakfast, Chen Mo took a small fishing and left the renting house.

Chen Mogang took Xiao Yu’s hand to the pavement, and the aunt of the grocery store next door looked up and down.

"Young man, is this your girlfriend? It's a pretty girl, a good girl. After playing less games, working more, earning more money, such a good girl, don't let people follow you."

“Hey?” Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu, who was grinning, a little embarrassed: “Yes.”

"Come up and sit down and chat." The aunt of the grocery store saw that there were customers, dropped two people and immediately walked back to the grocery store.

"A girl who is so good, don't let people follow you and suffer." Xiao Yu said.

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and was speechless.

"You play games here?"

In a flash, Xiaoyu stared at Chen Mo with a bad eye.

"No, I sit at the computer every day and knock the code, she thought I was playing the game." Chen Mo shrugged and took out the key to open the door of the shop: "This is the pavement I rent, good girl."

Looking at the instruments and computers in the store, Xiao Yu blinked: "You took over the repair shop? Really do mobile phone repair?"

"Mobile phone repair? Great, boss, you help me to see, my phone just suddenly black screen, can not open the machine, now urgently, you can help me fix it now."

When I heard Xiaoyu, a girl stopped and stuffed her mobile phone into Chen Mo’s hands.

Seeing the cell phone that was forcibly stuffed into his hand, Chen Mo’s mouth pumped and looked at Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu blinked and looked at him.

"Don't lie, hurry to help people repair, business will not do it?" Xiao Yu directly pushed Chen Mo to the workbench to sit.

"Good, repair."

Chen Mo laughed and started to unpack the phone.

“How much does it cost to fix it?” Suddenly remembered a question, the girl hurriedly asked.

In the past, the owner of this store was too expensive and many people dared not come over. It seems that I have changed a boss, and she is worried too expensive.

"You mobile phone, hardware is no problem, it should be a system problem, you can re-install a system. Not expensive, five dollars." Chen Mo thought for a moment before opening.

"Yes, trouble you." The girl heard the price and immediately agreed.

After getting a reply from the beauty, Chen Mo turned on the computer and started to brush.

After fifteen minutes, press the power button and see that the phone screen is lit, and Chen Mo will return the phone to the beautiful woman waiting anxiously.

"Thank you." The beautiful woman who took the phone was happy, took out five pieces and put it on the table, and hurried away.

When the beauty just left, Chen Mo turned to look for a small fish.

At this time, the small fishing, the dust of the machine is being wiped, the sweat on the forehead, and Chen Mo feels distressed.

He wants to tell Xiao Yu, this is not a mobile phone. But if you tell Xiaoyu at this time, it will definitely be noisy. After thinking about it, Chen Mo still didn't say it.

"Let's go, I will clean it again."

"It's already done." Xiao Yu lost his rag: "You work here first, I need to go back to the dormitory."

After helping Chen Mo clean the shop, Xiaoyu said goodbye to leave. After she left, Chen Mocai put his mind on the computer in his hand and began to organize the design of the mobile phone motherboard.

chapters.title: Chapter 25: : Talent
chapters.body:
Chapter 25: : Talent

The function of the butterfly eye is similar to that of the current mobile phone, but there are still many functions that are not available now, and some functions are implemented. The cost is very high. They have just started, too cumbersome, but not good.

Chen Mo’s mind has a complete hardware design for the butterfly eye phone. You only need to make some simple modifications. All other commonly used functions can be copied.

The circuit designed by the motherboard is simpler than the current mobile phone. This circuit design has less energy consumption than the existing mobile phones.

Not long after, Chen Mo was interrupted by the ringing of the phone. Looked at the caller ID and connected directly.

"Chairman!"

Zhao Minzheng browsed the design and interface design of the mobile phone that Chen Mofa sent to her. The design of the mobile phone, she liked it at a glance.

This exquisite design makes people look like they have a bright feeling.

There is also interface design, mobile phone's wired waterproof interface, this design structure is exquisite and unique, the person who designed this structure is the genius who is uncompromising.

“Well, has the design and interface design sent to you been received?” Chen Mo asked.

"Received, I am watching, very good appearance, as well as the design of the charging and headphone interface, very unique, these are all designed by you?" Zhao Min asked.

"Yes."

Chen Mo can't be said to be taken from the technology library, otherwise others must think that he is a neuropathy.

"Do you have two heads?"

"I also think that now the brain is really not enough, I can't wait for three heads and six arms."

"The next time such important information, do not send an email, you inform me, I sent someone to take it in the past, in case it leaked, it would be a little trouble." Zhao Min said as he picked up the u disk at hand and downloaded the information.

"Oh? Ok," Chen said.

"Now I am talking about the waterproof function of mobile phones. There is no interface. It is very troublesome to charge and listen to music. These two interfaces are designed to solve this problem. I am a little admired by your head. How can I not think of this structure?" Min said.

The structural design of the two waterproof interfaces, this patent application, even if you do not sell mobile phones, authorized to the mobile phone business, can get a considerable patent fee every year.

"This structure is called the butterfly eye."

"It's a very nice name." Zhao Min said: "If you have time, come to the company. The response of the office software is good. There are already more than 3,000 paid users, and the free version has 70,000 users. The data is still rising."

"That's not bad."

"A few days, at your school's job fair, the company will send people in the past and let you know in advance."

Reporting the company's affairs to Chen Mo, Zhao Mincai hangs up the phone, removes the u disk, and deletes the mail by the way.

This important information is left in the mailbox. If the hacker is blacked out one day, it will be troublesome.

After getting the u disk, Zhao Min printed the information.

"Zhao Zong, this lady said to find you." Zhao Mingang printed the information back not long after, assistant Xiaoli came with a person.

Wang Sijia is carrying a computer bag and wearing a casual outfit. As soon as he walked into the office, he began to look around. After seeing Zhao Min, Wang Sijia smiled.

"Xiao Li, you go out first, let Minister Luo come over to me after ten minutes." Zhao Min said.

Until the assistant Xiaoli left, Wang Sijia sat down on the sofa and lost her backpack: "Sister, your office is a little small."

"The company has just started. Do you still want to build a building to be the headquarters? This time you are here, I am asking you if you want to join the company. Now the company lacks the talent of the team leader." Zhao Min said.

"I was tempted to resign, is this idea?"

Wang Sijia was surprised to see Zhao Min. During this time, Zhao Min let her resign and take a break. I did not expect this cousin, actually want to dig the wall.

"To work in other companies, it is also work, come here, and will not treat you badly. The head of the technical research department is responsible for the army ant system. Now the salary is lower, but in the future, you are guaranteed to be a small rich woman."

Zhao Min followed the temptation, Wang Sijia, a female engineer, she has been a long time. In the past, she was no longer a technology company, and with this gimmick, she has been unable to find an opportunity. This time she was tempted to resign and find the opportunity.

"Do not lie to me?" Wang Sijia asked.

"You are my cousin, I lied you have money to take it? I need some trustworthy people to take charge of important positions. The current house has a foundation, a frame, and a lack of main load-bearing columns. Otherwise, when the mobile phone system is released, something goes wrong. Get rid of it."

"Why did you choose me?"

"You are a technical professional, and trust," said Zhao Min.

Now that the company has just started, there are a lot of important things. The main position is to have a trustworthy person to guard it. When something goes wrong, it will not cause big problems. Otherwise, she can't explain to Chen Mo.

"I can barely promise you, but I want to meet you, the handsome chairman of the board. After all, I have always wanted to see the **** of the mobile phone system."

"I will introduce you to you next time."

"General Zhao, you said my charm, can you let him like me."

"Roll." Zhao Min was directly laughed at by Wang Sijia.

During the two chats, a man with glasses knocked on the door and walked in.

He is Lao Luo, who is over forty years old. Because of the age and the kindness, many people in the company call him Lao Luo.

Lao Luo was also one of the first people to be called by Zhao Min. Although he was a little older, he was able to rely on it, so Zhao Min asked him to be responsible for the management of the R&D system.

"Zhao Zong, is there something?"

"I introduce, this is Wang Sijia, who was a senior engineer at Xunfei. After that, she was your deputy and was responsible for the army ant system."

After the two men greeted each other, Zhao Mincai spoke again.

"This information, you two look, go back and get the samples out, don't let them go."

Zhao Min handed over the information he just printed to two people.

"Zhao Zong, which company is this mobile phone design?"

Just looking at the design drawings of the butterfly eye phone appearance, Wang Sijia put his eyes on the light. With such a beautiful appearance, she liked it at first sight.

"Zhao Zong, this charger interface, who designed it?" Next to the old Luo, is also the two eyes.

"This is the mobile phone that the company is going to produce next. It is strictly confidential. It is the design of the mobile phone, the earphone interface and the charging interface design, all designed by the chairman. Before the mobile phone comes out, these materials are never allowed to be external. Give way."

"Understood." Lao Luo nodded.

He knows that there is an army ant system, and now with this mobile phone design, if the product comes out, it will definitely be able to fly.

"Zhao Zong, I can't wait to see the big man of the chairman." Wang Sijia's eyes are full of light, completely like an idol.

Once she thought she was a young man, she was a genius. But in front of the mysterious chairman who has never seen it, it is completely a witch.

Seeing Wang Sijia's appearance as a flower idiot, Zhao Min was helpless, and even the old Luo next to him, his mouth was pumping. However, Wang Sijia said his voice, the chairman, he also wants to see.

"Lao Luo, you bring Scarlett to the personnel department to register, her employment contract, I will give her back. Her temper is jumping, you bring her with her."

"Ok."

After taking the information, Lao Luo took Wang Sijia and left Zhao Min’s office.

After the two left, Zhao Min was stunned at the temple and turned to look out the window and sighed. The company has no talent, it is still a little troublesome.

Everything is going on smoothly. Now the marching ant company is just a small ant, no one cares. Sooner or later, it will become a group of marching ants out of the nest.

chapters.title: Chapter 26: : Computer Language Creation And Application
chapters.body:
Chapter 26: : Computer Language Creation And Application

In the renting room, Chen Mo put down his books and went back to bed.

In order to get out the circuit of the mobile phone motherboard, I rarely read the book some time ago. They are dismantling the motherboard of the old mobile phone to let him know more about the motherboard of the mobile phone. After all, this is a hands-on professional.

After a few days of hard work, the phone motherboard has been designed.

He did not choose to make the phone motherboard, and it took a lot of effort to make the phone motherboard by hand.

The etching, punching, and soldering of the circuit board are very troublesome. If you accidentally ruin it, you have to come back. These professional things are handed over to professional personnel.

After handing over the phone's motherboard design and battery size design to Zhao Min, he no longer manages, the test and production of the mobile phone, as well as the mobile phone system conference, are handed over to Zhao Min.

After he finished the design of the mobile phone, he could put his mind on the book.

His days have once again become easier, sometimes accompanied by a small fishing out date, play. The rest of the time is to read a book in the store.

There are 1,000 books, and there is a long way to go, enough for him to struggle for a while. However, the efforts of this period have now read the 300th book.

Now, he knows that the days of rest are enough, and then there is a time to be busy.

After lying on the bed, Chen Mo closed his eyes and entered the technology library.

Still a huge bookcase of 100 meters high, Chen Mo has been eccentric.

Sometimes I come in, and when I chat with Shu Lao, I walked through these bookshelves.

Shu Lao told him some stories about the development of other civilizations, and introduced the technology on the bookshelf, countless technologies he could not imagine, even dare not imagine.

There are armor similar to Iron Man, the development method of super power, even the design of super spaceship, and quantum portal. Any technology that can be thought of is here. Chen Mo even saw the pharmacy technology on extending the life on the bookshelf.

If the technology library's high-priority technology is taken out and made into products, the whole world will be crazy.

Looking around in the library, Chen Mo went to the desk and opened the book on the table.

At the moment of opening the book, Shu Lao’s figure appeared in the technology library with the light curtain.

"Come on technology?" Shu old asked.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"You have random choices and free choices now, two chances, which one to use first?" Shu Lao said.

Random selection, is the [trainee] permission, the benefits can be taken once a month. The day before yesterday was the second month, but Chen Mo has never dared to use it.

Randomly choose this option is toxic, think of the first random "slim sanitary napkin production process", he still has some shadow.

Although there is a random office software behind, there are still some shadows, so after you have the freedom to choose, you can choose again, so as not to return empty-handed. The uncertainty of random selection is like buying a lottery ticket, never knowing what technology is randomly given to you.

"First come to choose randomly." Chen Mo did not want to say.

His words fell, in the air, like the tiles on the wall, once again densely woven into various books, the dazzling look.

The book slowly spins up, and Chen Mo’s heart is also smashed, and his heart is praying, a useful technique, or another opportunity.

After a while, the rotating book stopped and turned into a hand that fell into the hands of Shu Lao.

After seeing the cover of the book, Chen Mo stunned.

"Human Reproductive Supplementary Formula"? ?

Pharmacy? Human reproduction aid? What kind of medicine is this? Is this cover still a technology? This name is a bit strange.

For a moment, Chen Mo has an ominous omen.

"What kind of medicine is this?" Chen Mo pointed to the book.

"Your luck is very good." Shu Lao laughed happily: "This is a good thing."

"I haven't entered the medical field for the time being. This formula is for me. I can't use it for the time being. Tell me, what is this?" Hearing the old laughter, Chen Mo's bad premonition is more intense.

“Popularly, this is an aphrodisiac.”

Chen Mo felt five thunders and his face was red, and now he is afraid of what to come. Once again, he took the technique of partial door. He now feels that random selection is a huge pit.

"Your luck is good." Shu old laughed.

"Good luck? I can't use it for a while." Chen Mo wants to cry without tears.

"It is good luck, this is no side effects." After that, Shu Lao laughed happily.

Chen Mo's appearance is more uncomfortable than swallowing a small strong, and now it is not used, it is still so partial. Even if it is medical, he is not so depressed when he comes to the flu medicine.

"Look at your appearance, don't want it?" Shu asked.

"Yes, why not." Chen Mo said quickly. Even if it is not used now, it will be useful in the future. It is expensive and expensive, and there are no side effects. These are the silver of white flowers.

Shu old booked the book into Chen Mo's mind, haha smiled, he remembered the appearance of Chen Mo just now, could not help but want to laugh, he forgot how long it has not so laughed so easily.

"The random choice of this technology library, how is it so pit?"

Chen Mo smiled, and now he has a shadow of random choices, countless techniques, and he is so random to the technology.

"It's not a pit. It's your luck. You still have a free choice. Do you want to use it?" Shu Lao laughed.

"Use." Chen Mo nodded, but when he thought of the huge amount of books, he was a little embarrassed.

"I don't know what technology to choose?" asked Shu.

"It's really, there are too many things to choose, but think about the current situation, take these technologies, temporarily use them. Shu Lao, what advice do you have?"

"This is it."

Shu old palm, a book is formed in his hands.

Computer Language Creation and Application

"Is this used to create programming languages?" Chen Mo's eyes lit up.

"Yes, this is to teach you how to use your own language to create computer language." Shu Lao said.

"It's it."

Chen Mo did not think of the science and technology library, there are actually such books.

Chinese characters are very clever, even profound and profound. In terms of logical expression, they are much more flexible than English.

Whether it is ancient classical Chinese, poetry and songs, or the current network segment, it carries the unique expression charm of Chinese characters.

But unfortunately, the computer has been developing for so long, but there is no computer language for Chinese characters. If you create a Chinese programming language, it is absolutely shocking.

Knowing that there is such a book, Chen Mo did not hesitate to choose this book.

Acquired Chen Mo’s affirmative answer, Shu Lao nodded: “It’s the best strength to study well and belong to oneself. The science and technology library is ultimately someone else. Creation is the foundation of the existence of the science and technology library.”

After Shu’s book was taken into Chen Mo’s head, countless symbols and words flashed from his mind. After getting "Computer Language Creation and Application", Chen Mo's face showed a surprise color. Just because the depression of the pharmaceutical formula disappeared.

As long as the Chinese programming language is created, nothing else matters.

After withdrawing from the science and technology library, Chen Mo began to digest the "Computer Language Creation and Application" just obtained. After spending two hours and carefully reading the book twice, Chen Mo couldn't wait to lie on the table and start the keyword and phrase design of the Chinese programming language.

chapters.title: Chapter 27: : An Awakened Marching Ant
chapters.body:
Chapter 27: : An Awakened Marching Ant

Marching ant company.

Zhao Min is looking at the financial statements and his eyes are calm.

With office software, the company has more than two million revenues in these two months. And the user feedback of the office software is also very good, at least in terms of experience, it is more comfortable and smooth than other office software.

Office software can only be an over-product, although the function is stronger, but the competition is too great. Many people have used their habits and will not change office software in a short time.

Next, the company's profit is placed on the mobile phone, as long as the mobile phone is sold, there is no money.

She is using the newly produced mobile phone. Even her, at first glance, likes the beautiful appearance of the phone. Soft and without loss of atmosphere, men and women pass kill.

She believes that mobile phone systems and mobile phones appear on the market and will certainly be welcomed.

The marching ant system and mobile phone conference, preparations started five days ago, calculating the time, and the layout should be completed today.

When Zhao Min looked at the financial statements, assistant Xiao Li knocked on the door and walked in.

"General Zhao, Minister Li came to the news, the product launch event is ready, and tomorrow can begin."

"Ok."

Zhao Min put down his financial statements and dialed Chen Mo’s number.

From taking over the marching ant company, she is preparing for the product launch event. The new mobile operating system, this is not an ordinary product, as long as it is operated properly, the company will be a blockbuster.

There are still marching ant mobile phones, these two products, no accident, enough marching ants into the mobile phone market.

At first she did not choose to release the mobile phone system immediately.

The market is a place where people can't vomit their bones. If they are not prepared, they will be released, and they will probably be blocked by big capital, let them develop and be struggling.

"Chairman." After the phone was connected, Zhao Min spoke.

"what's up?"

In the shop, Chen Mo stopped the pen in his hand and stretched out.

"The launching ceremony of the marching ant system is ready. It will be held at the Marriott Hotel tomorrow. Do you want to make a speech in the past? This is a chance to show your face. It is not a big name." Zhao Min said.

"Exempt, I will watch you in the audience, and the conference will be handed over to you." Chen Mo said.

"why?"

"I don't like so many people pay attention, or the rhythm will be disrupted."

"That's good, see you tomorrow, low-key chairman." Zhao Min is not surprised by Chen Mo's answer. Since this time, she has had a general understanding of Chen Mo's style.

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo went on to study the computer programming language.

It’s been two months since I got the book created by the programming language.

During these times, Chen Mo was spent in research. He came to the store every day to carry out the character design of the Chinese programming language.

Someone came over to repair the mobile phone, and he stopped to move his hands and work together.

Studying computer programming languages is not a simple matter. The foundation of any discipline seems simple, but it is very complicated, especially the founder.

A keyword design, there are many aspects to consider, and sometimes one keyword cannot be designed in one day.

What is even more troublesome is that the Chinese characters are exquisite, and the expressions and combinations are also complicated.

In order to better design the characters and expressions of Chinese character programming languages, Chen Mo also specially read the books of Chinese language and literature majors.

The design of the keyword, plus the complete data type and operation method, all kinds of complicated settings must be intertwined in Chen Mo's mind.

After entering the state, various keywords, characters, and phrases flashed in Chen Mo’s mind.

The notebook under his hand is also covered with various complicated lines. The period contains a variety of words, seemingly chaotic, but there is a certain law in the faint.

The design of a keyword must first define its meaning and function before it can be included in the list of keywords.

I don't know how long it took, Chen Mo's thinking was interrupted by Xiao Yu's voice. Just looking up, I saw Xiao Yu holding a lunch box and walking into the store.

Seeing Xiao Yu, Chen Mo will smile.

"It's time to eat, not to eat every time. Are you made of iron? It's almost seven o'clock now." Xiao Yu's tone was blamed.

"I know you will send it to you."

"Which day I don't send it, are you ready to starve?"

"Are you willing to?"

"loquacious."

Xiao Yu laughed, and Chen Mo had no choice but to sit next to Chen Mo and pick up the chopsticks and eat it.

"Small fish, if you move out and live with me." Chen Mo said while eating. This idea, he played for a long time, and now he said it.

"I really want to move out?" Xiao Yu smiled.

"Of course, I want to dream. I don't know how to eat three meals now. I need someone to remind me." Chen Mo's eyes lit up, Xiao Yu said, there is a chance.

For Chen Mo's eyes, Xiao Yu Bao gave a smile and did not give him the answer.

The expression of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo knows that there is no drama for the time being, but Xiao Yu did not directly refuse, there is still great hope. Maybe one day, I promised to move out.

After dinner, Chen Mo packed up, closed the store door, and left with a small fisherman. During this time, the normal life of the two is like this. Every time they are seen, they are all around.

"Small fish, I have something to do tomorrow, take a day off, the store does not open the door."

"Yeah." Xiao Yu should have a voice.

"You don't ask me where to go?" Chen Mo asked.

"You are not going to fight home, killing and setting fire?"

"How is it possible. There are such smart and virtuous girlfriends, and they are going to fight home, unless there is a problem with their brains."

Xiao Yu squatted at Chen Mo's waist, and his body leaned behind his back: "Poor mouth, take me to the beach."

"Don't be afraid and forget the time?"

"Think of beauty."

......

The next day, Chen Mo studied the Chinese character programming language in the rented room. Until the afternoon, Chen Mo put on a casual T-shirt and left the rental room with his computer bag.

Today is the day when the marching ant system was officially released. Although his chairman is not on stage, he still has to go and see.

Marriott Hotel, one of the five-star hotels in Binhai. The charges here are not low. For a decent press conference, Zhao Mincai chose to do it here.

The release of the marching ant system and mobile phone is not a trivial matter, and it must be a formal occasion.

Chen Mo took a taxi to the Marriott Hotel and watched the time.

The conference will be held at two points, and there will be twenty minutes from the conference. Chen Mo saw that some people continued to enter the Marriott Hotel, and many of them were journalists holding cameras and carrying bags.

Chen Mo also followed and walked in, and soon arrived at the scene of the conference.

There were not many people at the conference, more than 500 seats, less than half of the seats, and a lot of staff. The press conference has not officially started, some reporters are debugging machines, and some are simply playing mobile games.

An awakened marching ant!

On the screen, a large line of words is written in a line of books, and the lines of the characters are blended together. With the background of the future with a sense of science and technology, the collection of calligraphy and technology looks pleasing to the eye.

This is the theme of this conference.

Looking at the screen, Chen Mo's eyes lit up, looking for a corner to sit down, waiting quietly for the press conference to begin.

chapters.title: Chapter 28: : Marching Ant · Butterfly Eye
chapters.body:
Chapter 28: : Marching Ant · Butterfly Eye

Li Tiejun leaned back on the table, and the huge screen, full of scientific projection, also made him unable to lift a trace of spirit.

If it is not an image problem, he would like to sleep directly on the table.

I didn’t have a day or two to play the draft two days ago. Today I’m going to participate in the press conference. Now I’m too tired, I can’t wait to go back to sleep immediately. But the duty of this job, he asked him to come over, he had to come over.

Now I am only looking forward to the weekend to come, take a rest for two days.

Many companies hold a press conference, which is simply a press conference without news. Otherwise, the theme of the conference is unknown. I don’t know what the focus of the conference is, and I’m bragging about how many companies in my company are.

Small businesses just want to use the media to publicize and start the company's popularity. Therefore, he has not caught a cold on the launch of small businesses.

He really didn't understand. As a well-known big media in China, why did he ask him to come to a small company that couldn't be small?

Maybe someone is there! Li Tiejun thought.

Marching Ant Technology Co., Ltd.

Before he came, he checked the information of this company. What made him desperate was that this was just a company that had just registered in Binhai for a few months.

What kind of eye-catching news can this newly established company have?

I don't think it will be a boring press conference.

It’s a waste of life to participate in boring meetings and conferences.

Not only him, but also a few journalists around the circle, there are also many people sitting in the position to play mobile games, or gossip. There are a few intern reporters who are sitting in the position and are preparing for the press release of the conference.

There are still a few minutes, the press conference will begin, Li Tiejun can only pick up the phone to play, try not to sleep.

“How many are you here?”

Zhao Mingang walked into the background and looked at the planner of the conference.

Li Lingfeng, the business ability is very strong, but unfortunately in the company, because the offending company executives were dismissed. After Zhao Min found him, he did not ask for salary. He quit his job, which he could not find easily, and came to help Zhao Min.

"107, People's Daily, Global News, Phoenix, Sina, and other mainstream media were present, and others were some technology media. There were several self-media people who introduced them through friends."

Li Lingfeng followed Zhao Min.

"It's better than I thought."

"It will be able to use the contacts, and only a few can be made." Li Lingfeng said.

During the talk, Zhao Min has come to the backstage of the conference. After taking the microphone and wearing the projection pen, Zhao Min went to the stage of the conference.

Zhao Minyi appeared, the scene of the press conference immediately quieted down, and everyone's eyes focused on her.

The mystery conference, now finally opened, some reporters who are playing mobile phones, also pay attention to the stage.

Zhao Min’s eyes glanced around the field.

Seeing Chen Mo in the corner, Zhao Min couldn't help but stay a little longer. This boss is a bit pitted and she has to do anything.

"Members and friends are good, I am the president of the marching ant company. Today is a special conference, no host, no big belly. The boss said, to be low-key, so refused to appear. I also saw it for the first time. Such a low-key boss."

In the crowd below, a smirk sounded, and Chen Mo also touched his nose. He did not expect that Zhao Min would dare to ridicule him brazenly.

The dull atmosphere became easy in Zhao Min's teasing.

"Going to the point, you are definitely guessing what our products are today, what news is there, this is what you care about the most. I can tell you that your arrival is absolutely in vain. If you feel white, the conference End, ask me to go back to the fare."

Zhao Min’s words allowed the reporters on the field to immediately cheer up and look at her with enthusiasm.

"Today our products are this." Zhao Min clicked on the projection pen in his hand, and the rear screen changed.

Mobile phone?

Seeing the cell phone appearing on the screen, all reporters stayed in sight.

Today is the mobile phone conference?

In this era, unless it is the launch of the mobile phone giant, the mobile phone conference is not news, especially this small company, but this phone is really exquisite, people can't help but like it.

For a time, many people showed their disappointment.

Seeing the reaction of the reporters under the field, Zhao Min smiled and pressed the projector pen in his hand.

The mobile phone on the screen lights up, and the logo of the company marching ant appears. After about ten seconds, the phone turns on and the desktop lights up.

All people have doubts on their faces and look at Zhao Min, hoping she can explain.

“This is our company's first product, a brand new smartphone operating system – the Army Ant System.”

Zhao Min left a blockbuster, all the reporters slammed, did not respond, and stayed at the screen.

Not a mobile phone? Is the mobile phone system?

The venue became dead, Zhao Min did not speak, hung a professional smile and looked at the reporter below. About ten seconds, everyone wakes up and there is a commotion at the press conference.

"The marching ant system is a brand new smart phone operating system. It is designed by our company and adopts a new architecture. Zhao Min’s introduction almost spurted out the old blood of the reporter who was excited.

"Next is the second product today."

I heard that there was a second product, and those reporters got up again.

"The advantages of the marching ant system will be combined with this product for detailed introduction." Zhao Min seems to know the reporter's mood, clicked on the projection pen, and the PPT changed instantly.

“This is the first mobile phone launched by our company: marching ant·butterfly eye.”

This is the scene of the conference, Xia Xue can only lie on the table, holding a mobile phone to whisper live, but Zhao Min introduced the sound of the system function, has concealed her voice.

"Bian 剁diao, eat Xiang!"

......

Looking at the barrage, Xia Xue blinked: "I can't believe it, I will show you the scene of the conference." After that, he pointed the camera lens to Zhao Min on the stage.

After the camera was aimed at Zhao Min, the fans watching the live broadcast exploded in an instant, and the number of viewers entering the live broadcast room began to soar.

The standard of the full screen boyfriend, seeing the summer snow tangled. If you ask this occasion, you must be abrupt. However, after a while, Xia Xue raised his hand high and swung a few times in the air.

The press conference ended smoothly and bid farewell to the media reporter. Zhao Min left the press conference. Go to the stage and take out the phone and dial Chen Mo's number.

"Next, I am ready to sell mobile phones. Do you want to go to the company?"

Not long after the press conference ended, the official microblog of the Global News published an article called "Awakening marching ants!" The article, in conjunction with some of the live video, immediately attracted many comments from people, in just a few minutes, reprinted and commented.

A squeaky voice came from the inside. This voice is not someone else, it is a girlfriend like a woman. Then, a woman in an apron walked out of the kitchen and had two dishes on her hand.

what's going on?

There are some hairs in Gan Yu’s heart. This style is often different and a bit strange: “Aqiu, is it uncomfortable?”

"Husband~"

Aqiu put down the dish in his hand and untied the apron. He jumped over to him and his tone was a little embarrassing.

"Aqiu, is it a fever? I touch?"

Gan Yu was so called by her, and the cold hair of her body stood up. He suspected that this ordinary girlfriend was a fever and burned his brain.

"People are not ill."

what? People? People?

Gan Yu was shocked, and he passed it twice in his mind. He didn't get it wrong. This female man spoke to him... spoiled!

"Husband, people cook for you today."

"Aqiu, you are not uncomfortable, tell your husband." Gan Yu scared almost to give her a full body examination.

"There are no uncomfortable people, husband, people want to buy a mobile phone."

Originally wanted to buy a mobile phone, Gan Yu immediately relieved: "Buy a mobile phone, did you just buy one last month? We are paying for marriage, can we buy it later?"

"Husband, the person's part is for you, you buy me another one, okay! I promise to cook for you every day. Husband~"

The tone of the bun and the appearance of the spoiled, seeing the rain and the heart are crisp, the exhaustion of going to work, disappeared instantly without a trace.

"Husband is the best, not Apple, half cheaper than Apple, this is called the butterfly eye, is a company called the marching ant company." Aqiu kissed him on his face, immediately took out his mobile phone to open Weibo, the picture Put it in front of him.

In every corner, there is a scene of various styles and novelties.

"Shocked! My daughter said, if you don't buy her, go find a boyfriend."

However, there are also some discordant voices. The circulation of marching ants is too small, so that some people can't see the past and think that it is hunger marketing. Many people have begun to make a fuss about this.

At this time, Zhao Min was in the office and listened to Julie’s report.

The effect of the conference was beyond everyone’s expectations. Even Zhao Min did not expect that this conference was so successful.

At first, she thought that this conference would attract a good response, but she did not expect it to be far beyond her expectations.

The marching ant company quickly became a cusp.

"Mortgage technology loans, if you can't pay back the money in time, do you think about the consequences? For big capital, we are just small ants. And the chairman will not agree to financing, the company's everything is his, why should it send benefits? To the capitalist?"

Zhao Min knows that the more this time, the more stable. If it is radical, and it will be caught by big capital, they will be in trouble. After all, the marching ant system is a huge cake.

"What next?"

"Prepare tomorrow's online sales related matters, be prepared to increase production at any time, and spare parts procurement, quality issues must be more careful. No one cares about us before, there will be no problems, but now we must be cautious. The important thing is the battery, the battery in stock, must be optimistic, do not have problems, or passive hands and feet, make a few battery explosions, we directly finished."

"understand."

After Julie left, Zhao Min’s temple, she did not expect, a press conference, the sensational effect far exceeded her original imagination, watching the movement of the network, has been jealous.

In just half a day, the marching ant company changed from a small enterprise to a well-known domestic enterprise, but the name of the marching ant also broke into the sight of major capital.
