what? Li Guo was dumbfounded and quickly returned to the phone page.

Sold out?

"Grass, without such a play, this is only a few minutes."

Li Guo was crying and sullen, and it was not a few minutes after the sale. The most beautiful butterfly eye has already been warned. But buy other solid colors, although very beautiful, but my wife certainly does not like it.

Forget it, buy the other ones first, and the wife doesn't like it, return it.

When Li Guo was preparing to buy other models, he was dumbfounded again. She found that the mobile phones were all sold out.

The dumb scene happened in every corner of the country. The person who grabbed it, joyfully, did not grab the person, a look depressed.

Five minutes, just three hundred seconds, 30,000 mobile phones warned, almost from the beginning to the end, the volume of 300 per second.

The activities of the Single Dog Festival are not so horrible. A group of people who did not grab, my heart is mourning.

All the way to see the inventory reduced, until sold out, the people were relieved.

The whole process is like a roller coaster. In just five minutes, everyone has a heart.

"Now start shipping, the news of the booking is released." Zhao Min sighed: "Juli, let the processing plant increase the production of mobile phones, the purchase of spare parts, must pay attention to quality, I do not want to have big problems in quality. All the original battery stocks ordered will be used."

After that, Zhao Min went back to the office.

Although it took five minutes to sell 30,000 mobile phones, Zhao Min knew that this was only the beginning. The first level of security clearance was the next big test.

The cell phone of the butterfly eye here just warned that the news has come out. Selling 30,000 mobile phones in five minutes, and many people can't buy them. If you put in the amount of expenses, it should not be more horrible.

In the new mobile phone, this sales speed can be described as horror.

The current mobile phone market is already rigid, and several big brands are vying for it. Other brands want to be big, unless there is a big change, it is unlikely. Lianxiang, Gerry and other companies want to enter the game, and finally ended in failure.

This time, the marching ant company, with a butterfly eye, opened a hole in the mobile phone market, which made many people envious and even jealous.

However, this time the sales volume is indeed a bit small, it seems a little small. The hat of hunger marketing is instantly buckled for the marching ant company.

Zhao Min put down the documents in his hand and turned to look out the window.

The booking has been released and the number of reservations is up to 200,000. For a company that has just entered the mobile phone market, if there is such a large booking volume, it is definitely a great piece of good news.

Zhao Min is thinking, when the company should develop, the desk phone on the table rang, a strange number.

chapters.title: Chapter 33: : Battle Post
chapters.body:
Chapter 33: : Battle Post

"Sorry, Mr. Li, we have no plans for financing. If there is such a plan, I will contact you."

Zhao Min hangs up the phone in his hand, puts a phone call on the landline, and rests on the chair.

It has been a week since the butterfly eye was officially sold. This week, Zhao Min kept answering the phone and asked about financing.

iDg, Penguin Investment, Sequoia, Jiuding Holdings, etc., the country's largest venture capital companies, all give her a call, there are many independent investors.

These days, she received a soft call from the phone. In seven days, she received more than 70 calls. If it is not a work problem, she can't wait to pull the phone line.

Chen Mo, the chairman of the board, completely ignored the matter and handed over everything to her. She felt that she had bet with Chen Mo and fell into a big pit.

But let her breathe a sigh of relief, the sales of mobile phones are very smooth. The mobile phone can be waterproof, and the experience of the marching ant system is smooth.

Many new mobile phones have been delivered to users. Because of the precautions in the early stage, everything has been very smooth so far, and no big problems have arisen. There are occasional discordant voices on the network, but they have no effect on them.

The problem with the waterproof interface, there are already mobile phone companies to contact them.

Charging interface, many mobile phone companies have their own unique design, headphone interface, now common are 3.5MM headphone jack.

The unique waterproof interface design of the butterfly eye has already attracted the interest of many companies.

Zhao Min said at the press conference that it can be authorized externally, so many people in mobile phone companies are already talking about licensing issues with them.

After all, not every company can choose wireless charging like Apple. The presence of a waterproof interface is not as expensive as wireless charging, and it gives the phone a waterproof function.

Whether it is cost or practicality, the waterproof interface is a good choice.

Now that the company is moving steadily, it will be truly stable as long as it is over a period of time.

Just as Zhao Min looked at the documents, a rush of knocking on the door rang, and Li Lingfeng took a hastily and walked in.

"What happened?" Seeing Li Lingfeng's appearance, Zhao Min frowned. In her impression, Li Lingfeng has always been very calm.

"Zhao Zong, there are some articles on the Internet that slam us, saying that there are major security loopholes in the marching ant system, and now it has been raging on the Internet."

"Security breach?" Zhao Min became cautious: "Does it really exist?"

"Fake, I went to the technical department to find Lao Luo, Lao Luo said that the so-called security loopholes are completely illusory. Some people hired the water army and deliberately discredited us. I also got news from Julie, many users have chosen Return."

Zhao Min picked up his mobile phone and opened the news. Sure enough, as Li Lingfeng said, many articles are reporting on the security loopholes of marching ants.

After reading a few articles, Zhao Min also looked at the news commentary.

A lot of snipers, under the leadership of a few sprays, commented on one side, are attacking the marching ant company.

A lot of news commentary, all without brains.

Zhao Min simply glanced at the phone and put down his mobile phone. It’s still coming, obviously someone doesn’t want to see them go so smoothly.

"What should I do?" Li Lingfeng asked.

The emergence of the marching ant system and the butterfly eye has already moved the big cake in the mobile phone market.

After speculating their company, after the reputation is rotten, the marching ant system will be abolished, and others will not dare to use it. Then swallow them, repackage them, and then roll them out.

This is a bit old-fashioned, but very effective.

"Don't worry, I will contact the chairman first."

Zhao Min signaled Li Lingfeng to sit and wait for the first time, dialing Chen Mo's number.

When such a big thing happened, she was busy and busy here. The chairman, but did not know where to go, made her very helpless.

"Chairman, there is a bad news." When the phone was connected, Zhao Min spoke.

"Is it a security hole in the marching ant system?" Chen Mo said off the news on the computer.

The marching ant system was designed by him, and he could not be indifferent to such things.

As for the smearing on the Internet, he doesn't care, and no one is jealous, which company will experience such trivial things.

"You know, then it is best." Zhao Min said.

"I can't find the loopholes in the marching ant system. I haven't seen it and I know it's fake. You can't solve it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Can solve, I just want to ask you, is there a better way, after all, you know the marching ant system best."

"So?" Chen Mo thought: "I have a bold idea."

"Your thoughts have always been bold, let's talk."

"Who can find a loophole and crack the mobile phone system, give him a million." Chen Mo said.

"Are you crazy?"

"Do not worry, can't find it."

Chen Mo with a strong confidence, this is the mobile phone system from the technology library, developed as an infrastructure.

After the completion, it is also optimized by the technology library. In terms of security, it is not perfect, but there is no source code. If you want to crack it, the difficulty is not that big. This is why he dares to think that the marching ant system is better than other mobile phone systems.

"Well, you don't worry, I don't have to worry about this job. But on the basis of your thoughts, I am going to change the way. You don't worry if someone finds a loophole, raise the bonus, two million lines?"

"A reward of less than five million, whatever you do."

"Ok."

After hanging up the phone, Zhao Min looked at Li Lingfeng.

"Ling Feng, to post a message. Who can find a loophole in the marching ant system and crack the system when the data is intact? Our company will take out two million, one million donated to the Children's Fund, one hundred Ten thousand people who find the loophole are rewarded for six months."

Zhao Min’s problems with the company are a little more than Chen Mo’s. Now that someone is discrediting them and wants to regain their reputation, charity is the best way.

When this kind of gimmick comes out, it can not only drive the sales of mobile phones, but also bring good reputation to the company. The safety of the marching ant system will also be known to everyone, and it will be more.

"Well, understand." Li Lingfeng nodded and left the office.

......

Regarding the topic of the marching ant system, the popularity of the network continues, and the security loopholes of the marching ant system are covered by various articles.

In the hottest time, the official weibo of the marching ant reprinted an article about the existence of security loopholes in the marching ant system and made a public response.

"Warrior! The chairman said: A loophole of 2 million, anyone or team found loopholes in the marching ant system, and cracked the mobile phone when the mobile phone data is intact, the company is willing to pay two million, one million donated to the children's fund One million for the person or team to be cracked. (The reward is valid for six months, and the final interpretation of this announcement belongs to the company.)

This response is tantamount to pouring a cold water into the boiling oil pot, instantly igniting the heat of public opinion and pushing the topic to a new climax.

#行军蚁公司响应#

This topic instantly occupies the front row of the hot search list.

Under the official microblog of the marching ant company, it was quickly occupied by various segments.

"I: Mom, give me money, I want to go to school, I can make a fortune, one million. Mom: I want to go to the Internet cafe to play games? Is it his kid, dad, tie him up."

"Last lie to me to go to Dubai for begging. I ended up lie to me to go to Ukraine to marry my wife. Last year I told me that playing cards in prison can make money. I still have pain in my ass. Now I want to lie to me to learn computer technology, find loopholes, Laozi. I don't do it... The boss, the salary of the bricks is over, I have to pay the tuition. Oh, yes, go to school."

"Bamboo rat, bamboo rat, clear sale."

Under the official Weibo of the marching ants, a lot of comments, all the styles of the paintings, the marching ant company rewarded two million news, quickly overshadowed the news.

The article that used the security tactics of the marching ant system as an attack point quickly collapsed after responding. The report of the network turned to the reward event of the marching ants.

This incident was too horrible. Even Apple did not dare to release such words. I did not expect an ant who had just left the nest to dare to say such words.

After the news spread, all the technical giants quickly paid attention to the official microblog of the marching ants, and forwarded the message and announced that they would join the cracked team.

The famous Penguin network security team and the leader of the Seven Tigers network security team also forwarded Weibo and publicly stated that they would join the cracked team and once they were cracked, all the money was donated to charity.

A message provoked a wave of violent cracking of the army ant system on the Internet.

chapters.title: Chapter 34: : Digging The Wall?
chapters.body:
Chapter 34: : Digging The Wall?

Zhang Xing walked into the room and put the briefcase in his hand on the sofa and sat on the sofa.

During this time, the company had a lot of troubles, the network was smeared, and the company's servers were often attacked.

Although the company used a two-million reward to escape a smear, but there have been rumors among colleagues, there is a big capital in the company, I am afraid that this little ant, can not last long.

I thought that I had a good company, and it didn't take long before I got to work.

Some of the company's newly hired employees are already considering whether to find a way out. After all, if the company is restructured and reorganized, they are laid off and it is a bit of a hassle to find a job.

Zhang Xing is also thinking about this.

He had just come in for less than a month and did not have much sense of identity and belonging to the marching ant company. Now I am a bit worried about those rumors. After all, there is no wind and no waves.

Oh...

Still thinking about whether to resign, his cell phone shook.

"Hey, old week, what?"

"I went to a new company. I am missing people here. Do you want to come over and help? The salesman, just getting started, the salary is lower, more than 4,000, the prospect is good, the salary will definitely rise, and the future promotion space is big."

"That's it?" Zhang Xing hesitated, his eyes flashing a few times: "That is tomorrow at 10 am, I will contact you."

"great, see you tomorrow."

Hang up the phone, Zhang Xing sat up from the sofa, searched the cabinet for a few times, took out an envelope and paper, and thought about it before writing.

the next day.

Inside the army ant company, a cloud of gloom, even the air is filled with a repressed atmosphere. Many people are not happy with their faces, because the people around them have already handed in their resignation letters and left the company.

"Zhang Ge, do you really want to resign?" Lu Hongyi looked at Zhang Xing, who was packing things, with a hesitant color in his eyes.

"Now the company is being stared at by the big capital. It will not be long before it will be acquired and reorganized. As a person, advise you to find a way back soon, and don't find a job."

Zhang Xing was attached to Lu Hongyi's ear, his voice was very low. After packing up his good things, he took the resignation letter and walked into the office. Looking at the back of Zhang Xing, Lu Hongyi hesitated and finally shook his head and continued to bow his head.

Li Lingfeng's face was a bit ugly. In the past two days, he received a letter of resignation from ten people.

It didn't take long for these people to be recruited into the company. I didn't expect someone to attack the company just two days ago. Now there is a wave of employee turnover.

In this way, the rest of the company's employees must be panicked.

What made him even more angry was that the two middle managers who were brought into the company by him also resigned and changed jobs. This is a betrayal against him.

Certainly someone is deliberately digging.

After thinking about it, I picked up the resignation letter that I handed in. Li Lingfeng walked toward Zhao Min’s office.

"Zhao Zong, my boyfriend and I are getting ready to get married. We need a stable job for the house, so it will be..."

In Zhao Min’s office, her female assistant, Xiao Li, is standing in front of Zhao Min with a stern attitude.

"Then you found a job?" Zhao Min calmed.

"With, a friend introduced, in a public company, as a manager assistant."

"I understand, let's go." Zhao Min licked his temple and said to the assistant standing in front.

"I'm sorry, Chief Zhao, I am sorry, Minister Li." With the permission of Zhao Min, the female assistant was sorry and left the office.

"General Zhao, I have received ten resignation letters here." Li Lingfeng put his resignation letter on the table, his face is not very good-looking.

"Just Julie has also come, there are also five market systems, which are middle management of some important positions. Lao Luo R & D system, there are also many technical staff resigned. Zhang Yi's financial system, two accountants also resigned. ”

Zhao Min’s voice was calm and turned to look out the window: “A wave of unrest, a wave of up again. Has anyone looked for you?”

"Looked, I got off work last night, and an old friend told me to go to his company, which is double the salary here." Li Lingfeng said.

"And then? Did you promise?"

"No, refused."

"Why don't you go?" asked Zhao Min.

"At the beginning, I was also promoted and trained by General Zhao. Only then can I have the ability today. Moreover, I feel that the company is very good and the future is very good. I believe that Zhao can take us out of the predicament."

"It's not a dilemma. The company has never been in trouble, and there is no shortage of money and no debt. This is just a hurdle, but some people can't stand the test."

Zhao Min turned his head and looked out the window, his face calm.

"Go back to normal work, who resigned, all the quasi-go, the management of the lack of positions, selected from the excellent staff to fill in. As long as the main management staff are still there, those people casually. They can not share the difficulties, these employees Going out early is also a benefit to the company, preparing for recruitment."

"Ok."

Li Lingfeng saw Zhao Min’s calm appearance and his heart relaxed. Zhao Min is their main heart. As long as Zhao Min is not chaotic, he also feels a little peace of mind.

After Li Lingfeng left, Zhao Min picked up his mobile phone and dialed Chen Mo’s number.

"Chairman, someone digs the corner of your company."

In the shop, Chen Mo stopped the design character's hand and smiled lightly: "Have you been dug up?"

"They can't afford the price."

"That's okay, you are still there, others just dig."

"When are you filling out the pit for you?"

Zhao Min was laughed at by Chen Mo’s words, and the other people who had been rid of the feelings wanted her to fill them. This chairman is not a general pit.

"What are you going to do next?" Chen Mo said.

"Give you a hole. We are now in the company's popularity, but the quantity and quality of talents can't keep up. It's just plain and strong. The company can't do it alone. I am going to your school to recruit some interns. ”

"Yes, whatever you want." Chen Mo said: "The quality of the mobile phone is fixed, the number of butterfly eyes, you look at it, the right time to stop production."

Now someone is staring at the company, and it is smearing. In case someone is on the phone, they are very troublesome. The little ants can't stand the toss and can only stop.

After learning about the company's situation, Chen Mo hangs up the phone and continues to study the Chinese character programming language. Those keywords, characters, and data types will make him a little tired.

However, the good news is that the research has progressed. In the past two months, in order to speed up the research, Chen Mo took a book about the creation of computer programming languages in the Science and Technology Library after reading the 400th book.

After studying for so long, I have created a lot of keywords and I am making great progress. I believe that he will be able to improve the foundation of the Chinese programming language soon.

After he entered the state, it was not until the evening that he was interrupted by the sound of Xiaoyu’s exhaustion.

"Chen Mo."

Chen Mo stopped the pen and looked at the little fish that came over. It was just a little tired face, and Chen Mo was slightly distressed: "What happened to you? Didn't sleep well?"

"I lost sleep last night, I can't sleep at noon, you are going to eat, go out to play with me tonight."

Chen Mo cried and laughed at the answer to Xiao Yu. What logic is this, tired of becoming a panda, and going out to play. However, Chen Mo did not refuse to sit down with his computer chair and pick up the lunch box that the small fisherman sent.

"Do you often do this?"

"Occasionally, every few days of the month, it is a bit serious." Xiao Yu said in the chair.

"That's still going out to play? Go to bed early tonight."

"I still can't sleep, anyway, you have to accompany me to play tonight, can't you go?" Xiao Yu said with a tight face.

"Go, wait, I will finish the meal first."

chapters.title: Chapter 35: : Other People'S Boyfriend
chapters.body:
Chapter 35: : Other People'S Boyfriend

The night in Binhai is full of colorful neon. In the taxi, Xiao Yu leaned on Chen Mo’s shoulder. The soft, slow-paced music is introduced into the ears of two people, accompanied by the sound of the engine around the water, with a touch of silence in the noise.

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu’s tired face and felt a little distressed. I didn't sleep for two days, but I still have to play. However, Chen Yu’s request was firm and Chen Mo could not refuse.

"Where are you going?" Chen Mo asked.

"go to beach."

"No." Chen Mo immediately refused: "Now it is winter, the sea breeze is so big, your body is like this, go to the cinema, watch the movie, take a break."

"Well, what you said."

Xiao Yu nodded lightly and yawned, but his eyes were already full of bloodshot eyes. The whole person did not seem to have a trace of spirit, which was completely different from the previously full of small fishing.

"So tired?"

"I can't sleep very painful. If I want to review and can't learn, what can I do?" said Xiao Yu.

"I used to be like this when you were insomnia?" Chen Mo asked.

"It will be like this, but I found a way last time, so I can't sleep."

Xiao Yu smiled and smiled, his face floating red, just covered by the night, but people seem to be a little more spiritual.

"what way?"

"Don't tell you." Xiao Yu smiled and turned his eyes to the window: "Chen Mo, do you think that I am not particularly ugly, and I am abandoning me."

"No, absolutely not."

Chen Mo immediately shook his head, and the words turned too fast. He almost couldn't keep up: "In my heart, when are you so beautiful."

After Chen Mogang finished speaking, the taxis were a bit unstable. The driver in front of the driver smiled and glanced at the two through the rearview mirror, his face was weird.

"Don't be so nauseous." Xiao Yu smirked and his face was blushing.

All the way, no matter, Xiaoyu leaned on Chen Mo’s shoulder and looked up from time to time to see the scenery outside. Not long after, both of them went outside the commercial plaza.

Seeing the appearance of Xiaoyu’s exhaustion, Chen Mo did not take a small fishing street and took her directly to buy a movie ticket.

"What movie to watch?"

"My **** girlfriend" love comedy, No. 3 couple hall." Chen Mo handed the movie ticket to Xiao Yu, and put the snacks in his hand into the arms of Xiao Yu.

"Do you mean that I am awkward?" Xiao Yu was sullen and his face was not happy.

"Where, my family is smart and smart." Chen Mo laughed.

"Who is your home." Xiao Yubai gave her a look, holding a snack and followed Chen Mo’s body and entered the auditorium.

"What is the main content of the film?"

Xiaoyu just sat down and ate with snacks, waiting for the beginning of the movie.

"A spoiled rich woman and her family angered and left home. Then the wallet phone was stolen, there was no money to eat, refused to go home, tired and hungry in the street, passed out. He was saved by a poor boy passing by. As a result, this wayward rich girl went to the poor boy and started a funny love journey."

"What about the end?" asked Xiao Yu.

"I don't know." Chen Mo shrugged and said.

The two chatted about the sky, and after a while, the lights in the movie hall went out and the entire movie hall was quiet. Xiao Yu will hold the snack in his hand, his head resting on Chen Mo’s shoulder and his body relaxed.

The one-and-a-half-hour movie soon passed, and after the lighting of the movie hall was lit, Chen Mo saw the little fish that had fallen asleep in his arms, and he could not laugh.

The sound of the movie was so big, and there was a sneer around. It was so noisy, the little fisherman could sleep, and it was obvious that he had not slept for two days. It was exhausted.

These two days are busy studying the Chinese character programming language. He has always been giving him a small fisherman. He has not noticed the situation of Xiaoyu, and he has some slight pity in his heart.

Chen Mo did not wake up Xiao Yu, took off the snack on her hand and gently hugged her up.

Seeing Chen Mo hug the little fisherman, and the couple in pairs are holding around. Ignore a pair of strange eyes, holding a small fisherman to leave the seat.

"You look at other people's boyfriends." Chen Mo, behind a little fat girl, to the next boyfriend.

"She is asleep, you are not asleep." The thin and weak boy looked at his girlfriend who was bigger than himself, and he smiled.

"Then I fell asleep, will you hold me?"

"Yes, of course."

"Then I will come to the cinema next time, sleep, you have to hold me." The little fat girl laughed.

In her words, the scared boy was awkward, crying and crying. Looking at his girlfriend who was bigger than himself, he secretly vowed to date, not to watch a movie.

Chen Mo holds a small fisherman and walks out of the commercial square.

On the road, many people cast a weird look, but Chen Mo can only bite the scalp and take a small fish to quickly leave. This kind of love show, this way, it is estimated that people will be beaten.

All the way back to the rented house, Chen Mo was relieved.

Just in the taxi, the driver Master looked at their eyes, especially embarrassed. Also reveal a look I understand.

"Let me down." Chen Mo was ready to find the key to open the door, the small fish in his arms suddenly opened.

"you're awake?"

"Wake up early." Xiao Yu said with a red face: "When you ride in the square, you wake up."

"Then you didn't say it."

"You don't ask me again. I just want to see when you will wake me up, who will make you not call." Xiao Yu laughed.

This answer makes Chen Mo almost vomiting blood, can you ask? How to ask? However, seeing that Xiao Yu has become a little bit more spiritual, Chen Mo is also relieved.

"I am going to take a shower."

Thinking of going to sleep together tonight, Xiao Yu’s face was slightly shy, and she took the last time she left the clothes from the closet and went into the bathroom.

Not long after, Xiaoyu walked out wearing the last sling nightdress, and the whole person had a lot of spirit.

"Go to the bath, you are sweating." Seeing Chen Mo's eyes hooked, Xiao Yu's face was reddish, and the subconsciously pulled the skirt of the nightdress.

"it is good."

Chen Mo nodded, he knew, it was another difficult night. However, my heart is also happy. Xiaoyu is here to take the initiative to stay here. It is a step closer to leaving Xiaoyu completely.

After the shower, when Chen Mo returned to the room, Xiao Yu was already lying in the bed and playing with the mobile phone.

"It’s so tired, don’t go to bed early.”

Chen Mo grabbed the mobile phone of Xiaoyu and put it off. As soon as he squatted, Xiao Yu fished into his arms.

"What are you doing?"

"I am inconvenient now, you can't touch me." The voice of Xiao Yu was heard in the darkness.

"Then you still like this?"

"I have recently lost sleep. Last time I found out that sleeping in your arms is very practical and will not sleep, so I will come back to you tonight." Xiao Yu said: "I am still very sleepy now."

"You win, as long as you sleep well, you can do whatever you want. If you don't move out, you don't have to sleep." Chen Mo said.

"Think of beauty, think again, surprise you, and postpone it."

"Don't, I am wrong, can you tell me what the surprise is?"

"It is not a surprise to tell you."

The two chatted in the bed, and after a while, Chen Mo heard the slight nasal noise of Xiao Yu, which was exhausted and had this slight nasal noise.

Chen Mo adjusted her posture and hugged her and slept.

chapters.title: Chapter 36: :Recruitment? (Second, For Devlin_Zz'S Wanjue Plus)
chapters.body:
Chapter 36: :Recruitment? (Second, For Devlin_Zz'S Wanjue Plus)

The next morning, Chen Mo got up. Like the previous two, Xiao Yu had already prepared breakfast and was watching the TV series. After eating breakfast, Chen Mo took a small fisherman and left the rental house.

This morning's small fishing, changed the look of nothingness last night. Chen Mo also breathed a sigh of relief as he saw the angry little fish regained.

"Small fish, when you are tired, just say it to me."

"It's okay, it's just a little bit more serious recently. It's normal." Xiao Yu was sitting in the back seat of the bicycle, and his face once again raised a satisfying smile.

Last night, she was the most practical one to sleep in the past few days. When she slept to wake up naturally, the spirit she lost a few days ago was raised.

After sending Xiaoyu back to the dormitory, Chen Mo left the shop outside the school.

Seeing the disappearance of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu turned his head and walked back to the dormitory. Just just opened the door to the dormitory, I saw the eyes of three pairs of jokes.

"Why are you looking at me like this?" Seeing three pairs of unscrupulous eyes, Xiao Yu has a dim sum.

"Yesterday was not glaring, today is full of radiance, it seems that this is the nourishment of love." Li Ruoxuan smiled badly.

Xiao Yu's face was instantly red, smacked and walked back to his bed.

“Small fish, did the news of the class group be received?” asked Wang Xiaolan, who was wearing thick glasses.

"I didn't see, what news?"

"Sure enough, I don't think about it." Zhou Xiao smiled: "Internship, marching ant company, come to our school to recruit interns."

“The marching ant company?” Xiaoyu wondered: “Is it the marching ant company that sells butterfly-eye phones?”

She remembered the name. A few days ago, Zhou had to change her mobile phone. She had seen the butterfly eye. Very beautiful, let people like it at first glance.

In addition, news of the marching ant company appeared in the recent news, so she was very impressed.

"Yes, this is the marching ant." Zhou Yi nodded and said: "Now in Binhai City, the marching ant company is a star enterprise. It has not been established for a long time. It is already a company with a market value of over 100 million yuan. Therefore, the school attaches great importance to the army ant company. Cooperate and inform the various college classes about their recruiting."

"Small fishing, according to your conditions, you can try it, maybe you can enter the marching ant company, I heard that the welfare is very good." Li Ruoxuan said.

"What about you?" asked Xiao Yu.

“Xiaolan’s postgraduate study, I want to go home, help her father manage the company, I am going to try it, let’s be a companion?” Li Ruoxuan said.

"When did you apply for a company at the last job fair?"

"Don't mention it, the interviewer's appearance is so stunned that I can't wait to slap him."

Li Ruoxuan’s voice was a little angry and he calmed down.

"I am going to try the marching ant company. Although there have been smeared comments on the Internet recently, they are all fake. The potential of this company is very big. Do you want to have it together? You have an accounting qualification certificate and an accountant. Very big."

"Yes, then I will prepare my resume." Xiao Yu thought for a moment.

......

Chen Mo returned to the store and looked at the comments on the network about the army ant company. Since the reward information was sent out, it has been said that people have found loopholes and finally tried to crack the mobile phone, all of which ended in failure.

Those articles about the security loopholes of marching ants have long been overwhelmed by the buzz of netizens. There are loopholes, and I’m going to get a reward early.

After this period of experience, the marching ant system has been initially confirmed by users.

Not to mention the marching ant system, configuration, appearance, and waterproof performance, these advantages make the butterfly eye phone completely worthy of this price.

Butterfly eyes are more popular among female users because of their beautiful appearance. At this point, even Chen Mo did not expect.

Now the sales of butterfly eyes are steadily rising, and they are also entering the mobile phone market. However, if you want to occupy a larger market share, with a butterfly eye, it is unlikely.

They just became famous overnight. In the eyes of many consumers, the butterfly eye is just beautiful, the brand recognition is not too high, and there are concerns about quality.

If you want to make the brand bigger, a fire is obviously not possible, and it needs to develop in the future. Just want to put down his mobile phone and start research on the Chinese character programming language, his mobile phone suddenly sounded.

At this time, Zhao Min stood at the window of the office with her mobile phone and calmly looked at the traffic behind.

Recently, the company has a lot of troubles. Today, five employees have resigned. It is already certain that some people are digging the corners of their company. It’s just that which company is moving, and she is not sure.

After the phone was connected, Zhao Min was relieved.

This chairman, although young, but the kind of flustered, calm personality, gave her a lot of peace of mind. If she is the backbone of the company's employees, this young and low-key chairman is her reassurance.

"Chairman, today, five more employees have resigned." Zhao Min said calmly.

"You don't have to report to me so carefully?" Chen Mo said at the end of the phone.

"I want to see if you have a sense of urgency. I found that no matter what happened, I didn't panic you. Is it that all employees have been dug up, are you not in a hurry?"

"If you haven't been dug away, there is no sense of urgency." Chen Mo smiled and said: "The big waves are sanding, this is the choice."

Chen Mo heard that Shu Lao had talked about other civilizations, from emergence to destruction. Even in the light curtain of the science and technology library, I saw the process of civilization destruction, which looks like a science fiction movie, but I have seen more, and I am not surprised by many things.

"I feel like betting with you now is a pit."

Zhao Min is also very helpless to Chen Mo.

“The company has already contacted the University of Binhai University and will send people to the past to recruit interns. In the future, I intend to cooperate with Binhai University to let them send talents, especially technical talents.”

"I went to the interview at that time. You said that I went to the interview. Can you pass it?" Chen Moxiao laughed.

"Go, let me promise you to pass, turn back and expel you, expel the boss, but my dream has always been."

Zhao Min was also amused by Chen Mo's words. This chairman, sometimes it is really a bit of a bad taste.

"Say business, there are problems at the company headquarters."

"Well, you said."

"I plan to have two plots, ready to build the company headquarters and industrial park." Zhao Min said.

Now that the company's popularity has gone up, although there are still few people, it is necessary to plan ahead, otherwise it will be a bit slow after the development.

"Yes, it should be built." Chen Mo thought about it.

"Then I let Ling Feng go to contact with the city government. First, if you have time, come to the company."

For Chen Mo's excellent travel, Zhao Min is helpless. Anyway, this chairman has a look of indifferent appearance, she is used to it.

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo re-entered the research of Chinese character programming language.

The book on creating programming languages is very thorough in terms of keywords, phrases, and statement definitions. However, the expression of Chinese characters is too complicated, so research will be so slow.

This is a brand new computer language system, and it has never been tried. It is not as simple as translating C language directly.

The research in the first two months has made great progress, and I believe that it will be completed in the near future. So during this time, he decided to put all his energy into the study of Chinese programming languages.

As soon as he entered the research state, Chen Mo got stuck.

chapters.title: Chapter 37: : Chinese Character Programming Language
chapters.body:
Chapter 37: : Chinese Character Programming Language

Time is passing.

In the seat of the shop, Chen Mo looked at the computer screen and laughed, and the laughter gradually expanded and passed to the store. His laughter attracted a lot of passers-by from outside the store.

"Young man, are you okay?" The voice of a question made Chen Mo's laughter come to an abrupt end.

Just turned around and saw the aunt of the grocery store next door, looking at him with doubtful eyes. Chen Mo’s smile was stiff on his face, and his look was awkward.

"Nothing, I successfully passed a game, a little excited." Chen Mozhen touched his nose.

"Young people, make more money, wives, play less games, or you are sorry for your girlfriend."

"Yes." Chen Mozhen nodded.

After confirming that Chen Mo had no problem, the aunt of the grocery store turned and left.

Chen Mo once again set his sights on the computer screen. After the last one, another month passed, and finally the basic grammar of all Chinese programming languages was created.

In terms of basic grammar, he borrowed some grammar from C, B and assembly language.

Finally, combined with Chinese special expressions and grammar, it has created 18 types of data, 108 keyword groups, 36 control statements, constants, variables, operations, characters and arrays.

These basic grammars allowed him to study, summarize, and revise all day and night.

Even if he is a super brain and has the comprehension and memory that ordinary people can't understand, he has read and understood the two "Computer Language Creation and Application" obtained in the Science and Technology Library three times. It took him more than three months to put these. The basic grammar is all sorted out.

Looking at the words running successfully on the universal compiler on the computer screen, Chen Mo couldn't help but laugh.

The Universal Compiler is a compiler that comes with Computer Language Creation and Application. The purpose is to enable people who create computer languages to solve the problem of incompatibility of compiled code.

However, the basic syntax must be defined before writing the code.

Huang Tian pays off.

After such a long time of creation, the basic grammar is finally completed. On the compiler, it is the simplest decimal calculator.

The above shows success, which shows that the definition of the basic grammar is basically complete.

If you let people know that he only created a computer language in three months, he will definitely be a monster.

After saving all the basic grammar materials, Chen Mo shut down the store door.

"Young man, closed so early? Don't do business?" Just left the store, the aunt next door looked at him doubtfully.

"The game is cleared, and I have a day off today."

After that, Chen Mo rode his bicycle and couldn't wait to go back to renting a house.

"Now the young people, playing a game becomes neurotic, and even the work is not done. How many people have lost the game, go back and take care of the stinky boy at home." Auntie looked at Chen Mo's back and shook his head.

Three months have passed, and the basic grammar of the Chinese programming language has finally been created. Now he can't wait to enter the technology library.

After returning to the rental house, the computer bag was lost, and Chen Mo was lying on the bed directly.

A hundred meters high bookshelf, a familiar book with dark red book covers, and a table. At this time, Chen Mo was happy and everything was beautiful.

After opening the book on the table, Shu Lao appeared again in the library.

"Come." Shu old looked at Chen Mo and nodded slightly: "Is it to come to the technology? You have three random choices right now, do you want to use it?"

In the past three months, the random choice of his apprenticeship level authority, all useless, this time is to share technology and technology.

Random selection is a huge pit, and Chen Mo has a psychological shadow on random selection. So some time ago, he has not chosen, just to get it all at once.

"Use." Chen Mo nodded.

"First, I wish you good luck."

Shu old smiled a little, a little finger, a dense book arranged out, began to frantically rotate, and finally became a book in the hands of Shu Lao.

Chen Mo blinked and stared at the book in the hands of Shu Lao.

"Human Thoracic Developmental Aid (For External Use)"

"What do you mean?"

Chen Mo trembled and his face was twitching, still not willing to believe that this is a fact.

"Legative meaning, congratulations, this is a good thing." Shu old smile again, and laughed out loud.

"I know it is a good thing." Chen Mo wants to cry without tears.

"Don't?"

"Yes, how can you not?"

Chen Mo immediately jumped up, this pharmacy, really made it, on the ability to make money, definitely not lost to the mobile phone, women's money is the easiest to earn, especially the woman who loves beauty. It’s just that every time I randomly get this medicine, I don’t know how to describe my luck.

And in the medical field, he has no plans to enter for the time being.

"That's right, technology is not good or bad, as long as it can bring people happy technology, it is a good technology." Shu old book into Chen Mo's head: "This is low-level, there is a disadvantage, but For you, it should be an advantage."

"What do you mean?"

"If you want to use it multiple times, you can make more money." Shu Lao laughed.

"Come back." Chen Mo simply recalled the drug after the opening.

Shu Lao smiled and pointed at the air, and the light curtain fell again. The book was rotated again. Not long after, another book was parked in the hands of Shu Lao.

"Carbon crystal lithium ion battery production process"

After Chen Mo saw the book, he immediately laughed, came to a normal, and was able to use it temporarily. This is definitely good news.

"Come back." Chen Mo said.

After the old man took the book into Chen Mo’s head, he clicked on the air again. After the light curtain turned into a book and fell into the hands of Shu Lao, Chen Mo's face was black.

"Ball pen production process"

Not as good as the first one, this is coming, not much use. Now that he wants to insert a foot in the stationery market, it is better to enter the medical field directly. This thing can be done by everyone, and there is no uniqueness in technology.

Three times of random selection, battery technology can be used temporarily, it is also a small gain.

"Is the computer language created?" After the book was taken into Chen Mo’s head, Shu Laocai opened.

"Created." Chen Mo nodded, then the main event.

Shu Lao nodded with satisfaction, clicked on Chen Mo’s head and left it in the air. The basic grammar of the Chinese character programming language is listed on the light curtain.

Seeing the basic grammar of the Chinese character programming language, Shu old's face flashed a slight surprise.

"Okay, very good." Shu Lao is full of affirmation: "The basic grammar of this computer language is very subtle. It is more subtle than many computer languages I have seen. Your language is really interesting."

Hearing the affirmation of Shu Lao, Chen Mo’s face showed a happy color. Sometimes I don't understand the problem, he will ask Shu Lao, when he is fine before going to bed, he will come in and chat with Shu Lao. For so long, both of them are also teachers and friends.

Chen Mo knows that Shu Lao’s vision is very high and his knowledge is very wide. He can be said to be exquisite by Shu Lao, and it is definitely very good.

“Is it willing to share technology?” asked Shu.

"Of course technology sharing." Chen Mo nodded without hesitation.

"Well! Very good basic grammar." Shu Lao is still amazed: "This kind of exquisite computer programming language is very small, shared with the technology library, should get a good technology."

Shu Lao nodded with satisfaction, a little finger, the light curtain quickly turned into a book, and flew into the innermost of the science and technology library. After a while, a light curtain poured down from the technology library, and a book slowly formed in the hands of Shu Lao.

chapters.title: Chapter 38: : Low-Level Artificial Intelligence Development
chapters.body:
Chapter 38: : Low-Level Artificial Intelligence Development

"Low-level artificial intelligence development"

A book slowly formed in the hands of Shu Lao. When he saw the cover of the book, Chen Mo’s face smiled and slowly expanded.

Artificial intelligence, this is the hottest research nowadays.

He saw books on advanced artificial intelligence on the bookshelf, but now he has no permission to touch books on advanced artificial intelligence.

However, low-level artificial intelligence is also artificial intelligence, and Chen Moxin is happy.

I didn't expect to share the Chinese character programming language, but I was able to get the technology of low-level artificial intelligence development. It was simply that the pie fell in the sky and he was in the middle.

"Don't be too happy, this is just a method to teach you to develop, and it is not the source code for artificial intelligence." Shu Lao said.

"It's almost the same." Chen Mo smiled.

Let you copy the answer, and tell you the solution to the problem, the two have essential differences. However, the idea of solving the problem is the same as long as the final result is correct.

"A lot worse."

Shu old shook his head.

"The source code of artificial intelligence, unless copied and pasted, each artificial intelligence is created differently, and the code and programming language are the genes of artificial intelligence."

"And this kind of stress?" Chen Mo is full of surprises.

"Like you have children, the children born are children, but gender, IQ, and birth defects, there is a fundamental difference. In the final analysis, the genes are different, that is, the source code and the programming language are different."

"What makes me have a baby?"

Chen Mo was happy at once, how to hear it feels weird.

"Play a metaphor, but you create artificial intelligence, and you are almost like a child." Shu Laohe smiled: "The framework of artificial intelligence is here. As for your genes, it is up to you to work hard."

When he finished, he took the book in his hand into Chen Mo’s head.

"There is one more thing to tell you."

“You said.” Chen Mo recalled the knowledge of low-level artificial intelligence.

"Artificial intelligence programming language, determine its height, the programming language you developed, although just created, but the level of subtlety is better than the computer language you have learned before. Develop a manual with the programming language you developed. Smart, maybe there will be unexpected gains."

"Understood." Chen Mo nodded.

"The last thing is something that must be reminded. When creating artificial intelligence, be careful. I remember that there is a world of people who are violent and violent, creating artificial intelligence, connecting people's consciousness, and resulting in artificial intelligence. It also inherits the character of that person, and the world is destroyed."

"understood."

Chen Mo’s heart is cold, this is an example of artificial intelligence destroying the world. But everything is a double-edged sword, and it is impossible to do it because of this fear.

After staying in the science and technology library for a long time, I asked Shu Lao about some knowledge about artificial intelligence before coming out of the technology library.

This time, the harvest is very large. Except for the "Human Breast and Department Developmental Aids", the "Carbon Crystal Lithium Ion Battery Technology" only needs to synthesize carbon crystals to produce batteries.

According to the data in the book, carbon-based lithium-ion batteries are not comparable to graphene batteries. However, compared with the current polymer lithium-ion battery, the capacitance is much higher and the charging speed is much faster.

In the future, batteries in the fields of electric vehicles, mobile phones, and notebook computers are fully accessible. Even Chen Mo was surprised that this technology is only a low-level technology in the technology library.

But think about what might happen in the future world. These technologies are really too low-level.

"Ball-point pen production technology", Chen Mo does not intend to use, this process, now completely replaced, there is not much special. A technology company, entering the stationery market, doesn't mean much.

The biggest achievement this time is "Low-level artificial intelligence development."

Artificial intelligence technology, from the very beginning, he coveted, but the level of authority is not enough, in the science and technology library, can not touch the books on artificial intelligence.

The sharing of Chinese character programming languages and the acquisition of artificial intelligence, even if it is low-level, is also a very unexpected surprise.

The low level defined by the science and technology library is not the low level of Internet technology definition.

After sitting up from the bed, Chen Mo dialed Zhao Min’s phone.

There is now a technology for carbon-based lithium-ion batteries, but he also needs a lab to synthesize carbon crystals. After all, the carbon crystals recorded in the book may be new materials, and this must be experimented.

"Chairman, what?"

“Let people help me build a personal lab, physics lab and chemistry lab. I will send the equipment I need to your mailbox,” Chen said.

"Yes." Zhao Min immediately agreed: "Now I am in a meeting and I will call you back."

"it is good."

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo turned on the computer and listed the required equipment and materials, and sent a list to Zhao Min’s mailbox.

It was not long before the success was sent, and I received a call from Zhao Min.

"Chairman, just finished the meeting, listened to the reports from various departments. I will report to you about the company's financial problems."

"Well, you said that the sales of the butterfly eye will do, how much?" Chen Mo asked.

"800,000, a very good sales. In addition to the purchase of spare parts and the cost of various patents, there are other costs, there are more than 500 million net profit."

"No wonder so many people covet the mobile phone market." Chen Mo was slightly surprised.

"We are because of the mobile phone system and waterproof function, the price is higher than other mobile phones, and the profit is also much higher. You are now a billionaire, how do you feel?"

"Nothing to feel." Chen Mo smiled.

"alright, you win."

Zhao Min’s voice is full of helplessness. It seems that the big things can’t stand the wave of this young chairman.

"I took a piece of land on the Qinhai side, more than 300 acres. Because it is a high-tech industrial park, the government has a great discount. 800 square meters, 170 million won, and the location is very good."

“Yeah.” Chen Mo said: “Then let people plan the design first.”

"Ok."

"What are you doing with the physics and chemistry lab this time?"

Zhao Min was sitting in the office and looking at the emails from Chen Mofa, the equipment and instruments, and the materials. She couldn't understand what it was. Only professionals knew the role of this equipment.

"Prepare to study the battery."

"I can't understand your head."

Zhao Min smiled bitterly. Now Chen Mo is a person who supports a company's technology. She doesn't know what Chen Mo has eaten.

For this low-key chairman, she is increasingly invisible. It seems to be an ordinary young man, but I really understand it and I don’t know it.

"I will let people build the laboratory, and the relevant environmental assessment procedures will be done for you. After the fake is over, it should be fine. The R&D department is working on the development of the computer operating system based on the architecture of the marching ant system."

"I have a lot of ideas, and I will tell you the progress of their research." Chen Mo came to interest.

"The company is only supported by you alone, certainly not. The people in the R&D department do not have to pay for their meals. On the mobile phone market, we have opened a gap and stirred up this pool of stagnant water. The second mobile phone design, do you still have Bold idea?"

"Look back, I think about it."

"Ok."

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo focused on the computer and began to familiarize himself with the use of Chinese programming languages.

This is a nascent field, a Chinese programming language that is different from other computer languages. However, this programming language was developed by him. For the basic grammar, he is very familiar with it. It only needs simple learning and can be integrated.

Near the night, Chen Mo was awakened, looked at the time, and was awake. Don't say anything, turn off the computer and rush to rent a house.

chapters.title: Chapter 39: :Come Back Home!
chapters.body:
Chapter 39: :Come Back Home!

Chen Mo rode his bicycle and flew all the way to the dormitory area of the school. There are a lot of students around with luggage, and they are in a hurry.

Yesterday, after the test, the University of Binhai officially took a holiday, and Xiaoyu also booked a ticket tonight. When he went out to play last night, he had promised to fish, and he was going to send her today. The result almost missed the time, but fortunately, I finally took a look at the time.

The bicycle is all the way to the dormitory area, and you can see the small fishing waiting in the cold wind.

"Small fish, sorry, too busy, almost forgot the time." Stopped in front of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo grabbed the hand that had been frozen and cold, and held it in his hand.

"I was thinking about how to punish you."

Xiao Yu let Chen Mo grab his hand. He was a little angry. Seeing Chen Mo’s distressed appearance, he disappeared instantly and his face showed a sweet smile.

"How to punish you."

Chen Mo took the suitcase in the small fisherman's hand and took her to leave the school.

"Take me over in the car."

Xiao Yu pointed to the little sheep next to Li Ruojun and took out the key and handed it to Chen Mo.

“The weather is cold, and you don’t need to blow the taxi.”

"I am not cold, I will punish you for sending me in the past, when I come back, I will blow the cold wind." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Okay, I confess."

Chen Mo took the key in the small fisherman's hand and put the small suitcase of the small fish in front. Just sitting down, the little fisherman sat up and hugged him from behind.

"Hurry up, if you miss the time, you are dead."

Xiao Yu buried his head behind him, with a threat in his voice, but Chen Mo couldn't see it. At this time, her eyes were bent into a crescent shape.

"Sit steady."

Chen Mo reminded him to start the little sheep and leave the school.

It has already entered the winter, and the cold wind on the street is close to the evening. The pedestrians on the road are wrapped in thick down jackets.

The small fishing rod is behind Chen Mo, and the whole body is attached to him.

"After I got home, you will go back soon."

"Good." Chen Mo nodded. "After you go back, if you miss me, just call me."

"I won't miss you, narcissism." Xiao Yu hugged Chen Mo's arm tightly: "After the end of the year, I will send you a surprise."

"You said, I remember. Can you tell me in advance, what surprise?" Chen Mo asked.

"think it yourself."

"Go home this time, don't be caught by your family."

"Do you want to die or don't want to live?" Xiao Yu was teased by Chen Mo, and he sneaked a slap in his back: "Go to a blind date, find one that is taller than you, richer than you, handsomer than you." ”

"I am taller than I, I admit that there are a lot. I am handsome, I am afraid it is not easy to find."

"Don't shave." Xiao Yulu giggled behind Chen Mo's: "Then I am looking for a richer than you."

"I am more difficult to find than I have money."

"Would you ask if you are a millionaire or a multi-millionaire?"

"There is enough for you, you are priceless, and you don't sell much money." Chen Moxiao smiled.

Hearing this sentence, Xiao Yu's face instantly turned red, and on the face of Chen Mo's back, a sweet smile was hanging: "I found that you became slick, and the words were so nauseous. You said this to other girls." ?"

"How is it possible, I will only tell you."

"shameless."

On the road, the wind chilled, and Chen Mo slowed down. When he arrived at the station, his face was frozen. However, there is nothing wrong with the small fishing in the back, and the face is a little red.

After the ticket was taken, the two went to the waiting room.

"There is still ten minutes to get on the bus. This time you are lucky, come in time." Xiaoyu looked at the time and took out a black and white scarf from the bag and directly put it on Chen Mo: "Send you Gift, be careful when you go back, don't freeze, I will go first."

"Call me at home."

After the small fishing check-in was on the train, Chen Mo-cai rushed back to the school and sent the little sheep back to Li Ruoxi. After returning to renting a house, it was already at night. After a simple shower, I turned on the computer and continued the study this afternoon.

Many people are worried that the maturity of artificial intelligence will bring chaos to the present world. Many people are worried that the artificial intelligence in the movie controls the world's picture, and even calls for stopping the study of artificial intelligence.

However, artificial intelligence is a trend in the development of technology in the future. This trend will not stop because of some people's concerns. No country will give up research on artificial intelligence.

The next day, after Chen Mo was dressed neatly, he wore a scarf from a small fisherman and left the rented house.

Zhao Min sat in the office and handled the documents.

Although the company was not obstructed for some time before, but the response has been timely, it has now subsided, and the remaining small fish and shrimp have no incentive to spray.

The year is getting closer and things are getting calmer.

Now that the company has entered a period of rapid development, the scale of the company is also expanding, and there are more troubles.

"Zhao Zong, there is a gentleman looking for you." When Zhao Min was processing the documents, a staff member knocked on the door and walked in.

"Let him come in."

Zhao Min put down the documents in his hand and frowned. Just looking up, I saw Chen Mo, wearing a casual attire and wearing a scarf.

After seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min’s face was full of surprise: “Chairman, is the sun coming out from the west today? Will you come to the company?”

From the establishment of the company to the present, Chen Mo has not come a few times. Until now, the company's employees did not know what the chairman looked like. Even the management has never seen the chairman.

Zhao Min did not expect that Chen Mo would come over today.

"You are very handsome in this line." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

“Thank you.” Chen Mo sat down on the sofa: “I am going to go home and take a look at the company before I leave.”

“It’s just right.” Zhao Min smiled and handed the documents on the table to Chen Mo: “The company’s financial statements, you see, there is this market feedback and the sales of butterfly eyes.”

Chen Mo simply flipped it and handed the document back to Zhao Min: "Now the company is on the right track?"

"In the high-speed development period, I have rented the top ten floors of the Phoenix Building. As a temporary office area of the company, your office and laboratory are at the top. After coming over, you should be able to get it."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded: "This time, it is to look at the company's situation. It seems to be good now. The year is coming, you take 20 million out and give the employees the year-end award. As for how to distribute it, you Decide."

"It's a good boss." Zhao Min showed a smile: "Then I thank you for them."

"Nothing, I will go back first. If you have something, please call me."

At noon that day, Chen Mo went out with his suitcase.

Determining that the company has no major events for the time being, so Chen Mo will be assured of going home. The hometown is not too far from Binhai, and it takes only five hours to drive in the same province.

All the way to the scenery, when I came back to the house, I saw the busy figure of my mother. Chen Mo took a deep breath and smiled: "Mom."

The busy figure, the body is stiff, and when I look back at Chen Mo, Chen Mu’s face immediately smiles. Yesterday my son called back and said that he came back today, but did not expect it to be so fast.

"It’s all thin, you wait in the house and wait for dinner. It’s good soon.”

"Where is it thin?" Chen Mo smiled. Every time he went back outside, he would be said to be thin: "Dad?"

"The work didn't come back, I will call you Xiaoxiao."

Chen Moyi heard it, it felt a bit wrong. He came back on holiday and called Xiaoxiao? However, Chen Mo did not put it in his heart, put his luggage, and sat in the hall to watch TV.

Busy for so long, back home, is the real relaxation.

Not long after, Chen Mu came in with a smile: "Amer, you will go to your little house with me tomorrow."

"You will know when you get there." Chen mother smiled mysteriously and turned to the kitchen to be busy.

chapters.title: Chapter 40: : Blind Date?
chapters.body:
Chapter 40: : Blind Date?

Xiao Yu dragged the suitcase, looked at the strange station, licked his painful eyebrows and dialed the phone.

"Hey, I am standing."

"Would you like me to pick you up for a night?" There was a female voice on the phone.

"No, I am going to my uncle's house tonight, take a rest tomorrow, and the day after tomorrow I will go directly to your wedding."

"Okay, see you then." There was a female voice on the phone.

After hanging up the phone, I am preparing to call the taxi, and the phone will ring again.

"Small man, what is it?"

"Sister, tell you an unfortunate news." There was a gloating voice on the phone.

"What unfortunate news? I am a little tired now, you are going to say, I have to go to Zhang Shushu's house."

"I have stolen my father and Zhang Shushu to talk on the phone today. Uncle Zhang asked about your situation, knowing that you are graduating soon, and then talked about your lifelong events. You guess what happened next?"

The voice of Xiao Man is still gloating.

“What happened?” Xiao Yu has a bad feeling.

"Hey, Zhang Shushu said that there is a nephew in Zhenzhen. This year, it is just a university graduate, it is your school. He feels that the conditions of the two of you are just right, and then I want you to meet tomorrow, if you want to make a friend, don't Just be a good face when you are right."

Xiao Man laughed at the phone and was full of gloating.

"No?" Xiao Yumu snorted: "I want to kiss me?"

"Almost, my parents agreed. After all, the person introduced by Zhang Shushu is definitely reliable. Sister, you ask for more happiness. I can only help you here, hahahaha..."

When the laughter has not fallen, it becomes a blind sound, and Xiao Man has already hung up, leaving the little fish in the wind.

This time I came to Huacheng, I am going to attend the wedding of high school classmates. As a result, the father did not trust, let her go to a friend's home for a few days, and then go back in the New Year.

Uncle Zhang Yang has seen her several times, and her father is a fishing boat. The two have a good relationship, and Zhang Shushu is also very good. Xiaoyu promised it.

The result is now she wants to kiss each other? And she still doesn't know, if she really meets tomorrow?

Thinking of this possibility, Xiao Yu's face slammed and hurriedly stopped a taxi and left the nearest hotel. Uncle Zhang’s family must not go, or he will be embarrassed when he arrives.

Just getting on the bus, the phone will ring again.

Precious.

After seeing the number, Xiaoyu suddenly became nervous: "Zhenzhen."

"Well, Xiaoyu, are you standing? I will let your uncle pick you up."

"I have arrived, but I don't have to worry about my uncle. I am going out to have something to eat with my friends. I may be late at night. I will stay in her place and go to your house tomorrow." Xiaoyu lied and felt the heartbeat constantly. accelerate.

"That's it? You can, come over tomorrow. Go out at night, pay attention to safety, don't play too late."

After hanging up the phone, Xiao Yu was relieved.

......

The next day, Chen Mo was woken up from bed by her mother and got up for breakfast.

"Amer, go for a handsome dress and go with me to your little house."

"I haven’t seen me before, why are you so handsome?"

"Just come back, give a good impression, don't be as embarrassed at home, you are so big."

Chen Mo feels a bit wrong, but the mother's request, he did not refuse, found a set of clothes that look more comfortable, followed her out.

Xiao Yan is the little girl of the mother, called Shao Zhen, who also called her Zhen Zhen.

When he was a child, he took great care of him, so Chen Mo was very impressed with this little girl. I used to give him a red envelope every time I had a holiday.

Blind date?

"Is not feeling well? Then I asked my nephew to pick you up and take you to see. Your dad told us, let us look after you, or we can't explain."

Outside the kitchen, Chen Mo sneezed and his face was desperate. Even he didn't know what it was.

Just as Xiao Yan’s words, he listened to his ear and wanted to introduce the woman to him.

"Mom, Jane, I am not feeling well, I go out to buy medicine." Chen Mo shouted, and waited for the two to answer, and rushed out of the house.

When I just ran outside, I bumped into the little coward. The little coward is usually a little optimistic and humorous. Every time I see Chen Mo, both of them will be especially happy.

"Sliding down, it is estimated that we know that we want to introduce girls to him." Zhang Yang smiled and said: "Isn't Xiaoyan?"

Zhang Yang chuckled a few times: "Let's find it next time." Opportunity, this kind of thing is barely coming. They are just graduated from college, still young, and may not adapt at once."

Chen Mo ran to the street and looked awkward.

Too dangerous, actually did not lie to him to go to blind date, if Xiao Yu knows, I am afraid that Xiao Yu can laugh at him.

Just ran to the street and the phone rang.

Seeing that it was a small fisherman, immediately relieved, if the mother told him to go back, it would be better to go to the hospital for two hours.

"I am in the flower city now," said Xiao Yu.

Chen Mo immediately smiled, just now there is nowhere to go. Xiao Yan will definitely not go back. Now go home, my mom is going home, it is estimated to lick his skin and put other people's pigeons.

"I got a good friend to marry, just here. I just got home and informed me, and I came here again. I just came here last night, didn't inform you, just have time today, take me to play." Said the fisherman.

After getting the address of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo immediately rushed over.

After seeing the small fishing, Chen Mo was just deceived by the blindness of the blind date, swept away. However, this matter must not tell Xiaoyu, or she will be laughed at by her.

"Want to go?"

"Don't talk, let me play for a while."

When Xiao Yu thinks of a blind date, he wants to scream Chen Mo. The crow's mouth really made her cheated to get blind when she came back. Fortunately, my sister reminded me, otherwise she would be embarrassed.

"You can call."

When his words fell, he was squandered by Xiao Yu, but on his shoulders, he stopped after a painful hand.

"The first time I saw hitting someone, I hurt myself." Chen Mo grabbed Xiao Yu's hand directly and smiled.

"Hey~ I found you numb." Xiao Yu showed a disgusted expression and turned to smile gently: "Together with me to go to a friend's wedding tomorrow."

chapters.body:

After hanging up the mobile phone, Xiao Yu directly lies on the bed, wanting to cry without tears, finished, it seems that this level can not hide. It’s a big deal to refuse.

Xiao Yu got up from the bed and began to pack things out.

"Small fish will come over." Zhang Yang just put down his mobile phone and said to Shao Zhen next to him.

"Then I informed Xuemei." Shao Zhen immediately took out his mobile phone.

"There is no demand for this. The two children are still too young. Didn't they see that they ran today? Xiaoyu almost refused to come over. It is estimated that we know our arrangement." Zhang Yang said.

"Small fish, I have seen this girl twice, and she is handsome and well-behaved. It is just a small match, and it is a university. There must be a common language. Maybe I can do it, otherwise I will not have this proposal. What are you urging them, now they are all popular in love, seeing one side, not knowing how to recognize a face, and being friends is fine."

......

The next day, Chen Mo finished breakfast and hurried out of the room. He was really scared, let his mother catch it, and took him to Xiaoxiao’s house.

When arriving at the agreed place, Chen Mo waited quietly for the appearance of Xiao Yu.

Today is the wedding of Xiao Yu’s friend. Since Xiao Yu let him stay with him, Chen Mo will not refuse.

Not long after it appeared, Xiao Yu appeared in front of him.

At this time, the small fisherman, wearing a slim trench coat, inside is a tight-fitting sweater, which keeps warm and outlines the body perfectly. A touch of makeup, coupled with the unique temperament of the body, makes Chen Mo look awkward.

"Don't see enough?" Xiao Yu's hand shook in front of Chen Mo's eyes, his face with a shy smile.

"so beautiful."

"That is of course, today is to attend the wedding, too casual, it is not good." Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's arm.

"Let's go." Chen Mo asked.

After that, Chen Mo stopped a taxi and went to the hotel where the wedding was held.

Blue Spring Hotel.

At this time, the hotel was full of wedding cars, and the doorway was decorated with some joy. There were many people coming and going, and everyone had a smile on their faces.

After paying the gift, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu went into the wedding scene.

"Small fish, you finally came over." The bride of the welcome saw the fisherman and immediately smiled.

"Hey." Xiao Yu and the bride gently hugged.

"Is this your boyfriend?" He screamed Chen Mo.

"Yeah." Xiaoyu pulled Chen Mo over: "He is Chen Mo. This bride is the same table in my high school. The groom is also a classmate in high school, Sun Hao."

"Happy wedding."

Chen Mo smiled and said hello to the bride and groom.

"Small fish, now busy, can't call you, I am really sorry. I have arranged, at the sixth table, the former classmates are there." Sun Hao and Chen Mo shook hands and smiled.

"Okay, you are busy first."

Xiao Yu said goodbye and left with Chen Mo.

Just sitting down on the sixth table, I feel that the atmosphere is a bit wrong. Originally, I talked about the hot atmosphere and stopped all of a sudden. Everyone’s eyes were on Xiao Yu.

“He Xiaoyu?” A man in formal suit was surprised.

"Liu Qiwen, I haven't seen you for a long time." Xiao Yu smiled and nodded.

"It was a small fisherman. I didn't expect Xiaoyu to see it for a few years. It became so beautiful." Liu Qiwen looked at Xiaoyu, his face was bright, and people were alive: "Small fishermen graduated this year? Are you interested in coming to me?" work in company?"

"I have found a job, thank you." Xiao Yu still smiles.

"Now it should be an internship, the salary is definitely not high. I heard that you are studying management, go to work there, my family is going to open a fifth supermarket, lack a manager, start with a monthly salary of 10,000, and dividends." Said a strong man who said.

"Thank you, Hua Qiang, I can't manage the supermarket." Xiao Yu still has a generous smile.

Her temperament, let a few men on the table, all attention to her body. In the past, the small fishing was also beautiful, and many people chased it, but the small fishing at that time did not have the unique temperament.

"Small fish, who are you bringing, don't tell us?" A girl couldn't see the past and interrupted them directly.

"His name is Chen Mo, my boyfriend." Xiao Yu said.

"Hello everyone."

Chen Mo smiled and said hello, and put his eyes on the phone. He just came to accompany Xiaoyu, this is not his home, so there is no choice to interject.

"Secretly handing over boyfriends doesn't tell us, not kind. Oh, I remember many people chasing you at the beginning, you don't care," said the girl who spoke.

"Mr. Chen, dare to ask Gao?" Liu Qiwen asked.

"I? Selling mobile phones, now is a billionaire." Chen Mozhen smiled: "Zimbabwe."

This made Xiao Yu smile and hit Chen Mo’s shoulder: “He usually likes to joke, don’t mind. Like me, he is preparing to graduate, the same school, and now learning software development.”

"It male?"

Everyone suddenly realized.

"Small fish, congratulations, now is awkward, I believe that soon after, it is yours." Another girl said.

The atmosphere is relaxed, there is no show-off and ridicule, everyone is just talking about the high school things of the past, and the things that have been experienced in these years, the friendship of the former classmates, is simple and pure.

Suddenly, the lively scene was quiet, and under the host's message, a pair of newcomers also made a grand appearance.

After a series of process ceremonies, it was also the time to throw the ball.

"I hope that the sisters who are not married today will come out and accept my blessings." The bride took the microphone and her face covered up the unknown color.

"Small fish, let's go too." Next to a girl pulled a small fisherman and walked behind the bride.

The little fish face is a little red and grows at the end of the crowd. Suddenly, the exclamation sounded, and the person in front was madly retreating. The little fish did not react, and a flower ball fell in her arms.

Just after returning to God, I was hit by people who were constantly retreating.

"what……"

After the exclamation, Xiao Yu fell backwards, without the pain of imagination, only feeling in a warm arms, and a familiar taste.

After seeing Chen Mu’s familiar smile, Xiao Yu also laughed.

"I saved you once again, how can I reward me?"

After the end of the call, Chen Mocai went to the front door of Xiaoxiao and knocked on the door. After a while, the door opened, and Chen Mo saw Xiao Xiao with a smiling face at first sight.

I was preparing to leave the small fishing boat in the room. I heard someone coming in, grabbed my footsteps, attached my head to the door, and listened to the outside situation.

chapters.title: Chapter 43: : Artificial Intelligence Prototype?
chapters.body:
Chapter 43: : Artificial Intelligence Prototype?

On New Year's Eve, the flower market is like a dragonfly, the fireworks are shining, and the flashing fireworks ignite the most exciting climax of New Year's Eve. The night of the city was shrouded in joy, and the car was like water, light and fire, intertwined into a moving picture.

The outside world is lively and exciting.

Chen Mo looked at the computer in front of him, and the speed of typing on the keyboard remained at a high speed. On the computer's compiler, it is not a programming language that people are familiar with, but Chinese characters.

With a small fishing tour for two days, and the classmates finished the old, Xiaoyu has already bid farewell to him to go home for the New Year. Every time I saw him, the inexplicable smile made him unclear.

After Xiao Yu came home, Chen Mo did not go out and spared time. During this time, he was fine at home, and he also devoted himself to the development of artificial intelligence.

So far, it has been more than half a month.

Hey! !

Finally click on the mouse and see the successful prompt shown above. Chen Mo sat in the chair, showing a relaxed smile.

The development of artificial intelligence has been almost a month from the beginning to the present.

He has thoroughly acquainted with the book "Low-level Artificial Intelligence Development", and after familiarizing himself with the Chinese character programming language, he started to develop artificial intelligence.

Finally, on this New Year's Eve, the development of the main architecture was completed.

The framework of the current house has been completed. Next is the perfect thing. After Chen Mo saved the Chinese character source code of artificial intelligence, he lay in bed and entered the technology book stock.

This time it is not for anything else, just to optimize.

When technology is shared, the technology library will help him optimize the details so that he can save a lot of effort and let the technology library help him.

After opening the book, Shu Lao appeared in the technology library.

"Shu old, happy new year." After seeing Shu old, Chen Mo's face showed a relaxed color.

“New Year?” Shu Lao smiled and said: “I have been your so-called year for the first time. You have to choose random permissions every month, and you have to use it for five days. This time, do you want to change technology or chat? ”

"Share technology." Chen Mo said.

"Well?" Shu old clicked on Chen Mo's head and pointed into the air.

The dense Chinese characters appeared. This time the programming language is not English, but all Chinese characters. Seeing the source code above, Chen Mo's face is relaxed.

I feel very kind when I look at it. After all, it is all he created.

"Yes, very good artificial intelligence, great plasticity," Shu old nodded with satisfaction, and looked amazed: "I still feel your words, the programming language created is very subtle."

“So is it a mature technology now? Can it be shared?”

"It's just a prototype, but it's an artificial intelligence, quite a newborn baby. I don't recommend sharing technology now." Shu old shook his head.

“Why?” Chen Mo asked. This is the first time Shu Lao does not recommend him to share technology.

"It's not unshared, it's not recommended to share now." Shu Lao said: "You are just an artificial intelligence architecture, quite a house framework, but just a framework."

Chen Mo nodded and expressed his approval. He also thought so.

"You want to take an architecture, and then let the technology library optimize for you?" Shu Lao suddenly said Chen Mo's mind.

"Yeah." Chen Mozhen nodded.

"I don't recommend you to do this. The source code of this artificial intelligence is like a newborn baby. Its character, you didn't define it, you have to know that a person's personality is the most important.
