Just like a house is built, there is no decoration, and there is nothing to do. Do you want to decorate your house into a simple or luxurious style, or a classical one? These are best defined by you, so that the technology library can help you define it. I am afraid you don't necessarily like it. ”

Chen Mo nodded, it seems to be too anxious.

However, artificial intelligence was developed, he had to be excited, and all could not wait to share technology. Now, with the reminder of Shu Lao, Chen Mo also calmed down.

"Go out first, wait for the perfection, then share and share the technology, it will be better." Shu Lao said.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded and covered the book.

After stepping into the light door, Chen Mo opened his eyes and stared at the computer screen. It seems that the success of artificial intelligence will take some time.

More haste less speed.

Chen Mo returned to the computer chair and started to design artificial intelligence.

Early the next morning, Chen Mo was woken up by her mother from the bed. Last night, I was designing the character of artificial intelligence until I was in the early hours of the morning.

"Wait for you, they will come over, Xinxin will come over, don't sleep late, get up early, have dinner together and have fun."

Chen Mo got up and after the wash, the mother gave him a red envelope.

"This is a lucky year."

"Hey." Chen Mo took the red bag and smirked.

He still remembers when he was a child, he got the lucky money and was happy all day. After all, the childhood home is not rich, and the lucky money is almost the most money he has received in a year.

The money in the red envelope is not worth mentioning for him. But every time I get the red envelope, the joy is still there.

"Happy New Year." Dad saw Chen Mo's appearance and stuffed him with a red envelope.

"Thank you Dad." Chen Mo took the red envelope.

Not long after, Xiaoxiao’s family came over. Coward, Zhen Zhen and a slim girl Zhang Xinxin. After seeing Chen Mo, Zhang Xinxin immediately showed an excited smile.

"Brother, I haven't seen you in a year, and you have become handsome again."

"Hey, I like to listen to this, you brother I have always been so handsome." Chen Mo smiled: "The previous follower, now also become a big beauty."

"Brother, I heard that Mom introduced you to the object." Zhang Xinxin did not lower the voice.

When the words came out, Chen Mo almost vomited blood. Looking at the look of this gimmick, Chen Mo can't help. However, her words, let Zhen Zhen suddenly come up with spirit.

"Xiao Mo, every time I let you go, I have to find various interfaces. The girls have not seen you, and now they have gone home, but it is a good girl." Zhen Zhen said.

"Zhen Zhen, this is forcing not to come."

"Then you find it yourself, anyway, young and handsome. If you can't find satisfaction, if you can go back, I will introduce her to you, but you must be fast, and she is not allowed to have a boyfriend. After all, a very good girl. ""

"Oh, good." Chen Mosong breathed a sigh of relief.

"Brother, intuition tells me that you have a girlfriend." Zhang Xinxin immediately attached his head and looked smirk.

"Hey."

Chen Mochao Zhang Xinxin made a gesture, and the intuition of this girl was quite accurate.

"You are so afraid of knowing what?" Zhang Xinxin's eyes are bent into crescent shape.

"When is she willing to go home with me, I will give my mom a surprise when I get there. Don't mess up."

"Sealing fee."

"Small follower, actually talk to me about money?"

Chen Mo was laughed at by Zhang Xinxin's appearance, taking out the red envelope from his father and mother just now. Just took it out and was taken away by Zhang Xinxin.

"The red envelopes are mine."

"I graduated from high school this year, where do you want to go?" Chen Mo did not grab the red envelope and asked.

"Like you, Binhai University."

"I have the ambition to get a gift for you, and I want everything."

"What you said, a word is fixed, when I go to find you, see the future nephew." Zhang Xinxin smiled.

The two chatted with joy. After a while, the food was ready to be neat, and several people sat around the table and started the first meal of the New Year.

chapters.title: Chapter 44: : Silly Girl?
chapters.body:
Chapter 44: : Silly Girl?

"Xiao Mo, after an internship in the end of the year? Have you found a job?" Zhang Yang asked at the dinner table.

"I started my business in the last semester and started a company. Now the company has stabilized." Chen Mo thought about it, but he still spoke. After all, this is not a bad thing, and it is not necessary to take advantage of his family.

"Open a company? Why don't I know?" Chen said with amazement.

"You didn't ask." Chen Mo said: "I decided to tell you later, but since the coward asked, I will say it now."

"Does business need a lot of money? If you don't have enough, there is still a little savings in your parents. You can use it first." Chen’s father sitting next to him.

Father and his words are not many, but also because when I was young, my father went out late and had little exchange for the sake of his livelihood. But Chen Mo always satisfied every time he needed money.

This silent care made Chen Mo feel very warm.

"Dad, no, my current company has made money, and now there is no shortage of money." Chen Mo immediately refused.

"What does the company do? What is the name?" asked Xiao Xiao on the side.

"Calling Army Ant Technology Co., Ltd. is considered to be in network technology." Chen Mo said.

When Chen Mo’s words just came out, Zhang Xinxin, who was sitting on his left, opened his mouth and was surprised to see him.

The marching ant company, this name is no stranger to her. Some time ago, when the butterfly eyes came out, there was a lot of noise. There were several classmates in the class who bought a butterfly eye phone.

Because it is too beautiful, it is often used to show off. The marching ant company is also known by them. An emerging technology company has expanded its scale to hundreds of millions of dollars in just half a year and has become a well-known domestic enterprise.

Their parents are just ordinary people, and they don't pay attention to news and news in this regard, but Zhang Xinxin cannot know.

This matter is not reliable, it is more like Chen Mo is fooling people. Zhang Xinxin did not say anything, and secretly took a few eyes on Chen Mo, who was calm and self-confident.

"Network technology? Not bad, the future is very big, do it well." Zhen Hao nodded with satisfaction.

"Are you a partnership with your classmates? Is this not reliable?" Chen asked.

"Nothing, the company is me alone, I will not lie to myself?"

"Then where did you come to open the company?" The mother is a stance to break the casserole.

"I am at school, learning software development, selling a software, can take a lot of money. Money is earned by me. Do not steal or grab." Chen Mo knows the mother's worry, patiently explain.

"Well, you start a business, you don't have money to tell your family, parents have a little savings, but you can't do illegal things, understand?"

"Good." Chen Mo nodded.

The next step is to talk about some common problems. I also talked about Chen Mo’s marriage later. He heard Chen Mo’s first two big.

"Brother, you just brag without blushing." Just after eating, Zhang Xinxin ran to Chen Mo.

"When did I brag?"

"That is, you said that the marching ant company is yours." Zhang Xinxin said: "The current size of the marching ant company, how can it be regarded as a large enterprise, hundreds of millions of levels, you said you opened, who believes? Parents and grandmother them I don't know, you can't lie to me."

"Well, your brother, I am bragging." Chen Mo looked at the girl with no words.

Seeing Chen Mo’s appearance, Zhang Xinxin hesitated: “Brother, wouldn’t it be your company?”

"Cheat you."

"Then I believe that you are the boss of the marching ant company. Can you send me a butterfly eye phone?" Zhang Xinxin asked.

"I still don't believe it, now I believe, I want to set the way for me? No way." Chen Mo laughed.

"Brother, you look at my current mobile phone, it has been used for three years, my mom and dad don't give me money to change the phone. Since you are a big boss, you are definitely not bad."

"When you go to college, you want to buy it for you, now you can't. You are in the review stage, what is the use for your mobile phone? To show off? Don't think that your careful eyes I don't know."

Zhang Xinxin spit out his tongue and his eyes were turning around.

"That brother, are you a billionaire now?"

"Fake, I am bragging!" Chen Mo said.

"Brother, you won't lie, I believe that you are a big local tyrant, wait for you to go shopping, you buy me clothes, can you?"

"Reluctantly promise you, just a New Year gift."

"It's still the best."

After packing up the table, the group left home to go shopping. Today is the New Year, the flow of people is particularly large, and the group of people has not returned home until the evening.

Just after returning home, Chen Mo was tired in bed. Today, Xinxin took the clothes everywhere and tried to experience the horror of a woman shopping. Even the strengthened body felt tired.

Looking at the ceiling, Chen Mo is thinking about the character design of artificial intelligence.

According to the standard, he feels that the similar character of Xiao Yu is particularly good. The character of Xiao Yu is the best character girl he has ever seen.

However, it is a template for the character of a small fisherman. It seems that there are some shortcomings, but what are not enough can not be imagined.

Didn't think of it, Chen Mo picked up the phone and dialed the number of Xiaoyu.

"Small fish, happy new year." Chen Mo said.

"Happy New Year." The voice of the small fisherman came from the phone: "Chen Mo, when will you come to Binhai, I will inform you, I will send you a surprise."

"Well, every time I say surprises, it makes me tickle."

"Do not want?"

"Think, how can you not want to. I want to see what surprises, so that you are so mysterious." Chen Mo laughed.

"You will know when you get there."

Chen Mo looked at the ceiling and thought about it. He didn't know what to say next.

"Do you have any thoughts?" Xiao Yu feels something wrong.

"It doesn't matter." Chen Mo woke up and found that thinking about the problem was a little bit fascinating.

"Can you tell me? If it is unhappy, I will share half with you."

"I wonder, there is you, what can I have unhappy? I am thinking, if you create an artificial intelligence robot with your character, what are the deficiencies, think a little bit into the gods." Chen Mo said.

"I think these things are messy all day long." The little fisherman's face on the phone is blushing: "You might as well buy a silly girl, why are you looking for a girlfriend?"

"Stupid girl?" Chen Mo eyebrows picked and suddenly realized.

The character of Xiao Yu is mostly well-behaved, gentle, and less of a cold look.

If you add artificial character to the character mode mode of the silly girl of the magic mobile phone, you can choose different characters and increase the freshness of communication with artificial intelligence.

A word awakens the dreamer.

"Small fish, love you, you are my silly girl." Chen Mo sat up from the bed, a smile.

"you you…"

Xiao Yu suddenly did not adapt to the sudden love words of Chen Mo, the voice was shy, and did not know how to answer. This Chen Mo is deliberately covering her words, and she is ashamed of death.

"I am not a silly girl."

"In my heart, you are a silly girl, hehe."

"Don't tell you." Xiaoyu hurriedly hang up the phone. She was afraid that she would be so saddened by Chen Mo, she would be ashamed of herself: "This bad guy is getting more and more numb, but why am I so happy."

Xiao Yu lost his mobile phone to the bed, his face was red and his mouth was filled with a sweet smile.

After the phone hangs up, Chen Moxiao smiled and immediately turned on the computer and began to improve the character of artificial intelligence. Sometimes only a moment of inspiration is needed, and research can make a big breakthrough.

Now with reference materials and patterns, the character design of artificial intelligence will become much smoother. I believe that soon, the first artificial intelligence of Chinese character programming will be available soon.

Chen Mo’s heart is also a bit eager to wait.

chapters.title: Chapter 45: : Artificial Intelligence: Ink Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 45: : Artificial Intelligence: Ink Girl

Ten days passed by.

In these ten days, with inspiration, Chen Mo did not go out, has been hiding in the room, and began to improve the character design of artificial intelligence, after all, inspiration is hard to come by.

Low-level artificial intelligence does not have its own personality emotions, so personality emotions must be defined by developers.

The creation without emotions is always a cold machine. Even if this artificial intelligence is to assist him, if there is no mechanical sound that fluctuates, it will become boring after a long time.

The essence of artificial intelligence is to simulate the process of human thinking information processing, involving many disciplines including mathematical logic, linguistics, computer science and control science.

If it is not based on the knowledge theory of "Low-Level Artificial Intelligence Development" in the Science and Technology Library, it is almost impossible for Chen Mo to build an artificial intelligence architecture in a short time.

Artificial intelligence has two implementations on a computer.

The first is programming technology, using programming methods to make the computer system present intelligent effects, regardless of the computer's thinking method, whether the methods used by humans are the same.

The second is the simulation method, which is to achieve the computer's way of thinking, the same way of thinking as humans or animals. Genetic algorithms and artificial neural networks are all analog methods.

Chen Mo is now using programming techniques to make computer systems present intelligent effects. Even if the analysis of artificial intelligence development is very clear, it is not easy to achieve it.

During this time, he realized that the artificial intelligence structure that began to be built was entirely a newborn baby. He also understands why Shu Lao did not let him share technology at the time.

Now through continuous improvement, this baby has slowly grown up, but to what extent, Chen Mo does not know.

At this time, Chen Mo sat in front of the computer and clicked the mouse in his hand. Seeing the successful prompt on the compiler, Chen Mo was dumped in the chair.

During this time, the crazy operation of the brain made him feel deeply tired. It is not physical fatigue, it is mental fatigue.

After drinking a glass of water and slowing down, Chen Mo saved the source code on the compiler, climbed onto the bed and lie down, and entered the technology library.

After opening the dark red book, Shu Lao immediately appeared with the light curtain.

"Come on, it has been a month, you have a random selection technique now, do you want to use it?" Shu old asked.

"Use it first." Chen Mo thought about it.

This random selection is a bit pitted, once a month, and it makes him very depressed a few times. I don't know if this will be an immediate use.

"Good." Shu old, a dense book surrounded the science library.

Looking at the rotating book, Chen Mo was silently praying. After a while, a book appeared in the hands of Shu Lao.

"Ultra-thin rubber sleeve production process"

boom!

Chen Mo feels like a blue sky, and he is stunned by the thunder and his lips are smashing.

Do you dare to hang a little more?

Ultra-thin rubber sleeve production process? There are already countless companies producing these things, as well as various shapes and colors. Chen Mo was turned out of this psychological choice by this random choice.

"Do you want it? Hahaha..." Shu old smiled and couldn't help but laugh. There are countless technologies in the science and technology library, and he does not know how to describe Chen Mo’s luck.

"Yes."

Chen Mo took a deep breath and told himself that he was normal, and then there was artificial intelligence.

Shu Lao smiled and took the book in his hand into Chen Mo’s head: “Next is sharing technology?”

"Yes, sharing technology." Chen Mo revealed an ugly smile.

"Yeah." Shu old clicked on Chen Mo's forehead and left in the air.

The light curtain is falling, or the familiar Chinese character programming code. Unlike the last time, this time the Chinese character programming code is much more complicated than the last time. The branches of the tree are already covered with branches and leaves.

"Yes, very good artificial intelligence." Shu Lao looked at the Chinese character programming code above, and nodded.

When his words fell, the light curtain fell, and a little girl appeared in front of the two. Wearing a white sash skirt, two big eyes like exquisite, looks very cute, just like the ancient little princess.

Now the little girl has no eyes, no wisdom, just like a projection.

After the girl was formed in the technology library, Chen Mo was not surprised because the image of the little girl was designed by him. It's just projected, it's more cute and more beautiful than in the image.

"This image is very good." Shu Lao is satisfied with this little girl: "She and I have seen different artificial intelligence. In low-level artificial intelligence, it is very good, probably because of the programming language and the architecture you designed. Related. Are you willing to share technology?"

"Of course I am willing." Chen Mo immediately agreed.

"Then let's get started!" Shu old said, and he clicked on the air.

On the light curtain, the Chinese character programming code begins to change, delete, and add. The image of the little girl in front of the two also showed slight changes. The lines of the face are softened, the skin tone becomes more natural, and it looks more lovely than just now.

The time is not long and the code changes. The new source code is listed on the light curtain, and Chen Mo's gaze, with the flow of the light curtain, keeps the optimization place in mind.

These optimizations can make this low-level artificial intelligence more perfect.

After a while, the light curtain slowly shrank and became a book. The little girl's projection disappeared and appeared on the cover of the book.

"Give a name to the artificial intelligence you created." Shu Lao looked at the book suspended in midair.

"Ink girl, ink of the Mohist family." Chen Mo thought about it.

This is the first real work of the Chinese character programming language, and it remains in the technology library, so I thought about this more meaningful name.

With his silent voice, it is the artificial intelligence he created, so Chen Mo chose this name.

When his words fell, the words "墨墨" appeared on the book, and finally turned into a light, flying into the depths of the technology library.

Not long after, a ray of light landed and formed a book in the hands of Shu Lao.

After seeing the cover of the book, Chen Mo’s eyes condensed. The black book gives a heavy mystery.

Artificial Intelligence Development and Upgrade

“Is this an upgrade of artificial intelligence?” Chen Mo pointed to the book.

"Yes, this is the upgrade method of artificial intelligence. You are now low-level artificial intelligence, this book, teach you how to improve the wisdom of artificial intelligence, upgrade it to advanced artificial intelligence or super artificial intelligence." Shu Lao said: "This is a book that will be shared by artificial intelligence, but it is not so easy to upgrade. You can see it yourself."

After that, Shu Lao took the book into Chen Mo’s head.

After exiting from the technology library, Chen Mo sat back to the computer and modified the optimized source code. After the modification is completed and it is confirmed that there is no error, Chen Mo can't wait to put the source code file on the desktop of the computer.

"Artificial intelligence is starting, identifying the creator identity."

The innocent female voice is heard in the computer's stereo, and the camera of the computer is automatically turned on. Chen Mo said nothing, aiming the camera at his face.

"If the identification is complete, please enter the artificial intelligence name."

"Ink girl."

"Artificial intelligence name confirmation: ink girl, please select the personality. Well-behaved, cold, shy, belly black..." The computer's stereo sounded again.

"Oh, well." Chen Mo said to the computer microphone.

“The character selection was successful and the artificial intelligence was successfully launched.”

After the sound of the computer rang, the artificial intelligence source code file on the desktop of the computer disappeared, and there was no movement at all.

Chen Mo stared at the computer screen, full of doubts, not successful? Where did the artificial intelligence go? I found it on the computer for a while, but I still didn't find out where it disappeared.

Is artificial intelligence already escaping into the network? Just when Chen Mo didn't know how to be good, a young voice sounded.

"father."

chapters.title: Chapter 46: : Leaving Home
chapters.body:
Chapter 46: : Leaving Home

Chen Mo heard this voice, his eyes stayed, and he didn’t react at all. Looking around the room, I looked up and looked out the window.

Nothing was found, Chen Mo refocused on the computer.

"Dad." The sound on the computer sounded again.

Chen Moru was thundered and already out of focus. He is sure that this is not an auditory hallucination.

"Ink girl?" Chen Mo was surprised to find out, looking for it on the computer, still did not find the source code file of artificial intelligence.

"I am a Mexican woman."

The tender voice reappeared, and the desktop of the computer suddenly turned black into an audio interface.

"father."

puff! Chen Mo squinted and almost vomited blood. The feeling of being called Dad made him not know what to say. Inexplicably an extra artificial intelligence daughter?

"Ink girl, don't call my father." Chen Mo said with his forehead.

"You created me, didn't you call Dad? That's mom?" The waveform on the audio is constantly shaking.

"Don't call mom." Chen Mo almost slammed into the computer.

"What is that called you? Call her husband?"

Chen Mo was beaten by Reid and the whole person was kneeling on the computer chair. After feeling calm, I looked up at the audio of the computer screen: "You call me My Brother or Mr. Mo."

"Momgo." The waveform of the audio beats.

"Can your image come out?" Chen Mo finally breathed a sigh of relief.

"can."

As soon as the voice fell, the desktop of the computer became a simulated picture. The picture displayed on the screen was the little girl Chen Mo saw in the library. At this time, the ink girl, wearing a white dress, her eyes are smart, a clever appearance, let people like it at a glance.

"What are you going to do?" Chen Mo asked.

"I don't have a lot of things right now. I need to learn. I can only learn after I study." said the ink girl.

"How to learn?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"You want me to learn, I can learn."

......

Chen Mo sat in front of the computer and kept asking questions. His understanding of artificial intelligence only exists in books. He must also thoroughly understand the artificial intelligence created.

I will understand all the questions I want to ask, Chen Mocai said: "Then go learn."

"Okay, thank you, Brother. I am learning very fast. As long as there is network signal and equipment, you call me, you will come out."

After the ink girl finished, she disappeared into the simulation interface and the computer desktop returned to normal.

Chen Mo sat in front of the computer screen and fell into meditation.

From some questions he just asked, he had a preliminary understanding of the ink girl.

The ink girl has already had a preliminary sense of autonomy. But there is no sense of autonomy and no autonomy. There is no difference between good and bad and likes and dislikes for the same thing.

She can self-improve through learning, and only listen to his instructions, only Chen Mo let her do, she will do so.

Chen Mo does not know how to use the current concept to define the level of the ink girl. According to the current concept, the ink woman has the autonomy, reasoning and thinking ability, which should belong to the category of strong artificial intelligence.

However, this thinking and reasoning ability of the ink girl is in the hands of Chen Mo. That is, he lets the ink girl reason, and the ink woman will think about reasoning. Otherwise, any topic, in front of the ink girl, is just a pile of text data without temperature. The ink girl will not leave Chen Mo’s instructions and actively reason about these problems.

So now the status of the ink girl, Chen Mo does not know how to define. It should also belong to the category of low-level artificial intelligence defined by the science and technology library.

As for advanced artificial intelligence, if you want to upgrade, this is very troublesome. The purpose is to let the ink girl possess human emotions, and break away from Chen Mo’s instruction and restrain and reason.

Seven emotions and six desires, this is the most complicated feelings of mankind. Wanting to have an artificial intelligence with emotions is a very complicated process that you want to implement for a long time.

During this period, the ink girl is required to simulate the neural network system of the human brain, which is recorded in the artificial intelligence upgrade book. But the brain is the most complicated and mysterious part of human beings. To simulate the neural network of the brain, the amount of computation of the computer is impossible.

It is impossible to upgrade the ink girl in a short time.

Now that the ink girl has been initially completed, Chen Mo has also relaxed a lot.

"Amer, come out to eat."

"it is good."

Chen Mo's eyebrows, looked at the time, only to find that it was already more than five in the afternoon. After walking out of the room, I saw that my mom and dad had already waited at the dinner table.

"Amer, who did you talk to in the room?" He just sat down and the mother spoke.

"Call chat with friends." Chen Mo did not expect that his conversation with the ink girl was actually heard by the mother.

"Is it a girl?"

"Correct."

"That's good, then I won't ask other people. You have grown up. You have to think about your own affairs, come and eat more."

When I heard Chen Mo’s answer, my mom’s face smiled.

“When are you going to school?” Chen Shanhe, who is drinking a small wine, opens his mouth.

"Prepare for tomorrow."

“So fast?” The mother’s eyes were slightly lost.

"Mom, if I go there to buy a house, you and Dad move over." Chen Mo also saw the loss of his mother.

"Where do you come to buy a house?" Shao Xuemei immediately asked.

“Is not starting a company? Making some money, buying a house is no problem.”

Chen Mo did not say how much money he earned now. After half a year, his son suddenly became a billionaire, and his mother could not think that his head had a problem.

"Make so much money?" Mom looked surprised at Chen Mo.

"Well, there are quite a few."

"You don't have to buy a house. My mom and I are used to living here. I don't like tossing, and I don't have a relative or friend who talks there. You have money, and you will be married later." Chen Shanhe's tone is firm. .

Chen Mo is not reluctant, he knows that his father has always said one thing. Then take a card out of your pocket and hand it to your mom.

"There is one million in this card. The password is Mom's birthday. Every month, I will play 20,000 in the card. Dad will not have to go out in the sun and rain, go back and take the mother out to travel, the money is not enough to fight again. The phone told me."

"So much money?"

After the mother got the bank card, her hands shook, and her face was worried: "Where is this money?"

"I earned all legal income, Mom, you can rest assured."

"You keep the money for marriage."

"Dad, you don't have to worry about the money I get married, there is." Chen Mo can't smile.

"Yes, Mom will help you with it and give it to you."

"Mom, this money is for you. You don't have to worry about my marriage. If you are worried about this, I will transfer another one million to Cary."

"No, you keep it." Chen Mu immediately refused.

"Dad, you take your mother out to travel and enjoy the happiness, you don't have to work in the sun and rain, or I can't work at the seaside city."

Under Chen Mo’s persuasion, Dad still promised. The son has a good future, and in the future, he will not worry about his exhaustion.

After the meal, my mom took Chen Mo to talk about her family. After all, the son will leave tomorrow, and some will not give up. Just the topic of chatting, except for the company's affairs, the other is to urge him to hurry to find a wife, so that Chen Mo can not laugh.

The next day, Chen Mo said goodbye to his parents and embarked on a journey to Binhai. I have been resting for so many days, now the New Year has passed, and the next year is a new journey.

chapters.title: Chapter 47: : The Surprise Of Xiao Yu?
chapters.body:
Chapter 47: : The Surprise Of Xiao Yu?

In the afternoon.

Chen Mo opened the door of the rented house, put the luggage, and glanced at the renting situation. He began to pick up his sleeves and clean the room.

An hour later, Chen Mo put the mop and the rag on the bed, and returned to the city again. Then he could not be as relaxed as at home. After a while, I got up from the bed and turned on the work computer.

"Ink girl." Chen Mo opened the computer's microphone and called.

"Merg brother, the ink girl is coming." The desktop of the computer quickly became an audio interface, and a young voice came out of the speaker.

"What did you learn and learn?" Chen Mo asked.

"I learned a lot of things, it seems like everything." said the ink girl.

"Can you control my phone?"

"Can, things that can be controlled by the network, the ink girl can control, but the instructions of the brother-in-law." The ink woman said in a tender voice.

This sentence makes Chen Mo's back cold, the things that the network can control, the ink girl can control, think about it is horrible. It is strange that few people are worried about the artificial intelligence crisis, and artificial intelligence is out of control. This kind of danger does exist.

"Then talk to me on the phone."

Oh...

When Chen Mo’s words just fell, the phone rang and it was an unknown phone call.

"Mer. Brother." Chen Mogang was connected, and the voice of the ink girl was heard.

"I mean controlling my phone, not calling."

"Merg brother's order was to talk to Mercedes on the mobile phone, not control. Control the mobile phone, the ink girl needs to modify the mobile phone system, is the brother of Mercy willing to modify the mobile phone system for the ink girl?"

"Okay, you modify it."

"Ink girl received, it takes a minute to modify the phone system."

The voice of the ink girl fell, the phone fell into a quiet, after a minute, the phone jumped out of an audio interface, and the audio interface on the computer, the style.

"Mer brother, the mobile phone system has been modified, and now it is shut down and restarted."

"Open WeChat." "Open the squirrel browser."... "Close the music player."

After the phone restarted, Chen Mo gave the ink girl several instructions, all of which were completed. His mobile phone, now a real smartphone, feels good.

"Contact Xiaoyu."

"Telephone or WeChat?" asked the ink girl.

"phone."

When his words fell, the phone appeared on the interface of the small fishing phone. After a while, the phone is connected.

"Chen Mo, have you been to school?" The gentle voice of Xiao Yu was heard in the mobile phone.

"Just arrived today."

"Then I will send you a surprise tomorrow."

"What surprises? God mysterious?" Chen Mo asked.

"Not telling you for the time being." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Well, then I will take a look at it, what surprise is it. Is there any fun thing during this time?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, there is one thing that is especially interesting, but I won't tell you for the time being, I will tell you later." The mobile phone uploaded a sweet laugh from Xiaoyu.

"So happy?" Hearing the laughter of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo's mood has also gotten better.

"Of course, I will tell you later." Xiao Yu said: "I have something, I will hang up first, and I will remember to surprise me in renting a house tomorrow."

"it is good."

After Chen Mo hangs up the phone, he will look at the computer: "Ink girl, to help organize the information of the carbon crystal lithium-ion battery. I said, you remember."

"it is good."

......

The next day, Chen Mo left the rental room with his computer bag and went to the company.

Although he does not participate in the management of the company's affairs, the company is his after all, and usually does not pay much attention to it. Now, it is necessary to go back.

Moreover, he also wants to see how the construction of the laboratory he needs is going.

It is now necessary to have a complete set of experimental equipment to synthesize carbon crystals.

This carbon crystal is a carbon microcrystal that can be formed by graphite under high pressure for a certain period of time, so professional equipment must be used. His shop has no physical and chemical equipment at all.

After coming to the company, Chen Mo walked into Zhao Min’s office under the leadership of the sister at the front desk.

"Let's leave the holiday? Mr. Chairman."

After Chen Mo came in, Zhao Min put down the documents in his hand, frowning, and went to the sofa to sit down.

"This New Year, the sales of the butterfly eye is good. Now the company has slowly stabilized, the construction of the headquarters has also been put on the agenda, has been designed, I believe that in the near future, you can map."

"Take me a look at my lab. This time, I need to start researching the battery," Chen said.

"Ok."

Zhao Min stood up from the seat and the two walked out of the office side by side.

As soon as they appeared, they immediately caught the attention of everyone in the office. Zhao Min is the general manager of the company. In the company, now that he can walk side by side with Zhao Min, I am afraid there are few, and this person is still wearing ordinary jeans and T-shirts.

Is it Zhao’s boyfriend? Seeing the two people walking side by side, there is an idea in mind.

Ignore everyone's eyes, Zhao Min took Chen Mo, took the elevator and went to the upper level.

"The Chinese New Year period, delayed for a few days, and now the construction of the laboratory has come to an end, but there is still some equipment not available."

Zhao Min took Chen Mo to start a visit in the laboratory. Not long after, Lao Luo rushed over.

"Lao Luo, this is the chairman you have always wanted to see. He is Lao Luo, the person in charge of the current research and development system, and the equipment installation and debugging of this laboratory, I have their technical staff responsible."

"The chairman is good."

Lao Luo hurriedly greeted Chen Mo, but his heart was full of surprise. Chen Mo rarely appears in the company. Even if it appears, I am looking for Zhao Min alone. He is busy researching, and this is the first time he has seen Chen Mo as the chairman.

I know from Zhao Min’s mouth that the chairman is a young man, but now I’m a little too young.

Is this the creator of the marching ant system? If it wasn’t for Zhao Min’s personal introduction, Lao Luo would never believe it. This is the legendary chairman.

"Hello." Chen Mo and Lao Luo shook hands: "Labor, how long does it take to complete?"

"Because the Chinese New Year, the workers rested, so it was delayed for a few days, and now it takes up to five days to complete." Lao Luo said.

“There is no other staff in this area?” Chen Mo asked.

"No, here is your lab, it is an important area, you need to be authenticated to enter. Next to the computer room, here is the physical laboratory, this is the chemical laboratory, next to the window, is your daily office." Zhao Min With a few people, I will introduce while walking.

After a round trip in the lab, Chen Mo nodded with satisfaction. This lab also made them spend a lot of thought.

"I changed my office computer, Lao Luo, you make people assemble the ten computers and put them in the laboratory and office according to the current maximum preparation."

"The highest preparation now, the price is probably more than 50,000." Lao Luo said.

"It doesn't matter, money is not a problem."

Last night, he asked the ink girl to help him sort out the carbon crystal data. As a result, the ink girl ran for less than half an hour, and the computer burned so badly that it almost burned. There are certainly many things that need to be helped by the ink girl in the future. If it is a computer that is normally prepared, it will not support the ink girl for too long.

After a brief understanding of the company's affairs, Chen Mo left the company with a backpack. After five days, come here to receive the lab.

On the way back, the phone suddenly sounded, and after seeing the number of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo would smile.

"Small fish."

"Chen Mo, where are you? The surprise I gave you, and go back and sign."

"So fast?"

"Yes, I rushed back to sign for half an hour, otherwise I won't be surprised."

"That's good, I am going back now."

Chen Mo hangs up the phone, recruits a car on the side of the road, and rushes back to the rental house. Xiao Yu has been selling off the hook and said to give him a surprise, so that he really wants to see what this surprise is.

chapters.title: Chapter 48: : Mobile Smart Assistant
chapters.body:
Chapter 48: : Mobile Smart Assistant

Chen Mo all the way back to the renting house, looking at the empty door, a look depressed.

Not talking about half an hour? He came back, only twenty minutes? How is there nothing? Was it taken away?

With a depressed mood, Chen Mo called Xiaoyu’s phone.

No one heard?

Chen Mo is more confused, with a depressed mood, open the door. When he just walked in, he paused and looked at the front incredulously.

On the sofa, Xiao Yu is sitting quietly with a smile on his face, next to her, and a suitcase.

The long black hair was tied up, and two dragons and bangs were left in front of the forehead. The high-necked slim sweater and jeans were sleek and elegant.

"The surprise for you, sign it." Xiao Yu stood up from the sofa with a sweet smile.

"Okay, sign." Chen Mo smiled and walked over, hugged Xiao Yu kissed.

"Hey...hey!"

A minute later, Xiaoyu had buried himself in Chen Mo’s chest, breathing slightly, and his face had become shy and rosy.

"I will bully me when I come."

"Signing." Chen Mozhen smiled: "Will you stay here later?"

“Not welcome?” said Xiao Yu.

"Welcome, how could it not be welcomed?" Chen Mo said without hesitation. When I thought about a lot of ways and let Xiaoyu move out and live, it didn't work. Now it is a huge surprise.

"It's too small. Looking back, I am looking for a big house. We moved."

"No, I think it's very warm here."

"How can I do that, I can't let you be wronged."

"I don't need to use it, you have to listen to me." Xiao Yu kissed Chen Mo's face.

"Well, listen to you. One day you want to change the environment, tell me, I want to go anywhere." Chen Mo said with Xiao Yu.

"Okay, don't be numb." Xiao Yu broke away from Chen Mo's arms and his face was red and rushed: "I made an appointment today, went to the internship company to report, and now I have to look for her."

"Well, you are careful."

After Xiaoyu left, Chen Mo found several books on physics and began to look.

During the period of studying computer language, in addition to opening the book to read the 400th book, I took a second book about the creation of computer language. During the study of artificial intelligence, Chen Mo only read books occasionally.

The task of the 1000 books given by the Science and Technology Library has only seen more than 490 books, and only a few books have passed 500 copies. To upgrade the privilege level of the technology library, this is a task that must be completed.

Just now, I have time to finish the 500th book today. After entering the state, Chen Mo was trapped inside.

Three hours later, Chen Mo dropped the sixth book and his face was relaxed. The books on physics are much more interesting, and a lot of knowledge is figured out, so learning is very fast.

The 500 book has been completed, and the next is the time to take technology. Chen Mo lay in bed and entered the technology library.

"Shu old, take technology."

"Well, the fifth hundred, already halfway." Shu old nodded: "You have a right to choose now, what do you want to choose?"

“Remove all the styles of the butterfly eye phone,” Chen Mo said.

Now that the butterfly eye has been launched for a while, it can be said that it has already entered. Next, it is necessary to launch a second mobile phone to gain a foothold in the market.

Because there is not much breakthrough in mobile phone technology, the current mobile phone market, modify the mobile phone system, or change the chip and the screen, are all changing the money without changing the medicine.

However, because the design of the butterfly eye is too special, Zhao Min did not dare to launch a second mobile phone. Indiscriminately launched the second mobile phone, the appearance is ugly, the technology does not have much breakthrough, I am afraid that the word of mouth that just formed will collapse in an instant.

So Zhao Min will talk to Chen Modi about the second mobile phone. After all, the first mobile phone was designed by Chen Mo, and others can't really take over the design.

After Chen Mogang finished, Shu Lao’s big hand waved, and hundreds of books appeared in front of Chen Mo.

"The eye-catching series of butterfly eye phones are all here," Shu said.

Each product inherits the beautiful appearance of the butterfly eye series, and Chen Mo immediately puts his eyes on the introduction of the book.

"Butterfly Eye Smart Phone"; Product Introduction: equipped with mobile smart assistant: Xiaodie. Can contactless voice control, chat.

"Butterfly Eye Gemini Butterfly"; Product Description: Dual processor, can run dual operating system.

"Butterfly Eye Full Memory Concept Phone"...

Chen Mo browsed all the mobile phone introductions, but this time I left a heart. Chen Mo wrote down the shape and pattern of some of the most beautiful butterfly eye phones on the cover of the book.

These shape designs, applying for a patent for appearance, take a long time. Therefore, all the designs will be designed out at one time, and the application for a patent for appearance will not be so troublesome in the future. He will be required to design the application.

After recording the appearance of the graphics, Chen Mo will look at his foremost "Butterfly Eye Smart Phone", mobile smart assistant, contactless voice operation.

This is a big selling point. After all, there is no real contactless voice operation phone on the market.

"Shu Lao, this book, there is the source code of Xiaodie?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes. This is the biggest feature of this phone, just like the waterproof interface, there is also the source code of the mobile smart assistant."

"This is the case." Chen Mo immediately said.

Shu Lao nodded, grabbed the book and took it into Chen Mo’s head. Get the design of the butterfly eye phone and the source code of the mobile smart assistant, and chat with Shu Lao, Chen Mocai withdraws from the technology library.

Just out of the room, ready to organize the design of the butterfly eye, the door to rent the house will open, and the small fisherman took a few big bags and walked in.

Chen Mo took the bag from the small fisherman: "How do you buy so many things?"

"I have some daily necessities, and I bought some food and went back to cooking. These are the clothes for you to buy, your clothes are old, come and go to those sets, I will buy you two sets." ”

"There is your girlfriend, earning a lot." Chen Mo will smile.

"You know." Xiao Yu wrinkled his nose. "Tell you a good news. I have already reported to the internship company today and will start work tomorrow."

"What?" Chen Mo asked.

"As assistant to the general manager."

"Assistant General Manager? You just had an internship, there is such a position, will there be anything wrong with it? You simply resigned, I introduced a job to you, when my assistant, packaged and wrapped, The salary you said is counting." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu with some slight taste.

"Jealous?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo with a smile on his face.

"No."

"Then you want me to be your nanny? That can't be done, there is no salary with you. I can't spend your money from the beginning, I always have my own work, or what should I do in the future?" Said.

"I think that you are an intern, and when you are an assistant to the general manager, will it be a little bad?"

"Old is always a woman, will not have any intentions for me, rest assured? The original assistant has changed jobs, there is no suitable candidate for the time being. I am lucky, I used to be an accountant in the finance department, but the general manager saw that I was a little familiar. Just missing an assistant, let me temporarily give her an assistant."

"So? Why is the general manager familiar with you? Have you seen it?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, I have never seen her." Xiao Yu shook his head.

"What is the name of the company?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"The marching ant company."

chapters.title: Chapter 49: : She Is Mine.
chapters.body:
Chapter 49: : She Is Mine.

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu, his heart was full of surprise, and his face turned strange.

The assistant to the general manager of the marching ant company is Zhao Min’s assistant.

That night, when Chen Mo saved the baby, Zhao Min was present. It may be that he saw a small fish at that time, so he would think that the fisherman was familiar, but he did not think that she was Chen Mo’s girlfriend.

Do you want to tell Xiaoyu about the marching ant company? Chen Mo is entangled.

"Why are you looking at me like this?" Xiao Yu was stared at by Chen Mo, and his eyes were red.

"What do you do when you go to the marching ant company for an internship?" Chen Mo asked.

"You didn't ask me. I went to the school for recruitment in the last semester. I went to the interview with Ruo, and the results were all passed. If I went to the marketing department, I was in the finance department. When I went to report today, I was met by the general manager. She let me be her assistant.” Xiao Yu said: “What is it?”

"No, the marching ant company is very promising and has great development prospects. Being able to become an assistant to the general manager, I just feel that my girlfriend is not only beautiful, but very good." Chen Mo laughed.

"Do you have such a compliment to your girlfriend?" Xiaoyu groaned, but the sweet smile on her face sold her.

"I said the truth."

"The fact that you are a head, I am going to cook." Xiao Yubai gave him a look and headed for the small kitchen.

Xiao Yu went to cook, Chen Mo hid into the room and dialed Zhao Min’s mobile phone. Xiaoyu enters the marching ant company, which is also a fate. As her boyfriend, he does not interfere with the decision of Xiaoyu, but secret help is still possible.

"Chairman, what?"

"Are you looking for an assistant today?" Chen Mo asked.

"How do you know? It is an intern at Binhai University. It is a pretty girl. I looked familiar and forgot where I saw it. I just missed an assistant. Although she has no experience, she has good conditions and can train. I will Let her be my assistant for the time being."

"That's a coincidence." Chen Mo said,

"How? Call my assistant's idea?" Zhao Min asked.

"The idea of playing the wool, she is mine." Chen Mo was speechless.

"your?"

Zhao Min’s voice was amazed, and he fell into meditation. When he came over for a while, he suddenly realized.

"I said how familiar I was. It was the girl who was with you that night. Wait a minute? She doesn't know if the company is yours?"

"I didn't tell her." Chen Mo said.

"Then you are very good, opened such a big company, the girlfriend still has no knowledge." Zhao Min's voice with a banter: "You intend to keep holding her?"

"My plan is to let it go. She asked me to say that afterwards, she will find out slowly. She will not tell him suddenly. I don't want to affect her life because of this. She came back to tell me today. I only know that she has entered the company."

"Then you called me, did you inform me of this?"

"No, it is in the company, you bring her, so that she can stand alone." Chen Mo said.

There is no need to worry about his money, but he does not want to be a housewife as a vase after a small fishing, which is unfair to small fish.

Xiaoyu seems to be weak, but her heart is strong, she will never accept the life of the vase.

"Okay, Mr. Chairman, I must train well. But this matter, I advise you to say earlier. From a woman's point of view, it has been unfair to her to continue to do so," said Zhao Min.

"Well, I will handle this matter well," Chen Mo said.

"What else?"

"Yes, the preparation of the second mobile phone, the specific design, I will send it to you tomorrow."

"Okay, I will arrange."

......

After the meal, Li Ruoyi went out to go shopping, Chen Mo also began to organize the smart assistant of the mobile phone.

"Ink girl." Chen Mo said with a headset.

In front of him, it is a notebook and a desktop computer. If you want the ink girl to work hard, you must exchange work with two computers. Otherwise, you can't stand the computer.

"Mer brother, the ink girl is coming." Chen Mo's words fell, and the voice of the ink girl came from the earphones.

"Now, according to the framework I said, the program modules and program code are sorted out." Chen Mo said in a low voice, or he was heard by Xiao Yu, and he should not think that he is going crazy.

"Okay, Mom, you said." said the ink girl.

Chen Mo, speaking into the headset, began to elaborate on the programming of the mobile smart assistant.

With the help of the ink girl, he does not need to do anything, just need to say the program modules and functions, the ink girl can be the first time to sort the code.

Less than three hours before and after, with the help of the ink girl, the smart assistant and the motherboard design have been sorted out. This speed makes Chen Mo feel terrible.

The efficiency of artificial intelligence, especially the artificial intelligence that can think for itself, is not comparable to human beings.

Chen Mo took a deep breath.

With the help of the ink girl, these tasks become simple. He only needs to act as a conductor. Any instructions from him, the ink girl will be completed at the fastest speed.

The power of artificial intelligence is also evident in the power of auxiliary research. The efficiency of the research has increased by more than a quarter.

No wonder so many giant companies have to study artificial intelligence. If you really research strong artificial intelligence, I am afraid that production efficiency will increase to a terrible realm.

This is a true revolutionary technology. Lianpu. Jingda believes that leaders in this field will become the rulers of the world.

Chen Mo now intuitively feels the meaning of this sentence. If he is willing to let the ink girl attack the global network, the whole world will be paralyzed.

It is terrible that artificial intelligence falls in the hands of people with ulterior motives.

The ink girl is temporarily impossible to expose, and then it is beyond his imagination. The existence of the ink girl is absolutely more terrible than nuclear weapons.

"Mer. Brother, may I still need any help?" The earphones uploaded the voice of the ink girl.

“The last is the design of the phone case.”

Oh...

Chen Mogang opened his mouth and the door opening of the rented house sounded. It should be that Xiao Yu was back.

"The next mobile phone shell design, I will come by myself, you go to learn." Chen Mo said.

The design of the butterfly eye is still to come in person. After all, it is difficult to describe the pattern of the butterfly eye in words. And talking to the ink woman here, Xiao Yu can not think that his head is out of order.

"Okay, thank you, Brother, what help is needed, you can call the ink girl." The ink girl finished, and went silent.

Xiaoyu walked into the room and dropped the bag to the bed. The whole person fell on it: "It’s exhausted, and I won’t dare to go shopping anymore."

"When you take a hot bath, you are not tired." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"it is good."

Xiao Yu got up from the bed, took the clothes, and went into the bathroom. The sound of the water in the bathroom sounded, and Chen Mo also focused on the PS software in front of him and began to draw the shape of the phone.

Not long after, there was a footstep in the room.

"Chen Mo, help me blow my hair."

Seeing the small fishing water hibiscus, another face shy look, Chen Mo heart happy, got up and took the hair dryer.

chapters.title: Chapter 50: : Xiaoyujin Company
chapters.body:
Chapter 50: : Xiaoyujin Company

Xiao Yu was sitting on the sofa, staring at the variety show on the laptop, letting Chen Mo help her with her hair, her face with a smile and a sweet face.

"This surprise is a bit big today. When did you start planning?" Chen Mo asked while helping Xiao Yu to blow his hair.

"It was when I said that I was surprised, but who told you to lie to me back, so I decided to postpone it, so that you are not honest." Xiao Yu snorted and his nose wrinkled.

"What do you do to lie to you in the future?" Chen Mo asked.

"Do you dare? If you lie to me, I will move out, and if you live, let yourself wash your own smelly socks." Xiao Yu smiled.

"So serious? Is it another way?"

"No, don't give you a long memory, you will bully me in the future." Xiao Yu said.

After drying the baby's hair, Chen Mo put the hair dryer on his back and re-sit back on the sofa, holding the small fish in his arms.

"I want to work tomorrow, tonight..." Xiao Yuyu was in the arms of Chen Mo, his eyes were ashamed.

"Don't worry, anyway, you will be mine sooner or later. When you are mentally prepared, just tell me." Chen Mo said.

"Don't shame, who is yours." The little fisherman's mouth hung a faint smile.

"After you threw you down in the library, you were destined to escape my palm."

......

Nothing to say overnight, the next morning, Xiaoyu will have prepared breakfast. After breakfast, Chen Mo went to the store and Xiao Yu went to the company.

"Small fishing, you are so lucky that I am a little bit embarrassed." Li Ruojun and Xiao Yu shoulders walked into the company: "When you report, you are seen by the president, directly as the assistant to the president, that is the position that countless people dream of."

"I don't know why." Xiao Yu said: "I am worried now. After all, I have no experience in this area."

"Well, everything is from strange to familiar. After development, remember that I have been with you in bed with the girlfriends." Li Ruoxi smiled and said: "It is separated here, work well."

"it is good."

Xiaoyu looked at it and walked toward Zhao Min’s office. After entering Zhao Min’s office, Xiao Yu suddenly became nervous. After all, I went to work on the first day, and I heard that Mr. Zhao’s character is very strong.

"General Zhao."

Zhao Min looked up and carefully looked at Xiao Yu.

Xiaoyu is very handsome, although it is not the beauty of the country, when it is gentle and wild, it is very unique and makes people shine.

"Sit down." Zhao Min smiled at her: "Why is He Xiaoyu?"

"Yes, the fisherman's fishing." Little fish nodded.

"Good name, I will call you a small fisherman in the future. You don't have to call me Zhao Zong. Call me old, call me Zhao Jie or Min Jie."

Xiao Yu took a moment, did not respond, looked at Zhao Min's eyes. Everyone feels that Zhao Min seems to be a little different to her.

"Zhao Jie." Although a puzzled heart, Xiao Yu still screamed.

"Well, the specific things that need to be done, Minister Li told you yesterday? Today, when you go to work on the first day, if you don't understand anything, you can ask, and this is the company's information. If you look at it, don't understand it. Ask me directly."

Seeing that Zhao Min did not think so serious, Xiao Yu was secretly relieved.

If the general manager is a difficult woman to deal with, the days will be sad. Now see Zhao Min, her hanging heart is also put down.

"Okay, Zhao Jie." Xiao Yu took the folder that Zhao Min handed over and left the office.

......

Chen Mo sat in the shop, carrying headphones to direct the ink girl to draw the phone case design. Four computers work at the same time, and now he can't wait to have four mouths.

"Ink girl, you change the third color of the eye on the picture into a blue gradient. The middle eye is the position of the camera. You change the surrounding lines to black..."

The ink girl is very fast, but he can't command it. And the color lines that are made are somewhat different from what he sees in the tech library.

While recalling the pattern of the appearance of the butterfly eye, while describing, relying on a strong memory, the pattern is initially completed.

The color of the butterfly eye, once it is a little bit, seems to completely destroy the beauty. Therefore, after the initial completion of the pattern, many places must be modified by himself.

Two hours later, Chen Mo was sitting in a chair.

Now, in his opinion, designing the appearance of a mobile phone is more difficult than designing a mobile phone motherboard.

With the help of the ink woman, designing the mobile phone motherboard, he only needs to say the components, and then explain the connection of the line, the ink girl can do it in the first time. But the butterfly eye's design, color and lines are not simple connecting components of the board.

Two hours, four designs were completed, and the appearance of the butterfly eye in the technology library was completely copied. The help of the ink girl was not slow.

"Ink girl, you send the phone's appearance and motherboard design information to the company's president Zhao Min." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, My Brother, the mail has been sent successfully." Chen Mo’s words fell, and the inky voice of the ink girl rang.

After a while, Chen Mo’s cell phone rang.

"Connected." Chen Mo said.

"It has been connected." said the ink girl.

"Chairman, the mail has been received. I really want to open your head and see what structure your brain is, such a powerful art cell, it is a pity to not be an artist." Sensitive voice.

"I don't want to art this thing, don't make a fuss. It's just four designs. There are still a few copies in my head. I have designed it back to you, and I will save you later."

"Okay," said Zhao Min.

"How is the small fish?"

"I just came to the company, I am familiar with the company's situation, I was worried about it for a while? Would you like to come to the company?" Zhao Min said.

“The lab is finished again,” Chen Mo said.

"When is she still not knowing your identity? You are not afraid of her, I cut you?" Zhao Min smiled.

"The ship is naturally straight to the bridge, and it is not a lifetime." Chen Mo said.

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo put his attention on the computer.

“Ink girl, embed the mobile smart assistant into the marching ant system.”

The most important feature of this release of the mobile phone is the mobile smart assistant here.

At present, there is no mobile phone in the market, which can truly achieve complete contactless control. As long as the butterfly eye equipped with the mobile intelligent assistant appears on the market, it will attract a second sensation.

"Okay, the ink girl received."

The inky voice of the ink girl just fell, the decoder on the computer was opened, and the dense code was listed on the decoder like running water.

"Mer brother, the ink girl has finished embedding."

"Change my mobile phone system to a marching ant system equipped with a mobile smart assistant." Chen Mo said.

"Mer. Brother, please wait."

The ink girl fell into silence, and after a while, the phone automatically restarted and turned on again. In the set function options, an intelligent assistant option has been added.

"Ink girl, I am trying out the smart assistant now, you don't want to control my mobile phone for the time being." Chen Mo said with a smart assistant.

"Ok."

"Open your browser."

After the voice of the ink girl was silent, Chen Mo opened it after the voiceprint recognition.

Five minutes later, after the initial test was completed, Chen Mo was given a sigh of relief and sent the source code and data of the mobile assistant to the assistant ant system.

chapters.title: Chapter 51: : The Shock Of Lao Luo
chapters.body:
Chapter 51: : The Shock Of Lao Luo

Zhao Min looked at the information that Chen Mofa sent, and his look became dignified.

Mobile smart assistant.

According to the introduction of Chen Mo's information, this intelligent assistant can switch APP, browse APP, voice input, search, chat, and realize voice completely control the mobile phone.

The more familiar voice assistant is Apple's own Siri, but Siri can't browse the control app, the smart assistant can. More powerful than Apple's Siri, this is not a trivial matter.

This is already the scope of artificial intelligence, right?

At the beginning, Apple acquired Siri for 200 million US dollars. After so many years of improvement, it has achieved the present results. Now it was suddenly discovered by Chen Mo that the intelligent assistant surpassed and announced it, and the impact would never be small.

After sorting out the emotions, Zhao Min copied the source code of the intelligent assistant and the code of the marching ant system embedded in the intelligent assistant with the u disk, and completely removed the mail and left the office.

"Small fish, come with me."

"Okay." Xiao Yu said nothing, put down the documents in his hand, and followed Zhao Min.

When Zhao Min walked into the office area of the R&D system, there was a commotion in the scene. After all, Zhao always appeared very rarely here. Not long after, Lao Luo and Wang Sijia came over wearing a research suit.

"President, I am so anxious to find me, is there something?" Lao Luo saw Zhao Min's serious appearance and his face was serious.

"You two, go to the lab and check the things inside." Zhao Min handed the u disk to Lao Luo.

"Ok."

Lao Luo carefully took Zhao Min's u disk and took the lead and walked into the lab. Let Zhao Min be so cautious, and the things that I personally sent are absolutely important things.

"Small fish, you will come over."

"Zhao Jie, do I follow suit?" Xiao Yu is not stupid, naturally knows that there is something important inside.

"Nothing, look over and see more."

Zhao Min called Xiaoyu, followed Lao Luo and Wang Sijia into the laboratory.

After opening the information on the u disk, Lao Luo and Wang Sijia began to look seriously.

The layman looks at the excitement and the insider looks at the doorway.

Zhao Min can only simply read the instructions from Chen Mofa. The terminology does not understand. He only knows the functions of the intelligent assistant. Lao Luo and Wang Sijia are professionals. When they see something inside, the expression is immediately cautious.

"Wait, I will take the mobile phone and try it."

Wang Sijia ran out, and soon after, he took a butterfly-eye phone and ran it back to Lao Luo. Waiting for the system to write, Lao Luo and Wang Sijia will look to Xiaoyu, and stop talking.

"Zhao Zong, she?"

"She is not an outsider. If you have anything, let me say it," said Zhao Min.

“Zhao Zong, is our company doing artificial intelligence research?”

As the person in charge of the R&D system, Lao Luo had to ask this question because the R&D system was managed by him and the technology of the intelligent assistant was never touched.

"No." Zhao Min shook his head.

"Where did this information come from?" Lao Luo frowned.

“The chairman of the board researched it.” Zhao Min glanced at Xiao Yu, who said: “The chairman’s research, I have no way to know.”

Xiao Yu was also seen by Zhao Min inexplicably.

"Impossible." Lao Luo shook his head: "How can he personally study this kind of intelligent assistant so quickly, this is already an artificial intelligence category."

Xiao Yu was stunned on the side. She didn't even think about it. On the first day of work, the president actually let her touch such a core thing.

"In his hands, it's really impossible. The marching ant system is out of his hands. He has two teams on his own, or do you think the company is getting up?"

"Is there a team behind the chairman?" Lao Luo still couldn't believe this fact, and now his heart is shocked.

"The chairman's business is not what we should be inquiring." Zhao Min's face sank.

Lao Luo also realized that he was wrong and no longer tangled on this topic. If it was really studied by the chairman himself, he could not imagine what enchanting it was.

"Lost, I just saw this information too excited." Lao Luo said.

“First test the function of the smart assistant first.”

Wang Sijia brought the topic back to the intelligent assistant, picked up the butterfly eye that had been written into the new system, and could not wait to open the intelligent assistant.

"Please perform voiceprint recognition."

After Wang Sijia turned on the smart assistant function, the mobile phone immediately sent out a synthesized female voice. After the voiceprint recognition was successful, Wang Sijia entered his name as a title.

“Jiajia, Butterfly Eye Smartphone Assistant Xiaodie, is very happy to serve you.”

After Wang Sijia confirmed the name verification, the interface disappeared and the original desktop of the mobile phone was restored, and the existence of the intelligent assistant could not be seen.

"Call."

"Without a card, you can only make an emergency call." Wang Sijia's voice just fell, and the phone appeared Xiaodie's voice.

"Connect wifi."

"The wireless network interface has been entered, wifi is enabled, please select. The wifi connection is successful and the signal is normal."

"Open the browser." Wang Sijia continued.

When the voice of Wang Sijia fell, the phone immediately jumped to the browser page: "The browser is open."

"Open the News Technology Channel."

......

Wang Sijia’s order is said to be able to open the video, close the video, and browse the article without touching it at all. But there is a limit, say, the words on the phone screen.

Until she stopped, Wang Sijia still felt incredible.

The function of Xiaodie has surpassed the known mobile assistants, which is considered to be the category of artificial intelligence.

"It's front-end technology, user interaction is very good, speech recognition is very accurate. Its function is stronger than Apple's siri, Apple's siri can't close and control the application, it must be recognized in the siri interface,

Xiaodie is running after, background recognition, control systems and applications. It enables true contactless voice operation and is a very good smart assistant. ”

Lao Luo looked at Wang Sijia's test with a surprise on his face.

"Zhao should know its value?"

"According to the motherboard and design I took today, I will test the prototype of the second mobile phone with the fastest speed. Also, pack the smart assistant into charging software, and replace the icon with the butterfly eye pattern. By the way, prepare the smart Mobile assistant PPT." Zhao Min said.

"PPT? What?" asked Wang Sijia.

"The press conference."

"Understood," said Lao Luo.

"The data is well preserved." Zhao Min finished, unplugged the u disk and left with a small fisherman.

"Small fish, you go to inform the propaganda department, prepare me for the second mobile phone promotion plan. Also, let Minister Li send people to arrange the conference at the fastest speed." Upon leaving the lab, Zhao Min said to Xiao Yu.

"Good." Little fish nodded.

After returning to the office, Zhao Min dialed Chen Mo’s mobile phone. This guy suddenly gave her such a voice assistant, and almost caught her off guard.

"Chairman, are you researching artificial intelligence?" Zhao Min asked as soon as the phone was connected. Today, she was shocked, and Chen Mo made this out of silence. The importance is absolutely not lost to the marching ant system.

“Why are you asking?” Chen Mo asked with doubt.

"You sent the smart assistant, you don't know?" Zhao Min said silently.

"The smart assistant is the feature of the next mobile phone. The function is limited to the control of the mobile phone. Of course, it is not excluded to optimize it for use on the computer." Chen Mo said.

"The second mobile phone is listed, there is still a period of time. I intend to release the smart assistant first in software, open the popularity and user experience. Before the mobile phone goes on the market, I will remove the software." Zhao Min said.

"Yes, I am responsible for the product, how to make money, it is what you should think."

After chatting with Zhao Min, Chen Mo hangs up the phone and picks up the book at hand, quietly looking. Now that the lab is not finished, there is no technology project in his hand. It is rare to temporarily idle ~www.wuxiaspot.com~ is a good thing.

After all, half of the goal of 1,000 books is not completed, and he wants to accomplish this goal as soon as possible.

chapters.title: Chapter 52: :Frank
chapters.body:
Chapter 52: :Frank

CEO's office.

Xiao Yu is sitting across from Zhao Min, with doubts in his eyes. Today, she feels that this president is very special to her.

She is just an intern who just came in, and the president took her around and touched the core things. If you think about it, you don't feel right.

"Small fish, go to work on the first day, are there any habits?" Zhao Min asked.

"Fortunately." Xiao Yu wants to stop.

"You are thinking, why do I take care of you like this?" Zhao Min saw the appearance of Xiao Yu’s words and thoughts, and smiled slightly.

"Yes." Little fish nodded.

"Remember the thing that your boyfriend saved the baby on the shopping street? At that time, I was the one who was robbed of the bag by the gangster." Zhao Min said calmly: "I felt familiar with you yesterday, but after returning, I was taken Remind, just remember."

Xiao Yu looked at Zhao Min with surprise. At that time, the crowd was too chaotic. Her attention was on Chen Mo, and she did not notice Zhao Min.

"Because this thing takes care of me?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Of course not, your boyfriend is a very good person, you are also a very good girl."

"Thank you."

Xiao Yu smiled, but did not really think so. She is good again, and she can't reach the top of the company when she enters the company.

"It's off work now." Zhao Min smiled.

"Oh, goodbye, Sister Zhao."

After Xiaoyu left, Zhao Min called Chen Mo’s phone: “Chairman, I have something to ask you.”

"You said."

"You really don't want to tell Xiaoyu?" Zhao Min asked.

"This problem is really a headache. I will mention it tonight." Chen Mo, sitting in the store, was a little helpless.

He knows Xiaoyu, Xiaoyu knows this, and there will definitely be a burden that will affect her life. Now Xiaoyu has entered the company. After a few days of laboratory completion, he has to go to the company. It has already reached the time of frankness.

"Since you say this, then I am relieved. Now Xiaoyu is my employee, but I will be nosy. Now I should get off work, goodbye, Mr. Chairman." Zhao Min said.

In the store, Chen Mo put down his mobile phone and took a sigh of relief and continued to look at the design of the computer's mobile phone.

......

Xiao Yu’s heart was filled with doubts. After packing things up, he left with a bag. Just after leaving the company, Li Ruoxuan greeted him.

"Small fishing, how is your work today?"

"It's very good, Zhao always takes care of me."

Xiao Yu is constantly reminiscent of Zhao Min’s words, and it feels a bit too much. But when it wasn't right, she didn't figure it out.

"Is it heard? Yesterday, the handsome guy around Zhao was the most mysterious chairman of our company."

"At the beginning, everyone thought it was Zhao’s boyfriend. I didn’t expect it to be the chairman. It’s so young, like a graduate who just got out of college, and there is no such thing as a technical house. The sun is handsome, and his girlfriend must be very happy."

Xiao Yu and Li Ruojun just walked out of the company's door, and the two female white-collar workers came out together and talked and laughed.

“Graduate? Technology House? Sunshine?”

When I heard the conversation between the two people, Xiao Yu’s mind immediately appeared in a figure and hurriedly took out his mobile phone to open the search.

"Small fish, what are you doing?"

"Look for an answer."

In the heart of Xiao Yu, the body became tight. Not long after, Xiao Yu bit his lip to collect the phone, becoming absent-minded.

"Small fish, what's wrong? Is it uncomfortable?" Li Ruoxi saw the appearance of Xiaoyu, and immediately felt that he was not quite right.

"Nothing, but this answer is too unexpected for me." Xiao Yu said calmly.

"What answer?" asked Li Ruoxi.

"After a while, tell you." Xiao Yu took a deep breath.

"Small fish, you are not kind, I am a good girlfriend with you in bed, what do I even say? Is it about Chen Mo? Are you um 哼~~" Li Ruoxi's smile is a bit bad, one I know what I know.

Xiaoyu was interrupted by Li Ruoxuan and his face was red: "Don't think about it, go ahead, or traffic jam."

......

That night, Chen Mo sat on the sofa and looked at the book quietly. I was thinking about it, and I should say how to speak with Xiao Yu.

Not long after, the footsteps came from the living room. Xiao Yu, as usual, wore a nightdress, sat down beside him, turned on the computer, and watched the show quietly.

“How is your work today?” Chen Mo asked.

"Fortunately, the president took care of me, I don't know why she is so good to me." Xiaoyu said calmly.

"Small fish, what if you have something to look at you?" Chen Mo put down the book, hugged the shoulders of Xiao Yu, and let her lean on her shoulder.

"There is something to see." Xiao Yu was held by Chen Mo, and he didn't know what he was thinking.

"I didn't help you kill the virus at the beginning? For this, there was an oolong in the library."

Chen Mo thought about the opening. Just finished, Xiao Yu smiled. When I first thought of the scene in the library, she wanted to laugh at the scene.

"And then?" said Xiao Yu.

"At that time, the global computer virus crisis, the killing software I developed, was able to kill the virus, I sold it to the Seven Tigers company, that was my first bucket of gold. Later I used the money to register a company..."

" Needless to say." Xiao Yu interrupted Chen Mo's words: "Let me be quiet." Xiao Yu leaned on Chen Mo's shoulder and his eyes fell on the computer screen.

Chen Mo’s heart is a little hairy, Xiao Yu’s appearance, he has never seen it, which makes him have no bottom, but he does not speak with interest.

It was not until the end of the program on the computer that Xiaoyu said: "Why did you suddenly tell me this?"

"You have all entered the company, sooner or later know, take the initiative to explain better, when did you find out?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Don't worry about when I found out, I don't enter the company, you are not going to say?"

"No."

"You don't talk now, I want to hit you."

Before Chen Mo reacted, Xiao Yuu held his fist and screamed at Chen Mo’s shoulder. After a while, Xiao Yu screamed and licked his fist.

Seeing this scene, Chen Mo laughed. Once again, I beat myself and hurt myself.

"Laughter."

Xiao Yu's face was red, and he held a small fist and greeted him. Until the tired, the small fish stopped.

"Not angry?" Chen Mo grabbed the hand of Xiao Yuhong.

"I am very angry, you don't want to move, I want to bite you." Then, Xiao Yu buried his head on Chen Mo's shoulder.

"Oh……"

Chen Mo did not resist, holding Xiao Yu in his arms and gently appease. Xiao Yu is willing to lose his temper, then it will be fine, he is afraid to be as boring as he was.

After half a minute, Xiaoyu only let go of his mouth and looked at the **** teeth on Chen Mo’s shoulder.

"Is it painful?"

"Where do you have such a bite to ask for pain?"

"Really, who will let you take such a big thing to me."

Xiao Yu snorted and got up and looked for it in the cupboard. After a while, he took a bottle of red syrup and a cotton swab and came over to help Chen Mo deal with the wound.

"Not angry, right?"

"I will ask you to bite you again."

After careful handling of the wounds by Chen Mo, the small fisherman put down the red medicine and walked back to the room. After Chen Mo waited for the red potion on his shoulders, he packed up the books and walked into the room.

chapters.title: Chapter 53: : Chairman!
chapters.body:
Chapter 53: : Chairman!

When Chen Mogang entered the room, he saw Xiao Yu’s absent-minded sitting on the bed, his eyes without focal length, and he didn’t know what he was thinking.

Seeing this scene, Chen Mo walked gently and sat down beside her.

"Small fish."

"Oh. Sleep." Xiao Yu was screamed by Chen Mo, awake, and looked at him and lay in bed.

"Is it still angry? If you are angry, hit me, you can do it." Chen Mo whispered.

"No, after you bite you, you will not be angry." Xiao Yu turned and looked at Chen Mo.

"Then why are you depressed?" Chen Mo asked.

"When I got off work today, I heard colleagues from the company say that I saw the chairman, and then their description reminds me of you, plus Zhao’s words, and most importantly, you send me a mobile phone, when you start, march The sign of the ant. It used to be just doubts. I didn’t think about it. Today, let me connect everything together.” Xiaoyu said softly.

"And then?" Chen Mo hugged Xiao Yu, asked softly.

"I checked the news of the military ant company on the Internet. Chen Mo, the chairman of the marching ant company, only heard the name and did not see anyone. Do you know what mood I have after seeing Chen Mo?"

"What mood?" Chen Mo smiled bitterly.

"Happy and angry." Xiao Yu said: "Happy, because my boyfriend is very good, angry because you are holding me. If you don't say tonight, it is not as simple as biting you."

When I think of the identity of Chen Mo in the company today, Xiao Yu’s mood is complicated. If Chen Mo didn't tell her tonight, she didn't know if she should pretend not to know.

After Chen Mo confessed, she was relieved, at least not knowing what to pretend.

"Sorry, I will not be jealous of anything in the future."

"Don't say sorry, I would rather not know the truth, you are still the ordinary you." Xiao Yu smiled and said: "Now I am thinking, how to punish you."

"You said, how can I punish me?" Seeing the state of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo’s heart was loose.

"I originally wanted to give you all of this for you this weekend, but you have been stunned for half a year, so you can't touch me for the next six months." After that, Xiao Yu smiled happily.
