"No?" Hearing this sentence, Chen Mo's face became depressed.

"How? Unwilling? As a punishment for you to lie to me, I move out and squat. Let yourself wash your own smelly socks." Xiao Yu said.

"Who said that I don't want to, I have been here for so many years, I am still afraid of half a year? Anyway, you will be mine sooner or later."

"Who is yours? Now you are inspecting the state. If there is anything else that glares at me, I will go home and kiss each other."

When I think of a blind date, Xiao Yu smiles more happily and buried his head in Chen Mi’s arms.

I got up the next day and saw the faint smile on Xiaoyu’s face. Chen Mo’s heart was relaxed. Yesterday’s incident did not affect Xiaoyu, and he was relieved.

After breakfast, Chen Mo went to the company with Xiao Yu.

"Small fish, are you a dog abuser to the company?"

Just arrived at the door of the company, Li Ruozhen just appeared, and saw the two men holding hands, a sly look: "I don't want him to come to work here too?"

"He really wants to work here in the future." Xiao Yu said.

"No? Really abuse the dog? Chen Mo, which department are you in?" Li Ruoxuan looked at Chen Mo.

"No department." Chen Mo smiled.

"You will not come over to apply for it?" Li Ruoxuan said.

"Chairman."

When Li Ruoxuan’s words just fell, Zhao Min walked over and looked at Chen Mo and Xiao Yu with a smile on his face.

"Dong... Dong... Director?" Li Ruoxi didn't react at once, and stared at Chen Mo. The amount of information is a bit large, and her mind can't turn.

"Chen Mo is the chairman of the company." Xiao Yu said softly in Li Ruo's ear.

"Oh." Li Ruoxuan's smile is a bit stiff: "Death fishing, why do you tell me now? Very shameful, do you know? The chairman is good." Li Ruoxi hurriedly greeted Chen Mo.

Zhao Min, the chairman of the board, immediately put all his eyes on Chen Mo. This is the first time Zhao Min has disclosed the identity of the chairman in front of the employees.

"Hello everyone." Chen Mo greeted everyone.

"The chairman is good." The people did not dare to hesitate.

"Everyone works hard, let's talk inside, if you come over." Chen Mo finished, took the lead to Zhao Min's office.

"Let's go." Xiao Yu took Li Ruoxuan and walked in behind Chen Mo and Zhao Min.

As soon as everyone walked, the office immediately exploded.

"I said why when Xiaoyu came, he became the assistant to the president. I didn't expect her to be the girlfriend of the chairman."

"The chairman is young and handsome."

"It is handsome, Minister Li has come over and hastened to work."

......

After a group of four people, after entering the president's office, they all looked at Chen Mo.

"I came over and wanted to meet the management of the company." Chen Mo said.

"Is it tired to figure out?" Zhao Min said with a joking.

From the beginning of the company to the present half a year, the number of Chen Molai companies, the number of hands to come over. Every time I report the financial and company situation to Chen Mo, I am on the phone. I usually want to find someone and I can't see it.

However, Chen Mo’s trust in her, she is also very useful, has been conscientious.

She is the backbone of the company, Chen Mo is her reassurance. Chen Mo came back, she can do things, she can let go of her hands and be bold, otherwise she is always afraid of the company's big things.

To Zhao Min’s words, Chen Mo just smiled.

"I am going out now, inform people to have a meeting, just to prepare for the intelligent assistants conference today, the management of each department is there." Zhao Min finished, left the office, let people notice, and then returned to the office.

"From tomorrow, I will come to work. You will first complete my office area and the laboratory will speed up." Chen Mo said: "If you go to the administrative system, let Li Lingfeng take her for a while."

"I?" Li Ruoxi pointed at himself incredulously: "Why me?"

"At the beginning you sold me a small fish, I still owe you a favor."

Li Ruoyu spit out his tongue and remembered that when he appeared in the library, he sold the information of Xiaoyu to Chen Mo. It is still very interesting to think about it now. Just did not expect that Chen Mo actually became the chairman of a large enterprise. She still can't turn her brains to the present.

"Small fish? Your girlfriend, do you want to be an assistant?"

Zhao Min’s banter makes Xiao Yu’s face slightly shy, without refutation, just sitting quietly around Chen Mo.

"No, let her continue to follow you, follow me, I can't teach her anything."

Not long after, the management had already arrived at the conference room. After Chen Mo and Zhao Min received the notice, they also took Xiao Yu and others to the conference room.

Tomorrow is the day when he officially entered the company. It is necessary to see the management today.

After the four people walked into the conference room, the scene immediately quieted down, and everyone’s eyes were placed on Chen Mo. They have already got the news, and the chairman who has been seeing the end of the dragon has been here today. He has already arrived at the company today and plans to stay in the future.

When Chen Moyi walked in, he sat in the middle position and scanned the circle at the conference table.

"Hello everyone, many of you have already seen me, but I still have to introduce myself officially. My name is Chen Mo, the chairman of the company..."

chapters.title: Chapter 54: :Supervision
chapters.body:
Chapter 54: :Supervision

After Chen Mo’s brief introduction, he sat in the middle position. For the first time, he was also the first time to open the high-level meeting. He didn’t know how to say it, but how to say it simply, there are not too many constraints. The purpose of this time is to show a face and let the people of the company know the existence of his chairman.

"You simply introduce yourself and let the chairman know." Zhao Min said: "Lao Luo, you start first."

"The chairman is good, my name is Luo Yonghao, they call me Lao Luo, the person in charge of the company's research and development system."

"The chairman is good, my name is Wang Sijia, deputy of the R&D department, senior engineer, mainly responsible for the development of the army ant system."

When Lao Luo finished, Wang Sijia also stood up and stared at Chen Mo as if he wanted to see Chen Mo. Studying the army ant system, there is a smart assistant. Now Chen Mo is in the eyes of Wang Sijia, it is the existence of God.

"Hey, Zhang Yi, you continue." Zhao Min directly interrupted this flower girl, she did not know how to say this little cousin.

After all the brief introductions, Chen Mocai looked at Zhao Min.

"The next step is the planning and promotion plan for the smart assistant's conference." Zhao Min turned his attention to Yang Lin, the person in charge of the conference.

"The press conference has entered the preparatory stage, and the invitation letters from the major media have been sent out. At the latest five days, the conference will be ready, the specific venue layout, process and personnel arrangements..."

Chen Mo sat quietly in the main seat. He was the first time to attend the meeting. In terms of company management, he really didn't understand it, so he was fully responsible to Zhao Min.

After the meeting, Li Ruoyi fled with Li Lingfeng and Xiaoyu returned to his job and became familiar with the company. Under the leadership of Zhao Min, Chen Mo entered the floor of the laboratory.

"Chairman, the army ant system is really developed by you?" On the road, Wang Sijia, who was with him, spoke curiously about Chen Mo.

"Jia Jia." Zhao Min glanced at this cousin who was not big or small: "Chairman, she is the cousin I told you. I used to be a senior engineer of the Philippine company. It was a computer genius. I was dug up by me. Now Responsible for the development of the mobile ant computer operating system."

As soon as he heard that Zhao Min’s cousin, Chen Mo looked at Wang Sijia strangely. But looking at it, it should be a very embarrassing character.

"The marching ant system is really developed by me." Chen Mo said.

"The smart assistant is also developed by you?" Wang Sijia looked at Chen Mo admiringly.

"Jiajia..."

"Nothing." Chen Mo interrupted Zhao Min's words. He still liked Wang Sijia's sly personality: "Intelligent assistants are also developed by me."

"You are so powerful, can you teach me? I can be your experimental assistant." Wang Sijia looked at Chen Mo with a sly look.

"I don't need an assistant for the time being," Chen Mo said.

The existence of the ink girl is too sensitive. Once her information is discovered, he will be in great trouble. The importance of artificial intelligence is comparable to nuclear weapons.

Chen Mo thought for a moment and said: "You are developing a computer operating system. I have a little idea to teach you. The marching ants and Linux are very different, but many things are similar.

For example, the development of the kernel tree, you can refer to the idea of Linux parallel development, let the system freely develop and track defects within the controlled scope, without affecting the stability of the system..."

Chen Mo and Wang Sijia talked about the idea of computer operating system development. After all, they are based on the marching ant system, and the architecture of the marching ant system is very well understood.

Zhao Min did not expect Chen Mo to really teach Wang Sijia, and did not interrupt, quietly watching. This chairman, she can't see how enchanting it is.

Wang Sijia listened with his eyes open, and all kinds of thoughts in his mind continued to emerge.

Chen Mo's general idea of computer operating system development and some error-prone places, told Wang Sijia, did not go deep into the explanation.

Because he is not clear, the development of computer operating system responsible for the R&D department has already reached a step. And if he explained his ideas in detail, he couldn’t finish talking all day and night.

After a while, Chen Mocai stopped.

"This is my general idea, for reference only. The research progress of the computer operating system will report to me next time. If you don't understand anything, you can ask me."

Just after he finished, Wang Sijia looked at him with a look of admiration.

"Well, Jia Jia, I need to ask again later."

Zhao Min interrupted Wang Sijia. She was really afraid that this big wild girl would talk indiscriminately. When the scene was awkward, it would be troublesome. After Wang Sijia stopped, Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"In your personal laboratory, only a few instruments have not been installed. The day before yesterday, I have already worked overtime for 24 hours. I will finish it this evening. The office can be renovated. Now you can work here."

Zhao Min walked into the office with Chen Mo.

This is the upper level of the office building and the office area of Chen Mo. Looking down at the window, you can clearly see the traffic in the coastal city, the view is very open.

"Okay." Chen Mo nodded.

“What other needs?” asked Zhao Min.

"People put a few bookshelves next to them, put some books on them, when I have time, I need to read books." Chen Mo said.

It is impossible to rush to the library of Binhai University to read books, so I can only study and read the book. After all, there are 1,000 books, and half of them are not completed. He always thought about what the next level of authority in the technology library is.

"Okay, I will make people arrange." Zhao Min nodded.

"The last point, you can help me to see if there is a small villa with good environment, buy a set, and live in the corner of renting a house, it is not a solution."

"Hey, Mr. Chairman, I am not your domestic servant." Zhao Min was laughed at by Chen Mo: "Your house, you will not see it yourself. Well, I will do this thing, who will make you the boss." Give me a salary." Finally, Zhao Min still has no choice but to accept his fate.

"Okay, nothing," Chen Mo said.

"This is the lab's magnetic card and password, and the magnetic card has a spare in my safe. The password is only you and I know. The lab door is equipped with face recognition, fingerprint recognition and iris recognition, your private territory, without you. No one can enter the lab."

Zhao Min took out a magnetic card and handed it to Chen Mo.

"Your assistant is hiring, I haven't found a suitable one for the time being. I will bring it with me. If nothing happens, I will leave first. The company still has a lot of documents waiting for me to handle it."

"Ok."

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo opened five computers on his desk.

This is what he requested. The main computer on the market is currently designed to support the operation of the ink girl. Next to the company's computer room, he no longer has to worry about the problem that the computer can't support after the ink girl runs.

"Ink girl."

After the computer's microphone and network were turned on, Chen Mo sat on the office chair and looked at the screens of the five computers.

"Merg brother, the ink girl is coming." Chen Mo's words fell, a little girl in a white skirt appeared on the front of his computer desktop.

"From today, if you supervise the company's financial system and bank account, if you have an unclear account, you will be notified."

chapters.title: Chapter 55: : Smart Assistant Conference
chapters.body:
Chapter 55: : Smart Assistant Conference

Chen Mo is very reassured to Zhao Min, suspects are not used, and people are not suspicious. Therefore, after handing over the company to Zhao Min, he did not ask the company's situation except for occasional financial statements.

But rest assured that Zhao Min does not mean that people underneath will not have mites. The company's finances are the most important thing for the company. The money is moving, and he can't guarantee that the people below will not move.

As early as the formation of the ink woman, he wanted the ink woman to supervise the company's financial system and account, but did not come to the company at that time, so did not do so.

Now that he has entered the company, he needs to supervise finances. The locusts inside are absolutely not allowed to exist, otherwise it is easy to shake the foundation of the company.

"Ink girl received." Chen Mo's words fell, the voice of the ink girl sounded: "The bank account has been monitored, the financial system is monitored, the data is being aggregated, the calculation is completed, the account is no problem."

Chen Mo nodded and focused on the computer in front of him.

"Now the information on carbon-based lithium-ion batteries is being sorted out." Chen Mo said.

Carbon crystal is a new type of battery material. Before the graphene battery technology is mature, the carbon crystal battery is very promising. As long as the carbon crystal battery is made, there will be great benefits for electronic products.

The laboratory will soon be able to complete the renovation, and after sorting out the technical data, he will be able to immediately put into the experiment.

Time passed and four days passed quickly.

Today is the day of the product ant company product launch. The news of the product ant company's product launch conference was released three days ago by the official Weibo.

The last time the marching ants were silent, the explosion of the marching ant system, the butterfly eye phone two heavy news, earned enough eyeballs.

After a few months, the marching ants released the product again, immediately attracting everyone's attention.

The original butterfly-eye phone was also named the most beautiful mobile phone of the year. The marching ant company also took advantage of the butterfly eye to enter the mobile phone market and quickly gain a foothold and gain recognition from young people.

Because of the production restrictions, the butterfly eye has only sold about two million units, but this sales volume is already terrifying for a new company.

The marching ant company has been reluctant to expand production, so by now, the butterfly eye phone is still out of stock in the market.

Nowadays, marching ants are so grandly releasing new products, and they don’t tell everyone about specific products. They have to think about it, whether it will be a product comparable to the marching ant system, or a new mobile phone.

With a mysterious veil, the product launch conference of the marching ant company has also become the focus of attention. The media that was invited, this time no one was absent, and already came to Binhai City early.

Many media want to interview Zhao Min in advance, but without exception, they are all rejected.

At this time, Zhao Min is heading towards Chen Mo's office area.

The launch of the intelligent assistant was held at two o'clock this afternoon, and the chairman was still busy experimenting in the laboratory, which made her very helpless.

The laboratory was completed three days ago. From that day on, Chen Mo went to the laboratory every day and went into the laboratory.

She also finally knows why Chen Mo didn't have time to deal with the company before. The typical technology house, the whole company, only Xiaoyu can call this chairman.

After facial recognition confirmed his identity, Zhao Mincai entered Chen Mo's experimental area.

Chen Mo’s eyes stared at the iron cans in front of him. On the table in the laboratory, there were a lot of black matter on the top, some of them had been formed into a sheet, the lines were covered with regular lines, and some were shimmering. The substance is attached to it but not pure.

Because the data is inaccurate, these are failures. Therefore, Chen Mo tried the best synthesis conditions of carbon crystal during this time.

Before and after, it has failed seventeen times, this time is the eighteenth experiment.

"Ink girl, how big is the pressure now?"

“1013KPa, ten standard atmospheric pressures.” The inky voice of the ink girl sounded.

“How high is the temperature?”

Chen Mo picked up the notebook at hand and began recording data. These data are the key to his experiment.

"1347K, just reached the boiling point of lithium."

"It seems that it still doesn't work." After Chen Mo finished, he began to debug the instrument in front of him: "The temperature is increased by 1K, the pressure is 50KPa, and this number is reached, remind me."

"Ok."

Not long after, seeing the fragments of graphite crystals in front of me, Chen Mo sighed.

It has failed again, but this time the results are better than the previous one, and the distance is further. The current crystal fragments are already a little bigger than just now. According to the current state, a little bit of experimentation, and soon get the accurate data of the synthesis.

In the book of carbon-based lithium-ion battery technology, only the conditions for carbon crystal synthesis are described, and no specific data is mentioned. The problem of synthetic materials is a thousand miles away. It is only a conditional error, and the experiment will fail, so you can't worry at all.

"Ink girl, combine all the experimental data and analyze it, then show me the data sheet." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, the ink girl understands."

After a while, on the printer next to it, I printed out a table. The above is the comparison of the data of many failed experiments. Looking at the data table, Chen Mo was slightly fascinated.

"Mer brother, Zhao Min entered the experimental area." When Chen Mo thought about the reasons and data of the laboratory failure, the ink woman reminded.

"Oh, I know."

Chen Mo put down the crystal fragments in his hands, took off the experimental cockroaches and gloves, and washed his hands out of the laboratory. Just came out and saw Zhao Min coming over the corridor.

"Chairman, how do I know every time I come?" Zhao Min asked. She remembers that every time she enters the experimental area, Chen Mo will know and then come out of the lab.

"Isn't it necessary for face recognition? I have a notice here." Chen Mo took the lead to the office area: "What happened this time?"

"How is the experiment?"

"It's still a failure, but there is some progress. It will be successful soon. I will send you the list of equipment in the end. You will buy the equipment and build a factory to facilitate the mass production experiment."

"Okay, the conference of intelligent assistants is held today. At two o'clock in the afternoon, there is another one and a half hours. I will come to you and go over together," said Zhao Min.

"Well, just have time, just go and see."

After Chen Mo changed his jacket, he followed Zhao Min. He also wants to take advantage of this time and think about the reasons for the failure of carbon crystal synthesis.

"You are not going to go on stage?" Zhao Min asked.

"Why did I go to the stage? The company did not ask the big stars to endorse, but you, the president of the network red, presided over the conference, saving a lot of endorsement fees. It is a pity that such a large celebrity is not used." Chen Mo laughed.

"Do you know that this is exploitation? Can you process the capital." Zhao Min gave him a look.

This chairman is not willing to show up in public. On the contrary, she became a net red, and the trouble was quite a lot.

"It is estimated that there are not many people in China who are paid more than you."

When Zhao Min helped manage the company, he gave Zhao Min 5% dividend. In the last half of the year, Zhao Min’s dividends took tens of millions, and this is only the beginning.

"Do not process the capital, then please let me eat the head office?"

"Well, the place will pick you up." Chen Mo smiled.

"Where do you want to go?"

"I want to go to the food stall near my school, where the skewers are good."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo silently.

After leaving the company, the two accompanied by the staff, entered the car already prepared and left at the press conference.

This conference was held in the Grand Theatre. This is the second press conference of the marching ant company, which was held more than the last time in the hotel.

The people present at the event had more than 500 media outlets, and the largest media were among them, as well as fans of the butterfly eye in the coastal city. People from several major domestic mobile phone companies also sent representatives to come and participate. Many media and self-media people are not invited.

At the press conference, there were nearly 2,000 people, which was completely different from the last brutal press conference.

As a fast-growing technology star in China, the marching ant company has always been the focus of attention. This mysterious press conference evoked the appetite of many people.

There are already many people on the Internet who are guessing the products of the marching ants.

Despite all the speculations, the marching ant company did not respond positively, and the employees of the marching ant company were all tight-lipped. Some people don't know, people who know can't say it, or they don't work.

After the team arrived at the Grand Theatre, the two got off the bus and, under the guidance of the staff, entered the background.

chapters.title: Chapter 56: :Insufficient?
chapters.body:
Chapter 56: :Insufficient?

Chen Mo walked into the conference and saw the dense audience, which was completely different. This was completely different from the first conference.

People's Daily, Global News, Sina, Phoenix, Penguin, Squirrel, CCTV... In the media area, look around, domestic well-known media, newspapers, magazines are present, say few hundred people. In the crowd, Chen Mo also saw many famous foreign media, all kinds of long guns and short guns.

Chen Mo now wants to ask Zhao Min, how to invite so many media in the end.

What surprised him even more was that some entertainment media appeared at the press conference. It is estimated that this is the last press conference, the topic of beauty president, let these people find the news potential in this regard.

There are quite a few people who have not received the invitation letter, but there are free channels of communication, and they are all coming.

Chen Mo sat down in an empty seat in the guest seat and quietly waited for the start of the conference.

A marching ant out of the nest.

The theme of this conference is similar to the first conference, but this time the ants have grown slowly and are no longer small ants in the corner.

Not long after, the scene was quiet, Zhao Min's confident figure appeared on the stage, holding a butterfly eye phone in his hand. Seeing Zhao Min’s mobile phone, there was a commotion in the people under the stage.

Is the marching ant company ready to issue a second mobile phone? This is the first thought of everyone's heart.

On the live broadcast platform, some fans also stunned and the barrage appeared.

"Astronaut level vision, the phone that Zhao Min holds in his hand is a butterfly eye, not a new mobile phone."

"What new features will this phone have?"

"The marching ants will be hungry and marketing, and they swear that no matter how good the products of the marching ant company will be, they will never buy it.

......

On the stage, Zhao Min glanced at the crowd under the lap.

"Start now."

Her words fell, and the big screen of the stage changed instantly. The virtual space of the screen slowly emerges. It consists of countless letters, numbers and symbols. Like the data world of science fiction movies, a 3D female face with a line dominates the big screen.

"Hello, human."

The mechanically synthesized female voice, in just four words, burst into a bang on the field. All reporters' cameras and cameras are all aimed at the images on the big screen.

The people who watched the live broadcast in front of the computer also began to calm down.

The person who saw this scene, his face was excited, this kind of scene, the instinct of the mind made four words.

artificial intelligence.

The product released by the marching ant company is artificial intelligence.

Artificial intelligence has always been the topic of discussion. Since the Alpha dog played Go and defeated the great Go player, artificial intelligence has become the hottest topic.

At present, the most powerful countries in the world, the top technology companies, schools and teams are studying artificial intelligence, which is the future development trend of science and technology.

On the Internet, the debate about artificial intelligence has different attitudes.

Now the marching ant company suddenly emerged and jumped out of an artificial intelligence, which is tantamount to thunder. This is almost to announce to the world that the marching ant company has entered the artificial intelligence research.

The scene of the conference became noisy. When Zhao Min did not speak, the people under the stage were quiet and waiting for the following.

"Continue, please introduce yourself." Zhao Min had a smile on his face. After the stage was quiet, he faintly opened his mouth.

"I am a product of the marching ant company, mobile smart assistant Xiaodie, I hope that in the future, I can become your friend." Zhao Min's words fell, the face of the line simulation on the big screen opened again.

"What is your function?" said Zhao Min.

"The function of Xiaodie includes voice recognition unlocking, chat, search, voice input, and the most important function is that Xiaodie can help you control your phone."

"How to control?"

"Sound control, you talk, Kocho can complete your instructions..."

The dialogue between Zhao Min and the voice assistant was quickly spread through live broadcast. All the key points are drawn out, the voice control phone, this feature is too similar to Apple's siri.

Those who saw this scene, what emerged in their minds, are scenes that are intelligent in the movie and can control the mobile phone when they speak.

After the introduction of the function, the small butterfly in the big screen stopped, and then the picture changed, and a picture of the mobile phone desktop appeared.

Zhao Min clicked on the software of the smart assistant on the mobile phone, and on the big screen, he also jumped out of the screen opened by the intelligent assistant software.

"Connect the wiFi network." Zhao Min put the phone on the platform that the staff sent him up and said.

When her words fall, the settings of the mobile desktop are turned on, and the network connection page is automatically redirected.

"The wireless network is already on, please select the wiFi signal."

"Running ants."

“The wireless network was successfully selected and the signal connection was successful.”

......

At the press conference, there was a commotion. Just now everyone will still think about comparing smart assistants with siri. Now they find that they are all wrong.

This intelligent assistant, which completely kills siri, completely controls the mobile phone without contact. The applause on the field was thundering, and everyone in the audience was excited to see Zhao Min on the stage.

The news is true, this smart assistant will completely change the state of the current smartphone and achieve true hands-free control.

"This wave 666"

"My wallet is already hungry and thirsty."

"You just cut the chicken, you come out, remember not to use it, or I will kill you as a dead eunuch."

"I am going to buy a hen now."

"It won't be controlled in the background? How do you look a little mysterious?"

The live broadcast has been noisy, there are praises, there are doubts, but more attention is paid to smart assistants, is it so powerful.

According to Zhao Min's demonstration, even the ability to manipulate the browser to turn pages, take photos, play videos, this function has far exceeded everyone's expectations.

This means that the era of contactlessness is coming.

After the demonstration, after the staff removed the things, Zhao Min pressed the PPT button, and the software icon of the intelligent assistant appeared on the big screen, which is the pattern of the butterfly eye.

"This is the product of our conference, mobile smart assistant, Xiaodie. Its function completely exceeds any mobile assistant in the market. This does not need data comparison, our products do not need to compare, because it is not in a grade. ”

Zhao Min’s voice is full of confidence.

"After the press conference, our company's official website will be on the shelf, just download the software and install it on the phone, you can voice control your phone."

On the big screen, the advantages of the intelligent assistant are all listed, and Zhao Min is also introducing these functions carefully.

Many media people are now taking photos on the screen.

If the above functions of the mobile smart assistant are true, this will be an epoch-making product. The conference has not ended yet, and many people have begun to wait for the software's smart assistants to be put on the shelves.

"However, the smart assistant Xiaodie has some shortcomings, it is not a perfect product."

Just when everyone was ecstatic, Zhao Min’s seriousness poured a cold water on the hot atmosphere.

Many people are stunned and stared at Zhao Min. At the product launch conference, they said that their company’s products are insufficient. Is this a trouble?

chapters.title: Chapter 57: : Hacking
chapters.body:
Chapter 57: : Hacking

The commotion on the field was quiet again, and everyone turned their eyes to Zhao Min. They all know that the next message is definitely important.

After all, at a press conference, saying that the lack of their own products, not everyone would dare to say so.

Zhao Min is still calm, not to open the next page of PPT.

"There is no perfect product in the world, even the smart assistant is no exception. The first one is compatibility. The current mobile phone system is only compatible with the marching ant system and Android system. It is not compatible with the Apple system, and there is no ioS terminal APP. ”

Zhao Min’s words, like a small stone falling into a calm pond, immediately provoked embarrassment. Not compatible with the ioS end, this is undoubtedly a big problem. At present, the mainstream market, the share of Apple's mobile phone is not low, is this to kill Apple?

If the functions described above are true and not compatible with the ioS end, then people will definitely not give priority to Apple in the future. This blow to Apple is undoubtedly huge.

Why is it not compatible with Apple?

The person who heard it, the head involuntarily raised this problem.

Zhao Min seems to know the ideas of the people and continue his speech.

"Intelligent assistants want to control the mobile phone, the mobile phone system can not be bypassed. Android system is open source, compatible with Xiaodie. Apple closed source, intelligent assistant can not automatically control the APP state, plus ioS has siri, no intelligence at all Assistant, so there is no ioS software."

When I heard Zhao Min’s words, everyone was speechless. Smart assistants are so powerful that they are not comparable to siri.

However, many people don't care because they don't need an Apple phone at all, and many people have two mobile phones. This kind of problem does not require them to worry.

"I seem to see the apple tremble."

"This is still a small ant, and you can't finish an apple."

"Two mobile phones, how do you send them, you can't use them to lose, beautiful..."

"Actually, I care, the price of this smart assistant, if this thing is free, it is estimated that Apple really wants to jump."

After Zhao Min said that there is no software on the Apple side, the comment area of the live broadcast is also being discussed madly.

Zhao Min on the stage still has a confident smile.

"The next question is its second problem. Xiaodie has just formed it. It can only interact between Chinese and English. We are working hard to import multi-language libraries. In the future, Kocho will cover the mainstream languages of the world. ""

There are not many people who have this problem. Even those who have opinions do not know the things of the marching ant intelligent assistant. For the time being, the main market for smart assistants is still at home.

"The last question is the charge of Xiaodie. This is also the topic that everyone cares most about. Now the price of Xiaodie is 20 yuan per month, and the first 10 minutes are free." Zhao Min said.

The price is 20 yuan per month. When Zhao Min announced the price issue, there was a commotion on the field, especially the area where the media people were located.

As a smart assistant, according to the function described by Zhao Min, its function far exceeds the similar software in the market. The monthly rent of 20 yuan per month is not expensive. It is almost equivalent to using 20 yuan to raise the mobile phone to a higher level, and this fee is almost affordable to anyone with a mobile phone.

But the point is, like such a high-end smart assistant, the market is close to blank, how many Android phones are available in the world, and the specific figures are not clearly stated. Even if only one-twentieth of Android users use it, the benefits are terrible.

The intelligent assistant, almost a chicken with a golden egg, will bring a steady stream of funds to the marching ant company.

After Zhao Min’s speech is over, the next step is the reporter’s question and answer session. Audience fans, also enter the product experience area, began to download the smart assistant experience.

The experience area displays products for the future concept of the marching ant company, including smart office software, computer operating systems, intelligent robots, ant cloud computing, big data and more.

However, these technologies are still in their infancy in the marching ant company, and even the prototypes are not counted. Therefore, many fans and journalists, the most important thing is to go to the experience area of the smart assistant and download the smart assistant experience.

The press conference has not officially ended, and reports on the Internet have already caused big waves.

Many people who went to the experience area to experience the intelligent assistants, patted the video into the circle of friends, attracted a lot of envy and questioning. Soon, the video of the smart assistant experience was uploaded to the network, attracting a lot of onlookers.

The marching ant company and smart assistant Xiaodie also quickly entered the hot search list.

A small smart assistant almost makes the smartphone a whole upgrade, and it is difficult to be ignored.

The marching ant’s press conference has just ended, and the overwhelming news on the Internet has opened up the bombing mode.

In this era, involving artificial intelligence, or with artificial intelligence, will become a topic. Now the marching ant company has released the smart assistant without warning. The function is stronger than Apple's mobile assistant siri, and the curve is overtaking, which makes people feel more cool.

"A marching ant out of the nest" - People's Daily

How far is artificial intelligence from us? 》——Global News

"Hello there! Humanity. 》——Squirrel headlines

......

All major domestic media, all writing articles with the intelligent assistants of the army ant company, published in-depth comments. Artificial intelligence has once again become a hot topic for everyone.

“Why don’t the marching ant company embed smart assistants on next-generation phones?”

"Now the marching ant company just wants to open the market, enhance the user experience, test and collect data, and enhance the database. In the future, the smart assistant will be removed and embedded in the second mobile phone market. The high-end mobile phone market is almost open to them. ”

"It’s so cool, I came back at the press conference and downloaded the smart assistant. Now I’m holding snacks to watch TV series, commenting, hahahaha...”

After the press conference, the network was turbulent and the marching ant company was not calm. Zhao Min stood in the technical background and quietly looked at the computer controlled by the technicians in front of him.

From the Grand Theatre, she rushed back to the company. The news has been released, and it is still in the process of fermentation. The next step is the test. The thing of the intelligent assistant is the most important thing.

She has already seen the response of the network, not her expectation, the response of the intelligent assistant is bigger than the marching ant system, except for the reasons of this propaganda media, there is artificial intelligence.

Mobile phone operating system, the market is saturated, so after the marching ant system came out, there are waves, but because it is not open source, coupled with the strength of the army ant company, can not shake the status of the three major operating systems.

Now, the mobile smart assistant is almost a blank. This piece of market is completely in front of them, and the interests here are too big to imagine.

"President, there are now more than one million visitors," said the backstage technician sitting in front of the computer.

"There is no problem with the server?" Zhao Min asked.

"After the last attack, we upgraded the server and millions of people visited at the same time, no problem at all." Lao Luo said.

"Put Xiaodie on the shelves." Zhao Min said.

The company was nervous, Chen Mo also sat in the office, quietly watching the back page of the official website, do not know what to think. After the intelligent assistant was put on the shelves, Chen Mo’s eyes also showed focal length.

"Merg brother, there are hackers trying to invade the company's servers." The smart assistant was just on the shelves, and the ink girl opened her mouth.

chapters.title: Chapter 58: :Wave
chapters.body:
Chapter 58: :Wave

Chen Mo's eyebrows pick one up and cheer up. He knew that things could not be so smooth. I didn't expect the smart assistants to be on the shelves and hacked into the server.

Don't think about it, the other party is coming through the source code of the intelligent assistant. After all, the source code of the smart assistant is countless money.

The benefits of intelligent assistants are enough to make people feel tempted.

"Protect the data of the database, encrypt all the data. Create a fake encrypted file file and insert the tracking code to let them take the fake data." Chen Mo thought.

If these hackers are returned empty-handed, they will definitely come to care later, and they will not be afraid of thieves stealing. Let them steal the fake documents and slowly crack them.

Pretending to let them succeed, their company can also stop for a while, when the market for smart assistants has been opened.

"Okay." The ink girl said: "Mer brother, there are other hackers, from different places."

"Well?" Chen Mo brows: "How many?"

"Seven, all ip are fake, hackers use these fake addresses as a springboard invasion." said the ink girl.

"Detect their specific location."

"Okay, the ink girl understands." The inky voice of the ink girl sounded, after a while, once again: "All address information has been found, three locations in North America, two in the island country, two in Europe, the specific location is... ..."

Chen Mo meditated when he heard the message from the ink girl. Once caught by so many hackers, it is really exciting. It’s just the address information that the ink girl said. He doesn’t know who these hackers are working for.

"You don't have to rush them in, let them crack slowly, things that are too easy to get, they will have doubts." Chen Mo thought and said: "Check out all the information about these hackers and see who they work for."

"Ok."

The ink girl fell into silence, and not long after, several pieces of information popped up on the computer at his desk. All are densely packed, all in English or Japanese.

“All translated into Chinese, looking comfortable.” Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom, please wait."

The data on the desktop disappeared, appeared again, and has been translated into Chinese.

Seeing this information, Chen Moile got up. Ink women sent all of these people's information, not missing, even the bank card password, remittance information, account passwords of major social media, without exception, all issued.

"Umbrella company, Apple's technician?"

Chen Mo quickly paid attention to the information of two of them. There are two people from these two companies. Chen Mo is not too big a surprise. There are too many things involved in intelligent assistants. The technology inside is definitely helpful for the current artificial intelligence.

In terms of artificial intelligence, many people want to share a piece of it.

"Mergo, the hacker of the island country, has cracked the firewall, entered the database, and is copying fake documents."

"Don't bother." Chen Mo said, thinking about it again: "You copy the information of this hacked computer."

"Okay." The inky voice of the ink girl sounded.

After two minutes, on the desktop of the computer, there are several more folders.

"Open the folder information to show me." Chen Mo leaned on the chair, said lightly. He wants to see, this is exactly what the hacker can do, actually the first black into the company's server.

"Ah...ah...a library..."

A video popping out on the desktop, the voice of ecstasy, was too late to catch up, and Chen Mo was shocked.

"Bodo teacher?" Chen Mo almost vomited blood: "Ink girl, how do you give me this?"

"Momgo, you asked me to put the information, what's the problem?" said the ink girl with a tender voice.

"Is there anything else?" Chen Mo was speechless.

"Have."

The voice of the ink girl just fell, another video jumped out, the heroine is still the teacher of Puerto. Chen Mo cried and laughed. It is estimated that this hacker is a super fan of Puerto Rico.

"Don't let go, copy the computer data of other hackers, too." Chen Mo said.

He is paying attention to the hacking incident here. In the company, he is busy all over the place, and he does not know about it.

“How much is the download now?” asked Zhao Min.

"The download volume is two million, the number of payments has exceeded one million, and the data is still rising." The technician sitting in front of the computer said.

"Zhao Zong, the company's servers, to continue to upgrade, in accordance with this number of growth, I am afraid that the company's servers can not stand." Lao Luo said.

"Well, you go to do it, upgrade the server with the fastest speed, don't worry about the money." Zhao Min said.

Nowadays, the smart assistant is almost crazy than the printing machine. This crazy speed is going on. She has to consider how the money is spent.

It is almost certain that the smart assistant market, their status has not been shaken.

The marching ant company is busy and the network is not calm. After the smart assistant was put on the shelves, it was already fried. After experiencing the smart assistants, they discovered that the black technology's sense of sight is the intelligent assistant.

Friends circle, the headlines of all major news, are all brushing the news of smart assistant Xiaodie.

This smart assistant is stronger than any mobile assistant on the market. The monthly rent of twenty pieces is almost the most conscience price.

Prices are within the reach of ordinary people, and most of them have chosen to pay after they have experienced the power of smart assistants.

There are many foreign media participating in the marching ant conference.

On the evening of the same day, the news of the intelligent assistant was quickly spread in North America and Europe. Because it is artificial intelligence, all messages appear on the network and are quickly spread.

Some internationally renowned media also quickly commented on intelligent assistants.

"Intelligence from the red country, spyware. 》——BBC

"artificial intelligence? No! "--Washington post

"The marching ant intelligent assistant is discriminating against apples? Why is there no ioS end? 》——The Times.

"The thief! Cottage siri? 》——CNN

......

In the major mainstream media, the intelligent assistants of the marching ant company were reported. In the report, they all used a large amount of space to devalue the intelligent assistant. Spyware, stealing identity information, monitoring, discrimination, and cottages have the most words.

There are still many people who believe that the army ant company has stolen the source code of Apple's siri, and then the smart assistant Xiaodie, and this view quickly became mainstream.

Even so, smart assistants are inevitably appearing in front of everyone. Four dollars, two pounds, can upgrade their mobile phone to a grade, for them, it is almost nothing.

It’s just that the foreign version doesn’t, you can only go over the wall to enter the Greater China area, and you can download it from the official website of the marching ant company.

However, some people have already installed Smart Assistant and sent the experience video to the network. As soon as the video came out, it immediately attracted a large crowd on the Internet.

"Oh, unbelievable, even if it is a cottage, the cottage is better than siri."

"They are famous for the cottage, from airplanes, high-speed rail to shoes and clothes. Which cottage is better than the original? This is a terrible nation, reverse engineering."

"Don't be sour, at least the Chinese people made it, and they did better than us."

"With this software, Huaxia people will know what color bra you wear tomorrow."

......

The Internet is rampant, and the US stock market has fluctuated with the news of intelligent assistants.

chapters.title: Chapter 59: : Valuation Of $10 Billion?
chapters.body:
Chapter 59: : Valuation Of $10 Billion?

Apple's share price, which opened for an hour, fell 1%, and the market value evaporated by $8.2 billion. Apple's stock price is still fluctuating, falling for three days, and finally stabilized. The decline in three days is close to 4%. For any company, this decline is very large, especially for giants such as Apple.

When there was such a big drop last time, it was still Apple’s announcement that it would charge Apple’s rewards. This sudden drop has made people think of smart assistants.

Apple's system is closed source and cannot support smart assistants. In the next mobile phone market, it will no longer have an advantage. The Apple mobile phone is the most profitable of many businesses. All Apple stocks have shown a downward trend. Although the decline is not large, the impact has already come out.

This influence has caused the market to be in turmoil, and many media have reported on this topic.

Has the marching ant been formed? "--New York Times

"The rising giant? 》——Wall Street Journal

"Agressive ants with aggressiveness! 》——Times

......

Numerous reports are overwhelming and are discussing the threat of marching ants.

Outside the bustle, Apple headquarters is not calm, a knuckle nose, a bearded researcher, looked gloomy at the screen code on the computer.

They have been back to the file from the marching ant company's database for a week.

This week, he was trying to crack this folder. I tried it for so long, and I have only made a little progress until today.

He did not expect that the marching ant company was so difficult, and actually encrypted the information, so that he wanted to break the scalp.

The company's recent stock market is not very good, and he is constantly urging him to crack the data package and get the source code of the intelligent assistant, otherwise it will definitely be embarrassing.

"oK."

The man sitting in the computer chair finally smiled. Not long after, the man's smile was stiff on his face, and he saw a bunch of garbled characters on his face, his face black as the bottom of the pot.

Snapped……

The computer screen is black, and several computers next to it are all black. This scene makes the man's pupil shrink.

"fuck!"

The man was angry and punched on the keyboard. Needless to say, the person who marched the ant company implanted the virus in the data packet and he was played.

With the black screen of the computer, the office area began to appear commotion.

Marching ant company.

Chen Mo heard the report of the ink girl and smiled.

He has already let the ink girl implant a tracking virus in the data packet. As long as the data packet is cracked, when the virus is scattered, the computer is already abolished. This is just a small lesson.

Standing up from the position, Chen Mo put on the lab coat and walked into the lab.

Chen Mo is very calm here, but the domestic network is not calm. With the popularity of smart assistants, more and more interesting things have emerged from the Internet.

In Weibo, someone posted a quarrel with his girlfriend and smart assistant, and then slammed the phone off. After the video was uploaded to the Internet, it attracted a lot of onlookers and laughter.

Xiaodie's chat function is also reflected in a short video.

This is not a case. Under the official Weibo of the Army Ant Company, it has been occupied by a group of people complaining.

"I have never seen such an intelligent assistant. Every time I lick it, it doesn't give up, let me lick it. It bullies me not to dare to fight it? Not to say, I just bought a new phone."

"Product quality problems, marching ants, you pay for my mobile phone. I lick it, it let me put it in the water. I forgot that it is not a butterfly eye."

"It seems that I am not only injured, but fortunately, the screen is bursting and can be changed."

"Brothers, I am going up, my mobile phone is Nokia..."

Although the style of painting is funny, many people see the key points.

Being able to have such flexible voice interaction capabilities is undoubtedly telling everyone that the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company is at the forefront of research.

Artificial intelligence is the main development trend of future technology.

Who made a major breakthrough in this field, who will rule the future market. In the artificial intelligence market, research has been done long ago, and many technology companies have invested a lot of money in the research of artificial intelligence.

Numerous market assessment companies began to evaluate the value of the army ant company, and finally Morgan made a $10 billion valuation.

This valuation has shaken the financial market. But many people do not agree with Morgan's estimate that this valuation is too low.

Not to mention the marching ant system and the butterfly eye mobile phone, it is only the existence of intelligent assistants, and the market value has exceeded 10 billion US dollars.

In the future, if you enter the global market, even if only 50 million mobile phone users pay for smart assistants, the company's annual revenue will be 12 billion Huaxia coins.

This is only the lowest estimate. There are billions of smart phones in the world. It is a bit more optimistic. With smart assistants, the future of marching ants is limitless, and smart assistants have many derivatives.

$10 billion is just the lowest valuation. For the marching ant company that has not yet developed, it will develop in the future, and the market value of the marching ant company will definitely be comparable to those of the giants.

The rise of marching ants has caused a huge sensation in the country.

Various reports on marching ants were overwhelming. For a time, the marching ant company once again became the focus of discussion.

Less than a year after its establishment, just two product launches have made the marching ant company one of the domestic technology giants, a legendary rise.

There has never been a technology company that has risen at such a rapid pace.

The marching ant company in the eyes of the storm is busy at this time. After the intelligent assistant came out, the marching ant company once again welcomed the opportunity of expansion.

Zhao Min sat in the office and handled the whole pile of documents. She was very headache at this time.

After the intelligent assistant came out, the marching ant company ushered in the largest development period. This time, it has to be expanded and expanded. The company's popularity has reached a peak. It is necessary to expand the scale of the company in order to operate better.

But the problem is here, the expansion is too fast, and the company is prone to problems.

Various reports outside, said how strong the army ants company, no one is more clear than Zhao Min, now the talents of the army ants company shortage, the speed of personnel training, can not keep up with the speed of the company's development.

When the last butterfly eye phone was released, the company had already deployed in major domestic cities.

Now that the scale is expanding, talents can't keep up. In order to be able to develop faster, the managers of the headhunting companies are now recruited to send to major cities to set up branches.

And now it has begun to prepare for national recruitment, recruiting talents. The marching ant company, like a large machine, must have a combination of individual pinions to function.

"Trouble." Zhao Min put down the file and knocked his head, and took a deep breath.

Smart assistants are selling very crazy. During this time, the company’s revenue is almost described as a daily investment. More money, more troubles.

It didn't take long for Zhao Minang to put down the documents. Xiaoyu went in and came in: "Zhao Jie, Mr. Yu Chengnan of Ceo of China Micro Terminal Company wants to see you, now in the reception room."

chapters.title: Chapter 60: :Direction
chapters.body:
Chapter 60: :Direction

Zhao Min and Xiao Yugang walked into the door of the reception room, and a man stood up from the sofa. He is the consumer of the China Micro Terminal Company, Ce Cheng Nan, in the technology circle, is one of the people of the storm.

"Yu, hello."

Zhao Min reached out and Yu Chengnan shook his hand and sat on the opposite side of his position: "Yu Zong personally came over and let us shine."

"Don't be a guest, I like to be a little more direct." Yu Chengnan shook his head at Zhao Min.

"I also like to be a little more direct." Zhao Min smiled and said: "Yu is coming to cooperate this time?"

Yu Chengnan has a positive body.

"Zhao Zong, is your company planning to take out the shares? Our company can buy some shares of your company, and join forces, one plus one, definitely more than two."

"I don't plan to say this. In the past few days, I have already sent away iDg, Ali, Jiuding, Sequoia and Penguin. Mr. Yu thinks we are still short of money. Do we need to go to the financing and sell the shares?" Zhao Min said.

"That's not it, there are some rumors in the circle. The shares of the marching ant company are only in the hands of your chairman. This piece of meat is too fat. He can't eat it. Some people want him to spit it out. I came here and thought. Work with you." Yu Chengnan said nothing.

"Let him spit out some?" Zhao Min smiled and shook his head.

Knowing Chen Mo for so long, she also knows about Chen Mo’s character.

Although the chairman of the board is usually very peaceful, very good at speaking, he also likes to make jokes. But when necessary, it is definitely a strong person. It is impossible to take away the shares of the marching ant company from his hands.

Now the main products of the marching ant company are from his hands, and the wealth they create cannot be sent out to others in vain.

"Yu Zong does not have to worry about us. The company has experienced a black hand. At that time, it has come over. Once again, it is no big deal," said Zhao Min.

“Can I talk to the chairman of your company?” Yu Chengnan asked with a smile.

"Small fish, you will inform the chairman to come down and talk to Yu." Zhao Min said to Xiao Yu.

"it is good."

Xiaoyu nodded and left the reception room. After a few minutes, Xiaoyu came back again, but there was a Chen Mo.

"This is our chairman, Chen Mo." After Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came in, Zhao Min introduced.

"Hello, Chen Dong."

Yu Chengnan looked at Chen Mo, with amazement in his eyes.

There was no photo of Chen Mo exposed on the Internet, but he knew that the chairman of the marching ant company was a young man. He only discovered it after seeing it, and he was too young.

If Chen Mo is not standing in front of him, he absolutely does not believe that such a young man is the real power of the marching ant company.

"Hello, Yu Zong, long-awaited name." Chen Mo reached out and Yu Chengnan shook hands.

"I won't say anything about it. This time, there are two things. One is about investing in a marching ant company, and the other is something about cooperation. These things are not what I should do, but this time. Here, I will be on the way." Yu Chengnan said.

Chen Mo sat down across Yu Chengnan: "I am afraid that Yu will be disappointed. I have no plans to sell shares for the time being, but the cooperation can be discussed in detail."

"In terms of shares, there is no room for negotiation?" asked Yu Chengnan.

"No. Our company is not short of money at present, nor does it need to adjust the company's shareholding structure." Chen Mo said without hesitation.

"Well, let's talk about cooperation."

Yu Chengnan did not entangle on this issue. Chen Mo has already made it very clear that if it is entangled in this respect, it will lead to resentment.

“How do you want to cooperate with Yu?” Chen Mo asked.

"Patent interoperability, our two companies can sign a patent interoperability agreement, and some patents interoperate." Yu Chengnan said.

“It didn’t take long for our company to be established, and there were not many patents in total.”

"Now it's just a memorandum of cooperation. There are opportunities in the future. Of course, if you are willing to take the technology of the smart assistant and we exchange patents, many of our technologies can be licensed to you."

Yu Chengnan looked directly at Chen Mo, and Chen Mo made him invisible. This is the most confident young man he has ever seen.

"Intelligent assistants don't plan to authorize." Chen Mo said slowly: "It is still possible to sign a memorandum of cooperation. After all, this is an open era, and cooperation can be a win-win situation."

"Chen Dong is a quick talk, it just happens to have time today, first talk about the general direction of cooperation."

As a giant of domestic technology companies, Huawei is not a strong force. The marching ants are the rise of new stars. However, Chen Mo is confident that the marching ant company will surpass Huawei, and it is not a problem at all. Therefore, when talking about cooperation, the two sides are reciprocal.

In the meantime, Chen Mo also asked Huawei to upgrade the server. During this time, the users of intelligent assistants grew very fast, and the speed of server upgrades was quite a lot. It just happened to take advantage of this opportunity and let Huawei people help.

Both sides have the willingness to cooperate, so the cooperation matters are very fast. After talking about cooperation, Zhao Min took a group of people and simply ate a meal to entertain, and then sent Yu Chengnan to leave.

"Chairman, the impact of this intelligent assistant is very big, I am afraid there are people who want to make ghosts from behind. The interests are too big, many people stare, it is more trouble than the last marching ant system." On the way back to the company, sitting Zhao Min in the business car said.

Zhao Min is very clear that the mobile phone system has many alternative options, plus their closed source, so the outside reaction is not as big as imagined.

But the market for smart assistants is different. There are no substitutes at present. They are the only ones. In any market, once the monopoly level is reached, the interests are scary and scary, no matter what is sold.

She had this concern before releasing the smart assistant, but it was impossible to give up the release of the smart assistant because of this concern. Now the company doesn't have much to happen, but she feels that the storm is brewing.

"Reassure, the soldiers will block the water to cover the earth, the company is not the original company."

"You are so optimistic, what else can I say?" Zhao Min said helplessly.

“How is the planning of the company headquarters?”

"I am designing people, I also sent people to follow up, and should be drawn soon. The problem of construction is also preparing for public bidding." Zhao Min said.

"Talk about the direction you want to develop next. I will pave the way first, so that I won’t be confused when I get it. You suddenly gave me a smart assistant this time. Such sudden things will disrupt many plans."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded: "Next to the manufacturing industry. I am studying battery materials, you first go to buy several factories, battery production, parts processing plants."

“Where is it wholly-owned?” Zhao Min asked.

"It’s all."

"Well, anyway, the company's money is yours, there is no place to spend, you can only listen to you." Zhao Min said: "There is one more thing, I am going to buy an advertising company, and later our product promotion, also have their own Channels and planning. And we have a platform that can also receive a lot of advertising business."

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

After the group returned to the company, Chen Mo went straight into his office area and continued to experiment.

chapters.title: Chapter 61: : If We Take A Step Back, Let Us Lose
chapters.body:
Chapter 61: : If We Take A Step Back, Let Us Lose

Chen Mo stood in the laboratory and observed the purity of the carbon crystal on the table. After a long time, he stood up and took a breath.

It has failed again.

The carbon crystal synthesis conditions are almost the same, but purity has always been a fatal problem. If the purity of the carbon crystal cannot be solved, even if a carbon crystal-based lithium ion battery is finally produced, the life of the battery will be greatly shortened, and the amount of stored electricity will also be reduced.

It seems that calibration data is also needed. Chen Mo stretched out and took off his gloves and placed it on the bench.

"Mergo, the company's server is experiencing traffic attacks, and the computing resources of the company's servers are being taken." Just as Chen Mo was preparing to leave the lab, the innocent voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

“Well?” Chen Mo brows: “Can you tell if it’s legal data?”

"Yes." The ink girl returned.

"Split legitimate packets and malicious traffic, filter out these malicious traffic interceptions, and put them in traffic black holes."

"To block malicious traffic, the ink girl needs to invade the service provider network."

"Invasion." Chen Mo said.

The ink girl is quite a wise network creature, and the entrance to all the networks, she can easily enter at any time. As long as the data connected to the Internet is in the eyes of the ink girl, it is not a secret.

After a while, the voice of the ink girl sounded: "It has been intercepted successfully."

"Is the source of the attack detected?" Chen Mo asked.

These days, the company did not encounter any attacks, which made him strange, did not expect to come now. It seems that the other party is prepared.

"The other party uses the 傀儡 machine, set up a timed attack, the source is in Germany, Germany." said the ink girl.

"Do you know the identity of the other party?" Chen Mo asked.

"This person." When the words of the ink girl fell, the laboratory screen immediately popped up a document and an avatar.

Chen Mo took a look at the company's other party's information and pondered.

This is a professional hacker who is used to attack a company to earn profits. Since he found his door, he did not mind letting the other side reflect.

"Send his information to the security department of Germany, send it anonymously, leave no trace."

"Okay, it has already been sent." The ink lady reminded.

"Build a cloud defense system." Chen Mo said.

There is a second time for the first time, and there will be more similar attacks in the future. The DDoS attack is one of the most difficult defensive cyber attacks. The purpose is to occupy the target service resources and make the experience of legitimate users worse, which will cause trouble to their company.

If there is no ink woman, it is very troublesome to resist this kind of attack.

"Supervisor, the DDoS attack disappeared, and now the server is back to normal."

The company's network security technology team, relieved that the service returned to normal, was relieved. The malicious attacks that suddenly appeared suddenly made them somewhat unprepared.

“Everyone else is giving up the spirit, and the company may not be very close recently,” said a technical director in charge of network security.

The company has just got rid of a cyber attack, and not many people know. On the cyber battlefield, it was originally a war without smoke.

This is just the beginning, a storm against the marching ant company is emerging on the Internet.

"Internal News: The marching ant company suffered a large-scale cyber attack! 》

"Exercise ant user data leaked? 》

"The marching ant company is about to be acquired?" 》

"Butterfly eye mobile phone explosion? 》

"Smart Assistant steals user information? 》

......

In just less than two hours, a variety of articles appeared overwhelming. The scale of this time is much larger than the previous one.

Almost instantaneously, covering all news channels, a clear smear against marching ants.

For a time, the network was in turmoil. In this matter, a heated discussion was launched. Never have a company that enjoys such a high level of treatment.

"Please march the ant company to explain the leak of user information immediately."

“Garbage marching ants, is it so easy to be taken care of?”

"The quality of the mobile phone is really bad. The butterfly eye I used is not waterproof. The marching ant gives me an explanation."

"So obvious smearing, only fools, will believe in these news."

......

Sitting in the office, Zhao Min calmed his face, and the coming came. The marching ants grew too fat. After all, they were paralyzed, but this time the intensity was so great that there was no warning.

"Zhao Jie, the person in the tax bureau sent a notice to come to the company to check the account." Just as Zhao Min was ready to inform Chen Mo, Xiao Yu knocked on the door and said.

"Okay, I know."

Zhao Min stood face in the office window, looking at the distant sky, trying to calm himself.

Now there is another overwhelming smear on the Internet, which makes her very uncomfortable. If she can't catch the company's little scorpion, it will hurt her way. This kind of disgusting means is very troublesome.

The tax bureau suddenly sent a notice to come over and check the accounts, and certainly some people are using them.

After a while, Zhao Mincai spit out a breath, the best way to deal with this means is to remain silent, otherwise it can only be more and more black. But she does not want to remain silent, it is not her character.

After thinking about it, Zhao Min called Li Lingfeng's phone.

The news about marching ants on the Internet is flying all over the sky, true and false, attracting many people watching the show.

This news reminds many people that when the marching ant system just came out, there was a blackout at that time. I didn’t expect this time, the intensity was even more crazy than the last time.

The wave of smearing marching ants appeared for a long time, and the marching ant company responded on the official Weibo and official website.

"There is still no way to see the light, even if it is made, if we take a step back, let us lose."

In a short sentence, it immediately ignited the paradox of the Internet.

"Weiwu domineering."

"Never bow to the villain, this is my favorite marching ant."

"Stop them."

"Shopping malls, such as the battlefield, after the release of the intelligent assistant, I guess that there will be people who are maneuvering hands. They have not seen the movement for a few days. It turned out to be a big move today. This kind of unfair competition, the 'related departments' should be in charge of one tube. ?"

"If you just start, someone wants to kill you. This kind of thing, if the relevant departments don't care, who will dare to talk about starting a business in the future? The marching ant company uses such high-end products for ordinary people. This time I stand on the army ant side."

......

In response to the response, a good voice on the Internet. Two press conferences, let the marching ants rise, and increase a giant in the country, but twice black, it is impossible for people to continue.

Chen Mo, sitting in the office, has a calm face. With such a big thing, he doesn't have much research now.

Two days ago, Yu Chengnan talked with them about cooperation, and he had already told Zhao Min that he would be hacked. Originally thought that there will be yesterday, I did not expect the other party to shoot today, and a shot is a mess.

Cyber attacks, public opinion attacks, and reports to the tax bureau, people come over to check the account, then which step will the other party take? Digging in the company like last time?

"Ink girl." After meditation, Chen Mo sat up straight and looked at the computer screen in front of him.

"Mer brother, the ink girl is coming."

When his words fell, the computer screen became a simulated picture, and a little girl in a white dress appeared on the screen.

"You help me check, which water company is involved in the smear?" Chen Mo calmly said.

"Okay, my brother, please wait... I found it, the neural network operator, Tianma Network..." The ink girl said the names of ten companies.

"Help me check it out, who is it, buy these companies." Chen Mo's voice is still very calm.

"Okay." The ink girl squinted at Chen Mo and fell into silence. After a long time, she opened her mouth again: "The ink girl found it."

chapters.title: Chapter 62: : Black Hand?
chapters.body:
Chapter 62: : Black Hand?

Julang sat in front of the computer, browsing the hot news on the Internet, with a smile on his face. The network water army that bought it worked, and even if the army ant company responded, it was just a small boat in the water army. When the news came out, it was drowned in the saliva.

Now on the Internet, the Black Army Ant Company is the mainstream. The boss’s account has been completed, and the next step is to reward.

After turning off the computer, Zhu Lang sat in the office chair and turned and picked up the phone to dial a number.

"Ink girl, turn his call back to the recording." Chen Mo, sitting in the office, said calmly.

"Okay, Mom."

When the voice of the ink girl falls, the computer screen pops up an audio interface.

"Hey, boss, what you told me to do, I have already done it. Now I have heard about the things of the army ant company?" said Zhu Lang excitedly.

"I did a good job, didn't leave a handle? Otherwise it would be bad for us." There was a deep, thick voice on the phone.

"Ink girl, I will find out the information of the person who will talk to him."

"Okay, Mom, please wait."

The inky voice of the ink girl stopped for a long time, and a file was jumped out on another computer screen.

“Dong Wei, who joined Changhe Capital seven years ago, is committed to investment in new energy, electronic products, and innovation and technology. At present, Chairman of Donghai Venture Capital Co., Ltd....”

Seeing the information on the computer, Chen Mo fell into the chair and listened to the conversation between the two.

"The boss, the reporter and the water army I have already prepared. As long as the people in the tax bureau enter the marching ant company, they will be photographed by the reporters. When the company makes fake accounts, it can be passed on the Internet and let them There is nothing to say."

"Yes, keep working hard, I will not treat you badly."

"thank you boss."

After the call, Chen Mo sat down on the office chair, turned and looked out the window, and spit a sigh of relief: "Ink, check the finances and accounts of Changhe Capital, and Donghai Ventures."

"Okay, Mum." The ink girl finished, in silence, not long after, two file compression packages appeared on the computer desktop: "Mer brother, this is their financial information for the last three years, Changhe Capital last year's finances False, Donghai Ventures has been tax evading for three consecutive years."

"The person who sent the market supervision, sent anonymously, the iP address is also fake." Chen Mo said.

Many companies will find some senior accountants to do the accounts. As long as they are not too excessive, there are not many flaws, and it is difficult for people in the tax bureau to find out.

Now that the other party is disgusting with him, he naturally will not let the chance of revenge.

He is not a good bully. Since the tax bureau is asked to check his account, he does not mind treating his own people with his own way.

"Okay, My Brother, has been sent successfully." said the ink girl.

"The company's financial supervision is very good recently. If there is any abnormality, please notify me as soon as possible."

"It’s been monitoring."

After the matter was arranged, Chen Mo stood up and took two books on the shelf and sat back in the position to look quietly. If you don't think about experimenting now, just read the book.

As for the rumors on the Internet, he can let all the ink girls be deleted. But the more they do this, the more they have ghosts in their hearts, so Chen Mo simply ignores them. After the storm of this matter, I want to deal with it.

The bombing on the Internet continued, and throughout the day, the articles of the marching ants were smeared.

This kind of article is written by rubbing, not touching the bottom line, or the title party, so there is no way to communicate the media of the article.

But this kind of screening has made the discussion of the network even more crazy.

“Is the marching ant company dug up the graves of these people? When can these water regimens return the network to a clean? Some departments, regardless of management?”

"The interest is moving. I heard that some time ago, many giants were looking for military ants. The marching ants were not willing to transfer their shares. With the market value of the intelligent assistants of the army ants company, the interests here are too great, so any capitalist wants to take a bite. It is a marching ant that has not grown up completely.

When the Rockefeller family was so powerful, its Mobil Oil was split into 34. The ownership structure of Microsoft Corporation has also been reorganized. Why? The benefits are too large and no one is not tempted.

It’s just that the marching ant company is in the limelight, and the capital oligarchy is afraid of affecting its reputation. They won’t do it. Needless to say, such anxious, it must be small and medium capital. Because if you don't do it now, the marching ant company will gain a foothold, and the small and medium-sized capital will not even have the qualification to participate. ”

"The truth came out on the second floor of the ancient city! To add that even if the marching ants are pulled down, they will not be able to enjoy the small and medium-sized capital. They just make wedding dresses for others..."

"Now the marching ants can't be compared with the current Mobil and Microsoft. At best, it's just a small ant. When Meifu monopolized the US oil market and was a non-government enterprise, the US government had to split Meifu because of national security concerns. Of course, there are also interests in it. Does the marching ant not touch this level?"

"The marching ants have this potential!"

"If it is to rise, it will die. Who will dare to start a business in the future, who dares to innovate? Who dares to develop technology? The domestic market is not the big capital to say?"

......

The discussion on the Internet is crazy, the marching ants are rising rapidly, and now they are the new stars in the domestic market.

Many people think that this is only the eleventh difficulty in the bones. Only through this disaster, the marching ants can gain a foothold in the domestic market and continue to move forward.

From the chat conversation of the intelligent assistant, it can be known that the artificial intelligence research of marching ants has already been overtaken. The potential of artificial intelligence is the future, who does not want to share a piece of it?

Two days passed by, the marching ant company is still in the midst of a wave, and various versions of the remarks are still circulating on the Internet.

Being influenced by people in the back, the impact on the army ants company is not small, but many departments are working normally.

There are a lot of reporters at the door of the company. It is only the latest thing for the company. All employees of the army ant company are silent and do not accept any interviews.

At this time, Chen Mo sat in the office and looked at the book quietly, and he turned his eyes to the window from time to time. The company manages Zhao Min, daily affairs, and does not use him to participate. So Zhao Min is very busy, but he is very leisurely.

The company's servers are attacked every day. There are ink girls, all attacks are blocked, and there is no impact on the company.
