Now the company is in the limelight, no one dares to openly deal with marching ants.

They are not listed companies. It is impossible to do anything from the stock market. Therefore, they can only attack through the Internet or engage in other small actions. Today is the day when the tax bureau checks the accounts.

"Merg brother, someone arbitrarily modified the company's accounts." When Chen Mo looked at the book, the voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

Chen Mo’s hole shrinks and his face sinks, putting the book in his hand down. Today is the day when the tax bureau checks the accounts. At this time, the company’s accounts are revised, obviously it is to do things.

Chen Mo immediately picked up the landline at hand and dialed the number of Zhao Min’s office.

"Chairman, something?" Not long after, the voice of Zhao Min came from the phone.

"Go to the finance department, look at the accounts." Chen Mo finished, put the phone down, got up and left the office.

"Good." Zhao Min in the office did not put down the phone and dialed Zhang Yi's number: "Zhang Yi, immediately go to see the company's accounts."

chapters.title: Chapter 63: : Unsettled
chapters.body:
Chapter 63: : Unsettled

After putting down the phone, Zhao Min immediately left the office and headed for the finance department. Chen Mo’s call came from a phone call, and he usually didn’t manage the company’s affairs. This time he suddenly came over a phone call and checked the accounts.

What is wrong with the finance department?

Zhao Min did not dare to neglect. Today is the day when the tax bureau checked the accounts. It was notified two days ago. If the accounts are really problematic, the trouble will be big.

Sun Hong took the bill in his hand and looked in the computer. The weather is not hot now, and his forehead is covered with a slight sweat.

After modifying the account of the bill, Sun Hong quickly put the bill back into his pocket and continued to take another bill from the ledger and began to modify it.

"Sun Hong, what are you doing?"

A voice rang from the back, let Sun Hong's heart tighten, and the pupils contracted: "Minister, I am keeping accounts and accounting for the company's accounts last month."

"Give me the books, wait for the president to come over." Zhang Yi said.

"Good, good."

Sun Hong hurriedly closed the account book in his hand and handed it to Zhang Yi.

"You sweated? Is it sick?" Zhang Yi looked at Sun Hong's flustered face, his brows wrinkled.

"No, the clothes are too thick, Minister, I am just urgency, go to the toilet."

"Yeah." Zhang Yi frowned and nodded, watching Sun Hong's anxious back, his eyes stunned a few times, and tempted his opening: "Wait, Sun Hong, the accounts don't seem right."

As soon as this was said, Sun Hong’s heart was shrinking and he almost scared him to the ground, and he ran away without saying anything.

"Catch Sun Hong."

Zhang Yi slammed his eyes and immediately shouted at Sun Hong’s back. Hearing the shouts, the staff who had just appeared at the door immediately stopped Sun Hong’s way and threw him to the ground.

"Let me go, I didn't do anything! It's none of my business..." Sun Hong, who was caught, struggled desperately, followed by two other male staff members and held Sun Hong.

......

When Chen Mo and Zhao Mingang came to the finance department, they heard that there was noisy inside. The eyes of all employees are concentrated on two people.

"Chairman and CEO."

The voice in the finance department immediately calmed down, and all the employees’ eyes were concentrated on the two people and they were nervous.

Zhao Min was puzzled and walked in with Chen Mo. He saw the scene in front of him and his heart sank.

In the middle of the crowd, Zhang Yi and several employees are holding down a man. And Zhang Yi's face is gloomy and watery, very unsightly.

“What happened?” Zhao Min asked with a frown.

"Chairman, president. I just checked the accounts. When I first arrived, I found out that he was working on the accounts. Fortunately, he found out quickly, and almost let him run." Zhang Yi said with a black face.

Now the company is in the midst of something going wrong. At this festival, the problem appeared in the finance department. Fortunately, Zhao Min asked him to come and see.

At this juncture, the **** came to him and he wanted to make a mistake in the accounts. If it is not discovered in time, the person from the tax bureau will come over, I am afraid he will cover the roll home.

"Is it serious?" Zhao Min calmed his face.

"Nothing big, he just changed a few, I came over. The original bill was also found in him, and now people are getting back." Zhang Yi finished, black face to see the man caught: " Sun Hong, the company is not thin for you? Why do you want to do this?"

"Someone gave me 500,000, let me modify the accounts." Sun Hong, who was caught, was crying and sullen: "Let me go once, I am a financial fan, give me a chance."

“A financial fanatic will solve it?” Zhang Yi said with a black face: “If you didn’t find it earlier, what do you know about the company?”

"I have a hard time." Sun Hong looked painful.

"Difficult? Eat the hardships outside?"

Zhang Yiyin was sullen, and during the company's time, although there were rumors outside, there was no problem. I didn't expect this big problem to appear in the finance department. He didn't know how to explain it to Zhao Min.

"I was forced to help, I have a family to raise, my wife is in the hospital for surgery, I have spent all my savings, and there are mortgages, car loans, I have no choice, I need money, I have a wife and son to raise." The sound of Hong became hysterical.

"This is the reason for your crime? I sympathize with your experience, but I don't agree with you. We are not children, you should be responsible for what you do." Zhang Yi angered: "Alarm, this matter Must be dealt with seriously."

"Let me let go, I can't go to jail, I still have a home, you can't ruin my family,"

"It is you who ruined yourself." Zhang Yi is gloomy.

This kind of behavior can never be easily let go. If it is not pursued, the company must not have big troubles in the future. Just the people in the finance department are watching, it is a warning.

The finance department is concerned with the lifeblood of the company. Zhao Min trusts him and will hand over the finance department to him. There is a problem here and the company has trouble.

Seeing that Sun Hong was taken away, the eyes of the finance department were complicated, but there was no sympathy. Any excuse was not the reason for doing so. If Sun Hong succeeds today, many of them will lose their jobs.

Everyone put their eyes on Chen Mo and Zhao Min. At this time, the chairman and the president came over. It seems that this time it is going to be awkward.

"Everyone else goes back to work. Today, I don't want to see it for the second time. If you don't want to do it, you will resign. Don't ruin your future because of the impulse."

After Sun Hong was taken away by the security guard, Zhang Yi Chao’s employees roared. In an instant, all the personnel turned into birds and returned to their jobs.

"Chairman, president, I am responsible for this matter." Following Chen Mo and Zhao Min returned to the office, Zhang Yi said with a low head.

Zhao Min did not speak and looked at Chen Mo. She was also very upset, but it was still early to find that there was no loss. Otherwise, the tax bureau came to check the accounts and found that they were in trouble.

People outside are arguing that their company has an accident.

"This kind of thing, you don't know in advance, you can't prevent it. This time you won't hold your responsibility, it's not an example. I hope that next time I don't see a similar situation, I will go back and look at the books, and soon the people from the tax bureau will come over." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Zhang Yi heard Chen Mo did not pursue it, and he was relieved, with a slight gratitude in his heart.

"Notify the people below. After the storm, everyone added half a month's salary as a bonus." Chen Mo thought about it.

Now the company has more things. If this happens, if the employees are not given some motivation, the company may be a dead-end look. And the smart assistant's crazy sales must also give employees a little reward.

"it is good."

After Zhang Yi left, Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

“How do you know that the finance department will have problems?”

"I said coincidence with your letter? I just thought that the people of the tax bureau would come over, so let you confirm the account, that is, afraid of someone hands-on, I did not expect it." Chen Mo said.

He naturally does not say anything about the ink girl. After all, artificial intelligence is not suitable for others to know.

Zhao Min rolled his eyes and looked like I didn't believe it. However, at this time, it can only be explained.

On the same day, a reporter photographed that a police car appeared in the office building of the marching ant company. Shortly afterwards, people from the tax bureau were seen entering the marching ant company. This hot news quickly spread on the network.

"The marching ant company evades taxes and tax evasion? 》

"The chairman of the suspected marching ant company was arrested! 》

"Transmission is true? Are marching ants stealing other company technology? 》

In the afternoon of the same day, various photos and articles were circulating on the Internet, all about the marching ant company.

It is a troubled autumn recently. At this time, the police car appeared at the door of the office building of the marching ant company. This is undoubtedly saying that some unknown things have happened inside the army ant company.

“President, influenced by rumors, some suppliers of mobile phone spare parts have suspended cooperation with us.”

"Butterfly eye OEM production is also stagnant, and we have to pay the full amount before the factory is willing to continue production."

In the conference room, Zhao Min listened to Julie's report, her brows wrinkled and her face was not very good.

"Pay the tail of the butterfly eye to them, the butterfly eye is discontinued, and the foundry factory is re-finished. Ling Feng, you will arrange and hold a temporary press conference tomorrow."

chapters.title: Chapter 64: : Come Here? (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 64: : Come Here? (Third More)

The press conference at the Marriott Hotel was crowded. This is the first time a press conference has been held since the marching ant company was hacked.

In addition to the short sentence that began, the marching ants faced the water army on the Internet and kept silent.

Is it no longer silent today?

All the reporters present were anxiously waiting for the beginning of the reception, including some foreign journalists.

After the smart assistant came out, a lot of things happened. Because of the inability to be compatible with smart assistants, Apple’s sales in Greater China in the latest week have fallen. Along with the suffering, and Apple's stock market, it also fell with the decline in sales.

Therefore, many foreign media want to take this opportunity to learn about this related news.

This is a press conference that is tentatively decided, but there are still many well-known media present. Yesterday, the marching ant company issued a news conference, and many of them rushed to Binhai City without stopping.

In the background, Zhao Min looked at the time and walked into the venue with a small fisherman. Now Zhao Min is the external image of the marching ant company, and is currently the largest network red man.

Zhao Min and Xiao Yuyi appeared in the venue, and there was a commotion in the crowd below. All the cameras are aimed at her, and the rest are the sound of the shutter, accompanied by the continuous flash.

They just sat at the long table of the reception, and the reception was quiet.

"Hello everyone."

After a simple greeting, I will enter the topic. Many journalists have come up with their own notebooks or mobile phones, ready to record news content and write news articles.

"This reporter wearing glasses." Zhao Mingang sat down and pointed to a reporter in the first row.

"Thank you."

The female reporter wearing glasses took over the microphone and looked at Zhao Min.

“I am a reporter for Binhai Daily. I saw yesterday that a police car appeared in the downstairs of your company office building and took away a man. The rumor is that the chairman of your company? Is this news accurate? Why is this man? Was it taken?"

"I can tell you clearly that this news is not accurate. It is not our chairman. Yesterday the police took away the employees of our company, and we alarmed. Because he harmed the company's interests, the company would not condone.

As for what he has done, I am temporarily inconvenient to talk about it. The police are investigating. We believe that the police in Binhai will give us a fair and satisfactory answer. ”

Zhao Min’s voice is calm and he can’t hear the anger.

"The man in the middle, wearing a white shirt." Zhao Min continued to ask questions.

Since the press conference was held this time, she asked them to ask all the questions they wanted to ask.

"Thank you, I am a reporter from the Southern Newspaper. Yesterday, the people of the Inland Revenue Department entered your company, and the network uploaded the words, the marching ant company has tax evasion and tax evasion. What are your responses?"

"I haven't read these articles. If there are these rumors, it is rumor. I will let the people of the company follow up. Some people have rumors like this. I don't mind letting them accept lawyers.

Yesterday's tax bureau was only a routine inspection. They can confirm the news. If we evade taxes and tax evasion, then I will not sit here and talk to you.

Our marching ant company was established shortly, and we can have today's achievements because we are law-abiding. We focus on technology, let technology benefit people's lives, and don't make a fuss about this kind of small path. ”

Zhao Min’s voice is not fluctuating, and it is still a quiet appearance: “Next, this gentleman.”

“Thank you, I am a reporter from Youth Daily. There are a lot of articles on the Internet that the marching ants may be stealing the technology of other companies in the cottage. What response do you have?”

"The idea is ridiculous. Whose technology are we stealing? Who has this technology for us to steal? From ant office, marching ant system, butterfly eye, and finally to smart assistants, these technologies are unique to our company, and innovation is ours. The soul of the company.

When it comes to stealing, I have a piece of data in my hands. From its inception to the present, our company has encountered 349 cyber attacks, a large number of traffic attacks, and Trojans. Although we have all been clarified by us, I am afraid that we are not stealing technology. ”

......

The reception was held for an hour and a half. Zhao Min calmly answered all kinds of questions. They did not do anything wrong, and they were not afraid of any attacks.

After the press conference, Zhao Min left the Marriott Hotel with Xiaoyu and rushed back to the company.

What I have said now, have already said, and how much resounding it will cause is not what they can predict.

After the press conference was over, there was indeed a big response on the Internet. The king of the recent topic is the marching ant company. This press conference can interpret many problems and can also explain the attitude of marching ants.

The attitude of the marching ants is very obvious. It is still the original sentence. It is not afraid of the challenges of those who can’t see the light, and it will not take a step back in any respect. The company's confidence is on the smart assistant.

No matter how dark the outside world is, the users of intelligent assistants are still climbing, and even if the company is just a product, the company is not afraid of saving money.

......

"It’s endless."

In the Chen Mo office, Zhao Min glared at his temple. In recent days, there have been many things and a lot of annoying things.

"The king is good to see, the little devil is difficult." Chen Mo thought about it and smiled. "But I read your speech, you can go to the spokesperson of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs."

"Roll." Zhao Min threw a white eye to Chen Mo, and returned to the topic: "I don't know what people will do in the next step."

The benefits of smart assistants are so great that many people want to share a piece of it. These people, if they don’t get what they want, will never give up. She is skeptical that she had published the smart assistant publicly, whether it was right or wrong.

But now it’s no use talking about right or wrong.

For those capitals, they are within reach, they will bite wildly, and they will bite a piece of meat in spite of everything. When the mountains are up, they will not dare to move you, they will only be tied, and they will pity you.

But the marching ant company has not yet reached the point where it is prohibitive.

"Afraid of what, water comes to earth."

"Of course, you are not afraid, and you are not bothering you. You are sitting here reading a book and studying it." Zhao Min turned his eyes and turned to look at the small fish around Chen Mo: "I will let Xiaoyu handle these troubles and see you. The heart is not distressed."

"What about me?" Xiao Yu was blushing, but he was suddenly thought to be ridiculed by Zhao Min.

"Optimistic, the storm will always pass." Chen Mo said: "What are the main things of the company next?"

"The recent acquisitions are busy evaluating the value of factories and advertising companies, building company headquarters, setting up branches in major domestic cities..."

Zhao Min and Chen Mo reported on the company's recent affairs. After the chat, Zhao Min took a small fishing and began to get busy. Chen Mo also returned to his office and quietly read books.

That night, a small rental house not far from Binhai University.

The small fishing rods are in Chen Mohuai's arms, staring at the programs on the computer, laughing from time to time. During the day and night, it was their only time to get along.

Seeing Xiaoli’s smile in his arms, Chen Mo also smiled.

Every day, when you study with Xiaoyu, you are the most relaxed. You don't have to think about anything. You don't have to talk about work, go out for a walk, go shopping, or watch a movie like a little couple.

"Small fish, show you something."

Chen Mo took two strings of keys from his pocket and swayed in front of the small fisherman.

Seeing the key in the hands of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu’s face was surprised: “How is this key in your hand?”

"What did I let Zhao Min buy the house for me? What's wrong?" Chen Mo said.

"Zhao Jie asked me to help her see, did not say that you want to buy." Xiao Yu also took the key in Chen Mo's hand and looked at it twice, confirming it is correct.

"I didn't expect her to let you go, she thought about it."

Chen Mo cried and laughed. When Zhao Min was asked to help him buy a house, he wanted to give Xiao Yu a surprise. I didn't expect her to let Xiao Yu go to see the house.

"Let's find a time, let's move over?"

"Don't move, it's a little smaller, but it's very warm. Let me adjust a bit psychologically, okay? And that house is so big, I can't clean it." Xiaoyu said helplessly.

"Well, I listen to you, but I want to reward."

"Hey..."

After two minutes, Xiao Yu was so gasping and soft in Chen Mohuai, his face was still rosy.

Hey!

It didn't take long before the two men just released, and the knock on the door sounded, and someone came.

chapters.title: Chapter 65: : The Military Is Coming?
chapters.body:
Chapter 65: : The Military Is Coming?

Hearing the knocking on the door, Xiao Yu hurriedly climbed up from Chen Mohuai, sorted out the nightdress that was messed up by Chen Mo, snorted and ran back to the room with a red face.

Chen Mo shook his head and stood up from the sofa.

Just after opening the door, I saw a middle-aged man in a suit and a standing man standing at the door and looking at him with a smile. The man's skin is dark, but his eyes are full of power, and his breath is very strong. It doesn't look like the average person.

"Hello, Mr. Chen Mo." The middle-aged man did not wait for Chen Mo to ask, and hurriedly introduced himself: "My name is Li Chengzhi. I am so embarrassed to be so late."

"What's the matter?"

Chen Mo looked at him. He was sure that he had never seen this person. His heart was also slightly vigilant. After all, it is now the eventful autumn.

The other party knows his address and should pay special attention to him.

"Can you talk inside?" Li Chengzhi said with a smile: "Don't be nervous, I am not malicious. I only come alone and talk about business."

"Chen Mo, come to the guests, don't you invite others to come in?" When the two men looked at each other, Xiaoyu changed clothes from the room and walked out.

"Sorry, I don't want to talk about business right now. If you can, go to my company tomorrow."

When Chen Mo finished, he would close the door.

"Wait." Li Chengzhi stopped Chen Mo's action and took a document from his pocket and put it in front of Chen Mo: "In fact, I don't want to bother you so late, but it is special."

"soldier?"

Chen Mo took a look at the documents and looked serious.

In China, it is not a trivial matter involving the military. He did not expect that the above would send someone to look for him, needless to say, certainly for the technology of the smart assistant in his hands.

"Can you go in and sit?" Li Chengzhi laughed.

"Come in." Chen Mo thought about it.

"Drink some water." Li Chengzhi just sat down on the sofa, and Xiaoyu took a cup of boiling water.

"Small fish, you go to bed first, I will talk to him."

"it is good."

Little fishing point nodded, did not ask, went back to the room. Chen Mo re-focused his eyes on Li Chengzhi, his face still calm.

"A very good girl, Mr. Chen Mo is really lucky." After Xiao Yu left, Li Chengzhi said: "This time, it is mainly two things. The first thing is to invite you to join the engineering institute."

"The second one?"

Chen Mo no expression, he has not really confirmed that the identity of the other party is true or false, so just listen. After all, the falsification of documents, the more things go, does not rule out some bold people take this risk.

"The second is to make a deal with you, in exchange for the technology of your company's intelligent assistant. Fair trade, what conditions do you have, you can come up." Li Chengzhi's gesture is very low, as he said, is to talk about business .

Chen Mo is not surprised. He starts to guess the identity of the other party.

The source of Siri is the CALO program announced by the US Department of Defense's Advanced Research and Planning Agency, a digital assistant that allows the military to streamline complex tasks with learning, organization, and cognitive skills.

The civilian software derived from this plan is Siri. Finally, Siri was acquired by Apple for $200 million and became the current Apple-assisted mobile assistant Siri.

The domestic military will certainly have a similar plan, but it has not been announced.

Smart assistants are more advanced and powerful than Siri, and the technology inside is close to the needs of the military. If the technology of intelligent assistants can be obtained, the progress of research in this area will certainly be greatly accelerated, and the research on national artificial intelligence will also accelerate.

Some time ago, the state has incorporated artificial intelligence into its national development strategy. The emergence of intelligent assistants will definitely make the country pay attention to his existence.

"Fair trade, your conditions, within our capabilities, will try to satisfy. Of course, if the little brother is not willing to trade, we are not reluctant."

Li Chengzhi looked at the meditative Chen Mo, and a heart was raised. If Chen Mo refused, then the next thing would be a little difficult. After all, in their investigation, Chen Mo is an out-and-out genius, and the future is limitless.

"How do I confirm the authenticity of your identity?"

Chen Mo does not have much emotional fluctuations. This is a small matter. The identity is uncertain and the consequences are very serious.

"This is my ID." Li Chengzhi took the documents from his pocket and handed it to Chen Mo.

"I have already seen it, I can't prove its authenticity."

Chen Mo had to be cautious about this incident. He admired the people's soldiers, but after all, he did not touch the top of the military. This is the first time.

For Chen Mo’s problem, Li Chengzhi was not angry, but smiled. Looking at Chen Mo’s eyes is more appreciated.

"This is really hard to prove, so let's say your condition first, I will go back and reflect. I will come to you tomorrow." Li Chengzhi said.

"When you prove your identity, I will say the conditions, go directly to my company tomorrow to find me." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, see you next time." Li Chengzhi was also unambiguous and got up and left.

After Li Chengzhi left, Chen Mo closed the door and walked into the room.

Xiao Yu took the earphones and leaned on the bed to play with the mobile phone. When Chen Mo came in, he put down the mobile phone: "Sleep."

"Ok."

Chen Mo climbed onto the bed and hugged her from behind: "Small fish, move over there this weekend."

Today Li Chengzhi came to him and asked him to find a problem. His current status is not an ordinary person. If the competitor wants to find him trouble, it is not very safe.

In the high-end residential area, there are many rich people living in the city, and the security will be better.

"Well, listen to you." Little fisherman nodded in Chen Mohuai.

"You promised? Don't ask why?" Chen Mo thought that Xiao Yu had let him live here for a while, but he did not expect that now he said that Xiao Yu agreed.

"If you promise me, it will not change easily. Since there is a change, there must be a reason. I ask so much. Why is it not a big move to move? There is no need to oppose it. I just think that the house is too big, I will Cleaning must not be exhausted. I knew that if you want to buy, you should choose a smaller one." Xiao Yu said.

"And me."

......

The bedside whispers of the two men gradually calmed down and had nothing to say overnight.

The next day, Chen Mo finished the breakfast and rushed to the company with a small fisherman. When I first arrived at the company, I saw the employees around me look happy and talked with the people next to them.

This situation, during this time, rarely occurs.

"The chairman is good." After seeing Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, the two employees hurriedly greeted each other.

“What is the company’s happy event today?”

"Chairman, don't you know? This morning, the rumors about smearing our company on the Internet were all gone. I heard that the heads of the water army companies were arrested. The network uploaded words and bought people who were smeared by the water company. Also caught."

"Oh?"

Chen Mo was also surprised, as if everything came too suddenly.

"You go to work."

"Ok."

After bidding farewell to Xiaoyu, Chen Mo also returned to his own office area.

"Ink girl."

"Mer brother, the ink girl is coming."

"You help me check a military officer's card, the number is..." Just after turning on the computer, Chen Mo said the number of Li Chengzhi's military officer's card that he wrote down yesterday.

The comments on the Internet about the smearing of marching ants suddenly disappeared. His first thought was related to Li Chengzhi’s visit last night.

He had to personally determine the identity of Li Chengzhi. After all, he had to be cautious about the military. If the identity of the other party is impersonating, then he is in trouble.

"Mer brother, the information has been found."

When the inky voice of the ink girl fell, the computer desktop immediately jumped out of a file.

chapters.title: Chapter 66: :Transaction Terms
chapters.body:
Chapter 66: :Transaction Terms

Xiaoyu is carefully looking at the documents that Zhao Min gave her. During this time, she followed Zhao Min and she learned a lot. In school, it is self-study management, so in many places, Zhao Min only needs to give pointers, she can understand.

What she lacks most is experience. Many of the knowledge that is learned in school is theory. There is no great use in company management.

A lot of things, Zhao Min let her do it by herself. From the beginning, everything will let her contact. Although very tired, it is very fulfilling.

When Xiaoyu was looking at the documents, a sister at the front desk stopped with two middle-aged men in front of her workbench.

"Small fish, there are two gentlemen looking for the chairman."

"Oh."

Xiaoyu put down the file and just looked up and saw two familiar faces. One was a middle-aged man who rented a house last night, and one of hers also met with Zhao Min, the head of Binhai City, Yao Yi.

"Hello, we saw it last night." Li Chengzhi smiled and said hello to Xiao Yu.

"Hello sir."

Xiao Yu rushed to stand up from the position, and the first hand suddenly came, almost scared her. This is silent, without any notice.

"Hello." Yao Yi also nodded slightly.

"Can you see your chairman? We made an appointment last night." Li Chengzhi said.

"He is doing experiments on it, you wait, I will inform the president first."

Xiao Yu went to Zhao Min's office. Li Chengzhi came to their rented house last night. She didn't even know his name. I didn't expect to come to the company today.

After a while, Xiaoyu followed Zhao Min and walked out of the president's office.

"Yao Shuji, hello."

After Zhao Min came out of the office, he hurriedly greeted him.

"Zhao Zong, today I came in a private identity, not a job, not so polite. Today's protagonist is this Mr. Li." Yao Yi pointed to Li Chengzhi around him.

"Hello, Mr. Li."

Zhao Min looked at Li Chengzhi and smiled and shook hands with him.

"Hello, last night, I had an appointment with your chairman to meet today, can you show me to see him?" Li Chengzhi said calmly.

"Slightly wait."

Zhao Min took out his mobile phone and dialed Chen Mo’s number. After all, the person who can let the first-hand person accompany him in a private identity is definitely not the same.

He said last night, and then think of overnight, the article of the smuggling marching ant company is gone, it seems that everything has become a good explanation.

"Chairman, there is a Mr. Li who wants to see you."

"And he came to my office, I went out after completing this experiment."

When the phone hangs up, Chen Mo is staring at the instrument and watching the changes in the data. The purity of this carbon crystal is not difficult, but requires patience.

From the beginning to the present, it has failed more than 80 times.

But fortunately, there are gains. Temperature, pressure, and time will affect the purity of the carbon crystal. These conditions are slightly different, the purity of the carbon crystal is not enough, and even the material is destroyed.

Now I am exploring, and the correct answer is getting closer and closer.

"Ink girl, report the data." Chen Mo said.

"The pressure is 1316.25KPa, the temperature is 1403K, and the distance is set at the time, 120 seconds left."

"it is good."

Chen Mo began to wait only, and after two minutes, the instrument automatically stopped running. He couldn't wait to take out a piece of carbon crystal and transfer it to the next instrument to start testing the purity.

Ten minutes later, Chen Mo sighed and stood up straight.

As expected, the purity has improved, but it is still not enough to be used as a battery.

"Ink girl, record other data."

"Okay, Mom."

Chen Mo packed the instruments and took off the lab coats and gloves before leaving the lab. When I returned to the office, Zhao Min and Li Chengzhi, four people, were already sitting on the sofa in the office.

"Come on again." Li Chengzhi stood up and shook hands with Chen Mo, pointing to Yao Yi: "This is my good friend Yao Yi, who is also the leader of Binhai City. I came here today as a private person. It is proof of my identity. This is enough What?"

Li Chengzhi felt funny, did not expect to confirm his identity, looking for a leader to come and help. In order to complete the task as soon as possible, you must find a heavyweight, or Chen Mo does not believe, he has to trouble again.

After a few guests, Zhao Min said: "Yao Shuji, it is rare to come once, today we go to have a cup of tea? Personal identity."

"Yes." Yao Yi immediately agreed.

The next thing, they all understand, some things, they should not know, so give the space to two people.

After the three men left, Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi also entered the topic.

"What is Mr. Chen thinking about? I won't take you with you. If there are any problem conditions, even if I say it. If we don't want to, we are not reluctant."

Li Chengzhi came to Chen Mo is also helpless, the intelligent assistant did not apply for a patent, the official did not know the technology, so came over to ask. After all, this technology can improve the country's research progress on artificial intelligence.

"The technology of the intelligent assistant is for you, it is not impossible." Chen Mo thought about it.

Chen Mo’s words made Li Cheng’s face smile.

As long as Chen Moken promised, other conditions are easy to say. With this technology, many aspects of their research, especially artificial intelligence research, can speed up. For scientific research, time is more important than money.

"But it's not free. After all, I am a businessman." Chen Mo said.

"I said at the beginning, fair trade, giving people jobs and wages, we can't afford it." Li Chengzhi smiled heartily.

"Then I said, the first condition, I want two years of tax exemption." Chen Mo also grinned.

Upon hearing this condition, Li Chengzhi was convulsed. Although his mathematics is not proficient, the annual revenue of the marching ant company is known from the sales of smart assistants.

The annual tax is definitely not a small amount.

"I will mention this condition to the above." Li Chengzhi said.

“The second condition is that intelligent assistants, including derivatives developed with it as the core, can be used as research. But they cannot appear in the commercial market within five years. If they are to appear in the commercial market in five years, we will charge a certain patent. Authorization fees, on these two conditions."

“Nothing?” Li Chengzhi asked.

"No, there is a condition that is not conditional. Do you have any better retired personnel? When you introduce it to the company as a security guard, the salary will never be less."

The company's security problems, he thought for a long time, the company's personnel need to protect, and now the company is developing too fast, it will inevitably cause some small people's embarrassment, so security, but also to increase efforts.

Those conditions are better, and many of them have been hired by security companies. This time there are such good resources, there is no reason not to use them.

"Okay." Li Chengzhi nodded. "The conditions you said, I will go back and reflect. Next is another question. Yesterday, did you have any interest in joining the Academy?"

"I don't have this consideration for the time being. I like to study freely. Today, I research software. Maybe someday, I will make a whim and go to study aphrodisiac." Chen Mo laughed.

Li Chengzhi jumped straight and looked at Chen Mo silently. "Then I will go back and reflect your conditions. I have news and come over."

"Wait for your good news." Chen Mo said.

After sending away Li Cheng, Chen Mo returned to the laboratory and continued to experiment.

chapters.title: Chapter 67: : New Material: Carbon Crystal (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 67: : New Material: Carbon Crystal (Third More)

"Ink girl, report the current temperature?"

"Temperature 1408K."

“Now increase the pressure to 1468.25KPa. When boosting, don’t go too fast and keep the temperature constant.”

In the experimental room, Chen Mo's face calmly stared at the instrument in front of him. The last time Li Chengzhi came over to talk about the transaction, it has been ten days passed, and after this period of continuous experimentation and failure.

It is finally here, the most crucial moment.

The temperature rises by 5 degrees Celsius, the pressure increases by 152 KPa, and the pressurization time of 3 seconds is increased. This data is the last data he has spent ten days and after hundreds of failures.

Looking at the countdown of the computer next to him, Chen Mo also raised his heart.

The lab was quiet and only the sound of the instrument was running. Three and a half minutes, not long after, Chen Mo feels like it has been a long time.

Knowing that the time set by the instrument is completed and the operation is stopped, Chen Mo will slow down the gods and slowly open the reaction tank of the instrument.

A familiar carbon chip, Chen Mo took out a piece of carbon crystal in the reaction tank. These carbon wafers are not the same size as shredded paper. These one-mm thick carbon crystals are not brittle, similar to cardboard, so don't worry about accidentally turning into powder.

On the small carbon chip, there are countless stars in it, just like the starry sky of the night, it looks beautiful.

There is not much difference between the carbon wafers of the previous experiments. However, this is mainly the difference in purity, which cannot be discerned by the naked eye.

Putting the carbon crystal into the test instrument, Chen Mo began to wait. It didn't take long for the drip of the machine's detection to sound.

"Purity 82%."

Seeing the data displayed on the instrument, Chen Mo laughed. Jumping from 79 to 82, and finally completing the goal of 80, this purity is enough as a raw material for the battery.

Chen Mo picked up a small cookie-sized carbon wafer and looked carefully under the light. This material is a new type of battery material.

The carbon crystal is finished, just a super-container finish, followed by a lithium ion embedding process. Lithium ions have the property of being embedded in graphite. This process is fast, reversible and not as cumbersome as synthesizing carbon crystals.

The lithium ion is embedded in the carbon crystal to form a true carbon crystal group.

Chen Mo did not continue the experiment. Today, the synthesis of carbon crystals has been completed. The next thing is much simpler. There is no need to worry.

"Ink girl, record the data of carbon crystal synthesis conditions." Chen Mo thought and said.

"Okay, Mercedes." The inky voice of the ink girl went silent. After a while, it only sounded again: "Mergo, the data is recorded."

“Organize the technical data of carbon crystal materials and save them in the database.” Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

Let the ink girl do the things she did, and Chen Mocai began to organize the instruments on the desktop. After all was done, leave the lab and walk back to the office.

The next thing he has to do is to take technology.

Unconsciously, it has passed a month. The level of authority of the trainee can be randomized once a month. Today is just one month. Although this is a bit random, it still needs to be taken.

Back at the office, Chen Mo lay directly on the sofa, closed his eyes and entered the technology library.

Still familiar taste.

After a glimpse of the circle in the library, Chen Mo opened the dark red book on the table. The book has just been opened, and Shu Lao appears in the library.

"Come." Shu Laochao Chen Mo nodded: "Want to take technology? You have a right to randomly choose."

"Use it."

Chen Mo wiped his face, just thinking, don't hang it this time, otherwise you will really choose this option randomly, and you will have a shadow in your heart.

Shu, a little finger, a dense book, quickly appeared in the library, and then slowly rotated.

The books are getting less and less, and Chen Mo is still staring in the air.

The last book fell in the hands of Shu Lao, and Chen Mo fixed his eyes and looked awkward.

"Test pregnancy production technology"

Seeing this technique, Chen Mo almost vomited blood and rubbed his face on the ground. He now doubts life, and he now completely believes that this random is a pit. This is not as good as Feng. Chest formula and aphrodisiac.

"Shu Lao, you tell me, this random choice, is there no good technology?" Chen Mo wants to cry without tears.

"Yes, there are just too many random techniques, and your luck is good after all." Shu Lao haha smiled.

"Well, I am unlucky." Chen Mo said with a sullen face.

Shu Lao smiled and took the book in his hand into Chen Mo's head, and immediately looked at Chen Mo: "You still have more than 430 books to complete the 1000 tasks. It is better to go to the next level and get better."

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded: "What is the authority for the next level?"

"You will know when you get there," Shu said.

Out of the science and technology library, Chen Mo was depressed, this time almost empty-handed. That **** random choice made him happy.

But it doesn't matter if you think about it. There are still a lot of his current technology, and he has not entered the medical field. It is impossible for him to come up with so many technologies at once.

After coming out of the library, Chen Mo picked up the book and began to look quietly.

It’s rare to have a free time. Now is a good time to read a book.

"Mu Gege, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu, came in with a man." Chen Mozheng looked at the book into the gods, the inky voice of the ink girl interrupted him.

Not long after, Zhao Min walked in with a man.

"Chairman, this is one of the best employees selected from the people introduced by Mr. Li, Wang Hai. He is a retired special commander. He will be your full-time driver and bodyguard in the future."

"The chairman is good."

Wang Hai glanced at Chen Mo, his face was blank, but his eyes were full of surprises. He did not expect that the chairman of the newly emerging marching ant company in China was so young.

"Hello." Chen Mo also looked at Wang Hai and nodded slightly.

Wang Haiping has short hair and dark skin. The one-meter-seven-five is not tall, looks ordinary, and grows in the sea and does not attract the attention of others.

In him, I can't see the breath of the soldiers, but Chen Mo is not looking at it, nor does he care about it.

"You go out first, and I have something to talk to the chairman."

After Zhao Min let the two leave, they looked at Chen Mo: "The chairman, the notice on the other side of the city has come down, exempting the company from tax for one year, and exempting half of the second year."

Chen Mo nodded: "Not bad." He knows that if you want two years of free, the difficulty is certainly not small, which is already a big concession.

"Talk about new materials, what equipment do I have for you to buy, are you ready? Soon, I need to conduct mass production experiments."

Chen Mo's face is serious, the carbon crystal has been completed, and then the mass production experiment must be carried out. Otherwise, it is in the laboratory stage and it is useless to them.

“It’s already ready, the equipment has been placed in the factory building. Has the new material been successful?” Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

“Today, the lab stage is successful, you are ready to prepare the raw materials, and the mass production experiment is carried out three days later,” Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

chapters.title: Chapter 68: : Announced!
chapters.body:
Chapter 68: : Announced!

"Cathode material, lithium cobaltate gel, carbon material for anode material. Limited voltage 3.86V, charge limit voltage 4.5V, rated capacity 8500mAh..."

The ink girl reported the battery data, but Chen Mo was carefully watching the battery in his hand.

After three days, Chen Mo passed the pulping, coating and fitting, and finally succeeded in making the first carbon crystal lithium ion battery according to the battery size of the butterfly eye.

Like all ordinary batteries, carbon-based batteries also include the positive, negative and electrolyte parts, but the difference is the material.

Carbon crystal can greatly increase the charge and discharge amount of lithium ions and the number of times of charging.

This makes the carbon-based lithium-ion battery have better capacitance than other materials.

The carbon crystal has defects in its atomic structure, making it less rigid and without toughness and ductility. So it's not as versatile as the super material of graphene. Its only use is to plug in lithium ions as the negative electrode of the battery.

It is this single use that limits its continued development, so it is a low-level technology.

However, carbon-based batteries are a very good product until graphene battery technology is not fully mature. Because of its capacitance, it is about twice the capacity of existing lithium-ion batteries on the market.

"Ink girl, your carbon crystal synthesis related technology, compiled into patent application materials printed out." Chen Mo put down the battery in his hand.

"Okay, Mom."

After a while, the printer connected to the computer in the lab rang. After getting the technical patent data of carbon crystal synthesis, Chen Mo left the laboratory.

Today is the day of mass production experiments, Zhao Min is already waiting for him.

When she went to Zhao Min’s office, Chen Mo gave her the patent application information: “This is the patent application for Carbon Crystal.”

"So fast?"

Zhao Min took a look at the information, a lot of technical terms above, she just took a look at it and put it down.

New material, Zhao Min is now extremely curious about Chen Mo's head. What is loaded inside, how long does it take to discover new materials and applications?

This kind of research cycle is terrible, and I don’t know if Tesla is reborn.

“I was sorting out the information at the beginning of the experiment, then went to the factory, the battery was out, confirming that the material was useful, and then the mass production experiment.” Chen Mo said.

"The battery it produces, how much capacity?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

"You are using a butterfly eye now? The new battery comes out, and the initial calculations will allow it to last for 35 hours."

Zhao Min took a breath of cold air and his eyes were full of surprise.

Nowadays, the average mobile phone life is only a dozen hours. The number of Chen Mo means more than twice the battery life.

"Go, go to the factory."

Zhao Min left Chen Mo to leave the office, and the two came out. Xiao Yu also held documents with Chen Mo. All the way to gallop, a group of people came to the factory.

After Chen Mo said that he entered the industry, Zhao Min began to buy the factory. This factory is the closest to the company's office building, so it has also been transformed into a pilot plant for research use.

The equipment that Chen Morang bought has already been installed here, and the raw materials of graphite are also ready.

When they first came to the factory, the factory manager hurriedly greeted them.

The name of the factory director is Wan Mingyi, a middle-aged man in his forties. In the past, the factory closed down, the boss rolled out the money, and owed bank loans and employee salaries. The court auctioned the factory and equipment, and finally bought it by Zhao Min. The workers were still the workers of the original factory and were very familiar with some production processes.

After Wan Mingyi saw Chen Mo and Zhao Min, people became cautious.

Now the marching ant company, as long as people who pay a little attention to the news, know the name, especially the people in Binhai.

“Where is the production workshop?” Chen Mo asked.

"On this side." Wan Mingyi said to you.

"Let a few smart technicians come over, etc. I will tell you the production process and some considerations," Chen said.

"Ok."

Wan Mingyi ordered several technicians from the factory workers and followed Chen Mo to enter the production workshop.

Seeing the machine in the workshop and the high-pressure reaction irrigation, Chen Mo went over, opened the control system of the equipment and began to set the parameters. For the production of carbon crystals, this data is the most important. If it is wrong, the purity of carbon crystals will be affected.

“Now it is starting to feed.” Chen Mo said: “Come two people to operate the reaction tank.” The employee behind Chen Mochao shouted.

"Ahua, Daqiang, you two have passed." Two young technicians around Wan Mingyi said.

"boss."

After the two walked to Chen Mo’s side, they asked Chen Mo’s cautious voice. This is a younger boss than they are, so they have to admire.

"This position, the thing to do is very simple, is responsible for the reaction of the irrigation switch. After the raw material is finished, the reaction tank is turned on, the specific parameters I have set. The temperature indicator light prompts to complete, you open the pressure button..."

Chen Mo will talk about all the steps he needs, and after confirming that both of them understand, he stops.

Specific data, Chen Mo did not tell anyone. Data is the key to carbon crystal synthesis. If the data is exposed, then your own efforts will be done.

“I will demonstrate the operation once.” After the raw materials were put in, Chen Mo started the reaction furnace.

The people behind, all eyes are on the reaction tank. After about fifteen minutes, the high pressure reaction tank stopped working.

After the reaction tank was opened, a large number of pieces of carbon wafers of different sizes were all poured onto the assembly line. All the machines stopped and the employees of the factory all looked at the carbon piles in the conveyor line.

This black and autumn thing is what they want to produce.

Chen Mo took a piece of carbon crystal from the assembly line and walked to the front of the instrument and put it into it. Not long after, seeing the 79% purity shown above, Chen Mo brows up.

It is 3% lower than the purity of the laboratory and lower than the standard of 80.

This can be understood, after all, the laboratory equipment, much more precise than here, the same conditions, the purity is slightly lower, completely acceptable.

“This batch of materials is completely destroyed and continues to be put into raw materials.”

Chen Mo picked up the notebook and wrote down the current parameters. After a little calculation, he went back to the instrument and started another experiment.

The precision of the equipment is different and has an impact on production.

After modifying the data, Chen Mo will explain to others the other things to pay attention to while waiting for the gap.

"Wan factory director, when starting production, every batch of materials, you randomly select 20 pieces to test out, once there is a piece of purity below 80, just like that, the batch of materials, all invalid."

"Good." Wan Mingyi nodded.

Two hours later, Chen Mo looked at 82% of the purity test and gave a sigh of relief. After four data revisions, the purity was finally improved.

"In the future, according to this data production, the reaction must be there, and must be controlled."

"Understood." Wan Mingyi nodded.

The success of the mass production test has left many people relieved. After explaining some things clearly, Chen Mocai and the people rushed back to the company. After confessing that Zhao Min had acquired several factories and prepared battery production matters, Chen Mo returned to the office.

"Ink girl."

"Mer brother, ink girl." Chen Moyi opened, the ink girl said.

"In the company's official website, in my name, announced the discovery of new materials carbon crystals, technical data should not be announced."

chapters.title: Chapter 69: : You Go Home To Manage Him.
chapters.body:
Chapter 69: : You Go Home To Manage Him.

"When is the founding of the country, is there any big news on the side of the marching ant company?"

"No, after the last clean-up, those waters were honest. The army ants company has been calm for the past two weeks, and there is not much that is estimated to be developing. The news of their acquisition of factories and recruiters is quite a lot. ""

He Jianguo took out the butterfly eye phone he just bought, connected to the computer, and prepared to download a smart assistant. The smart assistant is not expensive, and the voice interaction is very good, and it can input voice.

It is very convenient for them to be a writer. And the marching ant intelligent assistant can also let him experience the feeling of a future black technology.

Just entering the official website of the marching ant company, a newly updated news on the official website caught his attention.

"new material?"

He Jianguo clicked on the announcement, quietly watching it, every meeting, the face showed a surprise color: "Big news, the marching ant company issued an announcement, found new battery materials, carbon crystal."

He Jianguo’s sentence was almost shouted out. When his words fell, several colleagues in the office immediately surrounded.

“Whether the marching ant company wants to zoom in again?”

"It is estimated."

"Hurry up and write a newsletter..."

......

It’s not just them who got the news. The marching ant company has recently been in high spirits, and any big move is a huge news point.

Since the release of the smart assistant last time, the marching ant company has become one of the major technology giants in China. As long as you stand on the heels, it is almost certain that another unicorn company will appear in China.

After the last smear incident, the Sail Corps company was silent because of the spread of rumors, and there was not much news about the marching ant company.

This time, another new battery material came.

The news quickly spread on the Internet, and many media did not directly submit the manuscript, reprinting the announcement of the marching ant company.

The news point came again, and many people began to catch the heat. Anyway, this time, in addition to those stars divorced, derailed, love news, there is not much new things in the country.

The marching ant company has always been a topic, so many people choose to report on the new materials of the marching ant company.

However, in the announcement of the marching ant company, it has been stated that the electric capacity of the new material is only 2-3 times that of the existing battery, and the use is single. So the news came out, not as sensational as the smart assistant.

"It makes sense, I think it is big news. This new material is too restrictive. It doesn't have much research value. Now cutting-edge technology, increasing the capacity by 2-3 times is almost a matter of minutes. If it costs a lot of money to go Studying carbon crystals may not be worth the candle."

"In any case, it is a new material. If the carbon crystal technology can mature quickly, at least as an excessive material, our mobile phones, tablets and personal PCs, etc., have a 2-3 times longer battery life and are already very happy. ”

"Graphene battery is just a gimmick. In theory, graphene can only improve the charge and discharge efficiency, and can not increase the capacity. This **** is more than his practical value. And the material is expensive, it is almost impossible to use the electrode as an ordinary battery. I am optimistic about this carbon crystal."

......

In the discussion on the Internet, attitudes are different.

In this era, new battery materials are constantly being discovered.

Legendary, graphene batteries are among the best. However, for graphene batteries, many people have different attitudes and the debate has never stopped.

This carbon crystal discovery can only be improved by 2-3 times, so it has not caused much sensation among ordinary people. This is just discovering new materials that have no impact on their lives, so most people will not pay attention.

Zhao Min is thinking about how to make a mobile phone. Smart assistants, plus new batteries, this is definitely a big selling point.

However, the problem with the new battery is that the new material of carbon crystal appears. The new battery is still being tested. Plus the smart assistant is not going to get off the shelf so quickly, so it takes a while for the second mobile phone to be mass-produced.

When she thought about how to deal with a lot of problems, Xiaoyu knocked on the door and came in.

"Zhao Jie, he posted an announcement on the official website, the news of carbon crystal materials was announced, and now the network has spread."

"Small fish, talk to you."

"Zhao Jie, you said."

"You go home to take care of him."

Zhao Min knocked on his head and looked helpless. Now the company's business is already chaotic, and as a result, this guy actually came out and gave her a problem.

"This... I can't control him." Xiao Yu was said by Zhao Min, and his face was red. Originally, the face was not too thick, and now it is also ridiculed by Zhao Min.

"Fortunately." Zhao Min sighed after opening the announcement of the official website.

"Small fish, you will show him the design picture of the company headquarters, and there is the matter of carbon crystal, and give it to me. Now the company can't get the energy to toss, you tell him."

"Good." Little fish nodded.

After Xiaoyu left, Zhao Min was frowning.

Chen Mo did not participate in the management of the company, and did not know how complicated the company's affairs were.

Now the company is expanding, a lot of things. The headquarters is also being built soon, the mobile phone business, smart assistants, as well as the formation of research institutes, the acquisition of factory companies.

Now, Chen Mo does not need to manage these things. She has to deal with it. If a battery is added, the company’s talents will be in short supply, and there will be no manpower to manage this piece.

In the office, Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and blinked innocently.

He really didn't know that there were so many things in the company, but he was told by Xiao Yu, and now he discovered that this is really true.

Since the last smear event subsided, Zhao Min has been immersed in low-key development and has not issued any news.

Now the marching ant company is not big, Zhao Min's purpose is only to let the public's vision shift, and then the marching ant company can quietly grow. I just didn't expect that Chen Mo had an announcement, and let the marching ant company show a sense of presence in front of the public.

It seems that a bite to eat can not be fat, the company's development is indeed too fast, you need to calm down and precipitate.

"What should I do?" Chen Mo said.

"Zhao Jie said that the carbon crystal battery is handed over to her. So during this time, keep your usual low-key, quietly read the study. By the way, look at the design of the company headquarters is not satisfied. If you are tired, Just go out shopping and bend."

Xiao Yu took the books on the table and stuffed them into Chen Mi’s arms.

"That's just right, easy." Chen Mo smiled.

Shu Lao asked him to read 1000 books quickly. Now he has more than 430 books. Now there is no technology that is too interesting to study, just read the book. When you have time, you can study the thoracic and developmental auxiliary agents and human reproductive aids.

Although he does not intend to enter the pharmaceutical market for the time being, he can study it first and then enter it later. The profits in this area are beyond the imagination.

After Xiaoyu left, Chen Mo sat on the sofa and read the book quietly.

Carbon crystals are not supermaterials such as graphene, which cause limited attention, but still need to be kept secret. Zhao Min directly let the factory stop production, and then released the news that the technology is not mature.

In the announcement of Chen Mo’s announcement, she did not say that the technology of carbon crystal materials is mature. It just said that new materials were discovered, otherwise it would cause trouble.

Time is slowly passing, because the cold processing of the marching ant company, coupled with the imminent release of the technology, so the carbon crystal material also fades out of the ordinary people's vision.

Chen Mo’s days have also calmed down. He walked around the company two times a day, and spent the rest of his time reading books, occasionally with pharmacy, and rare leisure.

"Merg brother, there is a hacker from the island country, is invading the company's server." Chen Mo looked at the book, the voice of the ink girl, interrupted his thoughts.

Chapter 70: : A **** Case Caused By A Small Movie

“Is it another island country?”

Chen Mo brows, he remembers that this time, the company has suffered a lot of cyber attacks, from the island country iP.

"It was the last fan of Hatano," said the ink girl.

Chen Mo's face twitched, and this hacker was impressed.

The last time I asked the ink girl to copy all the computer data of the invading hackers. As a result, on the computer of the island hacker, all the small movies, posters and seeds of Hatano were copied back. From debut to the latest works, there is no omission.

"He stole the information and went back to crack it. After the release, the virus in the computer, the movies, posters and seeds of the hard disk collection were all gone," said the ink girl.

When Chen Mo listened to the ink girl, she was almost teased. This guy, will not invade the company's server for revenge?

"Ink girl, in the fake database, open a port for him to enter. Since it is coming, let him return empty-handed and send him a gift."

Chen Mo thought about it and laughed. Now there is no other thing, just play with him.

"Okay, Mom, brother." said the ink girl.

In just one minute, the ink girl created the fake database successfully. According to Chen Mo, the ink girl opened a covert port for the hacker and let him succeed.

In a corner of the island of Kyoto, in a dimly lit room, there is a smell of rancid smell, and the wall is covered with a woman's poster, which is now the hottest girl in Hatano.

In front of the computer, sitting on a man, his fingers tapping on the keyboard, his brows are locked, his face is pale and gloomy under the fluorescent mapping of the computer.

The last time the virus in the computer, the hard-collected movie, was completely ruined. This time, in addition to stealing information, he still avenged.

Looking at the encrypted information, the man did not crack. Unplug the u disk on the computer and can't wait to dial a number.

"Hey!!"

The man ignored the computer's information and turned his eyes to the computer next to him, with a look of excitement on his face. An hour later, the door knocked, and the pale-faced man hurriedly wiped his hand and hurried to open the door.

As soon as I opened the door, I saw a middle-aged man in a suit, followed by two bodyguards.

"Mr. Nakamura, you are here. This is what you want. The information inside is encrypted. You need to crack it. I don't see the things inside." The man's treasure is usually taken out of the u disk.

The middle-aged man took the u disk and looked at the room with a disgusting color on his face.

Just walked in and saw the situation inside the house. The middle-aged man frowned and his face was aggravated: "I check the information."

"You please."

The middle-aged man just wanted to sit in a chair and saw a pile of liquid on it. He hurriedly stood up and inserted the u disk into the computer.

After confirming that there is data encrypted, the middle-aged man pulled out the u disk.

"Doing a good job, I will burn it back to you."

The middle-aged man took the sunglasses and took it and turned away. The two bodyguards next to him agreed to grab the pale man and took out a piece of cloth and licked his nose.

After a while, the man was motionless and had no breath.

Remove all traces and put the man's body back in the seat before leaving the room.

the next day.

After putting down the phone, Nakamura put his gaze on the folder of the computer: "Your, open these materials to see."

In the conference room, Yi Zhixiu, who just put down his mobile phone, smiled and smiled: "You, I just got a call from Nakamura, and got very precious technology. Next, we have to develop..."

Isaiah’s words just said that, on the projection of the conference room, I immediately jumped out of a video. Miss Bodo, who is covered in red fruit, is crying and gasping. "anything else?"

chapters.title: Chapter 71: :Laser Sensor Technology
chapters.body:
Chapter 71: :Laser Sensor Technology

Chen Mo sat up straight, with a look of hope on his face. The Lingjiao Group is a military industrial group of the island country. The secret is quite a lot. He wants to see what the ink girl brought back in the Lingjiao Group.

"Open it and see." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

When the words of the ink girl fall, a piece of information jumps to the computer screen.

After starting to browse the information, Chen Mo Shen regained her weight. There are a lot of special materials in the information that the ink girl got, including the formulation of two special materials.

Chen Mo did not look at the information on automobile and ship research. When he saw the research of weapons, his face became more dignified.

He can't touch the munition, at least not at present.

However, these are all information on ordinary weapons and the design of an airborne cannon. Special weapons, it is impossible to store them in the company's database as such, there must be separate storage points.

When I saw the last piece of information, Chen Mo’s hole narrowed and his face sank.

This information is all domestic data, research reports on terrain, environment, weather and water. It also includes the location addresses of some bases and important research institutes, as well as a lot of research and development personnel and agents who work for the Water Triangle Group. Chen Mo is shocked.

After seeing this information, Chen Mo began to think about how to deal with it. This is not an ordinary thing. He is not sure, there is still no backup in the Water Cube Group.

It is a tacit agreement between the state and the country to send spies to each other. If it can be seized, it will test the capabilities of the national intelligence agencies. Some time ago, many spies were publicly arrested, but those who did not announce it did not know how many.

"Ink, the person who sent this information to the National Security Agency, wrote it from the Lingjiao Group. Send it anonymously, don't be traced to the address, or there will be trouble." Chen Mo said.

These things are not what he should manage. However, since he knows that there is such a thing, he will be a red guest, and he will find his name and name. This is his motherland and he has this responsibility.

As for the content of this information, what the above people will do is not what he should do.

"Mergo, it has been sent successfully, leaving no trace."

"This information is the most advanced encryption, don't let anyone see it." After instructing the ink woman to process the information, Chen Mo sat back on the sofa and continued reading.

Security Bureau Office.

"Secretary, I just received a special piece of information and I need you to take a look." Li Jizheng rushed into the office of the director, and did not even knock on the door. His face was dignified.

"So anxious?"

"very urgent."

Zhu Ming, who was preparing to handle the transaction, hurriedly put down the documents in his hands, and did not ask much. He hurriedly let go of the matter at hand and followed Li Jizheng quickly out of the office.

Under his men, he is very clear. Usually, Li Jizheng will never run in such a hurry. There must be something urgent.

"This is the information."

The two just arrived at the office, and Li Jizheng asked the technicians in front of the computer to open the mail. The people around him were all quiet, and their eyes were all on Zhu Ming.

Zhu Ming's face became more and more dignified. When he saw the last, his brows were wrinkled.

"Who sent it?" Zhu Ming asked.

"I don't know, the other party is a master, using a fake address, I can't track any information about him." The technician sitting in front of the computer said.

“Can you determine the accuracy of this information?” Zhu Ming looked at Li Jizheng.

"It should be true. There are two island people here. It is the object of our surveillance. Just now we have confirmed that half an hour ago, the headquarters of the island's Lingjiao Group was indeed hacked, and now all the computers at the headquarters are in shackles. Li Jizheng said.

"Copy the document to me, I need to report it to the above. Can anyone find the information sent to us?" Zhu Ming asked.

"I'm afraid not, the other side did not leave a trace, like the red guest's approach." The technician sitting in front of the computer said.

"The formation of the team, following the team leader, is responsible for monitoring the activities of the island people on the list. The researchers on the list, I will inform other groups to protect."

......

The hacking incident of the Watermark Group quickly entered international news and became a hot headline.

Being a hot spot is not because of the impact it has caused, but because it is too wonderful.

The entire Xiaojiao Group's computer plays a small movie of Bodo, even if it is unplugged, but as long as it is turned on, that picture is constantly circulating.

It is said that the Lingjiao Group invited the most outstanding technicians in the island country and finally did nothing. This unknown virus is already in the hard drive of the computer. As soon as you turn it on, the virus starts automatically, locks the system, and plays a small movie. The computer hard drive must be formatted and the system reinstalled.

As for who is dark in the Lingjiao Group, no one knows that the black hand behind the scenes has not publicly stated. As for what the Lingjiao Group lost, the outside world did not know.

The Lingjiao Group was affected by the hacking storm. With the listed companies of the Lingjiao Group and even the cooperative companies, the stocks all fell.

Because no one can guarantee that the hacker took away the information of the Lingjiao Group, and there will be any leaks in the future.

This incident has also caused many companies to pay attention to network security issues.

This is not a trivial matter. At the time, Morgan was hacked and leaked information from more than 20 million users. This kind of thing is a fatal blow to any company.

After the handling of the company, the day of Chen Mo once again fell into a calm.

Three days later, Chen Mo closed the book in his hand and let out a sigh of relief.

On this leisurely day, he has been reading books, and today he finally completed the conditions of the 600th book. A library's right to free choice.

揉揉 Some tired eyebrows, Chen Mo lying on the sofa into the technology library.

"What technology do you want this time?" When Shu Lao came out, he asked Chen Mo.

"Which page is the sensor technology? I am looking for it myself." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo did not choose software, software technology, he can let the ink girl help compile, he needs hardware technology now.

His research, after the future, must be supported by a lot of hardware.

This time the goal is laser sensor technology, he has let Zhao Min to buy a car manufacturing plant, the purpose is to prepare for the test of future driverless cars.

In the market of driverless cars, the software is quite mature, thousands of degrees, umbrella companies and Tesla, these autonomous driving software technologies are already very mature.

It is hardware that limits the popularity of autonomous driving.

The laser sensors currently on the market are too large, too expensive, and the technology is immature, which limits the popularity of autonomous driving.

Laser sensors have a wide range of functions. In the future, robots are also needed for laser sensors. Therefore, this time the laser sensor will be made, and the future development of other products will definitely have great use.

Shu Lao nodded and said: "On page 1606 - page 1789, all are sensory level sensor technology."

"it is good."

Chen Mo began to look at the dark red book and began looking for sensors.

Ultrasonic sensors, acoustic sensors, large-scale acoustic sensors, and so on, make Chen Mo dazzled. According to the classification, Chen Mo quickly found the technology needed.

"Tenglong Laser Sensor Technology"; Field: Physics, Electronics, Privilege Level: Trainee; Product Description: Maximum measuring distance 1000 meters, accuracy 5mm, fast speed, strong resistance to light and electric interference, miniaturization (diameter 10cm), production low cost.

Volume, cost, performance, and these metrics are fully consistent with his desire to find sensing technology.

"This is the case." Chen Mo pointed to the technology on the book.

"it is good."

Shu Lao nodded, his palm was big, and a book slowly formed in his hand, directly into Chen Mo’s head.

chapters.title: Chapter 72: : Enlighten Small Fishing
chapters.body:
Chapter 72: : Enlighten Small Fishing

The marching ant company started the burst buying model because the early development was too fast and many of the company's sections were blank.

With the permission of Chen Mo, Zhao Min directly used the money to fill these gaps. Finally, an investment mergers and acquisitions department was set up, and senior consultants were hired to evaluate the value of the company to be acquired.

Small car manufacturers, advertising companies, software development companies, parts production plants, sensor production companies... A company, factory, is being included in the army ant company at an extremely fast rate, almost an average of five days.

People who pay attention to the trend of marching ant companies in the market look blank. The acquisition of the marching ant company is too complicated and involves too many areas, making people unclear.

On the Internet, every time, there will be news of the company that the army ant company acquired, and many people have been numb.

Some people describe the army ant company, just like a blessed local tyrant, throwing money everywhere, it is completely wasteful, and does not understand the company's development.

It’s just that they don’t know that the marching ant company acquired these small businesses and factories, mainly for experimental research and development. The company's industrial park is still under construction, and it is necessary to provide some places for their R&D experiments and expand the company's volume.

In addition, the marching ant company has been deployed in major mega-city cities in China. Cooperate with some colleges and universities, invest in research by some technical teams, and absorb talents.

The marching ant company lacks time and talent.

These problems can be solved with money, and they are not a problem. Zhao Min’s idea is simple, using money in exchange for development time.

The company's current revenue business, only smart assistants, butterfly eye mobile phones and ants office, as well as the acquisition of advertising companies, the use of smart assistants and butterfly eye platform to earn advertising costs. In addition, it is the patent license fee for the waterproof interface.

The acquired company and factory, in addition to the transfer of some capable talents to the head office, remain the original business structure and are partially managed independently.

Even if these factories are temporarily unable to make money, at least the company will not be able to maintain the development of these factories. After more than a month of crazy expansion, the company has also entered a stable track, and the development problem has come to an end.

The company's prototype is complete and has the potential to challenge higher levels.

"Zhao Jie, are you looking for me?" Xiao Yu said in Zhao Min's office. At this time, Xiaoyu seems to be a little tired and not as spirited as entering the company.

"You inform the advertising company over there, let them use the fastest speed to come up with the second butterfly eye mobile phone promotion plan." Zhao Min said.

The second butterfly-eye phone thing, designed from Chen Mojiao, is already in production. Because the intelligent assistant in the middle interrupted once, and then interrupted because of the smearing incident.

Now the company's headquarters has been designed and completed, entering the construction phase, the progress of the project, she has been followed up.

The company's expansion has also been completed. Now the company doesn't have much to do. After this time, the time has come to release the second phone.

"Oh, good." Little fish nodded.

"And, this time, you will go to the Propaganda Department and be responsible for the preparation. This time follows me, the things I learned, have learned, and now I have to start to accumulate experience and find inadequacies in practice." Zhao Min said.

"Good." Little fish nodded.

When I first entered the company, Chen Mo let Zhao Min take her and be familiar with the company's operations and various tasks. The company’s big event, she now knows what to do. But without practice, now Zhao Min is giving her a platform for practice.

"Small fish, teach you the last point. As a management, you have to know how to use people, a lot of things, you don't have to do it yourself, just like your boyfriend calls me," said Zhao Min.

"He calls you?" Xiao Yu asked strangely.

With Zhao Min for so long, she has never seen Chen Mo let Zhao Min do something, but Zhao Min also let her girlfriend to constrain Chen Mo to do things.

"Don't understand? The top decision is the general direction. The rest is handed over to the employees below. It is his business to solve the problem. This is the ability to use people to test the staff, and you only have to make the final decision. It is your job to use his method.

If his method is wrong, you also decide to use it. This is your decision mistake. This will test the high-level vision. You are a high-level now. Don't use low-level ideas to define high-level jobs. There are many things that you don't have to do. Employing people and grasping the company's strategic direction is what the top management should do. Zhao Min said.

"There is a little understanding." Xiao Yu seems to understand.

"I have not touched a mobile phone production machine. Everyday work is to look at documents, sign documents, and mobilize personnel. The company can develop so well, know why?" Zhao Min said.

"It seems to be a bit clear. The content of this document does not meet the general direction of your heart, you will deny, let the following people come back." Xiao Yu said.

"Right, like repairing high-speed rail, said that road repairing, from the capital to the East China Sea, this is a grand strategy, and then no. Investigation of routes, budget and construction matters, ignore the above, handed over to the following people.

If the following design and construction plan meets the requirements, the design passes. Once the design route is not from the capital to the East China Sea, the above veto, let the following people rethink the method and know that it meets the above strategy. ”
