Zhao Min patiently taught Xiao Yu.

"Chen Mo is the person who is talking about big strategy. The legendary standing and speaking is not hurting. I am responsible for seeing whether this road is in line with his grand strategy. The other employees of the company are the basic construction workers below. This is called employment and management.

The rich do not care what they say, and they can make money by speaking. Just because he only needs to say the correct direction of making money, the following people can help him achieve it, just like Ma Dad. ”

"understood."

Xiao Yu heard Ma Dad, and immediately smiled like a flower, did not expect Zhao Min to be so humorous.

"Understand it, let go of your concerns, you can do it with confidence, don't be afraid to make mistakes. Don't worry because you are the girlfriend of the chairman. Your current position, even if it is wrong, the loss is not big, can give you experience. I won't blame you, he won't blame you, there is such a good platform, you have more advantages than others."

Xiaoyu has been doing this for so long, and she is also aware of some of the concerns of Xiaoyu.

The whole company knows that she is the girlfriend of the chairman, so she is easily labeled as a top-ranking tag.

This has also become an invisible burden for her.

Because she is the girlfriend of the chairman, she can't make mistakes in all the many things, and she has to do better. Once something goes wrong, the person below will definitely give her the label of the relationship.

Although I don’t say it on the bright side, I will definitely think so in private.

Therefore, Xiaoyu followed her for so long, and he will do his best to do things best, and do not want to make a mistake.

The name of the girlfriend of the chairman gave her a lot of pressure, but she did not show it when she was fishing. She was a girl who was just outside.

"it is good."

Xiaoyu nodded and was said by Zhao Min, she also suddenly became cheerful. Even Chen Mo’s girlfriend, she is her, the one-of-a-kind fisherman.

Thinking of this, Xiao Yu’s heart seems to be a lot of relaxation, and his face has regained his spirit and become more confident.

"You will inform the second generation of the butterfly eye, and the press conference will be handed over to you." Zhao Min said.

"Thank you Zhao Jie." Xiao Yu smiled and thanked Zhao Min, then turned and left the office.

chapters.title: Chapter 73: : Butterfly Eyes
chapters.body:
Chapter 73: : Butterfly Eyes

In the afternoon, the news of the upcoming second-generation butterfly eye has been updated to the official microblog and official website of the marching ant company.

As soon as the news came out, it immediately attracted attention. The first generation of butterfly eyes was too beautiful, and from the appearance, it killed all the models on the market.

That mobile phone has been selling all the time. Until now, the sales volume has reached nearly 10 million, and the army ant company has also earned a lot of money.

In terms of performance and mobile phone systems, such as the propaganda of the company, the mid-end machine, high-end performance. Coupled with the emergence of intelligent assistants, the current reputation of the marching ant company has been formed in China. Guessing the performance and shape of the butterfly eye, it is also on the dust.

In the various discussions, soon, the days of the marching ants’ conferences came quietly.

In the background, Xiao Yu's face is a little nervous.

This is the first time she is responsible for the launch of the conference. This week, she has to understand the progress of various work, rent the venue, and the arrangement of the current staff.

If it wasn't for Chen Mo to sleep next night, she would definitely lose sleep.

Today finally arrived at the beginning of the conference. This is the first time she has been responsible for a single event, and naturally she does not want to make any mistakes.

"What's wrong? How do I feel that you are more nervous than Zhao Min who is going to the stage?" Chen Mo said behind the small fishing.

"Of course I am nervous, this is the conference I am responsible for." Xiao Yu said.

"Tension is useless. Now that the press conference has started, sit still and feel at ease." Chen Mo took a small fish and sat down, quietly watching the press conference.

The press conference has already begun, and a video-filled video has opened up a lot of enthusiasm for the audience.

At the moment when Zhao Min was on the stage, everyone’s eyes were on her. Now the value of the marching ant company has exceeded 10 billion. Now Zhao Min is one of the people in the domestic business.

The marching ant company has held two press conferences so far and has directly become one of the domestic unicorn companies. Now in China, it has successfully established a foothold in the mobile phone market where the princes compete for hegemony.

"Hello everyone." Zhao Minyi stepped onto the stage, and the big screen behind it lit up: "This conference, the protagonist is this, the butterfly eye and the butterfly."

Zhao Min has no nonsense and has entered the topic.

When her words fell, the second butterfly-eye phone jumped out on the big screen.

At the moment when the beautiful pattern appeared, there was a burst of exclamation on the field. This butterfly eye pattern is similar in style to the first generation of butterfly eyes.

But the two different patterns give people a completely different feeling. Following the first generation of exquisite to the ultimate shape, almost everyone on the field took out their mobile phones and took pictures of the butterfly eyes on the big screen.

This is not like a mobile phone, it is more like a work of art.

Two mobile phone cameras, at the central pupil of the butterfly eye pattern.

This position is designed to be just right. Two cameras are embedded in it, such as the overlord, which is completely integrated and has no sense of disobedience. And that butterfly eye, with the focus of the camera, gives a strange feeling.

"Equipped with Lycra four-generation camera, 20 million front and rear double camera; 骁珑 865 chip; new marching ant system, smart marching ants; super endurance."

"The two most prominent features are the intelligent marching ant system and endurance. We will artificially embed artificial intelligence technology into the marching ant system. No need to download the smart assistant, after turning on the smart function, you only need voiceprint recognition, you can Control the entire phone with voice, no delays.

It now supports 50 mainstream languages with powerful chat capabilities. Anyone who knows how to use smart assistants knows that it has powerful chat capabilities, and you can give smart assistants a name. ”

"In addition, it has a prominent feature, superior battery life. It uses the new carbon crystal battery researched by our company, the battery capacity is 9500mA, full charge for half an hour, plus the energy of the marching ant system. Low-cost, this phone has an uninterrupted battery life of 48 hours and standby for more than fifteen days."

Oh...

The second blockbuster that Zhao Min threw out made the scene stunned. The news came too suddenly. Carbon crystal battery? 48 hours of battery life?

This endurance is four times higher than the existing mobile phone.

Many reporters on the field, in the beginning, when the army ant company released new materials, they reported the news of carbon crystal.

They still remember, but the army ant company said that the carbon crystal material technology has not yet matured, and finally slowly emerged as everyone's vision.

Unexpectedly, the marching ant company has applied carbon crystal technology to mobile phone batteries.

It all came too suddenly, just a mobile phone, which contained too much information. A new upgraded smart marching ant system, plus 48 hours of uninterrupted battery life, carbon crystal battery.

I thought that this butterfly-eye phone would be the same as the last time. At most, I just added a smart assistant technology. I didn't expect so much information.

The new material carbon crystal has been officially applied by the marching ant company. This technology matures too quickly and is faster than the rumored graphene batteries.

Now the most horrible thing about going out with a mobile phone is to see that the mobile phone has 10% of power left, as if it is losing the feeling of the whole world.

"How much is this phone? I want to sell kidney!"

"Apple is simply **** compared to the mobile ant phone."

"Huaxia Zhaobus? I feel that all mobile phone manufacturers are shaking in front of the screen."

"Apple is going to make money with a mobile phone case, like a marching ant. After the technology is completely broken, the new mobile phone is released, which is simply the conscience of the industry."

"Support for domestic..."

Watch the live broadcast of the conference and start the crazy barrage. I have never been so excited. This kind of mobile phone is a collection of black technology.

Zhao Min does not know the excitement of those people, with a confident smile: "This phone, the most advanced technology of our company. Next is the price that everyone cares most. 64g official standard 6600, Extreme Edition butterfly, 11888."

Oh...

At the press conference, the exclamation again broke out. The first generation of marching ants, still high-end mobile phones, this marching ants directly into the highest-end market.

"It’s just mad."

"Occasionally, the kidney..."

“This is the rhythm of killing the high-end market? This performance competes with other mobile phones and completely compares the other to slag.”

The huge response has sparked a wave of discussion on the Internet.

This perfect appearance, the ultimate performance, let those who originally wanted to buy Apple S, all dispelled thoughts. After the smart assistant came out, it was not compatible with Apple. It has already given Apple a big hit. Now it is not hesitant to open this market.

Soon, the product introduction is over, and the press conference enters the routine questioning session.

"You must have a lot of questions to ask me." Zhao Min looked at the reporter with a smile, then pointed to the front row: "The lady in front of the glasses."

The female reporter who was called was immediately stood up and took the microphone handed over by the staff.

"Thank you, I am a reporter from Southern Newspaper. Will your smart assistant be removed from the butterfly eye and butterfly after your company's listing? Will your carbon crystal battery technology be authorized by other mobile phone suppliers? Future carbon crystal battery Will it enter other battery areas?"

When her question was finished, everyone’s eyes were on Zhao Min’s body, looking forward to her answer.

chapters.title: Chapter 74: : Do You Really Want To Authorize? (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 74: : Do You Really Want To Authorize? (Third More)

The question of the female reporter asked the key point. If the marching ant company removes the intelligent assistant, it means that the intelligent assistant only has a butterfly eye. There is no doubt that this will take the position of the high-end mobile phone market.

Because of the full intelligent control of mobile phones, this one is only one.

During this time, many people like the software of the smart assistant. When I was bored, I chatted with Xiaodie, told jokes, and the content of the chat was not rigid. Sometimes I would find a classic cold humor.

The monthly rent of 20 yuan is simply the price of cabbage for this high-end technology. In addition to being smeared, the marching ant company is now very good at market reputation.

If this is an intelligent assistant to the army ant company, I am afraid that it will attract a lot of attacks.

Now all the reporters have turned their eyes to Zhao Min. Because Zhao Min's answer will determine the future decision-making direction of the marching ant company.

"You are three questions. These questions are very sharp and very good." Zhao Min took the question of the female reporter: "The first is the intelligent assistant problem. We will not remove the intelligent assistant for the time being, but the new version. It will not be updated for the time being."

Originally, Zhao Min intended to be a smart assistant. When they were released, they were removed. However, the influence of the intelligent assistant was too great. It was suddenly removed from the army and would only be used to black out the army ants.

Moreover, the intelligent assistants on the market can continue to collect data information for them, and constantly improve the voice interaction function of the intelligent assistants. There is also a considerable income, which is also good in the market.

"Battery technology problems, we can also authorize. We are businessmen, just for the money. When the butterfly eye just came out, I said, we are not afraid of competition. There is competition, this market has vitality. We want to be a first-class enterprise, do Is the standard."

When Zhao Min’s words fell, there was a commotion on the field.

For now, the biggest advantage of the marching ant company is the intelligent assistant and battery technology. As a result, Zhao Min has now authorized one of his own advantages, and they have to be surprised.

"This is the mentality of the strong, and this army of soldiers is destined to rise."

"Strong, this wave of my service."

"Conscience enterprises, not living in the competition, are destroyed in the competition. This is called aggressive, and it is a hundred times stronger than those who have made money for a mobile phone case."

......

Zhao Min’s words made people who watched the live broadcast, as well as those at the press conference, fall into crazy discussions. Everyone is discussing the impact of Zhao Min’s words.

Obviously, many people have been conquered by Zhao Min’s rhetoric. There has never been a company that dares to be so blatant and empowers core technologies.

"Chen Mo, do you really want to authorize?" Looking at the small fishing at the press conference, looking at Chen Mo beside him. She is now not worried about the problems with the release.

"Why not? The last smearing incident is an example. We need people and relationships. Otherwise, no one will help us when we are in trouble," Chen said.

Such a personal relationship is more important than his sole proprietorship.

Stock companies, they naturally have strong contacts and resources, do not have to worry about being blocked by others.

They are sole proprietorships. They must accumulate these resources and form a coexisting partnership. If they are tied together, they will not be easily moved.

"This is what I told her to say, this market, eating alone, certainly not, and we can not eat. We can only produce one million batteries per month, enough for their own use.

Authorized to go out, those factories, producing 10 million each month, we charge 15% to 20% of the technical patent fees, do not need to do it, do not consume materials, the money is also earned than their own production. ”

The little fishing point nodded and stared at Chen Mo.

"This is just the beginning. There is more cooperation in the future. This is a time of mutual benefit. The strength of a family is limited, and these technologies are not so important." Chen Mo said. Now these technologies are not so important to him, so there is no need to seduce people.

After half an hour, Zhao Min answered the various questions of the reporter and the conference ended. The Internet is already in full swing.

The last news of the marching ant company about the discovery of carbon crystal materials was dug up.

Until now they discovered that the carbon crystal technology of the marching ant company has already been applied. Only last time, in order to cover up the news, the marching ant company was diluted.

A new material, from discovery to entry, took so little time, and many materials experts have begun to be interested in carbon crystals.

Even if it has a single role, it is cheap and fast to replace other battery materials in a short time.

In addition to carbon crystal batteries, the news of the butterfly eye mobile phone has also become the object of discussion. Under the official Weibo of the marching ants, a group of complaints were again gathered.

"Shocked, my wife has been coquettish with me..."

"Shocked, my wife said that the son in the belly wants to play with the butterfly eye, in order to turn it into a butterfly and be born..."

"Shocked, my daughter found a rich boyfriend!"

"History is always amazingly similar! Hahahaha..."

There are various ridicules in the official Weibo, but this time there is not much smearing on the Internet. More is appreciated, because the marching ants are open-minded.

The official pre-sales page has been opened in both the official website and the Black Cat Mall. In just three hours, the pre-sales have exceeded 300,000.

This number has shocked many media. Many people even bluntly said that the army ant company will replace Apple and become the most popular mobile phone.

Regardless of performance or appearance, the butterfly eye of the marching ant inherits the unique characteristics of the Apple Steve Jobs era.

Not only domestic and foreign mainstream media, but also the butterfly eye, but the content is not friendly.

"A mobile phone from the future? 》——European Times

"The next Chinese apple?" 》——San Francisco Daily

"A terrible Chinese cottage - marching ants" - BBC

"The marching ants should develop intelligent source code. 》——CNN

......

This marching ant company, once following the intelligent assistant, once again entered the world's sight. Because the butterfly eye and the butterfly are too beautiful, it is more like a mobile phone from the future.

The video of the Butterfly Eye conference was quickly transmitted to famous social networking sites abroad. In just one hour, it attracted hundreds of thousands of clicks, and the comments were even more envious and hateful.

"I can't believe this is the product of Huaxia people, the technology of the cottage?"

"When it goes on the market, I want to travel to China, buy this phone, God, God's masterpiece."

"This kind of goods, looking beautiful, useless, you are not afraid to use one day to break down? The quality of Chinese people, do not dare to use."

"Ignorant Westerners, although I am also a Westerner, at least I have not been poisoned by those capital media, and China is better than you think."

......

Because the appearance of the marching ants was too perfect to be noticed, many people were finally conquered by the powerful performance in the introduction. The price is similar to that of Apple, but the performance is far behind Apple.

The outside is very lively, and the marching ant company is also very lively.

Zhao Min said that after the battery technology can be authorized, the next day, many battery manufacturers have come to the company to obtain technical authorization for battery production. They must hurry, and the 10,000 company ants company regrets, then they are not playing.

Production of mobile phones, licensing technology, and marching ants, once again caught in a busy schedule. However, everyone in the company has a happy face.

The company's business is good, meaning that their year-end bonuses will be more. The chairman never gives them bonuses, as long as they try to get the job done, just like the last two times.

The company was busy all the time, and Chen Mo was not idle.

During this period of time, the laser sensor has already been made, and the accuracy and performance have been tested. It is completely in line with the introduction. The next step is that the sensor is out of the laboratory for practical application.

Just as Chen Mo thought about how to use the laser sensor, Xiao Yu went into his office to find him.

"Chen Mo, the person in charge of the four major mobile phone companies, will come over tomorrow, and Zhao asked if you want to go and get to know each other."

"Yes." Chen Mo thought about it.

chapters.title: Chapter 75: : By The Way, Take Me To See The Ring!
chapters.body:
Chapter 75: : By The Way, Take Me To See The Ring!

The next morning, Chen Mo was put on a suit by a small fisherman and went to the company. Today, the heads of the four major mobile phone giants came over, and Chen Mo was surprised.

It stands to reason that the authorization of a battery technology should not be the head of the Big Four.

"I didn't expect you to wear a suit very handsome." Just seeing Chen Mo and Xiao Yu appear in the company, Zhao Min said.

Usually Chen Mo appears in the company, is a typical science and technology men's casual clothing, rarely see Chen Mo wearing formal clothing, did not expect Chen Mo to wear it now, looks very calm and confident.

"I also think I am handsome." Chen Mozhen nodded.

"I am talking about clothes." Zhao Min smiled.

"My clothes are all picked up by me. It must be good-looking. When I put on this body, Xiaoyu saw his eyes straight."

When Chen Mo’s words came out, the small fishing face sitting next to him floated red and wrinkled his nose toward him.

Zhao Min directly gave the two men a blank eye.

"But this tie is so uncomfortable on the neck, or the usual clothes are comfortable to wear." Chen Mosong said with a loose tie.

“The first time I met someone, it’s better to wear a formal one.” Xiao Yu said. If it wasn't for her to let him wear, I am afraid that Chen Mo is still wearing casual clothes as usual.

"Yu total nine points, it should be faster." Zhao Min looked at the time and said.

When his words fell, Yu Chengnan walked in under the leadership of the staff.

"Long time no see, Chen Dong, Zhao Zong." After seeing the two men, Yu Chengnan smiled and shook hands with the two.

"Just said that you are coming, please." Zhao Min led a few people and walked toward the company's reception room.

"This time, the first thing about carbon-based batteries, by the way, can the intelligent assistant be authorized?" Yu Chengnan just sat down in the reception room and opened directly.

"Intelligent assistants are already in the software store. Isn't this authorized?" Chen Mo laughed.

"That is a bilingual version. I am talking about a multilingual version. After all, we have a lot of business in Europe. There are many businesses around the world." Yu Chengnan came to the door.

"This is really a bit of a hassle," Chen Mo said.

"Chen Dong, what conditions are needed, even though it is said. We last signed a memorandum of strategic partners, and now it is also a cooperative relationship." Yu Chengnan said.

"It is not impossible to license multi-language intelligent assistants to you. In this case, you can provide your company's smart chips to our company. I authorize multilingual intelligent assistants for you."

Now Hua Wei's NPu, using 10nm ultra-fine technology, is the top artificial smart phone chip, marching ant system and intelligent assistant, equipped on the smart chip, performance will be an upgrade.

However, Huawei's smart chip has not been sold, just like Apple's Apple chip.

Chen Mo's words made Yu Chengnan fall into meditation. Both technologies are unique technologies of the two companies. Once the smart chip is given to the army ant company, it means that the uniqueness of the mobile phone is not, and it cannot compete with the marching ant company.

"Is this the condition of Chen Dong? I need to go back and discuss with the board of directors. After all, this piece, I don't count." Yu Chengnan said.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Then we officially signed the last strategic cooperation agreement this time?" Yu Chengnan smiled.

"No problem." Chen Mo nodded.

......

After the strategic cooperation agreement was signed and Chen Chengnan was sent away, Chen Mocai returned to his laboratory. It was not long before Chen Mo was once again called by Xiao Yu.

Because the Thunder of the rice company has arrived. The Thunder brings, in addition to battery technology, it is also a smart assistant.

However, Chen Mo did not agree for the time being. After all, the smart assistant is now the card of their company. Unless there is something that makes Chen Moxin move, it is impossible to authorize the multilingual intelligent assistant in a short time.

Together with the heads of Opal and Weiwo, Chen Mo is in the middle of the day.

In the afternoon, Zhao Min announced that he had reached a strategic cooperation with four mobile phone giants.

This news caused quite a small response, which means that the marching ant company has been recognized by four mobile phone giants.

A new mobile phone company in China has already entered the market and the future mobile phone market will be more interesting. However, the marching ant company is the top-level high-end market. The main competitors are Apple, Huawei and Samsung, which have little impact on other mobile phone companies.

Samsung’s domestic share is almost out of the game, so the main competitors are Huawei and Apple.

On the way back, Chen Mo leaned on the chair and turned to look at the scenery outside the window. Today, he also realized that entertainment is more tiring than his research in the laboratory.

"Is there anything wrong with it?" Xiao Yu was aware of Chen Mo's strangeness.

"No, just feel that today's entertainment is a little tired." Chen Mo said.

"The rest, you study every day, don't have to be so tight, now the company is stable, you don't have to be busy every day," said Xiao Yu, who is sitting next to him.

"Would you like to go out with me tonight to distract yourself?" Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and laughed.

Seeing Chen Mo's appearance, Xiao Yu did not refuse, nodded slightly.

In the evening, Chen Mo took a small fishing and let Wang Hai send them to the trade plaza. It was the place where the two first dated for shopping.

“There is a goldsmith shop here, let’s see it.” Just entering the mall, Chen Mo saw the gold jewelry store not far away.

Seeing the little fisherman's hand and the neck empty, Chen Mo did not wait for Xiao Yu to refuse, and took her hand and walked over. Every time she buys a small fish, she will find various excuses to refuse. Chen Mo also knows that Xiao Yu just doesn't want to spend his own money.

It seems that he has been in love for so long. He has never sent a flower to Xiaoyu. Instead, Xiaoyu takes care of his daily life. This boyfriend seems to be a little incompetent.

"What are you doing with these things?"

After Chen Moqiang pulled it to the jewelry store, Xiao Yu said helplessly: "I don't have to wear these things."

"That won't work, Zhao Min said that I abused you, be my girlfriend, don't give it to you, and give me a cow."

"Do you have Zhao Jie said? Who will make you a cow?" Xiao Yuchao Chen Mo wrinkled his nose.

"Hello, what do you need?"

After Chen Mogang pushed the reluctant Xiaoyu into the jewelry store, a female clerk asked and smiled at the two.

"Necklace," Chen Mo said.

"Okay, the necklace is here." The female clerk took both of them to a glass counter.

"Choose a favorite, I will give it to you."

"You choose me for help." Xiaoyu whispered.

"That's good, this one is taken out."

Chen Mo pointed to a jade Buddha pendant necklace that was beautifully worn on the model.

"Sir, you have a vision. This necklace is the most delicate necklace we work here. It is unique. Its name is the heart of Buddha. This Maitreya Buddha pendant is jade. Please create the famous jade carving master. The chain is white gold. The meaning is not irritating, and the smile is always open, which is very suitable for her."

"I helped her to wear it." Chen Mo took over the clerk and carefully handed over the necklace to help the small fish.

"Sir, your girlfriend is so beautiful, this necklace is very suitable for her, her temperament, with this necklace, is much better than other types of necklaces." The clerk looked at Xiaoyu, smiled.

Chen Mo also turned Xiao Yu to look carefully. It is really beautiful, the temperament of the small fisherman is gentle and quiet, with this pendant, but the temperament is set off.

It was discovered that Chen Mo’s eyes were straight, and Xiao Yu’s face was red and full of happiness.

“How much?” Chen Mo asked.

"188,000, we have activities, and we have a 5% discount."

“So expensive?”

Still waiting for Chen Mo to speak, Xiao Yu's face was surprised, and hurriedly reached for his neck and wanted to take off the necklace.

"You don't have to pick it up." Chen Mo grabbed Xiao Yu's hand and handed the bank card to the clerk: "Take me to see the ring."

Chen Mo grabbed his hand, and he forgot to struggle. He stared at Chen Mo, and his brain didn’t turn around. After the reaction, his face immediately turned red to the neck.

chapters.title: Chapter 76: :Miss?
chapters.body:
Chapter 76: :Miss?

Not only the fisherman's horror, but even the female clerk of the jewelry store, looked at Chen Mo with horror. After the reaction, the female clerk looked at Xiao Yu with envy.

As a clerk in a jewelry store, she has seen many rich people. The bank card that Chen Mo gave her is a special CCB black gold card. Those who have such a card are not rich and expensive.

So clearly proposed by a rich second generation, this is something she can only dream of.

"Is there a problem?" Chen Mo looked at the female clerk in a daze.

"No problem, you come with me."

The female clerk hurriedly left the counter and took the two to the counter of the ring. There are big orders this time, and the commission is absolutely quite a lot. The salary of this month has to be doubled, and the female clerk is thinking excitedly.

Xiao Yu’s head was a bit awkward and was reacted by Chen Mo to the counter.

"Chen Mo, do you really want to buy this?" Xiao Yu is a little nervous.

She hasn't given herself to Chen Mo until now, but Chen Mo suddenly bought a ring. This seems too fast.

"Otherwise?" Chen Mo smiled and looked at the female clerk: "Let's take a look at the ring."

"Don't buy, don't buy it first." Xiao Yu hurriedly stopped Chen Mo.

It all came a bit suddenly, her brain circuit has not been straightened out. Tonight, Chen Mo came out to distract her. She did not expect this to happen.

"What's wrong?" Chen Mo asked.

Xiaoyu didn't know what to say. I should have been happy with this kind of thing, but all of this came too suddenly.

"Can you buy it next time? At least you should give someone a surprise?" The little fisherman screamed for a while, only to come up with these words.

Chen Mo laughed when he heard that Xiao Yu was a little embarrassed.

"Not a surprise now?"

"Where are you surprised by this?" Xiao Yu laughed and laughed.

From the two people's love, Chen Molian did not send a single to her, and now suddenly want to send a ring, she did not have a snack.

"Miss, this ring is very suitable for you to wear, do you want to try? Platinum, this ring, each style is unique. Your boyfriend is so petting you, you are really happy."

The female clerk is anxious for Xiao Yu, and I can't wait to replace the small fishing position. Why is she not so lucky, met a rich second generation who is so petting?

She had to persuade the little fisherman, and if the little fish promised to buy it, her commission would be more.

"Don't buy it first"

"For the time being, don't check out first." Chen Mo said.

"it is good."

The female clerk enviously looked at Xiao Yu with a hateful look and changed to her. She could not wait to agree immediately, but she did not have this life.

From the jewelry store, Xiao Yu took Chen Mo's hand, his head was still a little awkward, suddenly thought of something, his face became ruddy, and Chen Mo's arm was tighter.

“Where are you going next?” Chen Mo asked.

"You said."

"Then go buy clothes, you are helping me buy clothes, this time I will give you a choice."

"Good." Xiaoyu did not resist this time.

One night, Chen Mo was shopping with Xiao Yu. Is there such an opportunity, Xiao Yu also put aside his thoughts, his face always with a sweet smile.

Tonight, let her regain the feeling of when she had just dated Chen Mo. She also knows that even if life changes, the person around him still likes her the same, all this is enough.

"The ring really doesn't have to be bought?" Chen Mo said on the way back.

"What kind of thing do you ask me?"

Xiao Yu blushes, does she still let Chen Mo not buy? Then she is digging for herself. But now she bought it, she is still not ready, and her mood is very complicated.

After they bought the things, they returned to the car and walked by the sea, strolling like a little couple.

Until the night, the two talents left.

On the way back, Xiaoyu had fallen asleep on Chen Mo’s shoulder. Looking at Xiao Yu’s sleep, Chen Mo was slightly distressed.

During this time, Xiaoyu’s work is also quite a lot, and certainly very tired. This time, I am willing to accompany him out. After spending a night, I was a little excited, I didn't feel it. Now I have to go back and I am trapped on his shoulder.

Wang Hai seems to know that Xiaoyu is asleep, and he is very stable. He does not feel bumpy at all.

In Chen Mo's impression, Wang Hai, the driver and bodyguard, rarely spoke and never talked on his own initiative. Only when Chen Mo asked him, would he speak.

"Chairman, there are cars to follow us." When Chen Mo was thinking about Wang Hai, Wang Hai glanced at the rearview mirror and said faintly.

"Tracking?" Chen Mo brows.

"Yes, two cars, coming back from the commercial square, followed the road." Wang Hai said.

Chen Mo looked back at the car behind, and saw two vans, followed closely behind the car.

Chen Mo took out his mobile phone and entered the words of the person who followed him in the communication interface with the ink girl. When Wang Hai is present, he is not convenient to communicate with the ink girl, otherwise it is easy to expose.

Soon, the ink girl sent the information to the phone.

"A professional porcelain gang, two cars, eight people."

Seeing this message, Chen Mo sighed. It would be a bit of a hassle if you specifically target him. After all, his identity is different now. If someone hits his idea, it is very dangerous. But this time it was a wake-up call for him.

"Let them open," Chen Mo said.

"Good." Wang Hai slowly accelerated, overtaking a few times, and directly diverted.

"Wang Hai, what did you do in the army before?" After knocking off the vehicle behind, Chen Mo focused on Wang Hai. Wang Hai followed him for so long, rarely talked, and he did not know much about Wang Hai.

"Ordinary soldiers." Wang Hai said.

This answer, Chen Mo does not believe, Wang Hai's wrist also has gunshot wounds and some knife wounds, these scars, is not an ordinary soldier should have. However, Wang Hai does not say that he is not good to continue to ask, there are ink women, he can go back and check.

He didn't care about Wang Hai's identity before, but now he is a little interested.

Soon, Wang Hai sent the two people back to the villa, the car stopped, and Chen Mo was awakened to Xiao Yu.

"I will go to the bath first." After returning to the villa, Xiao Yu put a good thing and ran into the room with a red face.

Looking at Xiao Yue's cheerful appearance, Chen Mo smiled and shook his head, and turned on the TV and looked up. After about twenty minutes, there was movement in the room.

Xiao Yu took a hair dryer and walked out and handed him directly: "Help me blow my hair."

"Good." Chen Mo said after taking the hair dryer.

Tonight's small fishing seems to be a bit cautious. After Chen Mo took the hair dryer, Xiao Yu's body was tight, motionless, and he often helped him to blow his hair. It was totally different.

"Small fish, is it not uncomfortable?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, just tangled up one thing." Xiao Yu lowered his head and let Chen Mo help her blow her hair. Two hands clasped together with the nightdress, seemingly making decisions, and my heart is very contradictory.

"What are you entangled? I am entangled that I have not bought a ring?"

"No, it's not this thing. Forget it, don't worry, let's talk later." Xiaoyu whispered: "Whoever makes you not take the initiative, stupid, deserve to be guilty."

"What the **** is it?" Chen Mo did not know why he did not think about it in other ways.

"Good thing, I wanted to give you a present, but I have changed my mind now." Xiao Yu said contemptuously.

"Don't change, what gift?"

"tell you later."

Xiao Yu smiled and stood up from the sofa and swayed back to the bedroom. Looking at the back of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo thought about it, still did not know what he missed.

Early the next morning, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came to the company and went directly to the office. I was followed by a porcelain gang last night, but Wang Hai’s keen observation made him a little curious about Wang Hai’s identity.

"Ink girl." Chen Mo said in front of the computer.

"Mer brother, the ink girl is coming."

"Help me check the information of Wang Hai."

chapters.title: Chapter 77: :Small Toy?
chapters.body:
Chapter 77: :Small Toy?

"Wang Hai, male, age 31..."

Not long after, on the screen of the computer, Wang Hai’s information jumped out. Looking at Wang Hai's information, Chen Mo's eyes were full of surprises.

Blue Sword special team member, code: Haiwang.

He did not expect that Wang Hai, who was not optimistic and reticent, still had this identity.

How can such people appear in their company as security part-time bodyguards? This can no longer be described by ordinary identity. People of this status, even if they retire, definitely go to work in state organs.

But now in his company, Chen Mo has to doubt that there are special reasons for this.

With curiosity, Chen Mo continued to read.

Soon, Chen Mo locked his eyes on the last item. Cobra action, success, retired due to serious injuries.

Chen Mo did not continue to delve into the role of the Cobra action, but to let the ink girl turn off the page of these materials.

However, he also had a preliminary understanding of Wang Hai, at least know that Wang Hai is not an ordinary soldier. What is the reason for him not to work in the state organs, he is not too entangled.

Some things go deeper, knowing too much, is not good for him.

"Zhao Min, come up." Chen Mo picked up the phone and said.

"Ok."

Not long after hanging up the phone, Zhao Min went into Chen Mo's office.

"This is the technical information of the small laser sensor that I have compiled in the past two months. You take it for testing and apply for a patent." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Zhao Min took over the technology, because before she knew that Chen Mo was studying sensors, she was already accustomed to the fact that Chen Mo's research and development cycle was short. The world of genius, she really does not understand.

"The next time, I will take the time to read the book and study a small toy by the way."

"What small toys to study?"

"Fun little toys, you will know when you get there." Chen Mo laughed.

"Whoever, who makes you the boss of the company."

"In a short period of time, there will not be too many products, you are responsible for the company to grow and stabilize during this time, and then prepare for the unmanned car." Chen Mo said.

“Into the unmanned car market?” Zhao Min said: “This market is a bit risky, and Leshi is a living example.”

“We are only testing laser sensors and software technology. After successful cooperation with other car companies, we provide software technology and platforms, and others have nothing to do with us.”

"Okay." Zhao Min nodded and tried to stop.

"Is there something?"

"I am going to set up a holding company and form a group company in the future." Zhao Min hesitated.

"Talk about your thoughts."

Chen Mo was a little surprised why Zhao Min raised this question.

"It is for the future development of the company." Zhao Min said: "The company has too many businesses and different directions. In the future, the mobile phone business and other businesses must be separated, become independent companies, responsible for the market, the head office is responsible for product development and major The business is more convenient to manage, the companies are independent, the direction is specific, and it is easier to develop."

"Well, yes, you can do it." Chen Mo thought and said: "You take 3% of the shares."

"Then I am disrespectful." Zhao Min smiled.

According to the value of the current army ant company, 3% of the shares, enough for her to enter the domestic rich list, in the future this is a potential company.

"This is what you deserve. The specific things will be handed over to you. After you have confirmed it, you can show me the signature." Chen Mo said.

"Now don't worry, just an idea, to make a preparation for the future." and Chen Mo chat for a while, Zhao Mincai took the information to leave Chen Mo's office.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mocai returned to his seat and picked up the book at hand.

There are still more than two months, the school's graduation season.

During this time, he is not prepared to toss other product research, look at the book, and strive to read the 1000 books required by the Science and Technology Library before graduation, and enter the next level of authority.

In the technology library, the technology in the apprenticeship stage is not very attractive to him. The artificial intelligence that comes with the next privilege in the Chinese character programming language code is much larger than all the technologies he got.

He now wants to see what the next level of technology is.

Before again, there are 4 opportunities to freely choose technology. He is ready to use it all on the little toys he will do next. The company already has enough income to maintain its growth and development, and now he no longer has to go out for money.

The other side of the ocean.

Cook looked at the sales statistics sent by the countries, and his face turned black.

Mobile phone sales in Greater China fell by 9%, which is only a quarter. The second butterfly eye has not yet been officially listed, just the pre-sale phase.

This butterfly eye for them, if it is really listed, I am afraid they will be more troublesome.

In addition to the impact of China Micro, now facing the marching ant company, this sudden black horse impact.

Marching ant system, intelligent assistant, new material battery. Every performance exceeds that of Apple's mobile phone. After the mobile phone is launched, I am afraid that Apple's new machine, Greater China, will be blocked in the warehouse.

This ant, from the beginning, stared at the apple.

After coming out of the marching ant company, three conferences were held, and each time they were released, they had to bite them. If this continues, I am afraid that this apple will be bitten halfway in the near future.

The mobile phone business is the most profitable business among their many businesses, and has now suffered heavy losses in Greater China. If the intelligent assistants and marching ants are internationalized, they will be finished.

Since the advent of the marching ant company, Apple’s stock has fallen and fell again and again.

The marching ant company’s press conference did not last two days, and the stock price that had just stabilized evaporated another $8 billion. Now the pressure on the company's board of directors, if you can't stop the trend of falling, then he is a little troublesome.

Cook calmed his face and kept thinking about the method.

The only way now is to break the heart problem of the marching ant phone. Otherwise, Apple will definitely be squeezed out by two of China's exclusive beasts.

After thinking about it, Cook called the Qualcomm president Aberley.

"Mr. Cook, what emergency is calling me? I figured out the patent fee for us?" The phone just turned on, and there was a playful voice on the phone.

Now that Apple and Qualcomm have gone to court, when they take the initiative to call, Aberley will not give Cook a good look.

"You interrupted the cooperation with the marching ant company, we paid you a patent fee, double." Cook's face was extremely bad.

But at this time, if you want to limit the marching ant company, you can only do so.

At least delay the time to market for mobile ant mobile phones. After their mobile phone Apple S2 is safely listed, the loss will not be so big.

"I am like a fool? We are not stupid enough to be an unreliable company, but we abandon an honest Chinese partner, and we have to pay them liquidated damages." Aberley's voice was mocking.

"What conditions do you want to interrupt their chip supply?" Cook has already got rid of it. If the marching ants go on smoothly, their situation is a bit troublesome.

"We will default and our reputation will be damaged. It will be impossible to interrupt. Moreover, the money earned from them seems to be more than your patent fees. We are not fools, you are sitting on the toilet and eating apples. , dream."

Upon hearing the blind sound from the mobile phone, Cook turned from black to red, then turned green, and finally took a deep breath and took the clothes out of the office.

“Book a flight to Huaxia Binhai.” Just out of the office, Cook told the secretary next door.

chapters.title: Chapter 78: : Cook Arrives
chapters.body:
Chapter 78: : Cook Arrives

"Liu Mingliang, you will come back soon. There will be a popular star to follow tomorrow. In the past two days, his actions are a bit abnormal. This is big news."

"Now I am picking up my girlfriend in Binhai City and playing with her for two days. My wife is more important, otherwise I will become single and silky. Buddy, you should help first, and you will accompany your girlfriend in the future? I will repay you later. ”

"Rely, your kid is a dog, remember to leave some energy."

"Let's say, hehe."

Liu Mingliang hangs up the phone and plays with the camera hanging on his chest, constantly looking for photos at the airport.

As a photography enthusiast, he wants to take art photos. However, the fate of his life, let him become a paparazzi with the star, or even have no food.

This time my girlfriend came to Binhai City and just took a vacation for two days.

Waiting in the airport hall, Liu Mingliang looked inside from time to time. Looking at the time, Liu Mingliang shook his head and smiled. I haven't seen any of her shadows yet. It is estimated that the plane is late.

Just when Liu Mingliang was in a hurry, a figure made him shine.

Cook?

As long as the people who follow the news, this face is no stranger to Apple's Ceo Cook.

Cook appeared in the coastal city? This thought made his brow wrinkle.

Suddenly remembered something, Liu Mingliang hurriedly lifted the camera and made a mad shot towards Cook.

There are not too many science and technology events and forums in Binhai. At this time, Cook came to Binhai City quietly. The only possibility was for the marching ant company.

The marching ant company is a domestic supernova company recently, and a few days ago, the second generation of the butterfly eye was released. This node Cook appeared in Binhai City. Does Apple want to cooperate with the marching ant company?

Knowing that Cook and the secretary walked out of the airport lobby, Liu Mingcai stopped to press the hand on the shutter.

Take a closer look at the people on the photo, and check the photo of the thousand degrees with your mobile phone. Make sure that Cook is no doubt before dialing a phone call.

"Tiger, there is a news, you help out."

"You are not going to pick up your girlfriend? Is there any news? Do you want to send photos to abuse the dog?" There was an angry voice on the phone.

"No, it is estimated that my girlfriend's plane is late. Can you guess who I saw at the airport?"

"Who? Your mother?"

"Roll, Cook, Apple's Ceo Cook." Liu Mingliang said: "It seems that it is quietly coming, it should come to Binhai City to find a military ant company."

"Cook? No, are you sure you didn't lie to me?"

"OK, the photo is in my camera, I am sending it to you now. This is big news, I am worthy of you." Liu Mingliang said nothing, took out the tablet and card reader from the backpack.

After sending all the photos to the tiger, Liu Mingliang was relieved.

On the evening of the same day, Cook’s news of coming to Binhai City was gone.

Along with his message, Cook and the secretary appeared in the photo of the Marina Airport. This news immediately attracted the attention of many media.

Binhai is not a first-tier megacity like Donghai City, and there are not many forums and events. Moreover, the coastal city does not have Apple's R&D base and the company's office. This time has come and it has to be reminiscent.

"Shock! Apple thinks it? 》——Squirrel headline.

"Apple stocks have fallen, come and ask for it?" 》——News eye.

"What happened to Cook, who came quietly?" 》——Global News

......

The news was uploaded on the Internet and immediately attracted people to watch. Many people are talking about the purpose of Cook's visit. All the final conclusions point to the marching ant company.

At this time, the only explanation for visiting Binhai is the marching ant company.

"Apple stocks have fallen and fell, Cook has to come, or Apple's share in Greater China is over."

"Now Apple's share in the domestic market is not much. Before the Chinese micro-clip, the latter suddenly ran out of a marching ant, and it is likely to become the next Samsung."

"The apple tax incident made people recognize the greedy face of Apple. Although it is compromised now, the broken glass has been cracked and many people have already disliked Apple."

"Unfortunately, the butterfly eye was released, just in front of Apple, he knew that things were big."

......

A bunch of netizens began to comment on this matter. Various statements have put this news on the headlines.

There are not many times when Cook came to China. This time, it didn’t come out loud, and people always felt that there was big news inside. Some reporters from nearby cities saw the news and drove to Binhai City overnight.

Such good news, live reports, maybe there are unexpected gains.

"What happened? Why is this?"

In the hotel, Cook, after seeing the news, his face was black like a pot of gray.

Originally, I came to Binhai City this time and I don’t know many people. As a result, it was not long after I got off the plane and returned to the hotel. It was all about the news that he came to Binhai.

"We were photographed by reporters at the airport," the secretary said.

"Damn." Cook, who has always had a good temper, is also a little impatient at this moment.

Things are still fermenting. The Ceo, a big company like Apple, appears everywhere. It is a big news. This time, sneaking into the coastal city naturally attracts many people's curiosity.

What is this secret transaction with the marching ants? Confrontation or cooperation?

With this curiosity, many people began to pay attention to this matter. Because in the past, this kind of thing is unique.

Early the next morning, the door of the marching ant company office building was guarded by many reporters.

They don't know Cook's hotel address, but the marching ant company is undoubtedly the place where he is most likely to appear.

"This is interesting."

Chen Mo’s car just arrived at the company’s door and saw various reporters.

Last night, he also watched the news of Cook's coming to Binhai City. With some brains, he knew that Cook would definitely come to them. Unexpectedly, in the early morning, the company guarded so many reporters at the door.

"Apple's Ceo, don't you really want to come?" Xiao Yu, sitting next to Chen Mo, was a little surprised.

"Who knows? Anyway, I don't care." Chen Mo laughed.

After Chen Mo’s car appeared, it attracted the attention of many reporters. But because they can't see the people inside the car, they can only wait.

The new security of the marching ant company has regulations, and the outside vehicles want to enter the company and must be inspected. So they don't worry that Cook will sneak in.

After confirming his identity, Chen Mo’s car entered the company smoothly.

Not long after they entered the company, an ordinary Audi car stopped just a short distance from the roadside.

Cook looked through the window and looked at the office building in front of him. His face could not see the likes and dislikes, but his mood was not so good.

It's hard to imagine that even a company that was rented at the company's headquarters actually let him feel the threat from his bones, and he also ran for himself.

It’s just a bit of a headache now, so go in and let him have a snack.

At present, the volume of the two companies is not in a grade. This time, it is simply a self-depreciation. Looking at the reporter with a long gun and a short gun on the side of the road, Cook's face is even more ugly.

"Go back to the hotel," Cook said faintly.

Along the way, Cook’s mood was not very good. During this time, the stock fell again and again. Just after he arrived in Binhai last night, he received a call from the company. After the stock market opened, the stock price fell another 0.9%.

For their company's size, 0.9% is billions of dollars.

"About the chairman of the marching ant company, come to the hotel to meet." Upon returning to the hotel, Cook frowned and thought about it.

chapters.title: Chapter 79: : Shopping Malls Like Battlefields
chapters.body:
Chapter 79: : Shopping Malls Like Battlefields

"What technology is this time?"

In the huge space of the science and technology library, Shu Lao stood in front of Chen Mo. Now that I have seen the 743th, this is Chen Mo’s effort after two months of taking the laser sensor.

I saw more than 140 books in two months. This speed is much slower than before. But he doesn't care, and there are 257 books in the end to complete the first phase.

After the laser sensor came out, Chen Mo was planning the technology to be acquired this time. It’s only today that I decided to get it.

"The design of the robot, the humanoid robot, the current technology can do it. Shu Lao, you will turn out all the parts of the appearance, let me see." Chen Mo said.

"can."

Shu Lao’s hand waved, and the books on the cover of various humanoid robots filled the space in the central part of the technology library.

Chen Mo's scalp is numb, and it is all humanoid robots. The humanoid robots that are as big as Transformers are not in the minority. It is only used for viewing or what role it has. Chen Mo does not know.

"The size is normal human size." Chen Mo said with a hard scalp.

"Yes." Shu old waved again, all the other robots were gone, but there were other books on robot design.

There are many books in it, Chen Mo does not care, this is not important.

He knows that even if he develops his life unscrupulously, it is impossible to get all the technology in it.

Chen Mo looked for it in the pile of books, and finally chose a robot that looked relatively good in appearance and made it less difficult to manufacture.

He is now a trainee level, got the design, and has no software. However, Chen Mo does not care, the software can be written, or let the ink girl control. His lab needs an assistant to help.

Xiao Yu does not understand technology, and he is not allowed to stay with him every day. Others, Chen Mo is not at ease, after all, there are too many secrets, the existence of artificial intelligence can not be exposed for a while, so he decided to choose a robot assistant.

Just got the robot's design picture from the technology library, Zhao Min entered his office.

"Apple's people contact, Cook wants to ask you to talk about cooperation."

Chen Mo was immersed in meditation. After a while, he shook his head. "I said that it is not convenient for me to get out. I can't leave the company for a while. I want to talk about cooperation. Come over to the company and talk to me. Please come to him and talk. The order of the guests and the guests is different. It seems that we ask them to cooperate. ""

Zhao Min nodded and agreed with Chen Mo. She just noticed that if Chen Mo chooses the past, she will also remind him that Chen Mo has said so now that he has a bottom in his heart.

"I am also wondering why he didn't come to talk to us. It is reasonable to say that they come over and want to cooperate, and they should take the initiative to visit." Zhao Min said.

"Who said that they came to talk about cooperation with us? Did he not talk about cooperation with us?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min.

Chen Mo’s words made Zhao Min suddenly realize that he was caught in the trap of thinking inertia.

She knew that Cook was visiting Binhai and was also working with them. But just a phone call, they didn't see real people, there are still many articles to do.

"The thing that we cooperate with is what the media said. He did not say anything about the city of Binhai. The outside world said that he came to our company, and we also confirmed that they want to cooperate.

But he did not step into our company's door, it is not a visit to our company. If we rush to see them, the article inside is big, and we can't do it. Chen Mo said.

If they go to see Cook, the meaning becomes different. They know that Apple invited them to the past, but outsiders and the media did not know.

At that time, the media said that they took the initiative to seek cooperation with Apple, and then said that it is hard to listen to, that is, they licked the apple, there is no point, the word of mouth accumulated by the marching ants, they are all over, and they are arguing.

Once this kind of thing happened, in the eyes of the unsuspecting people, it was not Cook who talked with them about cooperation, but the marching ant company saw Cook come over and took the initiative to post it.

Internet rumors of violence, the marching ant company tried more than once.

He didn't know what Cook thought, but he had to be cautious. Shopping malls such as the battlefield, a small decision-making mistakes, are likely to be overwhelmed.

"In fact, there may be a possible reason. There are too many reporters here. He came here and didn't want the media to know, so he came over quietly. It was just unfortunate that the news leaked." Chen Mo laughed.

"CEO, the world's number one company, Ceo personally came to see us, it is usually impossible. Maybe because our butterfly eye is listed, the smart assistant does not support the ioS end, Apple's stock price has fallen and then fell, and he is in a hurry. So Come down from the price, you have to know who he saw when he came to China a few times ago."

Cook has entered and exited *** several times, and he met with the Deputy Prime Minister or Minister of Industry and Information, as well as Chairman of Mobile. Now, as long as he does not meet Chen Mo, the two sides will not be in contact.

If Cook really enters the marching ant company under the lens of the media, it is undoubtedly a self-depreciation. Therefore, Chen Mo will be invited to talk in the past and take the initiative in his own hands.

In case the cooperation between the two parties is not successful, he will visit other cities or visit the mobile phone shop.

Once this happens, Apple takes the initiative. When they cooperated with the marching ant company unsuccessfully, they became the army ant company to take the initiative to paste the door to seek cooperation, and finally refused by Apple.

When the cyber violence came to an end, the trouble was that they could get back all the time, no matter whether the two sides cooperated or not.

"It seems that my worry is superfluous." Zhao Min said.

In principle, she would not agree with Chen Mo to see Cook. From Chen Mo said that Cook did not announce his intention to come to Binhai, she already knew that Chen Mo understood the pros and cons.

"Reject their invitations, they visit, we welcome, it doesn't matter if we don't come. We haven't gotten a bad call to each other, we have to talk to them about the cooperation."

Chen Mo is not good or bad about Apple's brand. After all, products are indeed better than others.

However, he did not like Apple's founder Steve Jobs.

This person was deified in China, but many people did not know that Jobs had not stepped into the summer step in his life, and he still had extreme arrogance and prejudice against China.

He was even too lazy to cover up the mood of the Eastern powers in front of the public. When the Apple mobile phone first appeared, he said that he would not enter the Chinese market for the time being. Later, he had to come to make money.

Perhaps because of this arrogance and prejudice affecting Apple, Apple has different attitudes towards consumers and other consumers in China.

Previously exposed warranty issues, using double standards, and later for the issue of rewards, there is a 30% fee for the Apple tax incident, squeezing domestic consumers again and again. Apple's sales plan, part of it, is Apple's death.

Cook is the successor to Jobs, and may seem to be close to China, but Chen Mo does not believe that there is no arrogance in the bones. The Apple tax incident is an example. Jobs is not there. In order to maintain Apple's performance, he has to come to China many times.

After learning about Chen Mo's thoughts, Zhao Min left Chen Mo's office area. As soon as she left, Chen Mo called out the ink girl and asked the ink girl to help organize the materials and design drawings needed by the robot. As for Apple's affairs, let it go, he will not take the initiative, this is his principle.

chapters.title: Chapter 80: : Second Rejection
chapters.body:
Chapter 80: : Second Rejection

The news is passing, but I don’t see the shadow of Cook, so that the media people in the marching ant company are weird. Cook did not visit the marching ant company, nor did he appear in other parts of Binhai.

Inside the marching ant company, it is also calm.

The news does not seem to be what they think.

Inside the marching ant company, reporters should not be allowed to enter the interview casually. Cook has not appeared since the exposure of Binhai Airport last night, and they even don’t know which hotel Cook lives in.

For a time, the reporters who were outside the marching ant company began to worry.

Cook sat in the sofa of the hotel and closed his eyes, his face was exhausted.

Just arrived last night, the time difference did not reverse, and now the spirit is not very good, the mood is not very good.

When the US stock market closed, Apple's stock price fell by 1%. Now it has been rejected by the marching ant company. The feeling of being rejected is not too good.

Now that the dilemma is in a dilemma, the marching ant company has clearly responded to the business. Going to the army ant company, they will not take the initiative. He wants to get the initiative, it is impossible.

But leave without saying anything, then he came to Binhai this time, all the plans are invalid. How to solve the problem is what he has to do next.

Now the launch of the new Apple S2, will start soon, the performance and marching ants are similar, but no intelligent assistant, siri's function, and Xiaodie can not be compared.

In terms of battery life, it is Apple's short board. In addition to the advantages of bionic chips, he can't think of the advantages of their mobile phones.

If this is the case, I am afraid that this sales will be affected by Waterloo.

The last time I let the black hat steal the source code of the intelligent assistant in the marching ant company, the result failed, and the company's computer was embarrassed, and it has not been publicly announced.

They are investing in manpower to expand siri's capabilities and artificial intelligence research.

But it is almost impossible to make a breakthrough in a short time. Now the most important thing is to get the smart assistant to break the game, otherwise they will lose most of the market in Greater China. In the future, the marching ants will be internationalized, and they will be more troublesome.

Not long after, Cook opened his eyes and took out his mobile phone to contact the secretary: "Contact the marching ant company and ask them to go out and talk."

At this time, the marching ant company, Chen Mozheng sat in the office and Xiaoyu had lunch.

Many times, at noon, Xiao Yu is eating with Chen Mo. Sometimes, I will go out to eat. Occasionally, the food will be cooked and brought to the restaurant in the morning.

"I found that my family's small fish dishes are much better than the outside." Chen Mo smiled.

As soon as his words fell, there was a hint of joy on the face of Xiao Yu. Just pretending to give him a white look. When they are together, when there is no one, Chen Mo sometimes says some small love words.

The people who like them praised, and Xiao Yu naturally rejoiced. There is no strong love, at least simple and very good.

"If you eat it, eat a little more, so many dishes can't stop your mouth." Xiao Yu eagerly took the dish into Chen Mo's bowl.

"There are so many clips, are you feeding pigs?"

"You are feeding you." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Zhao Min calls."

The two ate and the mobile phone on the desk heard the voice of the smart assistant Xiaodie, and then the bell rang.

"Connected, hands-free." Chen Mo did not put down the chopsticks in his hand, swallowed his mouth and said.

"Chairman, didn't bother you?" Just turned on, and Zhao Min's voice came from the phone.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo asked.

"Cook about to talk about us at night." Zhao Min said.

"Talk at night? Did he fall in time? Tell them, want to cooperate, come to the company to talk about it. If it is so difficult for our company, there is no need to talk about cooperation. We are not here on the 18th floor."

The two did not formally know each other and all of a sudden asked him to go out to chat. Chen Mo could not agree. Want to cooperate, even their company does not want to come, what does this mean?

Moreover, his impression of Apple is not very good. When the smart assistant first came out, there were Apple employees among the people who entered the company server.

"So simply refused, well, I let people reply to them." Zhao Min said.

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo continued to eat with Xiao Yu. After the meal, Chen Mo sat in front of the computer and continued to make the robot's design.

The list of materials, components and parts that the robot needs, he has sorted out, let Zhao Min ask people to purchase.

Before that, he had to design the robots. When the materials came, they could go straight into the manufacturing stage.

"You don't take a break?" After the lunch boxes were all packed, Xiao Yu went to Chen Mo.

"You go to lie for a while, go to work in the afternoon. I am not tired for a while, and I am tired, I can rest at any time. You can't go to work in the afternoon," Chen said.

"What are you painting?" Xiao Yu looked strangely at the design of Chen Mo's computer.

"The design of the robot."

"Do you want to study robots?"

Xiao Yu’s tone was amazed. In her impression, the robots were all things on the tall, only in the movies. Chen Mo said that to study the robots, she had to be surprised.

"Get a little toy to play, anyway, there is nothing wrong with this time. If you like it, send one to you after the success of the study."

"No, I want the robot to do it? I will take a break, don't be too tired." Then he went to the sofa of Chen Mo's office and lay down.

Chen Mo continued to focus on the computer and began to design the robot.

The robot consists of four major parts. They are the actuator, the drive unit, the control system and the detection unit.

Chen Mo is now carrying out the basic design. The technology that is available in the science and technology library is just a design drawing, and no other technology is available.

The drive unit is going to use a carbon-based battery to equip the electric drive. At this stage, he never thought about installing the Iron Man's chest in the Ark reactor. He is also not used to make war robots, carbon crystal batteries to store electricity, enough robots to use in the laboratory.

At least let the ink girl have a carrier that can help him experiment. Now in the lab, there are no assistants. I have to do a lot of things and be busy.

The control system is the ink girl, this is controlled by the ink girl, but a lot of data, but also need to test the entry. There is also a CPu at each joint for interpolation and control processing.

He is now designing the layout of the robot.

The final detection device is important, the location of various sensors, laser sensors, light sensors, acoustic sensors, thermal sensors, etc. These sensors, the eyes, nose and ears of the robot, send feedback to the control system.

The design of the robot is inseparable from the sensor, and the sensor is ignored to design the robot.

This is why he first made the laser sensor. With the laser sensor, this robot has a more precise eye.

Chen Mo is designing robots. Some people in Binhai Hotel in Binhai have not had such a good mood.

In the hotel, Cook frowned.

Trouble, now is a big trouble. The marching ant company made up its mind and decided to let him go. He is a bit messy now. Never tried, about one person was rejected twice.

After pondering for a long time, Cook stood up from the sofa and left the room.

chapters.title: Chapter 81: : Acquisition Of The Company? (For The Ring King Wan Wan Plus More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 81: : Acquisition Of The Company? (For The Ring King Wan Wan Plus More)

Yan Kai yawned and stood in the corner waiting instinctively. He was waiting here early this morning. It has been half a day since now, and many people in the same industry have given up.

Cook didn't know when he would come over, so he didn't know when to wait.

He is waiting here, hoping to get first-hand information.

After all, it’s hard to make a news that has something to watch. It’s a pity to give up. If it is confirmed that Apple has come to the army ant company to talk about cooperation, there is a lot of articles to do.

But for now, it’s still not seen by Cook, so it’s not the way to wait. If Cook doesn't come for a day, he will die and wait here.

Just as he was preparing to pack things away, he suddenly stopped. He saw that several people came out of the company and were waiting at the door of the company.

Is there a situation?

Yan Kai immediately reacted and began to prepare the camera. The remaining few journalists who are not ashamed of him have also noticed this scene and have started to fight.

Not long after, a car stopped at the door of the marching ant company. Li Lingfeng and others waiting at the door, after seeing the car, hurriedly greeted him.

Cook looked out the window of the building, the office building of the marching ant company. He did not expect that he had just returned from here this morning, and now he is going back here. Now he is a bit contradictory.

The chairman of the marching ant company is not willing to come out, he can only come over. A small intersection, this initiative has been lost. He has to come, if there is no intelligent assistant, then Apple's days will be very difficult.

"Mr. Cook, welcome, the president asked me to pick you up." Li Lingfeng said in English.

"Yeah." Cook glanced at Li Lingfeng and nodded blankly, coming down from the car.

As soon as Cook appeared, only a few reporters, like the smelly cats, all came over. The camera in his hand glared at Cook.

Just did not wait for them to pass, they were separated by security guards.

"Mr. Cook, what kind of cooperation do you want to talk to the marching ant company when you come to the marching ant company?"

"Is it because of the recent sales of Apple to march ant company?"

"When is the launch of Apple S2?"

......

A few journalists who were stopped, regardless of whether Cook would answer, asked in English.

Cook's face is not very good. As a public figure, he usually doesn't dislike reporters, but at this time his heart is not happy with these reporters.

I simply ignored a few reporters and followed Li Lingfeng into the marching ant company. Until the reception room, Zhao Min had already waited in the reception room.

"Mr. Cook, welcome to the marching ant company." Zhao Min said in fluent English.

"I am very honored." Cook also nodded politely.

"Please sit down." Zhao Min took a look and sat back to his position: "Mr. Cook, I’m going to tour the city in Binhai today. Is this city beautiful?"

Zhao Min’s face is smiling and looks like he is not humble. He is not because he is the world’s number one company by market value.

"This city is very beautiful, I like it very much." Cook also smiled.

Although the mood is not so cool, it is impossible to express it at the moment.

"Mr. Mr. Cook wants to walk more, I believe that there will be no way to go to Binhai in one day. There are still many beautiful places here."

Zhao Min did not intend to take the initiative to enter the topic, came to talk about the cooperation of Cook, anxious is him.

"Yeah." Cook nodded. "Ms. Zhao, let's get to the point. This time, I want to talk about the cooperation between our two companies."

"Oh, it is our pleasure to cooperate with your company." Zhao Min said: "Mr. Cook, how do you want to cooperate?"

“We want to buy your company.” Cook said directly: “Before we came, we asked BrandFinance to give your company a valuation of $13 billion.”

Cook asked the secretary to take a report from the briefcase and hand it over to Zhao Min, which was full of English.

Zhao Min’s report, a simple glance, will be placed on the table. Over the years, Apple has made a lot of money from around the world.

Apple has a 20% market share, but it takes 70% of the profits of the entire mobile phone industry. Apple's hardware profits have been pushed to the extreme, just that Qualcomm does not buy their accounts.

Over the years, the profit of hardware has not been squeezed, and it has locked its eyes on the software market with huge revenue.

As long as they are willing to sell the company, even if it is $13 billion in cash, Apple will definitely be able to take it out and not hesitate to come up with it.

$13 billion, this is definitely a crazy number. How many people earn a hundred lifetimes, they can not make a fraction of this money. It sounds very tempting, not enough for Zhao Min but not cold.

It seems to be a high price, but the value of the marching ant company is nothing more than that. Don't say that the company is not her, even if the company is her, she will not sell. This is a potential company, this so-called valuation is too low.

If you change to a person who likes money, you will definitely be excited to jump. But falling in the eyes of Zhao Min, it is not so important.

She is pursuing a higher life value and creating a super unicorn, not just money. As for Chen Mo, if you are here, you will definitely not bother to look at these value assessment reports.

"Mr. Cook, this price is very attractive." Zhao Min said.

When he heard Zhao Min’s words, Cook showed a slight smile and was relieved. This price is really not something that most people can refuse.

"But I am sorry, we have no plans to sell the company." Zhao Min pushed the report on the table back to Cook.

This sentence makes Cook's heart cold.

I thought no one would reject this number, but it was still rejected.

"Ms. Zhao, is it because I feel that this money is less?" Cook asked.

"No, this money is a lot. But our company, there is no plan to sell, it has nothing to do with money." Zhao Min said.

“Say a condition, how can I sell the company?”

Cook's face can't see the anger. He is more of a marching ant company this time. Cooperation is the second option.

As long as the marching ant company falls into his hands, Apple can take it to the next level. By the time he surpassed Jobs, he would no longer have to manage the company in his shadow.

Now no matter how good he is, he is considered to be more than Jobs. Even if he is, it is unavoidable, but it is not expressed.

If it can make Apple a new level, he will become Apple's second great man, and even make Apple's market value become the first listed company with a market value of more than one trillion US dollars.

"Maybe I didn't make it clear, no matter what the conditions, we will not sell the company." Zhao Min said with a smile.

"The price is not satisfactory, you can add, 15 billion US dollars." Cook finished, staring at Zhao Min.

He wants to see how this woman will react to judge her bottom line. But no matter how he looks, Zhao Min is still the look of a smile. I don't see any difference, it doesn't seem to put this $15 billion in the eye.

Zhao Min shook his head: "If Mr. Cook came over this time, it is for this matter, I am afraid I will return empty-handed."

"If you feel that the price is not suitable, you can say a price, we are negotiating."

"No interest, the company will not sell. Before Huawei, Penguin, Ali have come. If you sell, you can't take you. If this is the cooperation that Mr. Cook said, then there is no need to talk about it, so as not to waste both time. You and my time are precious."

After Zhao Min finished, the reception room fell into silence.

Xiaoyu stood on the side and did not dare to speak. Her English was also good, and she could understand what they were talking about. Cook’s secretary did not speak.

For a time, it was deadlocked.

chapters.title: Chapter 82: : Happy Communication?
chapters.body:
Chapter 82: : Happy Communication?

Cook did not expect that the attitude of the marching ant company was so strong that it was rejected for the third time today, and it was so simple. There has never been a day, so unhappy like today. Even if it is not good, you can only endure it at this time. Otherwise, I don’t say that the acquisition is a problem. I am afraid that cooperation is a problem.

This road is nowhere to go, only to find other paths.

"Ms. Zhao, can you let me talk to your chairman?" Cook broke the deadlock in the reception room.

Zhao Min smiled slightly and looked at the small fish next to him. Xiao Yuhui will immediately call Chen Mo’s phone: “Chen Mo, Mr. Cook wants to see you.”

"it is good."

After the small fishing hang up the phone, the reception room fell into silence again. Not long after, Chen Mo walked in the door of the reception room and walked in.

"Mr. Cook, this is our chairman, Chen Mo."

After seeing Chen Mo, Cook was surprised in his eyes. So young, young is a bit too much. After a few seconds of waking up, Cook stood up and shook hands with Chen Mo, and simply greeted him.

It was not until Chen Mo sat down on the sofa that Cook said: "Mr. Chen Mo, I want to buy your company this time. Before we come, we asked BrandFinance to make a value assessment of your company, $13 billion. I personally think that This valuation is low, so we give a price of $15 billion and want to buy 100% of your company."

"Sorry, the company does not sell." Not waiting for Zhao Min to translate to him, Chen Mo said. His oral English is not good, but Cook's meaning is understandable.

Chen Mo is so simple, in the expectation of Zhao Min. After translating Chen Mo’s words, Zhao Min saw that Cook’s face was not good.

When Zhao Min refused him, he was a little polite. Now Chen Mo opened, just a few words, directly refused, almost when he just finished, I don’t want to.
