That was $15 billion, not $150. Chen Mo simply let Cook think he was wrong. But after confirming, Cook’s mood was completely bad.

Today is the day he was most rejected. 15 billion US dollars, almost China's more than 90 billion, this figure is already a horrible number.

"Mr. Chen Mo is $15 billion." Cook stressed.

"I know, don't sell." Chen Mo said.

This time Cook has confirmed that what he just heard is correct.

"Since Chen doesn't want to sell the company, we have to change the way of cooperation." Cook immediately found a step down, otherwise he would not be able to talk about it.

"You said." Chen Mo smiled.

The president of Zhao Min, also became the translator of the two.

“Can your company finance? We can finance your company. $8 billion, take 51% of the shares.”

"Our company is not short of money. Mr. Cook still wants to talk about other ways of cooperation. The company's shares are not for sale." Chen Mo said.

Cook was silent. Just now he saw that Chen Mo’s tone and appearance were very firm. It seems that the way to control the army ant company is impossible.

"Then I will talk about cooperation." Cook said: "I hope that the smart assistant can launch the ioS version."

"I don't want to launch the ioS side, but I can't push it. We have to have the core source code and architecture of the operating system, according to the code and architecture design, can be launched. Without these, it can't run, or it will be restricted by the mobile phone system as unknown software. Mr. Cook, will you open the source code of ioS to our company?"

This is a problem that will make Cook completely difficult.

Open source to marching ants, which means that Apple has completely bowed to the marching ant company, which is absolutely not allowed to happen. According to Chen Mo, the smart assistant will not play without developing the source code.

How to do?

A huge question mark emerged in Cook's mind, and the light in the depths of his eyes was also flashing.

The reception room was dead, and several people were waiting for Cook’s answer. After a long time, Cook looked up: "Chen, we can open the source code, but there is a condition."

"You said."

"We both open source code, we open the source code of ioS to your company, you open the source code of the intelligent assistant to us, so fair cooperation." Cook said.

"Impossible." Chen Mo did not want to, and refused.

The source code of the Smart Assistant is currently only available to them, as well as the above. It is impossible for other domestic companies to get it, let alone foreign companies.

Moreover, he is not interested in the source code of the ioS system, and the marching ant system is better than the Apple system in any aspect.

"Chen, you refuse every cooperation, we can't continue like this." Cook said with a calm face.

"Not that we have to cooperate, we just develop software, the source code can not be opened to you. We also want to release the ioS terminal, but we do not have the ioS system architecture, the intelligent assistant can not control the mobile phone system, the role of the intelligent assistant can not be played.

The only way for us to develop the ioS end is to open up the source code of ioS to our company. If this condition cannot be agreed, then Mr. Cook will return empty-handed. ”

After Chen Mo finished, he took a sip of the tea prepared by Xiao Yu and waited quietly.

At this time, Cook, his eyes are constantly blinking, his face is not very good. Chen Mo's request is too big, even if he is, it is impossible to open the source code of ioS to Chen Mo.

For a company that has just been established for half a year, the blow to Apple is not as big as it is. And the source code of ioS is related to deeper security issues.

They can't unilaterally hand over such important things to a Chinese company, and the board will not allow him to do so.

"Mr. Chen, is there any other way?" Cook said.

"Mr. Cook, the security of your company's ioS system is too good. We can't bypass the mobile phone system and control the mobile phone. Moreover, your company has siri, it doesn't need our little butterfly."

After thinking for a long time, Cook sighed and stood up: "Chen, your proposal, I need to think about it."

"Okay, will Mr. Cook want to visit the company?"

"No, I will go back and look forward to seeing you next time." Cook reached out and Chen Mo shook.

"Zhao Min, let's go and send Mr. Cook." Chen Mo smiled at Zhao Min.

"Ok."

Zhao Min smiled and nodded and led Cook to leave the company's reception room. Not long after, the group of people left the marching ant company under the leadership of the staff.

Just walked to the door of the company, the reporters at the company's door, facing the mad shot.

Cook’s entry into the marching ant company has spread in the journalist circle.

The reporters who left the marching ant company came back again. At this time, more than forty reporters were outside the office building of the army ant company, waiting for Cook to come out from inside.

"General Zhao, what cooperation have you reached this time?"

"Mr. Cook, what cooperation between you and the marching ant company?"

"Zhao Zong..."

A group of reporters gathered around and began to ask questions frantically.

Cook walked to the front of the car and turned to look at the reporters around him, his face raised a slight smile.

“Thank you all the reporters and friends. I am very happy to be invited to the army ants company to talk with them. I have had a very pleasant exchange with them. The marching ants are a very promising company. In the future, we will both There will be more opportunities for cooperation."

After talking to the reporter, Cook entered the car. After closing the door, Cook's smile immediately converges and his face becomes bad. In the eyes of many reporters, it is gone.

chapters.title: Chapter 83: : Invading The Company?
chapters.body:
Chapter 83: : Invading The Company?

Looking at the car that Cook left, Zhao Min’s face was not good.

They are veterans of the mall, and from Cook’s words, she can hear a lot of information.

Invited? Only these words, Cook is undoubtedly want to say that it is the marching ant company to invite him to come, not Cook to take the initiative.

More cooperation is also a bit wrong, but it sounds normal, it's just a matter of words, and there is nothing wrong with it. Looking deeply at the direction in which Cook left, Zhao Min declined the interviews of the reporters and rushed back to the company.

In the evening, Cook swayed at the airport in Binhai and went to the capital. There is no cover for this trip. It is to go to the capital, Apple's R&D center, and announced that it will increase investment in China.

On the Internet, because of the short video that Cook had been interviewed, it quickly spread, and all kinds of news followed.

"The marching ant company invited Apple to cooperate? 》

"The reason why Cook came to China! 》

"Why do marching ants please apples? 》

"Apple and marching ants reach a cooperation? Is the smart assistant a name? 》

......

The words that Cook left the marching ant company, though brief, revealed a lot of information.

When Cook came to China this time, he was secretly invited by the army ant company. Apple and the marching ant company have already reached a cooperation, and there will be more opportunities to cooperate in the future.

The news was uploaded on the Internet, and as always, the smeared voice reappeared. All the criticisms this time are well-founded.

Although this argument is based on the expansionary speculation of the media based on Cook's one-sided words.

There are so many mobile phone companies in China that can cooperate, but I did not expect that the marching ant company will go back to find Apple to cooperate.

Netizens who do not know the truth will start a new round of attacks again.

"Is it so fast that I am swearing at the apples? Is this the ants who are bowing their heads? The slavery is too heavy."

"I just wanted to start a butterfly eye. Now think about it, it feels a bit disgusting."

"Garbage marching ants, no bones."

......

The buzz on the Internet is also on the rise with these news.

In just half a year after the establishment of the marching ant company, it became a domestic giant and refused to sell stocks and finance. There are many people who are embarrassed, so there are some rushes, and some people want to bring a wave of rhythm, hoping to push down this giant and eat it.

Soon, the black powder and the water army will also occupy the official microblog of the marching ant company, a buzz. Even if there is a good word, it was sprayed as a washing party.

In the office, Zhao Min is not in a good mood. At that time, it was only Cook's guest words, she felt that it was not right, but Cook was not there, and she did not refute it on the spot.

I just didn't expect that the media that had been bitten and chewed would zoom in and someone would attack them.

Before Cook left, he also laid a small pit for the marching ant company. I just didn't think that this little pit was constantly being digged by the media, digging big, and the people in the dark pushed it, so that it became a trouble now.

When Zhao Min thought about how to respond, the phone on the desk rang: "General Zhao, Apple people call."

"Come in." Zhao Min said.

"Ms. Zhao, Mr. Cook told me to say that I am embarrassed, his mistakes have brought this kind of trouble to your company." When the phone came over, there was a good male voice.

Zhao Min calmed his face, a sorry, no painful, let her eat a boring loss.

Now, according to the reason, I can't really blame Cook, but Zhao Min knows that it must be intentional. The usual Cook, will never pay attention to those reporters.

"Nothing, say hello to Mr. Cook on my behalf."

After that, Zhao Min hangs up the phone and then dials Li Lingfeng's phone number: "Ling Feng, let the public relations department clarify that the company has not reached a cooperation with Apple. In addition, find Lee Law, help him collect evidence that has already constituted rumors, especially Those big V are known to sue them."

Zhao Min is not in a good mood. Every time he is a little bit swaying, a group of black powder and water army will come out. There are also some so-called big V known, always jumping out of disgusting people.

Those so-called big V are known, good things are chaotic, sensational, a little bit of things are spurting, especially disgusting, don't give a lesson, never know the pain, next time there is a chance, they will jump out again and disgust them.

This kind of person does not know what the moral bottom line is.

In the face of numerous embarrassments, the official weibo of the marching ant updated a short announcement.

"The marching ant company has not reached a cooperation with Apple, and the media people are required to abide by their professional ethics. Don't listen to the wind is rain, people will be clouded, time will prove everything. Finally, we have collected articles and speeches that constitute rumors, all the ambiguous Companies and individuals of the marching ant company are ready to accept lawyers."

The strong response of the marching ant company immediately provoked waves. Every time I was attacked, it was obvious that the marching ant company was already impatient.

"Eat the people of the melons, do a good job."

"A person who has a distressed swearing for a second, and the rest is celebrating with ‘live it’, hahaha...”

"This is a nest of ants who eat meat. It is estimated that Pingtou brothers are afraid to provoke."

"The last time I closed so many companies and marketing numbers, I asked the water army and the sprayers, why not long-term memory? Well, the scars have forgotten the pain? This army ants will bite."

......

As soon as this announcement came out, many authors of news reports on marching ants immediately dropped their articles. Many people are afraid of the guns, and they are beginning to regret attacking the army ants. Compensation for the loss of reputation of the marching ant company is enough for them to go bankrupt.

Some media and individuals who smeared the marching ant company began to apologize and said that they did not know, but were misled by the article.

"A big V is known to have apologized (manually funny)!"

"Give you a joke, big V knows! Please feel good about it."

"These so-called big Vs are known, but they are just a group of clowns who are sensational, and the ones that give money are black. I didn't expect to kick the iron plate this time."

Under the official Weibo of the marching ants, a lot of comments, those well-known apologies, attracted a ridicule.

The online world is very lively, and Chen Mo sat in his chair and felt his chin. On the computer is the video of Cook leaving the marching ant company.

He did not expect that Cook simply put a single sentence on them.

He must know that there are countless hungry wolves in the country who are secretly watching the army ants. So a little subtotal, to trouble the marching ant company, another apology that is not painful, perfect to avoid all responsibility. They still can't get angry with him.

It’s just that Cook has pitted them, and it’s impossible to swallow this squandering.

"Ink girl." Chen Mo said.

"Merg brother, ink girl arrived." Chen Mo's words fell, the inky voice of the ink girl appeared in the computer's sound.

"Is the recording of the conversation with Zhao Min yesterday still?"

"Yes." said the ink girl.

"Using hackers to attack our company's servers from outside and control all the computers in our company." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

The inky voice of the ink girl sounded, and she did not ask why, this is not her duty, but Chen Mo’s order, she can not refuse.

chapters.title: Chapter 84: : Anti-Pit? (Plus More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 84: : Anti-Pit? (Plus More)

Xu Yuxian is browsing the official website. He is responsible for the company's security maintenance. Some time ago, there were many attacks on the company, but since this time, the attacks on the company's servers have been reduced.

It's all insignificant attacks and doesn't break their firewall.

Today is his responsibility for the maintenance of the website. Nothing big, he just needs to refresh the background to see if there are any abnormal data.

Just as he checked the background of the website, suddenly, an alert message popped up on the screen.

"Attention, there are servers that hack into the company."

Xu Yuxian’s pupils shrank. After saying this, Xu Yuxian began to convert pages to resist the invasion.

This sentence makes the security team all nervous, not only him, but also the people around the company's network security team.

"Notify the supervisor that there is a hacker invading the company server."

A minute later, the entire company's computer screen was frozen and the office area was turbulent.

Xu Yuxian slid two mouse clicks, pulled the mouse out and plugged it in again, still no reaction. When he looked at the colleague next to him and found that other people were like him, the computer screen was completely frozen and lost control.

The next moment, everyone smiled on the computer screen.

"The other party controls our computer. Computers with important information immediately shut down the gateway."

The people in the cyber security team are gloomy and black like the bottom of the pot. Their team, who could not resist the attack of the other two minutes, was controlled by the computer.

The entire company's network was in a shackle. Not long after, Zhao Min appeared in the office area of the network security team.

"What happened?" asked Zhao Min.

"There was a hacker that controlled our computer and we were cracking it."

Xu Yuxian and other people turned black, and now the entire company's computer is controlled, their security team has no effect, I am afraid to be embarrassed, can not even keep the rice bowl can not keep.

"how long?"

"Unclear, we have never seen this type of attack. It may be a new type of Trojan."

The cyber security team was sweating on their foreheads, and they were anxious. No matter how hard they tried, they couldn’t break it, and they felt extremely frustrated.

"Notification, hacking, looking for a solution, everyone is waiting for peace." Zhao Min finished, with Xiaoyu left the office area of the network security team.

At this time, Chen Mo sat in the chair and his face was calm.

It’s really unprecedented to invade your company’s servers.

"Change the official website into a smiley face, and release this smile on the official Weibo, with a smile!"

"Okay, My Brother." The ink girl did as Chen Mo’s order.

The official website became a smile, and Weibo updated this smile. The strange move of the marching ant company immediately attracted the attention of netizens. Just the official wei of the marching ant, just clarified the rumors, now update this smile, what do you mean?

"The visual marching ant company was hacked!"

"It may be hacked, a new sign, bitter in a slight smile. Is it a bitter fun?"

"It means letting the marching ant company laugh and live."

......

Zhao Min and Xiao Yu are preparing to go to Chen Mo's office. Just after getting out of the elevator, they received a call from Li Lingfeng.

"Zhao Zong, the official Weibo account password was stolen, and the hacker updated Weibo."

"I know, I will ignore it for the time being."

Now that the company's computer is under control, what is lost is still unknown. After explaining the matter clearly, Zhao Min hangs up the phone and speeds up the pace to Chen Mo's lab.

“Copy a copy of the last call I made with Zhao Min yesterday, a recording of the conference call for butterfly eye products, and a butterfly eye advertising campaign and several other product advertising schemes.”

"Okay, My Brother." The ink girl said: "The copy has been completed, and Mi Gege, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min enter the experimental area."

"Well, end the spoof, everything else, restore the original state." Chen Mo said.

"Ink girl understands."

......

The people on the cyber security team are crying, and there is still no clue that they can't crack the other party's invasion. In this way, their team is not as simple as it is, and the rice bowl is not guaranteed.

This is a company with a few big giants. After all, the development prospects are huge. If you are swept out of the house, it is almost impossible to find such a company.

Unless a few giants and unicorn companies want them, but this time there is nothing they can do, and it is unlikely that they will go there.

Just when they were helpless, the computer screen was a smile and suddenly disappeared. All computers in the company have returned to normal.

All the people in the cyber security team are stunned. From the beginning of the attack to the end, there is still no fifteen minutes, so it is over? What do you mean? What did the other party take?

After Zhao Min and Xiao Yu verified their identity, they passed through the long corridor and entered Chen Mo’s office.

"Chairman, the company was hacked." When Zhao Min entered the office, he hurriedly said.

"I know, the crisis has been lifted. People have issued an announcement saying that today's marching ant company was attacked by a large-scale hacker and did not suffer too much damage." Chen Mo said.

"So quickly released?" Zhao Min went to Chen Mo’s computer in amazement. It was a normal desktop: "Are you sure?"

"Almost." Chen Mo smiled.

He can't always say that he had invaded himself, or Zhao Min had to cut him with a knife.

"Then let me explain it." Zhao Min sighed. Since nothing happened, she was relieved and turned away.

"Ink girl, packaged the things I just copied and put them on the online forum of foreign social networking sites, indicating that the information was obtained from the database of the black army ants company. With fake iP, highlight the call recordings of me and Zhao Min yesterday."

"Okay, Mom."

Zhao Min quickly deleted the smiley Weibo that was just released, released the announcement, saying that the server of the army ant company was hacked, and lost some important conference call recordings and high-level communication call recordings.

A stone provokes a thousand waves, and this incident has once again attracted attention to the marching ant company that was already at the forefront.

It was smeared, and now the server is still being hacked. Besides, others can't think of other words to describe it.

At the same time, the West is at night, on the most famous social forum in foreign countries, a netizen of the net name smile, uploaded a few documents, and the title signature is the information obtained by the black army ant company.

The marching ant company has recently been a topic in the West. This post came out and immediately attracted the attention of many people.

"All Chinese, who can translate?"

"This is the most difficult text..."

"Chairman, didn't bother you? What's the matter? (Apple) Cook asked us to talk at night. Talk at night? Is his time difference down? Tell them, want to cooperate, come to the company to talk about it..."

"Cook? Tim Cook?"

"Cook? They want Cook to talk about business in the past? Who is so arrogant?"

Chen Mo and Zhao Min's call recordings were quickly translated, and they suddenly stirred up waves. Many people know about Cook’s visit to China. I didn’t expect that Cook was going to the marching ant company to talk about business.

People in foreign countries are just surprised and laughed.

But at home, it is a different response.

It didn't take long for those materials and recordings to be sent back to China, and the media that knew the truth were boiling.

The recording was an internal call between Zhao Min, the president of the marching ant company, and the chairman. It was not the marching ant company that invited Cook to talk about business, but Cook took the initiative to find the army ant company.

Today, many people are also mad at the army ants company because of this incident.

In the final interview, Cook said that he was invited, who is lying? A reporter with a news smell has a huge question mark in his heart.

chapters.title: Chapter 85: : Tiger Head
chapters.body:
Chapter 85: : Tiger Head

"Ms. Zhao, the network rumors of the ants company hacking incident, your company leaked the personal data of tens of millions of users. What response do you have for this news?"

Zhao Min was surrounded by many reporters, and all the shots were placed on her.

This simple temporary press conference is the meaning of Chen Mo. Make a clarification on the leaked documents, and the rumors of the network, plus the attack on the marching ant company.

"You said it yourself. This is a network rumor. For the company's users, our company has special protection, hackers can't steal. This hacked computer, stealing files, the most important thing is that a few undocumented The publicity program, and some of the conference recordings that did not have access to encryption protection, there is no loss."

“Ms. Zhao, a well-known foreign forum, has hackers who claim to have successfully invaded your company. They have published documents stolen from your company. There are some recording files in them. Are these recordings true?” Zhao Mingang answered, another reporter Just ask questions.

"Our company does lose some unencrypted audio files. As for the recordings, I have not heard the contents, and I can't judge the true and false. Regardless of the true and false, I hope that the relevant company websites can delete these documents, so as not to give us The company caused even greater losses. Our company seriously condemned this crime of stealing company secrets."

"One of the leaked recordings is a recording of the call between you and the chairman of your company. I talked about Mr. Cook who invited you to talk about business. Mr. Cook said that you invited him to come to talk about business. What is your response?"

Zhao Min’s mouth was smiling, and Cook dug a pit for him. This time, he could send it back with the benefits.

"About Mr. Cook's visit, we are completely unclear in advance. After Mr. Cook came to Binhai City, he invited our chairman to discuss it many times. But because the chairman did not leave, he did not go. Mr. Cook also understood. , take the initiative to come to our company to discuss cooperation."

There was a commotion in the crowd sitting, and Zhao Min’s short sentence gave a lot of information. The marching ant company did not know that Cook had visited. After arriving in Binhai City, Cook repeatedly invited people from the marching ant company to negotiate and finally refused. He personally came to the army ant company.

They are all text workers who bite the word, and they will hear the words in Zhao Min’s words.

"The network rumors, your company has already reached a number of cooperation with Apple, what is the cooperation?"

"The network rumors, these four words, is very terrible for our company. There are always some people who use false news to attack us. Which company we work with, this is our freedom.

With so many employees in the company, money is not falling from the sky. Your question, we have already responded, there are still many different opinions on the cooperation between us and Apple, and there is no cooperation at present. ”

......

After a simple interview, Zhao Min returned to his company. When I got back to the office, I got a call from Chen Mo.

"I didn't have a telephone recording this time? Mr. Chairman?" When he called the phone, Zhao Min spoke.

She and Chen Mo called to record, and the appearance was a little weird. She will not make a call recording, the only possibility is that Chen Mo recorded.

"Oh? Accident, my phone is always in the state of recording. After all, if you say something about the ages, you can record it and you can be alive." Chen Mo laughed.

In fact, the ink girl will record his call recording, Chen Mo can not say the ink girl.

"Oh, is that a famous sentence?"

“No.” Chen Mo said: “This time I did a good job. I feel that you have the potential to enter the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and speak a set.”

"I am working for you, now come to laugh at me?"

"No, obviously I am bragging about you." Chen Mo said: "It’s all said now. As for how the media interpret it, it is not our problem."

"You are really a person who is not willing to suffer." Zhao Min said with a deep hang up.

After Chen Mo hangs up the phone, he begins to draw the design of the robot. As soon as the design is presented, once the material of the design robot is back, it is possible to start making the robot.

The interview of the temporary ants’ press conference was quickly spread.

"Cook deliberately gave the army ant company the next set? 》

"Cook is panic? 》

Why is Cook lying? 》

"There is no cooperation with the marching ant company, is Cook angry?" 》

No one cares about the hacker who invaded the marching ant company. The focus of attention is on Cook. After all, under the general public, Cook said that being invited to come, will cause trouble to the marching ant company.

Because of the recording incident, it was revealed that the marching ant company did not invite Cook. Instead, Cook invited them. Not only that, but the news of Apple’s empty-handedness also spread quickly.

This means that all the rumors about the marching ant company on the Internet are all fake.

Capital, Apple R&D Center.

Cook's face is not very good, I thought the next set, a small set of marching ants company. I didn't expect to be back in the pit so soon.

The marching ant company was hacked? Hell invasion.

Their best hacker of Apple, the invasion of the marching ant company, was finally overcast and ate a boring loss. The firewall of the marching ant company, if it is so easy to invade, he does not have to work hard to come to China now.

The marching ant company apparently did not want to be so simple to lose, only to engage in such a hacker. Then it was so clever that the recordings about their conversations revealed. The marching ant company has no losses except for a few sets of painless propaganda programs.

He was unable to refute the fact that he was hacked.

The marching ant company took the opportunity to clarify and there was nothing wrong with it. The only thing that is wrong is that he clearly said that he was sorry. As a result, the marching ant company did not mention the matter.

When Cook was in a bad mood, his secretary came in: "Mr. Cook, the company is here to inform, let us go back to China."

“Returning to China? Why?” Cook said.

“It may be thought that the stock continues to fall. The company said that many directors would like to hear your response.”

"Book a ticket tonight." Cook said with a black face to the secretary around him.

This is the most unhappy time for visiting China many times. In the face of the smart assistant, the offensive that allowed the mobile phone to be replaced, he still had to come.

Otherwise, they will be like Nokia being made into history by Android, and Apple will also withdraw from the stage of the mobile phone market.

There are only two things to go back this time, to speed up the development of siri, or to persuade the board to hand over the source code of the Apple system to the marching ant company. However, it is almost impossible to do it later. Open source to a Chinese company is something that you can't even think about.

That night, Cook quietly left China, did not alarm anyone, and did not even respond to the things of the marching ant company, as he came, quietly.

Vigorously coming to China, and finally the end of the tiger. Quietly, quietly leave without taking a cloud.

chapters.title: Chapter 86: : Giants Never Bow To Ants
chapters.body:
Chapter 86: : Giants Never Bow To Ants

Apple's headquarters conference room.

The atmosphere was a bit boring, and the directors at the conference table, in suits and attire, all looked at the first cook.

Apple's stock has fallen and fallen, and they are losing a lot of money every moment, and their worth is shrinking.

This is not a good news.

"Cook, you go to China, what is the harvest this time?" On the opposite side of Cook, a middle-aged man with glasses asked.

Those who know him in the circle will admire him for three points.

When he joined the gene technology company as a scientist, he turned the gene technology company from a small company that was on the brink of bankruptcy into a bio-sector with an annual income of $13 billion and a market value of more than $100 billion, creating a Wall Street myth.

He is the largest pharmaceutical company in the United States, Genetek's chairman and Ceo, and is the member of Apple's board of directors, the most widely held member of the board of directors, currently Chairman of Apple's board of directors, Levinson.

After Levinson spoke, Cook immediately began to work. Although Apple managed him, he was also restricted by the board of directors.

"Levinson, this time to go to China, to be honest, did not get much useful things, but did a bunch of stupid things." Cook said.

"We are not interested in listening to your stupid things, we just want to know what you have gained." A seat near the 70-year-old man opened his mouth.

As soon as he spoke, the people in the entire conference room straightened up.

Shugel, former coe of Northrop Grumman. This is the world's third largest arms dealer, the famous B2 stealth bomber, the Global Hawk drone, and the Nimitz class aircraft carrier are the products of this company. No one knows how much stock he holds in Apple, but anyone who knows him is awesome.

This old man with two beards is definitely one of the top people in the American food chain.

When he heard Shugel’s opening, Cook’s heart glimpsed. Don't look at him as Apple's Ceo, the wind and the scenery, but the people who really control Apple are the board of directors.

“I met with the chairman and president of the marching ant company and proposed the idea of acquiring their company.”

"The results of it?"

"Rejected, refused without hesitation, they said they would not sell the company." Cook said: "So I talked to them about the idea of developing an ioS-side smart assistant."

All the directors present were on Cook's face, listening to Cook's words with no expression.

Former Vice President Al Gore, Disney's current chairman and Ceo Robert, former chairman of Avon Group Zhong Binyu, East BlackRock partner Susan, former Boeing chief financial officer James, this is the most luxurious boardroom.

Anyone, in the face of this lineup, has no bottom in mind.

"Last they let us open the source code of ioS. Because the design of the smart assistant must understand the core code of ioS, otherwise it can't be developed." Cook said with a black face.

Even if he does not know what Chen Mo said is true or false, he can only believe in the scalp.

The crowd did not answer, let Cook continue to say.

"I propose that both parties open source code. We open the source code of ioS to them, they open the source code of the smart assistant to us, and finally they are rejected. They insist that unless we open the source code of the Apple system, we cannot develop The intelligent assistant on the ioS side, the conversation has no results."

"Talk about the company." James spoke.

“Mobile phone business, in Greater China, scored 9% in the last quarter, and the market share was ranked fourth. After the emergence of intelligent assistants in the marching ant company, the sales volume is more serious. If you still can't support smart assistants, or we The siri has no technical breakthrough. Soon after, the mobile phone will bid farewell to the Chinese market."

Cook sullen, this is why he had to go to Binhai in person.

Smart assistants have upgraded their mobile phones for a whole generation and are not keeping pace with the times. The Apple mobile phone business is the next Nokia. In the future, marching ants will enter the international market and they will be even more dangerous.

“Do you have any better ideas? Or open the source code of the mobile phone system to the marching ant company?” Cook asked.

Several people have pondered, the marching ant company is in China, not in the United States, and is not a listed company. They want to move the army ant company, and they can't pass the Chinese government. After all, China is not the United States and Europe. There is only the calculations of the Huaxia government, not the capital predators.

If you are abroad, everything is easy to handle. They can do whatever they want, but the red land can't, any tentacle that breaks the rules will be cut off, and there is no emotion to speak.

Thinking this way, they really have no way to take the army ant company. The meeting room was dead, everyone was thinking about countermeasures.

"It is impossible to open the source code of ioS. The giant never bows to the ants." Shugel said calmly.

Others calmly looked at each other and did not say much.

"Our company's S2 will soon hold a press conference. If there is a smart assistant, its performance will surpass any mobile phone in the market." Cook's tone is calm: "But if not, I am afraid this time will be very trouble."

The people on the field did not speak, and they all made their own calculations in their hearts.

Until the meeting was dissolved, all the talents left the conference room.

After getting into the car, Shugel took out his mobile phone with a cold cold in his eyes. After hearing the phone connected, he flashed a little: "Look for two people to go to China, I want to take something, 10 million. ""

"Good sir, I am going to arrange it now."

After hanging up the phone, Shugel was full of wrinkled faces with a hazy smile. After the vehicle is started, the vehicle leaves Apple. Other people’s vehicles also followed closely.

......

After Cook quietly left, the storm on the marching ant company also slowly subsided. Everything is back to normal, and the marching ant company is also functioning normally, as if the rumors of the network have never appeared.

And Apple, there is no abnormal move.

However, the topic of the second generation of butterfly eyes and butterflies has appeared in the media's field of vision from time to time.

As the flagship machine of the marching ant company, the butterfly eye has sold more than two million units during this period. This amount of pre-sales is beyond everyone's expectations.

This pre-sale volume means that the marching ant company has been recognized by users.

The first batch of mobile phones have been shipped, and now the supply is in short supply, and will continue to be shipped in the future.

Zhao Min has also sent people to contact European telecom operators to prepare to push the butterfly eye mobile phone to the European and international markets. As for the US market, they are not considering it for the time being.

Lianhuawei, a unicorn who wants to enter the US market, has no choice but to work hard for so many years before it can open a gap. They don't think that the energy of the current army ants will allow them to enter the US market.

Therefore, Zhao Min’s eyes are on the European market, and he may be able to replace the status of Apple’s mobile phone in the future.

The company is developing rapidly, and Chen Mo is not idle.

Chen Mo hung the last design on the wall of the lab, clapping his hands and staring at the design on the wall in front of him.

Seven pieces of design, these are the design of the robot. Includes the machine's head design, limbs and body design. The body is designed to be the most complex and detailed, and here is the main part of the robot.

Many features are concentrated here, so the design is very detailed.

The design drawings of the parts have been handed over to Zhao Min, so that the senior fitters of the workshop factory can be built as required and will be completed soon. By then, his task is to assemble.

But before that, make a battery for the robot.

When Chen Mo was busy designing the robot, on the small road in the southwestern side, two big men came out of the mountain forest with a scary momentum.

"I heard that this is a forbidden place for mercenaries? Hey, I don't see how." The black man on the left said.

"Bol, don't be too happy. Finish the task first, leave safely, and say this again. It's not easy here."

"Good, timid Jack."

chapters.title: Chapter 87: : Timid Jack?
chapters.body:
Chapter 87: : Timid Jack?

Chen Mo looked at the various parts in several boxes and opened his mouth and laughed.

These are the parts that he created with the CNC machine tool for the fitter in the workshop on the part factory. When I finished today, I sent him all over.

In these boxes, there are all the parts that the robot needs. Not far from the test bench, various device parts were placed there. It's just this robot, there are nearly a thousand of various large and small parts.

As the main components of the robot, it is made of carbon aluminum alloy and plastic. These materials are lighter in weight and can reduce the weight of the robot and increase the running time.

He is now using battery power, and from the outset, it is necessary to consider the runtime problem.

In addition to the various components and various sensors, there are many micro motors and servo motors. These are machines that are used to drive the joint movement of the robot.

Looking closely at the parts inside the box, Chen Mo took out all the parts inside and began to assemble.

This is a fine work, especially the two hands of the robot, which is the most critical part, so he chooses to start from the hand.

He now has an assistant robot that requires a robot to help him control the machine and the laboratories, which requires the robot to have a flexible hand. In all parts, the parts of both hands are the finest. In robotics, the hand is one of the most difficult structures to imitate.

After slowly entering the state, Chen Mo also sank into it. Until the ink woman reminded him that Xiao Yu entered his experimental area, Chen Mo was only fascinated.

"I have forgotten the time again? After work, do you go back now, or wait for yourself to go back?" Xiao Yu looked into Chen Mo's lab and looked around.

"You wait, wait for me to get the fingers of this hand, go back together, very quickly." Chen Mo finished, continue to focus on the manipulator's palm of the lab.

"In the assembly robot?"

Xiao Yu looked at the design on the wall and then set his sight on the palm of his hand in front of Chen Mo.

"I got it right, but this is just the beginning." Chen Mo said, "It’s still a while away from success."

After Chen Mo focused on the palm of his hand, Xiao Yu was sitting in the chair next to him, quietly watching Chen Mo. These things she wants to help can't help. The only help is not to bother.

About fifteen minutes later, Chen Mocai put down the small screwdriver in his hand: "Yes, go back first, and the rest of the work can't be done at once."

"Yeah." Xiaoyu nodded, helping Chen Mo to pack up the lab and leave for the villa.

......

Kaili International Hotel Binhai.

Jack is preparing to leave the hotel, but he is not in a good mood and his face is gloomy. Next to Bor, it is destroying his will like an undead fly.

It’s been three days since he came here, and his ears only stop when he sleeps.

"Jack, I found that China is good, I started to like it."

"Jack, what I ate yesterday was especially delicious, so I couldn't help but want to eat it once."

"I want to stay here now, then sit down and eat every day, hahahaha..."

"Jack..."

"shitup." was a little annoyed, and Jack whispered to Bor: "No more nonsense, I cut your tongue and stuffed it into your chrysanthemum."

"Well, don't be angry. Not enough here is really fun, it's hard to come to China, we have to play for a few more days..."

When Boer hadn’t finished, he was taken back by Jack’s eyes and he shut up.

"Action tonight, get ready."

Jack put his pistol behind his waist and sorted out his clothes. I ignored Bor and took a look at the map.

Not long after, the two left the hotel.

Outside the villa community where Chen Mo is located, Bor carefully looks at the surrounding situation and looks at the map from time to time.

Two days ago, I came to Binhai from the Southwest Province with a tour group. In the past two days, they have been observing the security of the villa community.

Here is a high-end villa community, security is better than other places. They only have two people and they dare not act rashly.

This action is the source code technology of the intelligent assistant from Chen Mo. The task does not dare to have too many mercenaries to enter the coastal city, otherwise it is easy to be discovered, so this time only two of them came.

"Jack, you see that the car is beautiful, limited edition Lamborghini..."

"You better give me a quiet point, or I will not control you and kill you."

Jack can't think of it. Why did he let him and this sneak come over to complete this task? This way, his ears are not clean.

"Well, I don't say it. It's useless to look at it like this. I rushed straight into his house, grabbed him, and asked him on the top of his head with a gun. Don't you have it? You are a waste of time." Bor Disdain.

"You can live to the present, it is a miracle. I will let you teach me how to survive."

Jack faintly said, continue to focus on the villa community, from time to time look at the map of the community in his hand, the heart is calculating the next plan.

“Don't I say it wrong? These garbage security will be solved in three or two.”

Bor looked at the information in his hand. There are still a few photos on it. It is Chen Mo’s photo, which is the goal of their mission. He was blind to the oriental face and he had to look at it more.

"We are here to take things, not to kill people. Also, here is China, not the Middle East and Africa, nor Europe. It is a shock to the Chinese government, then you can go home to eat, no one can keep you. No You can't alarm anyone before you get the technology."

Jack is still watching the villa community: "I hope you remember, we only have one chance. If the mission fails, I must cut your tongue and stuff it into your chrysanthemum."

The task explained above is to get the technical information of the marching ant company. If Chen Mo was killed before he got the information, their mission failed and the consequences were very serious. So he had to be cautious and warned Bor.

"It's disgusting." Bor showed a disgusting expression: "Now ready to do it?"

"First talk about the next thing. After entering, you will not be allowed to shoot. It is very troublesome to shoot at here. It will be very difficult to see the Chinese government."

"I know, every time it is the Chinese government, are they so terrible? It’s timid." Bor said impatiently.

"In this land, for us, they are so terrible, otherwise you think that the Middle East is so chaotic, why is it so peaceful here? I hope that you can listen to my orders, or you will not have to use other people, I will kill you personally. ,Take action."

Jack took the map in his hand and looked around, avoiding the camera, walking to the corner of the villa's wall and quickly flipping into the wall.

"It's really troublesome, timid Jack." Boer screamed, his movements were not slow, followed by Jack, and turned into the villa community three or two times.

In the shadow of the night, the two men were lightly handed and quickly approached the villa where Chen Mo was located.

chapters.title: Chapter 88: : Little Thief?
chapters.body:
Chapter 88: : Little Thief?

"Hey..."

Chen Mo is sleeping and wakes up by the sound of his mobile phone. After the phone was connected, the voice of the ink girl was heard: "Momgo, two people want to sneak into the villa and climb up the balcony on the second floor."

sneak into?

Chen Mo’s sleepiness instantly disappeared by a large part.

His villa is equipped with hidden surveillance, and this monitoring system is monitored by the ink girl. Once the ink girl decides to be illegally invaded, he will be alerted.

Installed until now, there has never been an early warning, I did not expect to be alert in the middle of the night.

“Can you confirm the identity of the other party?” Chen Mo asked immediately.

"The face of the other party is camouflaged, the light is too dark, there is no frontal photo, it is not recognized, and it can be confirmed as a foreigner." The ink girl said.

"Foreigners? Disguise? Invade the villa? Immediately notify the community security department." Chen Mo looked down, leaned down, hugged the sleeping little fish and left the room.

"What's wrong? Chen Mo?"

Was picked up by Chen Mo, Xiao Yu also woke up in confusion.

"Nothing, don't ask this first." Chen Mo holding a small fishing, smeared toward the basement.

The disguised foreigner thinks with the **** and knows that the other party is definitely not as simple as burglary. He is now unable to determine the identity of the other party, but must confirm the small fishing and his safety.

"Is there something happening?" Xiao Yu was held by Chen Mo, and he didn't sleep at all.

"Someone sneaked into the villa, don't talk." Chen Mo whispered, holding a small fishing into the basement, locked the door.

The basement is an iron gate. He believes that before the community security comes, the other party will never open this door.

"Oh..." After entering the basement, Chen Mo’s cell phone shook.

"Connected."

"Mr. Chen, just received an alert from your villa, is there something happening?" Just after it was connected, there was a rushing voice.

Zhuang Ji, with a group of security guards, is rushing to Chen Mo’s villa at full speed. Living in this community, not rich and expensive, has never had any problems, and now suddenly received an alarm, awakened people in their entire security department.

If something went wrong, the reputation of the community was ruined, and they were all finished.

"There are two unidentified people entering my villa. My situation is safe, I will surround the villa and catch them." Chen Mo said with a calm face.

If it wasn't for him to install a layer of surveillance alone, there was an early warning from the ink girl, and he really didn't know what would happen next.

"Okay." Zhuang Ji's face sank: "Hurry up, surround the villa, don't let go of a person, let people inform the boss."

......

"Hell, no one in the room."

In Chen Mo’s room, Jack and Boer had guns and their faces were very strange. Be careful enough, why are you still found?

"The quilt is still warm, go to other places to see, don't let them run."

Already discovered, Jack did not intend to hide, began to look for a room.

"nothing."

"I went to the basement to see." Jack grimaced and walked toward the basement.

"Damn." Looking at the locked iron door in the basement, Jack's face was black. This anti-theft iron door is not so easy to open, it is obvious that their goal is inside.

"Jack, there is a situation." Just as Jack was ready to shoot and open the iron gate, there was a shout from Bor.

When I couldn't think too much, Jack rushed up.

"It was discovered."

Borla opened the gap in the curtains and looked at the security guards outside the door.

"Damn, leave here, go from behind."

Jack blackened his face and quickly ran to the second floor. The sneak failure means that the action failed and can only wait for the next time. He only hopes that Chen Mo will think that this time is just an ordinary burglary, otherwise he will be in trouble later.

The two just ran up the stairs and the door to the villa was opened.

"Upstairs, grab them."

A group of security guards ran upstairs, no way, in this community, there are some people who have identity, non-rich is expensive. So if they are sneaked in and not caught, all of them will be punished and even lose their jobs.

"Damn yellow-skinned monkey." Born ran out of the balcony and jumped directly to the grass below.

Jack is not slow, hurriedly jumped, grabbed a patrol car, and rushed toward the gate of the villa community. Now I don't have to worry about the problem of not being exposed, but the problem that I can't run away.

"Where, grab them." A group of security guards immediately chased them up.

"Goodbye, yellow-skinned monkeys."

The two drove the patrol car and slammed the railings of the community gates.

......

In the villa, Chen Mo calmed his face and looked around the villa. At this time, Xiao Yu, there is still a face, just holding the arm of Chen Mo, there is a hint of peace.

"What about people?" Chen Mo looked at Zhuang Ji of the community.

"Running, it may be two small thieves, we have already called the police." Zhuang said.

"Little thief?"

Chen Mo does not believe at all, the thief can easily sneak into this community, until he enters his villa, was discovered?

"The little thief can come and go in your community. I need to doubt the security ability of your community." Chen Mo's face is very bad. He is fortunate to have the warning of the ink girl, otherwise I still don't know what it is.

Zhuang Ji’s face changed slightly. Chen Mo said so, he really did not know how to return.

Here is a high-end villa area, many rich people, just seek peace of mind, will live here. If it is no longer safe, I am afraid that their reputation will plummet.

"Mr. Chen, we are investigating this matter and will give you an explanation." Zhuang Ji said: "You see it is already early in the morning, or sleep first. We will give you a statement tomorrow morning."

"Do you think I can sleep peacefully now?"

"Mr. Chen, I will arrange special defense for you here tonight. You should sleep with peace of mind. We will give you a statement tomorrow morning." Zhuang Ji can only say with a hard scalp.

"Chen Mo, it's too late, sleep first." Xiao Yu said, shaking Chen Mo's arm.

"I hope that you can give me a statement tomorrow." Chen Mo took a deep breath and said.

"Thank you Mr. Chen, thank you Mrs. Chen. You have peace of mind to rest tonight, we will send someone to look at it." Zhuang Ji sighed and let the security guards leave the villa.

After returning to the room, Chen Mo was lying in bed with a small fisherman: "Go sleep first, just two small thieves, don't worry too much, go to work tomorrow."

"Yeah." Xiaoyu nodded lightly, and did not ask much. He closed his eyes in his arms.

Kelly International Hotel.

Jack and Bor are not very good-looking, they can't figure out how they were discovered in advance. Almost, they can catch the target person.

"Jack, what do you do now?" Bor asked.

"I'll call you." Jack, who made a satellite phone, dialed a number.

"Is the mission complete?"

Just turned on, there was a heavy voice on it.

"No, I am afraid I was noticed by him. Is the task still going on?" Jack asked.

"Waste, this little thing can't be done well. The mission continues, no means, if the mission is not completed, you don't have to come back."

After that, I don’t wait for Jack to say anything, the phone hangs up.

chapters.title: Chapter 89: : Attack
chapters.body:
Chapter 89: : Attack

"Mr. Chen, I was very sorry about what happened last night. We have already investigated it. The two thieves who came in from the wall last night, we have sent people to upgrade the security system of the community."

Liu Changshan was in his heart, he did not expect that the person who had an accident last night was actually Chen Mo, the chairman of the marching ant company. This villa, or Zhao Min helped buy it.

Now the marching ant company, but the most promising star enterprise in China, the future is boundless. If Chen Mo is not happy, he will have a lot of trouble.

"I don't want this kind of thing to happen next time." Chen Mo said.

He said so, just to make Xiao Yu feel at ease.

Two foreigners, after disguise, easily sneaked into the community, the security system did not notice, the ordinary thief, it is impossible to have such a big skill.

Xiao Yu is just an ordinary girl. Chen Mo does not want to affect her because of this incident.

"Okay, Mr. Chen, thank you for your understanding. We have already reported the case, the relevant surveillance video has been handed over to the police, and there is no need to bother you. I will notify you when I catch someone." Hear Chen Mo did not pursue it. Liu Changshan’s heart was relieved.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded and turned to look at the little fish next to him: "Go to work."

"it is good."

Xiaoyu smiled a little, didn't say much, followed Chen Mo into the car.

"Chairman, what happened last night?" asked Wang Hai.

"Running in two people, but fortunately installed an early warning system in the villa, no loss, was run by the two people." Chen Mo said.

In his impression, this is the first time Wang Hai has asked him questions.

Along the way, Chen Mo was thinking about the identity of two foreigners last night. Things are definitely not that simple. He wants to see who is behind the scenes.

Just as Chen Mo thought about the matter, the sound of a sudden brake sounded, and Chen Mo and Xiao Yu’s body slammed forward and slammed into the seat of the car.

Everything was too late to prevent, Chen Mogang just returned to God, Xiao Yu has been unconscious.

"what happened?"

Chen Mo swayed and stunned his head, confirming that Xiao Yu was just fainting, and Chen Mo was relieved.

"The other side deliberately rushed, chasing the tail, I am afraid there is trouble." Wang Hai's face is a bit bad, the two men with guns facing him, the body is tight.

After seeing two foreigners, Chen Mo’s face was not very good. It is also a foreigner. It is estimated that they were two people last night.

"They are coming to me," Chen said.

"Get off the bus." Jack went to the window and said coldly.

"Get off the bus first."

Chen Mo calmed down, opened the door and walked slowly. The other side has a gun, obviously prepared, his car is not specially made, can not stop the bullet. Wang Hai nodded slightly, untied the seat belt, slowly opened the door, and just went out, Jack was used to hold his head with a gun.

"Jack, I said that my method is useful? It is this kid! Take him away first, and I want everything." Bor took photos, revealing that Sensen was staring at Chen Mo.

"It's useful, but then we will have..."

boom!

Still not waiting for Jack's words, Wang Hai suddenly started to shoot Jack's gun on his head and kicked Jack's arm.

Jack changed his face and hurriedly bent his knees to block the foot kicked by Wang Hai. Just blocked, Wang Hai swept his leg in a flash and swept the gun in Jack's hand. Wang Hai, who took the initiative, did not hesitate, rushed up and punched Jack's nose. This kind of recruiting fatal posture, obviously not ordinary people, Jack sees the situation is not good, hurriedly back a few steps, open the distance.

"Damn."

Everything was between the electric and the flint, and neither of them thought that Wang Hai would suddenly start. Bor saw Jack's gun being swept away, lifting his gun and pointing at Wang Hai.

boom!

As soon as he moved, he only felt a pain in his wrist, and the gun in his hand came out. When the gun had not fallen to the ground, Bor felt a huge force coming from the abdomen, and the pain swept the whole body, letting him fly out.

"Chairman." Wang Hai turned and looked at Chen Mo, with amazement in his eyes.

"This is handed over to me, you are responsible for solving that." Chen Mo blacked his face and leaned over, picking up the gun on the ground at Bohr.

"Hell, it hurts more than being smacked." Boer rubbed his blood at the corner of his mouth and stood up. Nearly two tall, cold and overlooking overlooking Chen Mo: "The kid, you must have never used a gun, the insurance did not open."

Still waiting for Chen Mo’s reaction, a punch greeted Chen Mo’s face.

Chen Mo tried to pull the trigger and had no effect. He hurriedly avoided Boer’s fist and bent his elbow before Boer’s belly hit.

These are the fighting skills when developing human potential. After the development of the human body's potential, he did not really move his hand, but now it seems that he is not allowed. At the beginning of the old age, if you do not have the ability to protect yourself, no amount of wealth is useless.

"Hell."

Bor did not expect Chen Mo's reaction to be so fast. Although it is still a bit rusty, it is definitely a master of fighting.

On the other hand, Jack's face is gloomy. Wang Hai’s attack was too scary and met many opponents, but he had never seen such awkwardness.

Recruitment is the deadliest place in the human body. Eyes, head, neck, heart, waist and armpits, every attack, made Jack frightened. As long as it is solid, it is not dead or seriously injured.

He did not expect that Chen Mo’s driver was so terrible. Is it true that everyone in China will work hard?

Jack saw Chen Mo, who was playing against Bor, and suffered in his heart.

Realizing his distraction, Jack's face changed, his abdomen came from a painful pain, his body flew out uncontrollably, slammed into the ground, spit out a blood, looked at Wang Hai with his belly, and looked unwilling.

Wang Hai walked slowly and looked at Jack with a blank expression. He lifted his foot and kicked it toward his head.

Solving Jack, Wang Hai turned his face and looked at Chen Mo and Boer. He slowly walked over and picked up the gun on the ground.

"It’s a ghost country."

Bor is now playing against Chen Mo, and his mood is getting worse. As time went by, he found that Chen Mo's movements became more and more skilled, and his strength was a bit scary.

He really can't think of it. This ordinary young man seems to have such a terrible power.

Suddenly, when I saw the stunned little fish in the car, Bor’s eyes slammed and rushed toward the door!

Chen Mo’s face changed and he hurriedly chased him up.

what!

Not waiting for Boer to get close to the door, the pain from the calf made him fall to the ground. Chen Mo also grasped this opportunity, sweeping his legs and sweeping over Bo's head.

The next moment, Bor is soft on the ground, unconscious. Wang Hai took a gun, dragged Jack's foot, and threw the two together and tied them with a belt.

"Thank you." Chen Mo looked at Boar’s gunshot wound with blood on his calf.

"This is my duty." Wang Hai said.

"I go back to see Xiaoyu, you look at them."

Looking at the special police car, Chen Mo sighed. From the beginning of their battle, to the end of the game, it will be five minutes. It’s only five minutes, but it’s been a long time.

"Don't move, let go of the weapon."

When the police car just stopped, he took out the gun and pointed it at the place where Wang Hai was. Wang Hai lost his gun in his hand and raised his hands.

Seeing the special police around, Wang Haicai said: "These two are mercenaries. It is best to see if there is any possession of poison in his mouth."

"Look." The captain, who took the lead, took a deep look at Wang Hai.

"Not found." After a while, the two special police officers stood up and said.

"Take the person back first and block the scene."

chapters.title: Chapter 90: :Origin
chapters.body:
Chapter 90: :Origin

Chen Mo sat in a room and looked at the water in front of his eyes.

He was thinking, who would let people deal with him. He is glad that if he didn't hide last night, he doesn't know what to end now. He does not think that he can deal with two mercenaries with guns at the same time.

Today is also to blame them for not paying attention, knocking out the gun in their hands before they can escape. Until now, he did not know the true identity of the two people.

When Chen Mo thought about the problem, two men and one woman came in with plain clothes and sat down opposite him.

Pan Long and Gan Xiaorong looked at Chen Mo. They also know today that the chairman of the marching ant company is so young and is a student at Binhai University.

If there is no Chen Mo's information, they will never believe it.

"Mr. Chen, this may be a bit of a hassle. We need your cooperation. I hope to tell you what you know." Gan Xiaorong took the lead.

"You said," Chen Mo said.

“Who have you recently offended? Or, who did you trade with?” Pan Long said.

"I can't talk about offending people. I rarely communicate. There are a lot of company transactions. If you have to count this, you can go to our company and ask Zhao Min. I am not involved in the management of corporate affairs." Chen Mo said.

"Do you know these two people?" Pan Long put two photos on the table and stared at Chen Mo's eyes.

"They are the two people who attacked me." Chen Mo said lightly.

"I said that before this, as far as I know, they seemed to enter your community last night."

"Two people actually entered my villa last night. My villa was equipped with an early warning system, found in advance, hid, did not see their appearance, and finally the security of the community did not catch them. This morning, the community told me that it was Two little thieves, I didn't care, there was a problem?" Chen Mo said.

"I am just wondering, Mr. Chen is so good, how can he be afraid of two little thieves, do you know someone is going to deal with you, or do you have anything to do with us? I hope that you know everything, or our investigation will be troublesome. It is also related to your safety." Gan Xiaorong interjected.

"It’s good because I have practiced Sanda for a few months. Someone sneaked into my villa. The first thing I want to consider is the safety of my girlfriend. My thief told them to steal, but I don’t know how much money, but I don’t know them. The identity is good. It doesn't mean that I can take my risk with my girlfriend."

Both looked at Chen Mo's face, but Chen Mo calmly looked like they couldn't see anything.

"You will tell us about this morning, don't miss the details. After all, please be a little troublesome."

"Today I am going out..."

Chen Mo’s eyes were calm and he told the story of the two people.

"According to what we know, it is very likely that someone is targeting you or your company. In order not to cause unnecessary panic, we announced that it was a fighting incident caused by a car accident, and the participants did not announce it. The nature of this matter, We still need further investigation, and please keep it confidential forever," Pan Long said.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"Thank you for your cooperation. If we have any questions in the past few days, we will contact you directly. Nothing is going on now, you can go." Pan Long collected the recordings and transcripts in his hands.

Chen Mo made a slight greeting and got up and left the room. Just coming out, I saw Zhao Min waiting.

"Chairman, let's go."

"Wang Hai?"

Chen Mo took the things he was detained from the police and looked around.

"He is still interrogating. I have already let the lawyers negotiate. If there is no accident, I will come out soon." Zhao Min said.

Wang Hai shot and wounded people, and things must be a little troublesome. However, the two men attacked with guns. They were all legitimate defenders. They would not have too many problems. Chen Mo thought about it and did not continue to ask.

"How is the situation with small fishing?"

"She is in the hospital now, she is awake, nothing, just a head hit, and rest for two days, now Li Ruoxuan is accompanying her."

"Go to the hospital to see it, Wang Hai's things, you let people follow up, let him come out as soon as possible."

"understood."

Chen Mo walked out of the Public Security Bureau and took the lead in drilling into the car.

"What happened in the end? The police told me that it was a car accident. I felt that things were not that simple." Zhao Min also sat in.

"Let's go out recently, go somewhere, bring some security personnel." Chen Mo said.

"Understood." Zhao Min immediately understood Chen Mo's meaning: "Do you know who it is?"

"I don't know for the time being." Silent said.

About fifteen minutes, the group entered the hospital. Just walking to the ward, Chen Mo saw the plainclothes at the door of the ward.

After seeing two people, Chen Mo went into the ward.

Xiao Yu, who was chatting with Li Ruoxi in the hospital bed, saw Chen Mo coming in and his face showed a relaxed smile.

"I don't bother you with your arrogance, Xiaoyu, if there is anything, give me a call." Li Ruoxuan greeted the two and left the ward.

"Is it okay?"

"The doctor is not a big deal. It will be fine in two days. Fortunately, Zhao said that you are fine. At the police station, you can rest assured."

"Look at tears on your face, crying?" Chen Mo asked.

"Is there?" Xiao Yu hurriedly wiped his face and found that he was fooled. He took a picture of Chen Mo and leaned his eyes on him: "When you wake up, you are not there, scare me."

"There is nothing big, that is, when we meet porcelain, we have a fight with them."

"Fighting? Are you injured?" Xiao Yu hurriedly looked at Chen Mo.

"How could I be injured? Wang Hai is a special soldier and has a very good skill. The result is that they were injured and they went to the police station and reported it."

"You are fine."

"Let's lie down, I'll go buy some food and come back."

Chen Mo was accompanied by a small fisherman in the hospital until he had a small fishing break before he rushed back to the company. Now he can't wait to know the origins of the two people, and who is who wants his life.

If there is no Wang Hai in today, I am afraid they will be in danger. What happens next, he can't imagine.

"Ink girl." As soon as the computer was turned on, Chen Mo spoke.

"Mer brother, the ink girl is here."

"Give me the information of the two people who attacked me today. The more detailed the better."

I sneaked into the villa last night to look for him. This morning, I didn't wait for them to go to the company. I wanted to hijack him halfway. Now he feels like a man on his back. If he doesn't pull out the people behind him, he will not feel at ease.

There are already two facial features, as long as their identity information exists in the online world, the ink girl can know.

The current ink girl, in the online world, is everywhere.

"Okay, please wait a moment,"

After the ink girl finished, she went quietly, and Chen Mo sat in the position and waited quietly. After half a minute, the computer screen popped up with more than a dozen pieces of information.

"Momgo, the information you want is found."

Chen Mo’s spirit was shocked and he focused on the information on the computer screen. Not long after, Chen Mo’s brow was wrinkled.

chapters.title: Chapter 91: : Killing People With A Knife
chapters.body:
Chapter 91: : Killing People With A Knife

Mike Bor, who participated in the second Gulf War, retired two years ago to join Academi, codenamed Chimpanzee...

Smith Jack, a retired member of the Delta Special Forces, joined Academi three years ago, codenamed White Mouse...

Chen Mo looked at the information in front of him with a sullen look. The two men were actually mercenaries of Academi.

Academi, the name, is not familiar to most people. But another name, many people have heard, is the former US Blackwater Company, because of too many scandals, forced to change to Academi.

This private military and security consultant company was born in the United States Military Industry Complex. It is one of the three private security companies that cooperate with the US State Department and is one of the world's arrogant mercenary companies.

Seeing the information on the computer, Chen Mo is not very good. He was targeted by mercenaries, which is definitely not good news.

Mercenaries are generally active in Africa and the Middle East. Where there is war, there is a shadow of these people.

The only belief in these death hackers is money.

In their belief, there is no concept of national interest. As long as they have money, their guns can even be aimed at their own country.

Huaxia was called a mercenary forbidden land. The two men risked their lives to hijack him here. He had to be careful.

It is now necessary to find out who wants to deal with him, or else stare at the eyes in the dark, making him very uncomfortable.

"Ink girl, see who hired them to come to me." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

The ink girl went silent again, but this time, she did not answer him as quickly as she started, and Chen Mo waited.

After a long time, the ink girl opened.

"Momgo, there is no information about your employment in the Academi database."

"Private trading?" Chen Mo brows.

If you have an acquaintance in a mercenary company, you only need to contact the other party, let them find someone to do it privately, skip the middle stage, and they will get more commissions instead of paying part of the commission to the company.

Private action, although not in line with their rules, but for the sake of money, it is normal to take risks.

“But I found information about you in the private mailbox of the Academi employee,” said the ink girl.

"who?"

"Ber, it’s Taylor who sent him the mail."

"Give me their information and email content."

Chen Mo seems to have caught a clue. As long as he follows this touch, he will soon find the person who wants his life.

"Okay, Mom."

As soon as the ink girl finished, the two personal data plus the contents of the mail also appeared on the desktop of the computer.

"Shugel? Look up this Shugel information." Chen Mo said.

When he saw Taylor's message, he determined that he didn't know this person and he had never touched it. But Taylor’s boss, let him notice.

A person who is still working for others, can't do nothing, and find the trouble of someone who doesn't want to do it. Just follow this line and you will be able to find a place to meet. He feels that the truth is getting closer and closer to him.

Luo Shugel, 67, formerly Ceo of Northrop Grumman, now one of the eight directors of Apple...

Apple board members, seeing this information, Chen Mo suddenly understand. The main reason is still at Apple, which may be related to Cook's collision at him. Otherwise, it is impossible to be so clever. After Cook returned to China, someone came here to find him.

The other party wants to move him, maybe it is to see the technology in his hands. It’s just the background of the other party, which makes him a headache. He must not let himself go, otherwise there may be trouble in the future.

"Give me the details of Shugel, preferably in terms of crime and enemies." Chen Mo thought about it.

The other side is in the United States, he can't reach it, he can only kill by knife.

In his current situation, killing people by knife is the best way. He does not believe that this capitalist is in such a high position that the money is clean.

"Momgo, the information you want has already been obtained."

The voice of the ink girl just fell, and a compressed file package appeared on the computer. Chen Mo looked at the contents of the document and the scalp was numb.

All are special information, and privately traded with mercenary companies, taking private weapons, murder, tying, etc. They are all secret documents, video recordings, and recordings.

The people involved, including competitors and mercenary companies, US government officials.

Chen Mo is now 90% sure that Shu Ge is doing it to him.

"Send these documents to the people involved, old rules, fake iP, anonymous."

He is willing to do this by killing people with a knife.

Let the other person idle, he has trouble. Only when he can't find free time, or even have no chance to find trouble, can he be at ease.

"Okay, it has been sent successfully."

"Listen to Berg, Taylor and Shugel, and they have any action against me, let me know." Chen Mo said.

After explaining everything clearly, Chen Mocai went to the lab and continued to assemble the robot.

In the evening, Chen Mo went to the hospital and took the small fish back to the villa to cultivate.

The other side of the ocean.

Carolina, inside a luxury manor.

A blonde man with a flat head and a hooked nose sits in the study room with eyes on the computer screen. Those who have seen him must know his identity.

Prince, former Blackwater Company, was created by him. He is currently the president of Academi and is a Navy SEAL.

At this point, his face is not very good, like a lion with a hairy fire.

When I got up this morning, I just opened the mailbox and I got an email on the mailbox. Just opened, I saw so many things.

This is all about Shugel’s criminal information, including smuggling weapons and evidence of murder.

What makes him feel bad, there are a few things that he is involved in. It was just a while ago that the company’s former employees testified that he was involved in smuggling weapons and murder.

Now all the evidence is found out and sent to his mailbox.

He was grateful to see this information, and most of it was directed at Shugel, and there are many other things.

Someone wants to borrow his hand and deal with Shugel. Thinking of this, his face is hard to look at.

This feeling of being used is very uncomfortable, but he still has to do so. There are still a few members of this, and if Shugel has an accident, he may suffer.

This is definitely not a good news.

"Damn."

Prince took the mouse in his hand to the computer screen, took a deep breath, sorted out the emotions, and took out the phone to dial the number of Shugel.

"Luo, I think we need to talk." When he got through the phone, Prince said with a black face.

"Don't talk, Randy just gave me a call."

At the end of the phone, Shu Ge stared at the computer screen. The above information makes him full of fear.

What will happen next?

This is the only thing he wants to know. As for where the evidence came from, why was it leaked, he no longer considered it.

"He knows too? What are you going to do now?" Prince's face was even more ugly.

"What do you say about me? Randy said that the federal agents are already on the way to me." Shugel did not have a trace of spirit at this time, as if he had been ten years old. The face that was already full of wrinkles became denser.

"You understand, think about your family." There was a cold voice on the phone: "Some things, you know better than me."

"I know, please let go of my family." Shugel's voice did not bring a trace of anger.

After hanging up the phone, Shugel stayed at the delicate pistol on the table, the old hand was shaking, and finally he twitched and picked it up.

boom!

A gunshot, awakening the morning of this luxury manor.

chapters.title: Chapter 92: :Robot
chapters.body:
Chapter 92: :Robot

In the villa, Chen Mo sat on the sofa and looked at the book. During this time, he read books when he was free, and he plans to read 1000 copies before graduation. This is not a way to drag.

Just when he was fascinated, the phone suddenly rang.

"Mer brother, there is a message." Just turned on, and the voice of the ink girl was heard.

"what news?"

"Shugel committed suicide," said the ink girl.

"Suicide? So fast."

Chen Mo was slightly surprised. Choosing suicide made him unexpected, but he thought nothing. Those things are too sensitive. If Shugel doesn't end up on his own, there will definitely be someone who has a knot because there are many people involved.

Shugel committed suicide, and his purpose of killing people by knife has been reached, and his heart is relieved. The person staring at him behind him is already finished, and then he can do his own thing with peace of mind.

But he is not happy, capital, this stuff, too much hidden darkness that is unknown. This kind of thing, the more trouble you get into it.

After hanging up the phone, Xiaoyu walked out of the bathroom and sat down next to Chen Mo, watching TV quietly.

"You have to rest at home for two days, you don't have to go to work." Chen Mo put his mobile phone and helped Xiao Yu gently lick his neck.

"There are still many things in the company!" said Xiao Yu.

"Zhao Min will handle it, you stay at home. Now your neck is stiff, just like a long-necked goose, waiting for your neck to go to work."

"You are a long-necked goose." Chen Mo described it as such, Xiao Yu said with no anger: "I still have to go to work tomorrow."

"When you go to work, I will deduct your salary." Chen Mo said, he laughed.

"Do you dare to deduct my salary?" Xiao Yu snorted: "I will deduct your food."

"Learn to talk back?" Chen Mo was happy, and touched the hair of Xiao Yu: "Still at home, hehe."

"You..." Xiaoyu didn't know how to answer Chen Mo. I don't know why. Chen Mo's touch of her head can't refuse: "Well, I can't do it at home!"

Nothing in the night.

"Apple Board member Shugel committed suicide"

"The reason behind the suicide of the third major arms dealer Ceo? 》

......

The news of Shugel’s suicide appeared in various news. The various media have been heated up.

As the world's third-largest arms dealer, the former CEO, there is Apple's current board member, his identity influence, it goes without saying.

After the news came out, it was affected, and Northrop Grumman’s share price and Apple’s share price also fell slightly.

Not long after, the evidence of the crime was passed.

For a time, public opinion was in vain. They finally knew that the darkness behind this was obviously a sinful suicide.

Then, the federal agents investigated a politician, and a member of the parliament involved in the crime continued to spread.

Because of the existence of the evidence, everyone chose to silence, and the network stirred up a heated discussion.
