"It's shocking. There are still a lot of dark corners in this world that ordinary people can't touch."

"Awful, the **** limits my horizons, and life is better than TV shows."

"This is just the tip of the iceberg. We can only see the tip of the iceberg. What will it be inside? You can't imagine it."

......

There is a lot of turmoil on the Internet, and there are also a lot of shocks in the federal government. Especially the military personnel who are better with Shugel are also worried, for fear that things will spread to them.

The scandal has spread and become a global topic. Things have been raging, but all this has nothing to do with Chen Mo.

Chen Mo's work is just to concentrate on assembling robots.

It’s been half a month since the last incident. A lot of things, whether on the plain or in the dark, have nothing to do with him.

He does not care about him. He is the initiator, completely like an outsider. Every day he comes to the company, he assembles robots and then reads books.

This time has worked so hard, and now the assembly of the robot is finally coming to an end.

Twist the last screw into the screw hole, Chen Mo lost the screwdriver in his hand, and touched his chin and looked at the robot lying on the bench.

Nowadays, there is no painting, and the robot is still the natural color of carbon aluminum alloy and plastic.

This robot cost him a lot of work.

There are three large carbon-based batteries in its body, in the two thighs and abdomen. Fortunately, the density of carbon crystals is not large, and all of them have little effect on the weight of the robot.

Free movement and calculation of the control system of the microcomputer, this is the most power-consuming place. In order for it to last longer, three large batteries are required.

At each joint, a small servo motor and stepper motor are used as the drive unit, and the pedals are also equipped with hydraulic damping devices.

This can more closely simulate human upright walking.

The way the two legs walk is very unstable, so the robot wants to walk upright and must balance the device. The built-in balancing system inside this robot is now a set of gyroscopes.

The control system is decentralized control.

Use multiple microcomputers to control the robot, the head of the microcomputer, responsible for system management, communication and kinematic calculations, and the transmission of instructions. At each joint, there is a corresponding CPu for control and interpolation operations. This kind of control can reduce the burden on the main microcomputer.

The final sensors, including laser sensors, thermal sensors, acoustic sensors, fluid sensors, etc., act as sensory organs for robots.

There are so many things up and down, Chen Mo does not know how long this robot with battery can run.

Try to start.

When Chen Mo turned on the power, the laser sensor in the middle of the robot's pupil and chest was illuminated.

can! Chen Mosong breathed a sigh of relief.

"Ink girl, can you connect it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes." The inky voice of the ink girl sounded.

"You control it now and try it out. You don't want to run it in the machine. It can't support your operation. You send the command to it and let it move according to the command, so you can control it." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

When the voice of the ink girl fell, the robot on the experimental table sat up.

After the robot sat up, Chen Mo glanced at the computer and checked whether its parameters were normal. This is the design drawing obtained in the technology library, and there should be no big problems.

"Now go down the ground."

Kaka... Hey!

The robot that just stood on the ground suddenly lost balance and fell straight to the ground.

"There is a problem with the balance system?" Chen Mozhen checked down.

"Merg brother, it is not a problem of balancing the system. It is the specific data that I don't have the human body to walk upright. I can't judge the way and the strength of walking." The ink girl said.

“What is the solution?” Chen Mo asked.

"Testing the movement data of a person walking, I imitate his way of walking." said the ink girl.

"It seems that we can test tomorrow, it should be no hurry."

Chen Mo turned off the power of the robot, hugged it back to the test bench and covered it with gauze, and dialed Zhao Min’s phone.

"What, chairman?"

"You are looking for two treadmills to be sent to the lab and will be used tomorrow."

"Okay." Zhao Min agreed to come down without thinking.

chapters.title: Chapter 93: : Human Motion Data Collection
chapters.body:
Chapter 93: : Human Motion Data Collection

The next morning, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu just walked out of the villa door and a car stopped at the door. Wang Hai walked down from inside and opened the door to the two.

After seeing Wang Hai, Chen Mo smiled and said: "Come back."

During this time, Chen Mo has been letting Zhao Min follow up with Wang Hai. Because of the shooting at the time, Wang Hai was subject to investigation anyway.

"They didn't give a reply and were temporarily released on bail." Wang Hai nodded.

"Is it not difficult for you?" Chen Mo asked.

"No." Wang Hai said.

"Get on the bus." Chen Mochao said to Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu is here, he and Wang Hai are not suitable to talk too much. Some things, Xiao Yu knows that the less the better, these things, he will bear enough.

"Wang Hai, when passing the square, stop the car, I buy something." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Wang Hai nodded and his eyes looked at the rearview mirror from time to time.

Not long after, the car stopped outside the commercial plaza, Chen Mozhen Xiaoyu waited in the car, and ran into the square. Ten minutes later, I ran out with a bag.

"Clothes?" Xiao Yu looked at the bag in the hands of Chen Mo with a smile: "Why are you going to buy clothes at this time?"

"Useful." Chen Mo mysteriously said: "Wang Hai, let's go."

Nothing at all.

Outside of his experimental area, Chen Mocai discovered that several employees, with two treadmills, had already waited outside his experimental area.

“Moving the treadmill to the door of the lab.” Chen Mo said to several workers.

Now his lab can't just let people go, especially after a series of things happen. And with robots, these studies can't be known to ordinary employees, so he didn't directly let them move into the lab.

“Yes, chairman.” Several employees left the lab when they put the treadmill at the door of the lab.

After confirming that the treadmill is ok, dial the phone number of Zhao Min.

"Chairman, what?"

"Let your assistant use it." Chen Mo smiled.

"She is your person, still need to borrow from me?" Zhao Min was teased by Chen Mo's words.

"In the company, she is your assistant. If I just ask her to come over, what should I do with her work? I have used her for the past two days." Chen Mo said.

"It seems that you are still public and private, I will inform her to go up." Zhao Min said: "By the way, let her bring two months of financial statements to you."

"Okay," Chen Mo said.

Not long after hanging up the phone, Xiaoyu took a folder and went into Chen Mo's experimental area.

“This is the company’s two-month financial statement.”

"Have you seen it?"

Chen Mo took Xiao Yu into his lab and put the financial statements on the experimental table.

"Look, it seems to be no problem."

"No problem, I don't have to read it. After the company's financial statements, you can help me."

Chen Mo is not afraid of someone on the company's accounts, because there are people in the monitoring of the ink, anyone will be clear, he will be very clear.

"How about that?"

"How can I not? Now come help me a favor."

Chen Mo pushed the small fisherman to the test bench and opened the gauze on the test bench. The robot that was assembled successfully yesterday appeared in front of the small fisherman.

Seeing the robot in front of him, the small fisherman’s mouth was big and stunned.

She knows that Chen Mo is studying robots, but when she came, she was just a skeleton. Now, I have already assembled it.

This robot, like the robot in the movie, just doesn't have the cool paint in the movie.

“This is the robot you finished?” Xiao Yu reached out and touched the body of the robot.

"Semi-finished products, there are still many places to debug, so let me help you."

Chen Mo took care of the start button of the robot, and the sensor of the eyes and chest immediately emitted red light.

"what can I do for you?"

The small fisheye stared at the robot intently, making her heart full of curiosity.

"It doesn't walk, I need data for a person's movement, so let me help you. I'm going to collect your athletic data and put it in it so that it can move freely."

"Okay." After thinking about it, Xiaoyu nodded: "How to try?"

"First put the sports vest on."

Chen Mo handed the clothes he bought this morning to Xiao Yu.

"It turns out that you are buying this this morning."

Xiao Yu took the bag from Chen Mo’s hand and looked at Chen Mo with a strange look. After changing the sports vest, he blushes and walks to Chen Mo’s body.

As soon as he looked up, he saw Chen Mo’s stunned appearance, and the rosy face of Xiao Yu’s face quickly spread to the roots of his ears.

At this time, the small fish, tied with a high ponytail, wearing a sports vest and sports shorts, long straight legs, and a proportion of innocent body, in front of him. If there is a vest line, I am afraid it is perfect.

Youth, vitality, the faint wildness of the temperament is magnified, and there is no such thing as ordinary gentleness and intellectuality.

Every change in the style of a small fish has a different aesthetic. Chen Mo did not know if it was a lover's eyes.

"It's beautiful." Chen Mo touched his chin and admired it.

Seeing Chen Mo with an aggressive look, Xiao Yu’s eyes were ashamed.

"Don't watch, test." Xiao Yu was a little overwhelmed by Chen Mo: "You don't test, I go back to work."

Xiao Yu did not dare to look directly at Chen Mo's gaze, and his heartbeat began to accelerate. The two were intimate, but the last step has not been taken.

"Good, test, go home and see."

Chen Mo showed a relaxed smile, took a small fishing, and took the human exercise test equipment. These instruments are mainly sensors and optical scanners.

Human body movement, composed of more than 200 joints, can perform highly complex movements, and these movements are highly coordinated.

In the aspects of robot design and intelligent control, human motion is a research hotspot.

Chen Mo put the sensor headband on the small fish, and then attached a sensor to her joints to let her stand on the treadmill.

Hold the robot on the bench to another treadmill, and Chen Mo opens the sensor's data connection.

“Now I am ready to collect data.” Chen Mo said: “Are you ready?”

"Okay." Little fish nodded.

"Try now a few steps." After pressing the start button, Chen Mo's eyes are on the computer screen.

As soon as his words fell, Xiao Yu slowly walked up on the treadmill. The data on the computer began to appear and stretched.

"Stop." Chen Mo called Xiao Yu and looked at the computer screen: "I will send the data you walked to the robot and try it."

After the data is sent, the robot not far from the small fishermen begins to walk. Chen Mo carefully observed around the robot. The distance of the pace is similar to that of a small fisherman, but the movement is mechanical, the limbs are only rigid, and there is no real coordination.

Relatively speaking, it is much better, because this is only the beginning, and it is already very good to have such results.

"Small fish, you continue to move, I will synchronize your data to the robot." Chen Mo walked back to the computer and switched to sync data.

At the moment when Xiaoyu walked, on another treadmill, the robot followed. Even the movements of the heads are the same, and I can see that Xiao Yu’s face is amazed.

"Accelerate the pace." Chen Mo said watching the movement of the robot.

The robot rotates a set of gyroscopes, which can automatically adjust the balance. In addition, the ink girl can automatically learn to adjust and constantly coordinate the movements of the body. Soon the robot's limbs begin to naturally grow and the movements are smooth.

"Continue to accelerate and run slowly." Chen Mo stared at the ever-expanding data on the computer screen.

When he heard Chen Mo’s words, Xiao Yu also speeded up and jogged on the treadmill.

Compared to letting the ink girl simulate walking, using human motion data to imitate, this method can make the robot's movements more coordinated and closer to humans.

Thirty minutes later, Xiao Yu was tired and stopped, looking at Chen Mo breathlessly.

"Let's take a break." Chen Mo helped Xiao Yu to dry the sweat, handed the water to her, and then put his eyes on the robot: "The preliminary exercise data has been collected successfully, you take a break to see your hard work today. ""

chapters.title: Chapter 94: :Test
chapters.body:
Chapter 94: :Test

Xiao Yu is now curious about this robot she has tested for a morning. This is the first time she has been so close to this high-tech that she used to watch it in the movies.

“What can it do?” Xiao Yu couldn’t help but ask the biggest question in his heart.

"It? What the average person can do, it can do. As long as all the data is tested, it is my robot assistant." Chen Mo said.

"You studied this robot just to make it your assistant?"

"This is just one of the reasons. My lab, not everyone can come in. Only the most trusted person can enter, or I will go to a female secretary." Chen Mo laughed.

When he studies, he must be assisted by the ink girl, and the speed of research is going to be many times faster. If you find an assistant, many things will be exposed, so he does not have this idea for the time being, and the smart robot acts.

Ink is the best candidate for this role, so he will think of the robot assistant.

"Then you look for it." Xiao Yu flatned his mouth and his tone was sour.

"I smelled the smell of vinegar. Is my family jealous? Is it sour!" Chen Mo said.

"Who is jealous." Xiao Yu seems to be punctuated and his face is reddish.

"Okay, don't tease you. There are too many things in the lab, and many of them are in a state of confidentiality. Other assistants, I don't trust. You can't help me in the lab, technical research. So I want a Robot assistant. What ordinary people can do, it can be competent, but also help me experiment." Chen Mo laughed.

"Is it so powerful?" Xiao Yu said with surprise.

Then, reaching out and touching the robot, it was still cold carbon aluminum, without any temperature: "What is its name?"

"It's called the ink girl, the ink of the cuttlefish. I changed my name, I took a homonym."

This is the first time Chen Mo introduced the existence of the ink girl.

This robot is the first carrier of the ink girl, but it is not a carrier in the true sense. It can only be regarded as a foreign tool.

Because it can only accept the instructions of the ink girl, can not run the ink girl's program, but it is also one of the ink girl's avatar.

"Ink girl? Very nice name."

"Ink girl, and Xiao Yu say hello." Chen Mo said.

"Little fisher sister, hello, I am a ink girl." Chen Mo's words fell, it sounded the voice of the ink girl.

"Hello." Xiaoyu was slightly surprised and also said hello to the robot.

Xiao Yu did not think about the artificial intelligence that controls the world in the movie. She thought of an upgraded version of the intelligent assistant, and she is also familiar with the intelligent assistant.

"Little sister, you are so beautiful, no wonder that my brother likes you so much."

When I heard the ink girl say this, Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo with a strange look, with a smile on his face.

"I didn't teach her, it learned by myself." Chen Mo couldn't laugh: "The ink girl is very smart and can learn by herself, but the ink girl is right, you are beautiful, both inner beauty and outer beauty."

"Do you have such a compliment?" Xiao Yu blame, my heart is sweet.

"Mergo is so numb!"

"Ha ha ha ha..."

When the ink girl’s words were just finished, Xiao Yu smiled and blossomed.

She was numb by a robot, she was the first to hear. She suspects that this ink girl is not alone, it is really too smart.

Chen Mo also touched his nose and talked about small love words. The result was artificial swords. He was the first person since ancient times.

"Do you still know how to numb?"

"I don't know the feeling of numbness, but I know that if you are heard in this way, you will describe it with meat."

After hearing their conversation, Xiaoyu laughed again. The smart assistant's chat is very flexible, but she found that the ink girl chats more like a person, rather than chatting with the machine.

"I now doubt if you have been transferred to the belly black mode." Chen Mo could not laugh.

“Is there a mode choice?” asked Xiao Yu.

"Yes, when I studied the ink girl, I got the inspiration from the silly girl of the magic mobile phone. She was able to switch the personality mode. Now the ink girl is a well-behaved personality model, and there are other personality models, but I have not tried it." Said.

Since the creation of the ink girl, it has been keeping a well-behaved model.

"Okay, don't make trouble, you can test it. Really black, it is estimated that she will reveal you old." Xiao Yu smiled.

"Well, don't gossip. Ink, start testing now and take a few steps."

Chen Mo put his attention back on the robot and began to test its performance. Now the performance of the ink girl is the focus of his work.

His voice just fell and the robot moved.

"Go and fill the water on the table with water." Chen Mo took the water from the small fisherman and handed it to the robot.

"Give me the cup."

......

A series of instructions, let Chen Mo constantly test the performance of the robot. These instructions, ink women know, but when implemented, to be just right, you need to continue to practice learning and adjustment.

Xiao Yu looked at this scene with amazement. This kind of picture was only seen in future science fiction movies. I didn't expect it to happen before her eyes.

It’s all too shocking, this robot is exactly like a human. If you send this video to the network, I am afraid it will set off another craze.

Xiao Yu sat on the side and quietly looked at Chen Mo’s back. She suddenly realized that the future is so close to her.

Chen Mo focused on the testing of the machine.

Now that the robot has just been completed, a lot of things need to be adjusted. Fortunately, the ink girl can imitate learning, and then automatically adjust, so adapt quickly.

And he has to give it a try, how long the robot can work while constantly working.

Two hours later, the active robot suddenly stopped working in his hand, slowly walked to the side of the charger and grabbed the charging head into the connector.

"So fast, no electricity?"

"Yes, the battery's power can only be maintained for three hours without interruption of movement and pick-up instructions." said the ink girl.

“How long can it be fully charged?”

"Half hour."

“It seems that two robots need to work in turn, or change to a larger capacity battery.”

Robot, Iron Man The Ark Reactor is the best energy source, but that technology is not possible in a short time. In the future, a higher level of authority in the technology library will be available to acquire similar technologies.

Chen Mo thought about it and decided to use the first method.

Larger capacity batteries, it takes a lot of effort to get it, and it lasts for several hours. It doesn't make much sense for the assistant robots that are in the lab for a long time.

Two robots take turns, and if necessary, two together, one more helper, obviously better. After thinking about the countermeasures, Chen Mo dialed Zhao Min’s phone.

Zhao Min was looking at the invitation in his hand. Suddenly, the landline rang, and after seeing the call, Zhao Min laughed. Breaking through the iron shoes...

"Chairman, what?"

"You come up."

"Okay." Zhao Min did not even think about it and promised to leave with the invitation letter in his hand.

chapters.title: Chapter 95: : Charity Night
chapters.body:
Chapter 95: : Charity Night

Zhao Min was staring at the robot that was pouring water on her face, with an incredible face. She did not enter Chen Mo's lab, nor did she know what was being studied. Usually, according to Chen Mo’s request, he arranged some things for him.

Now when I first came to Chen Mo’s office, Chen Mo called out such a robot. The robot in the sci-fi movie appeared in front of her eyes.

She wondered if it was crossed, and now her mind is a little bit too sharp.

"This is the little toy you said?" Zhao Min took the water cup that the robot handed over and looked surprised.

"It's a small toy, it was completed yesterday. It will just walk today. Let the small fish come up in the morning, it is the future collection of human exercise data." Chen Mo said.

"Your toy is really strange, is the technology mature?" Zhao Min looked at the robot with amazement.

"Not mature, it is still in the data testing phase." Chen Mo said: "It is now my lab assistant, robot assistant."

“After the technology is mature, how much is the estimated cost?”

"It's not easy to estimate, but from the beginning of research, it is not a smart core. It costs 20 million. The most important thing is to spend a lot of brain cells. If mass production, the cost will be about 1 million." Chen Mo said.

“Is there any interest in getting it listed?” said Zhao Min.

"The technology is not mature. Its accessories and parameters have no specific data. The service life is unknown. If it is just sold out, there is a problem. It is not a signboard."

"Well, the technology is mature, tell me when I am ready to go public. If the cost is really only 1 million, I will make you the richest man in the world." Zhao Min looked at the robot and thought about it: "But you are becoming the richest man." ”

"What do you mean?" Chen Mo said.

"Now the company's market value, I can not be valued, but at present your value, squeeze into the top ten of the domestic wealth list is no problem." Zhao Min said: "You will be able to climb to the top soon."

"How do you say that?" Chen Mo said.

He doesn't have any idea about money now. He only knows that there is a lot of money, and he hasn't seen it. With a technology library, money has become meaningless.

"After two days, I will go to Europe and talk to European telecom operators to let the butterfly eye enter the international market. The butterfly eye enters the international market, the money is faster than the printing machine. Because I want to go out, so there is I want you to do it for you."

"What is it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Heisa Charity Night."

Zhao Min put the invitation letter in front of Chen Mo.

"This year's party is just held in Binhai. Our company is a big company in Binhai. It is also invited. At that time, many domestic business people, stars and other elites will be present. I will go to Europe, can't go, Only you can go."

"I am not good at communication, I am estimated to go there, but also sitting in the corner to eat." Chen Mo said.

This kind of charity party is a platform for some people to improve their resources. In a circle, networking resources are important, especially in the business world.

Many people don't donate money and go to charity evenings. They just don't want to let go of such an opportunity to expand their network.

When the army ants company was first established, it was also based on the connections of Zhao Min.

However, Chen Mo did not want to be intrigued, so the company's affairs were handled by Zhao Min.

"The science man doesn't like the excuse of communication. He said that he is not good at it. I used to go to various entertainments. Your chairman, you should also make a debut. You can't do it behind closed doors. The weight of your chairman's speech is heavier than me. And this is to do charity, to enhance the company's reputation and image." Zhao Min said.

"I really want me to go?" Chen Mo said.

"You can't promise it." Zhao Min said, "I am going to find a small fisherman, let her take her boyfriend in the past and represent the company."

Chen Mo was teased by Zhao Min and understood the curve to save the country. Let Xiaoyu come to him, he really doesn't know how to refuse.

"Well, I will go." Chen Mo said.

“After a week of charity evenings, I went to let people give you custom dresses.”

"Do you know my size?"

"Xiaoyu knows." Zhao Min finished, stood up from the position, and specially looked at the robot in the corner: "If the robot wants to go public, let me know in advance."

"it is good."

For entertainment, Chen Mo does not like it. But since it is charity, he does not mind participating.

Poor is the only one, and the best is the world. This is not just an empty talk, but the method of charity should be appropriate, not blindly to help.

Although some charity scandals have made some people less convinced of charity, they cannot be ruined. On the night of Haisha Charity, he heard that donating is a real thing, instead of giving money to a charity, such charity is more practical.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo put the invitation letter of the charity party aside and continued to read the book.

The night before the start of the charity night.

When Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were watching the movie on the sofa, the door bells remembered. As soon as he opened the door, Wang Hai walked in with two boxes.

"Chairman, this is the dress that Mr. Zhao asked me to send, tomorrow evening party."

After Wang Hai put the dress on the table, he turned and left.

Chen Mo opened the box and handed the dress to Xiao Yu: "This is yours, try it. If you don't fit, you can change it now."

"My?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo.

"You don't know? I thought Zhao Min told you, so I haven't told you that. Tonight, Haisha Charity Night, you accompany me to participate."

"Zhao Jie just said that you are going to the party, didn't say I went."

"I want to go, don't want a female companion? If you want your boyfriend to find other female companions in the past, I don't mind." Chen Mo laughed.

"you dare?"

Xiao Yu snorted and walked into the room with a dress.

It didn't take long for Xiao Yu to come out.

When I saw Xiao Yu, Chen Mo looked amazed and appreciated it. He discovered that Xiao Yu is simply a hanger, different clothes, can wear different temperament.

Silk long dress, V-neck just exposed the collarbone, with the silk white, temperament gentle, pure, like a female fairy, let people take a look, can not help but look at the second eye.

The appearance of Xiaoyu is not considered to be a beautiful country, but it is also a beauty level, and the temperament is outstanding.

"Sure enough, people rely on clothes." Chen Mo said with amazement.

"Stupid, is it enough? Seeing enough to help me see if I don't fit." Xiao Yu took the skirt and walked to Chen Mo.

"The clothes are very suitable, but I feel that I owe something." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

"What are you owing?" asked Xiao Yu.

"High heels." Chen Mo woke up, went to the shoe cabinet, looked for it, and then came back: "I found that you do not have high heels, to change the dress, I will accompany you out to buy a few pairs of high heels."

"Don't you?" said Xiao Yu.

"Little fisher classmate, I found that you are very close to me. You are my girlfriend now, if you don't change it, then I will help you change it." Chen Mo said nothing, hug Xiaoyu and walked into the room. .

"Ah, let me down, I will change it myself."

"late."

......

Ten minutes later, Xiao Yu came out behind Chen Mo, his face was ruddy and his eyes were like water.

"Bad bad."

"This is broken? Calculate the time, I will be able to dry up you soon." Chen Mo's face with a faint smile.

"Stupid." Xiao Yu said not angry.

......

The two mixed their mouths and left the villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 96: : Banquet
chapters.body:
Chapter 96: : Banquet

Haisha Charity Night, initiated by well-known actor stars during the SARS epidemic, raised funds to support the fight against SARS, and has continued to this day.

Originally a star event, the audience was the main actor star in China. In addition, they are the bosses of well-known domestic companies, directors and some people with identity.

This time, the charity dinner was held in Binhai City. The marching ant company is the brightest technology star in China, and its headquarters is in Binhai. Therefore, it is inevitable to invite people who are marching ants.

This is the first time that the marching ant company has participated in charity. Zhao Min originally attached great importance and wanted to come in person, but this time he went to Europe and prepared to let the marching ant company enter the international arena. He had to let Chen Mo, the chairman.

Eight o'clock.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu appeared outside the banquet hall, surrounded by various luxury cars, almost a large luxury car show.

Xiao Yu saw the scene outside the window and immediately became nervous.

This is the first time she has participated in such a large banquet. It is the elite of society who participates in this kind of banquet. No matter how she counts, she is just a Cinderella, just a prince.

The melodious music in the car did not let Xiao Yu have the slightest relaxation, but instead grasped Chen Mo’s palm.

"Nervous?" Chen Mo asked.

"One point." Little fish nodded.

"To be honest, I have not participated in such a banquet." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's hand and gave her peace of mind.

When I felt the temperature of Chen Mo’s palm, Xiao Yu’s heart was only slightly relaxed. It seems that as long as Chen Mo is in the sky, it’s fine.

After the car stopped outside the venue, Xiao Yu took Chen Mo’s hand and walked slowly inside.

Just arrived at the door of the banquet, the two were stopped by the staff of the welcoming guests: "Excuse me?"

"We are representatives of the marching ant company." Chen Mo said lightly.

"Oh? Ms. Zhao Min did not come?" asked a staff member who was signed by a responsible person next to him.

"She went to Europe." Chen Mo said.

"Oh, then you sign here, please, there will be a second scene later." The staff smiled and said.

After the two left, the staff member picked up the walkie-talkie: "Director, the president of the marching ant company did not arrive, sent two representatives, one is Chen Mo, the other is He Xiaoyu."

"Clear, I will inform the host. The position of the second scene of the marching ant company is also changed. It is not the president. It is a bit inappropriate to sit at that table. The specific location, you can see where it is appropriate, adapt to the situation, will Huayi Group The position of the president changed."

"Ok"

It was not early for Chen Mo and Xiao Yu to arrive, and many people had already entered the game early.

This is an open-air banquet scene. In the venue, you can see people in groups of three and five, surrounded by wine glasses, talking and laughing. A number of security personnel were patrolling off-site, and it is clear that security work is in place.

As soon as he entered the venue, Xiao Yu was tightened by the whole person, and his body was tightly attached to Chen Mo.

"Small fish, don't be nervous, I feel a little nervous, wait for the next two to go out together." Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu sneaked a smile, and he said so much, but relaxed a lot. The laughter of Xiaoyu also made Chen Mo’s heart stretch and nervous, and looked at the people around him indifferently.

"Hey, He is an assistant." A middle-aged man in a suit and a smart man, after seeing a small fisherman, won the wine glass and smiled at the two people: "Is Zhao always not coming?"

"Hello, Mr. Qi, Zhao has gone to Europe, and it will take a few days to come back." Xiaoyu said politely.

"Oh, it’s a pity. I wanted to talk to Mr. Zhao about cooperation today. It seems that next time, Assistant, I will go there and talk to old friends, you are free."

Finished, leaving the wine glass straight away, from the beginning to the end is just a random sweep of Chen Mo.

"Who is he?"

"Qi Ming, the CEO of a company, the company is not big. I have seen it when I signed the contract with Mr. Zhao and those channels. The cleverness of the company makes me remember."

"Small fish, I found that you have learned bad." Chen Mo smiled.

"Where?"

Xiao Yu also smiled softly, and the tension was just dissipated, leaving Chen Mo’s arm to leave. Just because the small fisherman's temperament is pure, gentle and generous, attracting a lot of attention.

Those who know Xiaoyu know that Xiaoyu is Zhao Min’s assistant.

Now the marching ant company is a well-known domestic company, the company most likely to break the deadlock of domestic Internet companies. Zhao Min is at home and is now one of the business giants.

Today, many sons and sons came specifically for Zhao Min. After all, winning Zhao Min means that their family business and their future have unlimited future.

Zhao Min did not come, so many people were disappointed.

People who know Xiaoyu are just saying hello and chatting with other people. Zhao Min is not there, and they are not likely to talk to an assistant.

As for Chen Mo, no one knows.

"Chen Mo, how do you feel about this party?" In a circle, Xiao Yu asked Chen Mo's hand.

"If you don't come with me, I guess I will be bored."

Chen Mo gave an evaluation that he considered to be pertinent.

For him, these people are strangers. He is not good at communication on this occasion, and in this respect he is a blank. He also doesn't like to take the initiative to talk to others.

The people who entered this venue were all elites of all walks of life. When they talked for a lot of time, they didn’t like it.

If he can, he would rather stay in the lab.

"Go and sit down," said Xiao Yu.

"can."

Chen Mo took a small fishing and walked to a corner where no one was. Just sitting down, Chen Mo picked up a glass of juice and drank it.

These juices are all selected from the best and freshest fruits, and the cups go down to top the average person's salary.

It is a charity party, and it is often more like a communication platform.

However, Chen Mo does not care about this. Anyway, the sponsors donate money, not from the charity money. They donate money and they don't spend it in this place.

"Can I play a game with my mobile phone?" Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu laughed and played games at this banquet, it was a clear stream.

"You play, I see you play."

"okay."

Chen Mo took out his mobile phone and opened the game. Usually only play when you are relaxed, now it’s boring.

Just as Chen Mo was immersed in the game, a sweet voice would be their intention.

"Is there anyone in this position?"

When they looked up, they saw a beautiful figure. A handsome girl, surprised to see Chen Mo playing the game. Playing games in this place, she was the first to see.

"no one."

Xiao Yu looked up and looked at the girl in surprise: "You are Gao Wenwen?"

"Who is Gao Wenwen?" Chen Mo put down his mobile phone and glanced at the girl.

"A popular star, shortly after debut, relied on a TV series to be the most popular actor. The legend is that he refused the unspoken rules of a powerful person in the entertainment industry and was banned. Talented, but no director dared to use, signed The endorsement advertisement was also retired." The small fishing rod was in Chen Mo's ear and lighted his lips.

"Hello there."

"Uncle Yao, hello." Not waiting for Chen Mo to speak, Xiao Yu was the first to call.

"Miss He is next to Zhao Min, and she has a lot of changes. I remember seeing Miss He for the first time, or a little girl who is alive and well. Chen Mo brothers can have a girl like Miss, it should be the last life to save the world." Yao Yi haha smiled Nod to the small fishing point.

"It was my life to save the world." Xiao Yu smiled and leaned toward Chen Mo, leaning against Chen Mo's hand.

"We have saved the world together in the last two years." Chen Mo said. When the words came out, all three people laughed.

"Zhao Min did not come?" Yao Yi asked.

"You are all young and promising young people in Binhai City. The marching ant company is bigger and stronger. Later, it may become a signboard of the coastal city. After the emergence of a large enterprise like Huawei in Binhai, I said Going out and having a face."

The three people talked and laughed, and their manners and behaviors were very casual. People from all walks of life who were concerned about this corner had a huge doubt.

The business circle is more sensitive than the entertainment circle. A sentence or a small movement falls into the eyes of some people and is a lot of information. From the look and manners of Chen Mo, they can't see the market, only calm and unhapped. Many of them can't do this.

Yao Yi is the leader of Binhai City and is known for his strictness. But now, from the face of Yao Yi, they can't see the serious appearance, but they are talking to old friends.

Just for their active talks, they ignored it. I didn’t expect Yao Yi to take the initiative to talk to two young people.

Although the two seem to be beautiful, but at this banquet, the beauty of the handsome men is that they do not think that the ordinary young people can let Yao Yi take the initiative to communicate.

"Qi, who are the two? It seems to know Yao Shuji." Qi Ming, a man in a suit and a suit asked.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu strolled around and found another corner of no one to sit down and waited for the official start of the party. Not long after, the voice of the promoter Su Guo was heard at the banquet.

According to Zhao Min's position in the domestic business community, the seats should be arranged at the best table, sitting with the presidential directors of the big companies. Zhao Min did not come. If you sent you over, it should be that the seat was replaced. Said the man.

A good seat means a high status, which is an invisible face problem.

"Do you want me to talk to people?"

Seeing Chen Mo did not care, Xiao Yu did not say much, just sitting quietly beside him. Not long after, there was a commotion in the seat. Yao Yi appeared on the table where Chen Mo was on the whisper of everyone.

"Chen Mo Xiao brother, let me find a good bitter." Yao Yi looked at Chen Mo and smiled: "I also specifically asked the waiters, only to know that you are here, how can you sit behind this?"

Those who know Yao Yi have already spread the identity of Yao Yi in a whispered argument. The head of Binhai City came here personally. Many people's eyes were on Chen Mo, curious about his identity.

"100,000 welcome." Chen Mo smiled.

"This kind of banquet is boring, I just want to find someone to chat. Other people chat with me, they are flattering, very boring."

"It's really boring, but I have a girlfriend to accompany me." Chen Mo smiled: "Yao Shuji knows that there will be such a result, come over?"

"To do something good, but donate money or something, I can't donate too much. I am here to raise prices. You business people are the protagonists tonight."

"Yao Shuji, feelings, are you staring at me tonight?" Chen Mo smiled.

"That is."

Yao Yi smiled heartily, and others looked at it in an incredible way. The top leader of the coastal city, laughing so open, this is unprecedented.

Countless people are guessing the identity of Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, but they all know that Xiao Yu is an assistant to Zhao Min, but he knows nothing about Chen Mo.

There was another commotion in the crowd, and everyone who saw the words had a big mouth.

The people I saw, there were countless kinds of thoughts inside, I wish I could sit on that table and chat with Dong Zhu and Yao Yi on the same table.

"Yao Shuji, you are here, are you looking for this guy? Can you introduce me to me?" Dong Zhu looked at Chen Mo and Xiao Yu and nodded slightly.

"Ms. Dong, let me introduce it." Yao Yi looked at the people who listened to his ears and smiled. He said in Dong Zhu's ear: "He is the chairman of the marching ant company, Chen Mo."

hiss? Rao is seeing the world in Dong Zhu. When he heard this introduction, he took a breath.

In just half a year, the marching ant company has become the most famous new enterprise in China. This kind of development momentum cannot be imagined by others. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu followed Yao Yi and Dong Zhu and left, leaving a huge question mark on the minds of the people around them.

What is this big man?

“Su total, I found out. The donation list for the 16th table includes four teams of the army ant company, four teams of Chen Mo, two Ms. Dong Zhu, one of the Runhua Group, and Chen Mo is the representative of the marching ant company.”

The last sentence from the mobile phone, like a blue sky, hit the head of Suguo.

The marching ant company donated eight teams, the first person who did not have a marching ant company, but reported the president of Huayi to the south. Even if you don't give a reward, the name is not reported, this is already a sinner.

"You immediately contact the marching ant company and ask Mr. Chen Mo's contact information."

After hanging up the phone, Su Guo began to wait anxiously. Now it is too late to chase it out. People have already left. It didn't take long for the phone to ring again.

“Su, the person from the army ant company said that Chen Mo is the chairman of the company and they have no contact information.”

chapters.title: Chapter 101: :Apologize?
chapters.body:
Chapter 101: :Apologize?

Suguo held the phone in a stalemate and echoed a word in his mind.

Chen Mo, chairman of the marching ant company. The ruler behind the marching ant company, usually the dragon is not seen at the end, and has never heard of any major events he has participated in.

The first time on behalf of the marching ant company to participate in charity night, the result of this kind of thing.

If this matter is passed on, the reputation she has accumulated through the organization of charity nights in these years will be exhausted.

"The chairman of the marching ant company came over, why didn't you inform me?" Su Guo took a sigh of relief and took a deep breath.

"We don't know that he is the chairman of the marching ant company. He thought that the president of the marching ant company didn't come and sent two representatives. We just called the staff of the army ant company and asked about it." Come to a helpless voice.

"waste."

Suguo hangs up and the chest is violently ups and downs.

At this time, in her mind, I recalled the scene where Yao Yi and others left. But no matter what she thinks, she can't think of a person who is the chairman of the marching ant company.

Such multimedia is at the scene of the charity party, the news is definitely blocked. Suguo is now trying to minimize the impact, otherwise she will be finished.

After thinking about it, Suguo dialed a number.

"Wang, I am bothering you one thing." Su Guo said quickly as soon as the phone was connected.

"Su Guo, don't look at it, say that he is not troublesome, can help you, absolutely unambiguous."

Su Guo vomited and his face was loose.

"There was a little accident on the charity night tonight. These two days helped me to look at the topic of hot search. After all, charity is not easy. If it is destroyed by someone, it will be hard to trust people. How much do you come back to me? Say."

"So? Yes, it is not easy."

"Hot search list gives me a place."

"Ok."

After Su Guo hangs up the phone, hesitate to dial another number again.

Although the charity night experienced some episodes, it also ended smoothly. After the end of the game, many people wiped the cold sweat on their foreheads.

There are a lot of accidents happening tonight. If it is not quick, it will be a little troublesome.

The next day, various reports occupied the network, because last night's charity night, there were too many things. Many reporters also reported on the scene of the charity night on the field. It is impossible to expose these things.

As soon as the topic appeared, the heat broke out.

"Gao Wenwen is a **** head for charity! 》

"Men's surprise? Men's scares! 》

"Charity night, donations hit new heights. 》

......

Various articles about charity nights are circulating on the Internet.

Gao Wenwen had an accident and fell scalp blood flow, unconscious. Just this one, there are enough topics.

This era of unbridled entertainment, the topic of the play, is always hotter than other topics. I only care about which stars donate donations, and which stars donate the most.

A pair of invisible big hands are controlling the direction of the topic. Some voices that question the night of charity are also drowned in numerous entertainment articles and finally disappear completely. No one knows the truth, and people who know the truth will not say it.

In the car, Su Guo used the mobile phone to watch the news and hot search, and completely relieved. She knew that she was going south with last night, but she was off.

Looking south to see the red flower Dan Gaowen, in the upper layer of the entertainment circle, it is no secret.

This time Gao Wenwen's agent privately gave Gao Wenwen a promise of such a reward, hoping to enhance Gao Wenwen's image in the name of charity, and get a good impression to the south.

To the south in the entertainment circle, it is a big saying, since it is Gao Wenwen's agent promised, for the charity night, she also defaults, and sends it to the south.

However, everyone did not expect that Gao Wenwen would not want to die, preferring to seriously hurt the coma, and would not give this kiss.

Fortunately, the response was timely and prevention was prevented in advance.

Now she has successfully transferred the eyes of netizens, and she is also relieved. But there is still a problem now, that is, the marching ant company.

The departure from the scene last night obviously has expressed his anger. And they also gave a chairman to the family and arranged a third-rate seat. If you don't give an explanation to the marching ant company, I am afraid she will have trouble.

The car stopped outside the marching ant company, and Su Guo looked up at the office building and walked in.

"Hello, can you take me to see your chairman? I have something to look for."

"Ms., do you have an appointment?" The front desk sister looked at Suguo and said politely.

"No." Suguo said.

"I am sorry, if you don't make an appointment, you can't bother the chairman." The front desk sister said.

"I am the person in charge of Haisha Charity Night. It is really a matter of looking for your chairman. It is about the charity night last night. I am especially grateful to the marching ant company."

Suguo is going to see Chen Mo anyway today, or she will be out of the army ant company.

"This way? Please wait a moment." The front desk sister looked at Suguo and picked up the landline.

“Little fisherman, there is a lady who wants to see the chairman.”

"Ms.?" At the end of the phone, Xiaoyu was slightly confused: "Is there anyone who said she is?"

“She said she was the head of Hayes Charity Night and came for the night of charity night last night.”

"This way? You let her wait, I am going down now." Xiaoyu hung up the phone, thought about it, and left the desk.

The charity party last night was not pleasant. It’s just that Chen Moxin is wide, and he just donated an ambulance and didn’t participate in donations, so he didn’t go deep into it and found himself unhappy.

Unexpectedly, the head of today's Haisha Charity Night came over. Under the leadership of the sister at the front desk, Xiao Yu quickly saw Su Guo.

"Hello, what is your decision to find our chairman?" Xiao Yu said.

"I am the head of charity night, Su Guo, who came to thank you for his generosity for the charity night last night. By the way, sorry. Can I see him?"

Su Guo looked at the small fishing, always feeling a bit familiar. Xiao Yu is too young, like a freshly graduated student. It’s just that such a young girl’s status in the marching ant company does not seem low.

Xiaoyu took out his mobile phone and dialed Chen Mo’s phone: “Chairman, Su Guo, the person in charge of the night of charity night, wants to see you, and wants to thank and apologize in person.”

"Let her go back. I didn't happen last night. Thanks and an apology, tell her that charity must be charitable."

"Ok."

After Xiaoyu put down his mobile phone, he looked at Suguo.

"Ms. Su, the chairman said that he did not happen and did not pursue it last night. Don't thank, don't apologize. He told me to tell you that charity must be charitable."

"Can't you let me talk to him face to face?"

Suguo brows up, the last sentence, has clearly expressed his dissatisfaction, not because of other things, but because of Gao Wenwen's arrangement.

"The chairman is busy, there is no time for the moment." Xiao Yu's face kept a smile.

"When is your chairman free, about a time, I will come again."

"I don't know this, the time of the chairman is not arranged by us." Xiaoyu smiled and said.

"That tells your chairman, I was really sorry about last night. This is my business card. I have my phone number. If your chairman has time, I hope to see him."

Su Guo is very clear that Chen Mo’s attitude has come out and he will definitely not see himself. However, she still does not give up. She actually missed the opportunity to approach the top domestic figures last night. Now even if there is a hint of hope, she will not give up.

On the top floor of the company, Su Guozhen remembered the person sitting on the sofa at this time, took the coffee handed over by the robot, and looked at the book quietly.

Su Guo didn't have to see him, and he didn't want to go into it. Going deeper, the reputation of domestic charity is not good, and he will not get any benefit, no need to waste time.

"Mer brother, Zhao Min came to the phone." When Chen Mo looked at the book, the voice of the ink girl sounded.

"Connected."

"Chairman, there is something that needs to be told in advance. Just now, the people of the European telecommunications company Altice Group informed me that they refused to cooperate with the marching ant company." Just connected, Zhao Min’s voice was heard, and the tone was angry.

chapters.title: Chapter 102: : Joint Blocking
chapters.body:
Chapter 102: : Joint Blocking

Chen Mo listened to his brow and put down his book: "Is it so late? Are you so anxious?"

"The point is here." Zhao Min's tone is not good.

They have already talked about it today, the terms of the cooperation between the two parties have been fixed, and the details of the contract have been determined.

Originally, I was prepared to sign the contract tomorrow morning. As a result, the other party informed them at this time tonight that the contract discussed today was completely void and the signing ceremony was cancelled.

This means that the other party wants to re-define the contract or not cooperate.

“Why is this?”

"I don't know, I talked very well today. They also seem very sincere. The reason for the change of the other party is temporarily unclear. Maybe tomorrow, they will say it." Zhao Min said.

"Suddenly changing, this is a bit embarrassing. If the cooperation is not achieved, it does not matter, first return to the country, the European market, you can slow down first."

"I know, I will inform you in advance, I am afraid that this trip to Europe will not have much to gain."

Suddenly changing, the other party must be looking for greater benefits. And for the greater benefit, they can't give in. If the two sides do not agree, this trip to Europe can only be done empty-handed.

"First, let's take a break early. If they don't have much sincerity tomorrow, they will return home first, no need to consume."

"it is good."

After putting down the phone, Zhao Min frowned and slowly walked to the window.

It is late at night, and the Danube is so bright in the light that it is easy to get lost in this night scene. This is one of the most prosperous corners of the world, but behind the bustling, I don’t know the blood is hidden.

Here is no peace in the country, the area controlled by capital, the interests are supreme.

After calming down, Zhao Min walked back to the bed and lay down.

This trip to Europe, I am afraid that there will be no end, and the internationalization of marching ants will take some time.

What is the matter, tomorrow, Zhao Ming did not think much, closed his eyes.

the next day.

Zhao Min followed Zhu Li and others and left the hotel. Under the convoy of the team, it was soon to the Altice Group headquarters.

"Mr. Kang Bomin, we need an explanation. Yesterday, I have not already talked about it. I have calculated the time. When I signed the contract, why did I suddenly cancel the cooperation?"

When he saw Ceo Kang Bomin of the Altice Group, Zhao Min spoke. The tone is not very good, it feels like being played.

After spending such a long time, I worked hard to talk about the good terms. When I was called by the other party, I simply canceled it. No one has a good temper.

"Ms. Zhao, please don't be embarrassed." After listening to the translation, Kang Bomin pushed the nose of the nose and smiled slightly. He pointed to the opposite position of the table: "Sit down and talk about the terms of yesterday, the board disagreed, I There is no way."

"Then, how do you want to cooperate now?" Zhao Min sat in his chair and calmed down his feelings.

"We decided to cooperate in another way. We acquired a 10% stake in the marching ant company and used our company's resources to grow the marching ant company as quickly as possible, and to squeeze Apple out of the European market, we will get more benefits. Kang Bomin said.

He used to be the CEO of Alcatel-Lucent and has a good understanding of the software and hardware markets for telecommunications market communications in Europe. I have to say that the butterfly eye mobile phone of the marching ant is a very good product. It can get the agent in Europe, and the income is definitely not small.

Only the contract was rejected by the board of directors. The board only wants to share the shares of the army ant company and obtain greater benefits, instead of acting as a butterfly eye phone.

The above meaning is very firm. If you don't get the shares of the marching ant company, it is impossible to put them into the European market, and they said that they can naturally do it.

After all, the whole of Europe is so big, big consortia and big capital have long been the innocent king of this place.

"Impossible, we will never sell shares." Zhao Min said with a calm face.

As she thought, the other party really wants to take greater advantage. It is obviously impossible to just focus on the shares of the marching ant company.

"Ms. Zhao, you have to think about it. The European market is very big. With our help, you can quickly drop this piece of cake. The benefits here are much more valuable than the 10% of the shares of the marching ant company."

"No interest, since your company does not cooperate, then I can only regret it."

Zhao Min stood up and turned to leave.

"Ms. Zhao, if you leave here, you will leave the entire European market. It will be difficult to come in later. It is only 10% of the shares, and we are holding and not participating in the operation of the company."

Kang Bomin saw Zhao Min so decisively left, his brows close together.

"No interest, goodbye." Zhao Min said goodbye, leaving Julie and others.

It is impossible to talk about the company's shares. Chen Mo could not take out the shares of the marching ant company, but also sat on the table without talking and talking, just a waste of time.

Seeing that Zhao Min decisively left, Kang Bomin called a phone: "Mr., the army ant company refused to sell the shares."

"If you don't surrender, you will get out." At the end of the phone, a decisive voice came.

Zhao Min has just left, and the heads of major European telecom operators have received news from the group and are not allowed to cooperate with the marching ant company.

The news spread, indicating that it is almost impossible for marching ant mobile phones to enter the European market.

In Europe, it is not the government's calculations, but the big capitals, families and trade unions that put those politicians on the stage.

"It seems that they want to block our road."

In the evening, in the hotel, Zhao Min put down his mobile phone and calmed his face. They want to find another cooperation, and as a result, this kind of thing happens, and the plan is also ruined.

The marching ant company is now blocked by large European telecom operators.

Zhao Min looked at the time and dialed Chen Mo’s phone.

"how about it?"

“Not bad, I expected that the people of the Altice Group were really changing conditions. Their condition is a 10% stake in the marching ant company.”

“Can you change other partners?”

"I refused their request. The largest operators in Europe collectively blocked the blockade and were not prepared to enter the European market. The people of the Altice Group suddenly changed, and it is estimated that these telecom giants are cooperating together." Zhao Min said. .

"Is there a way?" Chen Mo asked.

"The whole of Europe, telecommunications software and hardware, most of them in the hands of these operators, almost monopolize the entire market. We are an outsider, want to break through, it is impossible." Zhao Min said.

Huawei has developed very well in Europe, but even China Micro will not easily offend these telecom operators because of them, and will not help them enter the market.

Because this market is already a big cake for China Micro, if it is to recruit marching ants, it is not in their interest to find a competitor for themselves.

"It seems to rely on myself." Chen Mo smiled.

"Come on slowly, this is just the beginning. There is still a long way to go. The army ants company has come this way, but it has experienced a lot." Zhao Min said.

"Since it has been blocked, it is not very useful to stay in Europe. Going back to the country, it is not convenient to speak on the phone. Go back to China and say."

"Ok."

The next morning, Zhao Min and others returned to China by plane.

chapters.title: Chapter 103: : Unsettled
chapters.body:
Chapter 103: : Unsettled

At the headquarters of the Altice Group, Kang Bomin was not in a good mood after he learned that the people of the Army Ant Company had returned to China.

Originally, the cooperation with the marching ant company has been almost completed.

The second generation of butterfly-eye mobile phones, which he used, especially smart assistants, is a very useful software. It can make people completely say goodbye to the era of palm control mobile phones. Plus the delicate appearance of the butterfly eye, a higher grade than the Apple phone.

If they cooperate with the marching ant company, their Altice Group will definitely be able to take more communication market share.

As a result, at the last minute, the board of directors actually disagreed with the cooperation and asked him to ask for the acquisition of the shares of the army ant company.

They all underestimated the determination of the marching ant company.

The matter of acquiring shares was rejected without hesitation. The people who marched the ant company returned to the country overnight, and even did not even talk to them.

He has a hunch that he may have lost a very important partner this time. With a sigh, Kang Bomin took out his mobile phone and dialed a number.

The news of the failure of the marching ant company and the Altice Group was quickly passed back to China.

During this time, the development of marching ants is too fast, and the domestic market share of the high-end mobile phone market is constantly expanding. Now it is ready to enter the international market. The failure of the marching ants in this trip to Europe has also become the focus of media attention. The European media has just heard the news, and the country has been reported by various media.

"The pace of internationalization of marching ants is blocked" - Global News.

"European fear of oriental marching ants invade! 》——Financial News

"Reuters: Altice Group and the marching ant company failed to end" - Phoenix News.

On the Internet, various articles appeared, experts from various fields also emerged, and began to comment on the failure of the marching ant company's cooperation.

The marching ants came all the way and the roads were very smooth. This was the first time that they encountered a refusal to cooperate and it was the first step to take the country.

In recent years, the domestic market situation has become rigid, and major markets have been occupied by major players. It is more difficult for small businesses to enter the market.

The sudden emergence of marching ants, like a group of fierce ants, left and right, suddenly broke through this rigid situation. Among young entrepreneurs, the marching ant company has become a legendary benchmark.

Now the marching ant company is a miracle of the development of domestic companies. Every move is in the spotlight of the media. This trip to the army ant company in Europe was the first time the marching ant company hit the wall.

This means that the time for marching ants to enter the international market will be slowed down.

At this time, a group of reporters are waiting anxiously outside the marching ant company. Seeing Zhao Min’s car approaching the company, a group of reporters swarmed.

“President Zhao, may I ask why the Altice Group refuses to cooperate with you?”

"How does the marching ant company develop next?"

“Will the marching ants work with other telecom operators?”

"When is the marching ant company going to go public, what do you want to say about this cooperation failure?"

All kinds of problems were all shouted out, and I ignored Zhao Min’s hearing.

Zhao Min quietly looked at the reporter outside the window, blocked by security.

She did not expect that they would come back one day, and their failure to cooperate with the Altice Group would actually come out and be passed back to China.

However, this incident did not have much impact on them.

The marching ant company is not a listed company and will not be affected by public opinion and stock market volatility. This is only the first failure to enter the international market, and has not had much impact on the domestic market.

After separating many reporters, Zhao Min’s car slowly entered the company.

Chen Mo's office area.

"Mer brother, the information you need is found."

Chen Mo looked at several pieces of information on the desktop, all of which were information from European telecom operators and European consortium families.

Vojonda, France Telecom, Orange, Deutsche Telekom, Altice.

They are all involved in this telecommunications company that prevented them from entering the European market. These companies almost monopolize the major telecommunications markets in Europe.

European telecommunications companies, all refused to cooperate with them, there is absolutely flawed inside. After the ink girl got the information through the surveillance investigation, things seemed to be a bit clear.

Behind the major operators, there are still a few big consortiums.

They just wanted to step into the European market and they were stared at by these oligarchs. Sure enough, this land of capital, the water is unimaginable.

At present, I am afraid that I will not be able to enter the international market in a short period of time. After all, outside is a world of capital control, and there are interests that will definitely make those oligarchs rush to snatch.

"Mer brother, Zhao Min came over, already outside the experimental area." When Chen Mo looked at the information, the ink girl interrupted him.

Zhao Mingang walked into Chen Mo's office. Chen Mo was already sitting on the sofa and saw her coming in. Chen Mo pointed to the opposite seat.

“Why don’t you take a day off?” Chen Mo asked.

"A day off is enough. Now the company can do a lot of things." Zhao Min took a sip of the water from the robot and leaned back on the sofa.

"This time I was a bit unwilling, I signed the contract and it was temporarily changed. Now the news leaks out, they should be intentional."

"It’s fortunate that I haven’t signed the contract yet. If they sign up, they will find trouble again, and things will be more headaches.” Chen Mo said: “This time, first develop in China, the international market does not have to think about it for the time being.”

In the high-end mobile phone market, the main markets currently are China, North America and Europe. The European market is now inaccessible, and the North American market is even less likely.

In many areas, it is a capital monopoly market.

Most of the market resources are controlled in the hands of big capital and big consortia. If there is anything that does not meet their interests, they will use this monopoly right to threaten to kill.

"There is no way to go out during this time. Foreign capital markets, unless enough benefits are given, will feed those wolves. Otherwise, we outsiders want to enter, it is more difficult than imagined." Zhao Min said.

She knows more about Chen than Chen Mo.

In recent years, the newly emerged companies have not been blocked by acquisitions, or they have been controlled by shares, and they cannot escape the palms of several giants.

At the beginning, Chen Muruo retired, and now the army ant company, is only the end of the acquisition.

In the domestic market, there are government regulations, and occasionally there are some companies that can grow bigger. Like a sudden take-out app, sharing a bicycle, but still can not escape the palm of several giants.

Outside, those capitals are even more unscrupulous.

The western capital structure has solidified, and once there is a threatening momentum, it will be strangled and eaten separately.

Either surrender or die.

If the marching ant company was originally out, I am afraid that it has already been eaten without bone residue. Now, both domestically and abroad, there are a lot of big capitals staring at the shares of the marching ant company.

"Where is this robot, when are you going to let it go?" Zhao Min pointed to the robot behind Chen Mo.

This robot is a good thing. If it can be launched into the market, it is undoubtedly a huge shock, and it can definitely detonate global topics.

Chen Mo looked back at the robot: "It's still early, its hardware and software technology are not fully mature. A lot of data is still being tested and it is impossible to bring it to market."

The robot is now controlled by the ink girl, so it is easy for the ink girl to write a smart software, but there are still big problems in the hardware, especially the battery and chip.

"Well, tell me about its technology."

And Chen Mo explained some things about the company, Zhao Min just left Chen Mo's office.

Time is slowly passing, and the cooperation between the marching ant company and the Altice Group has failed, and the heat has slowly subsided over time.

Only the heat of this wave has just subsided, and another storm has hit again.

chapters.title: Chapter 104: : A Wave Of Up Again
chapters.body:
Chapter 104: : A Wave Of Up Again

South Korea, Samsung headquarters.

In the conference room, the director and supervisor of various departments of the electronic mobile business. At the top of the conference table is Gao Zhendong, the person in charge of Samsung's mobile business.

His mission is to make the Samsung mobile phone business and create more revenue for the Samsung Group.

However, revenues in these years have not been good. After the Note7 battery explosion, the Samsung mobile phone business, the market share fell and then fell.

In the Huaxia market, the market share of Samsung mobile phones has fallen to the bottom. In addition to the recall incident, the Chinese consumers are treated differently, let Huaxia users lose their trust, and the impact of the Sadr incident, and most importantly, the rise of China's domestic mobile phone manufacturers.

First, China Micro, rice to separate the high-end market, as well as glory and opal to eat the low-end market. Now there is a difficult opponent - the marching ant company.

This is the most powerful opponent in the high-end market. A smart assistant has lifted the mobile phone for a whole generation, allowing the mobile phone to enter a real intelligent era.

If the marching ant company enters the international market, it is a devastating blow to the Samsung mobile phone business. Apple, Hua Wei has been attacking them from the left and right, and then a marching ant, they are afraid that their status will not be guaranteed.

Fortunately, the internationalization of marching ants has failed, and now is a good opportunity for their mobile phones to go public.

Huaxia is a huge market and they don't want to lose this market. This time, they are the opportunity to make a fortune.

Gao Zhendong looked around the conference room for one week and said: "The production department makes people speed up the production speed of note10. The people in the panel department will interrupt the supply of marching ant oLeD and reduce the supply of China Micro oLeD. Prepare mobile phone conference, advertising Also ready..."

Although I know that this is not appropriate, I have to do so. Using the monopoly power in their hands to create trouble for their opponents is their usual means.

After all the things were clearly explained, Gao Zhendong announced the meeting.

The people of Samsung Electronics' mobile business want an efficient gear and start to turn.

Li Danni blacked her face and dialed Zhao Min’s phone. She is the army ant company, the person in charge of the production system, responsible for the materials department, production department and import and export department.

Just now, the people in the production department contacted her and said that Samsung had suspended the supply of their oLeD on the grounds of insufficient production.

This is not a good news.

The second generation of butterfly eye mobile phone butterfly, the low match is with BOE, the high match is to use Samsung's oLeD. The disruption of oLeD's supply by Samsung means that their high-profile models are affected.

After the call, Li Danni immediately said: "President, Samsung has suspended the oLeD supply of our mobile phone."

"what?"

Zhao Min, who looked at the documents, improved his voice a lot.

"Samsung people have suspended the supply of our company oLeD on the grounds of insufficient production," Li Danni said.

"You make people contact BOE to see if they can increase the supply. Also contact with Samsung people and ask them when they can supply oLeD."

After hanging up the phone, Zhao Min calmed his face.

Now that the butterfly is in the hot stage, reducing production, especially for high-yield models, is a huge loss for them.

A wave of unrest has risen again, **** monopoly.

Zhao Min hated that he failed to enter the European market. Now he has just stopped, and another supply of oLeD is suspended.

Is Samsung trying to fall into the rocks?

There is no way to know Samsung’s intentions now, she can only wait for the other party’s reply. But she can't wait too long. If it doesn't solve it completely, I am afraid that they will be subject to people at a crucial moment in the future. The technology of BOE's high-end oLeD has not yet matured, and she has no way to worry.

Samsung’s interruption of the oLeD supply of the marching ant company soon appeared on the Internet.

The marching ant company failed to enter Europe, and the heat just dissipated, so it happened so quickly. As soon as the news appeared, it immediately became the target of many media reports.

Once again, no core technology will be subject to the example of people.

It is not the first time that Samsung has used monopoly rights to change the market. It will not be the last time.

After the incident appeared on the Internet, countless people began to look forward to the rise of BOE.

After the news came out, many people were naturally happy.

Because it is impossible to enter the international market, there is no difference between the multi-language version of the intelligent assistant and the dual-language version. This is undoubtedly the most happy of China Micro and Samsung. They all use Android and are compatible with smart assistants, Apple can't.

Now Samsung has suspended the oLeD supply of the marching ant company, and the remaining Hua Wei is the most happy because he is the biggest beneficiary. China Micro has a multi-channel screen supply, so Samsung's supply reduction has an impact on them, but the impact is small.

The news came out the next day, Hua Wei issued a message, will be held a week later, the China Micro M11 new product launch conference. At about the same time, Samsung announced that it will hold a note10 series mobile phone conference five days later.

Apple is not far behind, issued an announcement, and held a new product launch three days later. The rice company that has not released a new machine for a long time has also publicly announced that it will hold a mobile phone conference five days later and release the black rice series mobile phone.

Some time ago, the butterfly eye and butterfly of the marching ant company, because of the intelligent assistant and the perfect appearance, the limelight was no longer. At that time, if the mobile phone was released, it would not be of any benefit to them, and it would only die very badly.

As a result, the mobile phone launch time of several mobile phone companies was pushed back. Now Samsung is dealing with the marching ant company. This gap is the best time to get the mobile phone to market. They don't want to let go.

The four companies picked up the time points and collectively announced the holding of a mobile phone conference. One news after another broke out and instantly ignited the popularity of the network.

"Shock! Mobile phone industry Huashan on the sword? 》——Squirrel headline.

"East Samsung, West Apple, South China Micro, North Rice! 》——Sina Technology.

"The four major sects besieged the army ants? 》——Global News.

"Zhong Shen Tong - marching ants! 》——Phoenix News.

......

Most of the media used the scene of martial arts to describe the release of four companies, which is unprecedented.

Many mobile phone companies, in order to better sales, will tacitly stagger the release time of the flagship model to avoid collision.

This time, the marching ant company failed to enter the international market, the oLeD screen of the mobile phone was suspended by Samsung, and the production of butterfly eye mobile phones decreased, and there may be a shutdown.

A push-and-push mobile phone conference, this time is Huang Daoji. Otherwise, the butterfly eye will be resurrected, and they want to launch a new machine, which is a little troublesome. Now that you can't manage the things that go wrong, launching your own products is the key. As long as you have confidence in your products, you are not afraid to compare.

Affected, some of the only high-quality butterfly eyes and butterflies were quickly snapped up by the cattle. The marching ant company also announced that the high-grade version was temporarily suspended.

In response to this incident, the Internet has erupted in the history of the most heated discussion on mobile phone conferences.

"Good guys, these four nephews, look at the time is better than Yamazaki's kid. The second battalion commander, I will bring up the Laozi's pasta, and I will eat the face of Huashan."

"Dakang Secretary: Fighting, gDP growth, it depends on your Huashan sword."

"Where is Huashan's sword? Master, disrespectful and disrespectful, aiming at the people, dare to ask who?"

"Under the small slit!"

"Curtain is here, who is wild?"

"The villain sews gently, looks slowly and slowly!"

"This fairy is seeing the stitches - open."

"The old road is the top of the sky!"

"Ha ha ha ha ... comments are more exciting than the world war, I am unbeaten in the cave."

......

On the Internet, various articles, various comments and paragraphs are overwhelming. This is the first time that several major mobile phone companies have competed on the same stage. It is possible that this kind of grand event will not happen again in the future. Most netizens are looking forward to what will happen next.

chapters.title: Chapter 105: : Layout Of The Pharmaceutical Market
chapters.body:
Chapter 105: : Layout Of The Pharmaceutical Market

Three days passed by, Apple S2's conference, as scheduled.

Apple's press conference should be a month ago, because the butterfly eye released by the marching ant company had to push the time of the press conference.

Because the two mobile phones compare, in addition to the processor has a little advantage, the other basically no advantage, but the price is similar, and the marching ant company has intelligent assistants, Apple does not.

Originally Apple wanted to carry a smart assistant, but was rejected by the marching ant company. Then there was a suicide incident in the board of directors. During this time, Apple had a lot of troubles.

Now, just as Samsung is suppressing marching ants, Apple saw the timing of the conference.

Cook stood in the background, a little embarrassed.

Success or failure is here, and this is a revolutionary machine that can bring opportunities to Apple again. But the emergence of the smart assistant gave him a surprise.

If the conference is unsuccessful, Apple will fall to the altar.

The only thing that is fortunate now is that the pace of marching ants into the international market is blocked, giving them a chance to breathe. Before the marching ants did not enter the international market, as long as Apple's intelligent assistants made a breakthrough, there is still hope.

Organizing his mood, Cook took a smile and stepped onto the stage.

At this moment, there was a slight commotion in the field and it was quiet.

"Good morning everyone, I am honored to meet you again. In the past time, we have been steadfast in creating more perfect products for everyone..."

At the beginning of a speech, everyone listened quietly. However, everyone expects, or the last Apple S2, in the news publicity, this is a revolutionary product.

After a series of product introductions, Cook stopped and the atmosphere was quiet and began to solidify.

"Next is our mobile phone tonight, Apple S2."

When Cook’s words fell, a huge cell phone picture appeared on the rear screen.

The back of the glass, painted with blue enchantress, the screen in front, no awkwardness. The stage was awkward and finally turned into strong applause.

Full screen, the long-awaited real full screen.

"It's our perfect work, just as enchanting as a enchantress." Cook smiled on his face: "It has the advantages of a full screen, we use the latest screen fingerprinting technology."

"It uses the company's latest bionic smart chip A14, as well as wireless charging, and the latest ioS13 system..."

Full screen, screen fingerprint, camera, glass body, waterproof wireless charging.

As soon as these functions came out, they immediately ignited the audience. In addition to the camera hidden in the corner of the phone, the other screens, there is no blank.

The screen has been enlarged to the extreme.
