And this time Apple uses a 3D glass body with a pattern on it, and the appearance is second only to the butterfly eye of the marching ant.

Unfortunately, there is no smart assistant! Those fruit powders can't help but sigh.

With a smart assistant, you can call it a real smartphone, but Apple's mobile phone, which is not compatible with smart assistants, is the biggest flaw, but it is already very good.

If the marching ant company suddenly announced an intelligent assistant, this Apple S2, I am afraid it is close to the ultimate technology.

Apple's press conference has instantly become a news hotspot.

Such a perfect work almost ignited various fruit powders. Apple has once again demonstrated its top level of design.

Apple's stock, after the release of S2, began to surge all the way until the close, up 6%, and all the previous breaks, all rose back.

The ultimate craftsmanship will hide the past without the help of intelligent assistants.

After the launch of Apple's mobile phone, Xiaomi, Samsung and Huawei began to appear, and each conference was a big hot spot.

This is a Huashan sword in the mobile phone industry, and now it is the competition field.

Black rice is the main high-end market, with high price and become a highlight.

The advantages of Samsung and Huawei are similar to those of Apple. They only use different chips. The fingerprint technology and full screen are also standard.

However, the two are not as good as Apple in design, but they are compatible with smart assistants.

Hua Wei, Samsung, Apple compete for the high-end market, the average price is above 6000, the rice company's black rice, to seize the middle and high-end market. The four companies, starting with the darkness of the marching ants, began to madly compete for the market that they originally belonged to.

The outside world is very lively, the marching ant company is surprisingly quiet, and everything is going on step by step.

Workspace.

Zhao Min is reporting to Chen Mo about the company's situation, especially the problem of the butterfly eye phone. Samsung suddenly interrupted the mobile phone screen supply of the marching ant company, making them a little caught off guard.

The high-end butterfly eye phone is now sold out.

Samsung let their mobile phone supply have a vacuum period, and then they released new machines to increase their advantage, which made them suffer a boring loss.

“How does the BOE respond?” Chen Mo asked.

“Jingdong said that the production of flexible oLeD screens is insufficient. Their production has already been booked by other companies. The new production line is still under construction. At the end of the year, the new production line will be put into production, and only the goods will be supplied to us.” Zhao Min said. .

"Samsung's abacus is really exciting." Chen Mo took a drink from the cup and looked at Zhao Min: "What do you think?"

"At present, we are contacting Toshiba and other companies to increase the channel of the mobile phone screen. In the future, we can't put the eggs in one basket." Zhao Min said: "The conferences of several major companies have been held, and I don't know what the results are."

"How the results are, it has nothing to do with us. Anyway, there are Huawei and Apple blocking, and Samsung is unlikely to expand in China." Chen Mo said.

Because of the neto7 incident, Samsung has already made Chinese users chill, coupled with the civil resistance to Korean goods, a series of things, Samsung is destined to withdraw from the Chinese market.

The marching ant company can remove the smart assistant and respond to Samsung in an authorized way. But he did not do this because it would trigger a struggle between the two sides.

And he does not intend to authorize the smart assistant, at least until the butterfly eye phone does not enter the international market, he will not do so.

When the Huawei Micro M9 came out, it was once interrupted by Samsung's screen and suffered a boring loss. Later, Hua Wei learned fine, and this time it was interrupted by Samsung, so the impact was not great.

Now that the domestic BOE has risen, Samsung is not as brazen as it used to be. Only this time, Samsung has come to this routine, and the goal is to march ants.

Compared with those giants, the size of the marching ants is not large enough to be used. This boring loss can only be swallowed temporarily and will be returned later.

"The mobile phone market is put down first, the high butterfly eye is discontinued, and the low distribution continues to be produced. During this time, everyone's attention is on the four companies, you go to buy several pharmaceutical companies and cosmetics companies." Chen Mo thought I want to say.

"what?"

Zhao Min was surprised to see Chen Mo. Do you suspect that he was wrong? Chen Mo wants to enter the pharmaceutical and cosmetics market?

"You didn't get it wrong, it was to buy a pharmaceutical company and a cosmetics company." Seeing Zhao Min's appearance, Chen Mo immediately knew her thoughts.

“Now enter the pharmaceutical, cosmetics field?” Zhao Min is still not sure.

“Layout.” Chen Mo said: “Now lay out other markets. In the future, I want to make the marching ant company an all-round company.”

Breast enhancement pharmacy, aphrodisiac pharmacy, beauty **, etc. are all money.

In the future, we must definitely enter the field of biomedicine. It is better to focus on this area in advance when we focus on the hegemony of several companies.

The study of drugs is no more than other products, produced, and clinical trials. The cycle is too long and can only be laid out in advance.

"The ambition is not small." Zhao Min said.

"When I first met you, I already said, this is an aggressive marching ant." Chen Mo laughed.

"Good." Zhao Min immediately agreed.

Chen Mo’s words, she can only listen. This man who is a few years younger than himself, does not know what to do, what to learn, is a horrible genius.

Most media now focus on the hegemony of the four major mobile phones. They don't know that the dark horses they fear are ready to invade other areas.

chapters.title: Chapter 106: :Dull
chapters.body:
Chapter 106: :Dull

"Chen Mo, the refrigerator in the house is empty, just tomorrow weekend, not going to work, go out with me to go to the supermarket tonight."

Xiao Yu put the last dish, untied the apron, sat down at the dinner table, and looked at Chen Mo with a gaze.

"it is good."

Chen Mo immediately agreed that after the last mercenary incident, he rarely went out shopping with a small fishing. Xiao Yu is also sensible and never asks to take her out.

During this time, it must have been broken. There is nothing wrong with it now, so going out tonight is not bad.

After Chen Mo promised to come down, Xiao Yu showed a happy smile. Looking at her smile, Chen Mo's mood became easier.

Whether it is before or now, Xiao Yu’s request for him is a simple matter. He never asked him anything, nor would he use his money to make Chen Mo helpless.

Xiao Yu is a very easy to meet girl, not much, just an ordinary life. It is because of this that Chen Mo will pamper her even more.

"Eat a little more." Xiao Yu is in a good mood and keeps picking vegetables in the Chen Mo bowl.

"Hig pig?" Chen Mo smiled.

"If you say that you are a pig, I will raise you. Anyway, you are at home, almost like a pig, except for eating, doing nothing." Xiaoyu said slightly.

"Who said that I don't do it? I wash the dishes, I also help you blow your hair. But there is a beautiful woman, this feeling is not bad, and cooking is so delicious." Chen Mozhen nodded in something.

Xiao Yu's face is red: "Come on."

After eating and packing, Chen Mo left the villa with a small fisherman.

In the commercial plaza, Chen Mo’s arm was placed on his body, and a small smile filled with a sweet smile. The appearance of the two is the ordinary couple in love.

"Would you like to go to the movies?" Chen Mo asked.

"No, it's hard to come out once, it's not good to sit in the cinema." Xiaoyu said: "Walk first, wait until you go to the supermarket."

“There is a jewelry store there...”

"No need to."

Still waiting for Chen Mo to finish, Xiao Yu took him to other directions. Thinking of the last time I went to the jewelry store, Xiao Yu was helpless.

"Other girls like jewelry, don't you like it?" Chen Mo asked.

"Who said that I don't like it? I like it too, but one is enough, not too much, a waste of money." Xiao Yu said.

"I don't have money to spend money now." Chen Mo smiled.

He doesn't know how much money he has in his account. For him, money is now a number. And all these changes have started from encountering a small fishing.

"Do you want to make me a woman with a jewel?" Xiao Yu said with no anger.

"Attention to words, you are not a woman."

Upon hearing this sentence, the little fisherman’s ear immediately became red, and his cheeks were a little hot, and he sipped a bit: “Stupid.”

"I found that you like to say that I am stupid? Where am I stupid?"

"I said you are stupid, you are stupid."

"Well, you won." Chen Mo immediately surrendered.

Xiao Yu took Chen Mo, strolled around the mall, helped Chen Mo buy a suit, and went to the supermarket without buying anything else.

“Today, Zhao Jie asked the Investment M&A Department to evaluate the value of several pharmaceutical companies and cosmetics companies. Does the company want to enter the pharmaceutical market?” Xiaoyu asked while purchasing goods.

"I really want to enter the pharmaceutical market, but now it is a break, not to talk about work." Chen Mo said in a shopping cart.

"Okay, don't talk."

The two of them walked slowly in the supermarket, and they walked around for half an hour. Chen Mo was able to walk out of the mall with a few big bags.

They are snacks, fruits and some daily necessities.

“I found that it’s good to go shopping in the supermarket.”

"When you need to buy something next time, let you come over and buy it." Xiao Yu said with a smile.

"It’s boring to go alone."

The two talked and laughed. They just walked out of the supermarket door. Suddenly, Xiao Yu held his lower abdomen and his brow wrinkled.

"What?" Chen Mo immediately felt that the fisherman was not right.

"M pain." Xiao Yu smiled: "It will not hurt before, I don't know why, occasionally it will hurt in these two days."

"Is it serious?"

"No, just take a break for a while."

"It is estimated that it is stressful. Take a good rest at home on the weekend for two days. Don't worry about other things. Come on, I will take you back."

Chen Mo went to the front of Xiao Yu. Xiao Yu looked at the people around him, a little embarrassed, hesitating, and finally squatting on Chen Mo's back, buried his head on Chen Mo's back, his ears were red.

Taking a small fishing, feeling the softness coming from the back, Chen Mo took a deep breath, picked up the spoils and walked outside the supermarket.

"In this time, I am responsible for following up on a project. There are a lot of things, and there are things to prepare for graduation. After another month, I have to go back to school, answer the thesis and graduate."

"I’m graduating soon, I don’t feel anything.” Chen Mo said.

"If you are a god-like person like you, you don't have to worry about the papers. What can you feel?"

The dull communication of the two people gradually drifted away.

Happiness is valuable because of the ordinary.

In the next two days, Chen Mo took a small fishing back to Binhai University for a few laps to relax and relax. He didn't want to, because the small fishing was too stressful, it gave the body something hidden.

At the end of the weekend, Chen Mogang came to the company and Zhao Min took a document to enter his office.

"Chairman, I think Xiaoyu is in a good mood. Are you happy in these two days?"

"still alright."

"Sure enough, we can only work when we work."

Zhao Min laughed at himself and placed the folder in his hand on Chen Mo’s desk.

"This is the evaluation report of the three pharmaceutical companies. It is the assessment report I got from the investment M&A department and I was busy working for a weekend.

These pharmaceutical companies have complete research teams and production lines. Moreover, it has been in line with international standards, and has cooperated with many hospitals and universities at home and abroad, and there are many drug sales channels. It only needs to have the same powerful new drug to produce successfully, and it can develop rapidly. ”

"Well, after the evaluation report is finished, I will give you a reply." Chen Mo took the assessment report and glanced at it.

“There are other things?” Zhao Min asked.

"A little later, it is the graduation season. How do I say that I also came out from Binhai University. You will donate 20 million to the school in my name, and then set up an ant scholarship in the name of the company."

The Science and Technology Library was obtained in the library of Binhai University, and Xiaoyu also met there. Without Binhai University, there would be no him.

"can."

Zhao Mincai remembered that Chen Mo was still a student at Binhai University. In the short span of half a year, Chen Mo reached a height that others could not reach for a lifetime.

Making achievements now is also the time to return to the alma mater.

"Well, this is a matter of time. You should go ahead and evaluate the report. I will see it now. After reading it, I will give you an answer." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

Immediately after Zhao Min, Chen Mo picked up the evaluation report and opened it.

"Ink girl."

"Mer brother, the ink girl came." Chen Mo’s words fell, and the inky voice of the ink girl rang.

"You are now re-evaluating the value of these companies and giving me the results of the evaluation." Chen Mo said before putting the documents in front of the camera.

"Okay, Mom."

chapters.title: Chapter 107: : Benefiting Thousands Of Women?
chapters.body:
Chapter 107: : Benefiting Thousands Of Women?

In the previous acquisition, Chen Mo was asked to let the ink woman evaluate the value of the company, and it was determined that the valuation of those investment consultants was similar. Chen Mo would agree to acquire those companies.

"Merce, the value assessment has been completed."

After a while, the voice of the ink girl appeared, and on the computer desktop, three evaluation reports were immediately jumped out.

Looking closely at the report given by the ink girl, and then looking at the report that Zhao Min handed over, Chen Mo nodded. The valuation given by the investment adviser is 20% lower than that of the Mexican woman.

But this is also normal, the ink woman can invade the database of these companies, have the most complete information for evaluation. The people who invest in the M&A department can only evaluate the data and reports published by the company.

In the case of unequal information, the assessment is not exactly the same, which is also normal. But one thing is the same, that is, the company's potential, the evaluation is positive.

Putting down the assessment report in his hand, Chen Mo called Zhao Min’s phone: “According to your valuation, you will wholly acquire Jianghe and Lanhong Pharmaceutical.”

“Reading the evaluation report so quickly?” Zhao Min couldn’t smile. Her forefoot had just left, and now she just returned to the office. Chen Mo’s phone came.

"Read it." Chen Mo said.

"Well, I am now sending people to contact the two companies to talk about the acquisition." After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo went to the shelf and picked up a few books, quietly looking.

The network is full of reports on the pre-sales of mobile phones of four companies. Various data statistics appeared on the network at the first time.

In the Chinese market, Apple's sales are better than Huawei's, the black rice of the third, Samsung's market in China, sales bottom.

Now in China, people who use Samsung mobile phones are considered rare animals. However, Samsung's pre-sales in the international market is better than Huawei's, and it is catching up with Apple. This time Apple is a revolutionary model with almost perfect functionality. The only fly in the ointment is that Apple can't use smart assistants.

The hot spots were all arranged by the competitions of several companies. In the news of miscellaneous, no one cares about the army ants. And when everyone looked at several companies, the marching ant company, has completed the acquisition of two pharmaceutical companies, quietly set foot in the medical field.

"It didn't take long for the action to be very fast."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min went to the company's conference room.

"The two pharmaceutical companies, because the new drugs have not been successfully developed, costly, and the business is flat, profitable, but not high, so the holding company and shareholders behind them have long thought of getting rid of it." Zhao Min said.

The purchase price they gave was very reasonable, and the major shareholders behind it just needed funds to operate, so the acquisition process was not blocked too much.

As soon as they entered the company's conference room, the people sitting around the conference table stood up.

"Sit down, this is the chairman of the company, Chen Mo." After the two were done, Zhao Min spoke.

When everyone saw Chen Mo, it was slightly commotion. They know that this is a marching ant company, but the chairman who has always heard of his name is actually so young.

"Chairman, they are the main managers of the management and research teams of the two companies. This is Hou Youliang, the head of Jianghe Company. This is Tan Yong, the head of Lanhong Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd...."

Zhao Min began to introduce Chen Mo to the key personnel of the two companies.

"Hello! Welcome everyone to enter the big family of marching ants company." Chen Mo said.

Hou Youliang looked at Chen Mo, his eyes hesitated, and his words stopped, and he looked a little anxious.

Joining the marching ant company is indeed a very happy thing, but he is more worried about their work and the work of their employees. After all, they all have families to support, and unemployment at this time is not a good thing.

"Hou manager, do you have something?" Chen Mo noticed the strangeness of Hou Youliang.

"Chairman, this..."

"Nothing to say," Chen Mo said.

"Chairman, I do have one thing." Hou Youliang made up his mind: "Do we have two companies, will they merge in the future? Will they lay off employees?"

Chen Mo turned his attention to Zhao Min.

"The merger is inevitable, but it will not suddenly merge. The research teams of the two companies will first merge and gather the two leaders to develop new drugs. The management merger will take a slow look at the next paragraph of your company. Time of business and performance.

The company must grow and it may be necessary to recruit more employees. If there is a vegetarian meal during the period and the meal does not work, we will also cut it. The company does not need to be burdened. If you work well, you don't have to worry about being laid off. ”

The company has just been acquired, and the following employees are heart-wrenching. If it is a layoff, the company is prone to problems. All can only hold the hearts of the people first. If there are some people who are not necessary, she does not mind cutting.

"understood."

Hou Youliang nodded with joy and heard Zhao Min’s answer. His heart was also put down a lot.

"You are the company's first wholly-owned subsidiary, and the company's entry into the marching ant company. The two companies are now a family, I hope that you cooperate sincerely." Zhao Min finished, looking at Chen Mo.

"I don't have to say anything else. Listen to Zhao Min's arrangement. Who are the heads of the company's research team?" Chen Mo asked.

His words fell, one left and one right, and the two stood up.

"Chairman, I am Xu Minsheng, the head of Shanhe's new drug research team." A man in his forties, with glasses, looks very gentle and stands up.

“I am Shi Lin, the head of the research team at Lanhong Pharmaceutical.” A man in his fifties, who is white and white, stands up.

"Mr. Xu Minsheng is a medical doctor at Hopkins University, majoring in oncology and new drug research. Mr. Shi Lin is a doctor of southern medicine and a specialist in traditional Chinese medicine," said Zhao Min.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.

After the meeting, Chen Mo took Xu Minsheng and Shi Lin to the experimental area. After entering Chen Mo's lab, Xu Minsheng and Shi Lin looked at each other with amazement.

They did not expect that Chen Mo, there is actually a biochemistry laboratory.

“I have a formula for the medicine here, and it is the medicine that you need to study next.”

Chen Mo put the drug formula of "Human Thoracic Developmental Pharmacy" in front of two people. The above is just the name of the drug, and does not say the specific role.

"Do you know what medicine is this?" Chen Mo asked.

"Aloe vera leaf juice, evening primrose, sage, ylang-ylang..." Shi Lin looked at the name of the drug in front of him, and the eyebrows picked it up. He said with uncertainty: "This is similar to breast enhancement oil. Is this breast enhancement?"

“Mr. Shi really is a doctor of Chinese medicine.”

Chen Mo took the medicinal white test tube on the table and placed it in front of Shi Lin.

"When I have nothing to do, I will occasionally look at my medical books. I have seen more medical books and found this formula. But I have no clinical experience and need your team to help me research and improve this medicine."

Chen Mo put the specific formula data of the pharmacy in front of two people.

"Chairman, you are usually a person in the laboratory to study breast enhancement drugs?" Xu Minsheng and Shi Lin looked at each other and looked at Chen Mo strangely.

Chen Mo’s mouth twitched and touched his nose: “It’s just a whim. My medical knowledge is limited to some theoretical things, no practice. Pharmacology and medicinal chemistry, pharmacological analysis, Compendium of Materia Medica, and Jin Shu’s sketches. I have only seen it."

Chen Mo could not say that there is a technology library in his head. These formulas are taken out from the inside and can only be said to be of interest.

"If this medicine is successful, it can benefit thousands of women." Xu Minsheng laughed.

"The most important thing is to make money." Chen Mo cried.

"If this medicine is successful, it can really make a lot of money. Then we will study and improve it, maybe there is an unexpected harvest." Shi Lin hesitated and nodded.

"That's bothering you, these materials and pharmacy, I will send someone to your lab. You will arrange for the staff to help improve, the clinical trial results will be reported to me. This recipe, don't let the fourth person know."

Chen Mo did not give them the formula of "Human-Assisted Reproductive Pharmacy". Now come slowly, take out too much at one time, and don't let them think that he is a monster.

After sending the two away, Chen Mo returned to his office and continued his reading career.

During this time, he only read books, did not enter the technology library to take technology, just wanted to concentrate on the task of 1000 books, only the last effort.

chapters.title: Chapter 108: : Technology Apprentice
chapters.body:
Chapter 108: : Technology Apprentice

Ten days.

In the office area, Chen Mo’s book in his hand was thrown aside, with a relaxed smile on his face.

For the first half of the year, it is not long, and short and short. During this time, he finished reading, how many people can't finish the book for a lifetime. Even if he has a super brain, he still makes him dizzy.

1000 books, if not rational, he now has an impulse to write a poem.

In the temple, Chen Mo put all the books on the table back to the bookshelf. After reading 1000 books, he was surprisingly quiet inside.

The only thing he wants now is that the next level of authority in the Science and Technology Library should not be read.

After packing, Chen Mo lay back on the sofa in the office area and closed his eyes.

The golden gate of a hundred meters high is engraved with various incomprehensible words, symbols, dense and dotted. The feeling of the door is heavy and simple.

Standing under the door and looking up, Chen Mo sent out a small sigh of humanity from his heart.

When I first got the technology library, the door gave him a strange feeling, but the feeling at this time was completely different.

The palm of your hand is placed on the door, and the thick door slowly opens. The white light shot and drowned him. The glory is gone, Chen Mo has appeared in the library.

Still familiar with the hundreds of meters high bookshelf, only looking up, he felt like a confused ant.

Retracting the sigh, Chen Mo went to the table and opened the dark red book.

"Come." Shu old looked at Chen Mo and nodded slightly: "It’s ok to read 1,000 books in half a year."

"Is this still ok?" Chen Mo did not know why.

“It’s really just OK.” Shu Lao said: “Your head is different from ordinary people, with super memory and understanding. If you spend your time reading books, you can put 1000 copies in less than four months. The book is finished."

"Then I can't hang it."

"But it's good, at least you are not a nerd, the foundation is also playing." Shu Lao said.

"Shu old, can you take technology, upgrade?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, but you don't need technology, because it doesn't make sense to you."

"why?"

"You have completed the task of the first level of authority, and will enter the next level, and the technology of the [trainee] level will be open to you. You can take it without you.)

As your level increases, the permissions in the tech library will slowly open to you. The highest level of authority, all the books in the entire library, you can see. ”

Chen Mo nodded and expressed understanding.

"The technology of the trainee level, you can take it casually, these are the foundations for you to give the next level of technology." Shu Lao continued to introduce.

"What is the next level?" Chen Mo asked.

"After the apprenticeship period, it is [technical apprentice]" Shu Lao said: "Now you don't move, I will give you upgrade privileges."

Shu Lao’s finger was placed on Chen Mo’s eyebrow: “The process is a bit uncomfortable, but you have to bear it, it is good for you.”

"it is good."

When Chen Mo’s words just fell, he felt like a whirlwind. The sense of dizziness made him feel very uncomfortable, and his head seemed to blow up.

Being stunned by Shu Lao, Chen Mo’s body could not go down, and he was constantly shaking and his face was getting whiter.

"vomit……"

At the moment when Shu Lao released his finger, Chen Mo squatted on the floor of the Science and Technology Library and retched. The vertigo is too strong, so he can't stand it.

After a long time, Chen Mo was slowed down and gasped. The mental state recovered a little, and Chen Mocai stood up.

“How do you feel?” asked Shu.

"Like the speed of ten laps per second is spinning, the brain almost blew." Chen Mo said to caress his chest.

“It was just brain development.” Shu Lao said: “Now you already have the [Technology Apprentice] level authority.”

"There is no special feeling." Chen Mo checked his body and said.

"There is no feeling at all." Shu Lao said with a smile: "This is a reward for your promotion to the [Technology Apprentice]." Shu old's finger clicked, and a book landed in front of Chen Mo.

Seismograph Technology and Manufacturing

Chen Mo has always looked at the book in front of him with amazement: "Can this seismograph be able to warn earthquakes in advance?"

"The correct answer, five hours ahead of the earthquake, the detection range of 50 kilometers." Shu old nodded.

"hiss……"

Chen Mo took a breath of air and then ecstatic. This is definitely a good thing. If the earthquake can be early warning, it is worthwhile.

Without other technology, just this technology is enough for him to become a great man.

"Come to me." Chen Mo could not wait to say.

"You are a technology apprentice now, you can take it yourself." Shu Lao pointed to the book: "Place your hand on the cover of the book."

Chen Mo did not want to, and raised his hand on the cover of the book. Then, the book slowly faded, and in his mind, a lot of information flocked, engraved in the depths of his memory.

With the design drawings, working principles and manufacturing processes of the seismograph, Chen Mo recalled his fascination.

"What technology you need in the future, you only need to choose on the red book, then it will come out, you can get it yourself, but only for the apprenticeship technology, now to introduce you to the apprenticeship of science and technology."

Shu Lao interrupted Chen Mo’s careful memories.

"Your authority, in addition to the technical books that can be acquired at any time, there are optimization functions, but only limited to the technology apprenticeship and the following level of technology optimization. Finally, your apprenticeship has passed, and the monthly access to technology technology is random. cancel."

"How can I be promoted to the next level?" Chen Mo asked.

"Your level mission is this."

Shu Lao’s fingers clicked in the air, and the eight beams of light landed over the library, forming a book in eight directions, suspended quietly in midair.

"These eight books, each of which is a technology, represents a field. There are applied physics, chemical materials, biomedicine, computers, ecology, electromechanical, military weapons, energy."

Shu Lao pointed to the books in eight directions and introduced them to Chen Mo.

"The eight books are just a small representative of this field. The purpose is to tell you that as the owner of the technology library, you must be a versatile person. And your task is to put these eight books. Once the technology is complete, you can move on to the next level."

Chen Mo listened to the introduction of Shu Lao and nodded and understood.

“What if I want to acquire other technologies in the apprenticeship level?” Chen Mo asked.

"You are now a technology apprentice, relying on yourself, technology sharing technology. Sharing the technology you developed to the technology library. But the technology of these eight books is not counted, you have to develop it yourself."

"Understood." Chen Mo nodded.

"These eight books, you have to complete the first book, in order to get the second book. I will go back this time, before you finish the eight technologies, I will not come out. So, everything depends on yourself, I have already You got into the door."

When I heard Shu Lao’s words, Chen Mo’s heart was a little uncomfortable.

After getting along with Shu Lao for so long, he and Shu Lao are also teachers and friends. As a result, Shu Lao is no longer accompanying him to go down, just like a feeling of discomfort in the face of relatives and friends.

"The next road is up to you. Remember to complete these technologies as soon as possible. Your goal is to open the highest authority of the technology library. After you complete the task, we will see you again."

"it is good."

Shu Lao’s figure slowly disappeared, and Chen Mo’s eyes looked at the eight books. The book is like a mystery, only the name of the field, not the specific technology.

Chen Mo thought for a moment, did not worry about getting the contents of the book, and retired from the technology library. He still has a lot of things to do now, and he has no time to study it.

chapters.title: Chapter 109: : Back To School
chapters.body:
Chapter 109: : Back To School

Exiting from the technology library, Chen Mo walked to the window and overlooked the traffic behind him.

After the accident rescued the small fishing, his life trajectory has changed dramatically. It only seems to be not long, but it has changed too much. It has experienced too much during this time.

After feeling the emotion, Chen Mo sat back in his seat and began to organize the technology of the seismograph.

The earthquake is on the earth, and it exists all the time, but the vibration level is too low, and it is usually undetectable.

Earthquakes are caused by sudden fractures and displacements of underground rock layers, and energy will become seismic waves radiating around. Seismic waves have transverse waves and longitudinal waves and are transmitted in the state of mechanical waves.

At present, the most advanced earthquake early warning system in the world is to use the principle that the transmission speed of longitudinal waves is faster than that of transverse waves, and to warn earthquakes in advance. This kind of early warning system can only be alerted at most within 10 seconds to one minute before the destructive transverse wave comes.

This is also why Chen Mo is so ecstatic to get this technology. The earthquake disaster is forecast five hours ahead of schedule, which will be an unprecedented technology.

Of course, this is not to say that all earthquakes can be predicted within five hours. The sudden earthquake such as the sudden break of underground rock mass is unpredictable.

Just like a person living, working step by step, after five hours, can guess where he is. But there are unexpected accidents in the middle, these are unpredictable events.

The normal movement of the crust block can predict the earthquake five hours ahead of time, but the sudden situation is not possible five hours ago, but it is still possible to speed up the warning time.

This seismograph monitors the activity of the underground fault zone by electromagnetic waves, and calculates the time of rock fracture and dislocation in the underground fault zone according to the density and moving speed of the fault rock.

This is a kind of calculation, a small earthquake can not guarantee 100% correct, but a large earthquake can calculate high accuracy, and the damage is mainly caused by a major earthquake, which is enough.

"Ink girl, help me organize technical information."

"Okay, Mom, you said."

Chen Mo is immersed in the collation of the data. The principle theory of the seismograph only needs Chen Mo to say it. The ink girl can record it and organize it into information. This is the benefit of artificial intelligence.

With the presence of the ink girl, the speed at which he organizes the materials is not as fast as he knows.

One of them focused on it, and Chen Mo did not hear anything from the window. Until the ink woman reminded him that Xiao Yu entered the office area, Chen Mo was only able to return.

"What's the matter?" Chen Mo stretched out and looked at the little fish that came in.

"Is the study finished? Now it is off work. If the study is over, go back together. If it is not finished, I will go back first. I will go to the supermarket to buy some food."

"Organizing some technical materials, currently in the theoretical stage of technical preparation, has not reached the point of exhaustion and tiredness." Chen Mo looked at the time and found that it was indeed time to get off work: "Go, I will accompany you."

Chen Mo took a small fishing and left the office.

Out of the company lobby, many of the employees who left work, eyes are on Chen Mo and Xiao Yu. In particular, some female employees, from time to time, used the eyes of envy to sweep through the small fishing.

Chen Mo is the chairman of the company. He is easygoing, has a good character, and is not ugly.

This is the perfect goal of mate selection, but unfortunately, it has become a master of the grass, so that the company is not a girl employee, only fantasy but can not touch.

Usually, Chen Mo is in his own experimental area, and ordinary employees want to enter the experimental area. Even if someone wants to dig into the mind and close to Chen Mo, there is no such opportunity.

"When working in the company, is there any rumor that makes you unhappy?" Chen Mo and Xiao Yu shouldered and walked side by side toward the company's door, and from time to time responded to the greetings from the employees passing by.

"The office gossip is definitely there, you are the public male **** of our company's female employees." Xiao Yu said.

"How can I not know?" Chen Mo touched his nose.

"You hide in the lab all day, how do you know?" said Xiao Yu.

There were a lot of gossip about Chen Mo. One time, two female employees were a bit too much. They talked about it and were heard by Zhao. After expelling two people, the others were honest.

The company's chairman is her boyfriend, she is an intern, she is already the assistant to the president. This kind of thing is inevitably going to be gossip in the company.

At first, she was not under a lot of pressure, but after Zhao Min enlightened her, she didn't care about it.

Anyway, when she first entered the company, she came in by her own ability. Chen Mo hurts her, loves her, what other people say is not important, she still has to live her own life.

"It's okay, I don't pay much attention to this matter. What others say, don't bother." Chen Mo is really afraid of his identity, which will bring trouble to Xiaoyu.

"Know it." Xiao Yu’s face showed a soft smile, and she knew that Chen Mo was worried about her.

The two just stepped out, and Li Ruoxi, who was waiting at the door, greeted him: "Xiaoyu, chairman."

"Now, when I am off duty, don't call me the chairman. You didn't have such a life before." Chen Mo shook his head and smiled. At the beginning of the library, Li Ruoxi’s ability to sell his roommates was something he had experienced.

"Okay." Li Ruoxuan said: "Chen Mo, next week, on the day of our graduation reply, will you go back?"

"Definitely go back." Chen Mo said: "I have to reply."

"I and Xiaoyu have already taken time off and are ready to go back. For some time, we are going to stay in the dormitory for a few days and spend the last part of the campus life. After graduation, I will return the fish to you, don't you mind? Li Ruoxi smiled.

"I just want to go back, together." Chen Mo said: "If you are, how are you in the company?"

When he heard Chen Mo's question, Li Ruoxuan looked bitter: "In addition to the technical workers, Minister Li asked me to do anything. I am exhausted, especially ‘taking care of me.’

"Do you want me to let him adjust the work for you?" Chen Mo asked.

"No." Li Ruoxi immediately shook his head: "Although I have done much, I have learned a lot. I am blessed by you. I know that Minister Li wants to train me, so it is necessary to be tired. If you complain, then sorry. is you."

The three men walked out of the company and boarded the shuttle bus from Wang Hai, and rushed to the supermarket. After buying the things and returning Li Ruoxi to the rental house, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu rushed back to the villa.

In the evening, Xiao Yu was sitting on the sofa and quietly watching the PPT of the thesis defense. There is still a week to reply, Xiaoyu will have time to look at the PPT for the reply.

After a while, Xiao Yu thought of something and stopped.

“Chen Mo, donation and scholarship, Zhao Jie has already let people contact the school. She asked me to ask you, do you want to go in person tomorrow?”

"I definitely want to go back. After all, I donated it, or I need to come out personally." Chen Mo said.

Since leaving school, in addition to occasionally taking a small fishing back to go shopping, usually rarely go back. Just go back this time for a while and complete the final steps.

"Don't you go back to school? Just accompany me."

"Okay." Xiao Yu thought about it and continued to look at the PPT.

"You will recite the manuscript," Chen Mo will cover Xiaoyu's notebook: "Not so nervous, there is still a week, time is enough, now I am peeling chestnuts." Chen Mo grabbed a few chestnuts, put it small The hand of the fish.

Xiao Yu was laughed at by Chen Mo’s movement, and he shot the chestnut back into Chen Mo’s hand.

"I am cooking for you, now I want to peel you chestnuts? You really are pigs? You peeled me, there are these walnuts, or I will buckle you."

“Hey? Is it fat, threatening me?”

......

One night without words, the next day, Chen Mo took a small fishing and went back to Binhai University.

chapters.title: Chapter 110: : Identity Exposure
chapters.body:
Chapter 110: : Identity Exposure

"Little fishing sister, Zhao Jie came to the phone..."

On the way to the school, the voice of Xiaoyu Mobile Smart Assistant rang. Xiao Yu rushed to connect the phone, and after a while, hang up the phone.

"What is Zhao Min looking for you?" Chen Mo asked.

“Zhao Jie said that the principal and your teacher will meet at the school gate.”

"No?"

Chen Mo smiled, the headmaster and the teacher greeted him as a student. This battle was a bit big. It seems that he would not be able to go back quietly. He could not put the pigeons of the principal and the teacher.

"What is not, you donate 20 million to the school, and the school does not provide you as a Buddha," said Xiao Yu.

The car soon came to the main entrance of Binhai University.

At this time, the main entrance of Binhai University, there are many people standing in the dense. The principal and some leading teachers are also among them. Many students are on the lookout, and there are several student journalists.

Everyone is curious, what the great gods have come to the school, and the headmaster and so many leaders come out to meet.

After seeing Chen Mo’s car stop, there was a commotion on the field.

"Well, I originally wanted to keep a low profile. It seems that it is not a low-key." Looking at the posture of the school gate, Chen Mo said quietly.

After the door was opened, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came down from the car.

Seeing Chen Mo wearing ordinary casual clothes, many people whispered. No matter how you look at Chen Mo, it’s like ordinary students in their school. It’s not like a big man.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came, and the long-awaited principal and teacher all greeted them.

Who is he?

The person who saw this scene had a huge doubt in his heart. Some students have already used their mobile phones to record small videos to send friends.

"President Qiu, this is the chairman of our company and the student of your school, Chen Mo." Li Lingfeng introduced Chen Mo's identity to everyone.

"Chen Mo, welcome back."

Standing in the middle, with gold wire frame glasses, the middle-aged man with his back, stretched out his hand and Chen Mo gripped tightly, with a happy smile on his face.

He is Qiu Guofeng, the president of Binhai University.

In the past few years, the university has seen this principal in addition to the opening ceremony. This is the second time that the school’s principal has been seen.

Standing on the left side of Qiu Guofeng, is a clever, middle-aged man with a short stature, Yang Xiaodong, the dean of Chen Mo’s physics department, and Chen Hong’s class teacher and counselor Li Hong, vice president and other teachers.

"Principal, Dean, Teacher." Chen Mo and all the teachers greeted him. In this case, he did not know how to be good.

"Young and promising, really worthy of being a student at Binhai University, the school will be proud of you in the future." Qiu Guofeng looked at the silence and nodded.

"Thank you for the praise of the principal, the students are afraid to be." Chen Mo can only say with a hard scalp.

"teacher."

After the principal was simply placed, Chen Mocai looked at Li Hong. When he came out to start a business, he was also an application for helplessness submitted by the counselor.

"I didn't expect to be a big boss worth more than 100 million so soon."

Li Hong’s face is full of joy, and her students are so proud of her achievements.

At the beginning, Chen Mo applied for an exemption and said that it was a business. She thought that Chen Mo was just a small business, and did not expect to become a legendary company in the business, actually created by Chen Mo.

Now she suddenly felt that it was a very wise decision to put Chen Mo to start a business.

"In front of you, I will always be a student."

"Go in and talk about it. It is still at the school gate. There are too many people." Yang Xiaodong looked around and said.

Now that the physics college has produced such a talented student, it has to be amazing to create a business legend in a short time.

A group of people walked into the school, the school forum and the circle of friends, and they have already screened all kinds of news.

Boys' dormitory, Puyuan brushed friends circle.

Suddenly, Puyuan’s gaze reveals the color of surprise: “Everyone, stop and stop, don’t play games, recognize people, this is Chen Mo.”

"Hey? Chen Mozhen?" The fat man who is playing the game and Zhu Gang just surrounded.

"This is Chen Mo, next to his girlfriend, you didn't admit it." The fat man said: "How did he get a luxury car and was greeted by the principal?"

"Full generation?"

"The second generation of rich wool, fat man, are you sure this girl is Chen Mo's girlfriend?" Liu De asked.

"Of course, Chen Mo's kid, rented a computer repair shop in the food street last semester, his girlfriend often gave him a meal, I have seen several times." Fat man said.

"I have seen this girl. She is the assistant to the president of the marching ant company. I have seen the interview video of the marching ant company." said Liu De, who was a little bit fangs.

"No? Is it that Chen Mozhen is rich in white?" said Niu Lei, who is full of muscles.

The people in a dormitory face each other and the more they want, the more likely they are.

"Wait, you just said the marching ant company?" Puyuan seems to think of something: "The chairman of the marching ant company, like Chen Mo, just kept smelling his name, the same name? Coincidence?"

When the words came out, the dormitory fell into silence, and then several people took a breath.

......

The identity of Chen Mo and Xiao Yu could not be hidden at all, and people soon inferred. It didn’t take long for Chen Mogang to come to Binhai University. There was a post on the school’s forum.

Chen Mo, chairman of the marching ant company, is Chen Mo, a senior student at the school. 》

The post is inferred from the name of the chairman of the marching ant company, the identity of Chen Mo, the name, and the identity of Xiao Yu, the assistant to the president of the marching ant company.

Everything is linked, it is easy to conclude that Chen Mo, the chairman of the marching ant company, is Chen Mo who was greeted by the principal.

Only the high-ranking person who is the chairman of the marching ant company will come over and let the principal meet personally.

As soon as this post came out, the forum of Binhai University was bustling. According to the analysis of the post, it is already eighty-nine.

The chairman of the marching ant company has not appeared in the public. They did not expect that the legend of the domestic business community, the chairman is actually a student of their school.

"I don't believe in killing me. The control person of the marching ant company is actually a student in our school? Are you making me laugh?"

"I believe, I am part-time in the food street, this Chen Mo, seen in the computer repair shop in the school food street, the technology is very high. Her girlfriend, is next to the girl, often give him a meal, very loving. I I was fed the dog food, so I was very impressed."

“Unbelievable, the legend is so close to me.”

"I am Chen Mo's classmates. We all agree with this view. The group is crazy now."

"I am a classmate of He Xiaoyu, and Xiaoyu is indeed the assistant to the president at the Army Ant Company."

"I want to be a mistress for him!"

The post is being madly reprinted in the circle of friends at Binhai University.

Because of their alumni, there was a legendary figure and the chairman of the marching ant company that did not appear in the public.

This is the first exposure of the chairman of the marching ant company. Although it is only speculation, it has already been affirmed.

After the lively circle of friends and forums at Binhai University, the post was quickly forwarded to Weibo.

The identity of the chairman of the marching ant company alone is enough to cause curiosity. After all, the marching ant, the new technology giant, has settled in one of the domestic technology giants.

Chen Mo has never appeared in the media and the public. I did not expect this identity to suddenly burst out. This is an excellent opportunity to understand Chen Mo.

The Internet community has become hot because of this post.

chapters.title: Chapter 111: : Speech?
chapters.body:
Chapter 111: : Speech?

Zeng Jian slept a little confused, suddenly the ringing of the phone, hard to pull him from the bed.

Some time ago, tired and tired, the editor did not take him as a person. I am so hard to go back to school to prepare for graduation. I don’t want to sleep well. I am sorry for myself.

"Who is so wicked, call me so early. Hey, who?" Zeng Jian grabbed the phone, didn't look at it, and said nothing.

"Zeng Jian!"

"Rely, who are you?"

"Are you stupid? Call you." A short, short voice came from the phone: "Are you a student at the University of Binhai?"

“Editor?” After seeing the caller ID, Zeng Jian was sober-minded: “Editor, I am a student at Binhai University. What happened?”

"I heard that Chen Mo, the chairman of the marching ant company, is a graduate of the same year. I am going back to your school today. You immediately follow up on his report and see what big news, come back and I will turn you back."

“Running ant company? Director? Graduate?”

After hanging up the phone, Zeng Jian was still sitting on the bed and looked awkward. After the reaction, Zeng Jian opened the phone. Not long after, he turned it up from the bed, quickly washed it, and ran out of the dormitory with the camera.

This is not a case. The reporter who got the news rushed to Binhai University from all directions.

The marching ant company has developed too crazy. During this time, the news about the marching ant company is a hot spot.

Suddenly, the chairman of the marching ant company is just a recent graduate. The information contained in this news is absolutely explosive news.

In the end, there are many talented people who can make a company into one of the giants in such a short time.

As a party, Chen Mo is visiting the school with the principal. He was the first to encounter this kind of honour, even if he was already familiar with the school, he could only bite his head together.

"Chen Mo, I have a ruthless request here." Qiu Guofeng squatted and thought about opening.

"President, you said." Chen Mo said.

“The school will prepare a donation ceremony in the auditorium tomorrow. At that time, the students of the school will be organized to watch. Can you give a speech on the stage and give your schoolmates a model?” Qiu Guofeng asked.

Now Chen Mo is a giant figure, and ordinary people want to ask for trouble. This is a good opportunity, you must not miss it.

"I really don't know how to refuse this." Chen Mo thought about it and finally nodded.

"Then I will promise you, I will go back and make arrangements."

Qiu Guofeng’s face is full of smiles. The University of Binhai has such an outstanding student. It is a blessing for their school. If they are not happy, they will not do it.

“The student representative of the graduation ceremony, do you have time?”

"President, I will not go to the graduation ceremony, you will leave the opportunity to other students." Chen Mo laughed.

"That's all right." Qiu Guofeng nodded.

All the way to go and chat, the school wandered around, and looked at the watch, Chen Mocai took a small fishing, bid farewell to the principal and the teacher left.

"You are now a school celebrity."

Xiaoyu put the phone in front of Chen Mo, which is a variety of posts in the school forum, many of which are about Chen Mo's post.

In addition, there are many news about Chen Mo's identity on the Internet, which is now hot news. If the message is confirmed, this will be the strongest graduate, a new generation of legends.

"You see this." Xiao Yu smiled and put a post on the forum in front of Chen Mo.

"Chen Mozhi's romantic affairs"

Seeing this post, Chen Mo can't smile.

Sure enough, people are afraid that the famous pig is afraid of strong, this is only a long time back, there is such a legend in school. If he didn't see these stories, he didn't know that he had done so many things.

What is even more troublesome is that the picture of the principal welcoming him is also on the top. Now there is no doubt that he has been known by the school.

"The school is now a bad reporter. Many people already know about you. You have to go to the lecture tomorrow. It seems that you can't keep a low profile since today." Xiao Yu said with gloating.

"What can I do?" Chen Mo said helplessly: "But the identity exposure is only a matter of time. If you don't say this, do you want to go back to the dormitory now?"

"If you and I are waiting for me, I have to go back now. You still go back and prepare for the speech of the donation ceremony tomorrow," said Xiao Yu.

Sending Xiaoyu back to the dormitory downstairs, Chen Mo walked back to his dormitory alone.

I have been away for so long, although he and the people in the dormitory have a lot of iron buddies, but they are good friends. When I come back this time, I can’t say it without going back.

It’s time for class, not many people, and no one will pay attention to him.

In the dormitory, at this time, five people, who have no intention to play games, are discussing Chen Mo’s business.

Chen Mo and their dormitory, lived together after entering the university. As a result, they played in the university for a few years, but during this time, Chen Mo became a handsome man.

There is no harm without comparison, and now the mind of playing games is gone.

"I didn't expect Chen Mo to hide deeply." The fat man took the lead: "When he comes back, he must play local tyrants."

"I secondly," said Liu De.

"I am seconding." said Zhuang Nan Niu Lei, who is holding a dumbbell next to him.

"I think everyone is calling together. Chicken is good."

His appearance attracted a lot of eyes.

"Call your female donor."

"Who wants to be a female donor?" A voice rang, and Chen Mo came in from the door.

Seeing Chen Mo, several people lived, and finally looked at Chen Mo, and wanted to see what Chen Mo had. Chen Mo was still discussing. Now Chen Mo is coming back and doesn't know what to say.

The eyes of five people made Chen Mo feel a little hairy: "What are you doing with me?"

"You are the chairman of the marching ant company?" asked the fat man.

"Guess it." Chen Mo smiled.

really! The five people in the dormitory face each other. Chen Mo's identity, they are just speculation, after all, also called Chen Mo, the girlfriend is the assistant to the president of the marching ant company, think about it, can guess.

"Local tyrants, please eat." Liu De said.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded immediately: "Where you can eat."

"Tell good together. Silk, as a result, you quietly change from the 屌. Silk to the male god, let us feel embarrassed." Zhu Gang said this sentence, telling the thoughts of several people.

"Wait, I will take a picture with the billionaire and put it in a circle of friends. After that, my roommate is a billionaire. Then I can brag for a few days."

The smallest Puyuan, immediately took out his mobile phone and ran to Chen Mo, posing a scissors.

"I am coming too." The fat man also took the phone out: "Let's come together again."

Several people were in the dormitory for a while, just after a circle of friends, a few students in the next dormitory, also ran over and looked for Chen Mo. The chairman of the marching ant company, the future may be a legend. This time, I didn’t take a photo, and there was no such good opportunity in the future.

In the evening, Chen Mo invited several people to eat.

A few people didn't make a difference because of his identity. They talked and laughed one night. They all talked about some interesting things about college life and some plans for the future. I am about to graduate, and their path will be different in the future.

During the university, there were occasional contradictions between them, but they were quickly put down. The relationship was not iron buddies, but it was a good friend.

After drinking the wine, and after a few people, Chen Mocai rushed back to his villa.

chapters.title: Chapter 112: :Ceremony
chapters.body:
Chapter 112: :Ceremony

The next morning, after Chen Mo received a call from Xiaoyu, he got up and rushed to school. Today is the day of the donation ceremony. He wants to attend the ceremony and speaks more than on stage.

Just came to the school, Xiao Yu, Li Lingfeng, Li Ruojun, and a group of principals, have been waiting at the door. When Chen Mo’s car came over, the group immediately greeted him.

"Chen Mo, I have to say sorry to you about something." After seeing Chen Mo, Qiu Guofeng said: "Because there are too many students who are listening to your speech, the auditorium can't accommodate it, so I changed the venue to the square last night. Held. I am afraid to bother you at night, I will not inform you."

"That's it? It's okay, it's the same." Chen Mo said. For him, just change the stage and go everywhere.

"Today's donation process is like this..." Xiao Yu went to Chen Mo and began to introduce Chen Mo to today's process.

Soon, the group came outside the square.

They just appeared, and the students who had been sitting in the square had commotion, and they turned their heads and looked over here. Then, a warm applause broke out.

The media reporter who had already waited in the square also turned the camera to Chen Mo.

The marching ant company is a legend of the domestic business community. Their president, Zhao Min, has appeared in front of the camera numerous times and is a well-deserved net red. However, the seat as the chairman of the powers has never appeared in the public.

Until yesterday, the posts and news that flowed out from Binhai University let them know the identity of the chairman of the marching ant company.

When I heard about Chen Mo’s speech at Binhai University today, many reporters kept on rushing to the coastal city overnight.

Chen Mo looked at the crowded head in front of him, and his heart was screaming. No wonder the auditorium can't fit it. It is estimated that there are six or seven thousand people in the hall. Half of the school people have come over.

Many classes have been organized and listened to. Chen Mo did not know that for this ceremony, the school also notified the holiday day.

He never thought about it. When he first gave a speech, there were so many people coming to see it.

After Chen Mo was seated, the applause stopped and the scene was quiet. Just facing the lens of many reporters, he is still not used to it.

At the beginning of the ceremony, Qiu Guofeng took to the stage.

At this time, Qiu Guofeng, who was full of energy, interviewed ruddy, and rationalized the microphone in front of him, said: "I know, you are not coming to see me this old thing today."

His self-deprecating voice just fell, and there was a burst of laughter underneath, accompanied by crazy applause. The principal’s humor, they had already seen it at the opening ceremony, and I didn’t expect to ridicule myself this time.

"But I still have to say a few words, but this sentence is a bit long."

Qiu Guofeng smiled and continued to speak.

"When I started school, I have already told everyone of you. Today, you are proud of Binhai University. Tomorrow, Binhai University will be proud of you. Why do I say this to each of you? Because I am a little lazy. The speeches at the opening ceremony every year are the same. There is this sentence on it."

There was another laughter in the audience.

"Today, our University of Binhai is proud of a student. He is Chen Mo, your senior. I hope that you, like him, will fight for your dreams and be a useful person, not all day. Like an ostrich, hide in the corner to live.

I hope that one day in the future, standing on this platform and talking to your brothers and sisters will be one of you. I hope that you will become the next Chen Mo. Even if you can’t become the next Chen Mo, you have to be useful to the society. People. I heard that the shorter the speech, the more intense the applause! ”

"it is good……"

The students below reacted and began to applaud and cheered loudly. A stinking and long speech, they have heard countless times and have not heard anything useful.

The principal’s speech, though short, can at least hear a little.

The applause gradually subsided, and Qiu Guofeng said: "The following is a donation ceremony, and we have our Chen Mo schoolmaster to come to power."

Qiu Guofeng looked at Chen Mo, who was sitting downstairs. The eyes of other people all went to Chen Mo’s position. The shots of all the reporters are also directed at Chen Mo.

They know that today, this big boy is the protagonist.

In less than a year, marching ants have created a business miracle, and this miracle will become a legend in the business world.

The current marching ant company is a boat, and it is left and right in the already fixed market form, and Chen Mo is the helmsman behind the giant ship of the marching ant.

If it weren't for the facts, they wouldn't associate the chairman of the marching ant company with the easy-going big boy in front of the camera.

“Chen Mo, donated 20 million to the school, we will use this money to create better learning conditions for the students. At the same time, the marching ant company established an ant scholarship at Binhai University to help students with excellent academic performance and family difficulties. Classmates. We used the warmest applause and thanked Chen Mo and the army ant company."

Qiu Guofeng had a joy on his face, and he applauded constantly. The applause from the bottom was connected, and a good voice appeared constantly.

Under the stage, Li Ruoxuan looked around and smiled and attached it to Xiao Yu's ear.

"Small fish, is there a feeling of pride? Is your man so powerful?"

"Look first, don't make trouble." Little fisherman's roots are red, push Li Ruoxuan, continue to applaud, but his eyes fall on Chen Mo, but very gentle.

"Look at your eyes, you know that you have fallen." Li Ruoxuan once again stretched his head: "I should say that he is lucky, or are you lucky?"

"I am lucky." Xiao Yu smiled.

"You are indeed lucky." Li Ruojun said, "You look at the girls' gaze, keep your man, don't be robbed."

"Now is not the time to say this." Xiao Yu looked helplessly at Li Ruoxi.

The applause is higher than a wave, and many people applaud. Especially Chen Mo’s college and class, the applause is the most intense, and many people have already shouted out.

"The senior is handsome!"

"Schoolmaster, I love you!"

......

In the endless applause, there is a shout of not classmates. Then, the shouts screamed in a row, letting Chen Mo on the stage laugh and cry.

In the applause and shouts, Chen Mo handed the big check in his hand to Qiu Guofeng. The reporters under the stage, the long guns and short guns facing the handover of the two, a mad shot.

After the donation, Qiu Guofeng opened his mouth again.

"Next, your student Chen Mo will give you a speech. This is the place where your seniors are. The female show, everyone applauds."

In the fierce applause, Qiu Guofeng with a happy color, stepped back and handed the stage to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo looked at the dense head under the stage and went to the small podium of the microphone with his scalp. This is his first speech, and he was so big yesterday that he was not prepared for the speech. Now he can only catch the ducks.

At the moment before standing at the small podium, all the applause stopped. Countless pairs of mixed expectations, envious eyes cast on Chen Mo.

Each of them is curious and Chen Mo will talk to them.
