chapters.title: Chapter 113: : People And Ants
chapters.body:
Chapter 113: : People And Ants

Now everyone's eyes are on Chen Mo, and even some news media have already started live broadcast on the Internet.

This is his first exposure to the spotlight. If it was before, he would definitely be nervous, but now he has a different vision and what he sees is different.

After starting to bite the scalp and standing on the small podium, Chen Mo relaxed and looked at the students and reporters below.

"Hello everyone, I am Chen Mo. You came here today, you should come to listen to me this little thing." Chen Mo said.

As soon as the words were finished, the people below burst into laughter, accompanied by intense applause. This is obviously a mockery in the tone of the school principal.

"Before today, like many of you, I have never been to the podium, and I have never spoken to so many people. I used to fantasize about speaking on the stage. But when I came up today, I found out that I The first time it was gone."

A gentle laughter was raised again under the stage.

Chen Mo raised his hand and pressed down everyone's voice. Naturally, I can’t see it for the first time.

After Chen Mo entered the topic, everyone in the field was quiet. Everyone is looking at the stage seriously. The students in the forefront have already taken out their mobile phones, and the lenses are all facing Chen Mo.

"I heard the principal just said, I hope that you will make the next Chen Mo. Chen Mo himself warned you, don't do the next Chen Mo. You are you, not the same, everyone is unique.

In fact, the principal has made you the next Chen Mo, which has a purpose. He hopes that you will donate money to the school like me. ”

When Chen Mo said this, he immediately burst into laughter, accompanied by thunderous applause. This sentence ridiculed himself and also ridiculed the principal. Qiu Guofeng, who has even retired, smiled and applauded.

"The last sentence is a joke, don't take it seriously. But it is also telling you that you have to be different." Chen Mo continued: "Those rules, I don't tell you too much, many of you know better than me. ""

"In college, you only have to do one thing. Just one thing is what you like to do. Literature and art must be called dreams. If your dream is to become a 屌. silk, then you have to surpass Zhang Yida as Goal. Zhang Yida wants to win a lawsuit. Why can't you win two lawsuits?"

Speaking of Zhang Yida, laughter broke out again under the stage.

"No matter which major you are, what to study. University, choose a thing you like, and then stick to it and keep making progress. The word 'persistence' is very simple, it is easy to say, it is difficult to do.

There is no essential difference between humans and ants. They are also alive and alive. What makes us different from ants is that the content of our lives is more exciting..."

"it is good."

Chen Mo only spoke a few words, and applause interrupted his words. People are alive, and there is no essential difference between them and ants. This sentence has aroused the resonance of many people. All their efforts are to live better and live.

After the applause subsided, Chen Mocai spoke again.

"The students who are about to leave the society are like the ants who just came out of the nest. Next to the ant nest, the delicious food has long been occupied by other ants. The world today is the giant capital. These giants are the food that occupies the ant nest. Ant colony.

The roads that can be opened up around have been opened up by the predecessors, and the remaining unknown areas are becoming less and less. If you want to eat meat, you have to go further afield to find food. This requires us to be like a lonely hero, in the field of love, to stick to the road.

In school days, focusing on one thing is enough to make you an elite in the field of your choice. When you step out of society in the future, you will find that there are only one or two ants in a large chunk of meat. You can easily join them and get the meat you want.

I started the marching ant because I used to be an ant just out of the nest. I am only lucky, it is an open army ant, and I also met an ant who can only help me manage the team.

As you can see, the marching ant company stands at the top of the food chain. All the giants used to be an ant..."

Chen Mo’s speech was not long, only less than five minutes. Give a simple example to compare with them. After all, speeches, empty talks, and a little factual basis.

Until Chen Mo stopped, all the talents reacted, and then, bursts of applause broke out.

Chen Mo’s metaphor is very appropriate. They are ordinary people, like an ant, humble and small. In this era of lack of opportunities and opportunities everywhere, I want to take a step and must be good enough.

"Sorry, just bragging over the head." Chen Mo smiled.

When the words came out, I laughed loudly. The applause that just stopped under the stage broke out again.

"Every student, chances are rare. If you have any questions, you can ask Chen Mo, the principal." The host looked at the timing and stood up and said.

When the host’s words fell, the students under the audience raised their hands.

The next moment, a girl ran from the crowd to the stage and raised her hand. The girl is wearing a ponytail, her face is a little tender, with a baby fat, it looks a little cute.

"This story tells us that action is more practical than sitting." Chen Mo looked at the girl who ran out and said: "The first question is for the school girl."

The girls took the microphone, and some were embarrassed to say: "How can I make myself better?"

"Like you are now, you are the first to get a microphone. In this case, you are better than other students. When you want to get something, fight for it, the process of action will make you change. Excellent."

“Thank you, the schoolmaster.” The girl seemed to understand a little, thanked and walked back to her position.

"Next classmate."

After the words were finished, more than 20 students all ran to the front of the stage, and several people ran in.

"This story tells us to be the first person to eat crabs. Now I choose one of you, and the rest are the competition."

Chen Mo answered the question with all his heart, until he answered the question.

The speech took an hour and answered many students' questions. These are some insignificant questions. Many students are confused about their future. At this point, Chen Mo can't help.

After the speech, Chen Mocai walked off the stage with warm applause.

The ceremonies were scattered, and the reporters who had been under the stage were surrounded. It’s not easy to see Chen Mo once. If you can interview Chen Mo, this is the news.

"Mr. Chen Mo, what is your plan for the future of marching ants?"

"Why do marching ants fail to enter Europe?"

"What is the next product of the marching ant?"

......

A group of reporters shouted at Chen Mo, but because of the security guards, they could not get close to Chen Mo.

"Sorry, everyone, now I can't answer these questions. I will give you the answer one day in the future." Chen Mo responded politely and left in the crowds.

Get rid of all the reporters and walk back to the car, Chen Mo was relieved. Now I finally know that being watched is also a very tiring thing.

The video of Chen Mo’s speech was quickly uploaded on the Internet. As a legend of the business world, his identity has always been concerned.

"The first speech of the head of the marching ant company"

"A generation of legends? Chen Mo

"The ruler behind the scenes of the marching ant"

On the Internet, it was occupied by various articles titled Chen Mo. The young and terrible Chen Mo has also become the object of discussion. Chen Mo appeared in front of the public this time and completely satisfied the curiosity of everyone. Just a public speech, he has become a network red man.

chapters.title: Chapter 114: : Eat Fish?
chapters.body:
Chapter 114: : Eat Fish?

The online world is bustling, and Chen Mo’s news is everywhere. Chen Mo has become a celebrity. Any app that can see the news has news about Chen Mo. In just half a day, Chen Mo, the chairman of the marching ant, was well-known to Zhao Min. Genius, the youngest billionaire, the perfect boyfriend, etc., all kinds of titles are set on Chen Mo's head.

Some people even boldly confessed to the official microblog of the marching ant company, causing a lot of discussion. The focus of attention of everyone, at this time and Xiaoyu in the supermarket.

"Don't you say that you are going back to the dormitory these days?"

"I understand why you are low-key now." Xiao Yu smiled and picked up a box of greens and put it in the shopping cart: "The girls are more complicated than I thought. Several people in our dormitory were disturbed by other girls in the class yesterday. I’m so annoying, I finally get rid of the lights when I turn off the lights.”

"What are you doing?" Chen Mo asked strangely.

"After your relationship with me is exposed, they want me to ask you to go out and play together. As for what will happen next, you should know?" said Xiao Yu.

"I really don't know, what will happen?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Take me a slap, let's eat it." Xiao Yu's eyes are not good: "Do you want to go?"

"There is no such idea." Chen Mo hurriedly shook his head.

"We are not very familiar with them. Suddenly came over and made our dormitory a bit awkward. Then today, if I don't want to go back to the dormitory, I will be rushed back and become a abandoned child. You will not take me." ?" Xiao Yu said.

She did not expect that there would be so much trouble after Chen Mo and her relationship were exposed. First of all, various news, then various telephone calls, after returning to the dormitory, I was also annoyed to find Chen Mo. As before, there is absolutely no such thing.

"How is it possible, come back better, at least I don't have to cook for myself, and some people wash the smelly socks."

"Do you really treat me as your babysitter?" Xiao Yu was laughed at by Chen Mo's appearance: "What do you want to eat tonight? I will buy it now."

"Eat fish."

"Then go buy..."

Xiao Yu lived, feeling wrong, turned to see Chen Mo's unwilling eyes. Suddenly understood, the small fish ear roots were red and snorted: "Why do you want to eat fish and look at me?"

After that, you will escape to the fresh market.

Looking at the back of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo smiled softly and pushed the shopping cart to follow.

Strolling in the fresh market, Xiaoyu and snacks are not in the air, stopped in front of the fish stall, only to return to God: "Boss, how to sell this fish?"

"12 pieces, 1 kg, girl, you really pick. These fish are the best fish here. I will pick the biggest one for you."

The aunt of the fish stall saw the little fisher coming over, and immediately opened his eyes and smiled, reaching for the fish in the bucket.

"Boss, not so big, we can't finish it. Half will do it, or smaller, we will eat small fish." Chen Mo said quickly.

When he had just finished speaking, he felt the pain in his instep, and the foot of the small fish had already stepped on his instep.

Xiao Yu did not dare to look directly at Chen Mo, but the shameful face has already betrayed her.

"I didn't make a mistake? I bought so many dishes, and then I have such a big fish. I can't eat it, I waste it... I am wrong." Feeling the pain from his feet, Chen Mo hurriedly begged for mercy in the small fisherman's ear.

"Well, let's come here." The boss aunt saw the intimate appearance of the two, and smiled: "Young man, there are not many girls who will make fish now, you have to cherish it."

"Yes." Chen Mo laughed.

On the way to buy a good fish back, Xiao Yu's face is still ruddy, bowing his head. When I first entered the villa, I ran to the kitchen and saw her appearance. Chen Mo grinned and walked in.

“What fish do you like the most?” Chen Mo asked while washing the vegetables.

"I like it, my dad is a fishing boat. Every time I come back to the sea, I have a lot of fish. I like to eat since I was a child." Xiaoyu said.

"My little family is also a fishing boat. Whenever I come back, I will send fish to our house. But in recent years, I have not been at home, and I rarely eat it." Chen Mo said.

When he heard Chen Mo say that he was a little embarrassed, Xiao Yu remembered the last time he was blind, and then his face smiled.

"What are you laughing at?" Chen Mo is inexplicable.

"Laughter you stupid like this dead fish." Xiao Yu gave him a look and continued to deal with the fish.

"Where am I stupid?" Chen Mo said without a word: "If I have this fish, I will definitely live and say that this is the same root, and it is too urgent."

"Do you want me to fry you in a pan?"

"Still forget it." Chen Mo immediately refused.

Soon, the food was ready. For two people, the food was a bit more, and there was more fish than usual.

Looking at the hot dishes on the table, Chen Mo showed a relaxed smile, this small day is still good. When he looked at Xiaoyu, he found that Xiaoyan’s eyes were dodging.

After a meal, Xiao Yu did not say too much, seems to be thinking about something. Just finished eating, put down the tableware and hurried back to the room.

The night becomes rich in the call of the stars.

In the villa, Chen Mo sat on the sofa and quietly watched the news of the mobile phone. There are some news about him on this, all about his life or anecdotes in the school.

Chen Mo himself laughed. These stories, he didn't look at it, didn't know that he had experienced it.

Just now he wanted to enter the room, and the result was caught by Xiao Yu, but he could only sit in the hall to watch the news. Just as Chen Mo looked at the news, the door suddenly opened.

Xiao Yu wears a nightdress, with wet hair, sitting down on the sofa. At this time, the little fisherman, his face is still a little rosy, his hands are pinching the roots of the nightdress, I don’t know what I am thinking.

This tight state of fishing, looks particularly cute, Chen Mo's eyes softened, staring at the small fishing.

"Is it enough? Help me blow my hair." Xiao Yu did not dare to look directly at Chen Mo, and even his voice shook slightly.

"okay."

Chen Mo realized that he was watching, reacted, and hurriedly found a hair dryer to blow the hair to Xiao Yu.

Every time Xiaoyu washes his head, as long as Chen Mo is around, Chen Mo is blowing her. This seems to have become an indispensable thing in the lives of two people.

Just never once, let her be so nervous. Even for the first time, Chen Mo was blowing her hair, and she was not so tight.

Today Chen Mo’s words are too obvious. She tries to make herself pretend not to understand, but she simply pretends not to come out.

"You are very nervous?" Chen Mo asked softly.

"Don't ask." Xiao Yu was asked by Chen Mo and became more nervous.

"If you are not ready, I can wait for you." Chen Mo said while blowing her hair.

"No...no." Xiao Yu said: "You are a fool, don't ask." Xiao Yu has been incoherent, and now she doesn't know what she is thinking.

"Well, don't ask." Chen Mo laughed and quietly blows his hair to Xiao Yu.

The sound of the hair dryer, coupled with Chen Mo’s hand, let Xiao Yu’s tension slowly disappear and his body relaxed.

Just after the hair dryer stopped, Xiao Yu was nervous again and his body became tight.

Just after returning to God, I saw Chen Mo with a smirk face.

"Well, let's take your little fish, it's mine. I won't have any bones left for you." Chen Mo grabbed Xiao Yu and walked toward the bedroom.

Xiao Yu’s brain was blank, and he was forgotten even if he struggled. He was allowed to hold Chen Mo and buried his head on his shoulder. She knows that this day will come sooner or later.

At the moment of entering the bedroom, Chen Mo bowed his head and kissed him. Just as Xiao Yu gave up the resistance, Chen Moi prepared for the next step, the phone suddenly sounded.

"Mer brother, there is a phone."

chapters.title: Chapter 115: :Graduation
chapters.body:
Chapter 115: :Graduation

Chen Mo stopped, grabbed the phone, looked at the electric display, stroked his forehead, and went out.

"Mom." Chen Mo is on the phone.

"Amer, just now you gave us a news. I said that it is the chairman of the marching ant company. Is that person you?" There was an anxious voice on the phone.

"Mom, are you calling, just to ask this?" Chen Mo almost didn't cry out: "I didn't tell you about the New Year? I opened a company called the marching ant company, the news you saw. That person is me."

"So big, you don't tell me and your dad."

There was a happy and angry voice on the other end of the phone. The happy thing was that the son had a good life. The anger was that Chen Mo did not tell them.

"Mom, didn't you say the New Year? I opened the company." Chen Mo smiled.

"My father and I went to Binhai City in a few days. Are you healthy there? Nothing?"

"The body is very good." Chen Mo heart meditation, something was interrupted by you, but just think about it, did not say: "Mom, you and Dad pay attention to the body, come to Binhai City, I will tell you."

"it is good."

After hanging up the phone, Chen Mo walked back to the room.

Xiao Yu was lying on the bed, his face was swaying and his eyes were closed. After hearing the sound of opening the door, the body tightened again and pulled the quilt subconsciously. She felt that the heart was jumping out.

After waiting for a long time, I found that there was no movement, and Xiao Yu opened his eyes gently. It was Chen Mo’s smiling face.

"I know you are sleeping."

"I fell asleep." Xiao Yu almost didn't cover his face, too shy.

"Sleeping can still talk." Chen Mo smiled: "My mom just called and said that in a few days to come to Binhai, I will take you to see you."

"I really want to see?" Xiao Yu stayed and looked at Chen Mo, looks a little nervous.

"Otherwise?" Chen Mo said: "The last time I went back, I didn't tell them about you. The result was that I was arrested by Xiaoyan. I was there when you were there, otherwise I could not find an excuse to escape."

When he heard Chen Mo say this, Xiao Yu laughed: "Have you seen the girl who is dating you?"

"No." Chen Mo shook his head: "I am looking for an excuse to run."

"You don't want to see that girl?"

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu strangely: "You are not jealous? You are not afraid that I will go to see the girl and run with her."

"Ghosts are jealous." Xiao Yu snorted and ate his own vinegar, she was not so powerful.

"Okay, don't say this. This time you see my parents with me, otherwise they may also arrest me for a blind date." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Xiaoyu hesitated before he nodded.

"Let's sleep, this little fish is kept, the next time I look for a chance to eat again, give you a perfect night."

Chen Mo hugged Xiao Yu, kissed him and slept. The little fish in his arms, with a sweet smile, drilled into Chen Mohuai and closed his eyes.

......

The rain of the wet clothes drove away the long sweltering heat, bringing a cool cool to the graduation season.

In the lecture hall, Chen Mo looked calmly at the teacher below.

"The research method I use is a multi-slit one-step rainbow holography. The advantage of one-step rainbow holography is that the plaque noise is smaller than the two-step rainbow hologram. However, there is a disadvantage that the field of view is limited by the size of the lens.

For the problem of color blur and line blur, I used a multi-slit approach. When shooting a rainbow hologram, a double-slit, three-slit hologram reproduces the image, which is brighter than a single slit. As long as the slit width is appropriate, the color blur caused by the white light reproduction does not overlap the reproduced image..."

Chen Mo answered the teacher's question carefully. After a long time, he carried his backpack and walked out of the lecture hall with a relaxed smile on his face.

The defense has been completed, and his graduation thesis is "Photographing and Experimental Research of Rainbow Holography."

This is the title of the thesis that was determined shortly after the start of the fourth year of school. Looking for ways to increase the rainbow holographic field of view, compare the method of increasing the field of view and optimize the improvement.

When I was in an accident at the library, I was looking for paper materials. The paper is not too difficult, Chen Mo has completed the last semester. The defense and graduation design is very simple for him now.

Leaving the teaching building, Chen Mo rushed to the square.

At this time, Binhai University is full of excitement and immersed in the joy and parting of graduation. In the beautiful corners of the campus, you can see people who are taking photos in groups.

Today is the day of the graduation photo of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo trotting all the way.

In the square, a variety of people, Chen Mo looked for a moment in the crowd, and soon saw a small fishing waiting under the big tree.

At this time, the little fish, holding two bunches of flowers, with a smile on his face. The long black hair was tied up, revealing the white goose neck, leaving two dragons in front of the forehead, wearing a bachelor's suit, looking very fresh.

"Long wait, beautiful girl." Chen Mo stopped at Xiaoyu.

After seeing Chen Mo, Xiao Yu’s smile turned away and his eyes were bent into crescents. After a while, Li Ruoxuan, Zhou Wei and Wang Xiaolan also came over.

"Chen Mo, Xiao Yu graduated, what about your gift?" Li Ruoyi said as soon as he came over.

"Oh, yes, here." Chen Mo took a box from his backpack and handed it to Xiaoyu: "This is a bracelet. And this is yours, thank you for taking care of Xiaoyu for four years." Chen Mo took out three more Handed to three people.

Li Ruojun immediately laughed and took the box that Chen Mo handed over.

"It’s a pleasure to be a friend with the local tyrant. Then, the most beautiful, gentlest, and most cute kitten in our family will be officially handed over to you. But don’t think that a gift can buy us. If you dare to bully later She, three of us will use a kitchen knife to fight you."

"How could I bully her, I hurt her too late." Chen Mo smiled.

"Hey ~ graduated and fed us dog food." The three immediately tacitly revealed a look of disgust, and turned to laugh.

"Chen Mo and Xiao Yuhe have a movie." Li Ruoxuan said with a camera.

"Princess hug."

"Pro-one."

"Come on, put on Chen Mo's gift and take a picture."

Zhou Wei and Wang Xiaolan also followed suit, full of laughter and laughter. The photo took more than two hours, until the fun, five talents to eat.

In the evening, after returning to the villa, Xiao Yu became a sly look.

The graduation season is a season of joy and a season of separation. This time, I don’t know when I will get together.

"What's wrong?" Chen Mo went to Xiaoyu and asked.

"Nothing, just feeling, unconsciously, four years have passed." Xiaoyu said the emotions.

"Nothing lasts forever."

Chen Mo said, the phone rang, and after seeing the caller ID, he laughed and connected the phone. After a few promises, Chen Mo took a small fishing and went outside: "Don't worry, it will make you more embarrassing."

"Where?" asked Xiao Yu.

"The ugly wife wants to see the parents." Chen Mo smiled.

"Your parents are coming over?" Xiao Yu immediately nervous: "Do I have to prepare something? No, I will change clothes first, I will sort the house again..."

"Go."

Chen Mo saw the incoherent appearance of Xiao Yuyu, laughed, and pulled her away from the villa and rushed to the station.

chapters.title: Chapter 116: : Computer Operating System
chapters.body:
Chapter 116: : Computer Operating System

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, waiting outside the station. At this time, the small fisherman was extremely nervous, and his hands were tight and tight, and he looked at the exit.

After seeing the three people coming out of the station, Chen Mo laughed and hurriedly greeted him.

"Dad, Mom, Jane."

"Hey, Amer." After seeing Chen Mo, Chen Mu did not smile at the moment: "You are getting thinner again."

In the eyes of the mother, no matter how good life is, as long as they leave home, they become thinner.

Chen Mo is just his parents, not saying that Jane is coming.

Chen Mo looked at the little fish caught in his mother and Jane's claws and smiled. The appearance of a small fisherman is simply cute. I ignored her for help and took her luggage to the car.

After returning to the villa, my mother and Zhen Zhen looked at the villa and my eyes became stunned.

"Yes." Little fish nodded, his face was a little red, and he asked Chen Mo for help.

"Small fish, you go to the parents and Jane to prepare for food." Chen Mo hurriedly let Xiaoyu get out, or continue to ask, small fish can not be sewed.

"Good." Xiaoyu fled like a life-saving straw.

"Xiao Mo, my father and I, and you cherish it, I want to see your current situation. When a boss of such a big business, such a big thing, why don't you tell us?" Xiao Yuyi left Chen Mu will point the finger at Chen Mo.

"You didn't say that big! And, the little fisherman. This girl, mom likes it very much. You have graduated now. At the age of marriage, I have to give birth to a grandson. Now I am not working with your dad. Being idle can help you bring your children. I will let you cherish and talk to her family."

Chen Mo was short-lived and almost spurted out the old blood. The last time the phone interrupted him, and now he still said this, the characters are still missing.

"Dad, Mom, this is not an urgent matter. You should not do this first. I have Xiao Xiaoyu's own arrangements." Chen Mo said in a hurry, otherwise he would not let Xiaoyan go to the relatives after going back.

Not long after, Xiao Yu and Jane, with a fruit platter, came out, but the face was a little ruddy, I don't know what Jane said to her.

Until the time of sleep, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were relieved. After returning to the room, the father and mother and the cherished room were arranged.

Early the next morning, five people sat around the dinner table and had breakfast.

"Xiao Mo, last night, the question, we all asked. I know that I know, I discussed with your mother for one night, decided to go home in two days." Chen father opened.

"Why is it so fast? Don't you stay here?" Chen Mo hurriedly asked.

Chen mother smiled and said: "We are here, I am not used to living. I slept for a night in a soft bed last night. I have a backache and a comfortable back. I will leave space for you and Xiaoyu, and I will get along with each other for a while," Chen said with a smile. Some dishes were caught in the small fishing bowl: "Small fish, after a small bully, you will call me, I will come to teach him immediately."

"mom……"

" Needless to say, my dad and I have already decided, not accustomed to life on the side of the city." Chen Mogang wanted to speak, he was interrupted: "But you have to work, grow up, need some space. I and you Dad, I will go back and buy a house, and I will build a new house at home. You don't have to worry about our affairs. You remember to get along with Xiaoyu."

"Okay." Chen Mo smiled: "Buy more than one set, give it to Zhen, you have a companion, I will remit it to your account." He knows that the mother's decision, he can not discourage.

"How can I collect your house?" Zhen Zhen shook his head immediately.

"Zhen Zhen, in my heart, you are my loved one, there is no need to see. I also promised Xinxin to give her a college entrance examination gift, she is also a college entrance examination, even if it is a gift to Shin Shin..."

Chen Mo has not finished, the phone's prompt sounds.

"Chairman, the research team has been developing the army ant computer system, there is a breakthrough today, you need to come to the company." When the phone is connected, Zhao Min's voice is heard.

"Okay, I rushed over as soon as possible." Chen Mo said, hang up the phone: "Zhen Zhen, the house thing, just say it. Xiaoyu, later, go out with your parents and Jane, go shopping, go shopping I need to go to a company."

"Okay." Zhen Yu hesitated and nodded.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu also promised to go down. After the incident last night, her mind relaxed a lot, not so restrained.

"If your work is busy, go to work." Chen said immediately.

"Not so urgent now, after breakfast, I will pass." Chen Mo pulled out the bank card and handed it to Xiaoyu: "When you collect the bank card, when you go shopping, you can buy things for your parents and Jane, don't be afraid to spend money."

After eating breakfast, Chen Mocai went to the company, and told Wang Hai to follow his parents today and pick up at any time.

After the company established the R&D team, the marching ant computer system has been in development. Develop a new computer operating system based on the unique architecture of the mobile ant mobile operating system.

R & D to the present, the marching ant computer operating system, finally have a look. For him, he only needs a little bit of eyebrows, he can use the technology library optimization to get the perfect marching ant operating system.

“The robot energy is produced?” Zhao Min asked in amazement.

Umbrella companies turn their direction and extract the value of the Android platform, in order to prepare for the ecology of ChromeoS, to prepare to open the enterprise PC market. For them, the corporate PC market means a steady stream of cash.

So aiming at the corporate office market, they can get more benefits.

She has already done research, and the corporate office market is less competitive. In this market, Microsoft has already given them enough practice and is very feasible.

In this technical field of subdivision, as long as there are distinctive and more convenient cutting-edge technologies, there are enough companies to pay for them.

They have a series of office software such as ant office, and the most advanced intelligent voice assistant technology. As long as the intelligent voice assistant on the PC side is developed to improve office efficiency, there are enough users.

This market is much easier than rushing in a dish of a smartphone. And their smartphone market has been opened, and the mobile market ecosystem can be accessed in the future.

After listening to Zhao Min’s thoughts, Chen Mo meditated and nodded after a while.

"PC-side smart assistant, I can develop it, the product is already designed?" Chen Mo asked.

Product design he can let the ink girl do, but he will not do this.

The existence of the ink girl cannot be exposed for the time being.

Pu Jingmin believes that the leader in the field of artificial intelligence will become the ruler of the world.

If the presence of the ink girl is exposed, it is not a trouble. The great powers of the whole world, the capital crocodile, the ambition, and the conspirators have all set their sights on him. I am afraid that he will not be used for a day. He or even his family will be in danger.

“From the beginning of this project, people have already designed products.” Zhao Min said.

"The matter of this project is handed over to you."

Chen Mo has little interest in computer systems. Because there are many computer operating systems, windows has killed this ecology and almost formed a monopoly.

And the current computer applications are all developed around windows, the general operating system, there is no living environment.

If they want to change the user's usage habits, it is absolutely impossible in a short time. However, since the computer operating system has been successfully researched, the corporate office market is a good choice.

"Then I will arrange it." Zhao Min said.

"There is one more thing. The construction of the company's headquarters is going to speed up. It doesn't matter if you spend a little more money. Here, the restrictions are too big and many things can't be done." Chen Mo said.

With the existence of a technology library, money is just a cold figure for him. What he lacks most is time.

"Okay, I will inform the supervisor of this project."

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo walked back to his office: "Ink, transfer the source code of the computer system they developed."

"Receive success." Not long after, the voice of the ink girl rang.

Chen Mo began to look at the source code, after reading all the code, he went to the sofa to lie down. After entering the science and technology library, Chen Mo opened the dark red book.

As soon as his voice fell, the source code began to change. After a while, I stopped. A complete computer system appears on the light curtain.

As soon as his words fell, the light curtain turned into two, one became a light spot, and penetrated into Chen Mo’s head. One narrowed into a book and flew into the depths of the technology library.

Chen Mo’s mind appeared a word and quickly reacted. This computer system was developed from the marching ant system. The core architecture is the technology he took from the technology library.

After coming out of the technology library, Chen Mo sat back in the office chair: "Ink girl, according to what I said, optimize the computer system."

After Chen Mo’s stay, they stayed in Binhai for five days. He wants them to stay here, but the mother said that she is not used to life here, and she has to go back, and he can't stop it.

At this time, Shao Xuemei took a small fisherman with a smile on his face.

"Small fish, my father and I, and you cherish home, then, take care of Amer. If he bullies you, you call me, I personally clean him."

Chen Mo was laughing at the side, whether he was a biological one. How does he feel that fishing is more important than his son.

Xiao Yu smiled and looked at Chen Mo and turned his head and said: "He won't bully me. Auntie, you can rest assured, I will take care of him."

"Well, I am relieved to have you." Chen immediately smiled.

They left for a long time, and a plane landed in Binhai City. A man and a woman came out from the airport exit with sunglasses.

"If you don't like it, just go back and finish the mission." Mei Huizi calmly and observes everything around him.

"I hope that your strength matches your arrogance. If you drag your legs, I don't mind killing you." Mei Huizi said coldly, "Now start shutting up."

Noda took a look at Mieko, and his eyes showed lasciviousness.

When they just left the airport, they stopped a taxi. The two stopped the exchange and got off the airport.

the next day.

really!

chapters.title: Chapter 121: : Mousetrap
chapters.body:
Chapter 121: : Mousetrap

"If you want to get the intelligent assistant software, you must break through the four barriers. The first is security, the security guards patrol every half an hour. The second is monitoring, monitoring is the biggest trouble, in the building, almost no dead ends, all It is monitoring.

The third is to enter the building room, there is a password door, including face recognition, fingerprint recognition, only the senior engineer of the marching ant company can enter the machine room. The last is to get the smart assistant source code, which requires an authorization password. ”

Noda dropped the information on the table with a gloomy color on his face.

"Things are more troublesome than we think. It is obviously impossible to enter without revealing the identity. The monitoring room is inside the building and there are security doors. Ordinary people can't enter, we can't enter the building without the other party discovering it." Control and monitoring is impossible. With both of us, there are not enough people."

"That said, your method is not a ghost," said Mieko.

"Looking for help." Noda is not angry.

"Where are the helpers? Only two of us."

"Isn't that the person we are connecting with is a helper? I will contact you now to let him cooperate with us for a while, and he is familiar with us in Binhai." Noda took out a satellite phone and dialed a number.

Island State Embassy.

Rice field Jinnan is watching the news, this is some news about China. To work here, you must understand the Chinese people, otherwise they will be very troublesome.

Just as he could see it, a cell phone in the drawer rang.

Rice field Jinnan eyebrows picked and rushed out of the phone. After seeing the encrypted number above, Inada Jinan rushed to get the code book.

Not long after, I saw the news translated from above, and Iwata Jinan frowned. The things in Binhai are not enough, and need people to help?

After thinking about it, Iwata Jinan edited the information and sent it back.

"Let's wait two days and give us a reply two days later." Noda looked at the mobile phone's encrypted number and deleted it: "It's really troublesome. It's easier to use the kidnapping threat. Isn't that nothing to look for?"

"I know the kidnapping all day long. Have you ever thought about how we got out of here?" Mei Huizi said coldly.

"Do you think it is to travel?" Noda was furious: "When the above sent us over, I said, I will take the smart assistant back if I use whatever means."

"I don't want to kill myself. If you kidnap the chairman of a big company, can you get out of the city? Do you think this is your home?" said Mei Huizi.

"As long as we are not caught on the spot, we can run away." Noda said.

Mieko looked at him coldly and walked back to his room. Looking at her back, Noda licked his lips and his eyes flickered.

In the next few days, the coastal city was calm and there was nothing big. It’s just in a corner that no one else can see. At this time, an undercurrent is surging.

In the bar, under the lights, under the flashing lights, with the music wearing the broken eardrum, countless fans who slowly danced, they themselves did not know what they were jumping.

On the stage are a few blond exotic women, a pitiful three-point style, attracting countless double burning eyes. The temptation of the pole dance, the paralysis of alcohol, the people here have forgotten the pressure and troubles outside, took off the disguise, followed the music and screamed and shouted.

At the entrance of the bar, two people walked in and looked around and slowly walked inside.

These two people are no different from ordinary people. After entering the box, they saw a man surrounded by several beautiful women. The man saw the two coming over and the smile on his face was deeper.

Take out the money and put it in the clothes in front of each woman and drive them all away.

"You are finally here."

The man stood up from the couch, left the box, and left with two people from the back door of the bar. After walking for fifteen minutes, after a few corners, I entered a simple rental house.

"The mouse has already entered the nest." The three men just walked into the rental house, upstairs in the corner, staring at the plainclothes at the back door of the clubhouse.

"Get up the spirit, according to reliable news, the mouse may want to steal tonight." Li Jizheng said to the headset.

"The team leader, do we want to act now and grab them?" In another car, the child talked with a headset.

"When they come out, hold a few exits." After that, Li Jizheng put down the headphones.

Since the last time he got the identity information of the spy person sent by the anonymous person, he was appointed as the team leader to be responsible for the monitoring of these spy personnel.

Recently, this mouse in Binhai has been active, and he is here to take the mouse.

During this time, they kept the mouse for so long. These two days were very moving and they entered a batch of goods. In addition, the two foreign island people are targeting the marching ant company, and they should want to enter the marching ant company to steal things.

The marching ant company is a sensitive enterprise, and the intelligent assistant is something that has been paid attention to by countless people. Many people are squatting. The last mercenary incident, they have heard of these news.

In the clubhouse, the man looked at the two people: "I am code-named white mouse, let me help you, let me talk about your plans."

"It’s a problem to speak Japanese." Noda said with disgust: "This time we want to enter the machine room of the marching ant company. Your mission is to follow our arrangements."

"What do you want? (Japanese)" the man asked.

"This is not what you should know." Noda disdained: "You only need to cooperate with us on the periphery."

"If I take the task, I have the right to know the content of the task, otherwise I can not participate." The man did not care to sit on the sofa.

Noda's face was a bit ugly, and the atmosphere was deadlocked. Mei Keiko saw it and sat quietly on the sofa. The atmosphere in the room was a bit weird, and the three didn't talk, I don't know what to think about.

"Our mission is a smart assistant." Noda blackened his face and looked at the man's gaze, flashing a hint of haze.

"Tell your plan." The man did not have any accidents.

Subsequently, Mieko and Noda said their plans. Unconsciously, the rhythm has been controlled by men.

"It won't work." After listening to Noda, the man shook his head: "Want to enter the marching ant company, it is not as simple as the surface. The army ant company's intelligent software, if it is so easy to get, is no longer in their hands."

"Do not try, how do you know that it is useless?" Noda's face sank.

"Oh, after you have tried, can you come back?" The white mouse had a sneer on his face: "But since I let you cooperate with me, I can't help."

After that, the white mouse took two backpacks from the dark space and put them in front of two people: "Is it better to try my method?"

Li Jizheng stared at the rental house and his brow was crumpled. It’s been a bit uncommon to go in for so long.

At the time of his doubts, there was a sudden movement in the rental house. Three people came out of the house, and each had a backpack in his hand.

“The attention of the teams, prepare for action.”

Li Jizheng was serious in his face. When he heard this sentence, everyone was shocked.

chapters.title: Chapter 122: : Change (Change)
chapters.body:
Chapter 122: : Change (Change)

Just walking to the door, the three felt a little wrong. Suddenly I saw the figure in the corner, the white mouse twitched, and the footsteps stopped and returned to the rental house.

Behind Noda and Mihoko were puzzled and realized that they were not right and they were back.

"Receive the net." Li Jizheng saw a few people returning, the dark road is not good.

As soon as his words fell, several special police officers emerged from the alley: "Don't move, you have been surrounded."

"Damn."

The white rat snorted and immediately fled into the rental house, took out two smoke bombs to the ground, ran to the window, and put the rope that had already been prepared down.

As an agent, he must always think about how to escape. It is their faith to complete the task and survive.

Seeing the white rat escape, Noda and Mieko, his face black as the bottom of the pot. Did not dare to have any hesitation, keep up with the white mouse, jumped down.

Time seems to be still at this moment. When the three people just fell to the ground, they found that there were already eight special policemen who were guarding the alleys, the black hole of the muzzle, and staring at the three people.

......

Chen Mo is in the study, his eyes locked on the computer screen.

"Momgo, three spy personnel, have all been caught." The voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

Upon hearing this news, Chen Mo completely breathed a sigh of relief and frowned.

"So late, don't you go to sleep?"

Xiaoyu walked in pajamas and put the cup in front of Chen Mo. He looked at Chen Mo sitting in front of the computer and felt a little distressed.

She knows that the company has become so huge in a short time, and the trouble is certainly quite a lot. But she won't ask more, she also knows that there are some things that Chen Mo does not tell her, there must be a reason.

Help Chen Mo, she is definitely not as good as Zhao Min, she can't help with the research. Therefore, she understands that what she can do is to quietly accompany Chen Mo and give him the necessary care.

Feeling the care of Xiaoyu, Chen Mo’s heart warmed and walked back to the room with a small fisherman. Just went to bed, Xiao Yu turned over and looked at Chen Mo.

"Is it hard to see if you are frowning recently?"

During this time, Chen Mo rarely went out with her, and every time he bought something, he let Wang Hai pass. The small fishing that has always been fine has already been felt.

Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and held her in his arms: "You said that during this time, is the means to deal with things too gentle?"

Trouble came one after another, this incident, the source is still his intelligent assistant. He is thinking about whether the style of acting should be changed, or it is very likely that there will be continuous troubles in the future.

"I don't know what you are talking about." Xiao Yu said: "But people are deceived by people. Ma Shan is being riding. This is an old saying. It has been passed down to the present, and there is always his reason."

"Some things I am holding you, will you blame me?" Chen Mo asked.

"At any time, I believe in you unconditionally."

In just one sentence, it is better than a thousand words, let Chen Mo’s heart flow through a warm stream, hug her hand, and the subconscious is tight.

The next day, the Binhai Municipal Public Security Bureau issued a message to thwart a case involving suspected crimes, espionage, and arrested two islanders involved.

Explosive tools, including laser pens, guns, ether, hard drives, etc., as well as some intrusive unlocking instruments.

The news spread quickly on the Internet, and a stone provoked a thousand waves. All the media, the first time, reported on this matter. This is not the first time.

The Internet world exploded, and under the article, the comments were surprisingly consistent.

"Support the praise of the death penalty."

"The crown is celebrated, and the big pen is rushing."

"It’s beautiful, all the spies and traitors are damned.”

"Gossip, Lu, dead and dead..."

......

On the Internet, a wave of condolences, excitement, clap your hands.

Not long after the news broke out, a more exciting news broke out.

The action of the islander’s spy, the action of the island’s people, aimed at the army ant company, may be to steal the intelligent software of the army ant company.

The topic that just reached the apex of public opinion once again set off a higher wave.

As a rising star, the marching ant company has always been the focus of many media attention. This time it was blasted out, and the action was directed at the marching ant company, and immediately let many media smell the smell of the news.

The research on artificial intelligence of the marching ant company has always been a mystery. The emergence of intelligent assistants, human-computer interaction functions and machine learning functions has surpassed any artificial intelligence on the market.

However, deeper research on artificial intelligence has always been a huge mystery in the public.

In the media of Binhai City, the office building of the Army Ant Company was gathered for the first time. Everyone wants to see what the marching ant company is all about.

"Zhao Jie, there are many reporters around the company, they all want to see you and the chairman."

Xiaoyu stood in front of Zhao Min, and at this time she remembered the words of Chen Mo last night. During this time, Chen Mo rarely went out with her, it should be this matter.

"I don't know what the situation is, how can I see it?" Zhao Min went to the window and glanced at the media gathered outside the company's gate.

This incident is really a headache, and she is completely ignorant of these news. Recently, the army ant company had no news, and it only took a few days to stop.

"I will ask the chairman what advice first." Zhao Min smiled and left the office.

Chen Mo is working in the lab, assembling the robot with the robot controlled by the ink girl. The assembly robot parts have all arrived, and he is now letting the ink girl automatically assemble the robot.

In the future, there will be ten robot assistants in the lab. At that time, he only needs to tell the ink girl the technique, and then let the ink girl realize it through the robot, and the efficiency will be greatly improved.

"Momgo, Zhao Min enters the office." The robot working with him suddenly spoke.

"Yeah." Chen Mo stopped the action in his hand: "You assemble yourself, I will go out."

After Chen Mo finished, he left the lab.

"Chairman, now these reporters are all asking about espionage on the Internet."

Zhao Min and Chen Mo stood by the window and looked at the reporters outside the marching ant company. From their perspective, at least there are more than forty journalists.

"Their movements are very fast." Chen Mo looked at the reporter below.

"You won't know about it?" Zhao Min asked in amazement.

"Know." Chen Mo nodded.

"Would you like to see these reporters, even if they don't respond to it, give them a good one," said Zhao Min.

"If you go to give them a response, they don't know." Chen Mo said.

"That line, I sent someone to arrange a temporary press conference."

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo set his gaze on the computer: "Ink, you will sort out the Chinese programming language and prepare to announce it."

He has always kept a low profile. But the next few things told him that low-key can't help him reduce trouble, so he doesn't mind, from now on, a high-profile.

chapters.title: Chapter 123: : Major News
chapters.body:
Chapter 123: : Major News

Many reporters looked forward to seeing Zhao Min appear on the small podium. Dozens of people stunned and pointed the camera at Zhao Min.

Zhao Min is now a business woman who is uncompromising. Only by the position of the president of the marching ant company, some people have to listen to what she said.

The current marching ant company is the representative of Nova Technology, and its rise is enough to write a legend.

After Zhao Min took the position, everyone was quiet.

"Today's temporary press conference is not to let the media friends disappoint. Time is tight, the next question, the lady who wears glasses in front."

When Zhao Min was generous, he made all the reporters feel a lot of good feelings.

Not all company presidents will pay attention to these reporters. Zhao Min personally went into battle and gave them their face.

“Thank you.” The female reporter took the microphone and stood up: “Today, the Binhai Municipal Public Security Bureau released a message and seized two island country spies. The network rumored that this espionage was directed at the marching ant company. Is this news true? What is the response to this?"

"Thank you for the lady's question." Zhao Min said: "Related news, I have also seen it on the Internet. Since the founding of the army ant company, it has been living in the network rumors, before the confirmation of the authority, please keep cautious.

Whether this matter is directed at our company, we have no exact information. If the news is not true, please do not spread the false information everywhere. If the news is true, we are very grateful to the Public Security Bureau for protecting us and providing us with a safe living environment. ”

"Ms. Zhao, how much does your company's artificial intelligence develop? Is anyone yelling at your technology? What do you think of the future of artificial intelligence?" asked the second reporter after taking the microphone.

"Your first question is trade secrets, and I can't tell you." Zhao Min said with a smile: "As for the second question, billions of people around the world, absolutely more than half of them are licking our technology, after all, technology. It’s all money, who doesn’t want it?”

Zhao Min answered this question and let the reporter below laugh out loud. The reporter also realized that he had asked a redundant question.

"In the future of artificial intelligence, we will give it to the future to answer, but I believe that the future will not be too far." Zhao Min said.

In the last sentence, let the reporters below get excited. They are all word workers, and from these words, they can hear a lot of hidden information.

The marching ant company has a breakthrough in artificial intelligence technology!

"Ms. Zhao, what did you mean by your company's artificial intelligence technology and made a breakthrough? This spy incident is not based on the technology you broke through."

"Our technology has always been making breakthroughs. As for this, it is not me who can give you the answer..."

Zhao Min is answering the question. Chen Mo is also sitting in the office chair and browsing the Chinese programming language compiled by the ink girl.

The framework of the ink girl is written in the Chinese character programming language. For the Chinese character programming language, the ink girl can be said to be truly profound in the bones.

On the basis of "Computer Language Creation and Application", Chen Mo also borrowed some grammars from C language, B language and assembly language.

Finally, the Chinese expression and grammar are combined to create 18 data types, 108 keyword groups, 36 control statements, constants, variables, operations, characters and arrays.

This language inherits the genes of Chinese characters, is complicated and difficult to understand, and is more difficult to learn than other computer languages. Of course, this is relative to foreigners, just like Chinese people learn C language.

The basic grammar of the computer is based on a large amount of time, and a large number of personnel develop and perfect. A lot of whimsical programs are created by ordinary people.

Chen Mo feels that this is an opportunity.

The publication of the Chinese character programming language is absolutely sensational.

This means that he has filled the gap in China's computer-based programming language, with a set of programming languages that belong to them. After learning programming, you don't need to use English as a hard requirement.

English does not know how many heroes are stumped.

He can also take this opportunity to find some talent to join the company.

"Ink girl, contact Xiaoyu." Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

Zhao Mingang answered the last question. Just as she was about to announce her departure, Xiao Yu suddenly ran up and said a few words in her ear.

For a time, all the reporters cheered and looked forward to the two.

Many media people know Xiaoyu. When they were exposed at Binhai University last time, there was a small fishing. Legendary, the girlfriend of the president of the marching ant company, assistant to the president.

What is the important information about this posture?

Xiaoyu left, Zhao Mincai looked at many reporters: "The chairman just let me inform you that today at 12 noon, I will pay attention to the news of the official website of the army ants company. There will be major news. Today's reception is over, thank you all. ""

Zhao Min left the last news and let all the reporters circle. What is the big news? Is it new technology?

Many reporters looked at the time and had enough time to write this newsletter and wait for the important news of the marching ant company.

"Chairman! Which one is coming out?"

Zhao Minyi entered Chen Mo's office area and looked at him helplessly. The big news, even her president does not know.

"This one."

Chen Mo handed the printed Chinese character programming language grammar to Zhao Min.

"Is this awkward? Related words? If you tell me, this is the big news you said, I will jump to the building to show you." Zhao Min looked at the phrase above with a smile.

"Free fall is not good, I want you to give me a management company. Don't underestimate these pieces of paper, this is a Chinese programming language, a new computer language. After the release, these pieces of paper can enter the museum."

"Are you sure you are not kidding?"

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo with surprise. If it is true, the computer industry in China will remember the name Chen Mo. A groundbreaking thing can definitely make his name spread through the ages.

She knows that the founder of a field is definitely the most horrible person. Now many scientists, back to decades ago, are definitely the most cattle.

But history is just remembering the founders of the past, and the names of many scientists are not known to ordinary people. Because the founder is the pathfinder from scratch to the process, the most basic and simple, and the most difficult.

Chen Mo said: "Crap, it is one of the most proud works I have created."

After he got the technology library, the real meaning of creation was only the Chinese programming language and the ink girl. They are all created on their own after learning the basics.

Even if it is a marching ant system, it is still his imitation and transformation, not a creation.

"If it is true, it is really a cow." Zhao Min returned the paper in his hand to Chen Mo: "Are you sure it is true? Don't let off the fake news, or you will become a laughing stock."

"I still don't want to make fun of myself. Don't look at it, the energy equation is just a formula. Who dares to look down on it?"

"It's not me who signed it, just you."

After Zhao Min left the office, Chen Mo went into the lab: "Ink, 12 o'clock, you put the Chinese programming language on the official website on time."

"Understood, my brother."

chapters.title: Chapter 124: : Responsiveness And Promotion
chapters.body:
Chapter 124: : Responsiveness And Promotion

Qian Yongxing sat in front of the computer and stared quietly at the official website of the marching ant company. He was waiting for the important news of the marching ant company.

Nowadays, many media are paying attention to espionage incidents, and it is very difficult to dig up all the black history of the island countries. But as the most cutting-edge technology media in China, he is concerned about the development of the latest technology. Keeping up with the development and trends of cutting-edge technology is what he needs to do most.

There is still a minute.

Qian Yongxing is sitting on his body, waiting for the important news of the marching ant company, and taking the lead, is the most important thing.

Like him, there are other reporters who are also staring at the official website of the marching ant company.

Time is up.

Qian Yongxing rushed to refresh the webpage, a huge title appeared on the official website of the marching ant company.

Chinese Character Programming Language

Seeing this title, Qian Yongxing’s pupils shrank.

Chinese character programming language? The name looks like it feels very high. But the first thing that emerged in his head was the easy language.

Easy Language is the first computer programming language in China. It was founded by Mr. Wu Tao and programmed through Chinese. The core of it is written in C++, born out of the “C language”.

In terms of grammar, easy language is similar to programming languages such as JAVA, C, C++, etc., but this set of languages has not yet matured, and not many people have noticed.

Now the marching ant company has created a second set of Chinese programming languages? This is definitely a huge news.

Just staying for an instant, Qian Yongxing immediately clicked in.

See long keywords, data types, Qian Yongxing's eyebrows.

These are just some basic things. However, they do not understand the application of these data types, and can't see what is really good.

This is a newborn who just came out, I don't know what it looks like, how to use it.

He does not understand, how to write this article?

Not only him, like him, the person who clicked on this article is also a face.

Chinese character programming language, listening very powerful, but just came out, marching ant company only publish keywords and data types, how to use?

For a long time, Qian Yongxing can only log on to the media platform and reprint the articles published by the marching ant company.

"The marching ant releases the Chinese character programming language."

When the news came online, it immediately attracted a lot of netizens' strong views.

This programming language is also a full Chinese, cross-platform programming language, without the English threshold. Similar to easy language, it is only fundamentally different. Just like BASiC and C++, it is also a programming language with different types.

The marching ant company has not announced the use of skills, which makes many people curious. Easy language has been invented for more than a decade, and it has not been fully popularized. The army ants have any confidence in promoting this computer language.

Recently, the army ants company is very hot. The news about the marching ant company will be subconsciously entered by netizens, whether it is black ants or termites.

"According to the law, the shorter the news, the bigger the matter?"

"What is the Chinese character programming language? Isn't there a full Chinese computer programming language, easy language?"

"The people who don't know the truth!"

The comments under the news are mixed. With the emergence of the first Chinese language programming language, other media concerned have also joined the report.

"Foreigners are shocked! The second set of Chinese computer programming language - squirrel headlines

"Chen Mo Creates Chinese Character Programming Language" - Southern Newspaper

The pride of Binhai City! 》——Binhai Daily

The marching ant company only released keywords and data types, and the method of use was not announced, so that a lot of black powder climaxed.

"What is the use? Develop a domestic operating system."

"How can I use this? Who will want this thing?"

"There is money to study these useless things, or donate money to the poor."

......

When the news of the marching ant company came out, it would cover up the heat of the espionage incident that had just warmed up. The marching ant company is developing too fast, and every appearance is the focus of attention.

Soon, some experts also jumped out of the heat.

"The marching ant Chinese character programming language is useless: First, easy language development for nearly 20 years, has not yet fully matured, it has to develop for several years, who will develop? Second, Chinese is not a universal language, computer programming language promotion is difficult.

Third, even if the software is designed, is it compatible with the computer system? Chen Mo is just a newly graduated student. If he scores a little, he can't find his own direction. ”

When this statement came out, it immediately attracted an uproar. In this year, there are many people who are sensational, and in order to be famous, there are many unscrupulous means.

Chen Mo did not know how busy the network was. At this time, he was looking at the three people brought by Wang Hai. At the beginning, Chen Mo asked Wang Hai to contact the team members who had not retired. Today, they finally brought people over.

Two men and one woman, each looks very spiritual.

"Chairman, the people you are looking for are here. They are the same team that used to be retired because of injury. Anan, Black Hawk, and White Pearl are their nicknames..."

Anan is a tall man, one meter nine, the strongest of the four. The black eagle has a pair of sharp eyes, and Chen Mo suspects that this is a sniper. White pearls are very white in color, cut short hair, and look cool.

The three are very capable, placed in the crowd, are the most eye-catching people, this point Wang Hai has a big difference, because Wang Hai is more like an ordinary person.

"In the future, the company will implement strict military management on the security. After that, you will be responsible for the training and management of the company's security, and will be handed over to you as a bodyguard." Chen Mo said.

There have been troubles in succession. The company must have a special security team to strengthen the security of the company. Otherwise, there will always be troubles for him to worry about.

"Wang Hai, you take them to the personnel department to report, someone will arrange your work." Chen Mo said.

Not long after the four left, Zhao Min walked in.

"Chairman, are you looking for me?"

"Nothing big?" Chen Mo asked.

“Can there be any big event?” Zhao Min couldn’t smile: “Your Chinese programming language is not a small topic.”

"There are a full set of books and compilers for learning Chinese programming languages. All the information is free. You can take it to the public. Then let all the software developers of the company learn and learn the Chinese character programming language staff to add 5% salary.

By the way, declare a “Chinese character programming language environment” project to the government to see if you can cooperate with Binhai University to open an experimental class of computer Chinese programming language. At the same time, an information is published on the recruitment of employees who learn the Chinese character programming language. ”

The Chinese character programming language has been fully improved with the help of the ink girl. Freely publishing online information is more conducive to promoting learning and preparing for the next recruitment and selection of talents.

Now his goal is to create an environment for learning Chinese programming languages and then let it be promoted for free.

The world is all good.

Only when people can see the prospects of Chinese programming languages can they let them learn.

"Yes, can you tell me why?" Zhao Min asked.

"Let's say that the program developed by the Chinese programming language is faster and safer," Chen said.

He thinks of Shu Lao's words. If artificial intelligence is regarded as a living body, the programming language is its genetics.

This set of language, announced soon, is better than the late announcement. The ecology of a set of languages must be supported by the majority. He is not very useful when he is alone.

"Then I will arrange it now."
