Various reports from foreign media, filled with the smell of sour in the lines, all depreciate the Chinese programming language. Some of them also praised the news of the marching ant company, but they were quickly overwhelmed by the sounds of various singers.

"E language is completely cottage C / C + +, the usage is almost identical, and now a set of language is emerging, it is estimated that it is plagiarism, Huaxia is really a cottage kingdom."

"In the current network environment, this language cannot be fully promoted. In short, it is not used."

“Who will take the time to learn these programming languages that are completely strange and don’t know the prospects?”

There are many taunts, even if they are perfect, the future of Chinese programming languages is still not optimistic. Because of the current usage habits of computer programming languages, it has almost been finalized.

Some domestic experts also took the opportunity to jump out and attack the marching ant company with things that could not be promoted, but their words were automatically ignored. No one cares about these pseudo-experts, at best, it’s just a hot clown.

But they don't understand, Chen Mo really will use such a big move to do these useless work? Totally impossible.

The focus of attention is on the body of programming language Chen Mo.

Many people realize that the establishment of the marching ant company is not only the manager of Zhao Min, but the chairman of Chen Mo is the most important person.

In addition to the news of the Chinese character programming language, most of the media have focused on Chen Mo.

Various reports about Chen Mo are on the list.

A few days later, as the protagonist of the event, the rivers and lakes did not have his shadow, but there are always his legends.

Chen Mo, who has been hiding in the laboratory, looked at the robot in front of him with satisfaction. During this time, the ink girl controlled the robot assembly robot, and now the third robot has been formed.

In the laboratory, he is also liberating productivity.

In the future, many things, without his hands-on, only need to let the ink girl control the production of robots, can work for a long time without interruption, this kind of inexhaustible efficiency is absolutely impossible for him.

Just like the manufacture of seismographs, the necessary preparations, many things, can be handed over to the robot instead.

"Mer brother, Xiaoyu enters the office area." When he admired the robot, the ink girl opened.

"It's time to get off work. Ink, when I'm not there, you continue to assemble robots."

Chen Mo looked at the time, took off the lab coat, put the tools, and left the lab. Just coming out, I saw Xiaoyu walking towards him.

"It's time to go home."

"Let's go." Chen Mo smiled.

“Today, there are publishers who contact us and they want to publish a tutorial on your published Chinese programming language,” Xiao Yu said.

"Press: This is fine." Chen Mo nodded. Now he only promotes the Chinese character programming language and can publish it. It is also a channel.

Since he decided to release the Chinese character programming language, he did not intend to make it dusty, and promotion was a must.

"Because the materials are free on the Internet, the pricing of the physical books will be lower. They say that the five-five divisions, the publishers, receive 50%, printing fees and promotion fees, they are out."

"can."

Chen Mo immediately agreed, and now he is not bad for that money, how much is the draft fee, not so important. Otherwise, he will not publish compilers and textbooks to the Internet for free.

"I remember that the Chinese programming language seems to be what you studied in the school shop, right?" asked Xiao Yu.

"My family has a good memory." Chen Mo smiled.

"At that time, I was stunned by me. I was still foolish in the drums, hehe." Xiao Yu snorted.

"I am punished for taking advantage of you. You forgot?" Chen Mo grotesquely looked at Xiao Yu.

Seeing Chen Mo’s gaze, Xiao Yu’s face was red, and he hurriedly shifted the topic: “Tomorrow’s weekend, no overtime, what do you want to eat tonight? I am going to buy food.”

"This is a problem." Chen Mozhen had something to think about it: "I didn't eat fish last time, I want to eat fish again tonight."

Eat fish? Hearing these two words, Xiao Yu was stunned by Chen Mo’s hand, and his face rosy spread until he reached the neck.

"Then I will buy it." Xiao Yu bite his lip and bowed his head and said, "Give it to you."

chapters.title: Chapter 126: : Eat Fish! (Complement)
chapters.body:
Chapter 126: : Eat Fish! (Complement)

That night, in the villa.

Chen Mo looked at the little fish that came out of the room and his eyes lit up.

At this time, the small fish is a hibiscus. Clear and shy eyes, white face with a hint of red powder, the skin under the nightdress, such as white jade. Wet hair, pulled on the shoulders, with a different temptation.

Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo’s eyes and became more nervous. He grabbed the hand of the skirt and tangled together. He slowly walked toward Chen Mo and sat down on the sofa next to him.

"If I see enough, I will blow my hair." Xiao Yu bites his lip and opens his mouth.

"Good." Chen Mo hurriedly found the hair dryer.

The faint body fragrance penetrated Chen Mo's nose and made him more hot. He is not a saint, and it has been a long time since this day.

and many more? Is it eating fish? Is it blowing hair? Deja vu! Chen Mo hurriedly put down the hair dryer and grabbed the phone next to him.

"The hair is not dry." Some nervous little fish, open after the hair dryer stops.

"Eat a bit, long one wisdom, I will shut down the phone first." Chen Moxiao laughed, turned off his mobile phone is not at ease, and easily shut down Xiaoyu's mobile phone.

"There will be no calls tonight." Chen Mo smiled and picked up the air duct and continued to blow the hair to Xiao Yu.

Chen Mo was so troubled, Xiao Yu was even more nervous, and his body was always tight. His face is shy, he becomes more rosy, and he doesn't know what he is thinking.

After Chen Mo put the hair dryer, Xiao Yu did not dare to look at him, bow his head and fingers together.

"Be a woman." Chen Mo attached to Xiao Yu's ear and said softly.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu gently sighed.

Chen Mo’s mouth slammed into the ear and held Xiao Yu in his arms and kissed him.

After Xiaoyu struggled a little, he found that it was useless, and the body softened. He gently hugged Chen Mo and let him mess.

At the time of ecstasy, Xiao Yu’s breathing was so fast that he gave up any form of resistance.

For a while, Chen Mocai hugged Xiao Yu and walked back to the room. The door slowly closed, like the shy girl in her arms.

For a long time, whispered, closed the moon, and fell red.

early morning.

Xiao Yu slowly opened his eyes from the slumber, lazy look, like a kitten just awake, cuddly. The horns and eyebrows have been relaxed, the young girl’s youth is less, and the woman’s flattery is more.

Seeing the familiar face in front of me, my eyes are a little fascinating.

Finally, he was handed over to the man in front of him. Just want to move, was gently pulled, Xiao Yu Liu eyebrows close. I was bullied last night and I still have some discomfort.

Not waiting for her to move for the second time, one hand has already held her waist to the arms.

"Don't sleep for a while?" Chen Mo said.

"I am going to make breakfast."

"Don't worry, I am now eating fish and knowing the taste. I will do morning exercises first."

Understand Chen Mo’s meaning, Xiao Yu’s eyes panic: “No, I am still... oh...”

Half an hour later, Xiao Yu was in the arms of Chen Mo, like a tired kitten, and his eyes were flushed, letting Chen Mo hold and walk into the bathroom.

On the dining table, the small fish face is ruddy, the skin becomes more delicate, and it is a little more charming than before, and it becomes more charming.

At this time, Xiao Yu did not stare at Chen Mo, this guy, knowing to bully her.

For the eyes of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo chose to ignore it and put the peeled eggs on her plate.

"Eat eggs."

"Eat a big ghost!" Xiao Yu grabbed the soft meat of Chen Mo's waist: "I am very happy to bully me?"

"Only one night, the girl became a daughter-in-law." Chen Mo painfully sucked a breath. This trick is a trick that women have every day.

Xiao Yu snorted, loosened Chen Mo, and took his eggs to eat.

"Today's weekend, take breakfast and take you out to go shopping."

"No, I am at home, it is not convenient." Xiao Yu's face is red.

Seeing Xiaoyan blushing, Chen Mo laughed, and the result was not laughed, and the mouth was blocked by eggs.

"Laughter, it's not blaming you." Xiao Yu screamed Chen Mo.

"Well, blame me, I want to punish how to punish." Chen Mo said.

"Nothing." Feel the silence of Chen Mo, Xiao Yu smiled slightly: "Penge you to accompany me at home, and go out at night."

"Yes." Chen Mo did not want to agree.

After breakfast, Chen Mo was in the villa, accompanied by a small fishing. Xiao Yu is reading a book, Chen Mo also holding a mobile phone and starting to play games. It was not until the evening that she took her out to the mall.

A pleasant weekend.

When I came to the company, Chen Mo was very angry, and there was more confidence in the breath.

Not long after arriving at the office, Zhao Min took a piece of information and put it on his desk.

"This is the application material for the Chinese character programming language environment project. If you look at it, if you have no problem, I will apply it. The University of Binhai has already negotiated it. As long as the above approval, the formalities will begin, and training will begin next year. ”

Chen Mo picked up the material and began to look through it.

"There are also publishers who want to publish the set of books on programming languages. Do you know this?"

"I know, Xiaoyu told me last weekend that I have already promised. This kind of thing, you can bring Xiaoyu with you. Come here, not only because it is so simple?"

"You guessed it, there is one more thing. You are not trying to promote the Chinese programming language? I will discuss this with you." Zhao Min said.

"What do you think?" Chen Mo came to an instant.

"Hold a Chinese character programming language programming contest..."

Zhao Min said the idea and held the event. There are many benefits.

Under the reward, you can encourage learning Chinese programming languages and provide a platform for companies to choose talents. When you are in the game, you can choose a good team or an individual to join the company.

If you have a particularly good program software, buy it as a company software ecosystem. A lot of software with ideas is derived from the bottom.

"Good idea, yes." Chen Mo immediately agreed that this kind of thing, in one fell swoop, is very helpful for the promotion of Chinese programming languages.

He came out with a Chinese programming language, not for display. This programming language is better than other languages, there is no reason not to use it.

In fact, he wants to promote is very simple, just need to say that the artificial intelligence research of the marching ant company is programming Chinese character programming language. But he won't say that, it is not a good thing to expose the existence of artificial intelligence.

"In the future, you will be the master of the matter. If I have an idea, I will tell you."

"Decentralization?" Zhao Min smiled.

"What decentralization, power has always been in your hands, I said at the beginning, the company's business, you are responsible." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Zhao Min smiled: "In June next year, the first session will be held. I will prepare people for the specific activities, and I will give you a copy of the time."

After confirming things, Zhao Min left Chen Mo's office area.

"Ink, you make the instructional video of the programming language and use animation." Chen Mo said that he has no time to make instructional videos.

"Okay, Mercedes." The ink girl opened.

In the afternoon, on the official website of the Army Ant Company and the official Weibo, an announcement was also updated.

The marching ant company will hold a Chinese character programming language programming competition, which will be held in June next year with a maximum prize of 2 million. Specific activity rules and details will be announced in a week.

As soon as this news came out, it spread immediately among many media.

It didn't take long for the Chinese character programming language to come out, so let's play a game now. The marching ant company is trying to promote the Chinese programming language.

chapters.title: Chapter 127: : Normal Temperature Superconducting Material
chapters.body:
Chapter 127: : Normal Temperature Superconducting Material

Lin Shu holds a newspaper and rushes into a dilapidated room. It seems that this newspaper is her life-saving straw.

"Grandpa, Grandpa." Lin Shu's shouting voice, excited and anxious.

In the house, a white-haired old man is sorting out the waste products. When he heard Lin Shu’s words, the old man raised his head and revealed a wrinkled face.

Not far behind the old man, a little boy of six years old, holding a broken toy, is playing excitedly, looking up at Lin Shu, the glasses are pure like a starry sky.

"Sister, you are back." Lin Shugang ran in, the little boy raised his head and showed a clean smile.

"Yeah." Lin Shu saw the little boy and walked over to touch his head.

"What's the matter? Xiaoshu." The old man looked at Lin Shu.

"Grandpa, look at this."

Lin Shu put the newspaper in front of his grandfather, and it was the news of the marching ant company holding the competition. The prize was 2 million, and several big characters were very obvious.

"What is the use of this?" The old man looked up at Lin Shu.

"My brother's illness has been saved. If I go to participate in this competition and get a bonus, I will have money to treat my brother." Lin Shu said excitedly.

"Noisy, do you understand this thing? You have to study hard now, you are almost high school, study hard. My brother's illness, grandfather will find a way." The old man stared at Lin Shu seriously.

"I don't understand, but other people don't understand. This is the programming language that just came out, everyone doesn't understand, they can learn, I can learn, and the information is free. As long as I learn this, I will go. In the game, I got the bonus and I have money to treat my brother." Lin Shu firmly said.

"Noisy, I don't understand what programming language you are talking about. You are going to be a high school student. You must study hard and go to college. Your brother will find a way to get sick." The old man said.

"Grandpa, don't you marry your sister."

Hearing the old man's temper, the little boy playing with the toy ran over and hugged the old man's arm.

"Grandpa, the doctor said, only two years, where do we go to find the surgery fee of 200,000? And the cost after the operation is a lot. Missing the time, it is late, let me try, I must not affect the results. , at least one more hope."

Lin Shu walked to the little boy, stroking his head and looking at the old man's eyes, full of pleading.

Seeing the appearance of Lin Shu, the old man fell silent. After a long time, he sighed and nodded with sadness on his face: "Try it, Grandpa also thinks about ways, one more hope."

"Well, I will definitely get the bonus." Lin Shu took the hand of the newspaper and held it tightly.

......

Chen Mo is in the lab, carefully looking at the eleven robots that are neatly aligned.

He asked the ink girl to assemble the robot, and the assembly speed was ten times faster than his hands. In just a few days, ten robots have been assembled.

This is equivalent to having 11 assistants in his lab. Fortunately, the lab is big enough to accommodate eleven robots and it doesn't look crowded.

In the future, apart from the ultra-precision machining that robots can't do, other things basically don't require him to intervene.

After confirming that the robot is ok, Chen Mocai said: "Ink, the teaching video of the Chinese programming language, is it done?"

"It's already done, is there a reward? My brother!"

“Do you know that you want to be rewarded now?”

Chen Mo was surprised. Before the ink girl just listened to the order, now this girl actually wants to be rewarded. It seems that artificial intelligence is learning all the time, and is also learning to work. Nonlinear logic is also part of the artificial intelligence design.

"On the Internet, a woman who will be spoiled, life is good."

When Chen Mo heard this, his eyelids jumped straight: "You want to reward now, I can't give you anymore. It will be rewarded to build a beautiful body for you in the future."

"Thank you, Brother, you have to hurry. The robots I control can't follow you away from the lab," said the ink girl.

"Well, there are conditions, the first time to build your body. And soon you can leave the lab." Chen Mo said: "First show me the teaching video."

Artificial intelligence with autonomy is indeed terrifying. Fortunately, the ink girl is listening to his orders. Within his control, if the artificial intelligence is out of control, it is terrible to think about the consequences.

"Ok."

When the ink girl just fell, on the computer screen of the lab, she jumped out of a player and played an animated teaching video.

Seeing the cartoon lecturer above, Chen Mo squinted.

This character is not his image? The ink girl made his image into a cartoon version of the character, and she also thought that she couldn’t help but laugh.

Simply read it again and confirm that the content is ok, Chen Mo nodded.

This is a new programming language that is different from previous programming languages.

The grammar of easy language is similar or even the same in C or C++ in many places, but the Chinese programming language is completely different. Learning C language well does not mean that this is also very powerful.

So many people learn Chinese programming languages and must learn from the beginning. This set of instructional videos is enough for people to get started.

“The first set of teaching videos will be sent to the official website, and the employees of the company's software R&D department will be notified to let them learn by themselves. Every week, we will update one set.” Chen Mo said.

"Ok."

Put everything to the ink girl, Chen Mo is idle.

The parts of the seismograph, which he has already made in the parts processing factory, have not been sent back. The experiments in the laboratory, there are robots, not enough time in the past, but now nothing to do.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo walked back to the office area and entered the technology library.

At the stage of [Technology Apprenticeship], he has eight scientific and technological tasks.

It represents different technologies in eight fields of physical applications, chemical materials, biomedicine, computers, ecology, machinery, military weapons and energy.

Only after completing eight technologies can we move on to the next stage.

Now just idle, take a technology, at least now can start to prepare, and later start research, can also be carried out directly.

After entering the science and technology library, Chen Mo first strolled around the library and read all eight books.

The book represents the field represented by the book. As for what technology is inside, only the technology library knows that this thing is like buying a lottery ticket.

After hesitating for a long time, Chen Mocai went to the book with the words 'Chemical Materials'.

In terms of eight technologies, if the technology of chemical materials has sufficient technical information, it is undoubtedly the easiest to implement.

The company has raw material processing plants, equipment in the laboratory, and preliminary material research conditions. If you have detailed technology, you can quickly synthesize the materials you need.

After making up his mind, Chen Mo slowly raised his hand and reached over to the book.

The hand just touched the projection of the book, and the next moment, it became a light spot, and it was not in his head. A vast amount of knowledge is engraved in his memory.

Instantly accepting such a huge memory, Chen Mo felt his head dizzy and pale. After a long time, Chen Mo was slowed down and recalled the technology.

In the next moment, a few big characters came to his mind.

"Normal temperature superconducting material - silicon carbon"

chapters.title: Chapter 128: : Intergenerational Materials
chapters.body:
Chapter 128: : Intergenerational Materials

The words 'normal temperature superconducting material' make Chen Mo's head instantly awake.

The constant temperature superconducting materials have been the object of exploration by various research scholars. Countless people have spent countless efforts and resources, and have not succeeded in finding them. The result is now on him.

At room temperature, the material with almost zero resistance is a room temperature superconducting material. This material has unlimited prospects and has become a super material that the world's cutting-edge laboratories have been exploring.

Chen Mo did not expect that this material was actually this material, completely beyond his imagination.

However, it is also expected that the technology in the apprenticeship stage is already a very advanced technology. The next level of technology apprenticeship technology should be cross-era.

In this way, it seems that the appearance of room temperature superconducting materials is not so awkward.

After determining the material, Chen Mo began to browse the next information. A large amount of information is the conditions, steps, and precautions for material synthesis.

In addition, there are material properties, advantages, disadvantages, and prospects for material applications. It involves electronic equipment manufacturing, power transmission, superconducting chips, machinery manufacturing, etc.

Each message has the most detailed record.

Seeing the word superconducting chip, Chen Mo excited. This material, after special processing, can also become a superconducting chip.

If the superconducting chip can be researched, the computer operation speed is absolutely much faster than now, and there is no need to worry about the problem of the machine heating, and the energy consumption is greatly reduced.

Not to mention other applications, just the ability to superconduct a chip is enough to make the value and potential of this material infinite.

This is an inter-generational material.

Silicon carbon, using special chemical conditions, connects the outermost layers of silicon atoms and carbon atoms, and three atoms of silicon and carbon are arranged in series to form a stable honeycomb molecular structure.

Chen Mo began to digest the knowledge of silicon carbide at room temperature superconducting materials. The technology sounds very simple, but to achieve it, there are still many conditions.

After half an hour, Chen Mocai thoroughly digested all the knowledge.

After coming out of the technology library, Chen Mo took a heavy breath and licked his head.

Soon after, another material of the era emerged.

The material of the normal temperature superconductor, the things involved are too wide, the interests are too big and too horrible, and definitely can not be rushed out, otherwise the trouble will definitely be more than his intelligent assistant.

Chen Mo will never publish this material until he is fully capable of self-protection. The previous events told him that there are many dark things in the world that ordinary people cannot see.

"Momgo, Jane calls." When Chen Mo thought about the future of superconducting materials, the ink girl suddenly spoke.

"Connected." Chen Mo returned to God.

"Xiao Mo, Xin Xin finished the exam, and went to play with you. She has already got on the bus. It is about 5:30 pm to 6:00 pm, I will go to Binhai City. Do you have time to pick her up?" It sounded a precious voice.

"Yeah, you don't say that I have forgotten, Xinxin finished the college entrance examination." Chen Mo stunned: "I just got off work at that time, I will pick her up."

"That gimmicks go there, don't bother you?" Zhen replied apologetically.

"She called my brother, don't talk about it, the house is big, wash up a lot of chopsticks. Just after the college entrance examination, let her relax and relax." Chen Mo said: "Right, how is the Xinxin college entrance examination?"

"That girl is very confident, said that he can follow your footsteps and go to Binhai University, but after the exam, the scores did not come out." Zhen Zhen's tone is obviously a little happy.

"If she dares to say this, it means it is good. She is here, I will take care of her, you can rest assured."

"With your words, I am relieved. Go there, if she is in trouble, you will help me teach the girl." Zhen Zhen said.

"Do not worry, Shin Shin is not a little witch when she was a child." Chen Mo smiled.

"The aunt hangs, and Shin Shin will bother you."

"No trouble."

Hanging up the phone, Chen Mo began to let the ink woman help to organize the technical materials of silicon carbon. Until the off-duty time, Chen Mocai took a small fishing trip to the station in Binhai City.

"Who is going to pick up?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Xin Xin, my cousin," Chen Mo said.

"Zhen's daughter?"

"Have you seen her?"

Xiaoyu’s parents have a relationship with the Jane family, and Chen Mo knows that it’s not surprising that they have seen them. This matter was only known when he was last cherished.

"I have seen it twice when I was a child. I haven't seen it since I was studying. She used to come to my house, so small, and grabbed my and my sister's toys."

When I heard this, Chen Mo laughed and Xiao Yu smiled softly.

Soon, the car came to the station gate. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, also began to wait quietly. Not long after, I saw a girl in short jeans and a white T-shirt carrying a suitcase and coming out of the station. With a high ponytail, revealing a slender neck, it looks very spiritual.

"brother."

After seeing Chen Mo, Zhang Xinxin immediately showed an excited smile and ran to him.

"Come on, go on the bus first."

Chen Mo took her suitcase and handed it to Wang Hai, and took her to the car.

"Brother, is this my nephew?" Zhang Xinxin's eyes bent into a crescent shape and looked at Xiao Yu.

Hearing this title, Xiaoyu feels weird, but my heart is a bit happy.

"She is called He Xiaoyu." Chen Mo did not deny Zhang Xinxin's words.

"Little fisher sister is good." Zhang Xinxin immediately greeted Xiao Yu: "Little fisher sister, you look so good."

"Thank you." Xiao Yu also politely replied.

All the way to gossip, Xiao Yu and Zhang Xinxin are gradually getting acquainted. Until returning to the villa, Zhang Xinxin rushed in with excitement, regardless of the image. Xiao Yu also went into the kitchen to cook and started cooking.

"Brother, big boss, my graduation gift?" Zhang Xinxin sat on the sofa and reached out to Chen Mo, a look of excitement.

"What do you want, take you out to buy tonight." Chen Mo directly patted her hand.

"A word is fixed, anyway, you are a local tyrant." Zhang Xinxin excited, seems to think of something, look at Chen Mo: "Brother, come here, want to tell you something. I want to play summer workers, can you go to your company? ”

"You can play everywhere, I will give you the money, I don't have to go to work."

"That won't work." Zhang Xinxin immediately refused: "I am not a vase, I can make money myself. It is the most comfortable to spend my own money. This time I am not playing, but after college, I can't rely on my father. mom."

“Is it really working? Not afraid of hardship?”

Chen Mo looked at Zhang Xinxin, as if he had known this girl for the first time. It seems that this cousin who is not sensible has begun to become sensible. Since she has such a request, Chen Mo will not refuse.

"Not afraid." Zhang Xinxin shook his head.

"That's going back to let Xiaoyu give you arrangements, telling you in advance, it's the bottom job, you have to suffer." Chen Mo said.

"Thank you brother." Zhang Xinxin said with a smile: "I am going to help the blind man to cook."

Finished, immediately got up and ran into the kitchen. In the evening, Chen Mo went to the commercial square with Xiao Yu and Zhang Xinxin who had just arrived.

chapters.body:
Chapter 129: : Internet Conference

The next day, Chen Mogang went to the company, and Zhao Min took a report and entered Chen Mo's office. After seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min’s eyes became strange.

"Why are you looking at me with this kind of look?" Chen Mo was stared at by Zhao Min, and he was uncomfortable.

Zhao Min handed the report to Chen Mo: "The drugs you have studied for the pharmaceutical company have been clinically tested by the applicants of the Food and Drug Administration. This is the test report they sent back to the animals."

After that, Zhao Min still looked at Chen Mo weirdly. It seems that Chen Mo has a new understanding.

"Zhao Zong, look at it like this, let me feel very handsome to know?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Is this medicine researched by you?" Zhao Min pointed to the report.

"You said this abundance. Chest medicine?"

Chen Mo also looked at Zhao Min strangely, just his eyes, so that Zhao Min was uncomfortable.

"It's not my research." Chen Mo shook his head. "When I saw a medical book, I saw a similar formula. I saw a lot of medical books. In the laboratory, when I was bored, I would study it. After the pharmaceutical company acquired, I I will test the formula I studied."

Chen Mo did not read the report, but looked at Zhao Min.

"It turns out that you look at medical books, it is to see these things." Zhao Min said strangely.

Next to Chen Mo’s office area, there is a large study room with many books on it, all of which are knowledgeable in various fields of science and technology. She came in many times before and found that Chen Mo was reading various books.

"I just think it's fun." Chen Mo's face: "Don't say this, what is the clinical trial result?"

"The animal test is really useful. It is a topical drug, no toxic components are detected, and no allergens have been found. This drug, if it is successful in clinical trials in the human body, is very marketable. It can reach women without surgery. Purpose, if it is listed, the silicone era can almost say goodbye."

Zhao Min just read the report and looked awkward. She also saw the report, only to know that Chen Mo was handed over to the pharmaceutical company for research.

Chen Mo also knows that the cycle of drugs from research and development to market is very long, so this matter is not going to come.

"I have a prescription here, you hand it over to the research team and let them study." Chen Mo thought about it, entered the database, and put the formula of aphrodisiac into the u disk and handed it to Zhao Min.

"You are a superman." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo silently: "What is this medicine?"

"Look back and open the information and see for yourself."

In order to avoid embarrassment, Chen Mo did not say it.

"Okay." Zhao Min took a deep look at the u disk: "Today, I want to tell you something. Next week, the China Internet Conference is held in Yanjing. I have been busy these days, so..."

"Let me go in the right place?" Chen Mo asked.

"At that time, some domestic technology giants will pass, you can also know. The company has applied for a product booth, you need a top-notch technology product, bring your robot to show your face." Zhao Min looks at the station Beside the robot.

This robot, she has been a long time, but Chen Mo has never let go.

"Yes, it's just not too urgent." Chen Mo promised to go down, the manufacture of the seismograph, to the robot, he does not have to participate in too many things for the time being.

The transformation of the 3D printer can also be handed over to the robot.

Research on room temperature superconducting materials is still lacking some experimental equipment, so it is temporarily impossible to study.

Things look a lot, but with the help of the robot controlled by the ink girl, he has nothing to do.

"That's the way it is," said Zhao Min.

"Right, there is something to say to you. My sister is on holiday, come here to work, I will let Ruoqiang arrange her as an office assistant and tell you."

"You let your sister be an office assistant?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

“Is there a problem?” Chen Mo asked.

"No problem, just wonder why you gave your sister, arrange such a low-level job." Zhao Min said.

"She wants to learn independence, at least under my eyes, can still look at it, let her experience the experience. Know how to make money, and understand things later." Chen Mo said: "The higher position, there are opportunities in the future."

After a brief mention of the matter, Zhao Min did not object to Chen Mo’s thought after he understood the situation. Just graduated from high school, it is still a little smaller, from the bottom of the work, can also better experience the hard work.

After Zhao Min left the office, Chen Mocai went into the lab: "Ink, you write an independent intelligent software, embedded in a robot. The intelligence is not too high, better than Xiaodie, you can execute the command."

Next, he is going to attend the China Internet Conference.

In his lab, the robot also has a month, just to take this opportunity to let the robot enter the public's field of vision. As for what will happen, it will only be known when it is time.

"Okay, Mom."

After explaining the writing of intelligent software, Chen Mo began to transform some precision parts of 3D printers. These parts, the robot can't do such a precise job now, only he can do it himself.

A week's time passed quietly.

Until the day before the start of the China Internet Conference, Chen Mocai and Julie took the plane to the capital. This is the first time Chen Mo has participated in such a large conference, so Zhao Min let Julie accompany, at least Julie has a little experience.

The Internet conference, for Chen Mo, only heard the name, the first time to participate, there is still some expectation.

chapters.title: Chapter 130: : Inspection Division
chapters.body:
Chapter 130: : Inspection Division

Marching ant company capital branch.

Xia Changlong and a group of employees stood at the door and looked forward to seeing the watch from time to time.

He is a professional manager recruited by Zhao Min from the headhunting company and is now responsible for the management of the army branch of the army ant company.

When Zhao Min recruited a branch, many professional managers were unwilling, because Zhao Min’s salary was too low, but now, many of his former competitors have sharpened their heads and want to join the marching ant company.

Today, I heard that Chen Mo came over, and he was slightly nervous.

He didn't get close to the big boss of the company and didn't know his temper. People just watched it on the Internet, a young man who just graduated.

When he first saw the image of Chen Mo, his outlook on life collapsed and he struggled so hard for so many years. As a result, a newly graduated student would completely surpass him.

Tomorrow, the China Internet Conference will be held. The marching ant company is invited to participate in the Internet conference, and most of them are responsible for their capital division. He must also assist Chen Mo during his participation in the Internet Conference.

While he was thinking about how to communicate with Chen Mo, Chen Mo and his party, under the leadership of the secretary, appeared at the door of the company.

Seeing Chen Mo walking in the middle, there was a commotion among the welcoming employees.

Chen Mo can't talk about the big handsome guy level, but also a little handsome, confident, young and promising, all kinds of conditions, let him expose, become the object of many women's fantasy.

If they can be seen by Chen Mo, they will have no worries in this life, and they will think about life. Some people applauded and squeezed to the front, hoping that this young boss would notice himself.

Chen Mo glanced around in a circle, his eyes fixed on Xia Changlong.

"Boss, I am Xia Changlong, the manager of the Capital Division." Xia Changlong said.

"Well, hello." Chen Mo nodded politely.

"You all go back to work." Xia Changlong said to the staff below, and walked in with Chen Mo and Julie.

"Take me to your R&D department." Chen Mo said.

The Capital Division is mainly responsible for the North China market and is close to the capital. There are relatively many talents here. So there is also a software development department responsible for the development of butterfly eye mobile phones and computer software.

Chen Mo has a special liking for technology and naturally attaches great importance to the R&D department.

Research and Development Department.

Lin Zhiyuan looked at the computer screen in front of him, his fingers were constantly tapping and immersed in it. The complex computer language of the Chinese character programming language has made his technology home full of infinite interest.

After learning the Chinese character programming language, he found that the Chinese character programming language announced by the head office was more interesting.

He developed a simple little game with a Chinese programming language. Curious, he developed the same small game in C and JAVA.

As a result, the small game developed by the Chinese character programming language has the smallest amount of code and runs faster in the three languages.

Different programming languages, doing the same task, writing different amounts of code, the program runs at different speeds. Obviously, Chinese programming languages have two advantages.

This discovery, his success attracted his attention, and also let him see the prospects of the Chinese programming language. The Chinese language programming language announced by the company is better than the computer language such as C language.

He didn't know if other people found it, but he found this, so during this time, he was learning the computer language after work. He knows that this programming language has great potential.

Now he is trying to develop a game script in the Chinese programming language.

finished!

Lin Zhiyuan sighed with a relaxed smile. After thinking about it, Lin Zhiyuan took out his laptop from his backpack.

Now that the script is complete, you can try it out.

After the computer is turned on, Lin Zhiyuan directly clicks on the most recent fire, shootout competitive game, and puts the u disk copy script program into his own computer to open.

After the start, Lin Zhiyuan was immersed in it and began to try the script.

Under the leadership of Xia Changlong, Chen Mo entered the R&D department.

As soon as they came in, all the staff immediately turned their attention to the people. After discovering Xia Changlong and Chen Mo, many people have a bright look, dare not have any laziness, and pay attention to their work.

Chen Mo looked around for a week, suddenly his eyes gazed, looked at a corner and walked over.

His movements attracted everyone's attention and looked at Chen Mo's direction. He found Lin Zhiyuan who was playing the game.

"Zhiyuan."

The staff next door also noticed the actions of Lin Zhiyuan and immediately whispered. I was just immersed in the thrill of script killing, and I didn’t even hear it.

Xia Changlong saw Lin Zhiyuan's appearance, sighed in his chest and almost broke out. However, seeing Chen Mo’s appearance, he resisted hard and kept up with Chen Mo’s pace.

"Boss, this..."

Chen Mo stopped Xia Changlong and signaled that he did not have to talk. After walking to Lin Zhiyuan, he stared at the script on his working computer.

People in the R&D department can't bear to look straight, play games in the office, and be seen by the big boss. What will be the next game?

The office was terribly terrible, and even Xia Changlong could only be anxious.

The big boss came to the first day, and if he blames it, he will be responsible. The head of the R&D department around him, his forehead has been sweating.

When Lin Zhiyuan killed the last opponent, he saw the words on the screen and finally smiled.

It’s just that he just quit from the game and feels terrible around. Just looking back, Lin Zhiyuan’s smile was stiff.

The general manager and the supervisor are watching him. The most terrifying thing is that the young man who is standing behind him and is about the same age as himself, only seen in the video, the big boss behind the company, Chen Mo.

"Boss, manager, supervisor, that me..."

Lin Zhiyuan **** the scalp, still do not know how to explain, playing games in the office was caught in the current, how to explain has become pale and powerless.

Everyone looked at Chen Mo and waited for him to speak.

Chen Mo took a look at Lin Zhiyuan, went to the computer and began to browse the complete program of the script written by Lin Zhiyuan. He didn't talk, everyone else could only wait.

After a while, I stood up.

"Is this script written by you?"

Chen Moyi opened the door and the entire office was petrified. The style of painting is wrong, shouldn’t it be a black face and a temper?

Lin Zhiyuan’s head was also caught in the crash, and he was ready to accept the shackles of his face.

"Yes." Lin Zhiyuan nodded.

"Writing well, but unfortunately not used on the way." Chen Mo shook his head.

"I was wrong." Lin Zhiyuan hurriedly admit his mistake, or he was expelled, he was tragedy.

"As a punishment, deduct your half-month bonus, are you convinced?"

"Enthusiastic." Lin Zhiyuan bit his teeth and nodded.

"Don't use your talents in this kind of thing in the future."

"understood."

"Start next month, give him a 5% salary."

When this was said, everyone looked at Chen Mo incredibly. What are the meanings? Playing games in the office, shouldn't you be punished? How to raise wages?

"The company has regulations, technical personnel control the Chinese character programming language, wages rose by 5%, this is not empty talk. Still not thank the boss?" Xia Changlong hated the iron staring at Lin Zhiyuan.

"Thank you for your boss." Lin Zhiyuan was a little bit frustrated and now immediately became excited.

“Who else has learned the Chinese programming language in the R&D department?” Chen Mo took a look around the office.

Other people, look at me, I look at you.

"Boss, we will use a little." Two employees standing in the corner raised their hands and took out a u disk: "There is a small program that we developed together."

"Boss, Yin Zhenghao and Wang Ming, are freshly graduated college students, are in the trial period." Zhang Hai, director of the R&D department.

Chen Mo took the u disk and saw the small program code inside, then nodded: "Let them turn into formal employees."

Upon hearing this sentence, the two immediately became overjoyed.

"As a company's R&D staff, there are many opportunities to get in touch with the Chinese programming language. I hope that you can learn the Chinese programming language and it will be good for your work. Otherwise, you will be able to survive the fittest and regret it."

Chen Mo’s words made all the developers behind, and suddenly realized that the head office was coming.

After a brief discussion, Chen Mo, under the leadership of Xia Changlong and others, strolled around the company and met with the employees of the branch. After learning about the situation of some companies, I left with Julie and went to the hotel.

chapters.title: Chapter 131: :Theme
chapters.body:
Chapter 131: :Theme

Chen Mo has attached great importance to the promotion of Chinese character programming languages, so in the company, he opened a side to Lin Zhiyuan. It didn't take long for this computer language to come out. There were not many people who could learn in such a short period of time and use it to make game scripts.

This Lin Zhiyuan is a talent.

That kind of situation is not a big mistake. He doesn't want to let the company lose a talent because of this.

His programming language is better than other programming languages. It is only the beginning, and many people have not responded.

As long as those people really realize the importance of the Chinese programming language, no one can promote it, and some people will learn automatically.

All this, only one opportunity is needed. And this opportunity, he has a hunch, perhaps in the near future.

"Boss, do you have a heart?" Julie interrupted Chen Mo's thoughts.

"Nothing." Chen Mo smiled.

"Boss, come to the capital for the first time?"

As the first person to join the company, Julie knows Chen Mo, the boss, who is very easy-going, so she dares to be bold and chat with Chen Mo.

"It is indeed the first time, here is more prosperous than the coastal city." Chen Mo turned to look out the window.

"After the bustling, there are still a lot of little-known corners, there are many ants in the dwelling." Julie sighed and looked at the passing people in the car window.

"Do you understand this?" Chen Mo asked.

"I was one of the North drifters that year. When I was young, I always thought that girls could also squat in the world, and they chose to drift north. A girl alone, when I got here, I knew that life was cruel." Julie said with emotion.

Many people, the surface is bright and beautiful, but they live a life like a dwelling. When she was working, she also had to endure the greed of leaders, and she was truly warm and self-aware.

Some girls who work with her can't stand the temptation to fall on their own. If you don't want to accept the unspoken rules, you have to stay in place for a long time.

Julie has some sighs, this time, it is like dreaming. If it wasn't for Zhao Min's original appreciation and cultivation, she was still one of the white-collar workers on the road.

So at the beginning, Zhao Min contacted her and let her join the pioneering army ant company. She would not hesitate to quit the position of Wanbao company department head, go to Binhai City, and help Zhao Min to form the original army ant company.

When I heard Julie’s story, Chen Mo also sighed. He is a lucky one. Since the rescue of the small fishing, the trajectory of life has completely changed.

After chatting briefly, Julie started talking to Chen Mo about business.

"Our participation in the Internet conference, the main itinerary is: the opening forum on the morning of the 23rd, the Internet conference business exchange meeting in the evening, and the Internet high-level annual meeting on the morning of the 24th, the peak development forum on the 25th and the closing session of the conference. ”

"At the opening forum, as a guest of the conference, then a business meeting that evening..."

On the way, Julie gave Chen Mo a detailed introduction to the schedule. This is the first time that the marching ant company participated in the China Internet Conference. She must tell Chen Mo the detailed schedule, otherwise it would be embarrassing to make a mistake.

"As a domestic new star company this year, we are invited to give a keynote speech. You should know that you need to give a speech at the time." Julie said.

"This is not a good news." Chen Mo said.

He likes to listen quietly below, but he can't listen below. If it is not for a speech, Zhao Min may let others come as representatives.

But in the keynote speech, Zhao Min can only let Chen Mo come over if he does not leave. In addition to Zhao Min, only Chen Mocai has enough weight as the speaker.

It was already late in the evening when the two returned to the hotel near the Capital Conference Center. After the meal, after the shower, Chen Mo began to read the information of the Internet conference.

The Internet Conference covers many cutting-edge technologies in the fields of mobile Internet, innovation and entrepreneurship, cloud computing, big data, and the Internet of Things. This is a grand meeting of domestic Internet companies, and hundreds of domestic and foreign corporate executives will gather at the conference.

The theme of this year's Internet Conference is ‘new era, new starting point, new wisdom’, and the development of artificial intelligence has become a new mainstream topic.

Important forums such as the Internet Senior Conference and the Internet Innovation and Development Forum were also held in the same period. In real time, domestic technology giants will gather in these forums to discuss the direction of the next step.

As the fastest rising star company in China, the marching ant company is participating in this forum for the first time.

Early the next morning, after Chen Mo and Julie had finished their breakfast, they went to the location of the Internet Conference, the Capital International Convention Center.

When they arrived, they had already seen the flow of people coming and going at the door. Many people were in suits and suits, obviously attending the meeting.

"There are a lot of people." Chen Mo said.

“Hundreds of executives at home and abroad participated in the conference, and hundreds of media have tracked the report here. There are also large and small forums held in the same period. SMEs and entrepreneurs are coming over. This is a grand event. Julie walked around Chen Mo and introduced him to the situation while walking.

After entering the conference hall, Chen Mo was seated in the front row on the left under the leadership of the staff.

"Chen Chen, don't come innocent."

It wasn't long before Chen Mogang sat down. A thick voice was heard, and Yu Chengnan was also sitting next to him under the leadership of the staff.

"Yu total." After Chen Mo saw Yu Chengnan, his face showed a smile.

“Is it missing for a while?” Yu Chengnan said with a smile: “I didn’t expect to meet here, why didn’t the conference start and talk about a business?”

"Yu total, you said." Chen Mo said.

"After the last time, is there any interest in authorizing smart assistant technology to us?"

After the marching ant company's march into Europe was blocked, China Micro has been holding the high-end market. If you have the help of multi-language intelligent assistants, you can definitely seize the international market share of Apple and Samsung.

"I am afraid that it will not work for the time being." Chen Mo shook his head.

Smart assistants are the biggest selling point of their butterfly-eye mobile phones. If they are authorized to Huawei, their advantages will be lost.

"Two, can I join your conversation?" When the two said this, they were interrupted by a voice: "Chen Mo Xiao brother, long time no see, I did not expect that we will meet again, it will be in this case. ”

The coming person is Zhou Hongwei, the president of the Seven Tigers. His first pot of gold was earned in the hands of the Seven Tigers. After greeting the two, Zhou Hongwei sat down in silence around Chen Mo.

"I didn't expect to see you for less than a year. Chen Moxiao brothers have already achieved today's results." Zhou Hongwei said with exclamation.

"Fortunately." Chen Mo said not to humble.

“Zhou always knows Mr. Chen?” Yu Chengnan interjected.

"Know, there was a happy cooperation." Zhou Hongwei said with a smile: "Sit here today, are you going to take the stage? Yu Zong, what is your theme this year?"

"Terminal - cloud computing - chip." Yu Chengnan said: "What about Zhou Zong?"

"cyber security."

When Zhou Hongwei just finished, the two looked at Chen Mo and looked forward to his answer.

"Artificial intelligence," Chen Mo said.

"Now Chen Moxiao brother is one of the supreme gods of the Internet. What advice is there for network security?" Zhou Hongwei asked.

"The network is already insecure, and in the near future, new challenges are coming."

Zhou Hongwei and Yu Chengnan face each other and look at Chen Mo, waiting for his following.

chapters.title: Chapter 132: :Smart Robot
chapters.body:
Chapter 132: :Smart Robot

Chen Mo also looked at the two, this really does not know how to explain. Can it be said that advanced artificial intelligence has emerged? This is impossible.

"A large-scale virus attack will definitely come back in the future. Low-end devices, including personal computers and smart phones, have no security technology. The cycle of exploits is too short, so for ordinary users, the network does not exist. At least not at the moment."

Chen Mo thought about it and said the idea. If there is another large-scale virus incident like 'Eternal Heart', the network will be hit hard again.

"I listen to the Chen Mo brother's meaning, is the next network virus attack, there will be a change?" Zhou Hongwei said.

"I didn't say this, the specific things in the future, who dare to say certain?" Chen Mo said: "You can ask Yu in this regard, maybe he has any good suggestions. After all, Yu's experience is better than my fledgling boy. many."

"On experience, we have more than you. But on technology, we add up and multiply by 2, not as much as you."

Yu Chengnan turned the topic away. He is not an expert in cybersecurity. There is no way to comment on this.

During the three-person chat, the opening ceremony of the forum officially began, and the three people stopped and looked at the stage.

After a series of keynote speeches by the Minister of Industry and Information Technology, the organizer, and so on, the next step is the peak dialogue.

The dialogue was the interaction between Zhang Wei, director of the Network Economy Research Center, and the chairman of the China Internet Society, and Wu Hequan, an academician of the Academy of Engineering.

At the beginning, I listened carefully. Later, I was bored and bored. Chen Mo took out his mobile phone and started playing.

In the dialogue above, a few of them, and they also talked about each other, they are talking about some Internet technology development.

Time spent in the chat, Chen Mo also finally realized the pain of a long meeting.

At the same time, the exhibition area of the Internet Conference.

Jia Jin wandered around the exhibition area with his camera and looked at the various black technologies in the exhibition area. His face was full of praise.

Hollens, VR/AR hybrid reality technology, the world's fastest electric car - the Weilai eP9, saw the car's simulated cockpit, so he couldn't help but experience it.

Numerous black technologies have not only existed in science fiction movies.

It's just that these black technologies, because of their immature technology or cost reasons, can only stay in the laboratory stage and cannot be popularized among the public.

These technologies can only appear in the future world after a technological breakthrough.

After experiencing the cockpit of the fastest electric car, Jia Jin began to work again. His task today is to report on various black technologies in the exhibition area of the Internet Conference.

At the opening of the conference, many media have locked their eyes on the opening forum.

As one of the biggest highlights of the Internet conference, the exhibition area naturally attracted the attention of many reporters. This is one of the most popular places for ordinary people.

The technology inside is the technology of their future world. In these black technologies, to imagine the shadow of the future world.

Suddenly remembered what, Jia Jin looked at the map of the exhibition area and left in front of it.

The marching ant company is the rising star company this year and belongs to the legend of the industry. In his message, the marching ant company also participated in the Internet conference, and there were technology products exhibiting.

He is very curious, what is the product of the marching ant company?

Just entering the place where the marching ant company participated, Jia Jin saw the staff of the marching ants in the exhibition area. After seeing the exhibits in the exhibition area, Jia Jin revealed an incredible color.

Lu Hongyi smiled and looked at Jia Jin who came over, standing beside him, standing a female robot. This is the robot that came out of the boss's lab. It was specially created for this exhibition. The name is ‘妖姬’.

As the company that participated in the Internet conference for the first time, it is also a well-known domestic enterprise. It is naturally impossible to take the products of the Internet.

When he saw the robot coming out of the lab, he thought he would cross the future world. He can't imagine how much incredible technology there is in the lab of the boss.

After seeing the robot, Jia Jin was instantly attracted, painted in blue stripes, and elegantly with a pure beauty. Such a cool robot is already one of the top technologies in the exhibition area.

"Hello, what is the function of this robot?" Jia Jin took a few photos and immediately got together.

"It is the enchantress series robot housekeeper developed by our company. In addition to normal communication, it can do all kinds of housework. Clean the room, drink tea, chat, look after children, etc." Lu Hongyi said with a smile: "Other functions, currently It is under development."

When I heard the introduction of Lu Hongyi, Jia Jin was excited.

The robot era has arrived?

"Can it move?" Jia Jin asked immediately.

"Xiao Ji, can you move?" Lu Hongyi looked at the robot.

"I am not a wood man." The enchantress eyes lit up, turned to look at Jia Jin, and reached out: "Hello, I am the marching ant company enchantress series robot 001, you can call me enchantress."

Jia Jin was shocked by the robot that suddenly moved. After reacting, he reached out and shook his hand. The feeling of shaking hands with the robot is particularly strange, but enough to make him excited.

When the robot and Jia Jin shook hands, several reporters also came over and clamored for the action of the robot and Jia Jin shaking hands, with a excited color on his face.

Seeing so many people taking pictures, the robot released Jia Jin’s hand and put up the scissors.

A few reporters are even more excited. The movement of this robot is very natural. There is no mechanical sense of the general robot. And when you see the camera, you will put your own scissors, and to what extent does the intelligence reach?

Jia Jin reacted and immediately picked up the camera.

"Xiao Ji, can you change the shape?" After the filming, Jia Jin tried to say.

"can."

Its words just fell, immediately changed to a posture, the scissors hand also changed into a heart shape. Several reporters are like chicken blood, and the intelligence of this robot is against the sky.

"Xiao Ji, shaking hands with them." Lu Hongyi said.

"Ok."

After standing straight, the robot came over to several reporters. This scene made a few people feel awkward, and the camera was aiming at the robot all the time.

"Hello. I am the marching ant company enchantress series robot 001, you can call me enchantress." The enchantress reached out and said to a reporter.

After shaking hands gently, the robot went to another reporter again.

If you don't see this as a robot, you will definitely think that this is a person dressed in my robot's clothes.

“Is there any other features?” Jia Jin asked. “Can you let her demonstrate?”

Lu Hongyi nodded slightly: "Xiao Ji, give this gentleman a glass of water."

When his words fell, the enchantress picked up the mineral water on the table and unscrewed it. He poured it into a glass of water and handed it to Jia Jin: "Mr., your water."

The reporters at the scene were all stunned and stared at the robot.

How far has this robot's intelligence been? Has the robot era arrived? Several reporters floated a huge question mark at the same time.

chapters.title: Chapter 133: : Get Artificial Intelligence To Get The World
chapters.body:
Chapter 133: : Get Artificial Intelligence To Get The World

"Hello there! Humanity. 》——Global News

"The era of robots has arrived? 》——Phoenix Technology

"The marching ant robot housekeeper - enchantress! 》——People’s Daily

"Shock! robot. 》——Squirrel headlines

......

For a time, various news about robots appeared in major media. With the robot video of the marching ant company in the Internet conference, the network began to boil in a short time.

Many people have seen robots, but most of them are remote control, no remote control, almost all chat robots or sweeping robots, can't do too much.

Now that the enchantress came out, let them see what is real high technology.

The intelligence of the robot has reached this point?

This kind of technology, they only saw in the sci-fi blockbuster, and now suddenly burst out of such a robot, let them see something more horrible.

Under various articles, all the netizens blasted the pot.

"The Terminator is coming soon?"

"Humans are worried that the era of intelligent robots has come. The marching ant company is really terrible. Chen Mo is terrible. Does the country care?"

"Will the war robot be far behind?"

"Gates: It's hard to imagine why some people think that artificial intelligence is not enough."

Various comments under the article are worried about the threat of robots. Sci-fi blockbusters have seen, many people are subconsciously worried about the future development of robots.

Different from those articles, in some famous forums in China, some posts about the enchantress robot are very different.

1st floor: sofa, I am thinking, making a real doll, will it be called after going to bed?

2nd floor: Respond to the upstairs, while you exercise, let it call. You call it, you call it, call your throat, and nobody cares about you. It will listen to your commands.

3rd floor: broken throat...

4th floor: Don't be afraid of no girlfriend, wait for the country to be rich, and distribute the package.

......

After the exposure of the enchantress robot, it was less than an hour, and all the forums and news reports were full of robots.

After the emergence of intelligent assistants in the marching ant company, artificial intelligence has always maintained high fever. This time, intelligent robots emerged. Although they are not listed, it is enough to see the experimental products.

Robots in the exhibition area, but from a variety of actions, the technology has matured.

Intelligent robots allow the marching ants to stand out in the black technology of the Internet conference and seize the headlines. Other technologies are eclipsed in the face of this flexible robot.

Conference Hall 1, Hall.

Chen Mo is sitting under the stage, and Yu Chengnan is by his side.

Now it is already the 'voice of the industry' link. Yu Chengnan, as the first representative to give a keynote speech, is now down and talking to him.

"Chen Chen, look at this news." Yu Chengnan handed the phone to Chen Mo: "Your company is in the limelight."

Chen Mo set his sights on Yu Chengnan's mobile phone and saw reports about robots.

He recognized it at a glance, that is the robot in the exhibition area. This robot is the first robot he assembled successfully, and the back ten are slightly improved. So the weakest performance is used for exhibitions.

"So fast on the headlines?"

Chen Mo was a little surprised to see the news on the phone, the robot grabbed the headlines, which he did not expect. In the exhibition, there are many other technology companies' black technology. In his view, robots are ordinary.

"This is an era of information explosion, the speed of news dissemination, you are clearer than me. I did not expect the technology of the marching ant company has reached this point." Yu Chengnan said with emotion.

The marching ant company was established shortly, and this achievement is simply enviable and hateful.

"This is just a test piece." Chen Mo said.

“In the exhibition, many of them are experimental products. Why didn’t they see the headlines? I didn’t expect the marching ant company to target intelligent robots. It seems that I am going to change my opinion on you now.”

"This robot has only three hours of battery life. The current technology is still immature, and there are still many defects." Chen Mo laughed: "It is still impossible to go public, there is still a way to go."

During the conversation between the two, a ceremonial lady wearing a cheongsam came over to Chen Mo and smiled at him: "Mr. Chen, then you will come to the stage to give a keynote speech. Please come with me to prepare."

"Look back and talk."

Chen Mo and Yu Chengnan bid farewell, under the guidance of Miss etiquette, walked toward the background.

"I am afraid that everyone here has heard of the name of the marching ant company. The rise of the marching ant company is a legend in the scientific community."

On the stage, the famous host Du Fu talked.

"The field of artificial intelligence is a hot topic recently and the theme of this conference. The marching ant company is undoubtedly one of the pioneers in the field of artificial intelligence. Below is the founder of the army ant company, Mr. Chen Mo, who delivered a keynote speech."

As the voice of Du Fu fell, Miss etiquette took Chen Mo to the stage.

The people below have begun to talk quietly.

Just after listening to other people's keynote speeches, they have learned that the marching ant company exhibited an advanced intelligent robot in the exhibition area. Now when you open the news, you can see the report of this robot.

In the field of artificial intelligence, I am afraid that the marching ant company has already run ahead of other companies. In the circle of the Internet, there is such a saying: people who have artificial intelligence get the world.

The state has formulated relevant policies and even mentioned in the issuance document: With the power of the whole country, it is necessary to seize the global commanding heights of artificial intelligence in 2030.

This is not an empty talk, and relevant policies have been issued. The world is vying for the first opportunity of artificial intelligence. The country is also in this respect, and naturally it will not fall behind, and it has already begun to lay out.

Artificial intelligence will be an important topic for a long time to come.

Now the marching ant company, obviously in the field of artificial intelligence, has already caught up with the three giants. The influence of the future marching ant company will definitely increase.

If it is just a smart assistant, perhaps the big giants will not pay too much attention, but the intelligent robots have come out and everyone has to pay attention. The marching ant company, which has been overtaking and has become one of the leaders in the artificial intelligence industry.

After Chen Mo appeared on the stage, all the people in the conference hall were quiet, and everyone's eyes were concentrated on him.

The theme of this Internet conference is related to artificial intelligence.

As a pioneer of artificial intelligence, Chen Mo’s words are absolutely weighty. On technology, he developed the mobile ant smartphone operating system, developed the intelligent assistant Xiaodie, and also created the second Chinese computer programming language.

Even if Chen Mo is not old enough, no one dares to look at him because of this. Chen Mo is also one of the most influential technology giants.

Chen Mo stood on the podium and took a look at the speech on the podium. This is the first time he has stood on such a big stage, and his heart is more or less nervous.

Dispelling the sense of tension and taking a deep breath, Chen Mocai looked up and looked at everyone.

If you have a good grade, get more updates. Looking at the commentary area every day, I am only able to escape without being able to go out. In the future, I will be more sloppy and practice speed.

Finally, after you want to go to the shelves, everyone can subscribe to the support. Don't subscribe with the coupons for the first order. Don't subscribe with the coupons for the first order. Don't subscribe with the coupons. (Very important)

chapters.title: Chapter 134: : Speeches And Interviews (First To Subscribe)
chapters.body:
Chapter 134: : Speeches And Interviews (First To Subscribe)

"Hello everyone, I am Chen Mo from the marching ant company." Chen Mo slowly opened his mouth.

Everyone is uplifting and listening attentively.

“Artificial intelligence is not far away from us. Just ten days ago, the Ministry of Science and Technology held a meeting to announce the list of the first batch of national new generation artificial intelligence open innovation platforms. Thousands of autopilots, Ali’s urban brain, Penguin’s medical care The image, as well as the intelligent voice instant translation of Xunfei.

Whoever controls artificial intelligence can become the master of the world.

The battle to occupy the commanding heights of artificial intelligence has already begun. In the future, the marching ant company will also join the battle to help seize the global artificial intelligence commanding heights. The pattern has begun to change, and none of us knows who will be eliminated first.

Marching ants are new to artificial intelligence, but in the field of artificial intelligence, we are confident to accept any challenge. In the future, artificial intelligence will be spread across various fields such as manufacturing, medical care, and transportation.

Our company's latest intelligent robot technology is already in the experimental stage. In the future, it may be a smart housekeeper, cashier, waiter, babysitter, etc. You can think of a career.

Driverlessness can leave drivers unemployed, and intelligent language translation will make translators rare animals. The era of artificial intelligence is an unprecedented opportunity and an unprecedented challenge.

What we should think about is how to adapt to this environment. I very much agree with Mr. Li Yanhong's statement: In the future, Ai will be a downsizing against Internet products. ”

Chen Mo stood on the stage and talked. From his point of view, the era of artificial intelligence has already arrived. He controls the ink girl and can know the changes in the entire Internet world. The Internet today is as fragile as it is in the two-dimensional world.

The people below are listening carefully, and sometimes they are thinking about the color.

The history of human development is a history of the development of tools that are easier to use. Stoneware, bronze, iron, steam engine, electrical, information, intelligent.

Letting humans live with comfort is a development trend. So no matter how worried humans are about the existence of artificial intelligence, this trend cannot be changed.

If they don't develop and others develop, it means they have to be eliminated.

Combined with the intelligent robots of the Army Ant Company, Chen Mo elaborated on the application in various fields. The world has not yet been prepared to accept artificial intelligence, at least not yet.

"Zhou Zong, what do you think about Chen Mo?"

Under the stage, Yu Chengnan looked at Zhou Hongwei, not only them, but other people also whispered about Chen Mo.

"It's hard to say that he is very confident." Zhou Hongwei said.

It can be heard from Chen Mo's words that the marching ant company has strong confidence in the field of artificial intelligence.

"The robot of the marching ant company should be the source of his self-confidence. The technology seems mature, human-computer interaction and deep learning, and the marching ant company should belong to the most cutting-edge field."

"It seems that this world is about to be these young people." Yu Chengnan said with emotion.

"You are not old yet."

Said, both of them laughed.

The duration of the speech was only a short five minutes, but the things I heard were enough for many people to relish.

The opening forum, at the end of Chen Mo’s keynote speech, has come to an end.

A few people with Yu Chengnan strolled around the exhibition area and ate a meal. After a simple exchange, they went back to the hotel where they stayed with Julie.

"Boss, because of the robot, now our company has become the target of the major media, there are media, I hope to give you an exclusive interview."

"Which?"

"People's Daily." Julie said.

"Does people fear that famous pigs are afraid of being strong?" Chen Mo smiled, and this came out a few times. Various things followed: "It is not necessary to participate in activities in the afternoon, there is time to inform them to come over now."

"Ok."

Jiao Yan hung up the phone and jumped up in excitement.

They have already received an interview with Chen Mo, the founder of the marching ant company. This is Chen Mo’s first interview, and he did not have much hope. He did not expect to be successful now.

The editor-in-chief asked her to do this interview, which made her excited and nervous.

After careful dressing, Jiao Yan called the photographer with her and rushed to the hotel where Chen Mo was. There is not much time for that character, she can't let others wait too long.

"Jiao Yan, you said this Chen Mo, what kind of person is it?" On the way, a photographer also asked.

"Who knows? We only learned about him through his speech, and I have never been in close contact," said Jiao Yan.

"The people on the movies, those who are particularly powerful, have quirks. For example, Jie Jie or bad temper, when we go, what should we pay attention to?" asked the photographer.

"You have seen more movies." Another photographer gave him a blank look.

Not long after, Jiao Yan took the photographer to the hotel where Chen Mo was. Just arrived at the door of Chen Mo’s room and saw Julie waiting.

"Hello, sorry, let you wait." Jiao Yan said quickly.

Julie smiled and knocked on Chen Mo's door and walked in with both of them.

At this time, Jiao Yan’s heart was a bit embarrassing. After all, this is the first time to interview this big man. In the past, she had interviewed experts in various fields and was not so nervous.

Just came in and saw Chen Mo in the room.

"Hello." Chen Mo saw the two coming in and smiled and reached out.

"You... hello."

After Jiao Yan saw Chen Mo, the whole person was stunned. It was only after such close contact that Chen Moby was younger and more confident in the video. This age should be three or four years younger than myself.

Feeling the temperature uploaded by Chen Moshou, Jiao Yan’s face is also rosy.

After a while, Jiao Yan reacted and realized that the flower idiot had committed another crime. He hurriedly released Chen Mo’s hand: "Sorry, I haven’t seen the handsome guy for too long, and I haven’t reacted."

"Well, I didn't expect that I was quite charming." Chen Mozhen nodded in something.

The group laughed and resolved the awkward atmosphere.

"Do not delay Mr. Chen too much time, we are now ready to start."

After Jiao Yan finished, the photographer has started to machine. Not long after, the two sat on the sofa and the interview officially began.

"Mr. Chen, what kind of person do you think you are in life? In a very words, how many points do you give yourself?" Jiao Yan smiled and opened the chat mode with Chen Mo. If he asked too serious things at once, The effect is not good.

"It is also an ordinary person. If you have to say it, it is a technical house. Regardless of the conditions, you must have a perfect score for yourself."

"If you can get me crazy, you really should get a perfect score." Jiao Yan said with a smile: "Is there anything interesting in life or makes you feel lucky?"

"Nature, meeting my girlfriend is a very interesting and very fortunate thing." Chen Mo remembered the scene of meeting with Xiao Yu, his face was not consciously smiling.

After a simple daily chat, the atmosphere eased, and Jiao Yan slowly entered the topic of the interview. The topic of the interview was mainly the establishment of the marching ant company and some views on the future of artificial intelligence.

This interview, but used to publish the weekly magazine, it is impossible to casually talk about daily trivial matters.

The interview was completed in an hour and a half, and the atmosphere was spent in a relaxed and pleasant chat. After the interview, Chen Mocai walked into the room to rest, and there was a business exchange meeting in the evening.

chapters.title: Chapter 135: : Invitation (Second, Request For Subscription)
chapters.body:
Chapter 135: : Invitation (Second, Request For Subscription)

In the evening, Chen Mo took Julie and left the hotel, ready to go to the business exchange.

This is the second public event he came here. There will be experts, scholars, industry leaders and other authorities. Chen Mo is not good at communication, so his heart refuses, but he still has to bite his head.

Just arrived at the door of the hotel, I saw him to meet his car.

Sitting in the co-pilot position is the staff responsible for picking him up, called Sun Xian, now Chen Mo's identity is already extraordinary, belonging to the domestic amnesty level, so Sun Xian is very respectful of Chen Mo performance. His words are not many, Chen Moile has to be free, turn his head to look out the window and enjoy the night view of the capital.

The hotel where he stayed, not far from the location of the exchange party, arrived at the destination in five minutes.

Under the leadership of Sun Xian, Chen Mo soon met Wu Hequan, chairman of the Internet Society.

Wu Hequan is already in his middle and old years, his hair is white, with a pair of gold-rimmed glasses, a smile on his face, and it looks very spiritual. As an academician of the Academy of Engineering, there is no rigid figure in his body, and more is the atmosphere of the real school.

At this time, Wu Hequan was greeting the guests. When he heard that Chen Mo came over, he immediately said goodbye to other people. He walked over to Chen Mo. "I always hoped to meet Chen Xiaoxi. I didn't expect to be chanted today. I hope. It’s really young and promising. In the new era of the future, it’s up to you young people.”

In addition to the last Haisha charity night, Chen Mo did not participate in other large-scale exchange meetings. He did not understand the various etiquettes, but he was still able to hear the other person’s tone. He naturally did not dare to be rude in this respect. Said: "I have long respected the academician of the Wu, and I am honored to be able to see it tonight. There are still many places in the future, and I need to study like an academician."

Chen Mo’s words are not humble, and the calm and calm temperament is quite popular among the superiors.

Wu Hequan’s eyes are full of appreciation. He is young and has achieved such great achievements. There is still no young man’s arrogance. This is the best young man he has seen in these years. He does not know how many times he is better than his students.

Looking at Chen Mo, Wu Hequan said: "I was as old as you are, and I still lie in the pile of books. I don't know how tall and thick. Chen Xiao brother is so young, it is really rare to get such a big business. It is better than me. After the waves push the waves, my former wave is going to die on the beach."

"Wish academician, don't say this, you are a road opener, you are not open, we students, it is estimated that even the beach can not find anywhere."

Wu Chenquan laughed at Chen Mo’s politeness, and the young man was a little slippery. Then I looked at Julie around Chen Mo: "What is she?"
