"Wu Academician, I am the person in charge of the marketing system of the army ant company, Julie, this time with the boss to attend the exchange meeting, you chat, I went to the bathroom." Julie Wu Wuquan shook hands and said goodbye.

After Julie left, Wu Hequan cordially seized Chen Mo’s hand and took him inside. Without him, everyone around him can recognize Chen Mo.

This young man is Chen Mo, who is currently in the limelight, the founder of the marching ant company, and the big boss behind him. In the past, Chen Mo was low-key, no one knew it. But now that Chen Mo is exposed, there are not many people who know him.

"Chen Xiao brother, let's talk about it by a location." Wu Hequan seems to be afraid that Chen Mo will run, and he will not relax.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded.

The corner went into the courtyard, and Wu Hequan looked around and said: "Chen Xiao brother, this time looking for you, there is such a small thing."

"You said." Chen Mo was a bit curious, the old expert, pulling himself out, is trying to say something.

"You see our older generation, they are already fast. The country needs fresh blood. Are you interested in joining the engineering institute?"

Chen Mo did not know how to answer this.

He said how an old expert, still mysterious, did not expect it because of this.

"Wu Academician, this... I am a big boss of the company, let me enter the engineering institute, isn't it right?" Chen Mo said: "In addition, I entered a hairy boy and occupied other people's places. Those old people worked hard. Is it not for me to be a sinner?

There are many restrictions on entering the engineering institute. He is a big boss of a company, and it is somewhat inappropriate.

"The dean has already informed, apply to the above, see if you can break the case, maybe you can make a special offer, not counted in the quota, not to limit the talents." Wu Hequan said.

"This one……"

"Don't come innocent, Chen Mo brothers."

While talking between the two, a thick voice interrupted the conversation between the two. Li Chengzhi wore a smart suit with a smile on his face and looked like two men. He looked very capable, like a successful entrepreneur.

"Li instructor." Academician Wu saw Li Chengzhi, his face slightly strange.

"Mr. Wu." Li Chengzhi, Wu Hequan, modestly salute: "Mr. Wu wants to pull Chen Mo brother into the engineering institute? Just when I come over this time, it is almost the same. Let me and Chen Mo brother talk about it."

"That can be natural." Wu Hequan laughed.

"Mr. Wu, I saw your little niece in it, she seems to be looking for you." Li Chengzhi said.

"Then you talk, I am advanced."

Wu Hequan bid farewell to the two, with a smile, hurriedly walked inside.

The remaining two, Li Chengzhi came to Chen Mo to stand next to him: "Chen Moxiao brother, intelligent assistant, I will say thank you first."

"You are welcome, we are fair trades." Chen Mo said.

"Last thing, think about it? Can you join the engineering institute? The genius of you is very caring for it. It is very likely that you will make an exception for you. Last time I have responded to it. It was only a little resistance at that time. The problem is not big now."

Li Chengzhi glanced at Chen Mo and turned to look outside. For the genius Chen Mo, it is impossible to turn a blind eye. If you can pull into the engineering institute, it will be absolutely beneficial.

"You don't have to rush to refuse. If it is an exception, we will definitely not force you to do anything, study anything. Just hang a name and don't announce it. You enjoy the allowance, if necessary, within the scope of ability, provide some technology. Support, or train one or two students.

You now, it is estimated that a lot of people are staring, hanging a name, and the trouble will be much less. Many things are also convenient to do research, and we will send someone to protect your family. ”

"If it is the condition you said, you can join." Chen Mo promised to come down.

As long as there is no limit, it does not matter if he joins. As a descendant of Huaxia, there is nothing wrong with providing assistance within a limited capacity. His interests are not damaged, but he can still get the benefits. There is nothing wrong with it.

The family has always been his most worried. Li Chengzhi’s words undoubtedly point to his weakest part, and because of the last sentence, Chen Mocai promised.

Li Chengzhi laughed refreshingly. The last time Chen Mo was just a newcomer's hair boy, he wanted to make an exception and it was difficult. Now different, after seeing the intelligent robot coming out, basically many people can shut up.

"That's it." Li Chengzhi said with a smile: "I have a message to inform you."

"Li instructor, so happy, became?" Wu Hequan came in.

"As long as the last pass above passes, it will become."

Wu Hequan also laughed: "Thank you in advance for the Chenmo brothers, come, I will introduce you to someone."

After that, Wu Hequan took Chen Mo to go to the house. Li Chengzhi looked at the house and turned and left the venue.

chapters.title: Chapter 136: : Communication (Third, Ask For Subscription)
chapters.body:
Chapter 136: : Communication (Third, Ask For Subscription)

Wu Bing wearing a black evening dress, no gorgeous decoration, simple and generous, outline the curve, with white skin, is a standard beauty.

Wu Bing sat in the corner, holding a glass of orange juice, and staring at the crowds, talking and laughing.

If it wasn't for her uncle to let her come, she would never attend these exchanges. She instinctively rejects these businessmen who are full of copper smell.

Seeing that Chen Mo and Wu Hequan came over, Wu Bing stood up.

"uncle."

Wu Bing is very respectful to Wu Hequan, but he never looked at Chen Mo from beginning to end.

When the mother was pregnant with her, the father had left. At the age of seven, the mother also left. Since she was a child, she was raised by her uncle, so she is a father to her uncle.

"I will tell you about this. This is my niece, called Wu Bing. It has not been long since I returned to China. I am a doctor of Oxford Medicine and Biology. I am going to join the Academy of Engineering and become the youngest female academician." Wu Hequan smiled at Chen Mo. .

Chen Mo looked at Wu Bing strangely. This academician introduced his niece to him. What do you mean?

"Hello, my name is Chen Mo."

Wu Bing's look was a bit cold, but out of courtesy, Chen Mo still reached out.

"Hello." Wu Bing reached out and Chen Mo shook his hand and quickly shrank back.

"Initiative and Mr. Chen chatted." Wu Hequan was attached to Wu Bing's ear and looked at Chen Mo: "You young people talk, know a lot, I am going to find an old friend."

If Chen Mo does not understand the meaning of Wu Hequan, then he will be alive. The old man actually caught himself and introduced him to his niece.

After Wu Hequan left, the scene was once embarrassing.

"You should know what my uncle means?" Wu Bing said, his tone was as cold as ever: "I don't like the rich second generation."

Chen Mo wants to laugh, can't laugh, but can't help but shake his head: "Are you back in China for a few days?" Chen Mo first heard someone say that he is rich second generation, but he wants to be rich second generation, but he is not so good. .

"If you want to chase me, you can dispel that thought, I am not interested in you."

"I think there may be some misunderstandings inside, sorry." Chen Mozhen touched his nose and picked up the juice and sat on the sofa.

This woman is estimated to be preconceived, thinking that he is chasing his rich second generation.

Although a little beautiful, but his fishing, his personality is much worse. The niece of the academician of the past, chatting and knowing, is also polite, and the woman seems to be a bit arrogant.

So young, the double doctoral degree of the top universities is indeed much better than the average person, and it is normal to be proud.

The two did not speak any more, this kind of exchange, no one bothered, it was better. It was just that things didn't work as he wished. Just after sitting down, a voice rang.

"Mr. Chen, it’s a coincidence."

The wine red evening dress, the dress will outline the water snake. The enchanting eyes of the fox, the red lips of the flames, the gemstone necklace of the enamel, shining under the light, setting off the white swan neck. Seeing this woman, Chen Mo’s mind subconsciously came up with two words, a stunner.

Chen Mo didn't have much feeling. He glanced at the woman who came over and smiled politely.

“Yan Ruyu, I am very happy to meet Mr. Chen.”

Yan Ruyu looked at Wu Bing and had a smile on his face. He sat down next to Chen Mo and his body was slightly stunned. Chen Mo angle, can clearly see the snowy northern hemisphere and the Mariana Trench.

"Mr. Chen is sitting here alone? It's very boring, otherwise we chat." Yan Ruyu smiled and looked at Chen Mo.

Wu Bing looked at Chen Mo coldly and snorted and got up and left.

"Uncle, I will go home first." Wu Bing went to Wu Hequan and said.

"Why don't you talk to Chen Modu for a while?" Wu Hequan had doubts in his eyes.

"Inappropriate, uncle, don't introduce me to any man in the future, I haven't reached that point, I will find it." Wu Bing said.

"Chen Mo is a very good young man, but I have a thick face, only to find such an opportunity for you. You are not too big, and no personal care in the future?" Wu Hequan's face is not happy.

"I will take care of myself, you can rest assured."

When Wu Hequan saw it, he knew that there was no drama. This little niece, he is treated as a daughter. But outsiders, the character is cold, so going on, personal problems are enough to make him worry.

"Uncle, I will go back first, my paper, but also a little more perfect." Wu Bing said.

"Well, you should go back first."

Wu Hequan sighed and looked at Chen Mo’s direction.

"Sorry, I went to the bathroom."

Chen Mo gave Yan Ruyu a polite smile and got up and left.

This woman should be a socialite, the so-called social flower. Intuition tells him that this kind of woman is less irritating. And in addition to Yan Ruyu, there are still a few women staring at him.

If they catch Chen Mo, they will definitely come over. After all, there are not many people who are so young and promising. If they hook up, what do they want?

"Chen Chen." When Chen Mogang came out, he met Yu Chengnan: "Come here and sit down."

Chen Mo did not refuse, there is an acquaintance, always sitting stronger than himself.

"This year's people are more than last year. Do you think that coming here is not very useful." When he sat down, Yu Chengnan spoke.

"Really." Chen Mo is undecided.

"To our point of view, a lot of things, pay attention to resources and connections. People, many things, especially efficient. You have worked hard for half a month, some people solve a sentence, this is the benefits of contacts .

In this era, it is difficult to grow up on its own. A product, you want various channels, although it is the Internet age, but the necessary network resources are still indispensable, cooperation is an eternal theme. Of course, your company is the biggest exception. ”

The development of marching ant companies cannot be defined by conventional thinking. This has broken the rules and they don't understand. Yu Chengnan also knows that Chen Mo can't loosen the smart assistant, so he didn't mention these things.

The two of them chatted without a word.

Two big talkers, others naturally dare not bother.

Yu Chengnan has some small humor and occasionally reveals insider information about some incidents, which has made Chen Mo a lot of insights.

In other corners, many people talk and laugh, and it seems to be very happy. After a long time, Yu Chengnan saw someone greet him, and Chen Mo sinned and got up and left.

Once again, Chen Mo was left alone. The elegant tunes were fluttering on the venue. The waiter held the red wine juice and shuttled between the VIPs in many suits and suits.

Most of them are people with heads and faces at home and abroad, and they are in groups of three and five, talking and laughing.

Some ladies and ladies dressed up in flowers and flowers, shuttled to the crowd, saw the CEOs who had the order, and walked gracefully.

Occasionally, several ladies gathered together and whispered, and occasionally cast a fiery gaze on Chen Mo. And those young rich second generation will set their sights on the young and beautiful women on the field.

The program of the exchange meeting has already begun, and the famous star performance was invited. Chen Mo did not have much interest and watched quietly.

Seeing the celebrity's celebrity, Chen Mo picked up a glass of juice and walked toward the remote corner.

No one here, he is also happy.

After the end of the business exchange meeting, Chen Mo called Julie quietly left and rushed back to the hotel where he stayed.

chapters.title: Chapter 137: : Summon Of Little Fishing (Fourth More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 137: : Summon Of Little Fishing (Fourth More)

"Mer brother, Xiaoyu calls."

After Chen Mogang took a shower, the tone of the ink girl rang.

"Small fish, miss me?" Chen Mo picked up his phone and smiled.

"Well, I want to ask, can you get home on the evening of the 25th?" At the end of the phone, there was a soft voice from Xiao Yu.

"On the afternoon of the 25th, I will book an afternoon flight ticket. It should be OK. What is so anxious?"

"You will know when you come back."

After talking with Xiaoyu for a long time, I hang up my mobile phone. After thinking about it, Chen Mocai said: "Ink girl, is there something urgent about Xiaoyu?"

"No."

Didn't he still go back so urgently? Can't figure it out, Chen Mo simply did not want to, a few days of things a little more, tired one day, meeting with Zhou Gong is king.

The thing of the marching ant robot is still fermenting.

After the first day of fermentation, more and more people are paying attention to robots.

The network is full of all kinds of concerns about robots, worried about the smart crisis, and worried about being taken away by robots.

All the harms of robots that can be imagined appear in various articles and comments. Because of the robots of the marching ants, a wave of discussion about artificial intelligence was triggered.

The robot of the marching ant company has also become a generation of net red robots. In the exhibition area, there is a constant flow of information about robots.

On the last day of the Internet Conference, when the exhibition area was open to the public, the booth of the Army Ant Company was naturally the most popular. The people who came to visit all experienced the fun of taking pictures with the robot.

All of this seems to have nothing to do with Chen Mo.

In the past two days, Chen Mo has acted more like an outsider. Most of the time, he played in various attractions in the capital.

In addition to attending the high-level annual meeting and summit forum, other entertainment, Chen Mo let Julie all push off, Chen Mo did not go to the speech at the summit forum. With the lessons of the first day, going to participate in so much entertainment, is to find boring.

The Internet conference came to an end and Chen Mo rushed back to Binhai. Xiao Yu let him go back that day, he is also curious, what is it, let Xiao Yu so mysterious.

Binhai City Airport.

Xiao Yu’s eyes only stared at the exit. For the past three days, she was only the one who heard Chen Mo’s voice but could not see Chen Mo’s.

Until I saw Chen Mo and Julie coming out of the exit, Xiao Yu’s face showed a surprise smile. They all said that they would win the wedding. In the past few days, she felt a little bit of this feeling.

When Chen Mo came out, Xiao Yu came to him and did not speak, but the smile on his face already explained everything.

"Boss, I am leaving first."

Julie smiled and looked at Xiao Yu, and she was envious of this lucky girl. At this time, she is an outsider, and it is the best decision to leave.

"What about Xinxin?" Chen Mo looked around.

“Xinxin went shopping.” Xiaoyu hugged Chen Mo’s arm: “Let’s go back soon.”

"What, let you call me back so urgently?"

"You will know when you get home."

Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu and swayed out toward the airport gate. On the road, Chen Mo is thinking, what is it, so that Xiao Yu is so mysterious?

Just opened the villa door, did not turn on the lights, was pulled by the small fish into the hall.

Seeing the scene in the hall, Chen Mo stayed for two seconds, saw the cake on the table, and smiled on his face: "Who is birthday today? I am not prepared for a gift."

"Little fisher sister, I won."

When Chen Mo’s words fell, Zhang Xinxin sat on the sofa and immediately laughed.

"Well, you won." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo helplessly.

"Whose birthday?" Chen Mo thought for a moment, the days were wrong, and Xiao Yu’s birthday was not the present.

"I said it earlier, my brother is a lunar birthday, so I often forget my birthday." Zhang Xinxin said proudly.

Chen Mo thought for a moment, it seems that the days are right, only to show a smile.

"Close your eyes and make a wish." Xiao Yu urged.

"it is good."

Chen Mo’s heart was warm and the fatigue of the plane disappeared. He did not expect that Xiao Yu and Xin Xin would give him such a surprise.

"Brother, candle, Xiao Yujie helped you blow. You can't open your eyes if you wish." Chen Mogang was ready to open his eyes and heard Zhang Xinxin's voice.

"Why can't you open it?" Chen Mo did not know why.

"Because you don't remember your birthday, Xiao Yujie bet lost to me. Whoever loses, take your cream and lick your face."

Snapped……

When Zhang Xinxin’s words fell, a voice sounded, followed by two crazy laughter.

Wiping off the cream on his face, Chen Mo looked at the two people with a bad look: "Fat?" Then there was a frolic in the villa.

In the evening, the little fisherman was in the arms of Chen Mo, and the whole person seemed to be weak.

"Thank you today." Chen Mo caressed Xiao Yuguang's back.

"My gift hasn't been delivered to you yet." Xiaoyu struggled to get up and put a peace sign in the bedside table: "This is the peace sign that I went to Lingyin Temple for my health at the time of the New Year. Carry it in your wallet, although it is not very expensive, I hope you like it."

"Of course I like it." Chen Mo's heart was warm, and Xiao Yu was tightly held.

Feeling Chen Mo's mind, Xiao Yu's face also showed a sweet smile, then buried himself in Chen Mo's ear and said: "Love me."

......

After breakfast the next day, Chen Mo went to the company with a small fisherman. Zhang Xinxin’s gimmick, in order not to let people know that she is the boss of the big boss, actually took the bus to the company, so Chen Mo is also very helpless.

Just went to the office, Zhao Min found it.

"Boss, Internet conference, you can make a show of the limelight. Now it is the youngest billionaire in China, the pioneer of artificial intelligence, the fantasy object of countless girls. How is this feeling?" After seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min ridiculed Said.

"I suspect that you are pitting me." Chen Mo looked at her silently.

In Chen Mo’s marketing, there must be Zhao Min as a promoter, and his exposure has increased greatly. In addition to this Internet conference, he is now a symbolic figure of the marching ant company, and his popularity has surpassed Zhao Min.

"I don't have to pit you." Zhao Min smiled: "You don't manage the company anyway, the company needs a mascot, it is necessary to make you a symbolic figure of the company. Just like Ali's old horse, Microsoft's Gates Apple’s Steve Jobs has a belief that the employee’s centripetal force will be big.”

"You won, actually used me as a mascot." Chen Mo spread his hand, so to speak, this character is definitely not his.

"Our robots are not listed at the moment, and the impact of robotic events will slowly fade after the Internet conference, so don't worry about causing trouble to the company." Zhao Min said: "I will report to you about the company."

"Free." Chen Mo said: "I know the company's situation."

"That saves me trouble." Zhao Min said: "Your custom parts and components have arrived, so I will send it to you."

"Okay, you let them come up now," Chen said.

Those materials that he used to make seismographs and retrofit 3D printers were not completely complete at the beginning, and this time they were finally able to assemble them with confidence.

"Right, after the robot was sent back, I was going to put it in the company's lobby as a receptionist to enhance the company's image."

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mocai entered the laboratory and was ready to start assembling the seismograph.

chapters.title: Chapter 138: :Paper
chapters.body:
Chapter 138: :Paper

Zhao Min let the fitter in the workshop produce twice the parts, which is convenient for the parts to be replaced. This careful, Chen Mo is a little happy, at least a set of parts as an alternative.

All the parts were shipped to Chen Mo's lab. After the staff left, Chen Mo asked ten robots to start moving parts and formally assembled.

"Ink girl."

"Merg brother, the ink girl came, what do I need to help?" The voice of the ink girl sounded.

Now that the dialogue between Ms. and her is more and more diverse, she is learning at all times, and intelligence is becoming more and more complicated, which is expected by Chen Mo.

“Write a paper on early warning of earthquakes. The title of the paper is “Research on Earthquake Early Warning.” Write the principles of some seismographs, core principles and seismograph manufacturing techniques, don’t write them.” Chen Mo said.

The three armed forces did not move, the grain and grass first, the paper was first published, and then the equipment was officially manufactured. Any device needs a theory to support it.

Earthquakes are caused by faults and dislocations in underground rock formations. Earthquakes are present on Earth, and the level of normal vibration is too low to be noticed. Earthquakes below level 2 have nearly eight thousand times a day. These earthquake levels are too low to have any impact at all.

Before the earthquake, the underground rock will have a “magnetizing effect” under the ground stress, which will cause local changes in the geomagnetic field. When the underground rock breaks, the ground stress causes the rock to be compressed or stretched, causing the ground resistance to change, resulting in local changes in the Earth's electromagnetic field.

Moreover, before the earthquake occurred, due to the accumulation of geothermal heat, or the underground rock was subjected to strong gravitational force, intense friction occurred and a large amount of heat was generated. This heat overflowed from the surface of the ground and appeared to be geothermal.

Some earthquake clouds are generated because of the existence of geomagnetism and geothermal heat.

Earth's magnetic field anomalies, geothermal changes, and changes in seismic waves, combined with the three, make early warning of earthquakes possible.

Chen Mo, a seismograph, uses these principles to monitor the activity of the underground rock layer by using changes in geomagnetic field and geothermal heat, and calculating the time of rock fracture and displacement in the underground fault zone to achieve the purpose of early warning.

"Merg brother, the paper has been written, do you want to publish it now?" said the ink girl.

"let me see."

Chen Mo went to the computer and a paper manuscript appeared on the computer desktop. Read it carefully and make sure that you have no problem.

"Send it to Nature magazine." Chen Mo said.

"Is the international or domestic?" asked the ink girl.

"International, it is only published in the domestic two months, and the international is faster." Chen Mo said.

"Mer brother, has been sent successfully." said the ink girl.

Campbell is preparing the content of this week's weekly magazine, the magazine's mailbox, every week, will receive a lot of papers from all over the world.

They are a comprehensive science weekly with a reputation in academia. The magazine mainly reports on major discoveries and important breakthroughs in the scientific world, and the content is very strict.

As editor-in-chief, he has to determine the weekly papers, and this task is very important.

Not long after, an editor walked in and hurriedly placed a paper on Campbell's desk.

"Editor-in-chief, this is a paper from China."

"Huaxia?"

Campbell frowned, in his subconscious, what good papers can Huaxia have?

"What is it written?" Campbell didn't look at it.

"Research on Earthquake Early Warning"

"Earthquake warning?" Campbell came to the interest, grabbed the paper and looked at it. After carefully reading the paper, he left the paper to the side: "The ridiculous Chinese people think that casual fantasy is scientific discovery. Like the previous papers, There are some useless things in it, there is no factual basis, and there is not much use at all."

"That is the rejection?" asked the editor who sent the manuscript.

"Retired," Campbell said.

"Ok."

Seeing the rejection notice, Chen Mo brows, and this day is passed, it is rejected, this efficiency is really fast.

“Delivery papers are sent to natural journals and scientific journals in China,” Chen Mo said.

"What should I do if I send it successfully and then I am rejected?" asked the ink girl.

"Retreat and retreat, what can I do?" Chen Mo was asked by the ink woman to laugh: "I will send my own papers, scientific magazines, just a channel of academia."

Two days later, Chen Mo looked at the two notices of rejection and looked speechless. I was told by the ink girl and was rejected. Is it so difficult to publish scientific papers through authoritative magazines?

However, if you think about it carefully, he is not an authoritative expert or a famous scholar in this field. Similar to this theoretical paper, it should be difficult to pass.

"Publish the paper to the company's official website." Chen Mo said.

Publishing through authoritative channels is only an authoritative point of view, allowing more people to accept and accept. Since the editors of these channels do not recognize it, he does not need to die.

"It has been published." said the ink girl.

Cheng Mingxin sat in front of the computer and looked at the backstage of the official website from time to time. He is the person responsible for running the company's official website. Every day, he is responsible for the release of the official website.

When I checked the official website again, Cheng Mingxin looked at it. An article on the official website?

This kind of situation occasionally occurs, because in the company, the big boss makes any announcements, and does not have to go through the hands of the following people.

Carbon crystal materials, Chinese programming languages, etc., these things are all sent by the big boss himself.

Research on earthquake warning? Cheng Mingxin saw the signature, and the dark road really did.

After printing the paper, Cheng Mingxin did not dare to neglect and took the paper to the president's office. There have been flaws in the above. Any article published by the big boss is the first time to report to the president and pick his superior.

"Zhao Jie, he published a paper on the official website." Xiao Yu took the paper that Cheng Mingxin gave her and placed it on Zhao Min's desk.

"This enchanting, enchanting." Zhao Min looked at the paper and sighed.

When she just came back from a business trip, Chen Mo began to make trouble: "Small fish, is this family in your family coming back? Is he usually at home, is he still hiding in the room to study?"

"Occasionally, he usually learns things, and he will learn a lot when he learns. But this paper, I read, a little bit of trouble, maybe he is joking." Xiao Yu said.

"He dares to announce something, it is not a joke." Zhao Sen sighs.

From the carbon crystal materials, Chinese programming languages, and artificial intelligence papers, Zhao Min has never seen Chen Mo joking academically.

The robots are already in his lab to help him experiment. The lab above, although the equipment is not the most complete, but the research is the most cutting-edge.

Chen Mo is like a hen that will lay eggs. These papers, research, are like eggs, one day.

If Chen Mo knew that he was likened to a hen by Zhao Min, he must have gone.

"You take the paper and ask the situation." Zhao Min said.

"Okay." Xiaoyu nodded and took the paper to leave Zhao Min's office.

chapters.title: Chapter 139: : Genius Is Always Not Understood
chapters.body:
Chapter 139: : Genius Is Always Not Understood

Li Tiejun sat at his desk, idly bored, and opened the official website of the army ant company.

Because I tracked the news of the marching ant company, I got the first-hand information every time. Now that he has been promoted, he finally has to run outside.

He found a rule, and the heavy news of the marching ant company was mostly released through the official website. The official website of the marching ants has become a place of concern for many journalists.

Moreover, the curtain of the Internet conference has not fallen for a long time, and the popularity of the robot is still there. There are still many people concerned here. Robots represent the future, and the artificial intelligence of the marching ant company is already at the forefront.

No one can say, when the army ant company throws a blockbuster.

Suddenly, seeing the updated announcement, Li Tiejun stunned.

"Research on earthquake warning? Is this a paper? Signed Chen Mo?"

In just a few lines, Li Tiejun instantly found the keyword. Earthquake warning? These four words are the weight of the heavy, the weight of life.

Chen Mo published a paper on earthquake warning? If it is true, this will be another big step for mankind to fight against nature. The real merits are boundless.

Not yet finished, Li Tiejun quickly loaded the article and accompanied the title "The marching ant released a paper on earthquake early warning research"

Anyway, no matter whether the paper is true or not, it is not him who appreciates and criticizes him. He is only a media person. It is his task to report the news truthfully.

When Li Tiejun’s news came out, the amount of hits and readings rose rapidly. The marching ant company is worthy of being the darling of the media. In just one minute, the number of hits is broken and it is terrible.

Not only was Li Tiejun reprinted, but other media also quickly reprinted. It’s hard to catch the opportunity of marching ant news, no one will let go.

The paper was sent in less than five minutes and has been loaded by more than a dozen media.

The heat of the robot has just passed, and now an earthquake warning comes out. This shows that Chen Mo is currently engaged in related research.

The current marching ants are already at the forefront of the enterprise. This kind of enterprise, if there are any big events, will become big news.

If the earthquake warning is really based on Chen Mo's theory, Chen Mo will definitely become a great man who has been passed down through the ages. The evolution of human beings is the process of fighting with the sky.

Humans have been able to predict typhoons, and the biggest natural disaster now is the earthquake.

It’s just that Chen Mo’s paper has not come out for a long time, and some different sounds appear.

Earthquake warning is too horrible, this is a great event of merit.

Numerous physicists, seismologists are studying earthquake warnings, but so many years of efforts, just to advance the warning time ten minutes, and not very accurate.

Now Chen Mo has researched, where are their faces? And it's just a theoretical paper.

"The idea is unconstrained, but science is a very rigorous discipline. The theory is not supported by experimental data. It is empty talk. This paper, the whole theory, there is no data, how to prove it?

I admit that Chen Mo is a computer genius, but not a versatile genius. Young people, don’t expand if you don’t get a little bit of achievement. Don’t be the next party, you’re down to earth, it’s your future. ”

After the first expert voiced, more and more experts stood up and voiced. Everyone's argument is surprisingly consistent and not optimistic about this theoretical paper.

Chen Mo is an expert in the field of computers and a half expert in the field of materials. But in seismology, Chen Mo has never touched before, and they do not believe that Chen Mo can make any useful theory.

Many authoritative experts came out to oppose it, and many netizens came out to ridicule. There are not many people standing by Chen Mo, only less than 10% of the people, all kinds of supportive speeches are also drowned in ridicule.

"God said: It's awful. When I blast the ball, I have to be known by Chen Mo."

"In the earth, God does not cry, ghosts don't call, little Chen Mo, ridiculous. Please be down."

"Although I don't know how to be reliable, the people of Sichuan Province still hold a little hope and support Chen Mo. I hope he is a great person."

"The so-called earthquake is that the earth will be bed shock, car, earthquake, horse earthquake, wild earthquake, high-speed railway, aircraft earthquake, space shock energy, one-time return to humans. Why are there so many earthquakes in the island? Small movies have been shot! The logic is smooth, and suddenly it makes sense."

......

A variety of imaginative taunts and ridicules, as well as various ridiculous articles, appear on the Internet, even on the official Weibo of marching ants.

Things are also being pushed to the climax.

This is why Chen Mo began to look for the publication of authoritative magazines.

Authoritative channels are recognized by authoritative experts and can avoid the debates of ordinary people, and the response will be even greater. Non-authoritative channels, many people will think this is just a joke.

Chen Mo did not expect that because it was an academic paper, it caused such a big response.

The topic of earthquakes is too sensitive and involves too many things. They have experienced too many disasters and are naturally concerned about these news.

On the second day of the paper's publication, the door of the marching ant company was once again held by various reporters, hoping to interview Chen Mo and ask his answer.

“Do you want to respond?” Zhao Min stood next to Chen Mo and looked at the reporter outside the company. She is also a bit headache now.

This boss, the ability to make news, is not that big. As soon as it appears, it is like a magnet that attracts the attention of all parties.

The influence of a paper is beyond her imagination.

“A little bigger?” Chen Mo looked at the reporter outside the company and said with a smile: “The next bet, bet he is worth 100 million, bet I can get the seismograph out.”

"You are not from the earth? I want to make things big, not to think about the explosion of the earth."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo silently. If he followed Chen Mo, the impact of the company was not small.

“How is it small?” Chen Mo said: “Is the paper removed? When Einstein’s theory of relativity came out, it was not recognized, and time was the best answer.”

"I am not letting you withdraw the paper."

Now Chen Mo just did not confirm the theoretical conjecture. If it was withdrawn, it would appear to be a guilty conscience of the army ants. Then there must be more ridicule.

Cyber violence began in the development of marching ant companies and continues to the present. Some people are eager to go to the army ant company to make a problem, then come over and tear off a piece of meat to eat.

For those giants, marching ants are heterogeneous. A group of hungry wolves, staring at them. A paper is so big, except for everyone's attention, there must be credit for the push.

"You just say a response, I let people announce it, as long as things are not too big," Zhao Min said.

"Lu Xun said that genius is always not understood." Chen Mozhen shook his head in something.

This is a theory taken from the technology library. He does not think that the technology library will include the wrong technology.

When this was said, Zhao Min was teased by him.

"Then I will respond with this." Zhao Min said.

She is now breaking the can, and he is not big, it is very big.

A piece of paper is not a bad thing, and you can't take the army ant company.

"Whatever." Chen Mo said.

"I let Xiaoyu pick you up, or I will deduct her salary." Zhao Min said.

"Hey, threaten the boss? Believe it or not, I will deduct your salary now." Chen Mo was also teased by Zhao Min's words.

Simple jokes, the atmosphere is also a lot easier.

After confirming Chen Mo’s determination, Zhao Mincai left her office. She feels that to manage the company is to give Chen Mo his ass.

Not long after Zhao Min left, the official wei on the marching ant updated a message: The boss said: Lu Xun said that genius is always not understood.

chapters.title: Chapter 140: : Seismographs Available
chapters.body:
Chapter 140: : Seismographs Available

When the response from the marching ant company came out, it immediately attracted many netizens. Around this sentence of Chen Mo, another wave of controversy on the Internet.

"Lu Xun said: Silence, silence! Not breaking out in silence, just dying in silence. I suddenly found a secret."

"Lu Xun said: I have not said this."

"Lu Xun is not the focus. The key point is Chen Mo’s confidence, saying that he is a genius?"

"Einstein said: In order to punish me for defying authority, fate has also turned me into an authority. I am a bit convinced that Chen Mo is the next authority."

Under the official microblog of the marching ant company, the debate about Chen Mo's thesis was divided into three factions, one was strong, one was opposed, and one was neutral.

The opposition has 70% of the total, and the absolute advantage. No matter which time, new things are inevitably questioned before they prove value.

The theory has no factual support and can never be convinced. Plus no authoritative expert is willing to stand up and support Chen Mo, so that the authority of Chen Mo's thesis becomes lower.

The paper event, the heat of the robot is suppressed, and the debate about Chen Mo's thesis is maintained at the highest level of heat. The earthquake predictions are too big, and there are all kinds of ridiculous language everywhere.

Villa, Xiaoyu sitting on the sofa looking at the phone, looks a bit sullen.

When she found out that she was different, Chen Mo put down the book in his hand and looked up at Xiao Yu’s mobile phone.

"Because this is not happy?" Chen Mo pointed to the news in Xiaoyu's mobile phone.

"I just don't understand why they are ridiculed. If they don't believe, they will laugh and pass so many cynicisms?" said Xiao Yu.

"The mouth grows on others, don't care."

"But I looked uncomfortable."

"One day, one day, I will let these news become all articles that praise me. If you are uncomfortable, don't look at it and open it later." Chen Mo smiled and took the mobile phone of Xiaoyu: "Don't hide in the house and play with your mobile phone. Clothes, accompany me to go out and distract."

Without paying attention to the rumors on the Internet, Chen Mo’s life has returned to calm.

Half a month, on the Internet about the Chenmo earthquake early warning papers, the marching ant company did not give any response, and the heat of speech slowly declined.

Chen Mo’s thesis is still on the official website of the marching ant company, and will be turned over from time to time.

The things that seismographs are made are steadily progressing in various debates.

Because it is a technology obtained from the technology library, there is no technical bottleneck, and ten robots keep working day and night, the production of seismographs is going very smoothly.

"Mergo, the first seismograph has been assembled."

The voice of the ink girl, the Chen Mo spirit in the office shocked, hurriedly stood up from the office and walked toward the laboratory.

this is a good news.

It’s been almost three months since I got the technology of the seismograph. Having a complete technology, it's just a simple manufacturing, it took him three months, and this efficiency has been particularly slow.

When Chen Mo walked into the laboratory, he saw a cylindrical instrument with a height of two meters surrounded by ten robots. The bullets had a smooth surface and three pillars on the ground. There was no extra decoration and it was unpretentious.

Chen Mo knows that this thing is to smash the things that the outside world questioned.

"Is the algorithm written?" Chen Mo touched the seismograph.

This seismograph predicts earthquakes based on changes in geomagnetic fields, geothermal changes, and changes in seismic waves. Use the detected ground thorn data to comprehensively calculate and achieve early warning.

This small cylindrical instrument combines state-of-the-art geomagnetic field detection technology, seismic wave technology, and geothermal detection technology, a typical high-tech combination.

"It has already been written." The ink girl said: "There is no problem with the normal operation of the instrument. There is only a formal test."

“Yeah.” Chen Mo nodded. “Which place to look at the test is the most appropriate?”

“The Pacific Rim seismic zone, 80% of the world's shallow earthquakes, 90% of the medium-source earthquakes, and almost all of the deep-seismic earthquakes occur here. The most suitable foreign country is the Mariana Trench near the island country, Alaska, Chile. , and Sumatra. The most suitable for the country is the Tibetan Plateau, which is the junction of the plates."

Chen Mosi asked for it, and it is easier to do it in China. It is very difficult to test abroad. In those countries, it is impossible for him to bring such a large unknown instrument into it.

"Notify Zhao Min to come up." Chen Mo said.

Not long after Chen Mo’s notice went, Zhao Min took Xiao Yu to the lab.

"What is this?" Zhao Minyi opened the lab.

"Seismograph."

Chen Mo left a blockbuster, not only Zhao Min, but even Xiao Yu was on the spot. Chen Mo’s paper on earthquake warning came out only half a month. At that time, it was so hot that it was only half a month before the instrument came out.

"It's the one that makes you ridicule the world?" Zhao Min carefully looked at the instrument and wanted to see what was strange.

"Actually, it was made according to the basic principles of the thesis." Chen Mo said: "This is a short-term earthquake warning. In theory, it can be five hours ahead of time, but it depends on the actual operation. This thing is not absolute."

After hearing Chen Mo said that five hours earlier, Zhao Min took a breath. If it is really successful, Zhao Min knows what it means.

After the shock, Zhao Min resumed calm. She knows that this sounds a bit of a fantasy.

It is also no wonder that so much cynicism and doubts from the outside world, this technology sounds too sci-fi.

“Now is it finished?” asked Zhao Min.

"Complete, I am looking for you to come up, I want to ask, is there any way to get a few to go abroad to test." Chen Mo asked.

"Can't you test it in China?" Zhao Min asked.

"The country will also test at the same time, but its accurate detection range is only 50 kilometers, and several tests are needed at the same time. I am going to send it to a place where the earthquake is active abroad."

"It’s a bit of a hassle to test in other countries." Zhao Min said: "The problem of leaving the customs is not mentioned first. In those countries, the instruments will be deducted on the grounds of national security. This is high-tech, which country will not Let go of such a good opportunity."

"In fact, there is still a way."

"Talk." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu.

“The seismic zone test to the ocean puts the instrument on the seabed where the seismic zone is frequent. However, this instrument, if you want to pick it up again, is a bit troublesome,” said Xiao Yu.

"It is indeed feasible. But the situation on the seabed is too complicated. I have to carry out some technical transformation on it. After all, the seabed is not on land." Chen Mo said.

"How is this thing installed on the sea floor?" Zhao Min pointed at the instrument.

"Technical things, I have a way. You are now preparing materials for ten seismographs, things, I will arrange it."

After Zhao Min and Xiao Yu left, Chen Mocai walked back to the office.

Next, how the seismograph was shipped out of the ocean and reached the designated location was still a problem. Now that he can think of the channel, there is only Li Chengzhi.

"Ink girl, dialing Li Chengzhi's phone." Chen Mo said.

"Okay, Mom."

chapters.title: Chapter 141: : To Be Honest, Don'T Believe It!
chapters.body:
Chapter 141: : To Be Honest, Don'T Believe It!

Li Chengzhi looked at the office building of the marching ant company. It is hard to imagine that, in such a short period of time, the marching ant company actually rose so fast.

Chen Mo has been unable to describe himself with genius. That young man is a real enchanting encounter in a hundred years.

The more information he knows, the more shocking he is. In his information, the marching ant system, intelligent assistants and carbon crystal materials are all Chen Mo’s labs.

This young man has a terrible brain.

For Chen Mo to contact him actively, it made him very surprised. Is it because of the previous papers, let him help solve?

But he quickly denied this idea.

Chen Mo’s paper, the experts of the Earthquake Administration have seen it. Although the word profession is used, it is all theoretical. Without experimental data, it is impossible to convince anyone.

Those people are not optimistic, but he has a little expectation in his heart.

In his impression, Chen Mo is definitely not the kind of untargeted person. Not boring, just put a paper out and ask yourself for trouble.

But Chen Mo took the initiative to find him because of what? With doubts, Li Chengzhi walked inside the army ant company.

"Mr. Li, the boss is waiting for you, please come with me."

Li Chengzhi just entered the door of the marching ant company, and a robot stopped in front of him and performed a ceremony. The robot he has seen is the enchantress robot of the marching ant company at the Internet exhibition.

When he saw the robot report, he was shocked. Unexpectedly, the marching ant company was so extravagant that the robot was welcoming the company's lobby.

This highly intelligent black technology is used to welcome guests, and it is estimated that only the army ants will do it.

"Ok."

Li Chengzhi just nodded, and the robot took him to the elevator. Under the leadership of the robot, he quickly arrived at Chen Mo's office.

"Welcome." After seeing Li Cheng, Chen Mochao Li Chengzhi made a greeting.

"Chen Mo brothers are looking for me this time, but I am coming from a big plane. Is there any important thing?" Li Chengzhi was sitting on the sofa opposite Chen Mo, and took the tea and drank it.

"Nothing important, don't bother you. Know the essays of the previous period?" Chen Mo also went straight to the topic.

"As long as it is an individual, watching the news, I know." Li Chengzhi said with a smile: "But you will not come to me because of such a small paradox?"

"Paradox? I never care about other people's evaluation of me, or I will be mad." Chen Mo said: "It is a thesis to find you this time."

"Oh? You said."

Li Chengzhi sat up straight and looked at Chen Mo.

"Do you believe that my paper is true?" Chen Moxiao asked.

"I am not an academic, there is no way to judge." Li Chengzhi said: "But for this matter, it is probably that others laugh at you too mad, you laugh and others can't wear it."

"I will show you something."

Chen Mo was undecided, stood up from the position and walked with Li Chengzhi to the laboratory. Li Chengzhi hesitated and followed up.

In addition to Xiao Yu and Zhao Min, Li Chengzhi was the first outsider to enter his office.

In the office, in addition to the experimental instruments, there are only three robots, and a cylindrical instrument is placed in the most conspicuous position in the laboratory.

Three robots shocked him once, but he was relieved.

Chen Mo's lab, only he alone, making several robots as assistants, dealing with trivial things, is reasonable.

It is estimated that Chen Mo hides things. Apart from robots, he does not know what Chen Mo is studying.

"The robot energy is produced?" Li Chengzhi laughed.

"20 million one, sell you or not?" Chen Mo laughed.

"I can't afford it." Li Chengzhi shook his head in a hurry: "But many people in the engineering school are interested in your robot. I will go back and ask if they want to buy it. If you can, buy it for you."

"For ordinary people, the price/performance ratio is too low, and no one wants mass production. I use it as an assistant, but today's theme is not a robot, it is this."

Chen Mo went to the seismograph and took a seismograph.

"It is a seismograph based on the principles of my paper," Chen Mo said.

Upon hearing this, Li Chengzhi took a breath of air and shocked to look at this ugly instrument. Chen Mo’s papers have been raging, that is to say, the earthquake warning.

The outside world taunted, and only half a month later, Chen Mo had already manufactured the equipment. But it looks nothing special.

“Do you believe it can predict earthquakes?”

"To tell the truth, don't believe it."

Li Chengzhi shook his head. This thing does not seem to be special. If the seismograph is so easy to make, then there is a ghost.

"I am looking for me this time, is this for this?"

"I need to test whether this instrument is useful. I don't want to say it in China. I need to install it in the earthquake zone in Mariana. The earthquake is active and it is easy to collect data for judgment. I want to help you and transport the instrument to me. The specified location is placed." Chen Mo asked.

Li Chengzhi hesitated and carefully examined Chen Mo’s instrument. No matter how he looks, he can't see why.

If you can really predict earthquakes, this instrument is definitely the most advanced technology in the world. But how to listen to it is a bit of a fantasy.

If you don't help Chen Mo, this means that the cooperation is interrupted, which is absolutely not in their interest. Moreover, Chen Mo is a half-engineer of the engineering school, no matter which aspect, can not refuse.

Putting the instrument out, for Chen Mo, may be very troublesome, but for them, it is just a little effort. In the event of success, the impact of this technology is absolutely the most shocking.

Huaxia is the country with the greatest earthquake losses. If the technology is true, Chen Mo will definitely become a great man.

"How many flights do you want to put?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Six." Chen Mo said: "One-time manufacturing, put it out, save trouble."

"How much does it cost to make one?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"The manufacturing cost is five million." Chen Mo casually craps a number.

He didn't count it carefully, and he didn't know how much. Ready-made technology, no research and development funding, but the seabed transformation version, certainly more than five million.

"I can't give you a definite answer right now. There is an ocean science exam at the Academy of Sciences. I will ask, the question should be small, and there is news to reply to you."

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

"This instrument is really amazing as you said?" Li Chengzhi still looked at Chen Mo indefinitely.

"I also made it according to theory. This is the first test. As for the failure of success, you ask it." Chen Mo pointed at the seismograph and said: "If you don't succeed, I should play. If you succeed, I can make a lot of money." It is."

Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo silently, spending tens of millions and playing hundreds of millions of people. It really is the world of local tyrants. He doesn't understand.

"This time, only this thing?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Yes."

"Then I will go back first, help you ask. You have to study, time is precious." Li Chengzhi took the phone, took a photo of the seismograph, and left.

After Li Chengzhi left, Chen Mo continued to transform the seismograph.

Installing the instrument on the seabed is not as simple as adding a waterproof layer. It is necessary to overcome two of the biggest difficulties, the water pressure and signal on the seabed.

These two problems must be solved, and the water pressure cannot be overcome, and there is no way to operate normally or even break. If the communication problem is not solved, even if it is installed, there is no signal to contact the outside world, and the warning message of the seismograph can not be sent out.

The structural transformation of the seismograph is another problem, but it is still good to have the presence of the ink girl, and the trouble is much less.

chapters.title: Chapter 142: : Wu Zhen'S Wish
chapters.body:
Chapter 142: : Wu Zhen'S Wish

Institute of Geography, Academy of Sciences.

Wu Zhen carefully studied the papers in his hand and was Chen Mofa's paper on earthquake early warning research.

He has been studying back and forth no less than five times, and has done some simple experiments to find evidence on this paper, and the results are not satisfactory.

Although the experiment was not ideal, but as time went on, he now looked at the paper, and it seems that there is a new understanding, the more you look at it.

He has been engaged in geogeographical research for more than 30 years.

At the moment when he lost his loved one in the earthquake, he vowed in his heart that he would be able to solve the problem of earthquake warning in his lifetime, or in the earthquake, he could use his ability to save more people.

Many earthquake rescue equipment, instruments for measuring the seismic resistance of house bridges, are from his hands. He also participated in the formulation of the earthquake resistance standard issued by the Seismological Bureau. He is an expert.

When Chen Mo’s paper came out, his success caught his attention, but he did not come out to brush the sense of existence.

As some vocal experts say, science is a rigorous discipline. They have no experiments to prove that Chen Mo’s theory is wrong, and it is highly undesirable to veto Chen Mo.

In this paper, he studied several times and always felt that he lacked the most critical point and gave him a feeling of itching.

It may be that Chen Mo missed something important, so that he could not find the best place of this paper. While Wu Zhen was looking at the paper, Li Chengzhi entered his office under the leadership of an assistant.

Li Chengzhi knocked on the door and interrupted Wu Zhen, who was looking at the paper: "Mr. Wu, hello."

"You are?" Wu Zhen was puzzled and looked at Li Chengzhi.

"My name is Li Chengzhi, this is my ID." Li Chengzhi took out his ID and handed it to Wu Zhen: "Come here, there is one thing I want to talk to."

Wu Zhen looked at the documents and looked at Li Chengzhi with amazement: "Sit! Comrade Li, what are you looking for?"

"I heard that Teacher Wu has been studying Chen Mo's paper recently, just as I have something about Chen Mo here, I will come over to you." Li Chengzhi said with a smile.

"Oh? What about him?" Wu Zhen asked.

"Look at this." Li Chengzhi handed the photo taken from Chen Mo's lab to Wu Zhen: "I just came back from Binhai City. This is the instrument that Chen Mo got out. He said it was made using the principle of the paper. Seismograph."

The last sentence immediately aroused Wu’s interest, took photos, and looked at it carefully.

"Do he really say that?"

“It’s true.” Li Chengzhi said: “This instrument, he is going to put it into the Mariana area for data collection. You are not going to conduct a marine geological survey? So I came to you.”

“Can you take me to see this instrument?” Wu Zhen asked.

......

Chen Mo is outside the army ant company building, together with him, there are Xiao Yu and Li Lingfeng and others, Zhao Min has been on a business trip.

When Li Chengzhi just returned to the next day, he called to tell him that a seismologist wanted to take a look at the seismograph. This matter can't be refused. After all, this instrument is what they will bring to the sea in the future.

After a while, Wang Hai went to pick up the car and entered the company. He saw Li Chengzhi and a plain-dressed, gray-haired teacher coming down from the car. Chen Mo and other talents greeted him.

"Chen Mo, this is Mr. Wu Zhen of the Academy of Sciences, engaged in seismological research for more than 30 years." Li Chengzhi introduced to Chen Mo.

"Mr. Wu." Chen Mo hurriedly saluted. As a student of the younger generation, these etiquettes are a must.

"Hey, hello, you're welcome, real people are more than the spirit of the photo." Wu Zhen held Chen Mo's hand and smiled. I haven't seen such a good younger generation for a long time.

"Mr. Wu, let's talk to the students first," Chen Mo said.

"No, take me directly to see the instrument, your time is more precious than mine, don't delay." Wu Zhen said.

"Ok."

Chen Mo saw that Mr. Wu Zhen was eager to see the mood of the seismograph.

After entering the marching ant company, the group went straight to Chen Mo’s laboratory. There are only four people who can enter the Chen Mo experimental area.

"Your paper, I studied it five times, did a few simple experiments, but always felt the shortcomings of something, can not grasp the most important places." While walking, Wu Zhen opened.

"Because I was afraid that technology would be transmitted, the core part was not written out. Otherwise, if the technology leaked abroad, the loss would be great." Chen Mo said.

"Also." Wu Zhen nodded.

Not long after, a group of four people entered the lab.

In the experimental room, as in the case of Li Chengzhi last time, except for the most conspicuous seismographs and several robots, other things were not exposed.

After seeing the seismograph, Wu Zhen walked cautiously, and the palm of his hand did not touch the seismograph, but carefully observed around the seismograph.

"Mr. Wu seems to care about the seismograph."

Chen Mo did not bother him. The seismograph looked from the outside and could not see one.

"The earthquake of forty years ago took away his loved ones. Over the years, Mr. Wu has been working on disaster relief equipment. These instruments are almost paranoid, and the name was changed to Wu Zhen, the earthquake. After the change." Li Chengzhi attached to Chen Mo's ear whispered.

After hearing these words, Chen Mo was awe-inspiring. Focusing on a field for decades, it is the almost paranoid pursuit of the older generation of scientists that has their own stable life.

“Has this instrument been tried?” After carefully scrutinizing a seismograph, Wu Zhen stopped.

“Vibration wave test, but simple simulation test, the instrument can run. Now prepare for field test, establish several test stations in Tibetan area, and send several to Xitai, test together on land and sea environment, save Time." Chen Mo said.

"How much does this cost?" Wu Zhen asked.

"There is not much, money is not a problem. If the experiment is completed soon, if it is really feasible, it will be put into use soon. For many people, it is some gospel." Chen Mo said.

"Yeah." Wu Zhen looked at Chen Mo with appreciation and then turned his eyes to the seismograph.

"Mr. Wu, if you have anything, just say it." Chen Mo said.

"It is still uncertain whether this instrument has any effect. If it has a role, the data collected can be provided to me." Wu Zhen hesitated.

"Of course, such a big thing, I alone can't do it. I am also ready to cooperate with Binhai University. If you join, I can't ask for it." Chen Mo laughed.

He is currently lacking maintenance personnel in this area. Wu Zhen has been a senior academician for decades. Students are certainly no longer a minority, and there are many resources on their bodies, which can reduce a lot of trouble.

It's just the data collected, this is very simple, not the manufacturing technology of the seismograph.

Get Chen Mo's answer, Wu Zhen showed a smile.

He does not have much hope for this instrument, but even if it is one in ten thousand hope, he will also seize it. If it is true, this seismograph will fulfill his lifelong wishes.

Things went very smoothly, Wu Zhen also agreed to try to fight for Chen Mo to conduct this experiment. After getting a positive answer, Chen Mo’s next thing is to transform the seismograph that is put into the seabed.

chapters.title: Chapter 143: :Installation
chapters.body:
Chapter 143: :Installation

Short-waves are easily attenuated in water. To send signals on the seabed, ultra-long-wave or very long-wave communication must be used. This is the direction of signal transformation of submarine seismographs.

For the submarine water pressure problem, the seismograph must be structurally modified to adapt to the strong water pressure on the seabed. Otherwise, the instrument can work normally under such terrible water pressure, which is a big problem.

The ink woman helped to carry out the structural optimization of the seismograph. Chen Mo also entered the technology library and took a set of technology for extremely long wave communication. Extremely long wave communication technology is one-way, can only transmit, can not receive signals, and is generally used in submarine communication.

But with the current conditions, it is very remarkable to be able to send signals at hundreds of meters or even kilometers above the sea floor. There is also a need to install a buoy-type antenna outside the seismograph.

The help of the artificial intelligence and technology library, coupled with the full support of the marching ant company, made the reconstruction of the seismograph very smooth.

Now that the seismograph has come out, Chen Mo has devoted all his energy to the manufacture of the seismograph. In order to be able to make all the required seismographs before the scientific research of the Academy of Sciences.

The expedition team on the land is working with Binhai University to join professors and students into Tibetan areas. Everything is going on in full swing.

The turmoil of the paper has passed, and there is no big news for a long time. Now no one cares about the army ant company. The eyes of the media have turned to other places. The actions of the up-and-coming army ants are kept secret, so outsiders simply don’t know what the big action of the marching ant company is.

At the Marina Pier, Chen Mo was sighed with the last huge box on board. For two months, he is always preparing for the arrival of this day, and now it is finally here.

"There is a tutorial video of the installation of the seismograph. It is very simple. You hand it over to Mr. Wu Zhen." Chen Mo took out a u disk and handed it to Li Chengzhi.

Li Chengzhi took over the u disk and took a deep look at Chen Mo. This time, Chen Mo’s application for this project was surprisingly smooth. Perhaps it was the above that I wanted to see if Chen Mo could make a miracle.

He is not worried that these instruments will be taken away by other countries. He asked Chen Mo about this question, and Chen Mo also told him that he was prepared.

Once it starts up and wants to pick it up again, it must be ordered to abort the run, otherwise it will start the self-destruct function.

When such a large device is put in there, when the signal is sent, once it is found by other countries, it will definitely find a way to get it.

There are quite a few embarrassing technologies in it.

In order to prevent the technology from leaking and catching it without stopping the operation, the seismograph will be open at the bottom of the sea and will be destroyed by strong water pressure.

The seismograph has been transformed into a semi-intelligent machine by Chen Mo. If he is given more time, he does not mind transforming the seismograph into a robot that will exercise by himself. When it is time to fish, it is difficult.

After bidding farewell to Chen Mo, Li Chengzhi boarded the ship and left the equipment to the vessel of the expedition team.

"Is the instrument really okay?" On the way back, Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo.

"Do not worry, even if they directly throw the instrument into the sea, it will start up after sinking into the seabed, just the location problem. Mr. Wu is an expert in earthquakes, knowing which location is the most suitable for installation, so better, no There will be too many problems." Chen Mo said confidently.

"That's good, now things are coming to an end." Xiao Yu said: "You have been busy for two months, rest for two days."

"The seismographs sent to the Tibetan areas should have arrived. The installations should be done. Now the work has come to an end and is ready to move on to the next stage. Stay with you for the next two days, relax and want to go anywhere." ”

"I want to go to the movies." Xiao Yu said with a smile: "You haven't been with me for a long time."

"You will make this happen." Chen Mo was teased by Xiao Yu, only in front of him, Xiao Yu will reveal the side of the little woman.

"I have come to this point." Xiao Yu said with arrogance.

Tibetan area.

Zhang Songlin touched the two-meter-high cylindrical instrument and looked amazed.

He is a professor at the School of Geographical Sciences at the University of Binhai and has research on geology. This marching ant company cooperated with Binhai University, just as he had a geological survey to come to the Tibetan area, he was sent over.

This time his research project was also sponsored by the marching ant company.

Their mission was to install ten seismographs at ten locations. The formalities of the formalities, the marching ant company has negotiated with the Tibetan government, and there is no problem.

He is a professor of geology, the geology of this place, he is very clear, above the fault.

The sudden movement of the crust block along the fault is the main cause of the earthquake, especially near the junction of the plate, the crust is active, and this zone is one of the most densely populated areas in China.

Scientists have been studying these faults. As long as the research on the fault mechanism is deep, the earthquake can be accurately predicted. Now the marching ant company is doing this.

At the beginning, when Chen Mogang published the paper, he did not believe it. He did not expect to help the army ant company now.

"Professor Zhang, the hole has been laid." When Zhang Songlin lamented the achievements of the marching ant company, a worker with a helmet came over and interrupted his thoughts.

Zhang Songlin reacted and took the seismograph on the clap: "The instrument was transported above the drill hole and ready for installation."

This is a confidential project. He dare not say that this is a seismograph of the marching ant company. Only those who know it know it.

When Zhang Songlin’s words fell, several workers carried the seismograph and walked over the empty hole.

“Rotate one step clockwise to align the three holes below.” Several workers just lifted the instrument onto the hole, and a staff member responsible for the position opened.

After two minutes, the holes are aligned.

After the circuit is connected, Zhang Songlin opens the slot of the instrument and presses the start button according to the tutorial he has seen.

Hey!

The sound of the mechanical operation sounded, and the three closed holes under the seismograph suddenly opened, and the three probes slowly extended out into the underground borehole.

Just after the probe stops, Zhang Songlin opens the top of the instrument, and the geomagnetic field detector consisting of coils rises and is exposed to the air. The appearance of the seismograph is not flattering, but Zhang Songlin follows the steps to debug.

After the commissioning, Zhang Songlin took out the computer and began to receive information on the seismograph.

In another location, Luo Changhua is also doing the same installation work. They have to install ten machines and install them in two ways, which is more efficient.

Seismic installation work in Tibetan areas is progressing steadily.

maritime,

After the six large boxes were sent to the scientific research ship, a group of experts immediately surrounded the box, headed by Wu Zhen.

Many people are curious on their faces. What is the thing that makes them express this time?

Their scientific research, marine life, marine chemistry, marine physics, marine geology and other projects, the first destination is the Mariana Trench.

At that time, the submersible needs to collect samples from the water, and the equipment of the marching ant company will also be placed in a suitable position on the seabed. Chen Mo said the approximate location, specifically Wu Zhen, the geological expert judged.

"Open all the boxes," said Wu Zhen, the leader.

As soon as his words fell, several staff members immediately walked over and opened the lock of the box. A specially revised submarine seismograph is presented to everyone.

chapters.title: Chapter 144: : Seismograph Is Taken Away
chapters.body:
Chapter 144: : Seismograph Is Taken Away

The fat shape, smooth surface, looks like a bloated big cylinder. At the top are several large coils, similar to the coils of magnetic field detection instruments in the laboratory, wrapped in special glass, like the big ears that grow on the seismograph.

There are three robotic arms on the body that make the seismograph look more like a three-legged big-ear crab. On the smooth surface, the logo and name of the marching ant company are clearly printed.

They have been as scientists for so long, and all kinds of odd-shaped instruments have been seen. This style, in the eyes of everyone, is rather ordinary.

"This instrument is the instrument of the marching ant company?" An expert turned around the instrument, except for a few large coils, no special places were found.

It’s a big deal, just for the six instruments, but they don’t know what these instruments are for.

"What is the use?"

A group of people looked at Wu Zhen.

"The seismograph of the marching ant company." Wu Zhen said.

As soon as this was said, the field was in a strange silence. Everyone looks at each other and doesn't know how to answer them. They all thought that this was just an ordinary geological exploration instrument and the result was a seismograph.

"It was the paper on the earthquake warning published by Chen Mo, a marching ant company, some time ago," asked a geologist.

"Yes, this is the seismograph he made according to the principle of the paper." Wu Zhen said.

"I have seen his essay, the idea is very novel, but it is too arrogant. It is a theoretical thing, the application is not big, and the possibility of failure is great," said a geologist.

"I know that failure must be tested. Is it because I am afraid of failure, will I not experiment? This is not science."

Wu Zhen’s words made it impossible for everyone to refute.

"Earthquake early warning, we have been studying for decades, and we are only staying at the earthquake wave warning. We are not necessarily all right. We want to take a longer warning. Why can't we learn from other people's ideas? The stone of the mountain can attack jade."

Everyone was silent, Wu Zhen among them, the qualification is the oldest one, and Wu Zhen said that it is correct.

"Now don't say this, let's take a look at this instrument." Wu Zhen inserted the u disk into the computer.

The scientific research ship sailed without much attention.

The people can only have the stability of the country, but they cannot see the scientists and workers who are working hard behind them.

The location of the seismograph is very important. First, the faults with active plate movements must be used, and the seabed above 2000 meters is needed.

When designing, it can only withstand water pressure of more than 2000 meters. The water is too deep and the seismograph can't withstand the pressure of the sea.

The expedition team often takes a scientific examination in the Mariana area and understands the geology of the area. The location of the placement can be easily found.

Now that it has entered the autumn, the weather is relatively stable, there is not much wind and wave at sea level, and the seismograph is going very smoothly.

Few people know that their ridiculous marching ant company has already produced seismographs, and no one knows that the installation and installation of seismographs has come to an end.

The Eastern Pacific Ocean, which is the junction of the Earth's Pacific Plate and the Asia-European Plate, is one of the most densely populated areas.

Wu Zhen did not keep his eyes on the computer. Behind him, several experts also watched quietly.

It has been half a month since going out to sea. The scientific research project of this scientific research ship includes marine chemistry, marine physics, marine biology and marine geology.

At the same time as other scientific tests, the seismographs are also being launched simultaneously. In addition to the location problem, there are not many other problems, and the delivery method is very simple. The first five have been fully released, this is the last seismograph.

"The installation was successful."

After seeing the information displayed on the computer, Wu Zhen finally smiled. When I heard the news of Wu Zhen, others applauded.

Shi Tengchuan reflected on the radar display, and satellite images. The above goal is a Chinese scientific research ship.

This scientific research vessel seems to be putting instruments into the sea.

I didn't know the specific location on the last few times. This time I tracked it far. The task he received was to find out, this group of Chinese people, what they had thrown into the sea, and if possible, fished back a piece of equipment.

Seeing the red dot on the radar left, Shi Tengchuan was ordered to go to the location where the scientific research ship had just stopped.

The sea is calm and the sea breeze is not big, so the boat is not so shaken. Shi Tengchuan reflected to the side of the ship and looked at the sea with a telescope. Nothing was found.

"Invest in the sonar, look for what they just put here." Shi Tengchuan reflected the telescope.

With the sound of Shi Tengchuan, two sonar devices were dropped into the sea.

"Captain, find out the situation." A soldier ran out and said.

Shi Tengchuan immediately entered the cabin.

"There is a thing in this position, it is a metal object, it may be a submersible, or other unknown instrument." An officer pointed to the data collected by the sonar.

Shi Tengchuan thought about opening his mouth: "Get ready to salvage."

Marching ant company.

In the laboratory, Chen Mo's attention was all on the electron microscope.

The seismographs in the Tibetan area have all been installed, the monitoring stations have been set up, and the detected data has been transmitted back.

Several magnitude 3.0 earthquakes were detected, but these earthquakes were not felt by ordinary people, so they were not very useful, but the data proved that the instrument was usable. When the earthquake reaches level 5 and is destructive, the seismograph will take the initiative to warn.

Instrumentation in the Pacific region is also underway, and it is believed that all instruments will be ready to be released soon.

The next thing about seismometers is the problem of detecting data. He has no need to worry too much. Now he has invested in new research.

Normal temperature superconducting materials, this is what he will focus on next.

The Science and Technology Library has to study eight technologies. He is not completing the materials. Only by completing this material can you get the research of the next project.

During this time, all the equipment and equipment needed have been returned. What he has to do now is to synthesize the normal temperature superconducting material - silicon carbon. This material, the molecular structure is a honeycomb hexagon, and is similar in structure to graphene.

After a long time, Chen Mocai withdrew from the electron microscope and continued to formulate chemicals. This material is synthesized and requires special chemicals to be synthesized under high pressure.

Just taking an experiment, the concentration of chemicals was a little lower. The requirements of the experiment are very high. Although the synthetic material has silicon carbon, the purity is not high, and it requires multiple purifications to obtain a small amount of silicon carbon.

The higher the purity of this material, the better the superconductivity.

For the production of superconducting chips, the purity of silicon carbon is almost demanding, just like the silicon crystal used in chips today. Although 100% purity synthesis is almost impossible, he also needs to increase the purity of silicon carbon as much as possible for future use.

When Chen Mo carefully prepared the chemical, the voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

"Mergo, the people of the island country took a seismograph."

chapters.title: Chapter 145: : Big Trouble
chapters.body:
Chapter 145: : Big Trouble

"A few days ago, Huaxia personnel placed a detection device near my territorial water, which was discovered and salvaged by the guards."

One news from the island nation, accompanied by a photo of the device, immediately provoked a wave of madness.

"Huaxia was salvaged in the spy device in my territorial waters. 》——Asahi News

"China, the threat of the world! 》——CNN

"Huaxia puts spy devices on the island. 》——Times

......

When the news of the island country came out, it was immediately forwarded by the Western media. A variety of smeared news, on the dust, in the shortest possible time, spread all over the world. The dusty Chinese threat theory has once again become a hot spot in many Western media.

Smearing China, has always been the skill of the Western media, this time grabbed a handle, many media have reprinted the news, began a crazy attack.

Not only the media, well-known social media Facebook, foreign netizens, climax. The news came out in less than two hours, and there have been tens of thousands of comments.

"A cottage country, this country is dirty everywhere."

"Technology is stolen, and now they think they can rule the world."

"I'm sure that the device is definitely broken, because that's MAKeiN......"

"This country will destroy the whole world."

In the Western media, in just a few hours, all kinds of negative comments. The device that was picked up by the island nation has also become a target of attention.

Domestic regular press conference.

“The Island Guard announced that in the vicinity of the island’s territorial waters, a spy device was put up by Chinese researchers. Is this news accurate? What equipment is being salvaged? What is the response to the salvage behavior of the island country?”

Ren Ying smiled and looked at the reporter who asked the question. After asking his question, he nodded slightly.

"I have heard about this news here and got some information. First of all, I will reiterate some points. First, according to the information I understand, the device is placed in international waters. Second, it is just a general geological survey equipment. It is not a so-called spy device.
