Third, it is not owned by our researchers. We regret the fishing practices of the island countries, according to the International Convention on the Law of the Sea..."

Ren Ying responded that it was not painful to fight Tai Chi, so that those people felt like a punch on cotton.

Not long after, the network was exposed to photos of the device salvage. When the photo came out, everyone was dumbfounded, and then, it was awkward.

Marching ant company.

The logo of the marching ant's unique marching ant's head is particularly conspicuous in the photo, and the above text clearly spells the marching ant company.

Almost at the first time, everyone’s eyes were cast on marching ants. If you don't play, you will be low-key and have no news. When you appear, you will make international news.

"The shame is thrown abroad, the garbage marching ants."

"I only care about what this device is? Ask for great science."

"There is only one truth (Conan BgM). The net fishing spot is the junction of the East Pacific, Asia-Europe and Pacific plates. It is one of the most active earthquakes in the world. Did the earthquake feel familiar? Three months ago, Chen Mo, a marching ant company, published a paper on earthquake warning, comprehensive analysis, this device may be related to earthquake warning."

“The marching ant company doesn’t really think that it can make a seismometer that warns of earthquakes? But it’s just a small ant, really take it seriously?”

The various cynicism that disappeared some time ago, with the emergence of various news, is once again flooded with the Internet.

On the most troubled company, this year is definitely not a military ant company. All media, the first time sent people to the city of Binhai.

This company always makes unexpected things.

Early the next morning, outside the marching ant company, it was blocked by various reporters.

So far, they all know that the instrument is a sign of the marching ant company, but so far, the marching ant company has not responded.

If there is an abnormality, there will be a demon. If there is no problem, it is impossible not to stand up and clarify in the first place.

Marching ant company meeting room.

Zhao Min’s face is not good-looking, Chen Mo’s brow is also wrinkled, Zhang Yi, Lao Luo, Zhu Li, Li Lingfeng, Li Danni, Wang Sijia and other senior executives, the atmosphere does not dare to breathe.

This time, the island countries salvaged their installations in international waters, and they wanted to get ahead of the game, and they would take a trip and make things so big.

If they are allowed to protest, the initiative is on their side. The idea is very good, push the pot to them, occupy the moral high ground, and want to take the initiative.

Now the Western media are in the dark, and I want to know with my ass, I am definitely not happy. This matter can only be taken by the army ant company, and the world must be seen to see the value of the seismograph.

The **** island nation created a huge problem for them. When things get to this point, some things can't be squandered, and there is no need to hide them.

The practice of the island country has completely put the things of the marching ant company on the table.

"Have a press conference, I personally came to the stage to respond." Chen Mo said.

This matter must be personally taken to power.

He has contacted Wu Zhen and picked up the last equipment that was put in. It should be the island people who tracked them and fished them after they left. This thing can't be blamed. When they are put on, they have already made the worst plans.

"How do you want to respond?" asked Zhao Min.

This matter is not small, there are too many things involved, and it is a big problem for the marching ant company.

"How can I respond? Openly need to be equipped." Chen Mo Shen Sheng.

The official can only assist them, it is impossible to face the device, so they must speak. The signs on the device are theirs, the protagonist is them. Whether it is good or bad, they must take it down.

"It can only be like this." Zhao Min thought for a moment and nodded.

The device is the symbol of their marching ant company. This thing denies that it is not of much use, but it seems that they are weak. This situation must be strong and hard, especially if the opponent is an island country. Their installations are in international waters and there are no problems, and they are not afraid of shadows.

"Ling Feng, you immediately inform people to arrange a press conference." Zhao Min spoke.

"it is good."

Li Lingfeng did not dare to neglect and got up and left the conference room.

"You all go back and let the employees below not talk about it." Zhao Min looked at other people.

After the meeting, everyone left, Zhao Min only looked at Chen Mo: "The technology of the seismograph will not leak?"

"No, the core of the seismograph is nothing more than two. The algorithm of the core of the machine, the extremely long wave communication counts one. When they force the salvage of the instrument, the self-destruct function has burned the chip and the board. Very long wave communication technology, they It's even less likely to get it. Other technologies, their labs are there, but they are not combined."

Chen Mo is not worried that the algorithms of the seismographs are not exposed. Even if they imitate the seismographs, they only have their own shape. They have no gods and cannot be copied. It is also a kind of flesh without soul, which has no effect at all.

"That's good." What Zhao Min is most afraid of is the technology leak.

The news of the marching ant company's press conference in the afternoon came out. Many media outlets rushed to Binhai City and prepared to report firsthand here.

After a few months of silence, the news of the marching ant company was a bit big. They all want to see what the marching ant company is reacting to.

chapters.title: Chapter 146: : The First Earthquake Warning
chapters.body:
Chapter 146: : The First Earthquake Warning

Outside the marching ant company, this is a temporary venue.

Many reporters are looking forward to seeing them from time to time. Now things are very troublesome, and the unknown instruments of the marching ant company have already become international events. However, the marching ant company did not respond to this.

That instrument, the network upload is a seismograph, and the analysis is well-founded. But the marching ant company did not really confirm the news, and everyone just guessed. The reception of the marching ant company should give an answer.

The marching ant company has been pushed to the forefront because of the instrument. If you don't give the necessary answers, you will have troubles in the future.

In the anxious waiting of everyone, Chen Mo appeared very quickly. His appearance immediately became the focus.

All photographers, all put the lens on Chen Mo. This young man is the master of the marching ant company and one of the current people.

Chen Mo appeared in front of the microphone, everyone was quiet and his eyes burned.

After sweeping a circle, Chen Mocai said: "I came out today and made a formal response to the island country to salvage our company's instruments."

Chen Moyi opened his mouth and many people whispered. In a short sentence, Chen Mo has admitted that the instruments that the island country has taken away are confirmed to be marching ants.

"The instrument is the test equipment that our company puts in international waters. The salvage of the island government has caused losses to our company. We have contacted the embassy of the island to deal with this matter. There is specific news, we will announce it to the first time. everyone."

Chen Mo’s words are not painful, and all reporters face each other.

They are sure that things are definitely not that simple. Until now, the marching ant company has been ignorant of the device, and there must be something unknown in it.

"I heard that the equipment was dropped by the expedition team. Is this true? This incident has caused misunderstandings to the international community and damaged the image of the country. What is your response from the army ants?"

When the reporter came out with this question, the turmoil on the field. This reporter’s question is sinister.

The reporter who asked the question with black-rimmed glasses, dark skin, looks not outstanding, looks a bit Sven. Feeling the eyes of everyone, the reporter stared at it, but still remained calm, but did not dare to look directly at Chen Mo's eyes.

Chen Mo looked at him deeply.

"To repeat, the equipment was cast by our marching ant company. We are in the international waters. It is a normal test equipment. We are normal research activities, and the island country salvage our company's equipment. The fault is not with us."

"The equipment that your company puts on is a seismograph. Is this true? Is the marching ant company studying seismographs?" A female reporter took the microphone.

"You all want to know the answer?" Chen Mo glanced around the field and saw a lot of burning eyes, only smiled: "It is indeed a seismograph."

When the words came out, the field became noisy.

Seismographs, this has been a rumor on the Internet, but now Chen Mo personally admits, no evasive. This sentence is more official than the official, the official website sent a message, the wrong way and the intern blocked the knife, this is Chen Mo personally said, the meaning is completely different.

Chen Mo’s sentence almost affirmed the guess on the Internet.

Many of the many journalists have reported Chen Mo’s paper on earthquake warning. At that time, it was reported that the cynicism on the Internet directly drowned the major news platforms.

That is almost the biggest cyber violence in recent years.

Now Chen Mo once again bluntly said that the marching ant company is studying seismographs. If it is implemented according to the original paper, everyone owes an apology to the army ant company.

"So, the seismograph has been researched? You have already put in the test, what is the test result? Can it really predict the earthquake? The seismograph will fall into the hands of the island country, and the related technology will not leak."

"There is theoretically predictable, but the technology has yet to be verified. There is not much activity in the area we are testing. There is news that we will contact the local government as soon as possible. There is no possibility of technology leakage."

The press conference has just ended, and various reports on the Internet have appeared.

In particular, Chen Mo personally admitted that the study of seismographs was almost a blockbuster in the quiet big lake.

In some people's saliva, the marching ant company has already made the instrument. Not to mention whether it can be used, at least the Army Ant Company has already worked hard in this regard.

With seismographs, many people don't care about other things. More people are concerned about whether the seismograph can be used or not, and it will fall into the hands of the island nation, and some technologies will leak out.

The news quickly spread to foreign countries. It is a big thing to say that the instrument that can predict the earthquake is in any country. The media cannot ignore it.

When the news just came out, it attracted the unanimous ridicule of the foreign media, just like the original paper just came out. They all think that the marching ant company is using a scorpion to carry out surveillance activities.

Li Lingfeng is black-faced. He has already contacted the embassy of the island country. Now the other party has excused all kinds of excuses. Obviously, he does not want to return it, at least for the time being.

They are just a company, and there is no way to take the island country.

"They said that the instruments were found in their territorial waters. Now they are confirming who they belong to. There will be news to reply to us. Not only that, but I want to apply for a visa to go to the island to handle the case and refused to sign. They think that people in our company may be engaged in espionage. ""

When I heard Li Lingfeng’s words, Chen Mo and Zhao Min’s faces were not very good.

The island countries want to swear, don't return the equipment to them, maybe they want to make the equipment research thorough and return it to them. Now, in this way, they have also cut off the way they are coming back.

"If this is the case, then don't worry. One day, when the island country asks for help, I will let them know what is disgusting." Chen Mo talked.

"Do you know that technology will not leak?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"I don't know what I'm studying? There is no core algorithm, seismographs, it's a bunch of technology combined. Those technologies are in many countries, but they don't have this combination."

The most important thing is the algorithm in the chip, that is the soul of the instrument. The chips were burned when they forcibly salvage. ”

Zhao Min did not question Chen Mo’s statement. In this regard, plus ten of her, she could not compare with Chen Mo.

"If you want to do it, you must do it to the outside world."

They all know that it is unlikely that they will come back.

Even if I come back, I have to go through it for a long time. The barbarism of that country is not the first to hear.

If the instrument is a scientific research team, it will not be a few days before they come out. They are just an ordinary company. The scientific research team has helped them to invest in the instruments.

"This matter has been handed over to you. I don't have to spend too much energy here. The instrument is broken. I have to repair it again and waste too much time."

Zhao Min promised to leave with Li Lingfeng.

Outside of the debate on the seismometer, Chen Mo’s time was once again idle, and the matter of the seismograph was ignored.

He knows that even if he works hard, the hope of getting it back is still very small. It's a waste of too much time, not worth it on a broken device.

It was only a quiet day that didn't last long. After a week, Chen Mo received the first earthquake warning.

"Merggo, the seismograph sent back information, the western Pacific Ocean, 37.5 degrees north latitude, 146.2 degrees east longitude, this area, geomagnetic anomaly, two hours later, an earthquake of magnitude 6.0 on the Richter scale will occur, the depth of the source is unknown, and the source center is unknown. ”

The voice of the ink girl will be interrupted by Chen Mo who is in the experiment. This is the first earthquake warning since he launched the seismograph.

The seismograph test reaches 5.0, and after a destructive earthquake, it will send back a warning message. Now is the time to detect if the seismograph is useful.

chapters.title: Chapter 147: : Salvage Again?
chapters.body:
Chapter 147: : Salvage Again?

Not only was Chen Mo received, but the island’s radar also received this signal from the seabed. Just the signal is encrypted, and outsiders cannot decipher the information. But it can be determined that the location of the signal is not far from them, and the signal is continuous and the radar is easy to receive.

"Hey." Shi Tengchuan hangs up the phone and turns his gaze to the deputy: "I immediately turned around and found an unknown signal in the east."

The specific location of the signal has been notified above, and the last Chinese expedition team passed by. The unknown signal is likely to be from the instrument invested by the marching ant company.

The instrument that was picked up last time has been damaged, and he has no idea what the scientific researcher got from the instrument.

If this signal is sent by the seismograph, and then take another one, it will definitely be another. On the surface, they said that they could not see the technology of China, but they knew very well that many technologies in China have already surpassed them.

The marching ant company is a rising rookie, and no one dares to underestimate the company that has not been established for a long time.

It’s not just him who has the same idea. The US military, which is 'free sailing' in the Pacific Ocean, also received this signal.

The practice of marching ant company seismographs is well known.

At the beginning, the Huaxia expedition team was inspected in this sea area. Even if you don't believe that marching ants will succeed, try it. In the unlikely event that they succeed in copying the device, the meaning becomes different. After all, this is a high-tech product.

The marching ant company has already overstepped the road in artificial intelligence, surpassing many countries and companies. Such a high-tech company will certainly not use funds to make such jokes.

Even if the earthquake warning technology was not available, the submarine communication technology was also good. After all, it is possible to transmit signals on the seabed. This communication technology is not yet in control by other companies.

When Carter receives the signal, he goes to the source of the signal.

They all know that the Huaxia expedition team, in this area, not only invested in a device. Anyway, this is international waters, who is who it is.

Anyone who does this kind of thing will do it.

"Mergo, the American warships and the people of the island countries are rushing to the place where the seismographs send signals. They want to take the seismograph." Chen Mo’s office area, the ink girl suddenly spoke.

"Grass." Chen Mo could not help but swear.

This grandson is addicted to his seismograph. At the bottom of the sea, there are six in total. If a signal is found, it is taken away, and as such, his loss will be greater.

After the anger, Chen Mo calmed down. You must think of a way to deal with it, otherwise you will sit and wait, and you will only suffer from suffocation.

"Contact Zhao Min."

Zhao Min is the president of the marching ant company. It is necessary to give a notice to such a big event. Otherwise, Zhao Min will be caught off guard and cause unnecessary troubles.

"Big boss, what are you looking for?" Upon receiving the call, Zhao Min heard some tired voices.

"I just received a message from the Seismic Apparatus installed in the Western Pacific. In the next two hours, an earthquake will occur. I am going to post this message on the official website and tell you," Chen said.

"What?" Zhao Min's voice increased by eight decibels. It seems to be an incredible thing: "Now it's a test, it's still uncertain, you messed up, it's very troublesome."

"I know, it will be more subtle, and this news must be released."

"Must be sent?" Zhao Min asked.

"for sure."

"Can you tell me why?"

"You will understand later. This matter can't be explained at once, and the news must be sent." Chen Mo said.

With Zhao Min, the US military and the island people are going to fish his seismograph? This is impossible. The source of intelligence is a huge problem.

"Then you pay attention, don't mess, I will inform Ling Feng, let the public relations department prepare for public relations."

This incident is not a trivial matter. Regardless of success or failure, the impact on the marching ant company will be enormous.

Success, the marching ant company has become one of the most talked about companies in the world. Failure, the marching ant company will be laughed at by the whole world, which is the consequence.

"Do not worry."

After Chen Mo hangs up the phone, he looks at the computer screen: "Publish an alert message on the official website, remember, implicitly, all the words of the earthquake are removed, and the map is added by the way."

"Okay, Mom."

Wanting to let the Americans and the islanders dare not move, he can invade the navigation system so that they can't get to that position. But in doing so, the symptoms are not cured. If they want them to dare to use their equipment, they must let them see the power.

If he has to fish his equipment, he must be prepared to offend him.

In the case of earthquake warning, in the country, any unit or individual must notify the government before issuing an early warning message, and let the government decide whether to release relevant information. This is to prevent individuals from using these things to make a living and cause unnecessary confusion.

But he is now releasing the Western Pacific region, which is still a hundred thousand miles away, not domestic, so he does not have to worry about these things.

"In the next two hours, the Western Pacific Ocean, with a north latitude of 37.5 degrees, a longitude of 146.2 degrees, and a 6.0 level, the depth is unknown, and the center is unknown."

A short message appeared on the official website of the marching ant company, with a picture of Pacific coordinates.

Because this is the first warning, Chen Mo chooses to be subtle, at least in the absence of it, to avoid a lot of trouble.

"The marching ant company released the news, it seems to be an earthquake warning." Those reporters who are concerned about the official website of the army ants company, after seeing this news, climaxed.

This expression seems vague, omitting the keyword eye, but it is still very obvious. This kind of writing is about the description of the earthquake. After the announcement of the seismograph, the marching ant company first published news about the earthquake.

The key is time, two hours in advance.

Two hours, enough to do too many things, not to mention other, life-saving can definitely be.

A stone stirs up a thousand waves.

After the first media forwarded the message, almost all the media that were seen went to the official website of the marching ant company to forward the message.

The time when this news is released will become a sign.

If the earthquake really happened two hours later, then this time will mark the news that humans are far from forecasting the earthquake, and then a big step forward.

However, if you engage in an oolong, I am afraid that the army ant company will carry a lot of nicknames.

The news was also sent abroad at the first time and was reported by foreign media. In this era of developed information, less than an hour has been known to all countries.

The marching ant company sent a message to shake the world.

The news of dare to release the earthquake so boldly is only one of the marching ants. Everyone is looking forward to it, especially those countries that have suffered from earthquakes all year round.

“Hey.” Shi Tengchuan reflected the phone: “Go forward at full speed and head to the target location.”

The marching ant company announced that there will be an earthquake within two hours, and the location is the coordinates of the signal. He got the news that there was a US fleet in the waters of that area.

Although the island country and the US military are allies, they are not as irony as they might be. If there is a real earthquake, it means that the technology of the marching ant company is really useful. This seismograph will be a vital instrument, and it has been ordered that he must salvage it.

Not only is Shi Tengchuan, but the US military is also rushing to the target waters at full speed.

chapters.title: Chapter 148: : Owe Chen Mo An Apology (Third More)
chapters.body:
Chapter 148: : Owe Chen Mo An Apology (Third More)

Carter looked at the coordinates on the radar and his brows were close. It’s getting closer and closer to the marching ant company’s announcement, but still doesn’t feel any anomalies.

Is the seismograph a fake? Carter had to float up on this idea.

Being able to warn the earthquake two hours in advance, how to listen to it is a bit of mystery. If it is really so terrible, the marching ant company will be amazing.

When Carter was thinking about things, he suddenly felt a sway of the warship, making him an unstable, one on the wall next to him.

"What happened?" Carter supported the bulkhead of the warship and felt a strong sway, which was unstable.

"do not know."

Others, like Carter, suddenly swayed and made them feel overwhelmed.

Not long after, the warship recovered smoothly. After Carter stood firm, he was hit by a bag and looked at the helmsman with dissatisfaction.

"How is this going?"

"We don't know that there are no winds and waves on the sea, and suddenly it seems to have a huge thing swimming in the water." The other crew looked around with a sullen look.

The crew, including the crew on the deck, was also amazed. Fortunately, they just responded quickly, or they might fall into the sea.

It’s not a good thing to fall into the water here.

Suddenly thinking of a possibility, Carter’s eyes were indefinite: “Continue to sail and head to the target waters.”

His task is to pick up the equipment from the source of the signal and then bring it back to provide the scientist with research. As for other things, it is not for him.

The sea was calm and there was no abnormality, but it was not calm outside.

Not long after the earthquake came out, the US Geological Survey released a message: The Western Pacific Ocean, the northeastern seas, a magnitude 7.9 earthquake, with a focal depth of 20 kilometers, the earthquake center north latitude 37.2 degrees, east longitude 146.0 degrees.

A tsunami warning was also issued at the Pacific Alert Center in Hawaii.

Almost at the same time, the Island Meteorological Bureau also issued the same earthquake news and triggered a tsunami warning.

The waiting time is always long. Whether it is the network in China or the external network, the discussion on the seismograph has not been suspended for two hours.

However, as time went on, there was still no movement.

The first buzz appeared, and soon, the official Weibo of the marching ant company became a place where the sprays were assembled. A variety of ridicules, all sorts of ugly questions, all can be found on the official Weibo.

The news of the earthquake appeared when many media published an article ridiculing the marching ant company.

At this moment, the world is quiet.

Liu Qiang looked at the news on his mobile phone and his eyes were complicated.

In the western Pacific Ocean, the magnitude 7.9 earthquake has a focal depth of 20 km. The center of the earthquake is 37.2 degrees north latitude and 146.0 degrees east longitude, which is not far from the location predicted by the marching ant company. Although the magnitude of the earthquake varies widely, it is not important.

His hometown was destroyed by the earthquake, so he came to the coastal area to find a job.

The marching ant company is developing technology that changes the world, and he, with the money of others, writes articles and remarks that discredit the marching ant company.

At this moment, he felt a sense of shame, a sense of guilt, filled with his body and mind.

Over the years, his job has been hired by the Water Corps to smear a company, star and individual.

He is the network sprayer hated by netizens, the Wu Mao Party.

He used to ignore this before, as long as he had the money, let him conscience, it does not matter. Now, he suddenly feels that his work has been so shameful these years.

What appeared in his head was the scene of the rescue of the people when the earthquake occurred in his hometown. There have been too many stories.

Liu Qiang’s hand was shaking, his eyes staring at the computer screen.

The same as him, not only him alone. In every corner, many people look at the news on their mobile phones, and their eyes are similar to those of Liu Qiang.

This is the face, a fact that breaks all their faces.

The marching ant company is changing the world, and they are using the keyboard to spray the world, and a little bit of conscience, they feel that their behavior is ridiculous.

When the cigarettes were left with cigarette butts, Liu Qiang spit out a white smoke and extinguished the cigarette **** in his hand.

Delete the smeared article that has been written and create a new title.

"We owe Chen Mo an apology! 》

Not only him, but also the other corners of the computer, but also delete the smeared articles that are ready to be sent out, re-writing.

There is only one idea in everyone's mind, this great company should not be hacked.

In the online world of China, the most concerned is not the loss of the earthquake and the length of the casualties. The earthquake occurred in the northeastern waters of the western Pacific and has nothing to do with them. What they want most is an apology to the marching ant company and Chen Mo.

Experts banned the sound, the smudged media banned the sound, and the spray banned the sound.

Any articles and remarks that discredited Chen Mo and the marching ant company disappeared instantly.

Those who used to smear the ants of the army ants company all apologized to the official microblog of the army ant company.

The news of the earthquake came out less than ten minutes. The server of Weibo collapsed, not being attacked, but being crushed.

The official Weibo of the marching ant company rose more than five million in less than half an hour. Below the news of the marching ant update, the comments are all apologies and praises.

Unlike the domestic media, the Western media fell into a collective silence after the earthquake news was confirmed. They don't know how to report.

In the last second, I was still laughing at the marching ant company, and I was beaten in the next second. Their reports seemed so ridiculous.

Not only the media, but even netizens have collectively banned.

The news is too shocking. Huaxia's technology has been able to predict earthquakes, and it is so accurate and accurate.

Soon, some media and individuals who publicly mocked Chen Mo and the marching ant company, deleted their own articles, began to report on the earthquake, and circumvented the topic of marching ants.

Although many media want to circumvent it, it is impossible to circumvent a topic that is the seismograph of the marching ant company.

The news of the marching ant company means that early warning of earthquakes has become possible. This news is even more shocking than the magnitude 10 earthquake. Especially for the countries of the earthquake zone, this is a great news.

The evolutionary process of human beings is a struggle history against nature.

Scientific and technological means make it possible for mankind to fight against nature. Another major natural disaster is almost foreseeable to be mastered by humans.

The whole world is shocked.

Like the joys of the world, in the Western Pacific, a group of people are also very happy.

Carter is in the cabin command room, quietly looking at the display in the cabin. They have reached the waters where the signal has been sent, and the sonar has been released.

"Found, sir, this is it." A soldier pointed at an unknown object on the screen.

"Well? What is this?" Carter asked.

"It is the instrument that sends the signal, and the current role is unknown."

"Prepare the ropes and pick it up," Carter said, licking his lips.

His mood is a bit excited. This is an epoch-making technology. If you can bring technology back, it is definitely a great achievement. If you want to climb two more layers, he can get a better position.

"Sir, the fleet of the island country is driving towards this." A soldier ran over and said.

"Island?" Carter instantly understood that the island country also wanted to fish this seismograph: "Don't care about them, prepare to salvage the work, the group of slaves, not afraid to come."

chapters.title: Chapter 149: : Earthquake Bureau Came
chapters.body:
Chapter 149: : Earthquake Bureau Came

"Human understanding of nature goes further"

The news of the earthquake confirmed that it was not long before the official of the army ant company issued a document. This article immediately became the focus and the object of forwarding.

In the case of seismographs, the marching ant company is a well-deserved protagonist.

If the seismograph is thrown into a zone where earthquakes occur frequently, it will save countless lives.

The marching ant company has been surrounded by people from major media, hoping to interview Chen Mo. But let them down, this agitated person did not appear in front of everyone.

"Mer brother, the US military took away a seismograph."

The voice of the ink girl makes Chen Mo's face black. Unexpectedly, the other party was still unscrupulous to catch the seismograph. There are four seismographs left under the Pacific Ocean.

The seismograph has been tested successfully, and he now has the confidence. He originally thought that the seismograph warning was successful, and those people did not dare to be so unscrupulous. I did not expect him to underestimate the thoughts they wanted to get a seismograph.

If you are still tepid as it was last time, I am afraid that those people think they are bullying.

"After releasing the news, the country that took the marching ant company seismograph, within three days, will send the seismograph back and compensate the loss of the marching ant company, otherwise the consequences will be at your own risk."

Chen Mo issued a warning, not for individuals or companies, but for a country.

As soon as the announcement came out, it was added to the incident of the hot seismometer.

This is the first time I heard that a company dares to publicly warn a country. However, many people understand the marching ant company.

The confirmation of the technology of the seismograph allows the marching ant company to have this confidence.

The crime of army ants, which means that you want to cooperate in seismological equipment, it is even more difficult. Everyone only thought that the marching ant company was warning the island nation, but did not know that there is still a United States inside.

The news that the United States took the seismometer was not announced as the island nation, so outsiders did not know.

In the eyes of ordinary people, this is the marching ant company to settle accounts for the island nation after the fall.

Cheng Guo and Li Chengzhi, two people, quickly walked into the building of the marching ant company. He was the director of the Earthquake Administration. When he came out of the seismograph of the army ant company, he also knew that he was only concerned about it at the time, and did not put too much thought into it.

After all, this kind of thing, before it is confirmed, no one dares to express opinions, otherwise it is very troublesome.

It is different now.

The marching ant company successfully warned of the occurrence of the earthquake, the location is terrible, even time, and roughly the same.

This technology has far surpassed any previous technology.

The department of the Seismological Bureau is not up to the top, and their status is very embarrassing.

They are responsible for the development of various disaster relief equipment and instruments, as well as maintenance of seismic stations.

The vast territory of China, the earthquake station, there are many platforms, located in remote mountainous areas. Their employees risk their lives and go to various uninhabited places to inspect equipment.

In the past, there were geological members who were killed on the way, but these things were not known to outsiders. Many unsung heroes are fighting behind.

Every time there is a catastrophe, their earthquake bureau is the first to be embarrassed. All kinds of ugly words, even think that the earthquake bureau does not exist.

With pressure, they have to continue working. No one knows the efforts of the geological players and researchers behind their seismological bureau.

Chen Mo’s earthquake warning news, he also worried for two hours.

It can be said that those two hours are the two hours that he has lived the longest in his life. It was already disappointing. However, when the earthquake occurred, he was smirking at the news.

This is the first time he has been happy with an earthquake since his lifetime.

After several contacts, he found Li Chengzhi and hoped to come over with him and see Chen Mo. In order not to be so loud, he was alone, and he found Li Chengzhi together.

After entering the marching ant company, Cheng Guo’s mind calmed down. He also met the world, but for the first time, the robot came to be a greeter.

Cheng Guo had to sigh the technology of the marching ant company.

It has been a long time without such tension. The person he wants to see is a person who wants to change the world.

When the seismograph came out, it was not much to send Chen Mo a hundred Nobel Prizes. He must come over and let other people come into contact with Chen Mo, he is not at ease.

Not long after, Cheng Guo saw the people he wanted to see.

A young man who looks ordinary is not a three-headed or six-armed man, but he is more confident than ordinary young people. Next to him, Zhao Min, president of the marching ant company, and Xiao Yu, the legendary Chen Mo’s girlfriend.

"meet again."

Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi shook hands and then reached out and took hold of Cheng Guo.

"This is Comrade Cheng Guo, the director of the Earthquake Administration." Li Chengzhi introduced to Chen Mo.

There is no accident about Cheng’s identity. After the seismograph came out, the higher level people came over and he would not have any accidents.

"Director Cheng, it is a great honor to meet you." Chen Mo smiled.

“I am honored.” Cheng Guo said: “The two are Ms. Zhao Min and Ms. Xiao Yu?”

"Director, hello."

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min also shook hands with Cheng Guo.

"Talk inside." Chen Mo took a few people and walked into the reception room.

"Mr. Chen, should you know the purpose of my visit here this time?" Cheng Guogang sat down and slammed his hand and couldn't wait to speak.

"Is Secretary Cheng coming over for the seismometer?" Chen Mo said.

"Yeah." Cheng Guozhong nodded. "When you tested the seismograph, I was concerned. Teacher Wu Zhen told me. To be honest, I didn't have much hope at the beginning."

Cheng Guo did not hide it. At this time, it would be a bit fake to say that the flattery of the flattery.

"It’s just a marching ant company that always creates miracles." Cheng Guo said: "This time, I am cheeky and want to ask Mr. Chen for help."

Cheng Guo is a little embarrassed. After all, they have not made much effort before. It is really difficult to say this time.

“Dr. Cheng wants me to install a seismograph in China?” Chen Mo asked.

This matter, do not have to think about it, also know the meaning of Cheng Guo.

"Indeed it is."

Chen Mo said, Cheng Guo immediately laughed. This young man, who is smart, seems to be a good person.

"I am afraid this can't help." Chen Mo shook his head: "The cost of seismographs is very high. If there are too many words across the country, our company can't afford it."

"Because of this? This way, Mr. Chen added 20 seismographs and installed them in other test areas. If the instruments are really useful, these instruments are purchased by our Seismological Bureau, and we will give you the cost." Cheng Guo said.

"If you have twenty, you can do it. If you have the cost, make sure the instrument is useful. Then we will discuss it in detail." Chen Mo extended a finger: "One hundred million."

"Yes." Cheng Guo immediately agreed.

They are now seeking benefits for the people. As long as the instrument is really useful, a little more money, it will not hesitate to grant him.

After talking about some detailed things, Zhao Min took Cheng Guo to visit the army ant company. In the reception room, only Chen Mo and Li Chengzhi were left.

chapters.title: Chapter 150: : The Opponent Of Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 150: : The Opponent Of Death

Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo, he wanted to see if this young man really had three heads and six arms. Now Chen Mo is a national treasure. On the Internet, Chen Mo has even been given the nickname, the opponent of the **** of death.

The advent of seismographs is to save people from the hands of death.

Now Chen Mo’s reputation in China has reached its peak, beyond the scope of genius. Many people say that Chen Mo will be the greatest person in the 21st century. Chen Mo, who has gathered countless reputations, is still young and terrible. His future is full of possibilities.

Even Li Cheng’s capital has to sigh that this young man is too horrible.

"After you successfully warned the earthquake, Chile, Indonesian people have contacted, there may be high-level visits. Needless to say, you also know that one of their purposes should be for the seismograph." Li Chengzhi said: "I believe Soon, their ambassador will contact you."

Chen Mo nodded, and both countries were among the biggest victims of the earthquake. It is normal to attach importance to seismographs.

"This seismograph is not a trivial matter, and it has great diplomatic benefits." Li Chengzhi said: "Can you guarantee that the technology has not leaked out?"

"Crap." Chen Mo said: "These technologies will not leak out. You can rest assured."

"It’s okay to get rid of that?" Li Chengzhi asked.

"Nothing, the seismograph that has been taken away has become a pile of broken copper and iron, not much use." Chen Mo shook his head.

"In this case, I am relieved." Li Chengzhi said,

Seismographs, in addition to warnings, can also gain the goodwill of the world. In addition to economic interests, there is still a huge diplomatic interest.

If they are acquired by other countries, it is a huge loss for them.

The technology of seismographs is no small matter. The government and people of any country want to get this technology.

However, they did not participate in the whole process, and even when the seismograph of the marching ant company was taken away, there was not much action.

Because at that time, no one believed that Chen Mo would succeed, only thought it was a farce. As a result, Chen Mo has succeeded, and it is beyond everyone's expectations.

“This is a complete paper on earthquake early warning research.” Chen Mo took a paper from his backpack and handed it to Li Chengzhi: “The last published paper is not a full version. I will apply for a patent after the seismograph. This paper should It is helpful for the current earthquake research. You can transfer it to Mr. Wu Zhen."

Li Chengzhi looked at Chen Mo’s papers in a strange way, and he did not expect that Chen Mo would suddenly give him this.

For him, this may be precious. But for Chen Mo, this paper is nothing at all, as long as it is not the manufacturing technology of the seismograph.

In a short time, the technology of the seismograph is impossible to give to other people, this is a money-making instrument. In addition to bringing huge economic benefits to this instrument, it also has the reputation of the company.

After the seismograph message was confirmed, the network was now clean. The articles that smeared the marching ant company have disappeared without a trace.

"Then I will thank you for those who have suffered from the earthquake disaster." Li Chengzhi took the paper Chen Mo gave him and solemnly collected it.

Seismographs are based on the theory of Chen Mo's thesis. This paper is as important as any top technology.

Li Chengzhi and Cheng Guolai also rushed and went in a hurry.

But when they left, they all had smiles on their faces. They didn't come long, but they also got the answer they wanted.

The news of the marching ant company seismograph continues to ferment. The warning from the special marching ant company seems that the island nation has not taken this matter seriously. Many island country netizens, even in the commentary area of relevant news, sneered at the innocence of the marching ant company.

The United States did not publish any news that was taken away by the US military. Therefore, it is impossible for outsiders to know about the US seismometers.

Norfolk Naval Base.

Carter smiled and looked at the seismograph surrounded by many technical experts.

They grabbed the seismograph before the arrival of the island nation. The first earthquake warning was the information sent by the seismograph he had picked up.

This shows that this seismograph is available and can also predict earthquakes.

For the warnings of marching ants, they are not the same thing. If this is what the Chinese government said, there is still a bit of weight, but the marching ant company, they did not look at it.

Now they just want to get the technology about the seismograph quickly, and the rest are fake.

After a long time, the first skin of the seismograph was removed. After seeing the situation in the seismograph, many scientists immediately became dumbfounded.

destroyed?

The lines, boards and chips they can see have all been burned out, completely different from the intact appearance. After opening the outer casing, the scorching smell of scorching rushed out, causing a group of experts to rush back.

"What is going on here?" Everyone looked at Carter, and Carter's smile was also on his face.

"How do I know?"

Carter thought about it, but did not say it. Why did the seismograph become like this, and he didn't know what was going on.

"I don't know." Carter had no smile, his face was a bit ugly: "When we salvage, it still works."

Many technical experts face each other.

"Is that if you got it, who was broken?" A tall officer looked at Carter dissatisfied.

"No." Carter shook his head.

"What the **** is this going on?" The tall officer, the tone is very bad.

"Our people have never touched it, I don't know."

"I will monitor him immediately."

The tall officer was black-faced. This seismograph was taken from the site of the earthquake at the bottom of the sea and took a lot of risks. It has been determined that seismographs are available.

If they get these technologies, they will accept the praise of the whole world, and the prestige will be upgraded. The result will now be turned into a film.

Not only Carter, the leader of the island navy, Shi Tengchuan, also really bowed his head, listening to the scream of the chief’s face.

"Sir, when we arrived, the Americans were already fishing equipment, and we couldn’t intervene."

"Don't make excuses, you can't get it, I don't like to listen to the interface." Sitting in the chair in front of him, an old man with a black face.

The last time I recovered was a damaged seismograph. It was not easy to find another opportunity this time. The result was preempted by the Americans.

After the earthquake, seismographs have confirmed that earthquakes can be warned, and this technology has become crucial, especially for their island countries.

He slammed the tea on the table into the entrance, and the old man opened his mouth: "You go along the route that the Huaxia expedition team passed last time and search for instruments with sonar. They definitely have not only voted for two."

"Sir, the scope is too big to search."

"There is no way, but also give me a way to come." The old official was shot on the table: "I want a good seismograph, which is related to national security."

"Hey."

Shi Tengchuan took a banquet and left his face intricately.

chapters.title: Chapter 151: : Zhao Min’S 叮嘱
chapters.body:
Chapter 151: : Zhao Min’S 叮嘱

Chen Mo opened his eyes.

In the morning, a few rays of sunlight hit the room, with a warm color in the quiet.

The seismometer thing kept his nerves tight, and now things are coming to an end, and he is also relaxed. Lie in bed and enjoy a rare peace.

After a while, the door will open.

Xiao Yu wo came in and saw Chen Mo, who had already woken up, with a smile on his face: "Get out of bed, it is time to go to work."

Seeing Xiao Yu’s gentle smile, Chen Mo also laughed. The heartstrings were also slightly manipulated, and when he saw Xiaoyu, his mood was always unconsciously relaxed.

Not long after, Xiaoyu changed clothes, dressed in professional attire, long hair tied up, less soft and soft, looking very lean and confident.

Finishing the small fishing of the clothes, I found Chen Mo staring at her, and her face became unconsciously shy. Although he is already his person, this gaze will still make her unable to eat.

The sleepiness disappeared and Chen Mo also got up from the bed.

After the washing, Xiao Yu has also simply made a light makeup.

Chen Mo sat on the table and seriously ate breakfast.

White porridge with omelettes and a chopped apple is very simple. These are all made by Xiao Yu, although there is no shortage of money, but Xiao Yu did not ask the nanny's idea, insisting on making breakfast for Chen Mo every day.

For the preparation of breakfast, Xiaoyu is very attentive every time. The fruits are different every day and the style of breakfast is different.

Xiao Yu also sat on the table and saw Chen Mo eating with gusto, and her mouth hangs a smile. This kind of atmosphere, like the one she moved to Chen Mo’s renting house, changed her life, but the people did not change.

"Look at me like this, do you think that I am so handsome, do you have any thoughts on me?"

"It really does not matter to you." Xiao Yu smiles like a flower.

After eating in the warmth, after going to the company, the two also started their own work.

Xiao Yu is Zhao Min's assistant. To help with some affairs, Zhao Min sometimes gives some things to her, and she is very busy.

The technology of the seismograph has been completed, and Chen Mo will start to study the superconducting materials at room temperature. The discussion about seismographs is still very crazy. Many media hope that Chen Mo can come forward with a positive response, but Chen Mo is not interested.

"The boss, the relevant procedures for the production of seismographs, are already being processed."

Zhao Min seems to be very motivated. Now the marching ant company has become the most well-known enterprise in the world and will be the greatest enterprise in the future.

A business empire, under her management, is an unparalleled achievement for her.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded and took the information that Zhao Min handed over: "What is going on now? What reaction?"

"Overwhelmingly the topic." Zhao Min smiled.

Seismographs have made the ant company's fame and fortune, and the corporate valuation companies on Wall Street have rated the army ant company as the world's most valuable company.

The valuation of the marching ant company has made many experts do not know how to judge. The valuation is too high, many people will disagree, the valuation is too low, and it is necessary to attract boos.

The value of the marching ant company cannot be measured, but the stake in the marching ant company is still concentrated in the hands of Chen Mo, and the possibility of listing in the future is not great.

Chen Mo’s worth can no longer be described by normal wealth.

His prestige has reached its peak. Just the name Chen Mo is worth hundreds of billions. As an entrepreneur, this achievement has gone beyond the scope of entrepreneurs.

As the president of the marching ant company, Zhao Min has also become one of the most influential female figures in the world.

What she will do next is the production of seismographs.

With the help of the Seismological Bureau, the marching ant company has contacted well-known geological experts and geophysicists in China, and the production and installation of seismographs will also be carried out simultaneously.

"The wind is too strong recently, you don't want to make any big troubles anymore." Zhao Minhao said.

Mu Xiu Yu Lin, the wind will destroy it.

This sentence has been passed down from ancient times to the present, but it is not a simple word, but a real experience.

“Why do you say that?” Chen Mo asked.

"We are too busy, this is not a good thing. The wind is too strong, which means that we are in the field of vision with many people. We should be glad that the seismograph has not touched the interests of the super giants, otherwise it will be a steady stream. Trouble," said Zhao Min.

"We just got up from the trouble." Chen Mo smiled.

"This time, the previous influence is limited. After the seismograph comes out, the value of the marching ant company cannot be estimated. The equity is all in your hands. The giants have not got a benefit, and some people will stare at you. Second time, you should have a lesson."

Chen Mo announced the news of the earthquake prediction, let her hang a heart. At that time, Li Lingfeng had been prepared for the worst, only to predict success, and to make the shock become a surprise for the dead.

If you go on like this, the marching ant company can't stand Chen Mo toss.

Chen Mo nodded: "Then I have a low-key point during this time, and I promise not to make trouble, but to be a child."

He looked serious and looked at Zhao Min.

"You have to pay attention to personal safety issues. If the company doesn't have you, you will get rid of it immediately." Zhao Min became serious in the next second, and his face changed quickly. Even Chen Mo was surprised.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded. The last few things made him very sensitive to this kind of thing.

"There is one more thing. Some ambassadors of countries with frequent earthquake disasters have already contacted the company. They want to know the information about the seismograph and are very interested in the seismograph."

"What kind of information?" Chen Mo asked.

"The accuracy and price of earthquake warnings are the issues that they are most concerned about."

"If you are accurate, no one can say that 100% success, 80% should be. But the last time the first warning was successful, the data will continue to be collected in the future. The specific data must be tested before the production. If the production, the cost should be At around 3 million, how much do you want to sell?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min.

Studying him is OK, but doing business, he is not as good as Zhao Min.

"50 million." Zhao Min extended five fingers.

Seeing the price that Zhao Min said, Chen Mo sighed with a sigh of relief. This pricing is a bit embarrassing.

“Is it very unexpected?” Zhao Min smiled. “But I didn’t finish it. I’m talking about $50 million.”

Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min with a ghostly look. Now, looking at Zhao Min’s face with a smile, he feels cold. What is it? Compared with Zhao Min, he is simply a child of innocence and kindness.

I don’t know which day I was sold by Zhao Minming.

“Why are you looking at me like this?” Zhao Min glanced at Chen’s sinister expression and smiled slightly: “If you have money, but you don’t know how to do business. We are not doing business with ordinary people, we are with one. The country does business."

"How do you say that?" Chen Mo asked.

"Graphene knows? When the Western monopoly, 5,000 yuan a gram, after our country broke the monopoly, now the price of cabbage, the lowest time a few dollars a gram.

Now we are a monopoly, why not kill? If the seismograph was developed abroad and the price was $100 million, our country would have to buy a few scalpers because it is related to the safety of the people. ”

"Well, the poverty that once was, has limited my imagination." Chen Mo smiled: "This time, I have not been able to pass this business."

Zhao Min smiled and shook his head. Although Chen Mo was very skilled, but the grassroots origin, the company's business, he did not touch much.

Don't look at his current status, but in thought, he has not really grown into a qualified upper-level person, and there is still a lot to learn. Therefore, Zhao Min will find ways to let Chen Mo go to those forums and communication platforms.

chapters.title: Chapter 152: : Super Earthquake
chapters.body:
Chapter 152: : Super Earthquake

Shi Tengchuan is in a bad mood. In this sea, he let the fleet pull the sonar to patrol back and forth. However, after two weeks, there is still no gain.

He knows the general route of the Huaxia expedition team, but the Pacific Ocean is terrible. To find a seismograph that sinks into the sea, it is a needle in a haystack.

The last seismograph was discovered by them because of the signal.

It’s just that the seismograph sends a signal only when the earthquake strikes. This is a headache.

The whole country of the island country is in the earthquake zone, and it has always been a disaster. Because the earthquake is particularly large every year, they are determined to have the technology of the seismograph.

With the early warning technology of seismographs and earthquake warning, they can avoid many losses.

Holding a telescope and looking at the boundless sea, Shi Tengchuan’s face turned black. The instrument that I used to take away from the Huaxia expedition team was originally thought to have earned it. The result was found to be bad. The core technology has been lost, and the seismograph has long since lost its effect.

He did not know whether the seismograph that the United States had taken away was in good condition, but he had already given him a death order and must return a good seismograph.

"The command of the devil." Shi Tengchuan reflected the telescope, his mouth groaned.

Just as he complained, a soldier in a white sailor suit ran over and his face was excited: "The captain, eighty nautical miles northeast, found long-wave signals, and other directions, a total of three signals."

"Three signals?" Shi Tengchuan reflects ecstasy: "Record all signal coordinates immediately to the sea where the nearest signal is."

"Yes, Captain."

The marching ant company, Chen Mo was interrupted by the voice of the ink girl: "Mergo, West Pacific, three seismographs simultaneously signal."

Simultaneous signals from three seismographs? Chen Mo’s eyelids jumped up.

He was informed by Wu Zhentong on the location of the seismograph. In order to increase the scope of seismograph monitoring, the seismograph is only every 80 kilometers or more before it is placed, and the approximate location is in the western Pacific.

Separated so far, and issued an earthquake warning, he felt that this time things would not be too small.

"An island warship, and a US warship, are turning heads to the direction of the seismograph." The ink girl said again.

"This group of greedy ghosts, don't forget to take advantage of this time?"

Chen Mo's face is a whole.

"Let them catch it. In the future, they will have to repay it. What is the level of the three seismograph warnings?"

“5.0, 5.1, 5.3. The focal depth and the focal center cannot be monitored. It may be a super earthquake that will occur in other areas, and these three places will be affected.”

He also had this kind of hunch in his heart. He heard the ink girl say so, he is more sure of the thoughts in his heart.

"When is the time?"

"The news from the seismograph was an hour later," said the ink girl.

After hearing the news of the earthquake, Zhao Min was confirmed by Zhao Min. Chen Mocai spoke.

"Ink girl, in the official website, the West Pacific, an hour later, earthquakes occurred in three places, with maps, and finally added a little, there is the possibility of a high-level earthquake."

Some time ago, Zhao Min let him act in a low-key manner. Don't come out and provoke things. He did it and hid in the laboratory to do research.

It’s been half a month, although there are news on the web to discuss seismographs, but there are already many. In the context of this drama, any major scientific achievements will not last long, and the headlines of the play are the real headlines.

Now he decides to make another high-profile.

When the news of the seismograph warning came out, many people were convinced that there was some noise on the network as time went by.

Many people think that the last time the army ant company was a cockroach encountering a dead mouse, coincidence, can predict the second time, it is still a problem.

This time, as long as the prediction is successful, the performance of the seismograph can be truly hammered.

This time it may be a higher-level earthquake than the last time. He also wants to see how big the earthquake will be. He has a bad feeling, and this is definitely a big event.

The stealth half-month marching ant company once again released other news about the earthquake.

When the news came out, it was a stunned and immediately became the focus of attention.

An hour later, in the western Pacific Ocean, the northeastern islands of the island will have an earthquake and there is the possibility of a super earthquake. The shorter the message, the bigger the matter.

Super earthquake, it is terrible to think about it.

Many people think of the earthquake that occurred in the island country that year, the tsunami caused by the earthquake, the huge loss to the island country, the tens of thousands of lives, and the leak of nuclear power plants. Until now, many people live in the shadows, homeless. Return. Another super earthquake was the tsunami in Indonesia.

The news was transmitted to the island country in the shortest time, but many island people did not buy it, but many people chose to believe it. I took things with me and drove away from the beach home. This kind of thing, even if it is a tenth chance, can't take risks.

The debate over the marching ant company seismometers has revived, and time has passed in the debate.

Yi Hehao yawned and looked at the sea from time to time. He couldn't see anything other than the blue water.

Suddenly, Yi Hehao’s two pupils shrank, his spirit was full and his eyes widened.

The sea suddenly surged, it was a fish school. The fish swarmed on the surface of the sea and the dolphins. This scene is very rare. It feels like a dolphin is preying, and strange gray clouds appear slowly in the sky.

All of this seems to be a big anomaly. As an island nation, it is not uncommon for such a thing. It is a cloud of earthquakes.

Due to the abnormal magnetic field, electromagnetic waves affect the high-altitude ionosphere, so that the water vapor and dust are not randomly arranged in order to form a seismic cloud.

Did not think much, Yihe Hao Er immediately picked up the phone and dialed the captain’s room

Shi Tengchuan reflected the phone and picked up the telescope and looked at the sea. Sure enough, the fish swept out of the water and there was a vision of a cloud of earthquakes.

The seismograph that the marching ant company placed on the seabed signaled that the earthquake would come soon. However, this has nothing to do with him. His task is to get a seismograph.

He has a bad premonition, and there are signals in three directions. This means that there are earthquakes in all three directions, and I am afraid that it is not as simple as I thought.

The fleet speeds up and moves in the direction of the seismograph signal.

"Captain, the headquarters came to the news. The marching ant company released the news. One hour later, there may be a submarine earthquake in our sea area. The headquarters hopes that you will be careful." The reported soldiers handed a piece of paper to Shi Tengchuan.

"An hour?" Shi Tengchuan whispered and finally nodded: "The team slowed down."

Time passed by in a minute, and the earthquake was different. The marching ant company has predicted it once, and this time it is correct, which shows that the seismograph is really useful.

In every corner of the world, teachers, students, drivers, scholars, and all kinds of people, all holding mobile phones, waiting for news updates.

One hour lost in the phone.

On the bottom of the Pacific Ocean, strange sounds came out, the earth moved, the huge cracks appeared, and a catastrophe broke out.

chapters.title: Chapter 153: :Catastrophe
chapters.body:
Chapter 153: :Catastrophe

Island of Sendai City.

Takagi Akiko is sitting on the sofa eating snacks, watching the play of Doraemon on the TV, and keeping his eyes open.

High-intensity work, let her lose the motivation to go out to play, now just at home, just hiding in the house watching TV and eating TV, this is the supreme enjoyment, do not have to think about other troubles.

Oh...

The strange sounds sounded, and the TV's picture began to flash, making her feel wrong. Then, the phone received the message.

"earthquake?"

The warning message on the mobile phone made her heart shrink, and she did not put down the phone, and the things in the room began to beat.

I didn’t want to think about it. Takagi Akiko immediately lost his snacks and didn’t even wear shoes and rushed out of the room.

Like the end of the world, shaking her heart, let her heart smashed.

Last minute, I was still immersed in the ease of cartoons. At this moment, her body was already dominated by fear.

She experienced a lot of earthquakes, and every time she let her feel panic from her heart, like being crushed by the neck of her death, the next second will suffocate. There is only one voice in her heart, leaving the house and going to a safe place.

At the moment of rushing out of the house, Takagi Akiko felt that the whole world was bright.

Going to the nearest open space, Takagi Akiko fell to the ground, pale, and gasped. It is like defeating death again, and she has already taken off.

More and more people are gathering in the open space where she is, and everyone’s face is panicked and scared.

The world is shaking, the sound of the collapse of the house is filled with her mind, in less than half a minute, let her experience a moment of life and death.

The feet without shoes have been cut by gravel, she does not know. Not long ago, it was still a bustling area, and it was already devastated.

Looking at this scene, her eyes were a bit sluggish.

Broken wall wreckage, painful mourning, a face with fear and a person crying in the ruins. Sadness, fear and despair are filled with everyone's heart.

“Monitoring shows that in the northeastern seas, a magnitude 8.9 earthquake occurred, and the epicenter was about 150 kilometers away from Sendai.”

The Island Meteorological Agency, the staff face a bit sad.

After the marching ant company released the news of the earthquake warning, the Meteorological Agency closely followed the various seismic stations. We will strive to send earthquake warnings to ordinary people in the first time. Of course, we hope that this warning is a false news.

Unexpectedly, the super earthquake still happened.

This location is in the same sea area as the big earthquake of the year. It is not far from the location of the last magnitude 7.8 earthquake.

"The news of the earthquake and the tsunami warning were released." Kato's face was unusually ugly and had to make this order.

Now that it is not the worst, he only hopes that the tsunami will not happen. Otherwise, this level, I am afraid that the coastal areas will suffer again.

The Pacific Tsunami Warning Center, the Island Meteorological Agency, and the US Geological Survey issued a tsunami warning at almost the same time.

The news of the earthquake in the island country immediately attracted the attention of the whole world.

The tsunami warning has been issued, and people living on the island of the island have panicked. Many people were vividly witnessed by the tsunami that year, and now the natural disasters are coming again.

If you don't care too much, some people drive and start to rush to the nearest high ground.

Kishimoto looked at the fish in the box and smiled on the face. This voyage, no doubt, is a huge gain, as long as you land, this time, you can earn twice the usual money.

For him, it was a big harvest.

"Captain, received a tsunami warning." When Kwanben was happy, a crew member ran over: "A major earthquake occurred, 150 kilometers east of Sendai, the Meteorological Agency issued a tsunami warning."

Upon hearing this sentence, Kishimoto’s hair was erected. He has been able to see the port. At this time, he told him about the tsunami warning?

"Tune your head, immediately turn around, go to the sea at full speed, don't go to the beach." Kishimoto did not hesitate to think about the tsunami disaster. He felt cold in his heart: "Everyone returns to the cabin, immediately, immediately."

Kishimoto did not want to, did not want to go directly to the rudder, turned the bow, toward the direction of the sea, rushed out at full speed.

There is also an ominous premonition in his heart. The big earthquake of that year almost killed his life. Now when he mentions the earthquake and tsunami, he has a shadow in his heart.

Like him, the ship that was preparing to dock, after receiving the alarm, turned the bow at the first time.

The ship on the coast has also sailed. The scenes of hundreds of ships appeared in the port, including some large ships.

What they have to do now is to drive the ship to the open sea level to avoid the tsunami.

Miyagi Prefecture.

Anjing looked at the road that had been stuck in traffic, with despair on his face. I just escaped from the earthquake and now issued a tsunami warning.

The source of the earthquake is similar to the earthquake of that year.

If a tsunami occurs, they will be the first target here.

In the last catastrophe, they were the hardest hit areas here. The scene of the year reappeared and the road was blocked by the escaped car.

Looking at the mountains in the distance, how close, but no car, want to rush, it is impossible.

All kinds of jealous people on the road have already escaped from the car. Road congestion has become more serious and almost impossible.

He regrets a bit, why not leave the army ant company when it issued a super earthquake warning. But when friends advised him to go together, they should go out to travel.

It is impossible to leave now.

Seeing the scene in front of him, he knows that he can't waste time. Thinking of this, Anjing also came down from the car and ran towards the distant mountains. Now that someone is willing to change his car with a bicycle, he will not hesitate to agree.

The road has been completely blocked, and all kinds of escaped people on the road have panic on their faces, and hate the mother to not give them two more legs.

The tsunami is approaching, and the contours of the tsunami uplift can be seen at sea level. At the moment of entering the harbor, the funnel-like harbor makes the height of the waves bigger and bigger.

On the seawall, high waves on the sea level have been able to be seen.

Akashi stood on the hill, watching the waves coming from the beach, with calm on his face.

Just watching this wave, I am afraid that the disaster will not be small. This scene reminds him of the tsunami that year. I have experienced a life and death, that feeling, and now he is still vivid.

In the face of the disaster of nature, human beings are as weak as ants and have no resistance.

Rumble!

When the sea water is poured in, the bigger waves form and rush into the land, and it is unstoppable. The sea has spread to him, and it is impossible to escape.

The ship was lifted, rushed into the land, crashed into a house, and then the house was flooded with huge waves.

The vehicles parked on the road have been lifted by the waves, and as the waves drift, the gatherings are more and more, just like the garbage of nature.

Looking at the waves that are getting closer and closer, the face of Akashi is expressionless, which is a kind of indifference to death.

The tsunami has arrived, and he can clearly see that the vehicles that are too late to escape are being swallowed up by the sea and disappeared.

With him, there are still many people, screams and crying, connected in the mountains.

The home they depend on is once again submerged by the sea. Panic, stunned, and overwhelmed, can't stop, just hope heaven, no disaster.

chapters.title: Chapter 154: :Black Merchant
chapters.body:
Chapter 154: :Black Merchant

Asahi Shimbun: Meteorological Agency news, at 14:25 on the 13th, a 7.4-magnitude earthquake occurred in Sendai City. In the Pacific Ocean, with a latitude of 37.8 degrees north latitude and 142.2 degrees east longitude, an earthquake of magnitude 8.9 occurred with a focal depth of about 20 kilometers. The earthquake caused a tsunami and hit Miyagi Prefecture. According to current statistics, the earthquake and tsunami have caused 5,000 deaths and 20,000 missing, and the data is still rising.

CNN: US Earthquake Exploration Bureau news, at 21:25 on the 12th, Hawaii time, in the western Pacific Ocean, 37.8 degrees north latitude, 142.2 degrees east longitude, a magnitude 9.1 earthquake occurred, with a focal depth of about 21 kilometers. The earthquake caused a tsunami and attacked the island nation. The highest tide of the tsunami may exceed 25 meters.

CCTV: At 13:25 on the 13th, Capital Time, the Pacific Ocean, 37.8 degrees north latitude, 142.2 degrees east longitude, a magnitude 9.0 earthquake, the focal depth of about 22 kilometers, the earthquake caused a tsunami, attacking the island country Miyagi Prefecture, Fukushima and other places. At present, the latest official data has caused 5,437 deaths and more than 20,000 people have disappeared.

Reuters: In the northeastern part of the island country, an earthquake of magnitude 9.0 occurred, with tens of thousands of deaths and injuries. The marching ant company had warned of the arrival of a super-earthquake an hour ago, and the casualties could be reduced. Why are there so many casualties?

Financial Times: The island's earthquake and tsunami are expected to cause more than $150 billion in economic losses to the island nation.

World News: Fukushima was once again hit by the earthquake and tsunami, and the nuclear leak crisis may become more serious. Nuclear fuel can pollute groundwater, and Fukushima will become even more dangerous. On a global scale, the public once again discussed the safety of nuclear power plant facilities. South Korea has once again appeared against the construction of nuclear power plants.

Moscow News Network: Affected by the earthquake, the island island moved 5 cm to the Mariana Trench. The Mariana Trench accelerates the eastward expansion, and the Island Islands are sliding at a speed of 1.5 meters per year to the Mariana Ditch at 200 km. The fault has become more fragile, and there have been several similar major earthquakes. The "Island of the Island" will become possible.

Overwhelming, all kinds of news.

The eyes of the whole world were attracted by this great earthquake. Reports at all levels, all kinds of news, are talking about major earthquakes and tsunami events.

An hour before the earthquake, the marching ant company had already warned of the disaster, but it still caused so much casualties and losses to the island nation, and many people began to ponder.

The disaster can be alleviated, but the islanders chose not to believe in the marching ants, so the disaster did not decrease much.

The world is immersed in the earthquake of the island country earthquake and tsunami. The United States, China, Russia, Australia and other countries have sent rescue teams to the island countries. The United Nations rescue team is also rushing to the disaster area.

Various occasions, various prayer activities were held spontaneously throughout the island nation. The entire island nation is immersed in a sad atmosphere.

Gradually, there were some voices on the island's network.

“Why is the marching ant company warning news, but nobody cares?”

“Because the marching ant company did not inform the exact location of the super earthquake, this disaster was caused by the selfishness of the marching ant company. Why didn’t the marching ant company disclose the technology of the seismograph?”

“Why doesn’t the marching ant company announce the exact location of the super earthquake? Is the army ant company so selfish?”

“The marching ant company is strongly required to disclose seismograph technology.”

As soon as this voice appeared, it soon appeared on international news media and various social platforms. Various media have asked the marching ant company to disclose seismograph technology.

In addition to the news of the Great Island Earthquake, this news has also become a mainstream voice.

Now the marching ant company has successfully predicted two earthquakes, which shows that the seismograph is really useful. As long as the seismograph is installed in the area monitoring of frequent earthquakes, many people can be saved.

An international moral paradox that really forces the marching ant company. As for the manipulation behind this kind of sound, ordinary people are not known.

Not long after the news came out, the marching ant official responded.

The earthquake occurred in the territorial waters of the island country. The seismograph of the marching ant company was not near the source of the earthquake and could not detect the level and center of the earthquake.

As for the voices that demanded the publication of technology, the marching ant company did not intend to pay attention to it. This kind of problem with almost brain damage is a fool.

The earthquake in the island nation did not have any impact on them, but once again let the marching ant company have a limelight in the international arena.

This kind of thing, the marching ant company has tried to be low-key, except for a brief response, other things, did not show up at all, and did not publish any views on the earthquake in the island country.

At this time, the marching ant company is still doing things normally.

Li Chengzhi, Cheng Guo and Yao Yi came together and looked at the office building of the marching ant company. The three people were somewhat impressed.

This marching ant company is really amazing, and it has done something that no one can do. This time Chen Mo and the marching ant company are really within the scope of attention to the top.

The three of them just walked the army ant company and saw Chen Mo and others waiting at the door of the lobby.

"Mr. Li, Yao Shuji, Director Chen." Chen Mo hurriedly greeted the three and walked with the three to the reception room.

Just sitting in the reception room, Chen Mo said.

"This time, all three of you are looking for me at the same time. I am really surprised. Is there something important?"

"We just happened to happen, we just met together." Yao Yi smiled and said: "My business is not a secret matter. Let me talk about it first. Binhai is preparing to create a smart city and increase the image of the city. The most advanced intelligent platform, I want to invite the marching ant company to participate in this."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo, Chen Mo nodded slightly, she said: "Yes, things in this regard, I will go back and talk to Secretary Yao in detail."

"That's good." Yao Yi smiled: "The other thing is that the production license for the seismograph has passed, and the production lot number has come down."

Chen Mo and Zhao Min looked at each other with a clear heart.

The function of the seismograph was vividly reflected in the earthquake of the island nation. The high-level people probably wanted to install the seismograph quickly, so they would let them pass.

When the two looked at Cheng Guo, Cheng Guo also said: "I came here this time and wanted to tell you that we are going to purchase two hundred seismographs to establish an earthquake warning network in the provinces where earthquakes occur frequently in China. What about this price?"

"The cost price is about three million." Chen Mo said: "It is also a small thing that our company does for the people affected by the earthquake in China."

"That's good, I thank you and the army ant company for the people in the country." Cheng Guo looked at Chen Mo with amazement, this young man, really knows the general.
