"But some production equipment, you need help, or we have to wait for our equipment to come in order to mass production, it will take some time." Chen Mo said.

"This bag is on me." Li Chengzhi's big bag.

Now the above attitude is very clear, as long as the earthquake warning network can be built early, try to meet Chen Mo's requirements. This time he came here for this matter.

"This time I came over and brought the news." Li Chengzhi said: "I hope that you can give priority to helping the country establish an earthquake warning network. What help is needed, you can tell me."

"Yes, the establishment of a domestic earthquake warning network will only want to export." Chen Mo nodded: "Can you give me a tax-free preferential policy?"

"I will help you with this." Li Chengzhi said: "I am very curious, what is the price of the export?"

"50 million dollars a unit." Zhao Min smiled.

When her words came out, the three men on the field almost burst into swearing. The cost is three million, and it is necessary to sell 50 million US dollars. This Zhao Min, the knife is not a general flaw.

"It seems that Chen Mo brothers let Miss Zhao manage the company is correct." Yao Yi laughed.

"Production costs, only you know, you have to keep it secret."

"Yes." The three men smiled.

In the past, foreign companies used a monopoly to disgust them. Now it seems that the wind and water are turning. Not black is not a qualified businessman.

chapters.title: Chapter 155: : Island Country Buying
chapters.body:
Chapter 155: : Island Country Buying

The three simply said something, and after getting a satisfactory answer, they left the marching ant company.

The news of the casualties of the earthquake in the island country attracted the attention of the whole world.

One reason is that the earthquake is too big and has to attract global attention. The Fukushima nuclear accident has become more serious and fearful. Another reason is that the marching ant company has given predictions before the arrival of the super earthquake, but the casualties are still surprisingly large, which is somewhat unreasonable.

Ordinary people pay attention to earthquake disasters, and governments in various countries are concerned about marching ants. Earthquake prediction, one may be a coincidence, the second is not a coincidence.

Natural disasters cannot be controlled. What they can do is to try to reduce casualties in disasters. Now that the seismographs are coming out, it is undoubtedly a great event for countries with frequent earthquakes.

"The Ambassador of the Island State contacted us." Xiao Yu went into Chen Mo's lab and said softly: "They want to know about the seismograph. Zhao did not take the idea and asked me to come up and ask you what you mean."

Chen Mo put the already synthesized silicon carbon into the bottle and stopped the action in his hand.

"I didn't come back to salvage our seismographs. I still want to buy seismographs. I will hang them, don't give them a reply, wait for them to open up, send the seismographs back, compensate us for the loss, then talk about the seismometer, otherwise Free talk." Chen Mo did not want to say.

When I first salvaged the seismograph, I also wanted to hang a ant company. He is a vengeful, the island country is disgusting with him, and now it is his turn to go back.

Such a good opportunity, he will never let go.

"Good," said Xiao Yu.

In these two days, ambassadors of many countries have contacted the army ant company.

The seismograph business, as Zhao Min said, is not working with individuals or companies, and their partners are based on the state.

In countries with frequent earthquake disasters, the damage caused by earthquakes is hundreds of millions every year. One tenth of these losses are enough to install the seismographs in every corner of the country.

Therefore, as long as the seismograph is really mass-produced, he does not want to buy it at all.

In addition to the need to deploy an earthquake warning network in the country, there is another country that has shown a strong purchasing intention, which is New Zealand in the South Pacific.

New Zealand is one of the countries most desperate to get seismographs.

In recent years, the number of volcanic eruptions and earthquakes has increased significantly around the world. Experts predict that there will be big movements in the earth in the next few years, which will be earthquake-prone.

Scientists have discovered that the largest fault in the New Zealand Hikurui subduction zone has been awakened from the slumber of the previous year's earthquake. Experts predict that if there are three faults in New Zealand, there will be a devastating earthquake in New Zealand. The most terrible is the tsunami that may be caused by the earthquake.

Therefore, after the marching ant company confirmed that it could predict the earthquake, New Zealand could not wait to send people to negotiate with the marching ant company about the seismograph.

In addition to New Zealand, there are several other countries that have already contacted them, but the price is too high and hesitating. Chen Mo is not in a hurry. Now the output is not big. First, the domestic network will be provided. The island country wants to buy it, depending on his mood.

After Xiaoyu left, Chen Mo continued to focus on the experimental equipment.

During this time, I continued to experiment and finally synthesized some normal temperature superconducting materials. However, in terms of purity, it still does not meet the requirements. These materials, made of ordinary conductors, are no problem, but to make superconducting chips, it is necessary to purify the super-temperature superconducting materials.

In order to save costs and achieve mass production, the purity of the material must meet the requirements during the first synthesis process.

Island State Embassy.

Rice field Jinnan's face was very ugly. He did not expect to contact the people of the marching ant company, and the result was directly rejected by the other party. How to say, he is also a ambassador to China, and he was so rejected that he was very upset.

The marching ant company did not even say the reason for rejecting him, making him even more unhappy.

The earthquake and tsunami have just passed, and the country is busy in disaster relief. But now in China, the aftershocks continue, people have to worry about when the next big earthquake will come.

After the disaster, the technology of seismographs is urgently available in China. If there is such a technology and predicts the arrival of the next earthquake, those voters will certainly support their current party to be elected as the prime minister of the next government.

Now the order given to him is to hope to get the seismograph technology. If not, buy the seismograph and go back.

The marching ant company has been able to predict the earthquake. If the next catastrophe comes, they can't predict it. This is the government's inaction, and then they will fall into endless trouble. More likely to be attacked by the opposition party, let their resignation resign.

As far as he knows, New Zealand, Chile, Indonesia and other countries with frequent earthquake disasters have begun to contact the army ants and get some news.

But he came to contact, but he ate a closed door, so that he could not come out with a sigh of relief.

Now that the Army Ant Company has seismograph technology, it is unlikely that it will be acquired through abnormal means.

The marching ant company has been noticed by Huaxia's top management. If they are, they will be caught as they were last time, angering the marching ant company, not to mention the seismograph, a part can not be obtained.

"Tao Tianjun, will it be because of the last seismological incident, the marching ant company did not pay attention to us? The seismograph we picked up did not return to the marching ant company." Yokoi said next to it.

He is the counselor of the embassy and is responsible for assisting the work of the embassy. This time, he was asked to get a seismograph, and he also assisted. If this is done, he will also get a credit.

Rice field Jinnan patted his head and realized it.

The seismographs of the last marching ant company were picked up. They ignored the marching ant company and even refused the visa of the marching ant company staff to go to the island country.

Originally thought that the marching ant company would be aroused for this incident, the result of the marching ant company just gave a painless response. The marching ant company is definitely not happy with them in this matter.

"What do you do?" Inada Jinan looked at Yokoi Yu: "The last time, I have already got a crime army ant company."

"The best way is to return the seismograph to the marching ant company," Yokoi said.

"Would it be too faceless?" Inada Jinan thought about it.

A government that compromises with a company and can't get through it.

"We don't make too much noise. Now the media's eyes are on the earthquake. As long as the movement is not too big, we will not be noticed."

Rice field Jinnan nodded meditation and picked up the phone: "I will contact the country."

Now the pressure on the island government is very high. When I heard the request of Inada Jinan, I immediately agreed. The seismographs they picked up, the core boards and chips have burned out, and no useful technology has been obtained.

Now I want the island government to have a lot of troubles. I only want to do my best to import seismographs to appease the mood of those people. Damaged seismographs have not been of much value to them, and the research has been studied.

chapters.title: Chapter 156: : This Is A Traditional Virtue
chapters.body:
Chapter 156: : This Is A Traditional Virtue

Zhao Min put down the phone and raised a slight curvature in the corner of his mouth.

The island people opened up and knew the seismographs that were returned by the initiative. It is estimated that they meant what they meant. However, the other side requires a low-key transaction, which is definitely not a small face.

This is interesting. If you destroy their seismographs, you can send them back directly and do nothing.

This kind of loss business, she can not do.

"The big boss, the island country said, they made a mistake and mistakenly used our company's instruments as monitoring instruments. We are ready to send the instruments back to us two days later."

Zhao Min directly found Chen Mo.

"The island people are quite good at thinking. Just refused, they remembered it."

Chen Mo smiled lightly, not too much surprise. This is expected, the island country must compromise, otherwise it is impossible to want a seismograph.

"The seismograph will be sent to the coastal port, and he will let us go there to receive the seismograph."

"They want to send the seismograph back privately? Don't want to make a noise?"

Chen Mo immediately understood the key, there is no mention of compensation and apology.

"You are talking about it. A country compromises with a company. From any angle, they are very embarrassed. But now the initiative is not in their hands, they don't want to be open, we open ourselves, call some reporters in the past, get a Banner, come to a simple return ceremony, do not want to be public and open." Zhao Min smiled.

"This can be. When they took the seismograph, they blacked us. When the seismograph is now, why don't you go back? It's the traditional virtue of China." Chen Mozhen smiled. .

"What do you want to do?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo strangely.

"You will know when you get there."

Two days later, the port of Marina.

Rice field Jinnan stands in front of a container, which is the seismograph sent back.

Next to him is Yokoi Yu and a translator.

Although he personally came back to return the seismograph to the marching ant company, he was very upset, but in order to buy the seismograph, he could only come over with his head.

Seeing Li Lingfeng coming down from the car, Daotian Jinnan's brow furrowed, and then smiled, like an old friend who had not seen for many years. Li Lingfeng, who he saw, was the executive of the army ant company who was looking for him to negotiate the seismograph last time, not Chen Mo.

"Hello, Ambassador Ricefield. The boss has already felt your sincerity, let me pick you up, he is waiting for you at the company." Li Lingfeng said generously.

"Okay." Rice field Jinnan immediately nodded with a smile.

"Let's check the instrument."

Li Lingfeng and the staff made a greeting, and took the rice paddy Jinnan and others to get on the bus and walked back to the marching ant company.

On the way, rice field Jin Nanpi laughed and laughed. These Chinese people are all like a kind, showing a small kindness, it is stupid to treat people as VIPs.

Not long after, the group returned to the marching ant company.

Just getting off, the smiling face of Inada Jinan is there. He saw dozens of reporters, with long guns and short guns facing him, and the flashlight could almost brighten his eyes.

A feeling of being deceived comes to mind.

Originally, I wanted to return the seismograph to the marching ant company in private. I didn't expect the other party to call the reporter. Even more hateful, the marching ant company actually took a stage and pulled a banner.

‘Island Government’s return of seismological ceremony’

Seeing the banner, Inada Jinan slammed a fire, almost swearing, giving you something, and doing a ghost ceremony. Even Yokoi Yu, who is next to him, doesn't look too good. The marching ant company is afraid that others will not know about it.

"The Ambassador of Rice Field, welcome." Chen Mo smiled and greeted him, shaking hands with Rice Field Jinnan.

"Mr. Chen, we are sorry about the accidental use of your company's experimental equipment. We have confirmed that it is your company, so I sent it to you personally."

Already at this point, even if there is anger, he can only lie in his heart, pretending to be very graceful. At this time, it is very troublesome to go away and want to cooperate with the marching ant company.

"Oh, the guest does not say so much." Chen Mo right-handed, walked with the small stage of the rice field Jinnan Chao: "I feel your sincerity, so I specially set up a temporary stage for the general public to witness this moment, also Let the people of the world see what the epoch-making seismograph looks like."

At this time, a dump truck pulled a container into the marching ant company.

Just stopped, more than a dozen staff members ran forward, opened the container, lifted the seismograph from the container and walked to the stage.

A group of reporters boiled up, this is the seismograph that has recently been raging.

This seismograph was seen on the salvage photos published by the island nation, but this is the first time so close, so positively photographed the seismograph.

After the seismograph was placed on the stage, Chen Mo and Inada Jinan also went to the stage.

"Let's take a photo." Chen Mo smiled.

Rice field Jinnan stretched out his hand and held Chen Mo’s palm, slamming the smile on the face of the reporter, but his heart was gnashing his teeth.

"Do you have any words to say about the rice paddy ambassador?" Chen Mo asked.

Upon hearing the translator's translation, Iida hurriedly shook his head: "I won't say it, this is too sudden, I am not prepared."

"Then let me say a little."

Rice field Jinnan's eyelids jumped straight, and I don't know what Chen Mo wanted to do, but he left the stage with the staff.

Chen Mo smiled and took care of the microphone, and the scene was quiet.

"I am very pleased that the island government today took the initiative to return the seismograph and apologize to the marching ant company."

Glad you grandfather, the following rice field Jinnan almost spewed out a blood. He finally understood that Chen Mo asked him to come to the company, which was a pit.

"This is the first deep-sea seismograph that appears in front of the public. It has historical significance. The marching ant company will donate it to the museum collection in Binhai City, but I have a regret."

Chen Mo's regret?

When I heard the regret, everyone raised their ears.

"Unfortunately, this super earthquake did not warn the exact location." Chen Mo sighed: "Many people on the Internet asked us why we didn't say the exact location of the earthquake. I don't want to say it, I can't say it. We could have warned this time. The specific location of the super earthquake."

This time, everyone is commotion. Rice field Jinnan's eyelids jumped straight and there was a very bad feeling.

“We have placed a total of six seismographs in the western Pacific, the northeastern part of the island. This sea area, located at the junction of the Asia-Europe plate and the Pacific plate, is one of the most frequent sea areas, so it became our test seismograph. The best place."

When Chen Mo’s words fell, the projection of a sea area appeared on the white cloth behind Chen Mo, with six clear red dots on it and the center of the earthquake.

"There are two seismographs in the six seismographs, which are closest to the sea where the big earthquake is located. The first one is the seismograph that was salvaged. It was just put into operation and was salvaged. I was born and died, so I regret that it failed to warn the earthquake."

In the rice field, Jinnan heard Chen Mo’s words, a heart smashed up and his body was tight. What did Chen Mo want to do? Open up to them for trouble?

Those reporters have already culminated at this time, this is super big news.

"The first one died, this is very unfortunate. The second one is the biggest regret. It can also warn the location of this great earthquake. The first time to send back the warning message is the second seismograph. The sea area.

As a result, the signal was interrupted shortly after the first signal was sent back, and it was detected and signaled. Who is it, I don't know. ”

"The two seismographs closest to this sea area have been taken away. It is impossible to predict the location of this major earthquake. This is my biggest regret." Chen Mo sighed.

chapters.title: Chapter 157: :Karma
chapters.body:
Chapter 157: :Karma

Chen Mo’s words set off a huge wave. Everyone did not expect that there is such a hidden feeling. The two seismographs closest to the Super Earthquake were all salvaged, making it impossible for the marching ant company to accurately determine the location of the super earthquake.

This is a natural disaster, but it is also a man-made disaster.

If the second station, as Chen Mo said, was taken away because of the prediction of the last earthquake, then things are a bit complicated.

Who took the second seismograph?

Island country? United States?

The reporters on the field immediately took out the names of the two countries.

The island country has had a previous record and is the most suspicious. It is able to salvage seismographs in the northeastern waters of the Western Pacific Island countries, and there is also a United States.

In addition to these two countries, they can't think of any country that will salvage seismographs.

Everyone looked forward to it, Chen Mo once again said: "This is a very pity regret, I hope that in the future, this regret will not happen again."

Chen Mo did not continue to speak, and ended his speech without pain. His purpose has been reached, and the rest of the matter has nothing to do with him.

The 'ceremony' is short and the amount of information is large.

The second seismograph of the marching ant company was taken away and was the closest seismometer to the super-earthquake, which prevented the marching ant company from accurately predicting the arrival of the super-earthquake.

The news of the earthquake in the island country is already enough, and the island country is not calm.

Now Chen Mo broke the big news, so many people can't calm down. The video of Chen Mo’s speech was quickly uploaded to the social networking site of the island nation.

When the time is up, the people’s complaints are boiling.

The number of deaths caused by the earthquake and tsunami has risen to 7,264, and the number of missing people is 23,140.

Because the government took away the seismographs of the marching ant company, it was impossible to accurately predict the major earthquake, which indirectly caused this huge loss.

Under the leadership of the opposition party, the voice against the island government has emerged, criticizing the government’s willingness to go, leading to this catastrophic disaster. Protest, the more troubled with the support of all kinds of ghosts and gods

There are countless kinds of remarks on international social media.

The topic of the island country to die, become the mainstream!

Chen Mo took a few short sentences and seized the headlines of the major media, causing a sensation in public opinion.

He does not say this, ordinary people will not know, just think this is a natural disaster. Now that this is the case, many island people regret it.

The handcuffs picked up the seismograph of the marching ant company, indirectly causing the disaster, the causal cycle, and the retribution.

The second seismograph was taken away and became the focus of attention.

Island State Embassy.

Rice field Jinnan looked at the newspaper in his hand and his face was dark and terrible. This time I went to the marching ant company and was pitted. He did not expect that he would encounter such troubles.

The words that Chen Mo said are only personal regrets. It seems that there is nothing wrong with it, but the information revealed has given the island government a black hole.

He also had trouble, and the domestic call came over and smacked him.

This matter has nothing to do with him from beginning to end. The seismograph was fished and had nothing to do with him. Chen Mo’s words were also Chen Mo’s business. Because he was there, this black pot was on his body, and now he can't wait to kill the media that talks.

"The ambassador. The marching ant company just gave a reply." Yokoi Yu came in and cautiously said.

"Say."

Rice field Jinnan is pressing anger and squeezes a word out of his teeth.

"They said that the seismograph has been damaged and we must double the compensation to talk to us about the seismometer."

The appearance of Yokoi Yu, can not see the joys and sorrows. He is fortunate that this thing, the person who was blacked out is not him.

He is also very upset. They just want to buy seismographs and reduce the losses caused by the earthquake in China. As a result, Chen Mo’s words caused them so much trouble.

"Double compensation?" Rice field Jinnan brain door violently jumped, holding the tea cup in his hand: "How much?"

"100 million dollars."

When I heard this number, Iwata Jinnan rushed to the brain and almost violently walked away: "Why don't they grab it? Is it gold?"

His lungs were almost blown up.

A seismograph, $100 million? If it was not rational, he rushed to the marching ant company to find Chen Mo theory.

"The seismograph is worth 50 million US dollars. Other countries want to buy it. It is also the price. They say that it is very difficult to manufacture." Yokoi said.

He learned about the other embassy staff and it was $50 million, and it must be booked and delivered within one year.

Rice field Jinnan calmed down. Anyway, he didn’t pay for it. He bought it at home, bought it for money, and didn’t buy it. This time, the black pot made him very unhappy. He didn't even have a mood to negotiate with the army ant company.

After drinking the tea in his hand, Inada Jinnan took a deep breath and opened a domestic call.

office.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min were sitting, and neither of them spoke. Only the robot was pouring tea to the two people, and the office kept a strange silence.

Zhao Min’s gaze made Chen Mo’s heart feel a little hairy.

"I have a long flower on my face?" Chen Mo touched his face and broke the surprise.

"You said that the ceremony is still going on, is this thing?" Zhao Min asked.

"Actually, anyway, I don't break the law, and I am telling the truth. I don't even have to take advantage of the people of the island."

"I admire your ability to make trouble." Zhao Min shook his head and said: "You didn't tell me about the second seismograph."

"You didn't ask me why I want to announce the earthquake warning?"

Zhao Min nodded. When Chen Mo wanted to announce the earthquake warning, she had already let Li Lingfeng prepare for the crisis public relations, and the warning came true. She did ask the reason.

"Because at that time, the second seismograph was taken away. We will not announce it, let them know the value of the seismograph. When the next signal is sent, they will salvage again. If this continues, the seismograph test will be in vain. Not many people will believe us."

Zhao Min nodded and changed to be her, he would hesitate to announce it, but why Chen Mo is so confident that the seismograph warning must be correct.

"What should you do if the warning fails at the time?"

"What can I do? Isn't the scientific test failure normal?" Chen Mo's hands spread, and it didn't matter. He does not believe in the technology of the technology library, there will be failures.

"Your heart is really big, can you tell me who was the second seismograph?"

Zhao Min is sure that Chen Mo knows the news of the second seismograph, but it is inconvenient to say it.

"United States."

Chen Mo throws an unexpected answer.

"I was hesitant at the time. I would like to tell the United States to take out the second seismograph. It caused the conflict between the people of the island and the US government, and then let them bite the dog. But think about it and finally give up. After all, the United States denied it. I can't take the evidence."

"Fortunately, you didn't say it, or the company has to get into trouble. If you have a heartfelt guess, you can guess that you deliberately clarify things." Zhao Min said.

"So obvious?" Chen Mo said, touching his nose.

"It's very obvious! We have already gone out of this matter. We haven't made trouble recently. What we have to do is to make a fortune. After this lesson, no one should dare to touch the seismograph."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"Are you sorry that this incident has not successfully dragged the United States into the water?"

"You are right." Chen Mo said with a smile: "But I believe that paper can't keep the fire. Sooner or later, I will definitely show it. I will definitely eat melons."

chapters.title: Chapter 158: : Dog Bites The Dog (Complement)
chapters.body:
Chapter 158: : Dog Bites The Dog (Complement)

Shi Tengchuan reflected the u disk in his hand to Anyuan Xin, sitting in the opposite position, silently. Because the marching ant company spoke and said the impact of the seismograph, the government is now in greater trouble.

They were enough headaches for the disaster relief. If the seismograph is not handled well, they may fall into a political crisis. The opposition party has been holding the leader's position.

"The photos are here?" An Yuanxin unplugged the computer's u disk and said calmly.

"Yes, sir." Shi Tengchuan nodded.

Anyuan believes that the glasses are still expressionless: "When the Americans took the seismograph, did the fishing boats be nearby?"

"It seems that there are two fishing boats." Shi Tengchuan looked down and thought about it.

"This matter is confidential and cannot be known to others. Otherwise, you know the consequences." Anyuan’s tone is cold and with a warning,

"understand."

Shi Tengchuan guessed what Anyuan Xin wanted to do and immediately nodded. With the permission of Anyuan, he left the office, and for a while, he needed to take a vacation. Because the seismograph is that he has fished up and earthquakes, there are many contradictions, and he is inevitably the object of attention and attack.

Not long after Shi Teng left, a man with a cold face walked into Anyuan’s office.

"The pictures were sent to the Internet, and the fishermen took it." An Yuanxin handed the u disk to the man.

"Yes, sir."

The indifferent man took the u disk, did not ask, turned and left.

In the hall.

When Chen Mo was watching the mobile phone, Xiao Yu came out of the room.

The body was wearing his floral dress with his first date, and his long hair was scattered on his back, just like the beginning.

The current small fishing, looks very confident, often with Zhao Min, the people who come into contact are different, so invisible, the temperament has also changed.

"Come with me to the beach." Xiao Yu's eyes are delighted, and Chen Mo's eyes are very useful.

Chen Mo looked at the weather and said: "Is there rain outside?"

"There is you."

Xiao Yu’s shallow smile made him unable to refuse. This sensible girl, he will not refuse. Seeing Chen Mo’s movement, Xiao Yu immediately took his arm and went outside.

On the seawall outside the villa community, Chen Mo supported the umbrella, and Xiao Yu held his arm and walked quietly.

Chen Mo feels very comfortable. It has not been a walk for a long time. This is the first time it has rained. After a busy period of time, this tranquility is especially relaxing and enjoys a rare leisure.

The sea breeze with full moisture, and the long skirt of small fishing. Xiao Yu looks very quiet, and occasionally closes the hair that is blown by the sea breeze.

Looking at the sea under the night, Xiao Yu gradually became ecstatic, then folded his hands and closed his eyes.

Chen Mo did not bother, quietly watching Xiaoyu, he was the first time to see Xiaoyu reveal such a sincere face.

Not long after, Xiao Yu opened his eyes again and snuggled in his arms.

"When I was young, I always liked to go to the beach and wait for my dad to return. I once heard that a ship in the village had an accident at sea and never returned. On that day, I ran to the beach and cried. Wishing, my father who wants to go out to sea can return safely."

Chen Mo was a little distressed and tightened her. This is the first time Xiaoyu told him about childhood.

"Later my dad came back and saw me sitting on the beach crying like a big cat, giving me a present, a colored conch that he picked up at sea, very beautiful."

The small fisherman's hand opened, revealing a small colored conch, the texture is very delicate, the surface is rough, and the night color can not cover the bright colors.

"This is the first gift my father gave me. When I was young, my sister wanted to grab my conch. Later I hid it and kept it until now. At that time my dad said that the conch could hear the sound of the sea. Since then, every year today, I took this conch and went to the beach to make a wish."

Thinking of a Loli, a serious wish to the sea, Chen Mo would like to laugh, but he did not dare to laugh.

It’s interesting to hear Xiaoyu’s anecdote when he was a child.

"Until now, I still like to take this little conch and come to the beach to make a wish." Xiao Yu said.

"After more than ten years? What are you wishing?" Chen Mo asked.

"When I was young, I hoped that my father would return home safely and read well. My father bought me beautiful skirts and toys."

As he spoke, Xiao Yu himself laughed.

"What did you just make?"

"I won't tell you for the time being, I will tell you later." Xiao Yu showed a slight playful color: "Go back, I am a bit cold."

Early the next morning, Chen Mo rushed to the company with Xiao Yu. Now that the seismograph is on the right track, Zhao Min will handle the rest, so he only needs to study with peace of mind.

"Merg brother, the island people expelled the Americans to take away the seismograph." Chen Mogang entered the office, the ink girl reminded.

“Is the island nation out?” Chen Mo said with amazement: “What time?”

"last night."

Chen Mo immediately opened the news and saw the picture of the seismograph in the United States.

This was beyond his expectation. He did not expect that the island nation would secretly find someone to publish the pictures. But now these things, he is just a spectator, has nothing to do with him.

"The fishermen of the island nation broke the news, and the US military took away the seismograph. 》

"The News of the Second Seismograph"

......

In the recommended news, there are quite a few of these news. This was last night, the island people broke the news on Twitter.

Is the United States taking the second seismograph?

This topic is very hot now, and successfully grabbed the headlines of the island earthquake.

There were still people who doubted Chen Mo’s words. After all, Chen Mo said that it was possible, and did not see anyone taking the seismograph. Now that the picture is coming out, the evidence is conclusive, and Chen Mo’s guess is correct.

This news has made the domestic blame of the island country find a vent.

On Twitter, the island people are already crazy about Americans. Because they believe that the United States took away seismometers, causing the disaster not to be accurately predicted.

Now that Twitter has been in full swing, the netizens of the two countries have already launched an unprecedented confrontation on Twitter.

The eyes of the island nation also shifted from the earthquake and focused on the removal of the second seismograph in the United States. The earthquake and the tsunami, as well as the aftershocks, the anger of the island nation has nowhere to vent, and now there is such an opportunity, it is impossible to easily settle down.

The network of both sides fought and upgraded instantly.

Different from the two countries, the domestic netizens, the voice of gloating, the owner pitted the dog, and now the dog bites the master, and reports of mutual confrontation, seeing domestic netizens screaming.

In the office, Chen Mo looked at the news with interest. This time it was two birds with one stone and two pits for them. He was very happy. This is the result of taking away the seismograph.

Now, in the island country, because of this catastrophe, the intensification of social conflicts, and the insufficient handling of the government's disasters, the protests have started, and the island government has fallen into a political crisis.

The second seismograph was the news of the United States, which successfully diverted the attention of the people and turned the contradictions of the people into the United States. The island government did not have to bear such great civil pressure. In the island country, there is an invisible hand that manipulates the direction of public opinion.

Now that the two netizens are smashing each other, this can only be regarded as a civil dispute, which has nothing to do with the official, and the news is not ‘official’.

These two countries are originally inconsistent with each other. This situation is in full compliance with the practices of the islanders. This move by the island country is very good.

However, these things have nothing to do with Chen Mo as the initiator.

chapters.title: Chapter 159: : I Am An Alien.
chapters.body:
Chapter 159: : I Am An Alien.

Chen Mo took a mask and goggles, wore a white lab robe, and carefully removed the reaction vessel inside the instrument.

The separation in the reaction vessel was followed by an off-white crystalline powder.

Chen Mo carefully looked at the crystal powder and looked at the color, which is similar to the previous synthesis, but the purity cannot be judged by the naked eye.

After the crystal powder is washed and dried, Chen Mo takes a teaspoon and begins to check the purity of these crystals.

After a long time, Chen Mocai stood up straight.

With a purity of 92%, the first stage of synthesis, which can achieve 92% purity, has been successful in more than half. The initially synthesized material is not required to be subjected to a second silicon carbon purification, and is sufficient to form a superconducting circuit.

But his goal is not to stop the superconducting material with the circuit, but the superconducting chip. Using this material to make a superconducting chip is his goal.

"Mer brother, Xiao Yu sister entered the experimental area."

Chen Mogang wanted to test the silicon carbon powder, and the voice of the ink girl interrupted his movement.

"The data that was just synthesized is recorded."

Chen Mo took off his attire, left the lab, and just walked out, he saw the small fishing boat coming up in the corridor.

"Some equipment produced by the seismograph has been sent, and Zhao asked if you want to go over it." Xiao Yu saw Chen Mo open.

"So fast?"

Chen Mo was surprised. Not long ago, he told Li Chengzhi that the seismograph production equipment was not enough, and gave him a list. He did not expect the equipment to come so quickly.

The efficiency of these special things is not as fast as usual. Chen Mo did not refuse to leave with Xiao Yu.

Zhao Min is working in the parts processing factory. This is the processing of the acquisition. In addition to the necessary parts production, the parts of the robot and the parts of the seismograph are processed here.

To this end, Zhao Min also let the headhunting company, a high salary to dig a few senior fitters.

The seismographs tested were assembled at this factory. More seismographs are needed now, and production will be done here.

After seeing Chen Mo, Zhao Min greeted him.

"These are the equipment that Mr. Li sent people."

Zhao Min walked to the front of the equipment with Chen Mo, both precision machine tools and parts processing equipment. With these devices, they are enough to increase the speed of seismograph production several times.

"These masters are all senior fitters who have joined the factory." After introducing the equipment, Zhao Min began to introduce the factory's fitters to Chen Mo.

"Master Liu Meng, Master Hong Hailong, Master Wang Jiadong, they all have more than ten years of work experience."

The factory originally had several old fitters. The last time Chen Molai came to the factory to assemble the seismograph, I saw that there are a lot of talents.

Scraping, grinding and mechanical assembly of these pliers work, as well as some of the most sophisticated models, molds, measuring tools, still need to rely on the craft of the workers for precision machining. He is not good at this, so these talents, for him, the more the better, the places to be used in the future, certainly a lot.

"Hello there."

Chen Mo smiled and shook hands with several people, and also shook hands with other workers on the field.

The enthusiasm for him, everyone is a bit flattered. Now Chen Mo can be said to be a world-class man, the influence of seismographs is huge, and Chen Mo is also well received by the whole people.

The boss behind them is a marching ant company. All employees know that many people have never thought of being able to get close to Chen Mo, especially some employees who just came in, seeing the big boss so intimate, and a little more sense.

“How many people are there?” Chen Mo asked.

"Including the newly joined three masters, there are a total of 24 people. Every fitter master, we have selected the youngest and the best craftsmen from the factory, and apprentice to several masters as a future talent reserve. The manager in charge of the parts processing plant immediately took over.

“Not bad.” Chen Mo nodded: “The production and assembly of seismographs will be put here later. Every seismometer is very important and is related to the lives of many people. Therefore, the quality of each part is very high. Good psychological preparation."

"understand."

Many workers have solemnly focused on the earthquake. The earthquake incident in the island country has not yet fallen, and they have a deep understanding of the disaster. And the wages here are not low, they must be taken seriously, or they will lose their jobs.

After a round trip in the factory, I checked the production and processing workshop, and together with the workers, Chen Mocai left.

“How is the seismograph now? Are there orders from several countries?” Chen Mo asked.

During this time, the island nation and the United States fought on the Internet. But the officials of both sides did not respond.

The United States has taken the seismograph in the international waters, and it is not an island country. There is no problem for the island nation. The island government has even ignored this matter.

"We are watching, because we have to network in China, there is no export for the time being, many countries are only understanding the price. Because they are too expensive, they are all waiting to see. But no hurry, only the world masters seismograph technology, the price is high. To buy, this is the convenience of monopoly." Zhao Min said with confidence.

On the road of development in China for decades, the monopoly of losses, more than once and twice, Samsung's memory monopoly price increase some time ago, and oLeD screen pit them, is to bully them without technology.

There are still many monopoly technologies in the world, and they are selling them at a high price. Even some technologies can't be bought at a high price.

They can now use the monopoly technology to go back nausea. Sooner or later, they will come to the door to buy it. When they want to sell it, they will see their mood. Anyway, the army ant company is not short of money.

"Right, Zhao Min, you go to import a lithography machine." Chen Mo said.

"Do you want to make chips?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo incredibly, this monster, the next target area is chip technology?

"Really think."

Chen Mo did not conceal, but the room temperature superconducting materials should be concealed. With his current ability, the room temperature superconducting materials will be available, and he will bring endless troubles.

“I just want a lithography machine as an experimental device.”

"I feel that I am an alien." Zhao Min reluctantly sighed. She knows that Chen Mo wants to enter a field and will definitely make a difference. The previous products have already proved.

"The middle-end lithography machine, the problem is not big, but want high-end lithography machine, it is very troublesome, it is estimated that it can not be obtained." Zhao Min said.

"Embargo?" Chen Mo immediately thought of a problem.

"Yes, the top-end lithography machine is monopolized by the Dutch Asma company, and the Netherlands is a member of the Vanason Agreement. Europe wants to export high-tech products to us, and must be approved by the Americans.

Now the top 7 nanometer lithography machine, including 14nm euV lithography system technology, the country wants to import, the group of Westerners, against us, just like a thief. ”

A lot of technology, before the country did not master, is a high price. Once the technology is mastered, it means that the price of the sky becomes the price of cabbage. Many companies in Europe and the United States have closed down.

The most important reason is to try to stop the rise of China, and sometimes those countries do everything.

"If you can't, 22nm is OK, no more, 32nm, I just used to experiment. If they don't want to sell, there is no need to buy, you just need to get more precision. The lithography machine will do," Chen Mo said.

"Must have a lithography machine?" Zhao Min asked.

"Yes, I need to make a special chip design."

chapters.title: Chapter 160: : What Technology?
chapters.body:
Chapter 160: : What Technology?

Although Zhao Min believes that the company does not need to develop chips for the time being, but Chen Mo needs anything, she will not object.

Her annual dividends are so many that many people are jealous.

Chen Mohua hired her so much money, not to question his decision, but to complete his orders.

Now Chen Mo needs a lithography machine. Her task is to take the lithography machine back. As for what to develop, Chen Mo thinks that the timing is right, she will know, just like a robot.

After confirming Chen Mo's request, Zhao Min left and was ready to find a lithography machine for him.

Chen Mo also returned to the office.

If it is just a simple chip development, he does not need a lithography machine, just design the chip layout simulation, send the layout to the foundry, and then get the sample for technical verification.

But he is not developing a normal chip, but a superconducting chip. The material is different and highly confidential, and he must test it himself.

Therefore, if you want to design and manufacture superconducting chips, the lithography machine is necessary, not only the lithography machine, but also the packaging machine.

He will not let others know that he has studied room temperature superconducting materials before he has the right time.

On the sofa, Chen Mo closed his eyes and entered the technology library.

The science and technology library is his greatest strength. There is endless technology and a lot of technology. He can only watch drooling.

At the stage of [Technology Apprenticeship], he has eight technical technologies to complete. Now that the normal temperature superconductor has been completed, he needs to conduct the next scientific research.

If you don't need to complete a project, you can get the second technology. He can't wait to take it all. Now it's time to prepare for future research.

However, the Science and Technology Library stipulates that a second technology can only be achieved by completing a technology.

Every time you enter the science and technology library, there is a feeling that ants break into the human library. Looking up in front of a hundred meters high bookshelf, humble, small, confused, this is a unique feeling.

He couldn't tell how many books were hidden here.

In the vast universe, the earth does not even have a grain of dust, not to mention the fact that he, the human being who lives on the earth, is so small that there is almost no sense of existence.

Human beings have little understanding of the universe. Relative to the universe, the emergence of human beings is only a moment.

There are countless unknowns in this world. This scientific library is the best evidence.

After feeling, Chen Mo focused on the open space in the center of the library.

In eight directions, one book in each direction, the direction of chemical material is already blank, leaving seven books, quietly suspended in midair.

In the science and technology library, Chen Mo did not know how many civilized technologies he had. At the beginning, Shu Lao said that the technology that makes people immortal and flying is also in the library.

With the highest authority, you can get to know more about the technology library. So far, he has only made two steps forward, and he has a long way to go.

This is a process of exploration.

After a round trip, Chen Mo focused on seven books.

Applying physics, computers, biomedicine, mechanics, ecological environment, military, energy, to complete these seven books, he is eligible for higher level of authority.

In seven books, after watching a circle, Chen Mo set his eyes on the computer.

Eight major technologies, materials are the easiest to achieve, as long as there are data and experimental conditions. So he started by selecting the piece of material.

Among the remaining seven books, the computer is undoubtedly the most familiar. Not too much equipment preparation is required.

When the hand is placed in the book, the book disappears at a speed visible to the naked eye and turns into a spot of light into his head.

Massive information, instantly crowded in his mind. Chen Mo’s body was awkward, sitting on the ground with a big ass, gasping for a big breath. Now he has a feeling of nausea, feeling whirlwind, and suffocating in the chest.

Vomiting~

Chen Mozhen was on the ground and began to retching. The feeling of nausea and fatigue makes his stomach make waves.

The amount of information this time is much larger than the last time.

When I received the information on the superconducting materials at room temperature last time, my head had only a sense of dizziness and weakness, and after a while, I was relieved.

The amount of information was too large, and the brain didn't adapt. He felt his head explode, and his deep nausea and fatigue were full. Now look at the bookshelves of the library, all of which are upside down, more horrible than the motion sickness, and the chest is unbearably terrible.

"Chen Mo, Chen Mo."

I don't know how long it takes for an anxious call to appear, it is the sound of a small fisherman.

Chen Mo endured a strong sense of nausea and walked to the door of the science and technology library. His eyes were blind and he seemed to be drunk.

Just stepping out of the door of the technology library, Chen Mo on the sofa opened his eyes. The feeling of nausea and dizziness is still there. Just woke up, Chen Mo turned over and stretched his head and vomited on the sofa.

"Don't scare me."

Xiao Yu sat on the sofa and patted Chen Mo’s back, his voice crying. Spit for a while, the disgusting feeling disappeared a little, Chen Mo was lying back on the sofa.

"Drink of water."

Seeing Chen Moe slowly, Xiao Yu hurriedly poured a glass of water and carefully placed it on his mouth.

Drinking two mouthfuls of water, completely relieved, Chen Mo will focus on the surrounding. At this time, the small fish, the eyes are red, and the eyes still have dry tear marks.

Seeing the appearance of a small fisherman, Chen Mo’s heart was warm.

"How could this be? Isn't it just good?"

"Nothing."

Chen Moqiang smiled, and now his head is still a little dizzy, and he is weak.

The feeling of the massive amount of information that had just poured into my head made him almost faint. The body has been strengthened, and there is still such a strong sense of weakness.

"You still laugh? You have spit it like this, there is no blood on your face, and you have nothing to say? Where is it uncomfortable?" Xiao Yu was sitting next to Chen Mo, his eyes were tender and he could not wait to give him a full-body examination immediately.

"It's okay, just suddenly a little uncomfortable." Chen Mo said.

"No, I will take you to the hospital for examination."

Xiaoyu took out his mobile phone and just got ready to make a call, he was taken away by Chen Mo.

"It's okay, believe me."

"You are like this, how can I believe you? You don't go to the hospital for examination, I don't trust." Xiao Yu caress Chen Mo's chest and said softly: "Go to the hospital to check it?"

Seeing the tears on the face of Xiaoyu, Chen Moxin was soft and gently smothered her: "Well, accompany you. I am a little tired now, can I go to sleep?"

Brain power consumption, now the head is very heavy, I feel the ceiling is spinning, just want to sleep well.

"Well, go to the hospital with me after work, I will make an appointment with the doctor."

Xiaoyu picks up the phone and dials a number. After she hangs up the phone, Chen Mo has been resting on her lap and slept.

Carefully removed Chen Mo's head, and Xiao Yu took the broom on the robot's hand.

"Thank you, ink girl."

Just now, the ink girl notified her by phone, otherwise she still didn't know Chen Mo's abnormality.

"No thanks, Xiao Yu sister." After the robot opened, he went back to the lab and left the space to Xiao Yu and Chen Mo.

After cleaning the floor, Xiaoyu sat back on the sofa and quietly looked at Chen Mo.

Until the evening, Chen Mokai opened his eyes, all the fatigue has disappeared, except that the stomach is a little hungry, and there is no other difference.

This huge amount of information has left him with a lingering fear. I didn't exercise much during this time. It seems that I need to exercise and strengthen my physical fitness in the future. Otherwise, I will not be able to take the next time to get more information.

Xiao Yu still fell asleep on the sofa, Chen Mo did not bother, began to check, this time what technology is, let him almost fainted.

chapters.title: Chapter 161: : Americans Come
chapters.body:
Chapter 161: : Americans Come

Chen Mogang recalled that a huge amount of memory emerged from his mind.

supercomputer. After seeing the technology, Chen Mo is no wonder that there is such a huge amount of information.

[Technology Apprentice] In the stage, the technology obtained is one level higher than before.

He also has a better idea. Using superconducting materials to build a superconducting computer, the performance will be qualitatively changed, but only if a superconducting chip is designed.

And buying a good lithography machine is also a problem.

After Xiaoyu woke up, the two left the company. Under the insistence of Xiao Yu, Chen Mo still followed her to the hospital for examination, at least giving her a peace of mind.

In the next few days, Chen Mo was guarded at home as a pig, and a large table of seafood every day. A small fisherman who usually doesn't buy expensive ingredients, bought a lot of surprises. If it wasn't Chen Mo, this girl would definitely move back the store.

Eat TV dramas every day, go out for a walk with a small fishing at night, don't worry about research, quietly come over for four days.

Going back to the company, Chen Mo went to his office.

"Welcome back, Mercedes." Just came in, the ink girl opened.

"Yeah." Chen Mo sat back in the office chair: "The last thing, did you inform Xiaoyu?"

"Yes, I checked your body temperature, suddenly lowered, and the body showed abnormal symptoms, I informed Xiao Yu sister." The ink woman did not deny.

"It's getting smarter," Chen said.

"When My Brother is in trouble, I will judge for myself and make the most favorable decision for you." The ink girl said: "Momgo, you will not blame me?"

"What do you guys do? I am boasting you." Chen Mo said: "Now start designing chips."

During the rest of the day, he did not do nothing. When he was idle, he digested the knowledge of supercomputers.

In a few days, the vast amount of knowledge has been won by him.

Now supervise the supercomputer design and assemble a superconducting computer when the superconducting chip comes out.

The power of strong artificial intelligence lies in its powerful computing power, especially the strong artificial intelligence with autonomy. Therefore, it is very appropriate to give this kind of thing to the ink girl.

Design requires the use of software and algorithms, which is undoubtedly the most proficient in Mexico.

Although the ink girl was developed by him, in this respect, ten Chen Mo is not as good as the ink girl, and the efficiency is very fast.

"Which chip?" asked the ink girl.

"The chips used by robots, as well as the high-efficiency chips used by supercomputers." Chen Mo said.

Now the ink girl has already asked him questions, and the spirituality is getting higher and higher. This shows that the ink girl is slowly growing and evolving.

Zhao Min walked into Chen Mo's office: "Is the body okay?"

"It's okay." Chen Mo stopped the action in his hand and looked at Zhao Min: "Is there something for me?"

"The US Ambassador to China, Mr. Terry, is in the reception room and wants to talk to you about the seismograph." Zhao Min said: "I contacted the previous two days, but at that time, because you were not feeling well, I pushed away. ”

"I thought that this American is very strong and hard to support." Chen Mo stood up and left with Zhao Min: "How is the production of seismographs?"

“The production of the test machine some time ago gave the employees experience. The five high-precision machine tools that Mr. Li sent were better than ours. Now the employees have mastered the skills. Because they are not producing deep-sea seismographs, the process and materials are relatively simple. Assemble three sets."

"Not bad." Chen Mo said.

"Right, Li Danni and Asma are in contact. They refused our euV order. We are only willing to provide more than 32nm lithography machine for us." Zhao Min said: "Because the Wassenaar mechanism is controlled by Americans." It is forbidden to provide euV and NX1980D to China. They want to sell and have a lot of trouble."

She didn't have any accidents about this incident, and she didn't have much hope. Until the current globalization, there is still a technical blockade against China.

Western countries have tried every means to stop the rise of China, and the most sophisticated instruments are almost embargoed on them.

Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min and meditated and shook his head: "There is no need."

At present, the mainstream chip manufacturing process is 14-32 nm, and euV is not expected, but 22 nm or 32 nm is also OK. But above 32 nanometers, it has been two or three generations behind. This precision lithography machine does not meet his needs.

He wants to study the superconducting chip, the material's normal temperature superconducting material, can't make the fab OEM, but he doesn't want to use such backward equipment to make superconducting chips.

Originally there are ready-made instruments, he does not want to manufacture lithography machines for the time being.

The development of the lithography machine, he can let the ink girl carry out, but the production process requires a lot of precision instruments, which is more troublesome. His time should be placed on the main scientific research. After the industrial park was built, robots could be made to produce these instruments.

Now it seems that there are other ways to think about it.

Terry sat in the reception room of the marching ant, with no expression and no mood.

He contacted the marching ant company two days ago. It may be uncomfortable for the marching ant company because of the seizure of the seismograph. Therefore, the marching ant company did not have a cold on him.

This time personally, he has already explained his sincerity. The United States has also been deeply affected by the earthquake. The instruments that are picked up are bad, and it is necessary to purchase seismographs. Otherwise, there is a big earthquake, and the Americans are suffering.

Seeing Chen Mo and Zhao Min coming in, Terry immediately stood up.

"Hello, Chen."

"Hello, Ambassador Terry, this time, what's the matter?" Chen Mo and Terry simply shook hands and sat down on the sofa.

"This time, because of the seismograph." Terry went straight to the theme: "Last time, we got an instrument in the Pacific Ocean. I didn't know it before. It was a seismograph of the marching ant company. It was recently discovered that it is your company. Ready to return it to you."

Chen Mo has to admire, Terry's art of speaking. They did not contact the United States about the seismometer. Terry’s words pushed the blame and made them unable to pursue it.

"Then I want to thank you too?" Chen Mo asked.

"Of course not, just the instrument, when it was under the sea, it was damaged. Because of this, I didn't know how to open it with you before, I am afraid that you think we are broken," Terry said.

"Oh, there may be a little fault."

When the other person talks like this, he really can't find an excuse to pursue responsibility.

"That instrument, you can send someone to pick it up at any time. I personally thank the marching ant company for bringing the gospel to mankind against the earthquake. You are a great company. I have only said this to your company."

"Thank you for your compliment." Chen Mo smiled: "This time Mr. Terry came over himself, just because of this?"

"There is one more thing." Terry licked his hand and his face was serious: "I heard that your company will export seismographs. I want to know about this."

"Sorry, Mr. Terry." Zhao Min, next to him, interjected: "Our production is insufficient. In the future, we will not be able to meet the needs and will not be able to export for the time being."

Chen Mo had no comments on Zhao Min’s interjection, sitting and watching.

“But Mr. Terry values our company so much, and we are not uncomfortable.”

"President Zhao, do you have a way?" Terry immediately laughed: "We don't want much, we need two for the time being. We will import more if there is a need."

"There is one way." Zhao Min glanced at Chen Mo and smiled softly.

chapters.title: Chapter 162: : Seismograph Change Lithography Machine
chapters.body:
Chapter 162: : Seismograph Change Lithography Machine

"The seismograph is not exported for the time being, but we need an euV to do the experiment. We can exchange euV, we are happy to exchange with you." Zhao Min said.

Chen Mojing looked at it. If he could get a lithography machine and two more seismographs, he wouldn't mind.

"If Ambassador Terry feels impossible, then we can wait for our seismograph to export and come over and trade with us." Zhao Min said slowly.

"Mr. Zhao's condition makes me very powerless." Terry said: "We don't have euV, what about other conditions?"

"Others, our company is not lacking." Zhao Min shook his head: "I believe that Ambassador Terry will have a lot of magical powers and there will be ways to get it."

"Miss Zhao is really looking at me." Terry shook his head and smiled.

"In this case, Mr. Terry is going to be disappointed. You are still waiting for our company's seismographs to export. Come over, of course, if you place an order now, we will also accept it. Whenever possible, give you a seismograph. The price is Not expensive, $50 million."

Zhao Min said this, next to the female translator who came over Terry, listening to the corner of his mouth. The price is not expensive, 50 million US dollars?

If this is to be released, it will become a classic ‘small goal’.

After hearing the price, Terry's face was shaking. He heard about the price of the seismograph, but did not expect this price to be true.

“Can't the price be low?” Terry asked.

“No, it’s the same. Every country is this price. Our output is very low. We are not sure when we can place the order. But if there is a lithography machine, as long as the lithography machine arrives, we will immediately Some two are for you," said Zhao Min.

Terry is immersed in contemplation, which is a difficult problem.

They want seismographs, the main purpose is to study. The seismographs that were last collected were damaged. They didn't get much useful technology. This time they wanted a good seismograph to go back.

If the seismograph's operational warning mechanism is developed, they can produce seismographs. Compare this to the cutting-edge technology that many countries want.

“Can you show me your seismometer?” Terry didn’t respond to the first time. He needs to contact the country and reply further.

"There are models of seismographs in our company, you can take the Terry Ambassador to see." Zhao Min said.

"Ok."

The group went to the product exhibition area of the marching ant company.

In the company, with a specially set area to showcase the company's products. After visiting Terry, after leaving, Chen Mo and Zhao Min went to the office.

"The Americans took the initiative this time, what do you think?" Chen Mo asked.

"Push off the responsibility of fishing seismographs and get new seismographs. Their damage, not much research value, wants a new return, they want to study the technology of seismographs."

Zhao Min pointed to the focus of the problem.

"Is this seismograph for euV technology? Is there hope?" Chen Mo asked.

"He didn't refuse on the spot, he just hoped. I just used their eagerness to get a seismograph and traded with them. Even if they don't have a technical blockade, we will place an order for Asma, and it will take 21 months to get the lithography machine. This is a bit faster."

"It's better to open the news, use three seismographs, and exchange a lithography machine. Try it, maybe there is an unexpected gain." Chen Mo said.

Now the countries of the world, staring at the technology of the seismographs in his hands, are not one or two. The price thrown by the army ant company is too high, and the seismograph is not exported for a while, and many people have money and can't get it.

The marching ant company is willing to release the seismograph, and the companies that are interested will never be less.

"Yes, anyway, whoever exchanges is not necessarily the United States. There are many countries with lithography machines." Zhao Min nodded.

In the afternoon, the marching ant company was willing to use three seismographs in exchange for a euV news, which was officially announced.

The news immediately caught international attention.

The earthquake in the island nation has not really subsided yet.

The Fukushima nuclear leak became more serious in the earthquake, and the news that the United States took away the marching ant seismographs, causing the island countries and the American people to exchange each other, is still circulating on the Internet.

The seismograph was the biggest protagonist of the earthquake. Because of the emergence of seismographs, the earthquake became predictable, and the countries with many earthquake disasters were staring at the seismographs of the marching ant company.

Now the marching ant company exchanges the lithography machine with a seismograph and is immediately concerned by many media.

The domestic semiconductor industry has not developed, and it is not a poor chip design capability. It is also one of the reasons for the lack of high-end lithography machines.

The news of the marching ant company released a big signal: marching ants are preparing to enter the semiconductor market.

All the way, the army ants catch who is unlucky. For semiconductor companies, China has another potential opponent, which is a cold back.

Intel headquarters.

"What do you think of the ant company for the marching ant company?"

Paul looked at Barrett, the main seat of the conference room, and there were several other leaders or directors of Intel. Army ants want to enter the semiconductor field, they must develop new strategies to deal with.

This nest of ants, wherever they go, will make people feel scared.

"Don't worry, Paul." Barrett said: "The semiconductor field, not just a company, said it came in, but I am a bit interested in this seismograph."

"It's better to take out a euV and change them. If you can reverse the technology of the seismograph, the company's stock and reputation will be even higher." Sitting opposite Barrett, the hair has been grayed out, Intel Chairman Ann Di looked at the other people in the conference room.

His words, let all the people hold on.

"I also think that they can be considered. They just want a lithography machine. Although they are scarce, we have, and the next batch of goods is also shipped very quickly. In recent years, Europeans have embargoed on the Chinese embargo.

Ames has already shown signs of loosening. After two years, Huaxia people will have a lithography machine. We don’t need it here. We have one less, which has little impact on production, and we can buy one at any time. The youngest man on the field said. He is Wilson, the CEO of eA, and now the 12th director of Intel.

Other people on the field have also fallen into meditation. In recent years, many European countries have already lifted some technical embargoes against China. With the rise of China, this trend will become bigger and bigger. Now there are interests, they have no reason to look at it. .

If we use seismic instruments to study earthquake prediction technology, mastering the production of seismographs will have a great impact on the company's reputation and revenue. The marching ant company relies on this and becomes the same giant as them. The valuation is even more up to the sky.

Paul, the initiator of the conference, did not expect that the style of the conference was actually biased in this direction.

South Korea, Samsung headquarters conference room.

Sitting at the conference table are other executives of the Samsung Group. Everyone is sitting in danger and dare not have any big moves.

Li Jianxi looked at the seismograph on the projection and looked blank.

This thing is the seismograph that has been raging during this time. He is very interested in this technology, and if he can master the technology of the seismograph, the influence of the Samsung Group will become even bigger.

They are the shareholders of Asma, have the priority to pick up the goods, a euV, has little effect on them, the next batch of euV, will soon arrive. They have a bit of grudges with the marching ant company, but cooperation in the competition is the normal state of business survival.

There are no eternal enemies, only eternal interests.

Samsung is able to become a large group that controls the South Korean economy from a small trading company.

The seismographs of the marching ant company, each of which is $50 million, the news they know. High price monopoly, this is their favorite means, things are rare, and more money, this instrument that can predict disasters, those countries have to buy.

Originally, the marching ant company did not export seismographs to the outside world, and they could not get it at the moment. Now is another good opportunity, they will not let go.

The price of euV is 110 million US dollars, and the seismograph is 50 million US dollars. Even if three sets are returned and then sold to other countries, the business will not lose.

"People and the army ant company contact, tell them that we are willing to exchange with them, but we want four." Li Jianxi said.

chapters.title: Chapter 163: : Lithography Machine To Hand
chapters.body:
Chapter 163: : Lithography Machine To Hand

Intel, Samsung and the two companies are willing to exchange seismographs. This answer is beyond Chen Mo’s expectations.

Originally thought that there is a company that is willing to exchange, they are already very happy, because their purpose is to get the lithography machine. There are two companies now, and he is asking for it.

The cost of the seismograph is not high, and he will not mind if he has a lithography machine.

"The two companies all want four seismographs, and there are no other requirements," said Zhao Min.

"Four sets? They don't suffer." Chen Mo said: "Change with them, anyway, this is not bad."

Now that the news has not been published for a long time, the two companies have contacted them. The meaning is obvious. They use seismographs to study earthquake warning technology.

"Okay." Zhao Min immediately agreed.

Seismographs are used for export. Since they dare to export, they are naturally not afraid of technical leaks. The core chip, the algorithm inside and the seismograph system are all encrypted. It is almost impossible to get the algorithm, so Chen Mo is not afraid that they can imitate the seismograph.

Even if all the hardware is built, there is no core algorithm and seismograph system, it is just a shell, no effect.

Both parties want to change, so they traded with the two companies and did not receive any resistance. South Korea and the United States want to get seismographs, marching ants and Huaxia want lithography machines, all of which are cutting-edge technology, and both sides need it, so the exchanges are not restricted by the three governments.

Two weeks later, the exchange between the two sides was successfully completed.

Chi Shangjiang sat in the reception room of Intel Corporation. His face was red and with a smile. It seemed to have a big happy event.

Not long after, seeing Paul walk in, the face of Ikegami River, immediately like a blooming chrysanthemum. It’s more like welcoming the arrival of the host.

"President Paul, I am very happy to meet you."

On the charming face of Ikegami, Paul despised in his heart and did not show it: "Is the Ambassador of the Pool personally come over, what is it?"

Paul's mood is also good, because the smooth exchange with the army ants company to get seismographs, their company's stock price has risen in the past few days, Intel's market value is also rising, the impact of seismographs, beyond his expectations.

Now only get seismographs, their market value has been optimistic, if the earthquake warning technology is really handed, their company will definitely be in his hands, rising to another height.

"President Paul, this time, I want to ask about the seismograph. Can you sell a seismograph to us?" Chishangjiang is not nonsense, he smiles and enters the subject, and he speaks cautiously and is afraid of offending people.

"Seismometer? I need to consider this matter," Paul said.

If the seismographs are sold to the islanders, this means that their research will have one more competitor, which they do not want to see. Although the island countries are small, the research capabilities are definitely stronger than their one company. Now sell the seismographs to the islanders, they are making wedding dresses for others.

"President Paul, when can I have a reply? This price is good, we are willing to bid $100 million to buy one." Chi Shangjiang said.

Now there is an urgent need for seismographs in the island country. Who is uncertain, when will the next earthquake come over? After the last big earthquake, there were two large aftershocks, and their losses were not small.

They need seismographs in any country.

"Like this, I will reply you later." Paul thought about it.

The same scene happened in South Korea.

The island country can't wait to get a seismograph, but the island government has no lithography machine and can't exchange with the army ant company. The army ant company is not selling it for a while, only two ideas can be played.

The two companies that just got the seismograph did not trade with the island nation. The seismographs that they spent so much on their minds could not be handed over to the island nation to make a wedding dress for the island nation.

at the same time.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min walked in the park of the company headquarters. Now the company headquarters is undergoing the final renovation. The park has a basic prototype.

Building a headquarters industrial park, plus rushing to work, cost them a lot of money.

The headquarters of the marching ant company is called the nest, which is the nest of the marching ants. The ring structure of the headquarters is like an ant nest, not too high, but the floor space is large. The low-profile version of the nest, but the shape is different, is not steel structure, the outside is wrapped in irregular glass, beautiful.

In addition to the basic office area, there are restaurants, supermarkets, gyms and function rooms, as well as internal meeting rooms and external meeting rooms.

Each area, like the cavern in the nest, the inside of the ring, and various passages, leads to each area. The center of the ring is a green area, which looks like a glass-built nest.

Next to the headquarters building, there is another form of nest, which is an independent research institute with a connecting channel between the headquarters and the headquarters.

There are also factory workshops, warehouses and staff quarters in the park. The planning of the headquarters is for 10,000 people to stay and work.

It is now in the final stage, and it will take several months to get into use.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min, at this time, the Institute is in the past.

The two lithography machines exchanged by the seismograph were airlifted back. Because it is a special instrument, after returning to the airport, it will be transported back to the research institute at headquarters through emergency procedures.

"Because our temporary headquarters, there is no constant temperature room, it was shipped back here. Now the lithography machine is being placed in a constant temperature container and sent to the underground thermostatic chamber of the institute." Zhao Min introduced.

They don't have to worry about security issues. At the beginning of the construction of the park, the institute and the headquarters building were built with priority. The research institute and the headquarters building, the renovation has been completed, and many experimental equipment is also installed.

To be precise, the headquarters building and the research institute can be put into use now, but the staff quarters have not been completely renovated, so it takes three to four months to stay.

“In the Institute, there are security guards, monitoring and security systems, which are similar to the temporary headquarters. Annan and Black Hawk are responsible for security here, and all security personnel are veterans.”

Chen Mo listened carefully to Zhao Min's introduction. Soon, the group entered the institute. No one is staying now, and the institute looks a little empty.

After the lithography machine was in the clean room, after wearing protective clothing, several talents entered the institute.

In the second-floor basement of the institute, Chen Mo successfully saw the lithography machine in the constant temperature room, which did not look big, and there was a clear logo of Asma.

The two lithography machines are added together and none of them are large. This kind of lithography machine is composed of 50,000 parts. Once, Huaxia tried its best and did not have the equipment available.

"The packaging machine has a melting furnace, which is being purchased. With the lithography machine, other machines are much simpler to buy," said Zhao Min.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded and looked at the packaging machine: "Can the machine work normally?"

“The technicians checked it, no problem.” Zhao Min said.

"That's good."

For the two machines, they took a lot of effort, and now they have saved a lot of trouble.

At least his superconducting chip research can go smoothly without worrying that the technology is too backward. With superconducting chips, the research on superconducting supercomputers is not much hindrance.

But all this, after staying at the headquarters, can only begin.

After checking the lithography machine, he strolled around the headquarters campus, and Chen Mo and Zhao Min and others rushed back to the company's office building.

chapters.title: Chapter 164: : Semi-Smart Computer Virus
chapters.body:
Chapter 164: : Semi-Smart Computer Virus

Jiangnan City, a network cafe.

Lin Shu put down the mouse in his hand, took a bottle of iced cola from the refrigerator, and hurriedly ran past the 83rd machine. After handing over the cola to the young man who is playing the game, he ran back to the service desk and set his sights on the computer screen.

She has been working as a temporary worker for a few months.

Lin Shu can think of the few ways to make money, and the bonus of the marching ant company computer programming competition is her only hope.

The reward rules for the marching ant company computer design competition have all come out.

The first prize is one, the prize is 2 million, and the price of the purchased software is calculated separately. The second prize is two, the prize is 800,000, the third prize is five, and the prize is 300,000. The consolation prize is 10,000.

She only needs to get the top eight, it is possible to get a bonus, and the younger brother has money for treatment.

Since she decided to learn the Chinese programming language, she has been immersed in the world of Chinese programming languages every day for several months.

There is no computer at home, she can only come to the Internet cafe to work, use the computer.

Because she is still a student, Internet cafes are not willing to hire her. I asked for several, and the owner of this Internet cafe promised her to let her stay part-time and do hourly work.
