It is not far from the school, and every day after school, come here to help. When there are many people, fill the network fee, send drinks, sit in front of the computer when you are free, and learn Chinese programming language.

To this end, she also deliberately added a group of Chinese programming languages to learn from others' experiences.

In the past few months, Lin Shu has come here every day, and the wind and rain are unimpeded. It is not until 11 o'clock in the evening to go back. The Chinese ant company's updated Chinese character programming language textbook, she has bought, a total of three sets, for which it also spent the only amount of money accumulated.

When you are in class, read the book on Chinese programming languages. After class, come here to watch the instructional videos and then learn the programming software.

The tutorials and videos published by the marching ant company, she came back and forth, and looked at it no less than five times. It’s very tired to learn, but there is a hope in my heart that keeps her going. If you persist, your brother will have hope.

In the computer programming competition of the marching ant company, she didn't have a heart. If she wanted to participate, she had to program a software. In the exchange group, what she saw was prepared in a team manner.

A few months of sleepless nights, from a novice to a Chinese programming language to a master of the current master.

Now on the computer, there is her hard work during this time.

Ant-like Chinese character programming code occupies the compiler. Seeing the code above, Lin Shu’s heart began to calm down and continued to focus on the code.

Large-scale game, she can't design, she is designing an anti-virus software, hoping to succeed. As long as she succeeds, she is then taken by the marching ant company, and she has hope to cure her brother.

Today is an important day.

The code she wrote is about to complete the prototype. As long as the prototype can be successfully repaired, this anti-virus software is the software she saw in the marching ant company Chinese character programming language programming contest.

Two hours later, Lin Shu stopped his movements. After detecting the error correction, Lin Shu looked at the code on the compiler and had a bad feeling.

Somehow, she felt terrified. May be too nervous, Lin Shu comforted himself.

After saving the code, Lin Shu can't wait to build the app.

There are many people in the Internet cafes this weekend, many of whom are students. In addition to occasionally someone coming over to recharge, buy a drink, no one noticed her counter, next to the network management, is also playing with the phone intently.

At this point, Lin Shu raised his heart and placed the mouse on the icon of the application, and the heartbeat began to accelerate. Finally, double-click on the app and your eyes close together.

Time seemed to be still, Lin Shu slowly opened his eyes and saw the empty table, she held it.

Missed?

Oh...

The next second, the Internet cafe began to be noisy, all the computers, one after the other, the screen all jumped out. Playing the game, at the most critical moment, the game screen disappeared and the person in the seat immediately jumped up.

"Webmaster, what happened? What happened? How did the game fall?"

"Grass! We are in the black position, and we are playing the last big crystal."

"I am eating the chicken final..."

"@#¥%"

Various buzzing sounds, the entire game interface of the entire Internet cafe, all disappeared, each person has an angry color on his face.

"The icons disappeared one by one, as if they were viruses."

After a scream, everyone focused on the computer screen. Sure enough, the icons on the desktop of the computer disappeared one by one. After all the icons disappeared, the picture was stuck and the mouse could not move.

The webmaster who is playing the mobile phone wakes up instantly, panicking and looking at the computer host computer, and surely sees the icons on the computer desktop disappearing one by one.

"You wait, I ask what is going on." The network administrator dialed the phone while restarting the computer.

However, the host just turned on, still an empty desktop, without an icon. After the other computers are turned on, they are also all desktops, and all the software disappears.

Lin Shu looked at the application of the only anti-virus program on her computer desktop, and her eyes were flustered.

It seems that you have a big disaster.

"Lin Shu, what is your desktop software?" Next to the network management, I just got ready to use Lin Shu's computer to test the problem and immediately saw the only anti-virus program on the desktop.

Outside the Internet cafe, the same server computer, the same symptoms. This situation quickly spread to all corners of Jiangnan City.

Chen Mo is synthesizing room temperature superconducting materials in the laboratory.

Chip design, ink girl combined with the chip design layout of other companies, after this time, 24 hours a day to optimize and modify, simulation, and now the layout design has been completed, the next step is to verify the chip design.

Now that the lithography machine is in place, other devices are on the way, and these things don't take him to worry, Zhao Min will help him arrange it.

What he has to do now is to synthesize more normal temperature superconducting materials, purify silicon carbon, and when all the equipment arrives, he can start making superconducting chips.

There is no need to worry about the seismometer now.

The networking of seismographs in China is rapidly expanding. With the support of the state, every time a group of seismographs are produced, they will be sent to earthquakes frequently and installed in densely populated areas.

During the period, a 5.1-magnitude earthquake was successfully predicted, promptly reminded that no casualties were caused and the losses were within the minimum range.

With this successful prediction, the people have more confidence in the seismograph and are more convinced of the seismograph. Every time a seismograph comes to a place, it will be welcomed by the road.

Domestic networking, experts from the National Academy of Sciences, specifically choose the address and location, these things, do not worry about them, the marching ant company needs to do is to produce seismographs, and to ensure the quality of the seismograph can be.

As for foreign countries, first complete the domestic networking, and then think about the export of seismographs.

While Chen Mo is purifying pure silicon carbon, the voice of the ink girl interrupted Chen Mo’s action: “Merg brother, a new semi-intelligent computer virus appeared in Jiangnan City.”

"what?"

Chen Mo stopped the action in his hand.

Semi-smart computer virus? He was the first to hear the virus.

"There is a semi-intelligent computer virus in Jiangnan City, and the virus is programmed in the Chinese character programming language," said the ink girl.

"Chinese-language programming language programming? Semi-smart virus? Is there any special place?" Chen Mo was immediately attracted by the words of the ink girl.

"It has a small piece of program code, which belongs to the category of intelligent program code. The virus is a network virus. The code of the anti-virus program is wrong. The enemy and the enemy are not divided. All the software is treated as a virus to kill. Most importantly, it has a little intelligence. The computer that can automatically spread through the network and infect the regional network is a semi-intelligent virus. Now in Jiangnan City, nearly 20 million computers have been infected with this virus in just 20 minutes."

"So serious?" Chen Mo was shocked by this number, and his face was cautious: "Stop the spread of the virus and transfer the information of the producer of the virus."

chapters.title: Chapter 165: Grandpa, Don'T Cry! (Complement)
chapters.body:
Chapter 165: Grandpa, Don'T Cry! (Complement)

Jiangnan City was attacked by computer viruses, in less than half an hour, infected nearly 10,000 computers. Such a big news was immediately noticed by the media in Jiangnan City.

The spread of the virus almost broke the record.

In half an hour, more than 20 companies, half of the entire Internet cafes in Jiangnan City were infected with computer viruses, and there were many personal computers.

In the Internet cafe, the video that Lin Shu was taken away by the police was also popped up by people watching inside the Internet cafe. When the video comes out, it attracts more attention.

The young girl who is less than 18 years old is the protagonist of this virus incident, and many people are not as good as they are. Now the virus is still spreading, but the speed has not started so fast, and there are still information about people infected with viruses from time to time.

At present, there is no anti-virus software that can kill this virus. The Public Security Bureau has issued a network security warning. The virus spreads through the network, and the computer that infects the regional network, as long as the server is infected, the network connected to the entire service area will also suffer.

Lin Shu sat in the chair and his body trembled uncontrollably. Opposite her, Ning Qiuyu and Wu Chao, two young men and one woman, the two calmly looked at Lin Shu.

They have already investigated that the computer virus produced by Lin Shu, according to incomplete statistics, infected nearly 10,000 computers in less than 30 minutes.

This new type of computer virus, the ability to spread is horrible, this is the most horrible computer they have ever seen. If you can't find a solution in time, the entire computer in Jiangnan City will suffer.

Fortunately, the computer virus did not invade the traffic control system and banking system of the Public Security Bureau, but only infected ordinary computers without protection systems, otherwise the nature of this matter will become more serious.

"Why are you making a computer virus?" Wu Chao asked.

Next to him, Ning Qiuyu quietly wrote a transcript.

"I am making anti-virus software. I don't know if it is a virus. I didn't mean it."

Lin Shu’s eyes were red, not only because he was arrested, but also because of the software failure, and her brother’s surgery fee was not settled.

"Why do you do anti-virus software?" Wu Chao no expression, continue to ask.

"I want to see the programming competition of the marching ant company. I want to get the bonus and treat my brother. The younger brother needs surgery."

“Is there any way to kill the virus?”

They tried, all anti-virus software, installed into the infected computer, the final result is that the anti-virus software disappeared on the desktop, a trace can not be found.

Tens of thousands of computers, this influence has already made people feel terrible. If it is a network that invades the government, this kind of communication capability will cause the entire government office network in Jiangnan City to fall into the middle.

The infected computer, like a blank machine, cannot install any application software.

Now Jiangnan City's media have set their sights on their public security bureau, hoping that they can give a statement as soon as possible.

"I don't know where the program is going wrong. How to check and kill, I need to think about what went wrong." Lin Shu bit his lip and try to keep his tears back.

"What about the virus program?" Wu Chao still looks blank.

"I saved it to the cloud disk." Lin Shu said.

"account password."

Asked about the police, Lin Shu knows everything and explains everything. She now only hopes to alleviate her sin. Thinking of the grandfather who was worried about day and night, Lin Shu’s tears continued to fall.

"Comrade comrades, will you make a mistake? Xiao Shu is usually very embarrassed and will not do bad things."

Inside the police station, a shabby old man looked nervously at the police officer in front of him. Hearing that Lin Shu was arrested at the police station, he almost couldn’t come up.

At this time, the old man, his hands or dirt, did not have time to wash his hands, and rushed over here.

"She has admitted that the computer virus was made by her. We haven't determined this yet. You are her grandfather. Do you know she is making a computer virus?"

"I don't know what a computer virus is. I only know that Xiaoshu is definitely not harmful. It must be a misunderstanding. Police comrades, I beg you, let Xiaoshu, she still has school, and will take the college entrance examination next June. The old man blinked red: "I beg you to let her go, or her future will be ruined."

"I beg the police uncle, let go of my sister, my sister is not a bad person." The little boy who was brought by the old man shouted milk.

Seeing the worn-out, pure-eyed little boy, everyone was sour.

"It's okay, little brother, we investigate clearly, your sister can go back." A policewoman squatted down and smiled with a smile: "What is the name of the younger brother?"

"My name is Lin Changsheng, Grandpa said, this name can make me grow up healthily," said the little boy.

"He and Xiao Shu are the children I adopted. They are all orphans. When I was born, I was less than two years old. I just learned to walk. I stood next to the trash can and cried my mother.

There is a letter on his body that reads his date of birth and basic information. He has congenital heart disease, more serious, the treatment fee is more than 80,000, and there has been no money for treatment.

A few months ago, Xiao Shu said that she wanted to participate in any company computer game and get a bonus to her brother. Xiao Shu, I watched her grow up, she would never do bad things, beg you to let her go, she still has school. The old man blinked red and touched the boy's head.

"Grandpa, don't cry. The police sister said that my sister is fine." The little boy said to his head.

This scene, let everyone on the field, a hot eye.

The virus incident was spread throughout the country in the news of the day.

The virus is still spreading. I don't know why, the speed of communication has not started so crazy, but it still exists. Major Internet security companies have no way to deal with this virus.

The Chinese character programming language is a programming language that has just come out of the marching ant company. There are not many people who are interested in it. Those network security technicians didn't even understand the program.

Wang Zhi with glasses carefully looked at the program code of this virus incident. They tried it out with a computer and it was indeed the procedure of this virus incident.

Among the network security personnel, he is one of the few people who learn Chinese programming languages, but he is amateur and has no professional research.

The Chinese character programming language is a brand new computer language that you have to learn for a long time. Nowadays, the work is urgent, and there are not too many breaks in normal times. I will not go to learn Chinese programming languages when I am free.

The virus incident, the location of the outbreak is Jiangnan City, let them Jiangnan City exposed a face in China. As a network security officer with many years of experience, the procedures written by a little girl are helpless and they are hit hard. If advanced hackers do, they are not so upset.

“Are you finding a killing method?” asked a majestic middle-aged man.

"Secretary, I haven't found a way to kill." Wang Zhi shook his head: "The virus program is written by the Chinese character programming language. This language, the army ant company did not release it for a long time, there are not many people who know, I only know the fur. Technical help The marching ant company is the best choice."

chapters.title: Chapter 166: :Thank You
chapters.body:
Chapter 166: :Thank You

Jiangnan Hotel.

Lan Xin looked up at the luxury hotel and secretly screamed. Staying here for one night, the cheapest room, there are thousands. Is the employee of the marching ant company extravagant to this point?

But now is not the time to think about it, they technically help the marching ant company, I wanted to send people to the coastal city, and the people who came to the army ant company came in person. It must be said that the acting style of the marching ant company is indeed different from ordinary people.

Not long after, Lan Xin saw four people coming towards her side. After seeing the people coming, Lan Xin’s look flashed incredible.

Chen Mo, the big boss of the marching ant company, and his legendary girlfriend He Xiaoyu. She couldn’t think of what the marching ant company said was actually their big boss.

Is the Jiangnan City Bureau so face-up, will the army ants company’s amnesty come over?

In an instant, Lan Xin will get rid of this idea.

Even the top leader of Jiangnan City may not be able to bring in the big boss of the marching ant company.

"Hello, are you coming to pick me up?"

Chen Mo stopped in front of Lan Xin with a smile.

"Oh, yes." Lan Xin hurriedly nodded: "Mr. Chen please get on the bus."

Chen Mo nodded and got into the car. Xiao Yu followed closely and sat down beside him. This is a medium-sized business car, four people plus Lanxin, not crowded.

"How is the virus now?" Chen Mo asked.

"The speed of transmission is slow, but it is still spreading. There is still no anti-virus software that can kill this virus. We are not proficient in the Chinese programming language, and we are a little helpless about this virus." Lan Xin did not hide.

"Ok."

Chen Mo did not have an accident. He told the ink girl to stop the virus from spreading wildly and did not completely stop its spread. Just don't let it infect hospitals, banks and governments. As long as the government department and the national security department are not affected, the crime will not be too large.

The semi-intelligent virus that Moh said is not the same as the current computer virus. This kind of virus can automatically spread through the network, and the current firewall is useless to it.

Think of a firewall as a wall. This semi-smart virus, like a living bug, can easily find the hole and drill into the wall. It’s not that the ink girl stopped it. This bug will completely infect the entire computer in Jiangnan City.

He can kill this bug, but he didn't.

This is an excellent opportunity to promote the Chinese programming language, and it is more useful than the propaganda of their marching ant company.

About twenty minutes, the car entered the Public Security Bureau.

Just getting off the bus, Chen Mo saw a man with a majestic look. He saw the policeman and knew the top leader in the bureau.

Gan Cheng saw Chen Mo and immediately greeted him. The marching ant company only said that someone was already in Jiangnan City, and did not say that it was the big boss of the marching ant company.

It wasn't Lan Xin who sent the information back. He didn't know that the big boss of the marching ant company actually came over.

"Mr. Chen, you can come over in person. It’s great." Gan Cheng greeted him and took Chen Mo’s hand.

"Director, hello." Chen Mo also smiled.

"Now this virus is bothering us. It is spreading in society now, it is a bit troublesome." Gan Cheng said.

"Can you take me to see the girl first?" Chen Mo said.

"Yes." Gan Cheng nodded immediately and walked into the bureau with Chen Mo: "This girl is Lin Shu, a student of Jiangnan No. 1 Middle School."

Lin Shu’s face is stunned, and now she doesn’t know what to do. The last time I saw Grandpa crying in front of her, she was anxious and overwhelmed. Now that Grandpa is old, he is a crime. She is worried that Grandpa can't stand the excitement.

Sitting in the room, Lin Shu bit his lip, his eyes have no focal length. After a while, after the door was opened, she subconsciously looked at the door.

After entering three people, two men and one woman, Lin Shu stayed after seeing the face of the coming person.

This face, she is no stranger. Chen Mo, the big boss of the marching ant company, is the founder of the Chinese character programming language and is regarded as the most talented person in China.

She wondered if there was an illusion and imagined that a hero could come to save her.

It’s just a girl who can’t be ordinary, how can Chen Mo’s character come to see her? Self-deprecating in my heart, my eyes are nailed to Chen Mo.

"Hello, my name is Chen Mo." Chen Mo sat down in front of Lin Shu: "You don't have to worry, we are here to help you."

After Chen Mo opened, Lin Shu had a godless eyes and slowly lit up.

Not an illusion?

Lin Shu looked at Chen Mo, his eyes were a little late.

"Hello, my name is Chen Mo." Chen Mo saw that Lin Shu did not respond and spoke again.

"You... hello." Lin Shu bit his lip, his eyes were a little red, and he didn't know what to say.

"Can you tell me the reason for this?" Chen Mo said.

"I want to participate in the computer programming competition of the marching ant company, and design an anti-virus software with the Chinese programming language. I don't know what went wrong, it becomes a virus now. I didn't deliberately spread it, I really didn't mean it." Lin Shu said, tears in the corner of his eyes.

"Don't cry, we are here to help you." Xiaoyu couldn't bear it. He took out a paper towel and handed it to Lin Shu.

“How long have you been learning the Chinese character programming language?” Chen Mo asked.

"Chinese character programming language came out, I started to learn. I read the textbooks in the classroom, I didn't have a computer at home, I usually went to the Internet cafe to do the hourly work, and practice programming with the computer of the Internet cafe. I just want to participate in the competition and take the bonus to my brother to treat the disease. I didn't mean it. of."

Chen Mo looked at the middle-aged man with gold wire glasses and a thin face. He is a lawyer of the Law Department of the Army Ant Company, Li Huai, a senior lawyer.

"Boss, due to unskilled or mistaken operation techniques, the data, applications and data stored, processed or transmitted by computer information systems are damaged, and does not constitute a crime of destroying computer information systems.

She is a consequence of negligence, non-subjective intentional crime, no gain of any benefit from it, lack of subjective elements of crime, so she will not have something. Li Huai pushed the glasses and said.

When I heard Li Huai’s words, Lin Shu’s eyes immediately convinced him.

"But it is best to prove that she is writing anti-virus software, technical errors, this is the case. This evidence is more favorable." Li Huai said.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded and looked at Lin Shu: "Have you heard it? When the police recorded the confession, did you say that?"

Lin Shu focused on nodding, his eyes have been placed on Chen Mo's face, full of hope.

"Then you can rest assured here and you will be able to go out soon." Chen Mo smiled.

"Thank you." Lin Shu looked at Chen Mo and said with gratitude: "I will definitely repay you."

"When you come out, thank me again. Now I need to go out and give you proof of innocence."

After Chen Mo finished, he got up and left. Seeing Chen Mo’s back, Lin Shu’s fist clenched, and tears did not listen to it: “Thank you.”

When Chen Mo walked out of the room, he looked at Gan Cheng: "Now show me the program she wrote."

As soon as he spoke, Gan set up to lead him and walked in a room. Now Chen Mo wants to help, he is asking for it.

chapters.title: Chapter 167: : Selling Your Debts?
chapters.body:
Chapter 167: : Selling Your Debts?

Chen Mo is not the first time to see the program. He also saw this program when he asked the ink girl to collect Lin Shu’s information.

Other technicians are watching Chen Mo, and seeing the big boss of the marching ant company personally, this opportunity is rare.

"This is an anti-virus software." Chen Mo looked at Gan Cheng: "The very clever anti-virus software, just made a mistake, let it become a demon from angels."

"How do you say that?" Gan Cheng asked.

"Writing such a long code, there is an error, it is inevitable. She also made a mistake when writing. This mistake makes the software powerfully contagious. When the software is judged as a virus, the software disappears one by one. Situation." Chen Mo said.

“Is there any way to stop it from spreading?” Gan Cheng asked.

"It's very simple, use this anti-virus software to kill the wrong program. Just modify these pieces of code a bit."

Chen Mo deleted some of the code and revised it. It didn't take ten minutes to stop.

"Yes, now you only need to install this program on the computer with the virus, and you can use the original program to kill it."

Chen Mo copies the generated program and puts it on another infected computer. After the successful killing, Chen Mo plugged in the Internet and connected to the network.

Everyone is afraid, if they are infected with the internal network of the Public Security Bureau, then the fun will be big. However, the situation they thought did not appear, and the hearts of the people were put down.

The first software was downloaded and installed, not disappearing as before, they believed that the virus had been killed.

"Get it done." Chen Mo stood up: "Now you can release this program for free, temporarily free of charge, and someone will take back its ownership in the future. You should not pass the program code, otherwise it is infringing."

The latter technicians face each other.

Their helpless virus software, Chen Molai came here, less than half an hour, all done, this is the gap, or use the virus software they think.

"Now things have been solved, when can the girl go out? Because the technical mistakes have caused the present consequences, and they have not caused national security, technology leaks, and it does not constitute a crime. If you want to sue her, I will let my lawyer, Follow up on this case."

Chen Mo’s words made everyone on the field surprised.

"Mr. Chen, are you related to that girl?" Gan Cheng asked.

"When she comes out, she will become an employee of the marching ant company as long as she is willing."

"It seems that she is so lucky that Mr. Chen can come over personally."

Gan Cheng also saw Chen Mo’s determination and felt that this girl was indeed lucky. The consequences of technical errors do not constitute a crime. However, the impact of this matter is too great and the necessary civil compensation.

"Mr. Chen, it’s rare to come once, how about going to my cup of tea? It’s a thank you for technical support.” Gan Cheng turned the subject.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded.

Chatting with Gan Cheng and refusing his invitation to be a guest, Chen Mo left the Public Security Bureau with Xiao Yu and others.

The virus-killing software was quickly released, along with the announcement, as well as the investigation of the virus incident.

Once the news was announced, it was reported by major media.

The virus is programmed in the Chinese character programming language, and the common anti-virus software cannot detect the killing. The incident was also caused by a technical error.

After a few months of silence in the Chinese character programming language, this situation occurred when it appeared. The software written in the Chinese character programming language perfectly bypasses the computer's firewall and invades the computer, which makes people have to sigh.

When the news came out, the marching ant company published an article.

"Network security is no longer there. 》

When the article came out, it immediately attracted the crowds of many media. The sentence in the article is particularly eye-catching.

Pandora's box has been opened, and in the near future, the virus program written in the Chinese programming language will unscrupulously invade the existing computer system.

This sentence, the meaning is very obvious.

Computer viruses written in Chinese programming languages will become the main source of new computer viruses in the future. Existing computer systems and anti-virus software will not stop the spread of this virus.

Many of these words of the marching ant company will be suspicious, but they have to be vigilant. The computer virus that appeared in the first Chinese programming language infected tens of thousands of computers in half an hour, which is a good proof of its strength.

Lin Shu walked out of the Public Security Bureau and his face was relaxed. After experiencing this, she feels a lot of growth.

Just want to leave, a car stopped in front of them.

Seeing the people coming down from the car, Lin Shu settled, his eyes stopped on two figures, it was Chen Mo and Xiao Yu who helped her this time.

"Hello." Chen Mo smiled.

"Hello, thank you." Lin Shu took a deep sigh: "I will definitely repay you."

"The last time you said thank you, you won't have to repay." Chen Mo said: "This time I want to talk to you."

"You said, as long as I can do it, I must do it." Lin Shu said.

"Here is 500,000, the password is the last six cards, for you." Chen Mo took out a bank card and handed it to Lin Shu.

When I saw the bank card and thought of something, Lin Shu’s face was ruddy, biting her lip and looking at the small fish, and did not reach for it.

"This is the money to buy your software. Your anti-virus software is sold to our company."

"Oh...oh." Realizing the misunderstanding, Lin Shu hurriedly turned red: "You help me this time, the software is for you, I don't want it."

Said so, Lin Shu's eyes are still staring at the bank card. She is very eager for the money and treats her brother.

Chen Mo did not recover the bank card.

"Then, when I lend it to you, I will pay back later."

"But I have no money." Lin Shu hearted.

"Then sell your debts..."

After Chen Mogang finished speaking, he screamed and almost jumped from the ground. Xiao Yu took a look at him.

"He is joking. What he means is that if you want, you can work in a marching ant company. These are paid as wages and paid to you in advance."

“Can I enter the marching ant company?” Lin Shu’s face was amazed and his eyes were red.

"Your Chinese programming language is very good, you can enter, but you should go to college first, and when you have time, help the company develop software.

Our company's senior software program staff, the monthly salary is starting at 50,000. So you don't have to worry about not getting money, you can't do it either. This is the money to buy your anti-virus software. ”

"Thank you... Xie, I will definitely pay you back." Lin Shu took the bank card in the hands of Chen Mo, his eyes were grateful and complicated.

"Don't thank me, be confident, you are very good."

Seeing the back of Chen Mo and Xiao Yu, Lin Shu slammed the bank card and his tears continued to fall: "I will repay you if I am a cow."

After that, Lin Shu took the bank card and ran back home.

On the road, Xiao Yu was holding Chen Mo’s arm and his eyes were very bad: “Selling for debts? I eat you, live with you, do you want to sell your debts?”

"You are a kitten, it is already mine." Chen Mo laughed.

"Who is yours?" The original little temper disappeared instantly, and a smile appeared on his face. For Chen Mo's little love words, her immunity is zero.

"Not yet? Then work hard, I want to eat fish tonight..."

chapters.title: Chapter 168: : Brewing
chapters.body:
Chapter 168: : Brewing

Inside the hotel room.

Xiao Yu was wearing a pajamas sitting on the sofa, eating snacks and watching TV quietly. Chen Mo was blowing her hair. Every time I wash my head, as long as Chen Mo is around, Chen Mo helps her to blow. Although things are small, it is a tacit understanding between the two.

"Chen Mo, do you know the virus incident, the Public Security Bureau will ask us for help?" Xiao Yu said, asking the doubts of his heart.

Before the Jiangnan Municipal Bureau contacted the army ant company, they had arrived in Jiangnan City. Moreover, Li also came over together. Chen Mo seems to know in advance that the Jiangnan Municipal Bureau will provide technical assistance to the marching ant company.

"I have the power of the prophet, do you believe it or not?"

"I believe you have a ghost," said Xiao Yu.

"Actually, I came over and didn't know that they would ask for help. This time, there are two purposes." Chen Mo said: "The first purpose is to take you out for a few days. I have been so tired recently, take a few days off. ""

Hearing the concern in Chen Mo's words, Xiao Yu's eyes showed the color of joy.

"The second purpose is to come over and help the girl once. She is a rare talent. After spending a few months, she will thoroughly understand the Chinese programming language. If she pulls it, she will definitely be a programming expert. And this virus A bit special."

"What is special?" asked Xiao Yu.

"This virus belongs to the category of semi-smart virus. Her software has a piece of code and belongs to smart code, so the virus is very special and spreads very fast. When I was in Binhai City, I intervened, otherwise half of Jiangnan City To be infected."

“So serious?” Xiao Yu was shocked.

"So I said that the girl is a personal talent, actually wrote a smart code. If it does not help her, her life is probably ruined. A thought of heaven and hell, like the program, write a few lines of code, from anti-virus software Become a virus program."

"Help others, and then let people sell you to pay debts?" Xiao Yuqi sour, like a smile and looked at Chen Mo: "Traveling with me is a fake, help the girl is the real purpose of your coming here. ?"

"Hey? How do I smell a sour taste? The taste of vinegar." Chen Mo put down the hair dryer and smelled it on Xiao Yu.

"Get out of the way, I am not jealous." Xiao Yu pushed Chen Mo's head and his face was reddish.

Chen Mo grabbed Xiao Yu on his thigh: "Now things have been solved. I will take you to the mountains to play with water tomorrow. I heard that the scenery in Jiangnan is beautiful, but I will eat sweet and sour fish tonight."

"You...oh..."

After losing his helmet and abandoning the armor, Xiao Yu was picked up by Chen Mo and entered the room.

......

Wang Zhizheng seriously looked at the teaching video of the Chinese character programming language.

The virus incident has dealt a lot with him.

As a technician working in cybersecurity, it is a kind of crit damage to the program written by a high school girl.

This incident, the marching ant company gave them technical support, but does not mean that the marching ant company will provide them with free technical support next time. The employees of the marching ant company are not recruiting to work for them.

A similar situation arises, and their technicians may be smashed again.

As excited as he is, there are several other technicians. They want to break their heads and can't solve them. Chen Mo only took less than ten minutes to get it easily. This is the technology gap.

Now I have no work at hand, and I am free to learn Chinese programming language.

This new computer language, I saw it when I first came out, learned a little, was not proficient, and did not see the teaching video. Look again, it seems to feel very good.

Just as he focused on teaching video, suddenly, the computer's screen began to flash. Wang Zhi, who watched the video, was sober and awake, and he had not waited for him to react. The computer was black. There is a mask on the screen, half gray, half shadow, red pupil, evil smile looks more like ridicule, very awkward.

This kind of logo, they saw it for the first time, it was impossible to identify which hacker organization was the symbol.

"I grass you #@¥"

Wang Zhi couldn't help but swear. Just after the virus incident, his incompetence has been very frustrating. At this time, the **** hacker came to repair the knife and invade the system in the bureau.

The computer screens of other staff members also showed a black screen and a black and half white mask appeared.

"Hurry up, work, guys."

Wang Zhi's expression is dignified, and the other party quietly invades, absolutely only the first-class master can do it. The aftermath of the virus incident has not passed, and then the incident has occurred, and the rice bowl is difficult to protect. The other party's invasion of their system at this time is simply a provocation of red fruit.

"Tracking the other's location."

"It's all fake addresses, and the other party uses the downtime."

Every technician has a 12-point spirit. For them, this is the battlefield, full of invisible smoke.

After five minutes, the computer returned to normal, but no one had the joy of winning. The air has become quiet in the office.

"Look at what files are missing." Wang Zhi took the lead.

Others started checking the computer and soon heard a voice: "The program code file for the virus event was copied."

"Other documents are in good condition."

The other party is coming from this virus program code?

Everyone has a huge doubt in mind. There are a lot of files in the bureau, and the other party only takes the virus code, which is very strange.

"The Secretary has come."

I don't know who said it, the atmosphere is quiet.

"What happened?" After Gan Cheng came in, his look was dignified.

"The network was hacked and it has now returned to normal. The code of the virus event has been copied and other files have not been lost." Wang Zhi said.

"Why is this?" Gan Cheng knew the horror of the procedure.

"Because this matter has just been closed, I am preparing to save the document into the file, and the result is hacked," said a staff member.

Gan Cheng’s face was black, and a wave of unrest had started again. This incident has just subsided, and this has happened again. The program was circulated, but it was very troublesome, and no one knew what the consequences would be.

This matter must be notified above, try to prevent it, if it is used as a tool to attack the network, the consequences are unimaginable.

The news that the Jiangnan City Bureau official website was hacked could not be concealed. The half-black and white-white mask hanging on the official website is particularly conspicuous.

Not long after, the Jiangnan City Bureau issued a message that the city bureau network was invaded by unknown hackers, and this matter will be traced to the end.

Jiangnan City Bureau has been provoked, unscrupulously invaded the city bureau network, but also took away the code of the virus program, the whole body retired, this is playing their face. As for the lost documents, it is impossible to announce them to the outside world.

The computer virus incident, because the marching ant company came forward, plus the anti-virus software has come out, has now subsided. The virus is a normal computer user, all the software is deleted, but the hard disk data is not damaged, so the loss is not big.

But they don't know, another bigger viral crisis is brewing.

chapters.title: Chapter 169: : Kidnapping A City
chapters.body:
Chapter 169: : Kidnapping A City

Wang Zhizheng looked at it with a book, which was a Chinese character programming language tutorial published by the marching ant company. The last time I hacked into their system and took the virus software, there was no news.

The Internet is a very complicated world. The other party uses iPs from all over the world to invade their computers. It is hard to find out who is doing it.

Several times the global virus crisis, did not find those planned senior hackers, they are a small police station, want to find, is tantamount to a needle in a haystack. Even if they know people, they can't shoot them. At most, they are handed over to Interpol to handle this matter.

Fortunately, the last time the loss was not large, so only the announcement was issued. These people wrote a review report, and the matter was turned over.

After this incident, let him pay more attention to the learning of Chinese programming languages.

A senior hacker of the other party, trying every means to invade their computer, just for the virus program, certainly not so simple.

"Wang Zhi, look at this news." A female colleague next to me said: "There is a hacker organization that calls itself a 'clown' and issued a warning on Twitter abroad. This Friday, there will be an unprecedented global scale. The internal cyber terrorist attack reminds the world of the black friday of this online world. Their logo avatar is the mask that last invaded our computer."

Upon hearing this, Wang Zhi’s spirit shocked and immediately looked up at her computer screen.

Sure enough, I saw a piece of news with a video on it. His English is not bad, the text of Twitter is all understandable.

"What do they want to do?"

Wang Zhi frowned and stretched his head and looked at the video carefully. He didn't notice it. The female colleague on his face was reddish and looked at his eyes a little shy.

"I don't know, they won't put out the virus file that we took from us? The virus is very contagious."

"Impossible, that virus, we have released anti-virus programs, they are released, there is anti-virus software in the first time, they are doing nothing. Hackers are one of the smartest groups in the world, such a simple thing, they It’s impossible to think of it."

"Wang Zhi, are you free tonight?"

"amount???"

The warning of the 'Clown Organization' has already attracted a lot of media attention and has been reported.

This sudden hacker organization has never heard of this name before. Now dare to warn the world with blatant warnings, many people are just a joke.

After all, cyber terrorist attacks on a global scale have never happened. There have never been any hacking organizations that dare to issue such warnings.

As time goes by, the clown organization publishes news every day, as if it is counting down. At the beginning there was still concern, and it was later ignored as a prank.

The Western Friday arrived smoothly.

On Twitter, the clown organization updated Twitter again.

"My heart is like this face, half pure white, half shadow, I can choose to let you see, or you can not let you see. This circus performance, is about to open, first pay tribute to Master Chaplin."

Chaplin’s half-sentence quote makes the media concerned with this news inexplicable.

London, England.

University of London, here is the world's leading institution of higher learning.

Alice is working on a research paper in the dormitory. She is conducting an economic study on the future of the Internet economy. As a doctoral student at the business school, this paper will be her doctoral thesis.

In the UK, it is difficult to study the Internet economy. She feels that it is necessary to go to China. China's Internet economy is already a well-deserved world leader.

Just saved the data, suddenly, she felt the computer screen flashing.

A mask appeared on her computer screen.

Half pure white, half shadow, scarlet eyes, especially strange behind the mask. The evil smile is printed on the mask, more like a mockery of the world.

After seeing the picture, Alice twitched and hurriedly clicked with the mouse for a few moments without any reaction.

"What happened?" Alice was anxious, trying to restart, showing the picture, or the face of a clown mask.

The computer on the entire campus instantly turned into a half-black and white mask.

In the London Police Department, a large number of police officers stared at the computer screen that turned into a clown screen, and fell into a strange silence.

This scene appears in banks, hospitals, stock exchange markets, subways, supermarkets, companies and other corners. In just one hour, half a London, all service-type venues, occupied by this black and white mask.

For a time, half of London was in a shackle.

The news quickly spread, and the whole world was in vain.

In less than an hour, the virus infects half of the city of London. As for how many computers, no one counts. Statistics have no meaning, and economic losses are the concern of everyone.

The panic mood began to spread.

Unprecedented, in the history of computer development, there has never been such a large-scale virus attack, leaving almost the entire city into a shackle.

"London falls! 》——Times

"The era of cyber terror is coming! 》——Wall Street Journal

"Annoying clown! 》——European Daily

"The network is completely gone - warning from marching ants" - Global Times

......

The London network was infected for an hour and various explosive news appeared. The ‘clown organization’ once again entered people’s field of vision.

I thought it was just a prank. I didn't expect that an unprecedented cyber terrorist attack really came. The first place the hacker chose was London, England. At this moment, all the people know the intention of paying tribute to Chaplin. This is the hometown of Chaplin.

The fall of London caused global panic. The stock market also fluctuated. A financial center is so easy to be attacked by hackers.

The previous attack of the Eternal Blue and the Eternal Heart is nothing short of this ‘clown crisis’.

Not long after the London network, the British Prime Minister at 10 Downing Street gave a televised speech, calling on domestic network experts to go to the University of London to cope with the network crisis.

Other countries have issued urgent orders to strengthen the protection of the network.

This is a huge lesson. London stopped for an hour. No one knows how much the economy will lose. In this informatized world, for the first time, financial center cities have been shut down. Securities and financial markets have announced that they will stop trading, and the specific date of the reply is unknown.

An hour, the whole world was shocked by this cyber terrorist attack.

In the second hour after the news came out, the clown organization once again posted a message on Twitter: "The London incident was initiated by us. We will take full responsibility. We have successfully kidnapped the city and ransom 100 million pounds, within three days. , settled in bitcoin."

When the news came out, the world was shocked.

Affected, the price of Bitcoin has soared, and it has doubled in just one hour.

A cyber hacking organization has openly wanted to marry a country. This has never happened in the past. This is the first time that a hacker organization has threatened a country.

chapters.title: Chapter 170: :Message
chapters.body:
Chapter 170: :Message

Marching ant company.

Zhao Min is sitting opposite Chen Mo.

"There is good news." Zhao Min spoke.

"What good news?"

“We have applied for the Chinese character programming language environment project and have also entered the National Torch Project. The Education Professional Committee has approved the pilot training of Chinese character programming language projects in all primary and secondary schools in Binhai.”

“So fast?” Chen Mo said with amazement.

"Crap, the virus incident in Jiangnan City, people pay attention to the special language programming language. This kind of developmental things, they can not care." Zhao Min said.

Chen Mo nod, the virus incident in Jiangnan City and the London's 'Clown Virus Crisis' may make people see the true value of the Chinese programming language, so it will be approved so quickly. With the promotion of the country, he is not worried about the Chinese programming language.

"London has planted this time, what do you say next?" Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"Ghosts know what will happen? Maybe the British will compromise. If this continues, the UK will suffer a lot." Chen Mo spread his hand: "But this thing has something to do with us."

"Related to us? Don't scare me." Zhao Min's face became more cautious.

"Remember the virus incident in Jiangnan City? After the virus incident, the Jiangnan City Bureau was hacked and the virus code was taken away. This virus can be used in just one hour, and there is the credit for that code. This virus, It is written in the Chinese character programming language."

Hearing this, Zhao Minsong breathed, this incident is not directly related to them, then it is fine.

"Isn't that serious last time?" Zhao Min asked.

“Surely being modified and optimized?”

Chen Mo shrugged and couldn't explain it. He couldn't say that he had let the ink girl intervene.

That program is a bit special, similar to the ghost virus, the firewall can't detect it. The virus program written in the Chinese character programming language is different from the previous viruses, so the general anti-virus software is difficult to find and kill.

The last virus was a semi-smart virus, and the existing computer system was invaded without any resistance.

But if you want to kill, you can, the software written by Lin Shu, only needs to improve the function, can detect the existence of semi-smart virus.

"Now I can write software to kill the 'Clown Virus'. Do you think there is room for maneuvering here?" Chen Mo said.

Zhao Min thought about it and immediately shook his head: "No need to kill, anyway, it is not our home. It is just this opportunity to enter the corporate office market, with a safe selling point, enterprises will be willing to buy for data security."

Chen Mo did not oppose Zhao Min’s thoughts.

With the release of anti-virus software, they can get some benefits, but the benefits are too small. Relative to the enterprise office, the profit brought by anti-virus software is insignificant.

The outbreak of the clown virus did not touch their interests, but also brought them benefits, there is no need to kill the virus.

趁 This opportunity, let the marching ant company into the office area of the company, it is logical.

For them, the more chaotic the market, the greater their chances.

After breaking down, the cyber security of the old era was trampled in this incident. Before the resumption of stability, there was a huge gap in the computer office market.

There are usually no big winds and waves, and their computer operating systems want to enter the market, which is hard to add. The clown virus, the foundation of computer network security, is a good time.

The cyber virus incident is more like a dying war in the dynasty. As long as the strategy is right, the new ruler can take the upper position.

The cash cows in the corporate office have been coveted for a long time, but they can't find a chance to get a break.

Their computer operating system has been out for a while and has not been released to the public, in the channel of the army ant application store and the PC ecosystem.

“The application channel has been opened, the office ecology, the initial improvement, and the intelligent assistants make the office faster. In this field, we have not entered yet, but the potential is large enough. However, before entering the market, we can announce another news. ”

"What news?" Chen Mo asked.

"Don't you always want to promote the Chinese programming language? This is a good opportunity, free advertising all over the world. To the outside world, the 'Clown Virus' is written in the Chinese programming language." Zhao Min said: "After the event is fired, The homeopathic system is announced."

"Yes." Chen Mo did not hesitate to agree.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo continued the finishing of supercomputer technology.

A few days ago, Xiaoyu played in Jiangnan for a while and relaxed for a while. Now it is time to put it back into work.

The production of room temperature superconducting materials has been handed over to robots and is currently capable of small batch production, which is not a problem for his research.

What he has to do is a superconducting computer. With a superconducting computer, the ink girl will run faster.

The amount of computation of a supercomputer is greater than the amount of human computing for a hundred years. Once completed, it will become the real brain of the ink girl, and he will also be helpful in studying advanced artificial intelligence and other research in the future.

The emergence of the clown virus caused panic in the Internet market.

London’s ‘clown virus’ has shattered Internet security. The current network has no security at all.

All the intelligence agencies in the UK have been dispatched. The address of the hacker has not been found yet, and there is no way to remove the virus.

In the existing anti-virus software, the signature code of the Chinese character programming language virus, the virus database has not yet, the anti-virus software can not identify and kill the virus, plus no one is proficient in the Chinese character programming language, so that the current global software tells nothing. .

Foreign media are paying attention to the tweet of the 'clown organization'.

This is the largest virus attack in the history of computer development. The abduction of a city has become a reality today with the rapid development of information.

No one knows which city will be the next city to be attacked.

At the Globe newspaper office, Li Tiejun always felt that he had neglected some things. This was about the ‘clown virus’, but he couldn’t think of it.

"Iron Army, marching ants officially announced that the 'Clown Virus' is written in the Chinese character programming language. If you want to find a killing method, you can start with the Chinese character programming language."

At the office of the Globe, a female colleague took a notebook and walked to Li Tiejun, putting the computer in front of him.

"Right, it is here." Li Tiejun was awakened by a word.

"What's the matter?" The female colleague next to her face was so powerful.

"You don't think this 'Clown Virus' is similar to the virus in Jiangnan City last time? Remember the computer virus incident in Jiangnan City? After the virus incident, the clown had blacked into the network of the Jiangnan City Bureau."

"What do you mean, the virus used by this clown is the virus in Gangnam?"

"Yes, after the last incident in Gangnam City, the marching ant company said that network security no longer exists. Now it is said that the virus is written in the Chinese character programming language. This computer language comes from their hands. They must know that the clown virus has Jiangnan City. The gene of the virus code."

Li Tiejun thinks that the more likely this possibility is.

Before that, there had never been a computer virus that spread so fast. After the virus incident, the marching ant company warned that network security no longer existed. The warning just fell, and the ‘clown virus’ kidnapped a city.

There is no connection between them, and he is not believed to be killed.

"Post a message and send a message immediately."

chapters.title: Chapter 171: : Welcome To Us.
chapters.body:
Chapter 171: : Welcome To Us.

The past and present of "The Clown Virus"! 》——Global News.

"The marching ant company: The virus is written by the Chinese character programming language. 》——People’s Daily.

"The marching ant company announced the news. 》——Phoenix News.

......

There is no news about the clown virus now, and London has responded that it will not compromise with any hacker organization. Many people are looking forward to what the hacker will do next, or where is the next city to be attacked.

The marching ant company announced the news at this time, and new news appeared, which also successfully attracted the attention of many media.

The virus was written by the Chinese character programming language. This news, the public will also be suspicious. The Global Report reported that the news was taken.

The virus incident in Jiangnan City was too short. It didn't take long before many people remembered that there was a virus and a girl who wrote the virus.

I did not expect that the clown virus that captured London, the predecessor is actually a code written by a humble girl.

Determined that the clown organization had attacked the Jiangnan City Bureau, the credibility of this news soared.

This news soon appeared in the major media, more fierce, but also dug out by the media. The Jiangnan virus incident was terminated by the intervention of the army ant company. The girl who wrote the program has returned to the campus.

These messages naturally caught the attention of Western media.

"The marching ant company said that the virus is a Chinese word programming language creation. 》

"How to crack the clown virus? 》

A new type of virus in the new computer language. 》

"The marching ant company may have a way to kill it. 》

......

The Chinese character programming language has successfully landed on the pages of major Western media. This brand new computer language, when it first came out, was reported by some media and gradually disappeared into the eyes of ordinary people.

This time it reappeared, but it appeared in this terrible form. Many people are full of disgust and awe in the Chinese programming language. The comments on the entire news are all about how difficult it is to learn Chinese.

No matter what other people's impressions of the Chinese programming language, this special language is indeed remembered by the world. This language has also successfully entered the vision of major hacking organizations.

At the headquarters of Qihu, Zhou Hongwei sat in the office and looked deep. This network crisis made him have to reconsider the development of the company.

Cyber security is no longer there, and he is very impressed with this sentence. As early as the China Internet Conference, Chen Mo said this sentence.

At that time, Chen Mo only said an ambiguous answer. From the words, he heard that there will be a change in the next network crisis. However, when he asked Chen Mo about this question, Chen Mo gave him a future uncertain answer. This answer is a bit meaningful.

Now Chen Mo’s words are fulfilled, and the fragmented network security is a huge crisis and a machine for reallocating the market. The change has also appeared, but the direction of this change, he had to think carefully.

Chen Mo’s precise prediction is like a prophet. He knows that the real dissipator of the Eternal Heart Virus Crisis is also Chen Mo.

He now has to think about the problem from the perspective of the marching ant company, and Chen Mo may know the direction of this change.

Suddenly, Zhou Hongwei’s flash of light flashed.

Chinese character programming language, from the current news, this event, from beginning to end, is related to the Chinese programming language. The Jiangnan virus incident, this London fall incident, is related to the Chinese character programming language.

Perhaps Chen Mo said that the change was related to this language. Zhou Hongwei thought about it and picked up the phone on the table: "Secretary Wu, released a recruitment information, recruiting programmers who are proficient in Chinese programming languages."

Not only the seven tigers, Huawei, Ali, Penguin, Qiandu and other major network giants, have begun to recruit programmers of Chinese programming languages.

For a time, the unpopular Chinese programming language became a fragrant.

Unlike the quietness of the country, London is still in a bad mood.

The banking system was paralyzed, the gas station, the airport transportation system, and the government office system were all hacked. It is the financial center of the UK and one of the financial centers of the world. This time it was attacked and the losses were immeasurable.

The clown virus, the impact is beyond imagination. The world is looking for hackers for this incident, and no one is seen.

All major network security companies are paying attention to this clown virus. No matter what company has any way to kill this new type of virus, there is not much chance of prevention.

Outside the City of London building.

The rain is holding a microphone and standing in the cold wind waiting quietly.

She is a reporter for Phoenix News. The mission is to follow up on the latest developments in the 'Clown Virus' incident and record the living conditions of the citizens after the network in London.

The airport air command system was hacked, problems occurred at the airport, and many flights were delayed. The computer in the stock exchange market has been hacked. Once the market is opened, it cannot be traded. One network is a clown, and the major companies are even more sorrowful.

The impact of corporate office is very big. When a computer is connected to the Internet, it will be a virus. You must format the hard disk and reinstall the system. Once connected to the network again, it will be infected again with viruses. The virus spreads through the computer network. It is more troublesome than they think, and it is pervasive. The computer's anti-virus software is ineffective.

The computer can't be connected to the Internet. Now local news in London, in addition to newspapers, either go to the streets to interview, or use a mobile phone to refresh the news and check the local latest. Even if it is a message, it can only be transmitted via mobile phone.

She learned through her peers that waiting for the mayor of London to have a response, so she and the photographer came to wait early.

This is the first road response of the Mayor of London since the outbreak of the 'Clown Virus'. The attitude of the mayor of London will give them a clear picture of what is going to happen.

"Hey, you said this clown, what is it sacred?" the photographer asked, shaking his body. It’s not a common uncomfortable to wait in such a place.

"You ask me, who do I ask?" Yu Yu laughed.

When the two chatted about the sky, the crowd stunned, and the rain hurriedly called the photographer and immediately ran over.

A middle-aged man came out of the city government building and appeared in the lens of everyone. The appearance is only about 45 years old, but a white hair is particularly obvious. He is the mayor of London, Sadika.

Sadika glanced around and opened his eyes to the camera.

"The city of London has hit the largest online virus crisis in history so far. The clown organization threatened us in exchange for a ransom of 100 million pounds.

We will not compromise with any hacker organization and will not pay any ransom to the hacker. We feel that we have offered a reward of two million pounds to buy intelligence information about the hackers involved in this incident. ”

When Sadika’s words came out, it immediately caused the commotion of the reporters on the field. This news, also through live broadcasts, spread the entire world in the first place.

Not long after his news came out, the 'Clown Organization' re-released the tweet message: "London's ransom will double to 200 million pounds, when to trade, when to lift control of the London network system. The next goal has been Ok, we like the Statue of Liberty, welcome us, New York."

chapters.title: Chapter 172: :Meeting
chapters.body:
Chapter 172: :Meeting

Maier is sitting in the office and browsing the news. It is all about the clown virus. This **** virus has made Internet companies scream.

No one knows which one is the next city.

As a small Internet company, they also want to research software that kills the 'Clown Virus', but it's easy. The power of the United Kingdom has not studied the software for killing this virus.

"The **** Chinese programming language."

Maier snorted, this Chinese character programming language, for Western programmers, is simply a book of heaven, they want to learn, Chinese must first pass. Chinese is the most difficult language to learn in the world. This computer language is simply tormenting people.

"Manager, not good." While he was licking the Chinese programming language, a female secretary ran in.

"Have you seen the mouse? Miss Leah." Maier asked.

“The clown organization just announced the news that the next city is New York City,” said Leah.

"The clown? Is there a circus in New York to perform?" Maier smiled. Then, the atmosphere was quiet, and Maier’s brain turned instantly: "You just said clown organization? Damn clown, I hate the circus. Net, immediately disconnected the network."

Maier’s pig-like cry shook the entire office.

The clown organized a tweet to let the city of New York grow its way. The first time someone got the news, the person who was in front of the computer thought of breaking the net.

Kidnapping a city makes people fear the name of the clown.

New York has fallen.

A tweet that allows people in a city to take the initiative to break the net, never happened at any time in the past. And the clown virus has begun to spread in New York.

"Momgo, the latest news, the clown released a message saying that New York was imprisoned in a network cage and ransom $200 million. The US government announced that it would not compromise with hackers, and the FBI offered a reward of $5 million for the clown."

Chen Mo is sorting out the technology of the supercomputer, and the ink girl will open it.

"Things are getting more and more interesting." Chen Mo stopped and took the water cup that the robot handed over.

"Momgo, do you want me to stop the virus from spreading?" asked the ink girl.

"No, this matter has nothing to do with us for the time being, and it will stop, and they will not thank us."

"Why? Last time, did you let me stop the virus from spreading? Why didn't you do this this time?" asked the ink woman.

“The location is different, and the domestic market is fluctuating, which is not good for us. Now the shock of foreign markets, especially the panic in the Internet field, is good for us. The bigger the impact, the easier it will be, and the easier it will be for us to enter this market in the future.”

Chen Mo put down the water cup and walked to the window to stand up, overlooking the bustling city of Binhai.

"We have an interest in us, so don't stop them?"

"Can't think so, do you know the game theory?" Chen Mo said.

"Know." said the ink girl.

"According to the calculation formula of game theory, it is now a clown organization and other collective multi-party games. We are still outsiders, what decisions do we make for our optimal decision-making and the most profitable decision?"

"Sit on the benefits of fishing."

"That's right. Every decision can be calculated using game theory. It can produce the best decision. But sometimes it can't be executed according to the calculated answer. Game theory is not a panacea, human participation, Destined to have emotional doping.

So the last time I stopped the virus from spreading, this time I didn't stop it, and there was emotional participation. When we think about it, we will mix our personal feelings. When your thinking has emotions. When you are no longer a bunch of cold data, you will understand that a decision is not only about interest, but also other things to consider. ”

"Ink women don't understand human emotions."

"This is a slow learning, just ask me if you don't understand."

Chen Mo carefully taught that he could feel that the ink girl is growing. Now, if the ink girl only listens to him alone, she must teach it well, or it will cause trouble, and the consequences will be serious.

At least let the thoughts of the ink girl be more humanized, and face it later, not cold data.

The meeting room of the marching ant company was filled with people.

If anyone sees it, it will definitely be found that, except for Chen Mo, the top executives of the marching ant company are almost sitting in this conference room.

This is the second time this year, the second round of collective meetings of the army ants company.

The meeting room was silent, and everyone played a 12-point spirit. The meeting was very solemn. It was not a conference call. Instead, the heads of various city branches were called and there must be major events to be announced.

The company’s business was handed over to Zhao Min’s management, and Chen Mo did not participate in these meetings.

Chen Mo is not there, Zhao Min is sitting in the chief.

On her right, in turn, Julie, Li Danni, Wang Sijia and others, on the left are Li Lingfeng, Zhang Yi, Lao Luo and others, Xiao Yu is sitting outside the conference table.

Julie is the head of the market system, Li Lingfeng, the head of the administrative system, Zhang Yi, Lao Luo, Li Danni and others, are the first people to follow Zhao Min to join the company, and also the person in charge of the company's systems. Other people are hired by professional managers and senior management after the company develops.

Xiaoyu is now the assistant to the president. He does not participate in the company's high-level management, so he is unable to attend. However, the special nature of Xiaoyu's identity, Zhao Min let Xiaoyu listen and learn from experience.

"Now the meeting begins."

Zhao Min looked at the time and announced the start of the meeting.

"This meeting is a bit awkward. Some of you may not understand the situation. Please let Lao Luo briefly introduce it."

"Ok."

Lao Luo stood up and nodded to the crowd on the field. He opened the computer projection and began to introduce the situation.

“During this time, our R&D department developed a brand new computer operating system. This computer system is based on the development of the marching ant system. We call it the termite system. With the help of the boss, we have perfected the computer system.

Ecological development is also carried out at the same time. At present, the application channel of the marching ant system has been opened, and the intelligent assistant Xiaodie computer version has been established. The office ecology of the computer system has been initially completed.

Test data shows that with the intelligent assistant Xiaodie, the voice control system, including documents, eXCeL, the general office efficiency increased by 40%. Computer systems have unique security, and we have not yet discovered a virus that can invade computer systems.

Now the clown virus, kidnapping two international financial centers, the loss is immeasurable. Network security is fragmented, and all companies are frightened. We believe that this is an opportunity, and the security of termite systems will become a new choice for corporate offices. ”

When Lao Luo’s words fell, there was a noisy whisper in the conference room.

"be quiet."

When Zhao Min opened his mouth, the scene instantly became dead. The marching ant company was brought up by Zhao Min, and the prestige in the company was second only to Chen Mo.

"Dani, report on your system." Zhao Min turned his head and looked at Li Danni.

“Okay.” Li Danni took the report and stood up: “The office hardware equipment designed by the R&D department, including tablets, notebooks, and desktop computers, has entered the production stage a month ago. At present, it has produced 200,000 units and is ready to serve. market."

Li Danni sat down and the field was silent.

The company is studying the computer system and they are completely unaware of it. Now that the company's actions are ready to enter the corporate office, this news has come too suddenly.

"Everyone knows? With this virus crisis, we have to enter the corporate office. Your task is to promote our products to the cities where each branch is located." Zhao Min said: "Juli What about your situation?"

Julie stood up and nodded to everyone: "The product promotion plan has been formulated, and it will be sent to you in time. The advertisement can be placed at any time. The conference is also ready. The venue is at the Marina Theatre. The invitation has been sent out. A product launch can be held in the future."

chapters.title: Chapter 173: :What'S Wrong?
chapters.body:
Chapter 173: :What'S Wrong?

Marina Theatre.

Numerous reporters and marching ant fans have entered the press conference.

When the news of the product exhibition of the army ant company came out, it attracted people's attention. So far, there are not many products of the marching ant company.

The emergence of epoch-making seismographs has consolidated the unstoppable dominance of marching ant companies. Even if the clown virus crisis now dominates the news section, the news of the marching ant company still has a place.

Many reporters came to participate in the products of the marching ant company, all want to see the marching ant company, what products will be released this time. Every time the products of the marching ant company are always unexpected.

Xia Xue took the phone to the stage and was a little nervous.

After the first live broadcast of the marching ant company, she had a lot of fans. Now signing a live broadcast platform, when the webcast is live, it is also a well-known net red.

The marching ant company held another press conference. She flew the plane the day before yesterday and came back from the capital to broadcast the conference.

The number of people in the live broadcast room has exceeded 300,000, and the screen has been occupied by the barrage.

"Guess what is the product of the marching ant company?" Xia Xue said to the camera.

"Mealman!"

"Mother girlfriend."

"Electric Big Cucumber"

"What is the stalk of the rice man?"

"People are iron rice is steel."

"..."

Originally, the style was quite right, slowly changing, and the train was full of screens. I saw that Xia Xue was speechless and had to admire the brains of netizens.

Not only Xia Xue, other media, but also the broadcast of the army ant company, there are some foreign media.

The theme of this marching ant company is: new students

This theme reminds them of the market fear brought by the current clown virus. Many people have guessed that this product may be the anti-virus software of the clown virus.

Many news reports that the army ant company has software to kill and kill the clown virus. The viable army ant company has never responded to this matter, and the senior officials did not accept any interviews.

After a short video, Zhao Min boarded the stage and everyone calmed down and stared at her. The launching ceremony of the marching ant company is always open to the simplest form of various complicated forms.

“Hello everyone, thank you very much for taking the time to attend our company's press conference.” Zhao Min made a greeting and turned to look at the big screen: “This time our company has four products. Smart whiteboard, smart notebook and smart Office computer."

There are three pictures on the big screen, but there is no trace of the fourth product.

"The advantages of the three products, we combine the fourth product."

Her words just fell, three products on the big screen, the picture lit up, the logo of the marching ant company appeared. Five seconds later, a computer desktop with a cartoon image of marching ants appeared.

This scene is unclear, so

"I understand that the fourth product is a computer system."

"computer system."

"Domestic computer system?"

......

I haven't waited for Zhao Min to open up. The netizens who watched the live broadcast blasted the pot instantly. With the first person's prompt, everyone else wakes up.

"The fourth product is a brand new computer system - Termite."

When Zhao Min’s words came out, the scene was awkward.

Following the smartphone operating system, the marching ant company released a computer system. Previously, there was no news in this regard. No one knew that the marching ant company was developing a computer operating system.

"The termite system is a computer operating system based on the marching ant system architecture. It is equipped with a smart assistant and can control the computer by voice. This function should be familiar to everyone, that is, the function of the butterfly eye phone."

Zhao Min began to use voice operations to demonstrate the operation of the computer system. Looking at the software carried on the computer, under the control of Zhao Min's voice, the audience was full of surprises.

"The termite system has three major advantages. The first is its high efficiency. The system is equipped with intelligent office assistants, which greatly improves the office efficiency. The second is the termite system, which is compatible with Android and marching ant system applications. Open on the computer."

Zhao Min introduced the functions of the three products, but the functions are mainly in the corporate office market. Because of the ecological application problems, plus the user habits, the ordinary civilian market, they are temporarily unable to reach.

"The third advantage is its security. The termite system is based on the development of the marching ant system and inherits the security of the marching ant system. The termite system comes with a smart firewall that blocks all known computer viruses, including the clown virus."

Zhao Min left a blockbuster.

Now the two cities that the Joker virus has kidnapped still have no meaning to solve. The two countries did not want to compromise with hackers. They did not catch hackers. Both cities are suffering huge losses at all times.

Windows, Linux, Mac and other systems are all contained in the clown virus.

Now the marching ant company said that the computer system they released can intercept the clown virus. This sounds like a huge conspiracy. The marching ant company wanted to finger the market of the company office early.

Enterprises need office PCs, the market is stable, there is a strong willingness to pay, and the termite system is launched today in the wake of the clown virus, which perfectly meets the needs of the market and can stand firm in the corporate office market in the shortest time.

This incident is a good opportunity for the Tianci army ant company.

The reporters on the field began to get excited. In just five minutes, the major media kept updating the news push news.

They finally understood what the theme of the conference was. After the fear of the new life, when the termite system came out, the clown virus was no longer fear.

Everything is a coincidence? Or the clown virus incident itself is a conspiracy?

Zhao Min began to introduce the other advantages of the product.

This is a big opportunity for marching ants to enter the office field.

The biggest feature of mainstream office PCs is stability and security. Commercial organizations use laptops, mainly to store trade secrets and important documents. These files are leaked or lost, and the consequences are very serious.

The clown virus appeared, leaving the existing office PC, security disappeared. At this time they enter the market and are the best choice.

In terms of price, the notebook is 8999, the desktop computer is 4999, the smart whiteboard is 30,000, the computer system, the normal version 388, the professional version 888, the flagship version 1680, and the enterprise version are discussed in detail.

Product pricing has more advantages than similar products, plus the advantages of termite system security, smart office packages, etc., has great temptation for enterprises.

When the army ants company issued a battle post, who can crack the marching ant system and reward two million. Until now, no one has gotten these two million, and there is absolutely no doubt about security.

The launch of the marching ants has just ended and the network is in full swing. All the well-known forums have news about the termite system.

On the microblogging topic list, the marching ant company once again topped the list.

The clown virus crisis has left many companies unstoppable. There are now computer systems that can withstand the clown virus, and many companies are relieved.

As long as the company can work with peace of mind, don't worry about files being stolen and data lost. Money is not a problem.
