Someone has installed and tried it, and the performance of various systems has also been released on the network. Once the experience video was released, it attracted countless netizens.

As time goes by, more and more trial messages about the marching ant system. Most of the news is discussing the feeling of use.

Many people's evaluations are good, just because of the long-term use of windows, some places are not used to it, it takes a few days to adapt, smart office assistant is very easy to use.

Various experiences have been commented out, increasing the heat of the termite system.

Zhao Min sat in the office and looked at yesterday's sales data. Judging from the current situation, the market has responded well, and the panic caused by the clown virus has caused many companies to take the initiative to change the termite system.

Foreign companies, especially those in London and New York, also contacted them to purchase the enterprise version of the termite system.

The termite system works well, but the disadvantages are also good, but it is not compatible with computer games and can only be used as an office computer.

Now there are only some common office software, other ecological development, it will take a while, these things, not the ones of the marching ant company, need many Internet companies to develop the ecology of termite systems.

Li Lingfeng pushed the door into Zhao Min's office and his face was somewhat cautious. After the launch of the new product, the heat is really big, and new troubles will follow.

Looking at the face of the careful Li Lingfeng, Zhao Min put down the documents in his hand. In her impression, Li Lingfeng’s work has always been calm, and such a hasty situation rarely appears: “What?”

chapters.title: Chapter 174: : Very Resort
chapters.body:
Chapter 174: : Very Resort

Li Lingfeng sorted out the emotions and handed the folder in his hand to Zhao Min.

"These are screenshots of online articles and comments. Some people hired the water army, saying that we created this virus crisis, destroying our opponents and paving the way for termite systems."

Zhao Min took the file and opened it.

"The clown virus is written in the Chinese character programming language. The most familiar with this set of computer languages is the marching ant company.

The predecessor of the virus was a virus crisis in Jiangnan. According to the information obtained by insiders, the virus crisis is also solved by Chen Mo. The program code was purchased by the marching ant company and the program fell into their hands.

The clown virus has left global cyber security companies at a loss. When the network security was fragmented, the marching ants suddenly released the termite system, claiming to be able to resist the attack of the clown virus.

The marching ant company has the ability to stop the Jiangnan virus incident, and may also solve the clown virus incident. For the sake of consideration, the release of the termite system makes the company's interests higher, or another possibility..."

"I also think things are a bit too much."

"Put melons and watch the big show."

"..."

Seeing the analysis of the article, as well as comments from netizens, Zhao Min frowned.

Analysis of the head is the road, logic is no problem, but only from a personal perspective. There is no indication that the marching ant company is the mastermind of making the clown virus, but it guides the reader in this direction.

Most importantly, they released the termite system and made a lot of money. It was the only company that profited from the clown virus crisis.

No matter which aspect of analysis, the biggest suspects are them. For her to be an ordinary person, she must also point her finger at the marching ant company.

"Not only these, the mainstream media in the West, but also accused the marching ants company, they attacked us to create this virus incident." Li Lingfeng said.

Zhao Min turned to the last few pages, and she saw the reports of foreign media, and allegedly blamed the marching ant company for letting them publish the virus killing software.

"The usual means, we touched their interests, this is to create pressure for us." Zhao Min said the document: "Unfortunately we are not abroad, they have no way for us. This kind of thing, the marching ant company experience is not a two Times."

“Do you want to respond externally?” Li Lingfeng said.

"Respond, the clown virus has nothing to do with the marching ant company. Please ask the relevant platform to delete the articles and comments that smashed the marching ant company. Nothing else needs to be said and no need to do it." Zhao Min thought about it.

After Li Lingfeng left, Zhao Min continued to process the documents, not because of online speech, but also had any special actions.

These things must be positively responded, otherwise they will be said to be guilty conscience, and when they talk again, they will be more and more black.

The easiest way is to have no tricks and tricks. The paradox attacks experienced by marching ants are not once or twice. Many people are looking forward to their accidents.

The release of termite systems has touched the interests of many people. In the corporate office field, competition is small, but the main competitors are oligarchy. Now the marching ant company is swaying and adding the performance of the termite system, causing them to panic.

Nowadays, the network is full of arguments made by the marching ant company to make the clown virus. From the current situation, the marching ant company is indeed very suspect.

The marching ant company gave a painless response that made people look weak and had a feeling of punching on cotton.

Seattle, a single-family villa.

Weiss stared at the computer screen, and thick glasses could not cover the exhaustion in his eyes. He is a special technician of Microsoft Corporation, mainly doing things that the company can't officially do. It is popularly known as black hat hackers.

The identity of these people will not be announced, and only a few people inside the company know.

Senior hackers have unique communication forums.

The forum has hackers from all over the world, and the computer is probably the boss of a company, an executive, or a teacher or student of a school.

Many people exchange technology with each other in the forum, but they don't know each other's information.

In this forum, asking for identity information is a taboo.

During this time, the most popular exchange on the forum was the Chinese programming language. The clown virus makes this language into the eyes of hackers.

Hackers, whether black hats or white hats, are technical paranoias, and this new set of computer languages has become an area of new technology.

Because hackers have found that programs programmed with Chinese programming languages can be poisoned by anti-virus software, become a ghost virus, always lurking in the computer, and can be activated remotely at any time.

It’s just that Chinese is too difficult to learn, so that he can’t do anything about the programming language of Chinese characters.

After the termite system came out, it was threatened by the clown virus, and the marching ant company invaded the office field, which was as horrible as a locust.

The company asked him to contact the person in charge of the clown organization and wanted to talk to the other party. He had sent out information in the forum for a week, such as the mud cows entering the sea, and did not receive any response.

While he was browsing the post about the Chinese programming language, a message prompted him to come out of his focus.

"You looking for me?"

The simple three words, let Wes have a short doubt, suddenly thought of something, Weiss waist plate.

"clown?"

"You only have one minute."

Without confirmation of identity, Weiss will be suspicious. However, at this time, the other party looking for him, there should be no hackers boring to do this kind of prank.

"My boss wants to talk to you," Weiss said.

"After an hour, I will contact you and ask your boss to come over."

Seeing the news, Weiss blinked, or dialed the phone, he can only believe that the other is a clown.

A car enters the villa of Weiss.

The car stopped and walked down a middle-aged man with black-rimmed glasses and bald head. Outsiders here will definitely recognize it. He is the current president of Microsoft, Nadella.

After the rule of Microsoft's legendary Gates, there was another generation of tyrants, Ballmer's leadership. A few years ago, Microsoft remained profitable, but the company was on the decline.

The technology world is changing rapidly, and all technologies are developing rapidly.

A few years ago, Microsoft, watching Apple crazy gold, they can only rely on office and windows to eat old. The world has entered the mobile era, cloud technology is developing, and they are stalling.

At that time, Microsoft, the company, was full of fierce competition, and the intrigue in the office, so many people worried about this generation of legendary companies, the sound of singing has also appeared.

At this time, the board let Ballmer abdicate and announced that he would serve as the new CEO, and he became the third CEO of Microsoft.

He is not a well-known manager. He has experienced the ups and downs of Microsoft. He is more like a veteran veteran. When I first took office, many people questioned his ability to be a CEO.

As soon as I took office, I will use ‘cloud service’ as the core of Microsoft. The new technology will bring new challenges to Microsoft, and bring new life to Microsoft, which is eating the old.

Now the market value of Microsoft has doubled, higher than before the economic bubble burst, reaching a historical peak.

Today, Microsoft is welcoming a new challenge.

After the clown virus came out, it was a big blow to Microsoft. Windows system fell across the board, originally thought that repairing system vulnerabilities, can lift the crisis, the result is not a system vulnerability.

The clown virus, able to bypass the windows firewall, has no obstacles to invade the system. This conclusion has caused Microsoft to vibrate up and down.

The language of the Chinese character programming language has also entered their field of vision.

During this time, the company has specialized personnel to study the Chinese character programming language. The time is too short, the marching ant company does not give them time to directly announce the termite system.

Corporate office is a piece of fat meat from Microsoft. This piece of fat meat has been separated by Apple and Umbrella companies because of previous mistakes in decision-making.

After he took office, he has already snatched back some. Now the marching ant company has a big foot and gives him a strong sense of crisis.

This meat-eating marching ant, in which field, will be frightening.

Now we can only use the very means to fight for time. In response to this virus crisis, what they need most is time.

Weiss saw Nadella coming in, some cautious, and hurriedly called him to sit down: "He said that he would contact me an hour later, and now there are ten minutes."

Nadella nodded and sat on the sofa, waiting quietly.

chapters.title: Chapter 175: :Transaction
chapters.body:
Chapter 175: :Transaction

Wes sat in a chair and stared at the news on the forum. Nadella stood behind him, still calm and relaxed.

It has already arrived at the agreed time. When the message appears, Wes has a good body and quickly opens the message.

"Do a deal." Nadella said.

Wess did not dare to neglect, and immediately responded to the clown in accordance with Nadella's words.

"What transaction?"

"You are on Twitter, in my opinion, send a sentence, I will give you a million dollars." Nadella stared at the computer screen, the sound was no waves.

"What?"

"Thank you for your support from the marching ant company."

As soon as his words came out, Wess sitting in the chair shook his fingers. The boss wants to tie the clown organization and the marching ant company together and take the connection between the army ant company and the clown organization.

But to think about it, Weiss's hand is not slow, according to Nadella's words, sent to the clown.

After the news was sent, the atmosphere was quiet and both of them were waiting for the clown's reply. Two minutes passed and there was no movement.

Wes couldn't help but glance at Nadella. Seeing that Nadella didn't move, he didn't say anything, waiting quietly.

After three minutes, the news came over again.

"Ten million."

Seeing this news, Wes couldn't help but take a breath. This clown is in the eyes of money. Say a word, actually dare to say this price.

"Up to three million, or the transaction is cancelled."

When Weiss sent this sentence, the picture was quiet again. Two minutes later, the message came over again: "The deal."

“How do I confirm that your identity is true?” Nadella said.

"Two minutes later, the next goal: Tokyo. Prepare bitcoin, give money first, then send."

After the clown finished, the computer screen was silent again, but this time, the protagonist will not appear again.

Nadella walked back to the couch and meditated.

After a while, Nadella turned on the phone and saw the clown release a new tweet.

"London, New York, within two days, no ransom, I will make an indiscriminate attack on two countries. Next station: Tokyo, please prepare for ransom, 200 million US dollars."

Nadella put down the phone, it has been determined that the other party is a clown, and now the transaction is no problem.

"Now buy Bitcoin and contact him for trading." Nadella looked at the Weiss ropeway.

"Good." Wes immediately nodded.

The news of the clown once again stirred up waves.

Just after the news came out, Tokyo government agencies and the Tokyo stock market were attacked by the clown virus for the first time. Before the clown virus spread, the personnel of major institutions immediately disconnected the network cable to minimize losses.

I can't access the Internet, but the main computer is not infected with viruses. If the files are not lost, I can still work normally.

The news of the virus came out for five minutes. Various news reports were uploaded on the Internet. Many people are still attacking the marching ant company.

Their suspicion is the biggest. The Chinese character programming language is created by the marching ant company. Together with the previous virus program, it fell into the hands of the marching ant company. Huaxia has not been attacked. Anyone has reason to believe that this is done by the marching ant company. .

It’s just a marching ant company, except for an official response that doesn’t hurt, no other action.

Those who want to attack the marching ant company can't catch the fulcrum.

The marching ant company is not a listed company and it is impossible to make a fuss about the stock price. And the marching ant company is within China, foreign capital can't help. In China, there is no company that is willing to take the initiative to provoke this strong army ant.

The sniper was very loud, but the marching ant company did not lose much. The virus attacked Tokyo, and the termite system, which claims to be resistant to the clown virus, was fired again.

US Central Intelligence Agency, Office of Science and Technology.

This is one of the four departments of the CIA. Each technician is an expert or senior in a certain technical field.

Morrison was a computer expert who was recruited to collect intelligence for the CIA. After the outbreak of the clown virus, his task was to find the clown organization.

At this point, Morrison looked dignified and his fingers tapped on the keyboard. Next to him, there are many other technicians who are also nervously tracking the address of the clown.

The clown organization sends tweets, which is the only target they can track down.

Not long after, Morrison stopped and looked at the map popping up on the computer, his face blackened. More than one hundred addresses are distributed in every corner of the world. Only one address is correct in these addresses.

One by one confirmed that they are not so human.

"How?" asked a strong and majestic middle-aged man behind him. He is the director of the Central Intelligence Agency, Peng Pei.

"Only one of these addresses is correct." Morrison said: "Need to be excluded."

"Notify the action department, let them go to these places, confirm the address information." Pompeii's face is a bit gloomy, the address is distributed in all corners of the world, the difficulty is very large, but must be confirmed one by one, even if the agents are exposed, so do.

Those who do not catch the clown organization will only lose more.

A villa in Seattle.

Seeing Bitcoin trading success, Wes stopped and looked at Nadella. This is the biggest bitcoin he has ever bought.

This cryptocurrency is theoretically worthless and is essentially a bunch of data. But the recognition of the group is large, let it exist value, just like the consumption of diamond jewelry, the essence is stone, but the group of identity is huge, so that jewelry has value.

A variety of hype, coupled with more and more people entering the Bitcoin transaction, has allowed Bitcoin's price to climb to the point where it is now nearly $20,000.

Weiss is a master of the Internet industry. He knows that Bitcoin is often used between hackers or some underground transactions. It is not a special requirement, otherwise he will not buy Bitcoin.

"Contact him," Nadella said.

Weiss nodded and immediately sent a message to the other party. Not long after, the clown sent an account.

"Send it to him."

For the average person, there are a lot of three million dollars, but for them, this money is nothing.

Let the marching ant company continue to use the clown virus to promote the termite system and enter the corporate office field. Their losses are thousands of times more than this.

As for the clown's remorse, he considered it. He can only gamble that the gambling clown will follow the agreement. Now that the clown virus is raging, the marching ant company has trouble and can give them the most time.

“Happy cooperation.”

"Ask him, can you sell the virus program and anti-virus software to us, 20 million US dollars." Seeing the clown replying information, Nadella said quickly.

"Not interested in."

After three simple words, no matter how Wes sent the message, there was no reply. Nadella calmed her face, took out her cell phone, and watched the clown's tweet.

One minute and one second passed, and as time went by, Nadella’s calm face showed a slight change. The clown hasn’t sent a tweet yet, I’m afraid that three million is lost in the water.

He was disappointed, and when he was ready to put away his mobile phone and leave the villa, the information pushed together made him feel shocked.

chapters.title: Chapter 176: : Wei Zhe
chapters.body:
Chapter 176: : Wei Zhe

The sunshine that slid out of the window brought a warmth to this winter, and it was a pleasant morning.

After washing, leaving the room, I saw that Xiaoyu was preparing breakfast for him. Chen Mo will smile and sit next to her.

"Just done it, eat it hot." Xiaoyu handed the hot milk to Chen Mo.

Since Chen Mo’s inexplicable vomiting last time, Xiaoyu has paid special attention to the diet.

"Ok."

Chen Mo responded, took the milk, smiled and looked at Xiao Yu.

"Look at me why? Eat breakfast." Chen Mo stared, Xiao Yu also smiled: "You are not hungry when you look at me?"

"Yes, it’s a good meal." Chen Mozhen nodded.

"Continue, I like to listen, praise me."

Xiao Yu laughed, picked up the eggs from his own hands, and peeled them into the bowl of Chen Mo.

In the eyes of outsiders, this man is calm and confident. But when I return to the villa, or when I am with her, sometimes it looks like a big boy who grows up.

Only this big boy belongs to her alone.

The breakfast was finished in a warm atmosphere and the two went out to the company.

During this time, the marching ant company was attacked by various public opinions, and there were many troubles, but these things were not handled by Chen Mo.

The company's large and small affairs are handled by Zhao Min. Chen Mo only needs to do his own research, and he does not have to worry about the company's troubles.

Chen Mo’s car, not far from the company, slowed down.

Far from being able to see the door of the marching ant company, surrounded by many reporters. When I first arrived at work, there were so many reporters. This situation first appeared.

This scene makes Chen Mo brow wrinkle.

Xiao Yu also saw this scene, and then took out the phone to open. Just opened the news page and saw a bunch of news headlines.

"The clown admits that he has received technical support from the army ant company. 》

"The marching ant company secretly supports the clown organization? 》

"The clown virus is a conspiracy of the marching ant company? 》

"The clown and the marching ants fall out?" 》

"Chen Mo, this."

Xiaoyu handed the phone to Chen Mo.

Chen Mo’s eyes glanced and saw the news content, and immediately knew what was going on. The clown organization posted a message on Twitter, thanking the marching ants for their support.

When the clowns organized their tweets, they were late at night, and now the news has spread to every corner of the world. The clown virus is at its peak, and the world is paying attention to it.

The emergence of such news is undoubtedly the most central of the marching ants into the storm.

"It seems like a lot of trouble." Xiao Yu said: "We were framed by the clowns."

She has access to almost all the secrets of the marching ant company. Chen Mo's lab, she is free to enter and exit, the company's affairs, she is one of the best known people, never had to support the clown organization.

"Go back to the company first."

After entering the company, Xiaoyu went to his job, and Chen Mo went to his office. Just arrived at the office, Zhao Min appeared.

Entering Chen Mo's office area, Zhao Min said: "At one o'clock in the morning, the clown is on Twitter, and released a message: Thanks to the support of the marching ants. Now the news has spread around the world, almost all media, think that we and the clown organization Collusion, and because this thing has fallen out, now the trouble is not small."

"What do you think of the clown?" Chen Mo asked.

"The clown organization released this news. To be honest, I can't figure it out. We have nothing to do with them. The only thing that can be explained is that he hates us for releasing the termite system and lowering the danger of the clown virus, leading to his It is more difficult to make a ransom, so give us trouble."

See Chen Mo did not speak, Zhao Min sorted out the ideas and continued to analyze.

"From the time we released the termite system, we and the clown organization stood on the opposite side. In addition, the media had doubts about this before. Now the clown is releasing this news, thank you on the surface, but the exposure is that we are falling out with them, we are very passive."

"What are you going to do?" Chen Mo asked.

"Now the market is skeptical about our credit. The clown is very bright. He is dark, we are clear, no matter what attack, we are suffering. Now we can't do too much action, we can only respond simply."

They are now in a dilemma, anti-virus software, not taken out before, being so troubled by the clowns, it is even more impossible to come out, or even more suspicious, even sitting on their charges. And they want to promote termite systems, release anti-virus software, and termite systems are optional.

Many secret promoters have used this news to do articles on marching ants. Even the termite system has a back door, which is convenient for the marching ant company to obtain private documents of user data. The handling is not good and the trouble will only get bigger and bigger.

"This thing is handled according to what you mean." Chen Mo said.

After Zhao Min left, the ink girl suddenly said: "Momgo, I know who is the mastermind of this matter."

"Oh? Is there a story inside?" Chen Mo immediately came to the interest: "Talk about it, who is the mastermind?"

"Someone spent three million dollars to let the clown organization send this sentence."

"Three million dollars? Really willing." Chen Mo slightly surprised, three million dollars is not a small number, used to let the other party send a sentence, this is a real word.

"Who is such a local tyrant?" Chen Mo asked.

"iP is in Seattle, according to the address, it is this person." When the ink girl fell, she jumped out of Weiss's personal information: "The information shows that he is a computer master and is currently unemployed, but every month, Microsoft will give him Transfer money, like salary, but Microsoft employees do not have his identity information."

"Microsoft?" Chen Mo instantly understood.

Chen Mo was not surprised by the push behind the ink girl.

The termite system was released, reaching the interests of the office sector. In particular, Microsoft, the computer systems market, is Microsoft's strongest and most important market. Now marching ants enter the market and rob their market, threatening them the most.

Three million dollars in one sentence, has already been blooded.

“Would you like to announce this?” asked the ink girl.

"No, we don't have substantial evidence. Now many media are discrediting us, and no one believes it. It only makes people excuse themselves."

"Well, it's really complicated." The ink girl said quietly.

Microsoft used this method to discredit them, indicating that Microsoft is now feeling threats on termite systems, which is a good thing.

Regarding Microsoft's search for clowns to organize him, Chen Moji is in his heart, and there will be a better chance in the future. He will definitely report the revenge of the present, and now there are more important things.

"Ink girl, give me the information of all members of the clown organization."

Originally, the clown organization brought benefits to the marching ant company. He didn't want to pay attention to these people. So at the beginning of the virus outbreak, he didn't stop the ink girl, and he was not interested in knowing the information of the clown organization.

After this tweet came out, they and the clown organization had changed from the enemy of the enemy to his enemy. It is necessary for him to know the enemy's intelligence information, even if he does not intend to deal with them for the time being.

Information determines the win or loss of the game.

The ink girl is the **** in the network, she can know as long as the information appears on the network.

In this game, the clown organization has no chance of winning, so in the current situation, he does not intend to kill it for the time being, otherwise it is easy to solve like the Jiangnan virus incident.

Now that the clown virus is raging, the marching ant company gets benefits from it. They don't have to stop, but the bigger they make, the more they benefit.

"Okay." The ink girl opened.

Not long after, there were several pieces of information on the computer desktop. Chen Mo's eyes condensed and began to look carefully. Looking at the last page of the information, Chen Mo has a color of interest in his eyes.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo said: "Ink girl, give me the details of this Weizhe."

chapters.title: Chapter 177: : The Purpose Of The Clown?
chapters.body:
Chapter 177: : The Purpose Of The Clown?

Huaibei City, an orphanage in the suburbs.

A young man with black-rimmed glasses and a big box came in with a smile on his face. It was winter, and the weather was warm today. He just came in and the children who were playing, immediately surrounded him.

"Well brother, you are here."

"Wei brother..."

Every child's eyes are full of joy, and he seems to regard him as his own relatives. Seeing these gaze, Wei Zhe warmed his head and patted the box.

"Brother bought you new clothes."

During the time, the child who surrounded Wei Zhe, cheered: "Thank you for your brother."

"Wei Zhe, you are here."

During the noise of several children, a plain old man walked out of the house and saw Wei Zhe with a friendly smile.

"President." Wei Zhe smiled and put the box in his hand down: "There are winter clothes I bought for the children."

"Every time I come, I buy these things." The old man sighed: "Despite the hardships in the hospital, there are government help and some social donations that can barely be maintained. You will come if you come later, you don't have to buy these things."

"Yeah." Wei Zhe nodded: "Give the clothes to the children."

"Good." The old dean nodded, opened the box, and distributed it to the child in joy according to the size of the clothes.

The old dean is sending something to the children. Wei Zhe looks at the girl in front of the easel, not far away, with a gentle color on his face.

Wei Zhe’s eyes made the girl rush to dodge, and some panicked. After slowing down, the girl smiled at Wei Zhe, made a gesture of greeting to him, and continued to focus on the drawing board.

Seeing her focus on the appearance, Wei Zhe did not bother, sitting on the side of the stool, watching her quietly.

Chen Mo wore a sweater and a black jacket, wearing the scarf that Xiao Yu gave him, which is no different from ordinary youth.

Looking at the dilapidated orphanage in front of him, Chen Mo no expression. Behind him is Wang Hai and White Pearl.

Just entering the orphanage, I saw the children who were laughing and playing, and Wei Zhe sitting next to the girl.

Wei Zhe, who was watching the children playing, saw Chen Mo, and his pupils shrank and stood up immediately. As a programmer, he could not recognize Chen Mo.

Chen Mo should be in Binhai City, suddenly appearing here, let his heart sink.

"Hello, who are you looking for?" Wei Zhe Chao Chen Mo came over.

"Let's talk."

Chen Mo glanced at the girl who was painting, sat down on a stool not far away, and quietly watched the children playing in the orphanage.

"What do you want to talk about?"

Wei Zhe also took a stool and sat down next to Chen Mo. He is a wise man, and Chen Mo suddenly finds him, certainly not a coincidence.

"Do you like that girl?" Chen Mo looked at the girl who was painting.

"What do you want?" Wei Zhe suddenly nervous: "She has nothing to do with my business."

Seeing the appearance of Wei Zhe, Chen Mo smiled and shook his head: "I am not coming to trouble you, can you tell your story? I am very curious, why do you volunteer in this humble orphanage, because this girl? ”

Wei Zhe looked at Chen Mo deeply and hesitated for a long time.

"No, I am also an orphan. I grew up eating hundreds of meals, so I often go to volunteers. Her name is Tang Xueyin. A year ago, when I came here as a volunteer, I saw her and I like it at first sight. I am on this quiet girl, so I come here often."

“A person who likes to be a volunteer creates a ‘clown’ that threatens the security of the world’s cyber? The clown is half pure and half shadowed, is that you?” Chen Mo said.

Wei Zhe's body froze, looking at Chen Mo incredibly, then calmed down.

"The matter of your company has nothing to do with me, I have already withdrawn."

Wei Zhe did not deny that after Chen Mo said the clown, he knew that Chen Mo must know his identity.

"It is because you quit, so I came to you. I am very curious, why are you quit as the founder of the clown organization?" Chen Mo asked.

Wei Zhe fell into silence, and Chen Mo did not speak.

"Are you coming to arrest me to see the police?" Wei Zhe asked.

"If I want you to go to the police, I don't have to come over myself. I have a list of all the members of the clown organization."

Hearing Chen Mo’s answer, Wei Zhe looked down and didn’t know what he was thinking. After a while, he opened his mouth.

“After the Chinese character programming language came out, I launched a technical exchange group on the forum, named clown, who are all interested in the Chinese character programming language. After the Jiangnan virus incident, we know that the virus is written in the Chinese character programming language. We are all curious, what is the code of the virus, and it has such a great power."

"So you invade the city bureau and take away the code files." Chen Mo said.

Wei Zhe nodded, sorted out his thoughts and said.

"After getting the code, we found a secret. The virus can actively spread on the network. The current system firewall does not have much effect on it. It can infect the whole area in the shortest time. The network then passed to the next area. This code makes them ecstatic."

"So I want to use this virus to control the online world and achieve the purpose of getting money?" Chen Mo asked.

"No." Wei Zhe shook his head with self-deprecating on his face: "The reason is ridiculous."

"How do you say that?" Chen Mo asked.

Wei Zhe’s self-deprecating appearance made him very interested.

"They control the network just to prove their technology and sense of accomplishment. They kidnap a city and blackmail a country's sense of accomplishment. Their purpose is not money, just for fun." Wei Zhe calmly said: "I am not so extreme, So I quit. The next thing happened. As for why they framed you, I don't understand, maybe it's just for fun. Maybe your termite system threatens their plans."

This answer surprised Chen Mo. These behaviors are indeed extreme.

Tell Chen Mo what he knows, Wei Zhe is not saying more, looking at the girl who is painting.

"Why do you like her not to say?" Chen Mo no longer asked the clown, these things are not important to him.

"She is a dumb woman, congenital. She knows my heart, but has always been inferior to worry." Wei Zhe said.

"You are not determined, her concerns are inevitable. You can't let her tell you? Her situation is even more afraid of being rejected." Chen Mo said.

Wei Zhe looked at Chen Mo, thought for a while, nodded slightly: "Thank you."

"I said at the beginning, the purpose of my coming here is not to find you trouble. Is to ask you, are you interested in joining the marching ant company?" Chen Mo asked.

Upon hearing Chen Mo’s invitation, Wei Zhe was surprised in his eyes and suddenly did not know how to answer him.

“Why?” Wei Zhe asked.

"This era is changing. We need talents who are proficient in Chinese programming languages." Chen Mo said: "With higher wages, you can better help orphanages. It is better to be an obscure programmer than in a company."

"I think about it." Wei Zhe said.

"I am waiting for your reply. I am in a hurry and have not prepared anything. Since I am here, it is impossible to come empty-handed. Here is 100,000, you give it to the Dean, let them buy winter clothes and quilts for the children."

After bidding farewell to Wei Zhe, Chen Mo left the orphanage. Among the information that the ink girl gave him, there is the detailed information of Wei Zhe, so he will come over. This is a principled talent.

When Chen Mogang stepped out of the orphanage, the phone rang.

chapters.title: Chapter 178: : The Invitation Above
chapters.body:
Chapter 178: : The Invitation Above

Seeing the caller ID, Chen Mo was amazed. Li Chengzhi’s call at this time made him somewhat surprised. Didn’t he find him because of the clown virus?

It is unlikely.

Looking for him, he was looking for him at the beginning of the outbreak of the clown virus. There is no reason to contact him now.

"Chen Mo brothers, don't come innocent?" When the phone was just connected, Li Chengzhi's hearty voice was heard.

"There are some troubles, I am in trouble now, what are you looking for at this time?" Chen Mo asked.

"One thing, I want to inform you in advance." Li Chengzhi said: "The earthquake warning network has been tested. Five days later, the nation's earthquake warning network was officially launched. The earthquake observation station in the capital, the head of the summit will personally attend the launching ceremony. I would like to invite you and the president of your company to come to the launching ceremony. Is there time?"

Chen Mo immediately understood what the meaning of Li Chengzhi’s head was. He did not hesitate to say: “This must have time.” His courage is not big enough to enlarge the head of the pigeon.

"That's good, then I will reply to it." Li Chengzhi said.

"it is good."

Chen Mo hangs up and takes the car and leaves.

Now the marching ant company is almost a full-network attack stage, and the clown organization has brought a lot of trouble to the marching ant company. Many companies are skeptical that marching ants are working with clowns, worrying about problems, refusing to use termite systems and computer equipment, and letting them lose a lot of users.

Although the marching ant company is not bad, it has a bad reputation. The participation in the inauguration ceremony of the earthquake network and the appearance of the marching ant company may yield unexpected results.

The next day, Chen Mo returned to the company and went to Zhao Min’s office. At this time, Zhao Min is worried about the break of the marching ant company. The clown’s words shut them in a dead end.

"Zhao Min, there is something to inform you."

"What?" asked Zhao Min.

“Li Chengzhi informed me that five days later, the ceremony for the launch of the earthquake warning network will be attended by the heads of the heads. I am invited to attend the ceremony with you. Is there time?”

"I dare say no time?" Zhao Min feels that the whole world is bright: "It is estimated that nothing is more important than this."

"How are these two days?" Chen Mo asked.

"How else? Or was it bombarded with all kinds of true and false news. The clown organized this move, and we will be a soldier. Now it is a bit passive. If there is evidence, it is estimated that Interpol will find us." Zhao Min said "I was thinking about the way to break the game. This earthquake networking ceremony is the best time."

"The clown doesn't have to worry about it. When necessary, the clown organization can be abolished at any time."

Zhao Min was surprised to see Chen Mo and did not understand the meaning of his sentence.

"You don't really have any connection with the clown organization?"

"Crap, I tracked the address of the clown organization members and was able to announce their identity at any time."

"Really?"

"Really! Do you want to announce it now?" Chen Mo asked.

"Don't announce, don't post it." Zhao Min was shocked by Chen Mo: "If we publish the list of clown members, and the black pot collusion with the clown organization, we really have to back."

They published the list and they sat down on the rumors that they and the clown organization had fallen out. This is not a good thing.

Moreover, the clown virus is still threatening the world. Although they are suspected of having an intersection with the clown organization, the threat of the clown virus has caused the users of the termite system to rise slowly, but the speed is not as fast as before.

When the two people exchanged information about the company, Xiaoyu knocked on the door and came in: "Chen Mo, there is a person named Wei Zhe looking for you."

"It’s coming so soon." Chen Mo was slightly surprised: "Notify him to come here."

Xiao Yu promised to leave Zhao Min’s office.

"Who is Wei Zhe?" Zhao Min asked curiously.

"The founder of the clown organization."

Chen Mo’s answer is that Zhao Min, who is trying to drink water, shakes his hands and the hot water is almost on her body: “Are you sure you are not kidding?”

This guy is scared to death, just said that there is no intersection with the clown organization, now the founder of the clown organization came over to find him.

"I went to Huaibei yesterday, just for this."

Chen Mo said the clown organization and Wei Zhe, and Zhao Min simply said it again. She is the president of the company and it is necessary to know the information of the company's employees.

After hearing the answer, Zhao Min felt incredible.

It's hard to imagine a group of hackers who kidnap a city's network and blackmail a country just for a sense of accomplishment.

"Extreme brain, you can never know what he is thinking." Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo.

"Hey? What do you mean by your eyes? How do I listen to you a little bit strange?" Chen Mo was also amused by Zhao Min's eyes. When he said these words, he actually looked at him.

"Don't be seated, not to say you." Zhao Min said with a chuckle.

In a few minutes, Xiaoyu took Wei Zhe into Zhao Min’s office.

"Come and sit." Chen Mo pointed to the sofa next to him.

Wei Zhe was also polite, sitting down on the sofa: "I thought about it yesterday, and finally decided to come over."

"Welcome to join you."

After that, Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min. People join, but personnel arrangements, also need Zhao Min to arrange.

"Mr. Wei, are you proficient in Chinese programming languages?" said Zhao Min.

"There is some research, it is a small achievement, and the published information, I have carefully read it. This is a very good computer language." Wei Zhe said.

"Now the Chinese character programming language is in the development stage. Some people in the company are learning. I plan to bring these employees together and set up the Chinese programming department to specialize in the research and software development of Chinese programming languages. You are the head of the team." Zhao Min said.

Zhao Min had this idea long ago, but he has never been a person who is proficient in Chinese programming languages. Now he has this opportunity. The founder of the clown organization, plus Chen Mo personally invited in the past, the technology is certainly not too low.

Let Wei Zhe be the leader, this is the best arrangement.

Upon hearing this position, Wei Zhe’s face was surprised. He did not expect that he would be the head of the department as soon as he came. His predecessor was a hacker, and Chen Mo’s unconditional trust made him feel unspeakable.

"Yes." Wei Zhe nodded.

"I will make the contract ready, and the salary will be in accordance with the standards of the supervisor of the second-level department. Come over tomorrow, confirm that the contract is ok, and sign the contract and you can go straight to work." Zhao Min said.

"Good." Wei Zhe got up and looked at Chen Mo: "Thank you for your suggestion yesterday, she promised me, she asked me to come here to work."

"Congratulations." Chen Mo smiled.

After Wei Zhe left, Chen Mocai discovered the curious eyes of Xiao Yu and Zhao Min.

"What advice did you give him yesterday?" asked Zhao Min.

"Teach him to chase the girl." Chen Mo said.

When the sound just fell, I found two people with a strange face. Xiaoyu did not say anything and hurriedly left the office.

Talking to Zhao Min about the company, Chen Mocai returned to the lab.

Now the smudges of the marching ants are everywhere, they are everywhere, they are more than itch, how to pass or how.

When the time comes, everything will be solved.

Digesting the technology of a supercomputer is what he needs to do most now.

chapters.title: Chapter 179: : Chen Mo Is Angry?
chapters.body:
Chapter 179: : Chen Mo Is Angry?

Los Angeles.

Ivy is focused on the computer screen and looks excited. He is playing a big escape, this way of raising, the Colosseum-like struggle, makes him addicted to it.

Every win, there is a great sense of accomplishment.

Ivey, who was hiding in the house, looked at the lens of the scope on the screen, his eyes were excited, and he constantly searched for the target. Seeing the silhouette in the distance, Ai Wei smiled.

Just click the mouse and the screen is black.

"Wodefak?"

Ai Wei violently, looked angry, just thought that when the network was broken, a half-black and white clown appeared on the computer screen.

Cambridge, UK.

Ellie stared at the screen, and the evil smile looked more like a mockery. The last second was still watching the TV show, and the mask appeared in the next second. This mask, familiar with it, is a recent clown.

The threat of the clown is not a joke, and the clown organization claims that the indiscriminate attack has come.

Prime Minister of the Island State.

There are more than a dozen officials sitting in the conference hall, all of whom are leaders of the main positions of the island government.

Everyone has a dignity on his face.

There are news on the other side of the ocean. The United States includes five cities, including Washington, and five cities in the United Kingdom. The clown organization attacked two countries and ten cities at once, which shocked the world.

Indiscriminate attacks, the entire city can not be prevented, and now the United States and the United Kingdom suffered heavy losses. Tokyo has fallen and they refused to pay the ransom.

The goal of the next indiscriminate attack is probably theirs. So they called the officials overnight and came to discuss the countermeasures urgently.

"You talk about it, what should I do?"

Sitting in the first place, a short, fat, small man with a slave, he is the current Prime Minister of the island, Anbei.

"I think the ransom will be paid. The earthquake has just passed and the domestic economy has suffered heavy losses. Our economy is not good at all. This year is declining. If the most important cities are attacked again, I am afraid that our market will really collapse. Said the man sitting on the left side of Anbei.

"We compromise and will be attacked by other parties." The middle-aged man on the right side of Anbei said.

His words fell and the meeting room was quiet.

“We can use the termite system of marching ants,” one official said.

"No, Huaxia people, no one can guarantee that they have left the back door. Computer office system, related to national security, can not use the Chinese system."

At the beginning, some people retorted fiercely and the scene was quiet again.

"The market crashes, we will also be attacked by other parties, I am afraid it will be more troublesome. Secretly contact the clown organization to compromise, as long as we do not pass it out, we still have hope to go."

This sentence, let a few people nod on the field.

The earthquake has just passed, and now the island economy is fragile like a cracked glass, which may collapse at any time. At this time, when I suffered from a large-scale clown virus attack, I was really unable to return to the sky.

"Let people contact the clown." Anbei's eyes flashed for a long time, said openly.

"Foreign media news: The United States has included clown organizations in the list of terrorist organizations. 》

"The United States is discussing the inclusion of marching ants on the sanctions list. 》

"The marching ants really support the clown organization? 》

The next day, the day was over, and the domestic news was overwhelming.

Overnight, ten cities fell and shocked everyone. The speed of this attack is to use pressure to force the two countries to compromise.

Countries that have not been attacked for the time being are also nervous.

New types of cyber terrorism have arrived. This is not a dead person, but it is a huge economic blow.

Chen Mo stood by the window, overlooking the dense media outside the company, with no expression.

The marching ants have huge troubles because of this attack, which led the media to link the marching ant company to the clown organization. Without giving an answer, these people are going to die here.

"Zhao Min, open a temporary press conference." Chen Mo picked up the phone to inform Zhao Min.

On the open space in front of the marching ant company, more than two hundred reporters stood quietly. Around them, in addition to the security of the marching ant company, there are more than 20 police officers who maintain order.

Because of fear of conflict, Zhao Min informed the Municipal Public Security Bureau and sent people to maintain order. In the case of a marching ant company, no one is guaranteed, and an irrational person appears.

Seeing Chen Mo coming out of the office building, the turmoil on the field, the sound of various camera shutters, continuous, all facing Chen Mo.

Chen Mo’s standing on the small podium, everyone is quiet.

"There have been some misunderstandings about the marching ant company in the outside world. Our company has issued a number of statements. I have reiterated here. The marching ant company has never supported the clown organization in any way. As for why the clown organization says so I don't understand the words.

Originally, I did not want to personally respond to these unfounded remarks. The willingness of individual media reports has had a bad influence on our company image. I am here to warn the slang of individual media, the previous reports, I can not go anywhere.

Tolerance is not without a bottom line. From this moment on, there are any articles that link the clown organization with the marching ant company, release false statements, damage the image of our company, and wait for the lawyer's letter. The legal department of the marching ant company is not used for display. ”

Chen Mo’s serious voice made the reporters dead.

They heard that the marching ant company was angry because of this. Chen Mo personally said these words, I am afraid to come true.

"Now, if you have any questions, just ask." After Chen Mo solely warned, he glanced at him: "The first question, give the white shirt in front, the handsome guy in glasses."

The reporter took the microphone and immediately attracted the attention of all the reporters.

"Mr. Chen Mo, there is no intersection between the marching ant company and the clown organization. Why do they say thank you for your technical support?"

After asking this sentence, the male reporter suddenly became nervous. Just now Chen Mocai said that he should not be associated with the clown and the clown. Now he asks this question.

"The computer language they write for viruses is the Chinese character programming language. This is the language I created and is free to the outside world. If this supports the clown organization, I have nothing to say. Technology is not guilty, the company sells iron ore, some people buy Iron makes guns to kill people, which is also a company that sells iron ore?"

"We don't know the inside story. The clown organization said that the support of the army ant company, the existing logic, also points to the marching ants. How can I explain this?" asked the second female reporter who got the problem.

"I don't understand what logic is the logic you are talking about? Or is it your wishful thinking? The clown organization says that you believe? We say why you don't believe it?"

Some media, would rather believe in a kidnapping of the entire city network, blackmail a country's hacking organizations, and do not want to believe in a company that does research and benefit society. Is this your so-called logic? ”

Chen Mo’s fierce rhetoric made the reporters fall into silence.

I saw the marching ants in this scene, and I was applauded. During this time, they were bothered by the news. I have heard a lot of remarks from those companies recently. Chen Mo’s hard sighs gave them a sigh of relief.

"Mr. Chen Mo, rumored that the marching ant company has software to kill and kill the clown virus, but it has not been released. Is this news true?"

"We have already released the smart firewall of the termite system, which is against the clown virus software. As for the separate anti-virus software you are talking about, it is still under study.

The termite system is the most complete computer operating system. Based on the development of the marching ant system, it has a smart firewall and is more secure than any other system.

The Chinese character programming language is a new computer language. This language is not available for a long time, but the software it writes is better than other languages, including virus software. This is a genetic problem. This is why the clown virus is not being killed by existing anti-virus software. Natural selection, survival of the fittest. The Chinese character programming language is a choice for survival. ”

After answering a few questions from the reporter, Chen Mo left and walked back to the office.

Xiaoyu walked into the office and said nothing. He poured a glass of water and handed it to Chen Mo. She and Chen Mo have been together for so long, and for the first time I saw Chen Mo’s face.

"Do you think I am angry?" Chen Mo took the Xiaoyu's water glass and smiled.

He is not going to price these things, it is too pricey, but he must stand up and warn some people, otherwise the company will be distracted by these rumors.

"But you are just scary," said Xiao Yu.

"If I smile face to those people, they will think that we are bullied. People are deceived by people. This is what you taught me at the beginning. Can you learn fast? Please kiss me."

"Thinking of beauty, Zhao Jie stipulated that it is forbidden for anyone to come in the company, want to kiss, wait for the next time to go home." Xiaoyu pushed Chen Mo's head.

After Xiaoyu left, Chen Mo turned to the window. Just after the response, outside the company, there has been no reporters.

"Mer brother, the clown released a message." The voice of the ink girl suddenly sounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 180: : Ending
chapters.body:
Chapter 180: : Ending

"My heart is like this face, half pure white, half shadow, I can choose to let you see, or you can not let you see. This circus performance makes me excited, but it makes you afraid. Because you are Beast, I am a clown.

The ransom scheme was successful, the ransom was received, and it was late at night, the circus performance ended, looking forward to the opening of the next circus. Another statement, someone spent three million dollars, let us say: Thank you for the support of the marching ant company. Finally warned the CIA: Don't think about catching us, otherwise we will attack the global network. ”

The statement of the clown organization silences the world.

Less than half a day after attacking ten cities, it was suddenly announced that the news was so unprepared for everyone.

Who pays the ransom, is the United Kingdom still the United States, or is it an island country? This news has become the focus of everyone's guess. This means that a country compromises with hacker organizations.

The United States has included clown organizations on the list of terrorist organizations, and it is unlikely that clowners will pay ransom.

The rest of the UK and the island countries have become the object of speculation.

After the news came out, the British and island governments rushed to clarify that they did not pay the ransom to the clown organization. As for whether there is any person, it is another matter.

This statement, the marching ant company also condemned some companies colluding with the clown organization to conduct unfair competition and discredit the marching ant company.

Just their voice did not cause much attention.

After Zhao Min came in, Chen Mo put down the work at hand. The clown organization announced that it had stopped, and Chen Mo just started to pay attention. Later, he stopped paying attention: "What happened now?"

"It’s very lively. All three countries said that they did not pay the ransom to the clown. As a result, the opposition parties in the three countries attacked the politicians and compromised with the terrorist organizations.

After the last news of the clown organization, it disappeared, and even the global clown virus disappeared in the shortest time. Because of the ransom payment, the opposition parties of the three countries madly attacked the ruling party. Now the three countries are in a state of turmoil, and all kinds of scandals are flying all over the sky.

"The clown is a very interesting circus. The whole world is being played as a monkey," said Zhao Min.

One of the clown's tweets stirred up the global storm, and each country was played around. Zhao Min had to admire the crazy people.

"I am a bit curious, who is the local tyrant who gave the clown a word for three million dollars."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo and instinctively told her that Chen Mo knew. This man seems to know everything, and the sky is falling down. It is a calm and calm appearance. It seems that there is nothing that can arouse the waves in his heart.

"Microsoft." Chen Mo said calmly.

This answer is in the expectation of Zhao Min. After listening to Chen Mo’s answer, Zhao Min stared at him. She became more and more curious about this man: “I, the insider, suspects that you have a connection with the clown organization.”

"I am not so boring, to blackmail the world." Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min, who looked straight, and said strangely: "You should be not interested in the younger brother."

Zhao Min realized that he was dysfunctional and returned to God. His face was a little red. Chen Mo actually used her to ridicule him, and teased back.

Her appearance makes Chen Mo more weird. Knowing Zhao Min for so long, this is the first time he saw Zhao Min: "It won't be a New Year. You need to bring your boyfriend to go home? I can't help this busy."

Zhao Min was almost laughed at by Chen Mo: "Sister is an unmarried person. Now, the salary for one year is enough for me to eat for a lifetime, free and comfortable, but what about men?"

"Yes." Chen Moxiao nodded his face and couldn't bear to look straight: "Freedom."

"To say the right thing is to go to the capital to carry out the earthquake warning network launching ceremony, tomorrow afternoon ticket."

The day after tomorrow is the day when the earthquake warning network is launched. They must arrive in the capital one day in advance. The National Earthquake Early Warning Network was officially launched, which is a very important day.

The seismograph produced by the marching ant company during this period will be delivered to the Seismological Bureau as soon as possible after the test is completed. In the shortest period of time, people in the Seismic Bureau send the seismograph to the area where it needs to be monitored, and the actual test and data collection are also carried out at the same time.

After the earthquake in the island, the domestic people’s gray memories of the earthquake disaster were aroused.

There are marching ant company seismographs, which issued various priority policies, and with the help of the Earthquake Administration and the Institute of Geophysics of the Huaxia Academy of Sciences, the earthquake warning network was completed in the shortest time.

Capital International Airport.

Already in the evening, Li Chengzhi was waiting at the airport gate. He was standing next to him and stood with a man and a woman. This is the driver responsible for receiving Chen Mo and his party.

Both of them were expressionless, but their eyes were fixed at the airport gate. They all know that the person responsible for the transfer is the owner of the marching ant company. They watched the boss of the marching ant company on TV, but the contact was the first time.

Not long after, there was a pedestrian at the airport gate.

Chen Mo took a scarf and carried two suitcases, which looked like ordinary youth. On the left side of Chen Mo is Xiao Yu, on the right is Zhao Min, one after the other is two bodyguards of Wang Hai and White Pearl, a very simple lineup.

When Chen Mo and others came out, Li Chengzhi greeted him and simply said hello.

"You can wait for this, this weather is not generally cool." Li Chengzhi laughed.

"Working hard, old man." Chen Mo said.

"You're welcome, you marched the ant company, this time made a big event that benefited the country and the people, and it was a big event. I just waited for a while, and it was insignificant." Hearing Chen Mo calling him a brother, Li Chengzhi laughed.

"It’s almost stinking for a long time."

Chen Mo handed the suitcase to Wang Hai and drilled into the car. Xiao Yu and Zhao Min also followed in and the group went to the hotel where they stayed.

"You said the clown organization? To be honest, we were also scared of a cold sweat. In a few cities, the loss was immeasurable. As far as I know, during that time, cyber security personnel constantly monitored the network for 24 hours, for fear of appearing. situation."

When Li Chengzhi said this, he looked awkward. If the most important cities in the country are disconnected at the same time, no one can calculate the loss.

"You can use the termite system, I will give you a discount." Chen Mo smiled.

"Chen Mo brothers are more and more temperamental, and three sentences are not separated from the bank." Li Chengzhi smiled and took out a document and handed it to Xiao Yu: "This is the specific process of the launch ceremony tomorrow, Miss He, look, Then tell him, there is one more thing."

Li Chengzhi suddenly became serious. The next words are the key points.

"Tomorrow morning, the head wants to meet you, and then go to the launching ceremony. Someone will pick you up in the morning, get ready before 8:30, no problem?"

The location of the interview did not say clearly, Chen Mo and Zhao Min looked at each other and immediately understood. These arrangements are expected, but Li Chengzhi said, let them look forward to it.

"No problem." Chen Mo nodded.

chapters.title: Chapter 181: : Tell The Head Of The Class?
chapters.body:
Chapter 181: : Tell The Head Of The Class?

Early the next morning, Xiao Yu woke up Chen Mo, and helped him to finish the game early.

With Zhao Min sitting up and picking up the car, Chen Mo looked at the environment inside the car and regained his gaze. The interior of the car is very simple, without a superb accessory, completely different from the decorations on those luxury cars.

The car body is heavy and the space inside the car is spacious enough to give a calm feeling and comfort, no worse than those luxury cars. The luxury car is a high-profile show, this car is a low-key luxury. Calm and calm, very consistent with the official image.

This car is the special car that picks them up. In the co-pilot position, I am sitting here to pick up his youth. Keep a short flat head, named Xu Yuan. Xu Yuan respects the performance of the two, but does not speak on their own initiative.

Chen Mo and Zhao Min did not speak, simply turned their eyes to the window, looking at the scenery outside the window and the traffic coming and going. There are not many traffic, mainly because their hotels are not in a busy location, avoiding the congestion of the capital's working hours.

In about fifteen minutes, the car finally arrived at the destination.

Zhongnanhai, this historical royal garden, is now the central brain of China, the symbol and synonym of the highest administrative power, and one of the places where the world is full of mystery.

Some of the buildings here are full of history. Since it is not open to the public, public publications have very few descriptions here, making the world feel very mysterious. Chen Mo and Zhao Min are the first to see this place.

After the car stopped, a middle-aged man walked to Chen Mo and looked like a secretary. Under his guidance, the two finally saw the No. 1 head.

The sixty-year-old man looks more like a middle-aged man. The body is strong, and it is full of spirits. Majesty, harmony, this is Chen Mo's first impression.

After seeing Chen Mo and Zhao Min, the head of the first one smiled.

Chen Mo, who has always been calm and calm, is a little nervous at this time. I used to see it only on TV. Now I feel so a bit unreal.

"I have been chanting to meet the little heroes. Today I finally got my wish. It is really a surprise. I really have a talent." The head of the No. 1 took Chen Mo’s hand and showed a friendly smile.

Upon hearing the head of the No. 1 head, Chen Mo’s body humbly said: “The head, you are polite, can help the country and the people to exert a little strength, it is my honor, and also the honor of the marching ant company.”

Chen Mo’s calm and calm look, coupled with the words of not being humble and not humble, has quite a temperament.

The head of the No. 1 looked at Chen Mo and looked at it. He said with emotion: "Jiangshan has talented people, and he has created a world at a young age. When I was as old as you, I was still the captain in the township. You young people."

A few people on the field were surprised. In just a few words, they know that the head is very concerned about Chen Mo. There are few young people in the country who can get praise from the heads.

After Chen Mo and Zhao Min simply chilled, several talents sat down and entered the theme.

"The marching ants help to establish an earthquake warning network, which is a great event for the benefit of the country and the people. The country has these talents and it is the blessing of the people of the country. Here, I thank the army people for the domestic ants company." Opening.

"The head of the army, the army ants rely on the state and social support, only to today, and now also to give back to the community." Chen Mo said.

Seismographs that are networked in China are all cost price. So a huge number of seismographs are sold to other countries at their price, which is a lot of money.

"Well, yes, very good. At a young age, there is an idea to give back to the society." Head No. 1 looked at Chen Mo with admiration: "This time, please come over, I want to hear your views on the future development of science and technology."

Chen Mo organized his thoughts before he introduced it.

"Future technology, the most prominent is artificial intelligence. In terms of artificial intelligence, marching ants are better at it. If needed in the future, robots can replace most of the jobs, humans can do the work, they can do it, our company is also researching Robot housekeeper."

"Is it the Internet conference exhibition?" The No. 1 leader took over.

"I didn't expect the headmaster to know that it is really that. But there are some technical restrictions, but I believe that it will be able to break through very quickly. It won't take long for our company's robots to enter the market. It can be a housekeeper, babysitter, or some more dangerous. Occupations, such as working at heights, don't worry about their dangers."

"Is the price not low?"

"Not low." Chen Mo said: "So it is not for special needs, it is impossible for all people to use."

No. 1 head nodded and thought about it: "Internet technology? What do you think of the recent clown virus?"

"Network security is no longer there. We have emphasized this many times. The Chinese programming language is a computer language that I created. It is different from the existing high-level language and is higher than the high-level language.

The clown virus is a programming language programming language. The current anti-virus software cannot recognize the virus program programmed by Chinese characters, so there is no network security at present.

More and more hackers are aware of the special, future, technical talents of Chinese characters, which are very important. If you still use the current computer system, there may be a second clown in the future, and even the third clown appears, the network is already insecure. ”

The people on the field did not think that Chen Mo was joking. In terms of Chinese character programming, Chen Mo is the absolute authority in this field.

Some days ago, the clown virus really made many people frightened.

First, the United Kingdom, then the United States, and then to the island country, many people in the country are worried that the next target is China, but fortunately, the clown organization has announced the end, so that many people in many big cities in the country are relieved.

"But the security status is relatively speaking. Our company's termite system has a smart firewall and is the safest computer system at the moment. The semi-smart virus of the clown virus is useless to the termite system. It can help build a stable and secure office. Environment. If you need to purchase equipment, consider us."

In the last sentence, Zhao Min’s eyes sitting next to him bent and squinted and almost laughed. Chen Mo is too strong, and he actually sells the company's products to the No. 1 head, and the most cattle salesman does not dare to do this.

The head of the first one also smiled softly. This Chen Mo is true enough, and there are young people's style and courage, which makes him appreciate it.

"When it comes to Chinese character programming, there is still an important thing about this." Chen Mo's face became a whole and became cautious: "The use of Chinese character programming to develop artificial intelligence will be better than other languages."

This matter will be studied sooner or later. Since he has already published Chinese character programming, this matter mentioned at least, it can at least allow domestic researchers to take less detours and waste less time.

The head of the army asked him to come over and let him talk about it, which is to give reference for future decisions. Every year, they have to do collective learning. The lecturers are research experts and scholars in various fields, as well as leading figures.

Now the head is just trying to listen to Chen Mo’s thoughts. Inside the marching ant company, there are many world-leading technologies. With Chen Mo as an exploration, their decision-making can have a good reference.

If you get the affirmation of the number one, the promotion of the Chinese character programming language will not worry about him in the future.

Upon hearing the last sentence of Chen Mo, the head of the first one gently responded.

The artificial intelligence of the marching ant company has sprung up and is at the forefront of the world when it first appears. This is probably the reason.

The people present did not think that Chen Mo dared to fool the head, which was a big trouble. Therefore, Chen Mo said so solemnly that they must also take it seriously.

chapters.title: Chapter 182: : The Worry Of The People Of The Food
chapters.body:
Chapter 182: : The Worry Of The People Of The Food

The Capital Earthquake Base Station, located in the western suburbs of Baiji, began to record the earthquake and geomagnetism from the International Geophysical Year 60 years ago. It has a variety of observation methods, and is an important base for domestic seismic observation and geophysical research. It is also a platform for international earthquake and geomagnetic data editing and exchange.

Here is the scene of the launching ceremony of today's earthquake warning network.

In the winter of the capital, a few days of snow, it is rare to clear today. Repeated sunshine gives the winter a little warmth. At the ceremony, the crowd was crowded, and many reporters were broadcasting live.

After the seismograph came out, the earthquake warning network was officially launched. This will indicate that future earthquake predictions have become possible.

As everyone looked forward to it, a team appeared and stopped in a special area of the ceremony venue.

"Chen Mo, is the seismograph designed by you? Tell me what interesting stories happened when you designed the seismograph." The head of the army called Chen Mo to the side with a friendly smile.

Chen Mo nodded and his brain was running fast. He could not say that the seismograph was obtained from the technology library. The existence of the science and technology library is his highest secret.

“When I saw the earthquake disaster report, I thought it would be better to have an earthquake warning. When I was reading, I learned all the knowledge of physics, including vibration, electromagnetics, thermals, mechanics, etc., and later read about earthquake warning. Knowledge, I began to sort out the relevant theories. Until the company has money, I will practice the original idea..."

Chen Mo was arrogantly talking nonsense. Anyway, except for himself, no one knows the truth, he said it is true, it is true.

"To tell an interesting story is to publish a research paper on earthquake warning. The natural weekly magazine has been rejected, both domestic and foreign. It was sent to the official website, and I wanted to find the sound, and the result was completely ruined."

Chen Mo said all the way, the head is also listening carefully.

"From the pressure, I developed the first seismograph. After the introduction of Li Chengzhi, I met Mr. Wu Zhen from the Academy of Sciences, and then began the test of the seismograph."

His introduction is very simple, but it falls in the ears of other people. How many hardships can be imagined.

"A lot of great discoveries are not understood at first," the head said after listening.

The group arrived at the scene and began to greet the staff involved in the seismograph installation test.

Wu Zhen is full of red light, and his color is written on his face, as if he were a young teenager. His lifelong wish is to hope to warn the earthquake, without the pain of his family in the earthquake disaster.

For this wish, he changed his name to Wu Zhen, and at the age of the upcoming land, he finally fulfilled this wish.

After installing the seismograph, the data is tested at all times.

The specific data collection is completed. Below the magnitude 5.0 earthquake, the accuracy of the warning is about 92%. The higher the earthquake level, the higher the accuracy.

There are no earthquakes of too high level in China. The specific accuracy rate cannot be judged. The high-level earthquakes are obtained from the seismic instruments of the Pacific Ocean. The known earthquakes are successfully predicted.

The test work has already been completed, and today is just a ceremony. The actual seismic network, put into use early, will not be interrupted by a ceremony.

Even a ceremony, he is still happy. This means that the era of earthquake warning is coming to the world.

When he was happy, the heads and Chen Mo and others had already come to him.

"Mr. Wu Lao, I have worked hard." The head took Wu Zhen’s hand.

Feeling the warmth of the hand, Wu Zhen’s eyes were hot, and the scene of his loved ones being crushed under the rubble was still vivid.

After returning to God, Wu Zhen opened his mouth and his voice was a little choked: "Not hard, the food of the people, the worry of the people."

In the last sentence, Chen Mo secretly admired. Numerous unknown scientists have supported the country in the past decades and become stronger and stronger, not seeking fame and fortune. Just like Mr. Wu Zhen’s old saying, the food of the people is the worry of the people.

"Mr. Wu Lao, congratulations on your wish." Chen Mo congratulated Wu Zhen.

"I should thank you." After seeing Chen Mo, Wu Zhen cast a grateful look.

All the workers and employee representatives who participated in the seismograph installation test were shaking hands with the heads. Or excited, or pleasantly surprised, everyone has a different mood.

The staff area of the marching ant company stands with the technical staff of the marching ant company and the employees involved in the assembly of the seismograph.

“They are all the ants of the marching ants, representatives of the assemblers, and participate in the manufacture and assembly of seismograph parts.”

After coming to the area of the marching ant company, Chen Mo began to introduce. Every employee is straight and his face is full of pride. After shaking hands with the head, he is even more excited.

"There is also a special employee, it is the enchanting robot of the marching ant - the demon."

Chen Mo took everyone to the front of a robot.

"It's chip is loaded with all the data about the assembly of the seismograph. At the beginning of the assembly, it was responsible for teaching other employees to assemble and explain, and sometimes also participating in the assembly of the seismograph. There are five robots involved in the assembly, responsible for assisting five Team assembly."

In order to let this robot participate in the ceremony, Zhao Min took a lot of effort and was approved after numerous confirmations and inspections.

But the meaning is special, even if there are many procedures, Zhao Min also makes people do this.

It is no secret that the marching ant company has intelligent robots. The use of robots is being tested and it is possible to launch the market in the future.

"The head is good." Chen Mo's words fell, and the enchantress robot spoke.

"Hello there."

The head looked up and down the robot and smiled and shook hands with the robot. Shaking hands with the robot, he is also the first time. The robot's flexible and smooth movements, which I don't know, are thought to be pretending to be real, and the intelligence is too high.

"Working hard."

"It is an honor to be able to participate in the assembly of seismographs."

Hearing the voice of the demon, the people on the field laughed and sighed at the advanced technology of the marching ant company.

The head smiled and nodded, but my heart was thinking. He saw this robot in the video during the exhibition of the Internet conference. The location is special, and he considers things more and more comprehensive than others.

After the robot came out, some social problems caused by them need to be considered. Now is an open society, technology is changing too fast, and the future is in sight.

"A good little demon, I look forward to your active innovation and better benefit the society and the people." The head nodded and looked at the small fish around the robot.

When the head was seen looking at her, Xiao Yu immediately became nervous.

The old man, who used to see it on television and mobile news, was so close, it was the first time, saying that he was not nervous and not excited, it was a fake.

"She is my girlfriend, He Xiaoyu, and Zhao Min's assistant. When the earthquake warning paper came out, Xiao Yu believes me and spends the time with me." Chen Mo smiled and said: "There is her support." Only today's seismographs are available."

"The head is good."

Chen Mo introduced this, so that Xiao Yu's face was red, and Chen Mo praised her for being embarrassed. Holding the head of the head, it was a bit nervous, but the manner was decent.

"Hello." The head smiled: "It’s precious to be in the same boat."

"Thank you for your head." Xiao Yu heavy nodded.

After all the representatives and staff members greeted it again, all the talents were seated and the launching ceremony was started.

chapters.title: Chapter 183: : See Parents?
chapters.body:
Chapter 183: : See Parents?

Dongjiang City.

A girl is sitting on the sofa playing a mobile game, looks a little excited, can see the little tiger teeth when laughing. If Chen Mo is here, she will definitely feel familiar. She and Xiao Yu are similar in nine points, but the temperament of the two is different. Xiao Yu feels gentle, but this girl is smart.

"Small man, you look at it, this is not a small fisherman." Next to the girl, a middle-aged woman watching TV shocked and anxiously shouted. She is the mother of Xiao Yu, Wang Lan.

"Sister is back?" Xiaoman put down his mobile phone and immediately looked at the door, empty.

"On the TV."

Xiao Man Shun Shun looked at the TV screen and saw the small fishing in the live broadcast of the news.

"Is this your sister? How did she shake hands with the head?" He mother pointed at the TV, and her face was still uncertain.

After seeing the content of the news, Xiao Man was amazed: "It is the sister, the sister is working in the army ant company."
