"It’s really her, it seems that the small fisherman has a good time." He mother with a proud smile on her face.

"There is indeed a lot of money." Xiao Man laughed badly: "Mom, look at the handsome young man next to the leader, his boyfriend."

Not a sister of the pit sister, not a good sister.

"What? Xiaoyu has a boyfriend? Why didn't she say that?" Hemu's voice improved a few points, with a surprised face.

"Mom, now is a free love. Sister is not too small, isn't it normal to find a boyfriend?" Xiaoman snickered in his heart when he thought about what was going to happen.

"Who is this young man?" asked He.

"The boss of the marching ant company, called Chen Mo, and the sister are the same school." Xiao Man said. Her mother is not concerned about this, so she must talk to her carefully.

"Where is the family? How many brothers and sisters at home?"

"Mom, you can call this sister, she knows best." Xiaoman got up.

"You won't lie to Mom?" He mother stared at Xiao Man unbelievably.

"I definitely don't lie to you, you don't believe to call the sister, let her bring it back in the New Year." Xiaoman laughed.

He mother picked up the phone and thought that Xiaoyu was working now. Finally, let go: "Your dad returns to the ship tonight, wait for your dad to come back, then call again. He opened the company, the family is very rich?"

"He is the richest young man in the country." Xiao Man said.

"Does this?" The news made her mother happy, and her eyes were a little worried.

The small fishing of the Capital Earthquake Base Station, at this time, did not know at all, was deared by the dear sister, was sitting under the stage, attention was on Chen Mo, and the eyes flashed proudly.

When Chen Mo and the leader's hand pressed on the starter ball, all the shots were aligned on the stage.

For the world, this is a signal.

The era of earthquake warnings was announced when they pressed the start button. For human history, this is a major event in the history books.

The process of human evolution is the process of struggle with nature. Earthquakes can be early warning, which means that human beings can further their ability to cope with natural disasters.

The ceremony ended in a series of reports.

Yan Fei took the microphone and took the photographer to Chen Mo’s direction.

On this special day, I was able to interview Chen Mo, and the opportunity was rare. This is her first interview with such a senior figure.

Going to Chen Mo, Fei Fei is a little nervous.

"Hello, Mr. Chen Mo."

"Hello." Chen Mo said politely.

"What do you want to say most on this special day?" Fei Fei looked at Chen Mo and looked forward to it.

"The weather is a bit cold, I want to go back to bed and sleep." Chen Mo smiled.

Hearing this answer, Fei Fei stayed for two seconds, but this can't be followed: "When the seismograph was invented, what interesting stories have happened? Can you share it with us?"

“Interesting thing? When I submitted the earthquake warning paper, I was rejected by Nature magazine. Is this a bad? It’s also very fast, I will reply that night. The manuscript was rejected twice, I will post to the official website of the marching ant. The facts prove that the authority is wrong." Chen Mo said: "So admonish young scholars, authority is not always right."

"Einstein said: Because of my contempt for authority, fate punishes me and makes me an authority. You are this situation, and now you are also an authority. Before I interviewed, many viewers wanted to ask What is the next product of the marching ant company?"

"The next product? I don't know which product is successful, which one." Chen Mo smiled: "But there is a message to announce. After today, the seismograph is officially sold, and countries interested in buying seismographs can Submit an order to our company."

This unexpected news made Fei Fei a bit surprised.

After the interview, Chen Mo got on the bus and rushed back to the hotel where he stayed. The launching ceremony has been completed. This time I came to the capital. The people I met also met. If you take a break, you should rush back to the company.

The news of the launch of the China Earthquake Early Warning Network has spread throughout the world. This is an epoch-making event, and the most concerned is the country with frequent earthquakes.

Before the marching ant company always said that the output was not enough, refused to export, and now officially exported, which means that the global earthquake warning era is about to bring.

"The marching ants should disclose seismograph technology. 》

"I hope that China will open up seismograph technology for the benefit of mankind. 》

......

After the marching ants announced the exit of the seismograph, let the marching ants publicize the sound of the seismograph technology. It’s just another matter that nobody cares.

In the lobby of the hotel room, Xiao Yu took the phone. She is a bit strange, why is the mother calling me so late?

"Mom, didn't you sleep so late?"

"Your dad just came back, I heard that you have a boyfriend?" He mother went straight to the subject.

Sitting beside her, she was still sitting in a middle-aged man with dark skin and serious face. He is Xiao Zheng’s father, He Zhenghua. When he came back, he said that his most beloved daughter had a boyfriend, and his heart was still a little uncomfortable.

Next to the two, Xiao Man grinned.

"Mom, why did you suddenly ask this?" Xiao Yu glanced at Chen Mo sitting next to him.

"You are not a big boss. If you have a boyfriend, bring it back and let your parents see it." Hemu said: "Other than your father and I don't trust."

"Okay." Xiao Yu spit out his tongue.

"Remember, if he bullies you, you look for my father." He Zhenghua on the side spoke.

When I heard my father's words, Xiao Man grinned and almost laughed. The feeling of this pit sister is not ordinary fun.

"He won't bully me." Xiao Yu laughed and laughed.

"Remember, bring it back in the New Year." He mother groaned again.

After hanging up the phone, Xiaoyu hesitated and looked at Chen Mo: "My mom just called."

"And then?" Chen Mo put down his books and looked at Xiao Yu.

"They know that I have a boyfriend, my mom said, let me take you back in the New Year, they want to see you." Xiaoyu looked forward to Chen Mo.

"See the parents?" Chen Mo smiled: "Yes."

“Really?” Xiao Yu’s face is a joy.

"Crap, no parents, your parents still don't think I will sell their daughters." Chen Mo put the book in a good position, picked up a small fishing: "Look if you can take two back."

chapters.title: Chapter 184: : The Benefits Of Monopoly
chapters.body:
Chapter 184: : The Benefits Of Monopoly

early morning.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were eating breakfast in the room, and the door knocked. When they opened the door, Zhao Min walked in a professional dress.

"Isn't it a day of rest for a long time? Is it so formal?" Chen Mo looked at Zhao Min and sat back on the table to eat breakfast: "Would you like?"

"I am born to work." Zhao Min said: "The Embassy of New Zealand came to the news, they want to discuss the purchase of seismographs."

"So fast?"

Upon hearing this news, Chen Mo was a bit surprised. Yesterday, he told reporters that he announced the seismograph exportable. Now he came to the news that New Zealand wants to buy a seismograph.

It can be seen that New Zealand is too late to want a seismograph. But think about it too, this island country, located in the earthquake zone, is not a small loss every year in the earthquake. If it is a tsunami of a super earthquake, I am afraid it will be even more horrible.

"I will inform you, after breakfast, do you want to go together?" Zhao Min asked.

"What am I going to do? If you talk about business, you will be enough. Let Xiaoyu go with you, I will not join in the fun." Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Zhao Min sat on the sofa and waited quietly.

Soon, Xiao Yu Cao had breakfast and changed clothes, and Zhao Min left the room.

Mai Kang looked at the time and looked at the door. Yesterday Chen Mo announced that the seismograph can be exported. For them, this is good news.

In the evening, the domestic news came, let him negotiate with the marching ant company to buy seismographs.

After seeing the disaster of the island country earthquake and tsunami, the people in New Zealand were heart-wrenching. Geographically speaking, the two countries have similarities and are located in the earthquake zone.

The researchers have concluded that the Hikulangi subduction zone has been divided into three segments. If the three sections break at the same time, it may cause an earthquake of magnitude 9.0. The study found that the three sections did have fractures, and the devastating earthquake was likely to be ushered in from the top of the South Island to the northern Gisborne trench.

The earthquake is not the most terrible existence, and the tsunami that accompanied the earthquake is the most terrible.

If a devastating earthquake produces a tsunami, the tsunami will reach the coastline within a few minutes, and the coastal area will become a vast ocean. People living in it will not have enough time to escape.

Seismographs appeared and let them see hope. Early warning of the earthquake, they can get more escape time. Therefore, after the marching ant company announced the export of the seismograph, the country informed him to contact the marching ant company.

Just as the president and boss of the marching ant are in the capital, he immediately contacted.

When Zhao Min appeared, Mai Kang was relieved and smiled on his face: "President Zhao, hello."

"Hello, Ambassador Michael," said Zhao Min.

"Sit, I called breakfast, and talked while eating."

In the right hand area of McCann, Zhao Min and others were seated. There are not many people on the field, only Zhao Min and Xiao Yu, Mai Kang, and a female translator.

“In the news, your boss said that the seismograph can be exported?” Mai Kang went straight to the point.

“Well, we have already completed the domestic order and can indeed export.”

"That would be great." Mai Kang slammed his face and smiled on his face: "We really want to buy a seismograph, but here is the price? Can it be lower?"

After listening to the female translator, Zhao Min shook his head: "I am sorry Mr. McCain, the price can not be lower. The price of 50 million US dollars is actually not expensive."

Zhao Min’s words made Mai Kang’s face twitch.

This is not expensive? The marching ant company is clearly asking for the price, and they have to pay for it.

"The quantity we ordered is relatively large, can't it be low?" Mai Kang is a little bit unwilling, a $50 million one, not cheap for anyone.

"Mc. Ambassador Kang, the seismograph is not production line. The large quantity does not mean that the production price will become lower." Zhao Min said: "If you need it, it is best to place an order early. Once you have placed orders in other countries, you have to wait for a while. Time, the price will not change."

"This price is a little more expensive, lower it, 20 million dollars, we can place an order now." Mai Kang said with pride.

"Sorry, Ambassador McConnell. Seismographs will not be cheap. They are sold to you for 50 million US dollars. They are sold to the United States or the island countries. They are also 50 million US dollars. The price will not change. If you insist on price, just waste us. Time." Zhao Min said no hurry.

"You think about how many people can be saved if the earthquake warning is one hour ahead of schedule? How much loss is lost? Is human life negligible for the money to buy a seismograph?"

As soon as the words were finished, the box was quiet and McCann’s eyes flickered. Zhao Min bite the price, iron heart will not cut prices, he has no way, do not buy the seismograph of the marching ant company, no more.

When other countries have studied it, I don’t know if it’s going to be a monkey, and the daylily is cold. The earthquake is a natural disaster. No one knows when this disaster will come.

"Since Ambassador MacKang needs to consider, then I will go back first, there is still a meeting, consider contacting us again. But fast, we will go back to Binhai this afternoon, next time you contact, you have to go to Binhai to find me. "Zhao Min finished, with Xiaoyu ready to leave."

"Okay, look forward to seeing us again."

Looking at Zhao Min's back, Mai Kang frowned, and after a while, took out the phone. The marching ant does not make concessions on the price, he must also contact the country to determine whether to buy or not, after all, the transaction amount is too large.

"The Prime Minister, the marching ant company refused to cut prices, and killed 50 million dollars in one bite. It didn't mean to loosen it."

"Do you? Wait for the notice first, and I will let you know if there is any news."

Chen Mo was in the room and saw Xiao Yu and Zhao Min coming in and asked: "How is it?"

"It is still unclear, saying that the price is too high is still considered, but they have a strong willingness to buy. Seismographs only have us, the advantage of monopoly is how much we say, how much money." Zhao Min smiled.

“Well, how much is this order expected?”

“If New Zealand wants to cover the whole world, how do you calculate it?”

"About 15 units." Chen Mo thought about the area of New Zealand.

"Plus they have to install a few on the sea floor, it will be nearly 20 units, 1 billion US dollars." Zhao Min said: "Our customers are a country, this kind of money, do not earn a hand, are sorry for the seismograph. ”

Chen Mo smiled and nodded. If he had money, he wouldn’t be too much, and these **** came to peace of mind: "Would you like to stay in Beijing for two more days and wait for the New Zealand Ambassador’s reply?"

"No, they don't know when they can think about it. We don't have to waste time waiting, it's the same, this afternoon's plane. When they want to talk, they should take the initiative to contact us."

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo also went out to the capital with a small fishing, and bought something by the way. In the afternoon, New Zealand still did not return news. Chen Mo and Zhao Min and others also took the scheduled flight and rushed back to Binhai.

chapters.title: Chapter 185: : Profiteering
chapters.body:
Chapter 185: : Profiteering

On the second day of returning to Binhai City, ambassadors from several countries came to the marching ant company to visit, all for the seismograph.

With the establishment of the first truly earthquake warning network in China, the heat of the seismograph has swept the world. Countries that have suffered huge earthquake disasters want to establish an earthquake warning network.

The high price of seismographs caused public outcry. Netizens in many countries have bombarded the army ants company to monopolize the market, but the official government does not dare to say anything more.

It is useless to come out to protest or sanction the marching ant company at this time. The market for marching ants in overseas markets is not too much. Sanctions have little effect on marching ants, and once they provoke marching ants, the earthquake warning network does not want to be established.

In order to reduce the loss when the earthquake comes, each country can only hold the nose and accept the unmanned price of the marching ant company.

Zhao Min took the folder and went into Chen Mo's office.

During this time, all her energy was placed on discussing the seismographs with representatives of various countries, and today, finally, it has come to an end.

"The seismometer export talks became, this is the entire list and contract. New Zealand ordered 16 units, Chile 14 units, Indonesia 47 units, Mexico 35 units, island countries 25 units, lost the last $100 million damage to the seismograph There are 24 in India and 20 in Turkey with a total of 181 orders.

These seismographs are produced and we have more than $9 billion in revenue. The earthquake in Nepal yesterday was not a small loss. Today their ambassador has contacted us. The order is being talked about. There should be only two or three. ”

Hearing this number, Chen Mo was surprised.

The $9 billion was exchanged for Huaxia, and there were nearly 60 billion seismometers costing more than 3 million. This number is almost negligible. This is definitely a horrible profit.

"Is it very shocking? This is the monopoly of profits." Zhao Min calmly said: "Our customers are based on the state, the money is just a small amount of money."

As Zhao Min said, their customers are a country. Although the money is large, it can be brought out in a slightly economic country. In this respect, the opposition parties in those countries dare not oppose it. After all, this is for the benefit of the people, and the opposition is against the people.

"The United States, Germany and Russia also want to buy, but they have few orders, only two in each country, I have not given a reply. They want to import seismographs, copy their own production. Technical confidentiality, no problem?" Zhao Min asked.

"Don't worry about the technology leak, as long as there is money, who wants to sell it." Chen Mo said: "The core system algorithm, already encrypted, only I know. I didn't get the most critical algorithm, imitate it, there is no soul. Body.

"Understood." Zhao Min nodded.

After Zhao Min left, Chen Mo refocused his attention on the computer. The company's business, he only knows occasionally, the specific matter is responsible for Zhao Min, do not have to worry about him: "Ink girl, continue to organize information."

"Good." The ink girl opened.

From the capital back to the company, there is nothing else, Chen Mo has been staying in the office area, and the information on supercomputers has been almost completed.

Supercomputers can perform large amounts of data and high-speed operations that PCs cannot handle.

Although the components are not much different from the ordinary computer concept, the performance of the supercomputer is unmatched by ordinary computers.

It has powerful data processing capabilities, characterized by high computing speed and large capacity. Because of the speciality of the supercomputer, it has a lot of special peripherals, and there is a need for a specialized large computer system.

Computer system problems, ink women can solve, without his worry.

The characteristics of supercomputers just meet the needs of artificial intelligence.

It is mostly used for cutting-edge technology research. If it can become the place where the ink girl lives, the speed of the ink girl's operation is definitely more horrible, and his help is even greater.

Now he is studying superconducting computers.

The superconducting computer uses superconducting technology to produce computer components. Its switching speed reaches several microseconds, and the computing speed is one hundred times faster than that of current electronic computers. The electric energy consumption is only one thousandth of the ordinary supercomputer.

This means that after the completion of the superconducting computer, the superconducting computer does not have to occupy a large area like a supercomputer, consumes a lot of power, and has powerful computing power.

The study of superconducting computers is very important for the future. Once the superconducting computer comes out, in the future technical research, the calculation speed of the ink girl will be faster.

Until the ink woman reminded that Xiaoyu entered the office area, Chen Mocai stopped.

"Get off work, if you wait below, we are going to go shopping and buy something, you want to be together." Xiao Yu said.

"Good." Chen Mo picked up his jacket and left the office area with a small fishing.

Just arrived at the company downstairs, I saw Li Ruozhen waiting. "The boss is good, the boss is good." Li Ruoxi smiled and bowed to the two.

"Don't make trouble, let's go." Xiao Yu's face was red, and he took Li Ruoxuan and walked toward the car where Wang Hai was.

In the commercial plaza, there are various activities everywhere. The decoration is festive and the flow of people is much more than before. Chen Mo, Xiao Yu and Li Ruojun are one of them.

Chen Mo took a mask and was afraid that others would recognize it. This is required by Xiaoyu, because the last time he came out, he was chased by many girls to take a group photo, which caused a lot of trouble.

The rise of the marching ant company, coupled with the seismograph, Chen Mo’s reputation in the country reached a peak. Being famous is a bunch of troubles, and you can be recognized wherever you go.

"What gift do you want for the New Year?" Chen Mo asked.

Li Ruoxuan's eyes bent, pulled a small fishing, gave her a look, Xiao Yu immediately shook his head. Seeing the strange eye contact between the two, Chen Mo wondered.

"what's wrong?"

"Nothing." By Xiao Yu, Li Ruoyong hurriedly shook his head: "Big boss, this gift, you have to prepare yourself, you have sincerity. She told you to buy, and then give it to her, it is not a surprise."

Chen Mo smashed his head and said: "It seems like this is the case."

"You should think about it, women like something, and you haven't given it to her." Li Ruoxi smiled.

"If you don't, don't talk nonsense." Xiao Yu's face was reddish and looked at the store: "I and Ruo to buy some girl's supplies, do you want to come over?"

"Hey? Still not." Chen Mo looked at Li Ruowei next to him and hurriedly shook his head: "You go buy it first, I also buy something. If you buy it, give me a call." If Li Ruo is not present, he may still be together, now Go to it.

"Well, then you go to see what gifts are there, and soon we will pass." Xiao Yu took Li Ruoxuan and walked toward the inner clothing store.

After the two left, Chen Mo looked around and thought about it and walked in one direction.

Zhao Yanyu stood at the counter and quietly looked at the door of the store. Now there are a lot of customers in the jewelry store, but they are all taken away by other colleagues, she can only look forward to the next customer.

It is the peak season, which is close to the year. During this time, there are many customers. They all hope that they will make more money this month and divide them into Chinese New Year.

Suddenly, seeing a figure appear at the door, Zhao Yanyu's eyes lit up and finally came. Just seeing the other person wearing a mask, Zhao Yanyu hesitated, still greeted.

"Sir, hello, do you have any needs?" Zhao Yanyu looked at Chen Mo.

chapters.title: Chapter 186: : People Who Don’T Send Flowers
chapters.body:
Chapter 186: : People Who Don’T Send Flowers

Chen Mo looked around the store for a week and nodded slightly toward Zhao Yanyu.

"I need a ring."

“Mr. want to ask for a wedding ring?” Zhao Yanyu led Chen Mo to the glass cabinet: “There are the latest rings of our company, each of which is carefully designed and unique.”

Chen Mo carefully looked at the ring in the glass cabinet, each ring has a different style, and his mind is matching which one is suitable for small fishing.

Xiao Yu followed him and never asked for anything, but he had to give Xiao Yu an answer. The most amazing gift he can think of is this.

"This one." Chen Mo pointed at a ring.

"Mr. has a vision, this ring is the elegant version of the Believe series, and it is also our best ring here, meaning a silent trust." Zhao Yanyu shines, put the ring out and put it in front of Chen Mo.

Chen Mo took the ring and looked at it carefully.

Seeing his appearance, Zhao Yanyu was also nervous. Wearing a mask, the most expensive ring, this must be vigilant, many jewellery stores have been robbed, are made by people wearing masks.

"Just it, check out." Chen Mo handed the ring to Zhao Yanyu.

"Sir, do you really want to buy?" Zhao Yanyu smiled: "The price is 131,400. Are you sure?" Zhao Yanyu is really afraid that the other party does not know the price remorse. When the problem arises, she also has trouble.

"Buy." Chen Mo handed the bank card to Zhao Yanyu.

Seeing the black bank card, Zhao Yanyu has wide eyes. With this kind of bank card, the absolute super bank is a super VIP.

Just now she was afraid that the other party was a robber. Now think about it, how ridiculous.

"I will pay you now, do you need other jewelry? For example, the necklace here is the best choice for girlfriend." Zhao Yanyu said.

"Not needed for the time being." Chen Mo shook his head. "I am in a hurry, you hurry."

"Good." Zhao Yanyu said nothing, holding a ring and a bank card to check out.

Five minutes later, Chen Mocai put the ring box in the pocket of the jacket and left the jewelry store.

Xiao Yu and Li Ruoqi took the bag, stood in the place where Chen Mo was separated, and quietly waited for Chen Mo to appear.

"You said that your home is not smart, the things he invented, the world is shocked. You said that he is smart, living with you for so long, he has not even sent a flower to you. Just remind him, he Still do not understand. Is it that EQ is occupied by IQ?" Li Ruoxuan said.

Hearing Li Ruoxuan's words, Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head: "Maybe he forgot, this is very good, at least I can expect, when will he remember to send a flower to me." Xiao Yu smiled.

"No interest, you should expect, when will he send the ring to you." What Li Ruoxuan thinks, bitter face: "I envy you have a boyfriend who loves you. I don't dare to go home this year. Going back, Sangu Liupo will come over, oh yeah, if you don’t have a boyfriend, I know a guy, I want to introduce you to it. I haven’t graduated since last year. I can’t be drowned in this year.”

Seeing that if he had learned a lot, Xiao Yu slammed and smiled: "Then you go to blind date."

"The old lady is used to being single," Li Ruojun said with a domineering attitude: "Twenty years have come, no man is still alive."

Xiao Yu smiled and shook his head.

Seeing Chen Mo running back, the two talents greeted.

"Where are you going?"

"I met a college classmate and talked a lot more." Chen Mo smiled.

"Go, go buy clothes for you." Xiao Yu led Chen Mo and walked to the nearest men's clothing store.

Until the evening, three talents left the commercial street. As soon as he entered the villa, Chen Mo took off his jacket and stood upright on the sofa.

Wang Hai put down his mobile phone and turned his head back to Chen Mo’s villa. I squatted in front of the villa and finally made up my mind and knocked on the door.

Seeing Chen Mo came out, Wang Hai hesitated and said: "Boss, I want to ask for three days off. The child language suddenly fell ill, I want to take care of her for three days."

Chen Hai was a little surprised by Wang Hai’s sudden leave, but he did not stop. The person who can make Wang Hai so anxious is definitely important to him: "Go." Chen Mo nodded.

"Thank you for your boss." Wang Haichao Chen Moxing took a ritual and hurried away.

"Ink girl, what is the relationship between this child language and Wang Hai?" After Wang Hai left, Chen Mo walked back to the study and said to the computer. He has never seen Wang Hai’s gaffe, and the identity of this child language makes him a bit curious. For those who are with him, he also needs to know more about it.

"Momgo, the information you need is found."

After the ink girl opened her mouth, three pieces of information appeared on the desktop and continued to be introduced.

"Children's language is a member of the National Security Bureau. She has a twin sister, called Tong Yan, a member of the women's special team and Wang Hai's fiancee. However, Tong Yan sacrificed in the cobra action."

"Cobra action?"

Hear this term and let Chen Mo familiar. Soon, Chen Mo suddenly realized. When he saw Wang Hai's information, he saw the Cobra action. Wang Hai was seriously injured in the operation and retired.

"Yes, do you need information about the Cobra action?" said the ink girl.

"No need." Chen Mo shook his head. These secrets were not of interest for the time being, but Wang Hai should have a story hidden.

The little fish came out of the bathroom, rubbed the wet hair and walked to the living room.

It was just that the living room was empty, and she was a little helpless. It was estimated that Chen Mo had hid in the study room for research.

This kind of thing is not once or twice.

Sometimes she feels bad about Chen Mo, then a big company, there must be a lot of things to carry. Because of this, she only let herself know things, at least not in life, to bring trouble to Chen Mo.

Snapped!

Just packed Chen Mo's coat on the sofa, a small purple box fell out. Seeing the small box, Xiao Yu stayed with a surprise and unbelief in his eyes.

Xiao Yu stared at the small box, and his heart was a little nervous, slowly picking up the small box.

The small purple box of the whole body is exquisite, and the pattern above is also beautiful. Gently open the small box, a white diamond ring, and quietly put it in the box.

Surprise, sweet, excited, all kinds of complex emotions together, she can not describe the mood at the moment. Thinking of the bit by bit with Chen Mo, Xiao Yu slowly reached out and was afraid of seeing the illusion.

“Do you like it?” said a pair of hands covering her waist from behind, attached to her ear.

Familiar voice, let Xiaoyu nod his head, tears of joy on his face: "Like."

"I wanted to be a New Year gift and give you a surprise. Now that you found it, you can only send it to you in advance." Chen Mo picked up the ring and attached it to Xiao Yu's ear: "I love you, marry me?"

"Yeah." Xiao Yu cried and laughed and nodded. She has been waiting for this sentence and finally heard it today.

The moment the ring was worn with the ring finger, Xiao Yu only turned back and hugged Chen Mo: "Bad egg, you said that I will not let me cry, you are crying now. Proposal, you don't send flowers, no flowers."

Xiaoyu has some incoherence.

"Then I comforted my family." Chen Mo smiled and bowed his head, kissing Xiao Yu's lips.

Five minutes later, on the sofa in the living room, Xiao Yu was sitting on the sofa with a smirk on his face, staring at the ring in his hand and enjoying Chen Mo blowing her hair. At this point she felt that she was the happiest woman in the world.

chapters.title: Chapter 187: : See Parents
chapters.body:
Chapter 187: : See Parents

Dongjiang City, Haifeng Village, an ordinary fishing village, here is the home of Xiaoyu.

A black car appeared at the entrance of the village and slowly entered the village along the road. These years have developed rapidly. Small flags are hung above the road and are the slogans for the New Year. Occasionally, there are a few people who will curiously take a look at the passing car.

Going back home, the little fisherman sweats. This is the first time she has returned to her home and she feels nervous.

"Sancha, have time to come home and sit." Xiaoyu politely responded to the women who greeted him.

Hearing this, Xiao Yu laughed: "No, only my parents and sister are at home. But during the Chinese New Year, I must go to relatives, you are ready to be a baby panda."

"When you go home with me, you have to be a baby panda." Chen Mo smiled.

On the road, people continue to greet Xiao Yu. Growing up here, there are only a few college students in the village, and the surrounding neighborhoods all know Xiaoyu.

Only the eyes of everyone are placed on Chen Mo, and occasionally there are people who greet Chen Mo, Chen Mo also smiled and nodded.

Not long after, the two returned to the yard.

More than 130 square meters of three-story hardcover small flat, nearly 120 square yards surrounded by walls, planted several trees. It is not a wealthy home, but it is also a well-off family, which is better than the situation of Chen Mojia.

At the moment when the iron gate of the yard was pushed open, the tension of Xiaoyu disappeared.

"Dad, Mom."

When the sound of Xiaoyu fell, the two old men hurried out and looked at Xiaoyu with a smile. After seeing Chen Mo around Xiaoyu, the two looked at each other and looked at them carefully.

"Uncle is good, my aunt is good." Chen Mo said slightly, bowed and said hello.

"Hey, hello, come in and come."

Wang Lanchao Chen Mo nodded, but his eyes looked up and down Chen Mo. At first glance, he looked pretty good, polite, and a talented person.

Just stepping into the house, Chen Mo saw a little man sitting on the sofa playing mobile games. That look, let Chen Moyi stay, if it is not a small fisherman beside him, he will really admit the wrong person.

"She is my sister Xiao Man, I am two years old, many people think that we are twins." Xiao Yu said.

"Hello." Xiao Man put down his mobile phone, looked up and greeted Chen Mo, and smiled to reveal the small tiger teeth.

"Hello." Chen Mo also greeted her.

After Xiao Yu and Wang Lan went to cook, He Zhenghua said: "Xiao Mo, I told you to be silent, how do you know how you and my family Xiaoyu know?"

Looking at the curious little man next to him, Chen Mo replied: "I and Xiaoyu are from the same university and I know at school."

Chen Mo told the truth.

He Zhenghua had a serious face: "I heard that you opened a company? How is the company?"

"Now the company is developing very well. Every aspect is stable and the funds are sufficient." Chen Mo laughed.

Hearing this, Xiao Man looked at Chen Mo more curiously.

Can be said that the marching ant company is developing well, and only Chen Mogan. Dad usually goes out to sea, and he rarely knows about this. He just knows Chen Mo and finds some friends who know what to hear.

Some young people who care about the Internet know how terrible the army ant company is. It can't be described as good.

"This ring, is he for you?" Wang Lan stared at the ring in the small fisherman's hand, this ring looks very valuable.

Xiao Yu nodded gently: "He asked me to marry me."

"Is he to you? Are you bullying you?" asked Wang Lan.

"Mom, you can rest assured that he is very good to me and will not bully me." Xiaoyu smiled with a smile on his face.

Seeing Xiao Yu’s smile, Wang Lan sighed. The daughter is her born, the emotion expressed on her face, she knows best: "Small man said that he is your boyfriend, Mom knows, such a big thing, you still stare at us."

This word almost made Xiao Yu vomiting blood. It turned out to be Xiao Man, and she thought it was Jane.

"Zhen Yu and Uncle Zhang Yang also know." Xiao Yu said.

"The treasures of Huacheng and Uncle Zhang?" Wang Lan was slightly surprised: "Last time, your dad still had a drink with your uncle Zhang, and he did not say this."

"He is a precious nephew."

When I heard this sentence, Wang Lan was even more surprised: "You didn't say that you didn't see her nephew last time? You gimmick, what is going on with me and your dad. You go with Xiaomo, Let your dad come in, I told him." Wang Lan's tone is a little blame.

"Oh." Xiaoyu should have a cry and leave the kitchen.

From the previous inquiry, He Zhenghua found that the young man was calm and peaceful, young, with no small achievements, and no arrogance, which gave him a good impression. Chen Mo is Zhang Yang’s nephew? The news surprised him, and Zhang Yang never told him about it.

"What are you doing? Call Lao Zhang and ask him about Chen Mo's child." Wang Lan stopped the hand of cutting vegetables and said anxiously.

Xiao Yu took out a beautiful jewelry box from the suitcase and handed it to Xiao Man: "This is the meeting that Chen Mo gave you, you try."

"Thank you brother-in-law."

Seeing the beautiful necklace in the jewelry box, Xiao Man’s eyes bent. Just now Dad is here, she dare not scream, now Dad is not there, Xiao Man will dare to open the door, revealing the little tiger teeth, giving the human body a flexible feeling, although it looks a little like Xiao Yu, but it is two temperament style.

Xiao Man’s name made Chen Mo feel weird, but readily accepted that Xiao Yu’s face was slightly reddened and did not deny her words.

"Is you talking to mom about us?"

Xiao Yu is sitting next to Chen Mo, and there is a kind of meaning after the autumn.

"No." Xiao Man hurriedly shook his head: "At the time you were seeing the national leader, live on TV, and was seen by the mother. Mom said that this guy is good, I will let my sister bring you back. Then My mom thought of your lifelong event, and it doesn't matter to me."

Xiao Man glared at the innocent big eyes.

Xiao Yu does not believe in the roots, this sister squinted and said the rumor, she has been taught more than once.

"Sister, your ring is so beautiful, how did your brother-in-law propose to you?"

Xiao Man hastily transferred the topic.

chapters.title: Chapter 188: :Committed To
chapters.body:
Chapter 188: :Committed To

On the round table, Chen Mo was sitting, with a small fishing on his left and a small man on the right playing the phone. He Zhenghua was sitting opposite him, and the family was sitting around.

Seven dishes and one soup on the table, the heat is still white. Usually, it is also the home of three dishes and one soup. It is specially prepared to entertain Chen Mo, the future son-in-law.

They are all homemade dishes, and the air is filled with the smell of food. This feeling, like going back home, is extremely warm.

Wang Lan looked at Chen Mo, and a pair of mother-in-law looked at the son-in-law, and the more they looked, the more satisfied they were.

I didn’t know Chen Mo before, and I was worried that Xiao Yu was deceived. After all, this year, the children of the rich people they heard have caused a lot of troubles everywhere.

I learned that Chen Mo was the nephew of Lao Zhang. After asking Lao Zhang, he now knows Chen Mo.

She is very satisfied with this prospective son-in-law. When she is young, she will make a career, her potential is unlimited, her character is good, and her work is steady. This year, I can't catch such a good son-in-law.

And Xiao Yu is the same university graduate, has a common topic, the most important thing is to be good to his daughter. Now Chen Mo is the best girl in her eyes.

"Dad, Chen Mo knows that you like to drink a little wine, and bring two bottles of wine back to you."

Xiao Yu put two bottles of Maotai on the table, brought two small cups, poured a small cup to his father, then poured a cup and handed it to Chen Mo: "You have a drink with Dad."

"Uncle, I respect you." Chen Mo picked up the glass and said to He Zhenghua.

"Ok."

He Zhenghua picked up the glass and smiled a little.

Although the daughter is distressed, the daughter always has to marry. Just contact Lao Zhang, I am sure that it is the nephew of the old friend, and the other party is young and promising. The two young people also have emotional foundations, which is a very good result.

The daughter is also a good home.

“Does Xiaomoping like to drink?” He Zhenghua took a sip and put down the glass.

"Occasionally drink a little, don't drink often, don't dare to get drunk." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo’s words, let He Zhenghua gently nod his head: “Occasionally, drink a little bit of blood, you can do research, drinking too much wine is not good.”

At the dinner table, the family eats meals and often asks questions. Chen Mo’s task is to answer questions. As time passed, the atmosphere on the dinner table became more and more harmonious.

"I have known you and your coward for more than ten years. Now when the ship comes back to the sea, I will also come out to drink some small wine. Last year Xiaoyu went to him to attend the wedding reception of the classmates, and said that the introduction of the foreigner gave me a small fisherman’s understanding. I said that people have not seen it."

"The girl who introduced the introduction last time is a small fisherman. I have been in contact with Xiaoyu in school, and I didn't think about blind date. Later I learned that it was a small fisherman."

Chen Mo glanced at Xiao Yu, who was laughing next to him.

"It is also a fate." He Zhenghua said with a smile: "In the future, it will be better for small fishing."

Seeing his father’s attitude, Xiao Yu’s heart was a little happy. Looking at it, his parents accepted Chen Mo.

Before returning, she was still nervous than Chen Mo, for fear of family opposition.

In the school, there are some classmates, love has reached the point of marriage, and finally was dismantled because of family opposition.

Chen Mo’s parents, she has seen in Binhai. His parents liked himself, and Chen Mo also proposed to himself. Now this is the last level.

If the parents object, she is really at a loss. Now that this is over, her fears have also been put down.

Xiao Man looked at a few people on the table, his eyes turned around, suddenly remembered something, and immediately said: "Sister, my parents have promised, when are you going to get married? Earn a little nephew to give me a hug..."

When Xiao Man’s words were not finished, Xiao Yu was holding a chicken leg to plug her mouth. Xiao Yu’s face is a bit red. This girl’s pit is used to it. Anything dares to say: “So many foods can’t stop your mouth.”

Just saying that the words have been exported, He Zhenghua and Wang Lan looked at each other and looked forward to Chen Mo and Xiao Yu.

They really don't object to Chen Mo and Xiao Yu now, but when they get married, they are not good at it. Xiao Man asked, and they are with their minds. Get married early, have a little grandson early, and they can enjoy family fun.

"I don't plan to hold a wedding for the time being."

Chen Mo’s words made He Zhenghua and Wang Lan’s face sink. The atmosphere that was originally harmonious, vanished. Xiao Man feels awkward, spits his tongue out, eats chicken legs with his head down, and the atmosphere on the table is a bit strange.

Xiaoyu was a little anxious. When he just wanted to talk, he was stopped by Chen Mo. Seeing the silence of Chen Mo's heart, Xiao Yu is also quiet.

"I and Xiaoyu are preparing to get a marriage certificate first, and I don't hold a wedding for the time being. Xiaoyu has always supported me. During my time, I have been accompanying me and taking care of me. She is very important to me, I can't let the wedding go smoothly. In the future, she will give her the most grand wedding, let her wear the most beautiful wedding dress, and marry me."

Chen Mo’s words made Xiao Yu stunned. She thought that Chen Mo had said that she would marry for a while, but she did not expect this answer. Looking at Chen Mo, Xiao Yu’s face showed a gentle smile.

"This is my commitment to small fishing." Chen Mo solemnly said.

"Oh, well, I and Xiaoyu Dad support. Your big thing is to plan well. Now you have good conditions, don't be as sloppy as we were." Wang Lan heard Chen Mo solemnly, the smile on his face floated again. Start.

"Ok."

He Zhenghua is also satisfied with the nod, and the degree of affection for this prospective son-in-law is also instantly improved.

They are really worried that Chen Mo dragged his daughter not to get married. They have many cases, many women are rich and expensive, and the last end is abandoned. They don't want their daughters to be like this. They will be abandoned when they are older.

Now Chen Mo’s solemn promise, they are also assured that it looks like a lie.

"Don't talk about it, eat first, the dishes are cold, and Xiao Mo eats more." Wang Lan gestured to Xiao Chen to give Chen Mo a dish.

The atmosphere on the dinner table became harmonious again, and the little man was secretly stunned and almost scared to death by Chen Mo. Looking at her sister with a low envious look, if a man gives her such a promise, she will not hesitate to fall.

After returning to the room after dinner, Xiao Yu did not want to hug Chen Mo, his face filled with a smile.

"I was scared to death just now, thank you."

"Recognize me? Take me as an outsider?" Chen Mo looked at her eyes and said seriously: "I have been serious about the words just now, that is my promise to you, and let you be the most beautiful bride in the future."

"Well, I believe in you." Xiaoyan eyes with tears, nodded firmly, she did not know when to start, became so emotional.

"Don't you cry, just said nothing, your dad lost his chopsticks and black face. Let your dad know that you are crying, thinking that I am bullying you, he has to cut me with a knife."

Chen Mo’s words made Xiao Yu’s laughter.

"Your parents have promised, is it right now?"

"What is the change?" Xiao Yu stayed at Chen Mo and looked confused.

"Tell it!"

Chen Mo is attached to Xiao Yu's ear and gently whispers. Just finished, Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo with a shy look and flushed his face.

chapters.title: Chapter 189: : Learning Foreign Languages
chapters.body:
Chapter 189: : Learning Foreign Languages

The sound of firecrackers is far and near, and the smell of nitrate and sulfide is also filled in the air. It is not too irritating, and it seems to be celebrating the passing of the old year.

The New Year’s Eve in the village is very simple. I ate breakfast, posted the Spring Festival couplets, and went out to walk around the door. However, the small fisherman is very lively now.

"It’s a talent, Xiaoyan, a girl who is sensible from a young age, I said that she is blessed when she grows up. It seems to be married to a good family." A middle-aged aunt with a bloated body said.

"It’s just a blessing. It’s the ancestors. I just told my niece that he started a big company, a billionaire."

“Billionaires? See the national leaders, can billionaires see the national leaders?”

......

Several women sat together, staring at Chen Mo, and constantly talking about it. It is a fake to say no envy, and Chen Mo is the son-in-law of their son.

Chen Mo, sitting in the position, looked helpless.

It feels like a baby panda in the zoo, surrounded by a group of people. There are many things going on, and all kinds of strange eyes are used to it, so there is not much psychological fluctuation, just helpless.

"Hello, are you Chen Mo? Can I take a photo with you?" A girl came over with her mobile phone and looked at Chen Mo with a look of excitement and worship.

Chen Mo is the idol of a new generation of young people. After the exposure, all kinds of news are overwhelming, and those who pay a little attention to mobile news can recognize Chen Mo. I just didn't think that such a super man is in front of her eyes.

This is the daughter of Xiao Yu, an uncle. When I introduced it, Chen Mo remembered it.

"Good." Chen Mo nodded and promised.

After the photo was taken, the girl left, and then two girls rushed over with a look, and several men rushed over.

After taking a picture, Chen Mo was relieved.

Today, in the New Year's Eve, Chen Mo will leave with a small fisherman and go home for the New Year. I know that Xiaoyu has a very good, very rich boyfriend, many neighbors, relatives and friends, all came to the small fishermen to visit, want to see the old woman's son-in-law, there is the current battle.

Chen Mo is sure that there are three aunts and three sisters here. Fortunately, the yard is big enough to sit down many people. However, Chen Mo has the feeling that animals are visited.

It’s rude to hide back in the room. I can only sit here and play games with the children of neighbors who are not sensible.

"Small fish, is your boyfriend the boss of the marching ant company?"

In the hall, a middle-aged woman smiled and opened her mouth. Her dress was gorgeous, hot and curly, and she was more like a lady. The LV bag is placed in the most conspicuous position, for fear that others will not see it.

“Can you let him give your brother a position as a company manager or vice president?”

"I really dare to say, then I can't be the president?" The little man who cut the apple next to him, the voice can only be heard by the people next to him.

The little fish next to it, I don’t know what to say.

This woman is the cousin of her father. Xiao Yu was also the first to see this cousin, not even her name.

In this case, she never met. I did not expect to bring Chen Mo back, will recruit such people.

"Aunt, the company's useful person system, need an interview, can not be arranged." Xiao Yu said.

The middle-aged lady looks like a high-ranking man: "Your boyfriend is the boss of the company. What is your assistant president? Can you not directly arrange a job for him?"

"I am the assistant to the president. I don't have this right. The matter of employing people is determined by the personnel department and the president. I can't intervene in these things. Chen Mo does not care about these things."

Xiaoyu refused to use euphemism. She knew Zhao's temper. No matter who she is, she couldn't walk the back door. She wouldn't do it. The company is Chen Mo's. She can't make Chen Mo embarrassed.

"Does he say a word? Is it so difficult?" The middle-aged lady was so intolerant.

He Zhenghua's face is very bad. Because this cousin marries a rich man, he rarely interacts with their ordinary relatives. The face of a nouveau riche will not look at these poor relatives.

Since she married, the two sides have never come and gone, and can’t talk about family.

If it wasn't for this time, he wouldn't think of this cousin. If you go out and call Chen Mo and delay your daughter, then it will be troublesome.

"This is busy, we can't help." He Zhenghua said: "Is your family not a company? Let Xiaoxi help in the company?"

"It’s all relatives, this little busy is not willing to help?”

The voice of the middle-aged lady is a bit big, so that people sitting in the yard can hear it. Everyone immediately looked at the window curiously, but Chen Mo was present, and they were not too obvious.

Chen Mo naturally heard the voice inside, and made a greeting to the neighbors in the yard and walked in.

The controversy in the house also stopped. Chen Mo came in, He Zhenghua and Wang Lan were worried, but the middle-aged lady was happy.

"Mr. Chen, hello." The middle-aged lady got up and made a greeting to Chen Mo. The inability to dissipate the smoke and the face was full of smiles.

"Hello there."

Chen Mo smiled and sat down next to Xiao Yu.

"Chen Mo..." Xiao Yu gave Chen Mo a look.

"Nothing." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's back and gave her a peaceful smile.

He Zhenghua and Wang Lan left the seat and went out. At this time, they are not present, Chen Mo will not be too embarrassed, and there are other neighbors and relatives to say hello.

"Mr. Chen, you are a talented person. Are you interested in sitting at my house? My daughter always wants to see you." The middle-aged lady looked at Chen Mo.

"Thank you for your kindness, I have to go back today, no time." Chen Mo shook his head.

"Then next time."

The middle-aged lady is not impatient, but rather a flattering smile.

"Small fisher, he has a brother, want to change the working environment, you can see if he can enter his company, take charge of what, after all, loved ones can trust and rest assured."

"Our company, there is no precedent for opening the back door, but it is not impossible for you to come to me to help." Chen Mo comforted a little anxious fish next to him.

This made the lady look happy: "Mr. Chen, I know that you are very good."

"Do you have management experience in your son? Our company is ready to open up markets in Africa. There is a shortage of people there. I value the market there and send the average person to the past. I don't trust it. I just let him go. I am also myself." rest assured."

This made the lady's smile froze.

Africa?

so far?

It is impossible for a son who is accustomed to being a child to be able to live in that environment. And she heard that there was chaos in Africa, and there was nothing short of what happened there. She could do nothing.

"What's wrong?" Chen Mo asked.

"My son's foreign language is not good, can't he be at home?" said the woman.

"Foreign languages can go there to learn again, no one will be born, and there are also translations. It is good to learn a foreign language. It is really good to learn." Chen Mozhen nodded.

Next to the little smirk, almost squirted the apple in his mouth. Xiao Yu also wants to laugh, but he does not dare to laugh.

"You call to let him come now, I will arrange for him to enter the African branch, and he will be able to join the job in the next year." Chen Mo picked up the phone.

"Not needed for the time being." The lady hurriedly stopped Chen Mo: "I will go back and ask his opinion, then reply to you. Can you give me your phone number?"

"can."

The lady got Chen Mo’s phone number and was happy to leave.

"Do you want to learn a foreign language?" Xiao Man next to him finally couldn't help but laugh.

"I don't want to." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and immediately shook his head.

After He Zhenghua and Wang Lan walked in the middle-aged lady, they also came in: "Xiao Mo, you are going home now."

"Dad, what's the matter?" Dad's tone seemed to be rushing, and Xiaoyu was worried.

"I am afraid that the rest of the family will come over again. What are your two uncles? I am very clear, otherwise I have to be a little bit guilty. Xiao Mo, you brought Xiao Yu back to the New Year, your business, I promised Now, take good care of Xiaoyu." He Zhenghua said to Chen Mo.

Who has few wonderful relatives?

Neighbors and villagers, everyone knows and understands, the villagers are also simple, just envious of admiration, discussion before and after tea, and occasionally compare the work and achievements of their own children, but there will be no excessive demands.

Just like now, he has not lost his temper, and he dares to speak. Sure enough, people are shameless, and the world is invincible.

Ever since, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu were almost out of the house by their parents. Sitting in the car, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu are still speechless.

chapters.title: Chapter 190: : Recognition
chapters.body:
Chapter 190: : Recognition

Traffic jam.

Chen Mo looked out of the window without a car, and his face was helpless. I can't get home tonight, this New Year's Eve, I am afraid I have to go outside.

The car that had been sitting for a few hours was still on the road, and the small fisherman had fallen tired in Chen’s arms and was sleeping sweet.

It’s ten o'clock at night, and the car dragon hasn’t moved too fast.

"Black Hawk, don't go back tonight, first find a hotel to stay for one night." Chen Mo lowered his voice, for fear of waking up the little fish in his arms.

The black eagle sitting in the driver's seat looked at the traffic outside the window, his eyes blurred and a little sad. When he heard Chen Mo's words, the Black Hawk returned to God.

"it is good."

The Blackhawk hit the steering wheel and slowly drove past the lane.

"Do you have a heart?" Chen Mo felt that the Black Hawk's mood was low.

"Today is the jealous day of two comrades, some feelings." The black eagle glanced at the small fishing in Chen Mohuai through the rearview mirror, trying to keep the voice down: "There is a lot of people who exchange life and blood behind this prosperous stability." Some stories, ordinary people will never know."

"Can I listen?"

Chen Mo used his clothes to cover the ears of Xiao Yu, for fear that the dialogue between the two would wake her up.

The Black Hawk thought about opening.

"Last year on New Year's Eve, we received a special mission, which was the last mission before our team retired, and together with the team where Wang Hai's fiancee was. They had already set the date of marriage, just on the Lantern Festival, and the mission was over. Wedding. The mission, although successfully completed, sacrificed two comrades, just on New Year's Eve."

The Black Hawk whispered, and these words were groaning, and his heart was uncomfortable.

"Wang Hai's fiancee fell to his eyes. Wang Hai, who had not heard the devil's training, collapsed at that moment. In the following month, Wang Hai was decadent and drunk."

The voice of the Black Hawk is full of emotion.

"Now the country is very stable, but the struggle in the dark has never stopped. It is just that ordinary people do not know that many people are guarded by life every day, and this stability is achieved."

His words reminded Chen Mo of the information of Wang Hai that he saw at the beginning. The special action that the Blackhawk said should be the Cobra action.

Chen Mo can only sigh.

The car quickly turned out to the car and drove to the hotel not far away.

Nothing in the night.

The next morning, there was not much car on the road. Chen Mo and Xiao Yu got up early and rushed home.

Xiao Yu was a little nervous, and the hand held by Chen Mo, the palm of his hand had sweated, and followed Chen Mo to a luxury community.

Now she is fighting in her head, and how to call Chen Mo’s parents when entering the house. I used to be a girlfriend, I can call my uncle and aunt, and my identity is different now.

After walking to the door, Chen mother smiled and greeted it, and Xiao Yu came back.

"mom."

The little fish came out of the mouth and the air was still for two seconds. When shouting out the title, Chen Mo stunned and Xiao Yu was also stunned.

"...Ah... Auntie." Xiaoyu changed his mouth.

"You have all put on the ring, you don't have to call the aunt." Chen mother looked at the ring in the little fisherman's hand and laughed.

"Mom." Xiao Yu was a little nervous and spoke openly.

"Hey." The smile on Chen's face turned open, and it should be heard as if she was ten years old: "Come, prostitute, come in quickly." Chen Mu ignored Chen Mo, took Xiao Yu's hand and walked into the house.

"dad."

Seeing Chen’s father on the sofa, Xiaoyu hesitated, shouting, and then looked at Chen Mo and spit out his tongue.

"Oh, good, come back."

Hearing the name of Xiao Yu, Chen’s father had a surprise smile on his face and decided that this daughter-in-law was gone.

"Come, this is the New Year red envelope that Mom gave you." Chen Mu did not wait for the small fishing station to fix, she took out a red envelope and stuffed it into her hand.

"There is not much money, a picture of Geely, what do you want to buy, let Xiaomo buy it for you. There is nothing to pass on at home. Yesterday, I went to buy a pair of jade bracelets with Xiaomo Dad. It is also for you. ""

Said to take out the box and hand it to Xiao Yu.

"Thank you mom."

Xiao Yuxin was touched by some people. The third time he called a lot of natural things, not as boring as he started.

"This is the New Year red envelope that Dad gave you." Chen Fu also took out a red envelope and handed it to Xiao Yu.

"Thank you, Dad." Xiao Yu took the red envelope and said.

"Well, here is your home in the future, don't be too restrained." Chen father said with a smile.

"What about my red envelope?" Chen Mo said depressedly.

"You left yesterday afternoon, you should arrive at home in the evening, you will come back early without a small fishing, and the red envelope will be late." Chen Mu did not say good.

"The traffic jam."

Chen Mo looked helpless, and his wife did not want a son. He did not know how to describe the mood at the moment. Turning around, I saw Xiao Yu holding two red envelopes to show off to him.

The two put their luggage, take a break, leave together, go to your home for the New Year. The two families are few, every year, every year, they will go to a family to spend the New Year, people are more lively.

Last year, Jane’s family came over and this year passed.

The Jane family was next door to their house. When Chen Mo asked his father to buy a house, he sent a set to the Jane family. Both are large-sized, nearly 30 million sets, complete with decoration and furniture.

The environment of this community is good, the security is good, the two are now moving over, they are taking care of each other, they often move around, their parents are at home, and no one is chatting.

"Zhenzhen, uncle, happy new year." Xiaoyu entered the door and opened his mouth.

"Hey, Xiaomo and Xiaoyu are back."

After seeing Xiao Yu, Zhen Zhen had a happy face. She is very fond of Xiaoxiang, a sensible girl, so she was introduced to Chen Mo at the beginning.

"The dishes are just right, come in and say while eating."

"This is the New Year red envelope that I and you cherish for you." Zhang Yang took out two red envelopes and handed it to Xiao Yu.

"Thank you, uncle." Xiao Yu took the red envelope and smiled.

"Brother, Xiao Yuzi." After seeing the two, Zhang Xinxin hurried over: "Happy New Year, brother, my red envelope?"

Chen Mo took out a red envelope to Xin Xin: "This year's holiday, why not go to us."

"I am afraid to disturb your two worlds. I am going to be abused by you. I have to be such a big light bulb before I can go." Xin Xin smiled and accepted the red envelope unceremoniously.

Seven people are seated, unlike in previous years, this year's dinner table has one more person, that is, small fishing. Xiaoyu has not started to be so nervous, and is now adapting to the role. It was her most fortunate thing to receive the unanimous approval and blessing of Chen Mo’s family.

"Xiao Mo, you two have to hurry. Your parents are chanting at home to hold their grandson. Xiao Yu, what do you think?" Zhang Yang teased and laughed.

"I listen to Chen Mo."

The small fisherman's skin was originally a little thin, and was asked by Zhang Yang, his face was slightly red, and he should have a voice, and he gave himself to Chen and Zhang Yang.

"This matter is not urgent, waiting for more than 20 years, my parents don't mind waiting for two more years." Chen Mo said.

"Who said that I am not in a hurry, I can't wait to hold my grandson this year." Chen said.

"Brother, I am going to dismantle your desk. You and Xiao Yuzi havetened to have a big fat boy. I want to be an aunt."

Xinxin’s words made the people on the field laugh.

The reunion dinner was finished in a warm atmosphere. After the meal, the two talents left home and went out shopping. The current square and flower market are very lively and crowded with people, and the New Year is full of joy.

Many people came out with their families and smiled on their faces. It is rare to accompany the family once, Chen Mo took the hand of Xiao Yu and quietly followed his father and mother.

chapters.title: Chapter 191: : Entering The Headquarters
chapters.body:
Chapter 191: : Entering The Headquarters

"The headquarters of the marching ant company was completed."

Zhao Min contacted Chen Mo.

Today is the fourth day of the year. In these few days, Chen Mo is happy to spend time with his parents and the holiday is coming to an end.

Now Zhao Min contacted him and there was no accident.

"The people worked overtime and worked hard. It was already finished. I should have informed you earlier, but at that time you and Xiaoyu have left the company. In order not to bother you, it is not bad these days, so now I will say." Zhao Min said.

"Well, I will go back with Xiao Yu tomorrow." Chen Mo replied.

"It is not convenient to say on the phone. When you come back, I will talk to you in detail about the settled, Happy New Year." Zhao Min said.

"happy New Year."

Hang up the phone, Chen Mo looks at the mother who is teasing the puppy. It is a small golden hair, and buying this pet is also a small fishing idea.

After they went to work, no one in the family accompanied their parents and raised a pet, at least not to make their parents feel too lonely. I am free at home, teasing pets, going for a walk, walking a dog.

Chen Mo asked them to move over to Binhai City, and they did not want to go. I have been in this city since I was a child, I have never left in my life, let them leave, no friends who talk, will not be more suitable.

He did not insist, anyway, coming back later, it is also a matter of hours. With your family, you can have a meal and chat.

"Mom, I am going back to the company tomorrow afternoon."

Chen Moyi opened, Chen’s smile converges, and the hand of the puppy is stopped, and the eyes flashed. It just didn't take long for me to come back.

If a son has a career, it is impossible to stay with him all the time.

"Yeah." Chen Mu nodded and looked at Xiao Yu: "Xiao Yu, you go there, take care of Xiao Mo. Xiao Mo Ping often does not pay attention, there is you, Mom is assured."

"Know it, Mom." Xiao Yu smiled and nodded. Now she gradually adapts to the status of this prospective wife: "We will come back often on weekends or holidays."

"Oh, good." Chen Mu smiled on her face.

"Xiao Mo, you have been looking for us yesterday." Chen father was on the side, hesitated to open his mouth. Both of them looked at Chen Mo, and now the son is the master of the house. Some things, they will be very bad when they are squatting.

"Your cousin is short of money in business and wants to borrow 500,000." Chen Mu also said. Have you borrowed it or not?

Chen Mo, sitting on the sofa, calmed down and nodded gently: "Let's borrow it."

"Oh, good." Chen mother smiled. She was afraid that the son would mind, after all, the unpleasantness of the year, Chen Mo also remembered.

"My father and I go to sleep first, and we will prepare breakfast for you tomorrow." Chen Mu handed Xiao Jinmao to Xiaoyu: "You watch TV and go to bed early, and you have to hurry tomorrow."

Seeing that Mom and Dad walked into the room, Chen Mo was leaning on the sofa.

"What?" asked Xiao Yu.

"18 years ago, at that time, the boss of the father's unit took the money out of the country, the wages in arrears were not issued, the father was unemployed, and there was no place to live. Asked Daxu to borrow 20,000 homes to build a small flat to tide over the difficulties.

My dad’s work has not yet been settled, and I am doing some casual work. During the Chinese New Year, my aunt was afraid that my family would not be able to pay the money. In front of many relatives, I forced my mother to pay back the money. That was the first time I saw my mother crying. It was really no money, and I couldn’t afford it. ”

Chen Mo’s voice was calm and there was not much mood swing. Things have been in the past ten years, when he was also a child of a few years old.

"At that time, the coward fisherman made some money and loaned it to my family. My family and my family have been in a stalemate. I haven’t been there for more than a decade. I didn’t expect to contact now."

Xiao Yu sat quietly as an audience.

"I am a big man, but my aunt is not very good. With my mother's character, I am afraid I will borrow the money. In any case, Daxie also helped our family through the most difficult time. And It’s also a mother’s brother, blood is thicker than water.”

Chen Mo did not object, and did not want to make it difficult for her mother to do it. After all, it’s a loved one, and it’s been a mess for more than a decade. Now there is a chance to return to it. Chen Mo is against it, and my mom will not be happy.

After so many years, my father and mother are relieved, and Chen Mo can't talk about hate.

"Don't think about it." Xiao Yu said: "Go back to sleep, and get up early tomorrow."

The next morning, Chen Mu prepared good luggage for Chen Mo. They are all eating, for fear that he will be hungry.

This was the case every time I went to school. This time, Chen Mo did not refuse, and put all the things that were prepared in the car.

"Daddy, go back, don't send it."

After bidding farewell to his father and mother, Chen Mo let Wang Hai drive away and go to Binhai.

After the New Year, Wang Hai came over to take over the position of Blackhawk's bodyguard and driver. The Black Hawk also went home to visit his family two days off.

Zhao Min is dressed in a sleek professional wear, high-heeled shoes hit the floor and make a regular sound. When you enter Chen Mo's office, you put the information in your hand on the Chen Mo table.

During the Chinese New Year period, the orders for seismographs increased by 38 units, the Philippines and Iran, and Nepal’s orders.” Zhao Min sat across from Chen Mo and opened his mouth.

"The harvest is good."

Chen Mo opened the file.

The first is the order for the seismograph, and the second is the cost statistics for the company headquarters.

“Because of the construction period, the construction cost of the headquarters is relatively high.” Zhao Min said.

The construction cost of the entire headquarters campus is more than 7 billion. This cost is already very high, but fortunately the company has money.

It is now complete and ready to enter.

Their current office headquarters is leased and they urgently need a real headquarters. Since the headquarters construction program, the construction party has been rushing to the construction period, and various high-end experimental equipment are ordered, and the cost is relatively high.

"Let's find time to settle in. It's best to be in this week, the new year, just settled in the new headquarters." Chen Mo said.

His time is more important than money. Now the money is just a number for him, so it will make people rush to the headquarters. The company headquarters is completed, and the sooner the better, the better.

The equipment in the headquarters laboratory is more complete, and the technical research topics such as chip manufacturing and superconducting computer research require those equipment and laboratories.

The new lab, with more confidentiality and greater space, will be able to open his hands and study. The cycle of technology development will become shorter.

The technology in the science and technology library, according to the normal development speed, will give him ten lifetimes, and it is impossible to complete it all. If you want to improve the quality, you must liberate the technical productivity.

His goal is to control the technology of the entire library.

"Good." Zhao Min promised: "Next Monday, there is already a good preparation there, and I can settle in at any time. I will inform the company headquarters of the relocation, this is the first major event of the New Year."

The news is about to enter the headquarters. This news has made the employees who have just returned to the company happy. With the headquarters, they have a real point of ownership.

Now on the Internet, the employees of the marching ant company are called ants, they are ants, and the headquarters is the nest that belongs to them. It is a great event to finally be able to settle in the nest.

On Monday, the violent inauguration ceremony is also in progress.

chapters.title: Chapter 192: : Keep Mystery
chapters.body:
Chapter 192: : Keep Mystery

The park is located in Qinhai District, Binhai City, with an area of more than 300 acres.

Located in the middle of the main building, the shape is like a ring ant nest structure, the ground part is more than 40 meters, not too high, but the floor space is huge, the outside is wrapped in irregular glass.

In addition to the office area, internal meeting rooms and exterior meeting rooms, there are restaurants, supermarkets, ATMs, gyms, cafes and multi-purpose entertainment halls.

Each area is like a cavern in an ant nest, a ring inside, and various passages leading to each area. The center of the ring is a green area, which looks like a glass-built ant nest.

Now there are many people around the park, all of whom are employees of the marching ant company.

There are also a lot of media, holding cameras to shoot at the headquarters of the marching ant company. However, it is only allowed to take pictures within the designated area and the area where the research institute is located.

After the lively ceremony of the ceremony, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu left the scene and walked into the main building. Zhao Min stayed for other business arrangements.

After setting face recognition and fingerprint recognition, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu entered the office area.

The corridor is bright, Chen Mo can control the light and darkness of the light through artificial intelligence. Inside, almost all electrical appliances can be controlled by the network, which is a real smart office area.

This area is his private space.

The office area is on the highest floor of the ant nest. In the office area, in addition to the laboratory, the bedroom, gym, kitchen, and bathroom are all available.

The study is tired and you can rest here.

There is also an elevator in the office area, which leads directly to the underground laboratory.

In addition to the personal laboratory here, there is also a laboratory in the thermostatic chamber of the underground research institute. High-precision instruments like lithography machines must be stored at a constant temperature.

"How? Satisfied?" asked Xiao Yu.

"Well, it’s much better than before." Chen Mo nodded. "What do I let out of the empty area?"

"over there."

Xiao Yu took Chen Mo to the window and pointed to an isolated area in the park.

"The factory is the reserved area. The equipment needed has also been transported in. There are three floors above ground and one basement. The security is under the responsibility of Anan."

Chen Mo nodded.

The area is empty and he has other uses. There, as a region where he studies and practices, after the robots settle in, they belong to special areas and must be specially reserved.

"Chen Mo, Zhao Jie contact me, transport your car, in the side door of the institute, Zhao Jie let me inform you." Xiaoyu put down the phone and said.

"Go, go together."

Chen Mo glanced at the office area and left with a small fisherman.

"What is inside you?"

Seeing Chen Mo and Xiao Yu came over, Zhao Min led Chen Mo and walked to the two container trucks on the side door of the institute. He was curious in his tone.

From the time of carrying these things, Chen Mo will not let anyone close to the container. From the company's basement, the company's security team was also escorted on the way.

Chen Mo, this squad, she saw it for the first time.

"I want to know?" Chen Mo smiled.

"Crap." Zhao Min did not say good.

After getting along for so long, Zhao Min has already understood Chen Mo’s temper and speaks like a conversation between friends, not like a subordinate relationship.

Chen Mo smiled and gestured to Wang Hai to open the door of the container.

Uniform and uniform, the newly painted robots are arranged in the container. The robot is very good, there are five robots in a row, there are twelve rows, a total of sixty robots.

When the door is opened, the red eyes of the robot light up and it feels like a robot army.

People who work in the army ant company have seen the enchantress robot. But so much, it was the first time I saw that the eagle eye, white pearl and Anan, who were present, were all stunned by this scene.

Except for Wang Hai, no one else knows that there are so many robots transported inside. The facts before me tell them that they are not filming science fiction movies.

Zhao Min also felt incredible. She had seen up to eight intelligent robots in Chen Mo's lab, but she was the first time she saw it.

When Chen Moyi opened, the robot came out of the car in an orderly manner, and the open space in front of the car was neatly arranged, even more neat than the army's team.

These are the robot assistants that Chen Mo asked the ink girl to prepare for moving into the new laboratory. In the previous lab, there weren't many robots that could be placed in the room. Don't worry now.

In the future, Chen Mo has dozens of assistants who can work anytime, anywhere, efficiency, and work tirelessly, which is the biggest advantage of robots.

“Is energy produced?” Zhao Min pointed at the robot.

She has been very concerned about the mass production of robots. Because this will be the flag product of the marching ant company.

Let the robot approach the lives of ordinary people.

"Energy production costs about 600,000 yuan, but it can only last for six hours. After six hours, it must be charged." Chen Mo said.

"This is enough." Zhao Min said: "I want to prepare for the listing of robots?"

"First prepare, you first investigate the use of the robot, and I have to enter the corresponding data, they can have unique features." Chen Mo said.

"Good." Zhao Min’s face was a joy.

"Open another container." Chen Mo pointed to the container next to him.

Next to the Black Hawk and Anan, hurriedly walked over and opened the door to the container. This time it was not a robot, but a sealed metal suitcase.

"What is it inside?"

Zhao Min is more curious, even Xiao Yu is no exception, standing with his ears waiting for Chen Mo's answer. In the research, she never asked, Chen Mo will not tell her.

"Fun things." Chen Mo smiled and looked at the robot team.

"Moving the box into the lab."

As soon as he spoke, all the robots went all the way to the container. The two robots were in charge of a box and pushed the box into the institute.

So secret, Zhao Min knows that it is definitely a crucial thing, she did not ask much.

All the boxes were moved down.

Chen Mo, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min also followed the lab.

“Do you really want to know what is inside?” Chen Mo looked at the two people who looked forward to it: “You only need to be a very important thing. The time is right, I will tell you.”

Zhao Min nodded gently.

At room temperature superconducting materials, once exposed, the trouble is absolutely beyond his imagination.

Agents all over the world, spies will remember the marching ant company. When it comes to the trouble, it is easy to destroy the marching ant company.

Therefore, the room temperature superconducting material does not belong to this world.

"These robots will be stationed in the constant temperature clean laboratory in the future, and they will all be my experimental assistants." Chen Mo transferred the topic.

Although most of the laboratories are fully automatic, there are still some places where manual intervention is required. Superconducting materials cannot be exposed for the time being. Only robots can be used to replace those positions.

"I feel more and more mysterious," said Zhao Min.

"Then keep mystery." Chen Mo smiled.

In the constant temperature clean room, there are some special experimental equipment. High-precision instruments such as lithography machines and high-precision CNC machine tools.

High-precision material processing, precision to the micron level or even the nanoscale of the chip, the temperature difference of one degree Celsius, can greatly affect the accuracy of the material. The three people walked through the glass window and watched the robot wear a clean clothes to enter the dust-free laboratory to start work.

The marching ant company is stationed at the new headquarters, which is a big news. Caused people's attention, but did not cause a sensation. The new headquarters has been completed, which is a new beginning for the marching ant company.

chapters.title: Chapter 193: :Corporate Restructuring
chapters.body:
Chapter 193: :Corporate Restructuring

“This is the plan for the development of the company in the new year. The marching ant holding company has already registered, I will let the investment department find investment projects, and will actively invest in emerging industries and technologies in the future.”

Zhao Min put a report on Chen Mo's desk and began to elaborate his own ideas.

The marching ant company is famous in China, even in the world, but its influence and reputation are not matched. Foreign investment can tap talent and technical teams for the company, but it can also increase its influence.

Compared with the old giants, the marching ants are more like the upstarts who get rich overnight. There are a lot of money earned, but the influence and voice in the field are not as good as the old giants.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded.
