After the seismograph was sold, Chen Mo did not count the cash on the account of the marching ant. Too much money, you really should take some investment.

"The most important thing is that I am going to reorganize the company and integrate some of the businesses into a subsidiary of our company, so that these subsidiaries can grow independently." Zhao Min said.

The company now has a wide range of business. Including smart assistants, mobile phones, computers, seismographs, new materials, batteries, small lidars, driverless, office software, cloud computing, pharmaceuticals, advertising, etc.

The business is too general. If you continue to let the development go, it will be easy to end up, management is not good, problems are easy to occur, and management is imperative.

Chen Mo picked up the planning report and read it again. Knowing the content, Zhao Min also continued to introduce.

“The head office retains the main business of seismographs, smart assistants, mobile phones, computers, driverless, robots, cloud computing, etc., other businesses, and goes out independently. These businesses have very large competitiveness in their respective fields. There are specializations, like new materials and laser detectors. As long as they are properly managed, these businesses are growing faster than the head office."

Nowadays, the marching ant company, these businesses are all responsible for setting up a special department. Just like the eagle hiding under the eagle's wings, not that these departments are not good enough, but under the cover of the butterfly eye mobile phone, computer and seismographs, the big light will be buried.

Therefore, we will become an independent company and develop independently, and the income will be even greater. Let them fly out, in order to really fly, the head office can be mainly supported as backstage.

"Well, continue." Chen Mo nodded.

Seeing that Chen Mo did not oppose, Zhao Min was relieved.

The company's department is indeed too much too much. Under the market system, there are departments responsible for various businesses, the number has exceeded ten, and management is too much trouble.

After explaining the ideas one by one, Zhao Mincai stopped.

"Let go and do it," Chen Mo said.

Apart from a few major businesses, other businesses, he didn't care too much. Most of the company's funds are earned by several major businesses. There will be more technology in the future. Now it is only the beginning. It is very necessary to simplify the management of the company.

"Good." Zhao Min smiled softly. From the tone of Chen Mo, he could hear Chen Mo’s trust in her.

Leaving Chen Mo’s office and convening high-level personnel to meet and prepare for the company’s formal restructuring. After everything was properly arranged, the marching ant company entered the reorganization mode in the following days.

Xu Qiang walked into the competent office with a brisk pace, and he was in a very good mood.

Last year's salary plus bonus, plus the year-end award, let him successfully give the house a down payment, yesterday also bought the first car of life.

During the Chinese New Year, I went back. The former classmates knew that he was working in the army ant company, and he was envious and satisfied him with a little vanity.

"The rest of the supervisor, are you looking for me?" Xu Qiang asked.

“Yeah.” Zhou Wenbo put the documents aside and looked at Xu Qiang: “Xu Qiang, have you been in the company for more than a year?”

"Yes, the company has just arrived, it will come."

Xu Qiang was a little bit sighed. The current army ant company is completely different in scale when he first came in. The speed of development is even more terrifying than the rocket.

"This time, it performed well. This is the arrangement for you." Zhou Wenbo handed a document to Xu Qiang.

After seeing the content, Xu Qiang was a happy face.

Promoted.

After entering the company for more than a year, his work is very unstable. He has been mobilized in various positions. He did not expect to be promoted now. This is a surprise.

Now he is a bit fortunate. When the company was just started, the resignation tide, he did not leave, has the opportunity now.

"Thank you for your supervisor." Xu Qiang bowed.

The restructuring of the marching ant company is not small. Many excellent employees in the company have been upgraded. This is even more encouraging to the company's employees, as long as there are achievements, there is the possibility of promotion and salary increase.

The development space of the marching ant company is infinite. Being able to enter the management of the marching ant company is something that many employees dream of.

However, some people are happy that some people are jealous, and new materials and other businesses have to set up independent companies, so many people are embarrassed. Because it is the establishment of a new company, the original experienced staff, the position has a small increase, which makes them feel comfortable.

After a month, the various tasks of the company’s personnel transfer and restructuring also came to an end.

Under the president, the original president's office was maintained, and a decision-making committee was added, as well as a venture capital department directly managed by Zhao Min.

The vice president is Li Lingfeng and Zhu Li. The company optimizes the administrative system, the management system of the market system and production system, and sets the director and director. It is the minister and supervisor of each department.

The smallest changes are the financial system and the R&D system. In addition to the changes in positions, the personnel changes little.

The board of the marching ant holding company was appointed by Chen Mo as chairman, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu. However, this board of directors is only a symbolic meaning of the structure of the holding company. No matter how it changes, Chen Mo’s supremacy in the company is absolutely no challenge.

The new management structure has given the company a new look. Because some people used to develop new companies in the past, there were some new faces in the management of the company.

This is a change for the marching ant company.

"Not bad, a stable transition." Chen Mo put down the report in his hand. In the process of corporate restructuring, nothing happened, and management did not appear chaotic, which is very good.

Next to Chen Mo, Xiao Yu stood with a folder.

In name, she is Zhao Min's assistant, but she is also half of Chen Mo's secretary. Because of the special circumstances, only she can freely enter and exit Chen Mo's office and laboratory. Otherwise, Zhao Min wants to give the file to Chen Mo, that is, the robot is finished.

"The material you need has been sent to the first building." Xiaoyu handed the folder in his hand to Chen Mo.

Building No. 1 is the fast-moving area that Chen Mo has let out. It is temporarily not open to ordinary employees and is ready to replace the employees with robots. What is produced is not something that ordinary employees can know.

"Well, you go back to work first." Chen Mo glanced at the list of folders.

"B."

The little fisherman slammed and left Chen Mo’s office.

"Momgo, the first batch of superconducting chip samples have come out." Xiaoyu just left, the ink girl's voice appeared.

chapters.title: Chapter 194: : Robot Listed
chapters.body:
Chapter 194: : Robot Listed

On the way to the lab, Chen Mo looked forward.

Chip design, including iC design, simulation, chip architecture and algorithm design, are all done independently by the ink girl. This is the first time that artificial intelligence has been designed so independently. If it is released, it will definitely cause a huge shock.

Chen Mo is looking forward to the use of chips designed by Moto.

Ink has designed a total of four chips, including intelligent robot chips, mobile phone chips, computer chips and the most important supercomputer chips. Now is the first chip verification, intelligent robot chip.

The superconducting chip comes out and will be installed on the intelligent robot first to improve the working efficiency of the intelligent robot. Chen Mo promised that the ink woman said to help her create a good-looking body, and the intelligent robot chip design was successful, and this matter should also be put on the agenda.

After entering the laboratory, Chen Mo saw that there were more than a dozen two-centimeter square chips arranged on the experimental bench. The chip of the intelligent robot is much larger than the chip of the computer because of the complicated and high-speed non-logic operation.

Chen Mo looked at the chip carefully. This is unpackaged, and it is still different from ordinary chips. The surface of the ordinary chip has a metallic copper-gold luster, but this is a crystal-like bright luster.

These unpackaged chips are all damaged chips.

The carrier of the chip is still high-purity polysilicon, and the circuit carried inside the chip is not a copper wire used as a common chip, but a silicon carbide having a normal temperature superconductor material.

This small chip is more than two hundred and sixty steps before and after, and more than one thousand processes are coming out, which is the crystallization of the highest information technology.

For these chips, it takes a lot of effort.

"The yield of wafer test is 74%, this is the packaged sample, the best one, the third is the worst." A robot took three plastic boxes from the clean laboratory and handed it to Chen Mo. .

The number of processors in each box is not equal. The first class of processors is the least, only twenty, the three types of processors are the most, and the specific number, Chen Mo has no way to count.

Three types of chips, like Intel's i3, i5, and i7 processors, are similarly classified.

The i3 processor is one or two CPu damaged in the chip, but it can still work. The i5 is the normal working of the chip, the frequency is not high, and the i7 is a processor made of chips with no problem at all. These chips are the final test stage. Classified.

The packaged chip, 4 cm square, is a bit larger than the computer's processor and looks very delicate.

"These chips can be used normally, and the circuit design is no problem. This is a test report with detailed data." Another robot handed the folder in hand to Chen Mo.

Get the test report, Chen Mo carefully read it again.

The power consumption of the chip is one-eighth of that of a common chip, and the speed of processing data is nearly ninety times faster. No wonder so many countries and laboratories are desperately studying the room temperature superconducting materials.

Even the worst three types of superconducting chips here, the performance is dozens of times more powerful than the known computer processors.

For computers, these materials are completely revolutionary.

This piece of chip, if released, means that the room temperature superconducting chip is available. The sensation brought by this little thing is definitely more crazy than the sensation brought by the seismograph.

Now a medium-sized computer consumes 10 kilowatts of electricity per hour. So superconducting computers made entirely of superconducting materials can work normally with only one dry battery. This is the horror of superconducting computers.

To make a robot with superconducting materials, you don't have to worry about using the battery too fast.

There are too many things involved, too big. Except for himself, no one knows the existence of superconducting materials at room temperature, and he dares not to announce them.

"Intelligent robotic chips, two more batches, and then test the supercomputer's chips." Chen Mo said in a test report.

At present, the most important task is the production of superconducting computers. Superconducting computers are the first technology he has to complete. There are too many technologies waiting for him to discover in the science and technology library.

The superconducting chip is not ready for mass production, because it is temporarily impossible to go on the market, only a batch of chip making robots is needed, and the robot can be upgraded.

Inside the lab of the office area.

A robot is quietly lying on the test bench, and various lines are connected to the test instrument. The robot is similar to the enchantress robot, and is more cool than the enchantress robot. It is the 2.0 version of the enchanting robot.

This is an upgraded version of the robot for mounting superconducting chips.

Install the superconducting chip into the robot, turn on the power, and the robot's eyes will light up. After ten seconds of no movement, the robot then sat up from the bench.

"Mer. Brother." What appears in the robot is the voice of the ink girl.

"How?" Chen Mo asked.

"The calculation and running speed is faster than before. My algorithm can run barely on this chip, the processor won't burn, but the board can be burned in less than half an hour, and the robot can only be controlled by commands." On the test bench, walk around in the lab.

“The board is not made of superconducting materials. When you make your body, use full superconducting materials,” says Chen Mo.

Now the procedure of the ink girl, and when it was first created, is two appearances.

In addition to the smart architecture is that skeleton, the other changes are great. The ink girl learns through the machine and constantly improves, like a child who grows up slowly.

So now the general processor, can not run the ink girl, can only accept her instructions.

On the 1st floor, the room temperature superconducting materials are continuously being synthesized, and small batch production has begun. The components of the superconducting computer are also being produced, and the information of the supercomputer is also sorted out by Chen Mo. As long as the chip test of the supercomputer is completed, the superconducting computer can be assembled.

The second generation of robots has come out, and the first generation of robots is also on the market.

Zhao Min put down the documents in his hands and left the office. The company just reorganized and some of the business is coordinating the handover, so there are relatively many recent things.

It was a bit of a surprise to Chen Mo’s sudden call.

Just entering Chen Mo's office, the newly painted robot immediately caught her attention. There is a clear difference between this robot and the previous robot.

Sitting on the sofa opposite Chen Mo, Zhao Min said: "Is this a new robot?"

"Yes, this is the second generation of robots, freshly baked." Chen Mo nodded.

"You summon me with a big summoning, there are important things." Zhao Min carefully looked at the new type of robot.

"What happened to the listing of robots?"

Upon hearing the listing of the robot, Zhao Min immediately came to the spirit: "The procedures have been completed long ago, the production batch number has been obtained, can be produced at any time, ready to go public?"

"Listing!" Chen Mo affirmed.

Zhao Min laughed. After the robot came out, she looked forward to the day of listing and kept waiting for Chen Mo.

The robot will be the first product released by their company in the new year.

chapters.title: Chapter 195: : Saudi Prince
chapters.body:
Chapter 195: : Saudi Prince

"Outside, outside the number, the marching ant company released an advertising video of the intelligent robot."

In a studio of online media, the glasses man jumped excitedly from the chair. The next moment, the entire studio was surrounded.

This is the first time that the marching ant company has entered the new headquarters. This great company is now a bit quiet and will be of concern to all.

"Hello everyone, I am very happy to meet you. I am a smart robot demon of the marching ant company. I can be your personal assistant, babysitter butler, health consultant, translator. I can drink tea, do housework, provide health. Life advice, proficient in 58 languages. I will be your loyal companion, do you need me?"

"It's really." In the studio, a singer and a man glare: "I feel the world of science fiction movies, so close to me."

"Will there be a machine crisis in the movie, like the robots in the public enemy of the machine produce consciousness and betray humans." The thinnest man of several people spoke.

"The mediocrity is self-interesting. These things are not what we should worry about." The glasses man stared straight at the computer screen.

"Hurry forward, forward and read again, earn clicks."

"Good." The glasses man did not say anything, and forwarded the advertisement of the marching ant company to the news public number of the studio.

Contains common sense of life, encyclopedia, more than a dozen medical books, parenting manuals, recipes, singing, chatting, proficiency in 58 world mainstream languages.

The short video of the enchantress robot advertisement spread out on the official website of the army ant company and the official microblog, which immediately caused a sensation, which led to the crazy forwarding of the major news media.

Concerns about the mechanical crisis, once again on the dust.

People used to think that robots betray humans is still far away, but now it has become very close, and intelligent robots are about to appear in human life.

There was no product launch conference for this time, and there was no warning. The advertisement video of this intelligent robot was suddenly announced, which surprised many people.

Is the marching ant company ready to go public?

When the intelligent robot was exposed to the Internet conference, it was exposed. The enchanting robot at that time caused vibrations at home and abroad.

The marching ant company is preparing to list the enchantress robot, which is a big news. This kind of robot, which only exists in science fiction movies, is now a reality.

"This is more reliable than the girlfriend, the girlfriend will not do anything, and will inexplicably lose his temper, at least the robot will reason, but the following is solid, how to break?"

"Be careful, brother, I suggest you buy one back, then tie up an airplane cup."

"Oh... Marx has limited my imagination. Now I am full of pictures. I just want to know, what is the price?"

In the official comments, there are various biased comments, but most people want to know an answer.

What is the price of the robot?

On this issue, the marching ant company quickly gave the answer, the enchanting robot unified price of 4.88 million, want to buy a robot, must be booked in advance to the marching ant company.

When the price comes out, it is awkward, and the average person is much colder.

"The price of the demon is nearly 5 million, who can afford it?"

"If the price is 500,000 and the factory assembly line is 80% workers, it is time to go home and stay."

"Poverty limits your imagination, a bottle of perfume is 3 million, let alone this black technology intelligent robot?"

"Single dogs, no longer work hard, dolls can't afford it."

"It's not free for the five girls, or 800 pieces of poor service quality, or 1000 dolls are not easy to use, so you can't think of it, want to buy 4.88 million machine girlfriends."

......

The news that the marching ant company released the intelligent robot appeared on social networks abroad soon. For a time, it caused a huge sensation.

The topic of robots was discussed by the whole people, and it was once again caused by the advertisement of robots issued by the marching ant company. It’s just that this robot is not affordable for the average person.

For remarks that the robot is too expensive, someone immediately refutes it.

If the price is too low, being ordered by the owner of the assembly line factory will cause unemployment, and it will become a social problem by then.

This high-tech product is too costly to be used. There is one after another about robot discussions. Now is the time to face the problem of robots.

When the world is busy, there is a place that is very lively.

Headquarters Ant Nest, Building One.

Here, it is one of the most mysterious places of the marching ant company.

The employees of the entire marching ant company have no more than three people who have the right to enter the first building. It is even more mysterious than the underground research institute of the Army Ant Company, second only to Chen Mo’s private laboratory.

The building is closed and not open to the public.

Even if someone is watching from the outside, they can't see any movement in the first building.

It is also the most secure place for marching ants.

On the outskirts of the building, there are security guards carefully selected from the retired military personnel, and a strict intelligent security system. It is almost impossible for outsiders to want to be close to the No. 1 building.

Inside the building, Chen has a variety of laboratory equipment, fully automatic CNC machine tools. This is a production plant of the marching ant company, but the products produced are a bit special.

Robot assembly, normal temperature superconductor material synthesis and superconducting computer assembly are all performed here.

The workers who work here are all robots.

All experimental equipment is controlled by robots and ink girls. Once Chen Mo needs experimental products, here will be the first time to make the benefits of robot control. It is not exhausted. When there is no electricity, it will be automatically charged. It will be taken over by other robots and will not stop for 24 hours.

Chen Mo is now in the basement of Building One. In his hand, holding a small chip.

This is not a chip of an intelligent robot, but a chip of a supercomputer. With the efforts of the robot for 24 hours without stopping work, the chip of the supercomputer finally came out.

The efficiency of robots is much higher than the efficiency of human beings, which is why humans are afraid of jobs being taken away by robots.

In front of him, there is a cabinet slightly larger than the double-door refrigerator, pure black, with the logo of the marching ant company, and it is not stained. This black chassis is a cabinet for a supercomputer.

The assembly of the superconducting computer has begun, and it takes a while for the distance to succeed. Around the various robots cooperate with each other to assemble the cabinet. The room temperature superconducting material synthesized in the whole building No. 1 is almost used in the circuit of the superconducting computer, which is extravagant.

If the material experts know that Chen Mo is so ruined at room temperature superconducting materials, he will definitely cut him with a knife. Only the horrible cash of the marching ant company dared to be so capricious.

When watching the robot assemble the cabinet, the ink girl informed him that Zhao Min called.

"Boss, you are in the first building." On the other end of the phone, the voice of a mature woman who was unique to Zhao Min.

"Yes, what's the matter?" Chen Mo asked.

"There was a phone call from the Middle East. Two days later, Prince Walid of Saudi Arabia will come to Binhai City and want to see you."

chapters.title: Chapter 196: : Ashes Local Tyrants
chapters.body:
Chapter 196: : Ashes Local Tyrants

Three Boeing 747s form a hunting lineup and enter China's airspace. The interior of the plane is decorated with splendor and extravagance, like a flying palace.

Inside the air giant, eleven people sat at the conference table.

Sitting in the first seat of the conference table is a middle-aged man. The hair is gray, wide forehead, black word Hu, a big skull under the corner of the mouth, black dress and tie, very spiritual and majestic.

He is known as the Arab Buffett, the Saudi prince Walid, known as the Middle East stock god, a few people in the world who can open a check of 100 million yuan.

When he was 5 years old, he was exiled to Egypt with his father. Later he was allowed to return to China. At the age of 22, he got his father's $15,000 and started his legendary investment career.

It is now the chairman of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, the largest individual shareholder of Citigroup, a shareholder of world-class large group companies such as Twitter, Apple, Disney, Time Warner, Amazon, Four Seasons.

In the field of investment, he and Buffett are two myths of the East and the West. They have a deep personal relationship with Buffett and are known as the richest in the Middle East.

Under his name, there is an Airbus Airbus A380 and three Boeing aircraft, a luxury yacht built for $600 million. At the same time as the extravagance of life, it is also an undisputed philanthropist.

A man who, in the eyes of outsiders, has almost perfect conditions and experience.

At this time, Walid’s eyes were calm and majestic, and from time to time they swept to the other ten people on the conference table. These ten people were his think tanks.

Everyone at the conference table didn't dare to have any slack. They all know that this workaholic boss is a very authoritarian person.

There is only one topic at this time - the marching ant company.

In front of each of them, there are information about Chen Mo and Zhao Min, as well as detailed information on the development of the marching ant company.

One of the purposes of coming to Binhai City this time is to join the marching ant company. This marching ant has already broken into his investment list, but he has never been able to find an opportunity.

"From the current situation, the marching ant company will not agree to our shareholding in the army ant company." One of the middle-aged people wearing glasses and looks at Sven said: "Based on the data, the marching ant company is the world's most cash-rich company. Only the seismometer, which is worth more than 10 billion US dollars, they are not short of money."

Walid's previous investments are good at investing in companies that have potential but are short of funds.

The investment of Citibank, which originally invested in his fame and fortune, was when Citibank needed funds urgently. The marching ant company does not have any financial problems, and there is more cash than they do. At this time, money cannot solve the problem.

"There is another way, such as helping marching ants enter the international market in exchange for shares," Walid said. His share of the marching ant company is inevitable, so this time he will personally go to Binhai.

"According to our judgment, this..."

"Stop, I am not the answer to negate. I hire you, so that you can find the possibility in the impossible, instead of letting you give me a light answer." Walid said seriously: "I will take a shower first. Give me a viable plan before the plane landed."

After that, Walid got up and left the meeting room, leaving the think tank below.

Outside the Binhai Municipal Airport, fifty new BMWs were neatly arranged outside the airport. This lineup shocked the people they saw.

Many people sent photos of this scene to a circle of friends.

This luxurious scene has made the media in Binhai City feel the wind.

In the waiting of many reporters, three planes landed at Binhai Airport. Not long after, Walid walked out of the airport with numerous bodyguards and entered the middle BMW.

"Mom, no one." The people who saw this scene couldn't help but swear, even if these dozens of BMWs were rented, they were still terrible.

"That is the Saudi prince Walid, the richest man in the Middle East. He leads three Boeing planes every time he travels. His Airbus has not come, or you will know what is called the local tyrant. The domestic 'poor people' who show off the wealth give him The shoes don't match." A person who recognized Walid next to him said.

The reporters who saw this scene were ecstatic, holding a camera and shooting.

The Middle East stocks visited the city of Binhai, which is definitely a sensational news.

The marching ant company just released the intelligent robot, the Middle East local tyrant, who is going to visit Binhai City. There is no doubt that it is related to the marching ant company.

After a while, dozens of BMW cars left the airport and went to the hotel.

"Walid arrived, this time with three planes and a 76-member entourage, rented 50 new BMWs, wrapped the entire Marina Hotel, and is now on the way to the Grand Hotel, have not contacted us." Zhao Min entered Chen Mo’s office and said to Chen Mo, who was sitting in a chair and studying.

"It's really uninhabited, and poverty limits my imagination." When Chen Mo heard Zhao Min's words, he couldn't help but vomit.

His words made Zhao Min turn his eyes.

"You know that words out of your mouth, how I wanted to hit you?"

"You can't beat me." Chen Mo shook his head and said: "Go back to the truth."

Zhao Min looked a whole lot and didn't make any more jokes. This visit to Walid is a key point. I just said that I saw Chen Mo and did not say the true intention of the visit.

"I guess that the purpose of their coming here is likely to be two."

"Talk."

Chen Mo led Zhao Min to sit down on the sofa and handed a cup of tea to her.

Zhao Min took a sip of tea and handed the information in his hand to Chen Mo: "This is Walid's information."

Chen Mo looked around and put the information aside. When Zhao Min said that Walid wanted to see him, he asked the ink girl to collect the information. He would recite it. The legendary word to describe this person is definitely not wrong.

"He is an investment genius, starting from $15,000, bold and decisive. The oil crisis triggered by the Iran-Iraq war, the oil invested in his price soared. Iraq’s invasion of the Kuwait war made him full of real estate.

At the end of the war, the first barrel of gold was obtained by selling the land. The final investment in the Saudi commercial bank and investment in Citibank has truly established his position as a world-class rich. His investment eyes are extremely sharp. This time, the first purpose is no doubt that he wants to join the marching ant company. ”

Walid’s legendary experience, even Zhao Min had to admire. And Walid's crazy work, flying a dozen countries to talk about business in a few days, this level of madness, her work madman is self-satisfied.

"I am afraid that he will return empty-handed this time. The shares of the marching ant company will not be sold." Chen Mo said.

"I know that he won't go empty-handed, so this time, he definitely has a second purpose, maybe he wants to buy our smart robot.

However, in other cooperation, there is no space for maneuvering. His network of resources is huge enough to exceed our imagination. If you can, you can use his network of resources to let our company's products enter the international market. As long as he has the money to earn, he will not earn. Zhao Min smiled.

The last butterfly-eye phone was blocked in Europe, delaying their entry into the international market. This incident made her feel worried, and if there is an opportunity, she will never give up the opportunity to continue to enter the international arena.

"Before preparing, they should contact us soon. I have always heard of the local tyrants in the Middle East. This time I can finally open my eyes." Chen Mo said half-jokingly: "I heard that he is the Diamond King, do you have... ..."

When Chen Mo’s words were half, they shut up in Zhao Min’s murderous eyes. Going on, it is estimated that his boss must be torn away.

"Reassured, I am giving you a lover, and I will not look at an old man who has been married for four times and has been married for four times. Little brother." Zhao Min smiled and smiled and stood away, leaving a dumbfounded Chen Mo.

"Day, I didn't hear anything about it just now?" Chen Mo looked back at Zhao Min's back and looked depressed.

chapters.title: Chapter 197: :Cooperation
chapters.body:
Chapter 197: :Cooperation

Walid’s visit to Binhai is not a small matter. This Middle Eastern stock god, the ashes-level local tyrant, has been familiar with it because of yesterday’s report.

Leading three planes to Binhai, this lineup, Walid's most classic hunting lineup. The only city in the coastal city worthy of the Middle East local tyrants is undoubtedly the marching ant company.

Many reporters got the news and waited outside the headquarters of the marching ant company.

Not long after, a fleet of 50 BMWs appeared in the eyes of everyone. This scene caused some people's commotion, holding a mobile phone and camera, madly shooting against the team.

A fleet of fifty new BMWs is rare. Many reporters can only watch the team enter the park of the marching ant company on the side of the road and cannot get closer.

Entering the park, Walid just got off the car and Zhao Min greeted him with an intelligent robot.

"Hello, Mr. Walid, welcome to the marching ant company."

Zhao Min reached out with a professional smile and was very generous. Just finished, Walid’s accompanying translators spoke.

"Hello, Ms. Zhao Min." Walid reached out and shook Zhaomin. When Zhao Min’s robot opened his mouth to translate his words, Walid’s face showed curiosity: “Is this your company’s intelligent robot?”

"Yes, Mr. Walid." After the robot was translated, Zhao Min nodded with a smile.

Walid looked at the robot and was more interested in his eyes. He reached out directly to the robot: "Hello."

"Hello, Mr. Walid, I am the first generation of intelligent robot demon in the marching ant company, I am very happy to shake hands with you."

The robot has no temperature, just like holding a plastic, which makes Walid feel weird, shaking hands with the robot for the first time.

In the information of the marching ant company, there is an introduction about the enchantress robot, but it is only limited to the description of the text and the advertisement video. It is true that this intelligent robot is as smart as the legend.

“What is the function of this robot?” Walid asked.

"The little goblins are in 58 languages. For you, the demon is your best companion. When you go abroad, the demon can replace your translator's position."

When the robot’s words just fell, the translators around Walid’s face were black, and they were more uncomfortable than swallowing a little. He understood the words of the demon, and a robot actually opened his job, and it was against the sky.

"Mr. Walid, let's go in and talk."

Zhao Min's body was slightly side-by-side, and he took the lead and walked over to the main building of the headquarters with Walid.

On the road, thirty-six robots were queued neatly as a team to meet. Following the scalp of Walid's bodyguard, it feels like walking into a science fiction movie, and I am really afraid that these robots will suddenly start.

The attention on Walid Road is on the robot. He has seen everything in the market, but it was the first time that he was welcomed by so many robots.

The reception room of the marching ant company is spacious enough, and the decorative style is mainly based on the plain tone, which is elegant and elegant. When Zhao Min led Walid to come over, Chen Mo and Xiao Yu had already waited at the entrance of the reception room.

"Hello, Mr. Walid, long-awaited, I am honored to see you today."

Chen Mo is wearing a black formal dress, with a smile and a hand out, not humble or humble, calm and calm, giving people a bright feeling.

"I have also heard the name of Mr. Chen Mo's genius for a long time." Walid smiled and shook hands with Chen Mo, and hugged gently.

After simple greetings, all the talents are seated. Zhao Min and Xiao Yu, and a robot were present. Walid also had two think tanks and a translator.

"Mr. Chen Mo, are you interested in entering the investment industry?" Walid smiled and said.

“I like research more than investment,” Chen Mo said.

"We are all the same kind of people." Walid smiled and did not surprise this answer: "All like our work."

"Yes." Chen Mo did not deny.

"Mr. Chen, do you want to develop your company more?" After the guest set, Walid entered the topic.

The last time he was caught by a government on the grounds of anti-corruption, he lost a lot, and finally came out. Now he needs a reliable investment. The marching ant company is the first target to aim.

"Of course I think." Chen Mo said: "What advice does Mr. Walid have?"

“There are indeed, we can try to cooperate. I am proficient in investment, you are proficient in research, we join forces, I believe that it will not take long for the marching ant company to be known around the world.”

Chen Mo and Zhao Min looked at each other and said: "How to cooperate?" Chen Mo did not show any objection.

"You are a shareholder of my oil company and bank. I am a shareholder of your marching ant company and exchange of shares."

Walid stared at Chen Mo's eyes and saw his reaction. The two think tanks with Walid also stared at Chen Mo, as long as they can see any hope from Chen Mo, they will chase after victory.

"I don't understand oil investment and bank investment, so I don't have much interest."

Chen Mo directly refused, and the shares of the marching ant company will never be put out. Even if he can control the company, he will not do so.

The transfer of equity is to send money to the capitalist. It is impossible for him to work hard for those capitalists.

Once this mouth is opened, more and more people will come over. The people who stare at the meat of the marching ant company are not ordinary people. As long as those people see a little hope, they will be in trouble.

“When Hua Wei, Apple, Umbrella, Penguin, iDg came to me, they ended up empty-handed. If Mr. Walid is also coming for this purpose, I am afraid I will return empty-handed.”

Walid stopped and did not go any further. He knew that Chen Mo would refuse, but he did not expect it to be so simple.

“There is no possibility of cooperation?” After a while, Walid spoke.

“Yes.” Chen Mo said: “Our butterfly-eye phone wants to be international, is Mr. Walid interested?”

Walid looked at Chen Mo, he wanted to see through this young and talented genius, but Chen Mo's calmness with his age did not find any useful information.

"Telecommunication industry, I don't have much resources. But I can help you to represent the robot." Walid smiled and answered: "You robot, very interesting, I like it very much."

Walid did not agree with Chen Mo’s proposal, but instead directed the topic to the robot that was being translated to Chen Mo.

"Telecom industry, I don't have many resources, but I know a lot of rich people. This robot is very good, you give me robots in batches, channel prices, we do agents, sell robots."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo and nodded slightly. Although the proposal to enter the international market has not been promised, the proposal of this robot is not bad.

"This is a good proposal." Chen Mo smiled.

"Then we can talk in detail."

From the marching ant company, it was already the afternoon. After getting into the car, Walid looked back at the headquarters building of the marching ant company.

"Boss, why don't you agree to their mobile agent?" Back at the hotel, the think tank around them said: "This is a good opportunity to cooperate with the marching ant company."

Walid looked at the think tank around him and shook his head slightly: "Others can cooperate, and this matter cannot cooperate."

“Why?” another think tank asked strangely.

chapters.title: Chapter 198: : Exclusive Food?
chapters.body:
Chapter 198: : Exclusive Food?

"There is not much telecom resources. This is just an excuse. Walid does not want to cooperate with us on mobile phones."

In Chen Mo’s office, Chen Mo, Zhao Min and Xiao Yu were sitting on the sofa.

Zhao Min looked confused.

Judging from the response of Walid, the other party said that the telecommunications industry is under-resourced and it is completely perfunctory. At least on the mobile phone, they are not willing to cooperate with the marching ant company.

Since the rejection of Europe, they are not in the international market, no big telecommunications companies are willing to cooperate with them, which is very strange.

"They want to cooperate with us, the mobile phone industry is the best direction of cooperation. Walid's rejection, beyond my expectations, also makes me very confused." Zhao Min shook his head.

She is preparing to split the mobile phone business from the company and enter the international market, and the results are unexpected.

Xiao Yu is sitting on the side, can't insert words, can only make tea for two people.

After taking the teacup handed over by Xiaoyu, Chen Mo said: "They refused to be normal, because we and they are not all the way."

“The marching ant company has broken the rules and in some areas cannot cooperate.”

"They break the rules?" The two think tanks around Walid looked confused.

"Single food?" One of them was surprised and said.

"Yes." Walid nodded gently.

Last time he opened a cruise party in Paris. Among the old friends, there was France Telecom’s CEO Richard. When talking, I talked about the marching ant company. Westerners are afraid of a consortium like Samsung, and they will compete for their interests. They must find ways to tear the marching ants, otherwise they will restrict their development.

The two think tanks immediately understood what he was going to say.

Huaxia Company is jealous, and the big reason is that those companies are state-owned enterprises. Some companies have been acquired and the whole piece of meat is Chinese.

This is the case with the marching ant company. Once they are allowed to enter the market, the meat they eat will not be separated at all.

Moreover, the marching ants are in China, not in the world controlled by Western capital, and have the official protection of China. When the Westerners’ tentacles pass, they will be cut off, so they can’t do anything with marching ants.

The financial world, the entire Western countries, various consortia, families, groups, companies, are inextricably linked.

Each has its own shares in the hands of the other company, which is the exchange of interests.

The shares of the marching ant company are only in the hands of Chen Mo. He is not willing to spit out part of the company's shares and interests. This circle will not accept him. This is the rule.

Therefore, the marching ants can stand at the top of China, and it is temporarily impossible to really step out of this circle.

"But sooner or later they will step out of this circle. This company can't stop them. We will work with them first and it will be good for us." Think about it, the think tank with glasses on the left.

"We have already cooperated with them, aren't we?" Walid said: "The sales of robots are also cooperation. The cooperation in telecommunications is not yet available."

Huaxia Li Chaoren holds BT, and Huawei's communication base stations are located in all corners of Europe. These companies are the best partners of the marching ants, but they have not cooperated with the marching ants.

There is no marching ant company shares, there is no long-term interest, no one will provoke this drowning.

The market of the mobile phone industry is so big, Samsung, Apple, and China Micro are the majority. The marching ants jumped out, and the first to suffer was definitely Apple. The Americans would not agree.

Walid also holds a stake in Apple. He won't find himself uncomfortable without getting a stake in the army ant company.

Once they help the marching ant mobile phones enter the international market, they have to face a lot of opponents, and there is no long-term interest, he will not take risks. The marching ant company did not succeed, and there was the Huaxia market. If he did not succeed, he would offend many people.

The robotics field does not touch the interests of other companies, so it can cooperate. Just like a seismograph, if a marching ant company is willing to cooperate with the outside world, all the companies in the world will want to cooperate with it.

Walid summoned the encumbered think tank and entered the conference room.

"We will cooperate with the marching ant company for robot sales. We will negotiate cooperation tomorrow, and you will prepare a plan for me to determine the trading method and accept the price."

Everyone began to enter an urgent discussion stage. Walid needs efficiency, and it is efficient. They can often visit more than a dozen countries within a few days.

The marching ants are not idle here. The team responsible for the robotics business also worked overtime and began to prepare for tomorrow's negotiations.

Early the next morning, Walid led his think tank and appeared again in the marching ant company. The executives of the Marketing Department of the Army Ant Company were all present.

"What about Mr. Chen Mo?" Walid asked Zhao Min.

"The boss is doing research in the laboratory, business affairs, he has given me the responsibility to do it." Zhao Min said.

"Then let's get started." Walid did not care, followed Zhao Min into the conference room: "General Zhao, I want exclusive rights in the Middle East."

"Yes," said Zhao Min.

What they mean is to give Walid a proxy in the Middle East. Walid is the first to work with them, and this can give priority. In other regions, it is not possible to give exclusive agency rights.

"Zhao is really refreshing," Walid said. "Then I will start talking about the price now."

After last night, the entire think tank's argument, the exclusive agency in the Middle East, is the biggest bottom line for marching ants.

“2.5% agency fee,” Walid said.

"1%." Zhao Min immediately responded: "Mr. Walid, we are all people in the circle, we should understand that this agency fee is impossible."

"Do you not say that China is bargaining?" Walid did not care: "Mr. Zhao Min, we are all refreshing, 2%, which is a good start for cooperation between the two sides."

"1.3%, this agency fee is released, many people will rush to ask, you are the exclusive agent in the Middle East, this is already a very refreshing start, but also 2%, this business is very bad." Zhao Min does not Said slowly.

Walid stopped and looked at Zhao Min quietly. After a while, I said: "We take a step back, 1.8%."

"No, up to 1.35%."

"Ms. Zhao Min, can't you compare us to an ordinary agency? This agency fee is too low."

Both sides are testing the other side's bottom line. They all have the intention of cooperation. This list must be discussed within today.

After an hour, the two parties confirmed all the terms and the negotiations were completely completed. 1.51%, the first deposit of 300 million US dollars, this fee was finalized by both parties.

"Mr. Walid, finally confirm it, if there is no problem, you can sign it."

Zhao Min handed the printed agreement and appendix to Walid, in duplicate, and both parties began to confirm the terms of the agreement.

"The first batch of 200, give me as soon as possible, the sooner the better, preferably within a month." After Walid confirmed the agreement, he did not want to, directly signed.

"So anxious?" Zhao Min finally confirmed the agreement.

"Yes, because these 200 are my own use." Walid said with a smile.

trench!

chapters.title: Chapter 199: : You Have Never Seen A Train Puncture.
chapters.body:
Chapter 199: : You Have Never Seen A Train Puncture.

"Sure enough, it is a local tyrant."

After listening to Xiao Yu, Chen Mo could not help but scream. Buying 200 robots by one person is a world-class local tyrant.

"I also said that I have no interest, and you have no interest." Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo's tongue and couldn't help but laugh: "Now the contract between the two parties has been completed, ready to hold a brief press conference, Zhao Jie let you and Mr. Walid. attend."

"The girl who has no interest, leading the way ahead." Chen Mo patted Xiao Yu's head and said.

The press conference was a special venue at the Ant Colony Headquarters. The layout was very simple. Many media reporters have already waited at the venue, seeing Chen Mo and Walid appear in the venue, and the crowd is turbulent.

The shutter sounds of various cameras and flashes are brighter than the lights.

Also eye-catching, there is a enchantress robot that follows the two. When the two were present, the venue immediately fell silent.

Every reporter’s eyes are full of curiosity, and they all want to know what the cooperation between Walid and the marching ant company is.

The marching ant company was established for so long, and this is the first foreign company to reach a strategic cooperation with the marching ant company.

"Mr. Chen Mo, come here." Walid smiled and smiled.

Chen Mo heard the translation of the robot, slightly sympathetic, and welcome.

“I am very honored to introduce to you that our company has added a strategic partner, Kingdom Holdings Group. The company under the Kingdom Holdings Group will be the sole agent of the enchanting robot in the Middle East.

Mr. Walid has always been an admirable figure, and we have something in common in many places. It is our pleasure to cooperate with Mr. Walid this time. In the future, the marching ant company will deepen cooperation with Wang Guo Holding Group in other aspects..."

The exclusive agent of the enchantress robot in the Middle East? Some reporters immediately focused on the key points.

After Chen Mo introduced it, Walid also began to speak.

"The marching ant company is a great company. I believe that everyone agrees with me. Mr. Chen Mo is the best genius I have ever seen. The biggest benefit of coming to Binhai is not getting the enchantress. The agency of the robot, but established a deep friendship with Mr. Chen Mo, and the people of the marching ant company..."

Walid’s words were translated by the robot and immediately robbed of the limelight. After the enchantress robot was an advertisement, the first exposure was in front of the public, and it was unexpected to appear as a journalist. This actual debut is more useful than advertising.

The translator who followed Walid was suffering. Once the enchanting robot is widely popular, the work of his translator can be replaced at any time.

"The Demon Ji robot is by far the best intelligent robot I have ever seen. It is more intelligent than any robot I have ever seen. This is an epoch-making product. I personally have purchased 200 robots."

puff!

Some reporters were caught by their own saliva and tried to cough.

Local tycoon!

What is called local tyrants, the people who show off the rich on the Internet and these senior local tyrants are simply pure poor people.

Walid’s face is calm and seems to be a very common thing: “I personally feel that the price of the enchanting robot is very cheap.”

Very cheap! Cheap!

When the robot translated Walid, it almost made many reporters think that the translation was wrong. They first heard someone say that the enchantress robot is cheap.

"Invisible. Forced the most deadly." A reporter could not help but vomit.

"This dress. Forced, I give full marks."

"It is estimated that there is another stalk after the repentance of Ali Ma's father."

A group of media people can't bear to look straight, they can't afford a robot for a lifetime, and they are said to be very cheap.

After the press conference, the news of the cooperation between the marching ant company and the Kingdom Holding Group was also seen in the network.

Walid's holding of the Kingdom Holdings Group, the company's exclusive agency in the Middle East. This news caught the attention of companies in major regions.

Intelligent robots are now a completely blank market. For the business world, this is a new cake. Whoever gets advanced will get more benefits.

The marching ant company took the big benefit of the cake, but the general company, a share of the pie, can get a lot of benefits.

Walid, who is known as the "middle-east god", will certainly not be a loss-making business. For a time, people who came into contact with the marching ant company came to the scene.

“Is the assembly speed of the robot enough to satisfy the market?”

Zhao Min handed the document to Chen Mo from the laboratory.

During this time, the company has a lot of things. In Southeast Asia, Europe, South America, and India, many companies are in contact with us to obtain exclusive regional rights for intelligent robots.

People in the marketing department are negotiating with major companies.

“50 machines a day, can this production speed meet the market demand?” Chen Mo asked.

"There is a period of explosive growth in the near term, and it is likely to increase production. Walid is not his own. The first batch of orders will cost 2,000. This is the first batch. According to our expectations, this order can only be used. It can be digested by the Saudi royal family, and there will be more follow-up."

"What is a senior local tyrant? This is." Chen Mo could not help but vomit: "All said that the local tyrants in the Middle East are everywhere, today is intuitive."

"You have never seen a train puncture." Zhao Min saw Chen Mo's appearance and felt funny.

"I have never seen it, what is the train puncture?" Chen Mo smiled.

Zhao Min is speechless: "Going back to the world, the Middle East, North America, Europe and China are the main markets. In North America, the US Department of Commerce does not allow us to enter the market, saying it is a spy robot, and the US media has also promoted this."

"Crap."

Chen Mo is serious, jokes are jokes, and when he encounters business, he still needs to take it seriously.

The US government has always been unfriendly to China's enterprises, and everything is linked to politics, that is, they are afraid of occupying the market.

"Don't pay attention to the North American market. Anyway, the current production is not enough. Just let them block it and see when they can block it. It will not give up the US market." Chen Mo said.
